Description:
Unlocking luxury travel

Name: RivetStays
Description:
Founded in January 2023, RivetStays quickly rose to prominence as a premium short-term rental provider in Toronto, ON. With a foundation built on managing over 30,000 bookings since 2016, our founders bring deep expertise in hospitality, ensuring exceptional guest satisfaction and reliable, seamless stays.

Our mission is simple yet profound—to provide exceptional guest satisfaction, reliable and seamless stays, and consistently professional service. We believe that every guest deserves to feel at home, even when they’re away from home.

At RivetStays, we blend the dependability of a hotel with the comforts of home. Every unit is equipped with fully stocked kitchens, extra linens, high-speed Wi-Fi, and thoughtful amenities like toiletries. Whether you’re here for a short visit or an extended stay, each detail is curated to make you feel truly at home.

To our property owners, we promise maximum revenue and minimum stress by expertly managing their properties with care and efficiency.

Name: Senator Hotels & Resorts
Description:
Senator Hotels & Resorts es una empresa hotelera familiar con más de 57 años de trayectoria y sede en Roquetas de Mar, Almería. En nuestro portafolio de marcas encontrará: Playa Hoteles, con establecimientos vacacionales para familias en primera línea de costa; la línea de ocio urbano y cosmopolita Senator Hotels; y los establecimientos Affiliated by Senator, hoteles afiliados que poseen su carácter propio y también el sello de calidad de Senator Hotels & Resorts. En 2025 además contamos con una nueva línea de gestión hotelera con Brand Partners que nos permite gestionar establecimientos con un gran estándar de calidad bajo marcas reconocidas mundialmente.

¿Te gustaría formar parte de esta gran familia? Consulta nuestras vacantes de empleo en https://empleo.senatorhr.com/

Senator Hotels & Resorts is a family-owned hotel company with more than 57 years of experience and headquartered in Roquetas de Mar, Almeria. In our portfolio of brands you will find: Playa Hoteles, with family vacation establishments on the seafront; the urban and cosmopolitan leisure line Senator Hotels; and the Affiliated by Senator establishments, affiliated hotels that have their own character and also the Senator Hotels & Resorts seal of quality. Name: The Oberoi, Gurgaon
Description:
Located in the prime business and shopping district of Gurgaon - The Oberoi, Gurgaon is the ultimate destination for contemporary style and luxury. Spread over nine acres of lush landscaping and soothing water features, the unique architecture of the hotel enhances the inimitable indulgence of the experience. Space, serenity, and Oberoi Hotels’ legendary service delivered by caring staff make this hotel the only choice for discerning business and leisure travellers in Gurgaon.

The Oberoi, Gurgaon is 100% solar powered for all electricity needs 

Ranked No.1 Hotel in India - Travellers’ Choice Awards 2022 by TripAdvisor

Name: Grand Hyatt Abu Dhabi Hotel & Residences Emirates Pearl
Description: Grand Hyatt Abu Dhabi is a 5 star luxury hotel and events venue offering awe-inspiring design and extraordinary architecture. Located in the West Corniche district of Abu Dhabi, the iconic hotel offers 428 rooms, suites and residences, each with stunning views over the Gulf. The hotel features a range of elegant restaurants, a temperature-controlled infinity pool overlooking the marina and extensive wellness facilities.

Name: JW Marriott Hotel & Residences Nairobi
Description:
When looking for top hotels in Nairobi, Kenya, ensuring you find somewhere with everything you need and a reputation for delivering exceptional experiences should be a high priority. 

At JW Marriott Nairobi, world-class amenities and a convenient location on Chiromo Lane deliver this and more. We allow you to pursue your passions in style. 

The iconic hotel tower with magical views of the city offers proximity to top local attractions, as well as a variety of experiences on-site. Our hotel features 315 luxurious guest rooms, 51 serviced apartments, and outstanding event and business facilities. We also offer carefully curated restaurants and bars, and a haven of health and relaxation at the luxurious Spa by JW. The beauty of the African Savannah coupled with elegant design and incredible experiences on your doorstep makes JW Marriott Hotel Nairobi a perfect destination. 

As a luxury hotel in Nairobi, we make sure your stay here is everything you want it to be, whether you're visiting for business or leisure.

Name: The Fives Hotels & Residences
Description: Discover the allure of the Mexican Caribbean and be amazed by the beautiful beaches, impressive coral reefs, delicious cuisine, and exciting experiences that The Fives has for you.

Name: Meriton Suites
Description:
We operate 23 apartment-style hotels across Sydney, Brisbane, the Gold Coast, Canberra, and Melbourne. With 6,210 suites and a total of 8,368 bedrooms, Meriton Suites is proud to be the largest owner-operator of apartment-style hotel accommodation in Australia.

Choosing a suite delivers you more space and more facilities, so make our home your home, when you next stay away.

Name: Abadia Retuerta
Description: Situado a menos de 2 horas en coche de Madrid y en pleno corazón del valle del Duero, en las inmediaciones de Sardón de Duero (Valladolid), se encuentra Abadía Retuerta. Un hotel 5* y una bodega ubicados en un monasterio del siglo XII fundado por la Orden Premonstratense en España. Cuenta con una finca de 700 hectáreas (200ha de viñedo) y más de 8.000m2 para 30 exclusivas habitaciones con servicio completo de mayordomía; 27 habitaciones dobles y 3 suites, ocho de ellas ubicadas en el edificio de las antiguas caballerizas. Sus experiencias únicas ligadas al vino, la gastronomía; con el restaurante Refectorio con una Estrella Michelin, estrella Verde y dos Soles Repsol, la naturaleza, el arte y el bienestar lo convierten en un referente experiencial único y de los más sostenibles del mundo como avala su certificación Green Globe. Abadía Retuerta es un destino para disfrutar en clave wellness o como un concepto de ‘Business and leisure’. Por su parte, la bodega, una de las más innovadoras de Europa, cuenta con grandes reconocimientos internacionales que la sitúan dentro de “Los 100 Mejores Vinos del Mundo” según la revista Wine Spectator.

Name: Eight Continents Hotels and Resorts
Description:
We are committed to provide a 360-degree integrated hotel management service that creates exceptional value. Our people embody the Eight Continents Hotels & Resorts Spirit to explore, Discover, Experience and Journey beyond.

Exceptional and personalized service, exceeding expectations, and inspiring a connection to our brand in the experiences we provide.

Name: Caterwest S.A
Description:
Caterwest es una empresa líder con más de 30 años de experiencia en la provisión de servicios hoteleros y de operaciones en sitios remotos. Con sede en San Juan, Argentina, y con raíces en la pintoresca localidad de Calingasta, Caterwest se ha establecido como una referencia en el mercado local.

Nuestro compromiso es brindar un servicio excepcional a nuestros clientes, que incluyen empresas y organizaciones en diferentes sectores, como la minería, la construcción y la exploración de recursos naturales. Nos enorgullece trabajar en colaboración con ellos para ayudar a hacer realidad su visión.

En Caterwest, entendemos la importancia de ofrecer soluciones adaptadas a las necesidades específicas de cada cliente. Es por eso que ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios, incluyendo alojamiento, catering y servicios de operaciones, y contamos con un equipo de profesionales altamente capacitados y comprometidos con la excelencia.

Nuestro compromiso con la calidad y el servicio ha sido la clave de nuestro éxito, y seguimos invirtiendo en nuestra gente y en nuestras operaciones para seguir siendo líderes en nuestro sector. En resumen, Caterwest es una empresa sólida y confiable, comprometida con el éxito de nuestros clientes y con un fuerte enfoque en la excelencia en el servicio.

Name: Trident, Gurgaon
Description: Trident Gurgaon is an award winning hotel, situated amidst 7 acres of landscaped gardens, walkways, water fountains, reflection pools and courtyards. The hotel is located in the central business district of Gurgaon, a part of the New Delhi National Capital Region. The hotel provides gracious, efficient and personalised service delivered by carefully trained and attentive staff.

Name: The Jeddah EDITION
Description: EDITION Hotels is set to expand into Saudi Arabia with its expected third property in the region. The hotel is located along the Jeddah Corniche next to the Yacht Club & Marina as well as the F1 racetrack, with easy access to Jeddah’s City Center and the Mall of Arabia. With 63 rooms, including 11 suites, the new hotel is slated to feature a signature restaurant, lobby lounge, intimate bar, rooftop and pool.

Name: Vertu Hotel Harmoni Jakarta
Description:
The sophisticated Vertu Harmoni Jakarta is conveniently located in Central Jakarta, a close distance from the National Museum and National Monument (Monas), Chinatown and Jakarta's Old Town (Kota Tua). Popular shopping malls, such as Central Park, Plaza Indonesia, Grand Indonesia, are also within 5 km from the hotel, as is the vibrant Jakarta nightlife.

Most notably, it is also strategically located for discerning business travelers with meetings within or around the Sudirman, Rasuna Said and Thamrin business districts, making this the most coveted choice.

This upscale hotel also Offers 7 meeting rooms and 1 ball room/ conference room, which can accommodate up to 1000 people as well as complimentary Wi-Fi throughout the hotel.

Vertu Harmoni Jakarta offers three types of accommodations: Vertu Suites (56 sqm), Vertu Room (28 sqm) with our Vertu Signature Bathrooms and the V room (28 sqm). All the rooms are curated with a modern, but yet simple touch that will turn guest experience into a memorable time. The Vertu room and the Vertu Suites are equipped with a full stocked minibar, 42” LED TV with cable network access, an espresso machine, a pillow menu, Hair dryer and air conditioning.

The hotel is directly connected to a lifestyle citywalk The Shoppes at HarmoniExchange with dozens of reputable restaurants cafes and service stores to enrich your stay whether its a business trip or a city vacation, 

Vertu Harmoni Jakarta deliver refined guest experiences with every touch carefully considered and delivered for the needs of today’s most discerning modern travelers.

The hotel is committed to providing a high-quality hospitality experience with elegantly furnished rooms, suites, and luxury residences matching international standards and professional service, hygiene, warmth, and a relaxed atmosphere.

A variety of flavor experiences awaits you at any of our restaurants, featuring an enticing array of international cuisine that comes with superior quality and friendly service.

Name: Grand Hyatt La Manga Club Golf & Spa
Description:
Grand Hyatt La Manga Club Golf & Spa is a luxurious and world-class hotel nestled in the heart of La Manga Club resort, a renowned sports and leisure destination in Murcia, South East Spain. It’s an oasis of sports and relaxation in an idyllic location nestled between Calblanque Natural Park and the Mediterranean Sea that strives to deliver exceptional experiences and create lasting memories for our guests.

Immerse yourself at any of our elegantly appointed 192 rooms featuring stunning views over the surrounding landscape. Relax and indulge in the views of our stunning adults-only infinity pool.

Get ready to embark on an exciting culinary journey with 11 bars and restaurants to choose from using the finest local ingredients. From our gastronomic restaurant Amapola offering our most sublime cuisine to the traditional Italian specialties at Luigi Trattoria, our dining options cater to every palate, accompanied by an extensive selection of wines and signature cocktails.

Indulge in the rejuvenating treatments of our skilled therapists at your own sanctuary of tranquility and well-being at Alma’ Spa.

Our hotel is ideal to host your next conference, meeting or social event. Our state-of-the art facilities, dedicated professional team and personalised service and customisation will ensure a seamless and successful event experience.

For golf lovers, the resort boasts three championship 18-hole golf courses that have played host to numerous professional tournaments. With stunning landscapes, challenging fairways, and exceptional facilities, our courses provide an unforgettable golfing experience for players of all skill levels.

The resort also includes a world-class Racquets Centre a well as a Football Centre that has attracted the best teams and players from around the globe.

Grand Hyatt La Manga Club Golf & Spa is more than just a hotel; it's a paradise destination where luxury, leisure, and tranquility converge. Whether you're seeking a relaxing escape, a golf getaway, our an exhilarating sports retreat, we invite you to experience the height of elegance and luxury hospitality with us.

Name: Marriott Marquis Dubai Creek
Description: Located in Dubai’s latest development ‘Jewel of the Creek’, Marriott Marquis Dubai Creek is gracefully perched on the historical Dubai Creek offering breathtaking views of the Creek and city skyline. The hotel is within proximity to the majority of the city’s tourist attractions as well as the financial and shopping hub of Dubai. Rooted in the vibrant culture of the city, Marriott Marquis Dubai Creek beautifully reflects UAE’s rich heritage with its distinctive architecture and interiors.

Name: One Shot Hotels
Description:
At One Shot Hotels, we value beauty in the everyday details: in the light that transforms a space, in the art that evokes emotions, and in the human connections established during each stay. We are not just a boutique hotel chain; we are a sanctuary where design and creativity intertwine to offer a unique warmth.

Located in the heart of Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, Seville, San Sebastián, and Porto, our hotels are distinguished by their careful design and attention to detail. Each hotel is unique, with a character that reflects the culture and surroundings of its location, providing a welcoming atmosphere that invites relaxation.

We believe in hospitality that goes beyond the conventional, where every corner tells a story, and each visit becomes a moment to remember. At One Shot Hotels, aesthetics become part of the experience, uniting comfort and creativity in spaces where you can feel at home.

As One Shot Hotels continues to grow, we are excited about the prospect of opening new destinations that will enrich our offering. Our commitment is to provide accommodations that, while not aiming to be art galleries, celebrate art in all its forms, fostering an appreciation for creativity and design in every detail.

We invite you to discover the uniqueness of our hotels, where good taste and personalised attention are the foundation of every stay. At One Shot Hotels, each visit is an opportunity to enjoy the authenticity and warmth of our approach to hospitality.

Name: LateRooms.com
Description:
LateRooms.com was born in Salford, Greater Manchester in 1999, starting life as an 'on the day for the day' booking site for unsold hotel rooms.

Today we’re owned by the Snaptrip Group but you can still book late deals on the day of your stay, of course – but also up to a whole year in advance. Helping you plan all those upcoming events, activities and special occasions for which you need a hotel.

Description:

See you soon!

Name: The Fern Residency Vadodara , Series By Marriott
Description:
Set in the city center, this laid-back hotel is 3 km from both sprawling gardens at Sayaji Baug and the Baroda Museum & Picture Gallery, and 6 km from Vadodara Airport.


Casual rooms with warm furnishings offer free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and minibars, plus desks, tea and coffeemakers, and sitting areas with sofas. There's 24-hour room service; DVD players are available on request.

Parking is complimentary, as is a breakfast buffet served in a relaxed restaurant. Other amenities include meeting rooms and event space. Airport transfers are available.

Name: Novotel Tangerang
Description: Touch down in 4-star comfort at Novotel Tangerang, a hotel for business and leisure, and staycations. 20 minutes drive from the International airport and 45 minutes from Jakarta. Panorama windows let natural light into your sleek contemporary room and show off the views. Rise and shine with few laps at the rooftop garden pool.

Name: Holiday AI

Whether you are a new business or an established holiday destination we will create a marketing plan that drives visitor numbers. We are passionate about tourism and travel, and we make it our mission to understand this industry better than any other marketing organisation. To do this, we invest in proprietary research, cross-channel data collection and analytics tools that lead to informed strategy.

Our holiday marketing clients include airlines, hotels, bus and train companies, tourist destinations, cruise lines, airports, tourist boards, ferry companies, leisure parks and online and high street travel agents.

Let us help you grow your business by improving your marketing if you are searching for an award-winning holiday marketing agency.

Name: Client Concierge Sales Management Group
Description:
Client Concierge Sales Management Group is a cost-effective sales solution providing remote sales representation to hotels across the country. Our model promotes operational efficiencies and controls overhead costs, providing an affordable, flexible solution for owners. 

We have had enormous success with hotels that are either pre-opening or mature, with or without a salesperson and with both long-term and short-term engagements. We customize our services based on the needs of each individual property. 

At Client Concierge, we work hard every day to help you maximize your business with a passion only found in someone doing work that they love. Our staff consists of seasoned sales professionals who are laser focused on growing revenues for our customers. Our team of experts can immediately fill and maintain a Director of Sales position for your hotel with minimal guidance. We believe that that it is imperative that someone is both proactively prospecting and reactive to incoming leads in a timely and professional manner.  

Utilizing our services strategically places a champion who possesses the expertise, business acumen, creativity and knowledge to proactively seek out and uncover new opportunities and partnerships locally and nationally for your establishment.  Our focus is your future, creating awareness and providing memorable experiences for return business that in turn promotes for future business.

Name: InterContinental Athénée Palace Bucharest
Description: With a legacy of over 100 years, InterContinental Athénée Palace Bucharest is steeped in culture and heritage, overlooking the Revolution square and offering guests views across the Romanian Athenaeum and Royal Palace. The hotel offers contemporary guest rooms, two restaurants, a bar and a secluded summer terrace where you can escape from the hustle of the busy street of Bucharest. Host clients in the large ballroom or indulge in a massage in the spa or a dip in the indoor pool.

Name: Grand Mercure Majlis Residences
Description:
Grand Mercure Majlis Residence - Upscale five-star hotel for business and leisure

While in Abu Dhabi for business or pleasure, enjoy the five-star prestige and comfort of a residence at Majlis Grand Mercure Abu Dhabi hotel. From studios to executive suites, all 198 rooms provide fully equipped kitchens, free WIFI, and LCD high definition TVs. Our 24 hour concierge attends to your every need and room service is available around the clock. Treat yourself to Mediterranean and Arabic delicacies at our rooftop restaurant Mezzahto, Frenc cafe La Maison du Goût.

Majlis Grand Mercure Abu Dhabi is located in the heart of an exciting and cosmopolitan city. Take a guided tour of the spectacular Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, one of the world's largest, or explore the sand dunes of the ancient desert in a 4x4 or atop a Visit the awe-inspiring Emirates Palace along the Corniche, where the Abu Dhabi Film Festival and classical concerts attract internationally acclaimed artists. For beach lovers, our white sands and clear waters are the ultimate luxury.

For Bookings -

Name: DEVENTURE HOTEL AND RESORTS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Deventure is a chain of Luxurious hotels & Resorts with a focus on providing unrivalled combination of warm Indian hospitality, contemporary, world-class service, and modern luxury. In an ever-shrinking world, Deventure Hotels & Resorts imbibes the local ethos and differentiates itself with a variety of experiences as the company's influence travels to exotic locales, cuisines and cultures. A leader in hospitality that is fast imprinting its exquisite brand of magnificence on the rest of the world, Deventure has retained the spirit and charm of the traditions of India, while blending these with unique experience and expertise required to create a hotel brand that is classic and contemporary.

Deventure hotel has the most spacious and well-furbished rooms in Karnal. For guests' convenience and entertainment, all three of the deventure hotels have added wireless broadband internet access facility and additional satellite cable TV channels linked to all guest rooms and suites. The hotel's 24 hours CAFE-24 Coffee house offers snacks, mini-meals, local delicacies and irresistible desserts. Room service is also available 24 hours. Weekend Hi-Tea buffet is very well accepted by local and foreign guests. The dining offers fine dining cuisines and is a fabulous place to dine in comfort.

Name: Mahua Resorts

Welcome to Mahua Resorts, a collection of boutique hotels, located in lesser known destinations where you can embark on memorable getaways in the heart of nature.

We are committed to providing nature lovers with a range of stay options that celebrate authenticity and simplicity. Here, you can immerse yourself in the outdoors, surrounded by an atmosphere of rootedness, peace, and calm. We aim to foster trust and genuine connections with the environment, ensuring your experience is truly unforgettable.

Description:
Welcome to Pullman Tbilisi Axis Towers - Where Business Meets Style in the Heart of Tbilisi.

Located in the iconic twin towers that define Tbilisi’s skyline, Pullman Tbilisi Axis Towers is the ultimate destination for modern travelers seeking a vibrant blend of work and leisure. As part of Accor’s premium international brand, we offer an upscale, cosmopolitan experience with a creative edge.

Our 5-star hotel features stylish rooms with panoramic views, state-of-the-art meeting facilities, and a dynamic social scene anchored by a contemporary French restaurant and a spectacular sky bar on the 37th floor. Whether you're here for business, a cultural escape, or an unforgettable event, Pullman delivers seamless service, bold design, and unmatched connectivity.

Stay plugged in. Stay balanced. Stay inspired - at Pullman Tbilisi Axis Towers.

Name: Cayo Levantado Resort
Description:
The resort sits majestically on an enchanting island within an island Paradise, in Samaná – Dominican Republic. After a short, relaxing boat ride, a Victorian-inspired dock greets your arrival and, after disembarking, you stroll up toward an opening in the lush palm grove swaying in concert with the salt-tinged breeze pushing you inland. Guests are welcomed by their personal ambassador and the staff, the lilt of the local accent and the subtle beat of merengue drifting through the courtyard, inviting participation.
At Cayo Levantado Resort, we are dedicated to offering an expertly curated, distinctly Dominican, and decidedly authentic experience. Local culture and lifestyle, sustainability and the care of mind, body and soul are the main inspiration of every corner of this brand-new, upscale five-star 24-hour all-inclusive resort, as well as its superior amenities and gastronomy. All aspects work seamlessly to elevate any vacation to be a truly meaningful personal journey.
Here, on Cayo Levantado Resort, you encounter a once-in-a-lifetime experience … in a place like no other… with a rhythm all its own.

Name: Hjortviken Country Club
Description:
Hjortviken Country Club - en down to earth city escape destination, beläget vid vackra Västra Nedsjön Hindås strax utanför Göteborg.
 
Hos oss kopplar du enkelt bort och istället, kopplar av. En weekend, en konferens eller en trevlig måltid. Oavsett vad just du är ute efter kommer vår inredning, service, pool club och för att inte tala om naturmiljön göra din upplevelse till något alldeles extra.
 
Skapad av ESS Group som ligger bakom bland annat destinationerna, Ystad Saltsjöbad, Falkenberg Strandbad, Jacy´z i Göteborg och Ellery Beach house, Lidingö Stockholm, MJ’s i Malmö samt Steam Hotel i Västerås.

Name: Kruger Gate Hotel
Description:
We offer a world-class, Big 5 Kruger safari experience combined with a luxury hotel stay defined by modern comforts, upscale dining, warm South African hospitality, and excellent service. 
Our lodge-style, 4-star hotel caters to international and local guests travelling as individuals, couples, families, or groups who want to experience the thrill of an authentic Kruger safari along with a luxury stay. 
Our unique location, less than a minute’s drive from the Paul Kruger Gate ensures quick and easy access to the game-rich southern reaches of the Park. Our comprehensive guided Kruger safari experiences in open vehicles include morning, all-day, afternoon and night game drives so that guests can explore the Park every day during their stay. Situated in picturesque woodland on the banks of the Sabie River with unique views into Kruger, the hotel is a tranquil sanctuary where guests can relax and enjoy features such as luxury rooms with modern amenities, the scenic Pool Bar & Viewing Deck, fireside feasts at the Lapa Restaurant, private dining and the African-inspired Spa.

Name: Radisson Blu Resort, Kumbhalgarh
Description: The first branded resort in Kumbhalgarh – nestled in the Aravallis and guarded by century-old banyan trees.

Name: Sofitel Montevideo Casino Carrasco & Spa
Description:
Ubicado frente a la rambla, en el barrio de Carrasco, y declarado Monumento Histórico Nacional en 1975, Sofitel Montevideo Casino Carrasco & Spa combina la elegancia de su legado arquitectónico con el lujo contemporáneo.

El hotel ofrece habitaciones y suites que garantizan el máximo confort y privacidad; una propuesta gastronómica creativa en el Restaurante 1921, actualmente bajo la dirección de la Chef Ejecutiva Pilar Illarraga; coctelería de autor en el Bar Sofitel; un exclusivo concepto de bienestar en el Spa; y experiencias de entretenimiento en el Casino Carrasco.

Más allá de sus servicios, Sofitel Montevideo es un espacio donde el talento y la hospitalidad se encuentran. Desde el área de Personas & Cultura, trabajamos para atraer, desarrollar y acompañar a nuestros Heartists, apasionados y comprometidos con brindar experiencias memorables a cada huésped, cliente y visitante. Fomentamos un entorno inclusivo, colaborativo y orientado al crecimiento profesional, donde cada persona es protagonista.

Sofitel Montevideo Casino Carrasco & Spa es más que un hotel: es un ícono de Montevideo y un símbolo del arte de la hospitalidad, encarnado por un equipo que vive su vocación con orgullo y excelencia.

Name: Hyatt Place Goa Candolim
Description: Hyatt Place Goa Candolim is a perfect choice for modern travelers and families seeking vacation in North Goa. Located just 400 meters from the beach, surrounded by a bustling street packed with multiple restaurants, bars, pubs, parties, and shopping options. With luxurious and modern amenities, a wide range of kid-friendly activities and facilities, and a trendy and sophisticated atmosphere, our hotel is the perfect destination for those looking to enjoy the local nightlife or simply relax and unwind in comfort and style. Experience the best of both worlds, and create memories that will last a lifetime.

Name: Holiday Inn Express & Suites Toronto Airport South
Description:
New Hotel in Toronto Airport South near Downtown Toronto.  

Welcome to the brand-new Holiday Inn Express & Suites Toronto Airport South. We are located a few minutes from the Toronto Pearson Airport and conveniently positioned close to highways 401, 407, and 400 offering easy access for both corporate & leisure travellers. Our hotel is surrounded by several companies including Ledcor Canada, Bayer Inc, Heineken Canada, Life labs Medical Lab, the International Center And Toronto Congress Center.  Other nearby attractions include the Woodbine Entertainment Center and Wet N Wild water Park for some family fun.
 
Our Free Airport shuttle operates 24 hours and takes you to and from the Toronto Pearson Airport & UP express train station which offers a 20-minute service to Downtown Toronto.
 
Our accommodations also offer Free WIFI and Daily Hot Buffet Breakfast. Maintain your workout routine at our 24-hour Fitness center or go for a swim in our indoor heated pool. Each room is equipped with a Microwave, mini refrigerator, Keurig coffee machine, 55” adjustable mount TV and in-room safe. 

We look forward to welcoming you to the Brand New Holiday Inn Express Airport South!

Name: Portemilio Hotel & Resort
Description:
Portemilio Hotel & Resort is a landmark seaside destination in Lebanon, proudly celebrating 30 years of hospitality excellence. For three decades, Portemilio has been synonymous with warm service, memorable experiences, and a deep commitment to guest satisfaction.

Set along the Mediterranean coast, the resort offers a refined blend of comfort, leisure, dining, and event experiences, welcoming families, couples, business travelers, and partners alike. From thoughtfully designed accommodations to diverse culinary offerings and vibrant social spaces, every detail reflects Portemilio’s dedication to quality and authenticity.

Driven by its people and guided by enduring values, Portemilio continues to evolve while honoring its heritage looking ahead to many more years of meaningful hospitality, trusted relationships, and unforgettable moments.

Name: Hotel Nandan
Description: A 60 room hotel with sober decor, identity and range that combines modern design with the ultimate in contemporary facilities and personalized services to cater to the corporate clientele. Hotel Nandan is stylish and modern yet cozy and comfortable with an emphasis on privacy, charm and attention to details.

Name: Evolatia Amenities
Description:

Name: The Nook - Guest House
Description: Welcome to THE NOOK, your perfect home away from home. Nestled in the heart of MUZAFFARABAD, THE NOOK offers a serene and comfortable retreat for travelers seeking a blend of relaxation and convenience.

Name: The Monogram Collective
Description:
The Monogram Collective showcases a newly crafted collection of unique British stays, each with its own distinct charm. 

Steeped in heritage and reimagined for the curious modern traveller, our hotels celebrate individuality and the rich spirit of their surroundings-inviting you to feel the story of every place you stay.

MONOGRAM COLLECTIVE: SIGNATURE STYLE IN EVERY WAY

OUR HOTELS

THE VINEYARD 
Royal Berkshire – England

Just an hour from central London, The Vineyard is a sanctuary of modern indulgence where world-class wine, food and hospitality meet in effortless harmony. 

Celebrated for its cellar and award-winning dining, this is a place where every dish tells a story, and every glass is poured with purpose. We invite you to savour culinary freedom without limits.

PINE TREES 
Perthshire – Scotland

Tucked between towering Scots pines and the Cairngorm mountains on the edge of picturesque Pitlochry, Pine Trees is a secluded Highland retreat where refined comfort meets untamed beauty. 

Steeped in charm yet designed for the modern traveller, it offers a place to breath deeply, dine thoughtfully, and unwind completely. Here, you are invited to write your own chapter in the heart of Scotland.

MELDRUM HOUSE 
Aberdeenshire – Scotland

Timeless Scottish elegance meets modern indulgence in 240 acres of sporting countryside, where championship parkland fairways unfold beneath wide skies.
Behind its 13th century walls, bold design and warm hospitality create a stay that's as expansive as the landscape beyond. 

From fireside whisky tastings to unforgettable dining under a glass-roofed dome, every detail is crafted to offer luxurious freedom.

Name: Tulip Inn Hotel and Suites Doha
Sanctuary
Description: Sanctuary is more than a weekend getaway – more than just a transient place to be outside. At Sanctuary, we offer a return to the natural world: an innate force within us – something we've only just rediscovered, something we've for too long ignored. We cut through the noise through nature-driven lodging experiences that help you find what matters most and inspire balance within the chaos of city living. This isn't just a one off. You won't be leaving empty handed.

Name: Radisson Blu Resort Galle
Description:
Come and stay at Radisson Blu Resort, Galle and enjoy our stunning seaside location. Take a dip in our outdoor pool, the social hub connecting our hotel to outlets and the ocean. Relax in one of our 172 modern and stylish rooms, each equipped with a private balcony or terrace and thoughtful amenities such as free Wi-Fi and coffee and tea making facilities. Perfect for families, our Kids Club provides multiple activities for little guests as well as a kid’s pool in the outdoor pool area. 

Unique to our hotel and only available with us, the Lounge is an area with lockers for luggage storage, toilets, and showers to facilitate early check-ins or late departures for your convenience. Enjoy a delicious meal or a light snack at one of our four available on-site restaurants and rooftop bar serving a range of fresh local delicacies. 

Organize your business meeting or plan your wedding celebrations with us and benefit from our beautiful location and versatile event space to ensure your event is one to remember. Visit our on-site spa and fitness centre for a well-deserved massage or attend one of our yoga sessions.

Name: Ellen Kensington
Description:
Located in one of the most affluent and exclusive boroughs in London, Ellen Kensington is a luxury boutique hotel with 105-keys arranged through five inter-connected Victorian town houses.
With a spacious reception, lounge, bar, restaurant, extensive wellness facilities, and a private garden, guests may anticipate round-the-clock service delivered in the warm embrace of Asian hospitality.
Ellen Kensington offers easy access to Holland Park and Kensington Gardens
and some of London’s finest cultural institutions in South Kensington including the Natural History Museum, Victoria & Albert Museum and the Royal Albert Hall.

The Morris Hotel is now lovingly restored, a place that affords guests peace and a place to pause. As you enter the impressive Italian architectural designed building you find a rich immersive restaurant and bar focused on socialising. Our guest rooms above are a haven of comfort with art deco design, luxury fittings and new technology.

Name: Fjelsted Skov Hotel & Konference I/S
Description:
Fjelsted Skov - Måske det hyggeligste konferencecenter i Danmark .

Fjelsted Skov glæder sig til at byde dig velkommen i et af vores 74 værelser, 13 konferencelokaler og ikke mindst vores dejlige, store naturhave bag hovedbygningen. Vi vil gerne være de hjemlige rammer for dit arrangement, hvad enten I er 2 eller 200 deltagere.
Uanset anledning og hvad end du skal afholde et intimt møde eller en stor konference med overnattende deltagere, så kan vi være behjælpelige med lyse og moderne mødelokaler, forplejning i særklasse og grønne, rolige omgivelser. 
I 2022 bød vi mere end 20.000 konferencegæster hjerteligt velkommen, og vi har derfor sammensat en række konferencepakker, som dækker langt de flestes behov. Med vores store erfaring, står vi også klar til at skræddersy dit arrangement, hvis du ønsker noget helt unikt. 

I fredfyldte omgivelser bare tre minutters kørsel fra E20-motorvejen ved Middelfart finder du os.

Name: Faralda Crane Hotel Amsterdam
Description:
“Faralda Crane Hotel, the most Romantic & Inspiring place to stay”

Faralda Crane Hotel is a mind-blowing and a once a lifetime experience. Hidden on top are three luxurious 5-star suites. The Faralda Club is the institute for Corporate & Music events. World leading DJ’s play during premium live stream Cranesessions. 

“An unusual hotel you won’t believe actually exists” (CNN)

We limited availability because we only have three luxury suites: The Mystique, Secret and Free Spirit.  Our guests are free spirits, creatives and open-minded. The view over the city and the river IJ floating beneath is unprecedented. A small panorama elevator takes you to the top of the crane and stops right into your suite. Because its height and structure, a stay in the crane will be completely incognito. Security and hostess(es) are available upon request. 

FARALDA ACTIVITIES

1. Hotel:     
Three extravagantly designed suites on top of a towering, monumental crane. 
Faralda Crane Hotel is an officially appointed wedding location. 
 
2. Corporate Events       
The ultimate venue for Brand activations
Product launches
Boardroom - Web meetings. 

3. Music Events                   
Faralda studio is the institute for our Resident nights, Crane sessions and Private events. 

Faralda Factory is a production in collaboration with recognized artists.

Name: Kimpton Hotel Monaco Pittsburgh
Description:
Welcome to Kimpton Hotel Monaco Pittsburgh, a luxurious hotel located in the heart of downtown Pittsburgh. Our hotel offers a unique blend of modern sophistication and historic charm, with beautifully designed rooms and suites that feature elegant furnishings and luxurious amenities.

At Kimpton Hotel Monaco Pittsburgh, we pride ourselves on providing exceptional service to our guests. Whether you're here for a business trip, a romantic getaway, or a family vacation, we'll go above and beyond to ensure that your stay with us is comfortable and memorable.

Our hotel is ideally situated for exploring all that Pittsburgh has to offer. We're just steps away from some of the city's top attractions, including the Andy Warhol Museum, the Heinz History Center, and PNC Park.

www.instagram.com/monacopgh/
www.facebook.com/HotelMonacoPittsburgh

Name: Shadow Play by Peppers
Description:
Shadow Play by Peppers is positioned within this truly romantic city, where laneway restaurants, rooftop bars, markets and boutiques are set around the Yarra River flowing through the metropolis, is nothing short of exquisite for your next urban escape.

From its striking facade to the dark and intimate interior, every aspect of this veiled boutique hotel is as exquisite and bespoke as the culinary offerings of Edwin Wine Bar and Restaurant offering an exclusively Victorian wine list, or the rooftop Cloakroom Bar with commanding views over Melbourne's city skyline.

Accommodation at Shadow Play by Peppers is inclusive of one and two bedroom suites with floor to ceiling windows and contemporary décor, full kitchen, euro laundry and all-weather balconies.

Housed within the hotel is an enclosed garden space situated on the top floor, which features a freestanding fireplace and sublime Melbourne bayside views, with exclusive rooftop entertainment area boasting two private conference/ dining rooms. 

First-class amenities comprising lavish guest lounge and library, gymnasium with sauna and steam room and adjoining patio with heated pool where you can soak in the fresh breezes, vibrant atmosphere, and views across the CBD. 

Completed by the convenience of valet parking and 24-hour reception and exceptional service backed by exclusive member and loyalty offering & benefits, Shadow Play by Peppers delivers the utmost in boutique Melbourne accommodation.

Estherea Resort & Spa | Jaipur

Our approach is creative and dynamic, our innovative proposals and business models are purely based in the best interest of our owners, partners and the community.
When you team up with Alliance Hotel Development, we can guarantee our solid experience in the key areas of the hotel development and operations together with our business partners to consolidate infrastructure, interior design, on-line and connectivity distribution.

Name: Hotel América Sevilla
Description:
El Hotel América Sevilla *** es un hotel céntrico, situado en pleno corazón de la Sevilla monumental, a corta distancia del Barrio de Santa Cruz, la Catedral, la Giralda y la Torre del Oro. Ubicado en la capital andaluza, se encuentra rodeado de restaurantes de tapas, junto a la calle Sierpes y la Campana, la mejor zona comercial de Sevilla.
 
Desde sus 7 plantas tiene garantizada la mejor vista del centro de la ciudad. Entre los servicios del hotel destacan Internet WiFi gratuito, Televisión LCD, minibar, caja fuerte gratuita en las habitaciones, baño completo, aire acondicionado, teléfono, calefacción, suelos de tarima flotante y un parking de pago concertado en el centro de la ciudad, entre otros complementos que lo acreditan como un hotel de gran comodidad y confort.

El Hotel se ha reformado íntegramente en agosto de 2020.
 
Este céntrico hotel, tanto por su situación como por sus servicios, se convierte en el hotel ideal para su estancia en Sevilla. Descubra esta maravillosa ciudad con nosotros.

Name: Nautilux Hotel
Description:
We welcome you in the new Mage Hotels & Resorts’ 5 star beach hotel in Rethymnon. Here you will immediately feel the difference in aesthetics and the vibrant personality of the hotel.

Its special, spiral architectural design combined with the uniqueness of its location in the city will surely fascinate you. A vibrant modern color palette, complemented by natural light and locally influenced design and décor, create a welcoming, elegant and refreshing atmosphere in every space of the city resort hotel.

Name: The Jay, Autograph Collection
Description: Welcome to the Jay Hotel, ideally situated in the bustling Embarcadero Center of San Francisco. Immerse yourself in the vibrant energy of the city while enjoying the luxurious comforts of our hotel. From our stylish accommodations to our personalized service, every aspect of your stay is designed to exceed expectations. Explore the iconic Embarcadero Center, just steps away, offering an array of dining, shopping, and entertainment options. Be sure to indulge in dining and entertainment at The Third Floor and terrace, where you can savor exquisite cuisine while taking in breathtaking views of the city skyline. Whether you're here for business or leisure, experience the essence of San Francisco hospitality at the Jay Hotel.

Name: Magno Apartments
Description: En Magno Apartments nos dedicamos a la gestión integral de alojamientos exclusivos en Sevilla. Tenemos como objetivo alcanzar la plena satisfacción de nuestros huéspedes, haciendo que se sientan como uno más de la ciudad, como en su propia casa, ofreciendo apartamentos de calidad y los mejores servicios. Para conseguirlo, contamos con un equipo de personas con una amplia experiencia y conocimiento del sector, además de herramientas profesionales e innovadoras. Todos nuestros alojamientos pasan por un exhaustivo proceso de selección en su decoración, equipamiento e instalaciones, cuidando hasta el último detalle. Además, llevamos a cabo un proceso de mejora continua con el que nos aseguramos que se sigan cumpliendo elevados estándares de calidad en todos los apartamentos.

Name: Searipple Village Karratha
Description: Remote workforce accommodation in Karratha WA. Searipple Village provides a range of fully-managed accommodation options, ideal for fulfilling short-term accommodation needs in key mining and energy project hubs across Australia. We provide a flexible, cost-effective, safe, and lifestyle-focused accommodation solution for your workforce. Our village offers a welcoming environment and can accommodate both large and small bookings, for short or long-term stays.

Name: Oyster Bay Beach Suites
Description:
The coastal escape of a lifetime, where the smell of the sea, the sounds of soft waves, and the sight of turquoise waters meeting the azure sky set the stage for a sensory paradise. Your beachfront holiday home awaits, offering not just a stay, but an enchanting narrative of nature, culture, and unparalleled luxury.

At Oyster Bay, home ownership transcends the ordinary—it's a gateway to a world of opulence and privilege. Our esteemed owners revel in unlimited access to a plethora of resort services, exclusive events, and enticing discounts.  Dive into an investment program that goes beyond expectations, allowing you to offset installment costs with annual returns. Enjoy the perks of guaranteed rental incomes and savor up to 30 days of property usage, even during peak seasons.

 Your balcony becomes a personal haven, where the sea breeze and the mesmerizing view of Marsa Alam create an ambiance of serenity and bliss. Oyster Bay is not just a residence; it's an invitation to a curated experience, designed exclusively for those with a penchant for the exquisite. Welcome to your sanctuary—a place where every moment is a celebration of nature's beauty and every sensation is a crafted indulgence.

Name: Hotel Indigo London Clerkenwell
Description:
Hotel Indigo London Clerkenwell sits in the heart of London’s renowned design district, surrounded by leading architecture firms, design agencies, and creative studios. Inspired by the rich heritage and innovation of Clerkenwell, the hotel blends local character with modern comfort - offering a unique stay that reflects the spirit of its neighbourhood.

This new property is ideal for business travellers and corporate guests seeking more than just a place to stay. The hotel features thoughtfully designed guest rooms inspired by Clerkenwell’s historic trades, alongside flexible public spaces and modern amenities designed for work, rest, and connection.

Above the beautifully restored Grade II listed Hat and Feathers pub, the hotel offers two private meeting suites, accommodating up to 30 delegates respectively. These spaces are ideal for team meetings, workshops, private dining, or off-site sessions.

Just minutes from Barbican and Farringdon stations with access to the Elizabeth Line, the hotel provides seamless connectivity across London, including direct routes to the West End, City and Heathrow Airport. Whether you’re hosting a client, planning a meeting, or exploring the city between appointments, Hotel Indigo London Clerkenwell offers a distinctive experience with the warmth of local hospitality and the convenience of a central location.

Name: MAJOR. SUITES | Curaçao
Description: Te huur: 6-persoons luxe appartement met eigen zwembad direct bij Jan Thiel! Beleving en gastvrijheid staan voorop, alles om iedere gast een fantastische vakantie te bieden!

Description: Nestled in the vibrant city of Gurgaon, Aadat Hotel stands as a beacon of sophistication and charm. With decades of experience in hospitality, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional service and unforgettable experiences. Our dedicated team ensures your stay, whether for a weekend getaway, business trip, or special celebration, is truly memorable.

Name: ASTON Kupang Hotel & Convention Center
Description:
A convenient base to stay in Kupang. Aston Kupang Hotel & Convention Center offers a superb blend of exceptional service and attention to detail. This waterfront hotel is the perfect choice when exploring Kupang and its surrounding attractions, such as Lasiana Beach, Kera Island, Semau Island, Crystal Cave, Tablolong Beach, and Oenesu Waterfall. The hotel is also within a short distance to the shopping district.

A perfect venue for business meetings and group functions. Aston Kupang Hotel & Convention Center offers a true experience of modernity. Featuring 5 meeting rooms and 1 grand ballroom with avant-garde facilities that can accommodate up to 1,600 guests, this establishment is ideal to host meetings, workshops, exhibitions, and social events.

Name: Hotel H4 Cangas
Description: Ultimando los preparativos para la apertura del que será un referente hotelero y espacio para eventos en la Comarca do Morrazo.

Name: Rio do Rastro Eco Resort
Description:
Um dos mais exclusivos Resorts do Brasil, há mais de 25 anos recebendo visitantes de todo o país e também do exterior, debruçado no cânion da Serra do Rio do Rastro, o Resort, possui uma área de 3 milhões de metros quadrados e uma altitude aproximada de 1.500 metros do nível do mar.  

Possuímos 19 chalés, acomodamos até 60 pessoas. Nosso Resort comporta: piscina aquecida coberta, piscina externa aquecida com borda infinita, jacuzzi, sauna (seca e úmida), sala de massagem, sala de jogos, academia, restaurante, playground, bar, boutique, quadras de vôlei e beach tênis.

Oferecemos espaços personalizados para eventos como casamentos, aniversários, reuniões e retiros corporativos que podem ser tão grandiosos ou íntimos quanto você desejar.

Cercado pela natureza, repleto de lazer para adultos, crianças e principalmente para aqueles casais que querem romantismo e intimidade, o Rio do Rastro Eco Resort oferece, além de maravilhosas acomodações, diversas experiências, tornando sua viagem única e inesquecível.

Contamos com uma equipe de colaboradores nessa missão fundamental de atender bem nossos clientes. Nosso time é formado por uma equipe sólida que se orgulha em fazer parte da nossa história. A nossa estratégia de atuação combina profissionais treinados com nossa forte marca, base de clientes e experiência no mercado.

Se você possui motivação, determinação e procura um ambiente dinâmico em meio a natureza, agregue as suas experiências, faça a diferença e venha fazer parte do nosso time!
Location: Bom Jardim da Serra, Santa Catarina

Name: Pride Hospitality, LLC
Description:

Pride has a great team that is focused on operating hotels the way an owner would run their business.

Description:
Discover Lodge at Marconi—a hidden gem for conferences, weddings, and events in the Bay Area. Explore miles of scenic trails, capturing stunning views of Tomales Bay and Point Reyes. 

Nestled within the park grounds, you'll find tranquility and natural beauty that transport you to another world. Just an hour from San Francisco's Golden Gate Bridge, Sonoma & Napa wine country, and the lively East Bay, Marconi offers an unforgettable experience with 45 guest rooms, 8 indoor and outdoor event spaces, and plenty of public space for experiencing the flora and fauna of the area.

Join us for remarkable moments at Marconi.

Description:
TocToc Suites Olof Palme  200m
 TocToc Suites Las Canteras  20m
 Gran Canaria

TocToc Suites is located in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, just one step away from Las Canteras beach. It is a place for those who love to experience the uniqueness of each destination, connecting as one more, feeling at home.

TocToc Suites offers hospitality and friendliness in spacious, comfortable, modern and well-kept apartments, equipped with a modern kitchen with dishwasher and microwave, a safe, a flat-screen satellite TV, ironing facilities, a closet and a seating area with a sofa. It is adapted for people with reduced mobility and family rooms are available.The bathroom is private and includes a shower, hairdryer and free toiletries. TocToc Suites also offers free WiFi, free private parking in the building nearby and bicycle rental service.
 
Near TocToc Suites there are several places of interest, such as Las Canteras beach, Santa Catalina Park, El Muelle shopping center and the Alfredo Kraus Auditorium. The nearest airport is Gran Canaria Airport, 22km away. Airport shuttle service is available for a surcharge.

Description:

Name: TAERU
Description:
Taeru is a unique accommodation in the Belgian Ardennes that is perfectly suitable for sports teams, companies, coaches/therapists to organize a retreat and other groups. 

The accommodation is unique in Europe due to the combination of: 
- sports hall of 1400 m2 
- 25-meter swimming pool 28° C in the sports hall 
- multifunctional heated room of 200 m2 (yoga room) 
- fitness, bike wash, sports bar, ... 
- 9 altitude rooms/bedrooms that can be raised with low-oxygen air (0 - 5000 meters). Taeru is the very first altitude hotel in Belgium! 
- 2 gîtes for 18 and 20 people (a total of 38 people can sleep in Taeru) 
- the new gîte is built with ecological materials 
- good location / easily accessible / beautiful surroundings 
- it is also possible for small groups or for a individually stay at Taeru ... 

Taeru has transformed an old farm, where a few years ago 75 cows were in the stables, into a great resort for sports, pushing boundaries and/or relaxing. 
Workout, Endure, Relax

Name: The Welbeck Hotel
Description:
The Welbeck Hotel is an Edwardian architectural gem, steeped in history and stories.
Welbeck Street, historically associated with the medical profession, was home to numerous prominent medical institutions and professionals from the early 1800s. The street maintained its medical character until the mid-20th century, resisting changes to ensure continued alignment with healthcare.
However, today Welbeck Street’s character has diversified, blending medical history with modern uses, including offices, retail, and residential spaces.
A hotel since its conception, the spirit of hospitality is in their DNA.
At The Welbeck you can Stay Well, Travel Well, Be Well

Description:
DISCOVER SHIBUYA FROM A HIGHER PLANE
渋谷上空、カルチャーダイブ

様々な⾊と個性が混在するジャングルシティ‧渋⾕の上空から、万華鏡のように変化するカルチャーをビビッドに照らし出す。
ホテルインディゴ東京渋⾕は、クリエイティビティを刺激する渋⾕カルチャーの発信地。
多様性を讃え、芸術性に溢れたこの街の魅⼒を館内のあちこちに散りばめ、アップデートされたホテル体験へと導きます。
開放的なテラスから、絶え間なく変化し続ける街の様相を眺める。
厳選されたアート、デザイン、⾳楽に触れる。
渋⾕上空の“聖域”で出会う刺激的な体験の数々が、かつてないネイバーフッドの世界への扉を開きます。
ホテルインディゴ東京渋⾕は、世界的に有名な街‧渋⾕での体験を、想像をはるかに超えるものへと昇華します。

Description:

Combined with classical decor pieces, this create a truly unique visual feast.

Escape your busy life for a while and enter a world of luxury. Our hotel in Limpopo has lavish suites designed and appointed with ultimate comfort and luxury in mind. Each dwelling is equipped with imported linen, solid wooden furniture, exquisite artwork on the walls, and specially selected toiletries.

Our taste for luxury extends to our facilities and services. Palala Boutique Game Lodge  offers indulgent bush experience and world-class spa retreat. We also provide a distinctive dining experience,  courtesy of our award-winning chefs. Entice your senses with our wide selection of wines, as well as our renowned collection of cigars.

Relaxation is what we do best here at  Palala Boutique Game Lodge. Here you can chill by the pool and sip a cocktail while savouring the breathtaking view of the African sunset. During winter, you can unwind in the lounge area in front of a warm and toasty fireplace, with a glass of red wine and a good book to keep you company. Sediko Spa is right the as well.

We are conveniently located only four hours away from Johannesburg.  Because we are the only five-star lodge on the vicinity, we aim to make our property as accessible as possible. We have an airstrip for private airplanes and two helipads.

Discover why we are one of the most award-winning hotels in Africa. Stay with us here at  Palala Boutique Game Lodge and know the difference.

Description:
Viva Resorts by Wyndham is a well-established all-inclusive resort chain boasting over 37 years of experience in developing, managing, and marketing properties across the Bahamas, Dominican Republic, and Mexico. This includes its exclusive Members-only Viva Club. The company attributes its success to a strategic focus on prime beachfront locations, diverse gastronomy offerings, high-quality services, and vibrant entertainment options. Committed to sustainable practices, Viva Resorts participates in the Wyndham Green Certification program. This certification underscores the company's dedication to environmental conservation. Initiatives such as recycling programs, energy-efficient lighting, and community-focused projects promote responsible tourism and support local communities.

Headquartered in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, Viva Resorts also maintains representation offices in Miami, Florida, and international offices in France, Italy, Argentina, and Chile.

Name: Hilton Arlington National Landing
Description:

The Pentagon, DC National Monuments, Government Agencies, and Museums are accessible via the Metro, within walking distance from our hotel. We offer a complimentary shuttle service daily between the hotel and DCA, the Crystal City Metro station, and nearby shopping, restaurants, and businesses.

The hotel offers a range of meeting and event space. With 21 meeting rooms, we have the perfect space for your next event. The Ballroom offers over 6,300 sq. ft. of meeting space, and the Virginia Hall has a large, bright foyer for registration, exhibits, breaks, and receptions.

Stay fit in the 24-hour fully equipped fitness center. At The Landing Kitchen+Bar, our lobby restaurant, experience a taste of casual American breakfast, lunch, happy hour, and dinner. Stop by the Marketplace to start your day, proudly serving Starbucks and grab-and-go meals.

Within easy access to local restaurants and shops in Crystal City, the Hilton Arlington National Landing is centrally located for your stay near Washington, D.C.

Name: The Steam Hotel
Description:
The Steam Hotel
Det gamla ångkraftverket vid Mälaren, en gång en av landets största energiproducenter, har stått tomt i snart 25 år. Tills nu när ESS Group, skaparna av Ystad Saltsjöbad och Falkenberg Strandbad - två av Sveriges mest prisbelönta spa- och resorthotell, har förvandlat ångkraftverket från 1917 till ett 18 våningar hotell med 227 rum, restauranger, barer, konferenslokaler och spa. Med 15 meter till vattenkanten, dryga kilometern till centralstationen och knappa milen till Västerås flygplats erbjuder vi en helhetsupplevelse som sträcker sig långt utöver den vanlig konferensen.

Mötesplatsen
Möteslokalerna, varav den största har en kapacitet för upp till ca 550 personer, andas precis som övriga hotellet historien från det gamla ångkraftverket. Miljön från det industriellt råa kraftverket har mjukats upp genom varma materialval, mattor och möbler för att skapa en inbjudande och välkomnande känsla. Vår ambition är att skapa funktionella lokaler, utrustade med den senaste tekniken, där ni verkligen kommer trivas och vill stanna kvar även efter mötets slut. Läs mer här: https://www.steamhotel.se/konferens-malardalen/

Restaurangerna
Den stora restaurangen på bottenvåningen, The Chamberlin, välkomnar er med en stor öppen brasa och ett livligt kök som växer ut i restaurangen. Med stora blyinfattade fönster som vetter ut mot Mälaren och den livfulla hamnen, sitter ni i en varm och skön miljö och njuter av internationellt inspirerad mat med fokus på grill och lokalproducerade råvaror. Här är vår ambition att trots kapaciteten på 300 platser, skapa en ombonad känsla, långt från de opersonliga kongressrestauranger vi är vana att se. Högst upp, på 18e våningen blir det en mäktig roof top restaurang, Locavore, där du njuter av mat och dryck omringad av den vidsträckta utsikten. Bara det en upplevelse i sig.

Varmt välkommen till en helt ny värld och premiären för en ny historia.

The unique chic design, glamorous atmosphere, and superb location make the Best Western Tbilisi City Center stand out from other hotels in the Georgian capital.

The hotel offers 44 modern guest rooms, including two suites on eight floors. Comfortable and spacious guest rooms are elegantly decorated in warm colors and are fully equipped with coffee and tea-making facilities, air-conditioning, a working desk, a hairdryer, and a refrigerator. Some rooms also have private balconies with views of the inner garden or the city.

Guests can enjoy a wide range of traditional Georgian specialties and International cuisine at the on-site restaurant. A welcoming and informal atmosphere, tasteful decor, and professional staff will ensure that you enjoy the highest standard possible of quality and comfort.

Best Western Tbilisi City Center is perfectly located and equipped to accommodate small to medium-sized events. The spacious conference room can accommodate up to 25 delegates and is equipped with audio-visual equipment, video conferencing, and free Wi-Fi.

Name: Steigenberger Pyramids Cairo
Description:
BRINGING GLAMOROUS ANCIENT HISTORY TO YOUR DOORSTEP

Close to the Pyramids of Giza and the Sphinx, this hotel is the perfect idyllic retreat for sightseeing and relaxation. These are the oldest structures of mankind and you can reach them in just 3 km from our hotel in Cairo, thanks to the excellent location. The largest pyramids were built in the fourth dynasty and you can visit them unchanged until today.

HOTEL IN PERFECT LOCATION OF GIZA

The nearest airports are Sphinx Airport, 25 km away, and Cairo International Airport, 53 km away. The hotel is not only close to the pyramids, but also directly opposite the New Egyptian Grand Museum, which has an exhibition on ancient Egypt.The city centre of the Egyptian capital Cairo can be reached in just 25 km, giving you the opportunity to visit the lively city on the Nile.To enjoy your holiday in Cairo near the pyramids to the full, the Steigenberger Pyramids Cairo Hotel is the right choice. Experience a new, unique journey through history, where Egypt's heritage meets luxurious European hospitality.

Name: Tappers' Village Nature Resort
Description:
Tappers Village Nature Resort is a serene and picturesque getaway nestled in the heart of nature. Located amidst lush greenery and surrounded by breathtaking views of Kiriella, this resort offers a peaceful retreat for those looking to escape the hustle and bustle of city life. Just less than 2hrs drive from the city of Colombo.
The resort boasts a range of accommodation options with cozy rooms, all designed to provide guests with maximum comfort and relaxation. Each room is tastefully decorated and equipped with modern amenities to ensure a comfortable stay.
One of the highlights of Tappers Village Nature Resort is its stunning natural surroundings. a natural swimming pool from the flow of gushing waters of Kiriella Falls in the vicinity. The natural stream flowing through the estate makes the Tappers' Village an ideal location for complete relaxation. One could witness plucking of tea, and tapping of rubber Guests can explore the resort's sprawling gardens, take a leisurely stroll along scenic walking trails, or simply relax and soak in the beauty of nature. The resort also offers a range of outdoor activities, such as bird watching, nature walks, and guided tours, allowing guests to fully immerse themselves in the natural beauty of the area.

Tappers Village Nature Resort also features a range of dining options, serving up delicious and nutritious meals made from locally sourced ingredients. Guests can enjoy a variety of cuisines, from traditional dishes to international favorites, all prepared by talented Appu.

Overall, Tappers Village Nature Resort is a hidden gem that offers a perfect blend of natural beauty, and relaxation. Whether you're looking for a peaceful retreat or an adventure-filled getaway, this resort has something for everyone. So why not escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life and immerse yourself in the tranquility of Tappers Village Nature Resort? https://www.facebook.com/tappersvillage

Description:
Stotrak Hotels proudly embraces its Indian heritage, with a name derived from the Sanskrit word "STOTRA," symbolizing a harmonious blend of hymns (Shlokas). 
Established in 2020, we stand as a beacon of authentic Indian hospitality, offering immersive stays deeply rooted in our rich cultural ethos. With properties in Uttarakhand (Dakpathar, Mussoorie, Rishikesh, and Selaqui), Rajasthan (Jaisalmer, Kumbhalgarh, Ranthambore, and Udaipurwati), Madhya Pradesh (Gwalior) and Himachal Pradesh (Nahan), we extend our warm hospitality across some of India's most captivating destinations. 
At Stotrak Hotels, we go beyond merely accommodating guests; we curate experiences that celebrate the essence of each location while prioritizing sustainability and community engagement. Our comprehensive hospitality solution encompasses room management, food & beverage outlets, and sales & marketing, all aimed at optimizing productivity and elevating guest satisfaction. By upholding our brand standards, we enhance property value, drive revenue, and ensure profitability for stakeholders, all delivered with professionalism, focus, and transparency. 
Experience the true spirit of Indian hospitality with Stotrak Hotels

Description:
Situated in the heart of downtown Toronto, TOOR Hotel warmly welcomes guests to experience a distinctive and inspired stay, thoughtfully curated for the modern traveller.
 
The property offers 232 guest rooms and suites designed for style and comfort, with 181 premium residential rental units, and an array of elevated amenities—including destination dining at the Muse Bistro + Bar, valet parking, a 1,500-square-foot fitness centre and yoga studio, a 3,000-square-foot southern terrace on the 14th floor, and an additional 1,000-square-feet of meeting and event space.
 
Centrally located in the Garden District in downtown Toronto, TOOR Hotel is the perfect hub to access the financial district, historic sites, green spaces, world-class shopping, dining, arts, and theatre. The hotel serves as the perfect locale for exploring Toronto. Whether browsing vibrant markets or unwinding at Muse Bistro + Bar, guests can enjoy an experience that is bespoke and memorable.
 
The TOOR Hotel Toronto is the first of five properties in The TOOR Hotel Collection. A second TOOR Hotel is scheduled to open this year in Soho, New York City.
 
Stay with Style in the City at TOOR Hotel

Name: Vértice Hoteles
Description:
VÉRTICE HOTELES es una empresa andaluza cuyos orígenes se remontan a 1999 con su primer establecimiento en propiedad y gestión. La marca Vértice es lanzada en el año 2003 con la inauguración del Hotel Vértice Sevilla. Un edificio de 12 plantas en categoría de 4 estrellas que nace tras la expansión urbanística e industrial que tiene la ciudad en esos momentos hacia la zona este.

Años más tarde aparecerían otras propiedades dando paso a una nueva generación de hoteles y apartamentos turísticos.

En la actualidad VÉRTICE HOTELES cuenta con 7 establecimientos, estando presente en las ciudades de: Sevilla, Madrid, Almería y Chipiona (Cádiz)

El grupo Vértice Hoteles además dispone de un Centro de Convenciones con una capacidad de hasta 2.500 personas, capaz de simultanear distintos eventos a la vez, y que junto con uno de los hoteles y apartahoteles, forman el Complejo Vértice Sevilla Aljarafe.

En el campo de la restauración opera con tres marcas: “Arrocería La Plaza”, con 4 restaurantes ubicados en diferentes provincias, especializados en arroces mediterráneos y que se han convertido en toda una referencia en la Ciudad de Sevilla; “Vakum”, restaurante especializado en carnes premium y Foodspace, restaurante basado en los conceptos self-market y auto-cooking.

Además, dispone de su propio catering para eventos tanto sociales como de empresa.

VERTICE HOTELES apuesta por el futuro de una compañía hotelera de prestigio, bien definida, y competitiva, con clara vocación de servicio y orientada continuamente a la satisfacción del cliente.

Con una filosofía profesional basada en el esfuerzo, el sacrificio y la colaboración, pero desde el modelo gestión más humano, centrado en el reconocimiento y la tolerancia.

Un modelo de negocio del que tanto empleados, clientes y accionistas, se sentirán muy orgullosos.

Name: Apex Hotels and Resorts
Description:
About Us
Apex Hotels and Resorts is a hospitality company which is a subsidiary of Apex & Co, an impact investment arm of Rupani Initiatives. The company is committed to promoting sustainable tourism by partnering with local communities and ensuring equity in gains and dividends. Apex Hotels and Resorts offers premium and eco-friendly residential experiences to visitors through its patent concept, Le Yurt. This unique cultural experience is a convergence of trans-border cultural experiences from the ancient Silk Road. With four exotic locations, visitors can enjoy luxury accommodations while immersing themselves in a regenerative and culturally rich environment.
How are we unique?
Apex Hotels and Resorts offer guests the opportunity to immerse themselves in the rich cultural heritage of Gilgit-Baltistan while enjoying the comfort of a world-class resort. The company's commitment to promoting local partnerships ensures that the communities benefit from its operations while providing guests with a chance to learn and experience the unique cultural traditions of the region. Apex Hotels and Resorts' commitment to sustainability, community growth, and promoting a regenerative way of life makes it a unique hospitality company that promises to create memorable experiences for its guests while making a positive impact on the world.
Why Chose Us?
Apex Hotels and Resorts are surrounded by lush green landscapes and scenic views, making them the perfect place to experience the beauty of nature. Book your stay at Apex Hotels and Resorts today and experience the beauty, luxury, and commitment to sustainability that make us one of the top eco-friendly resorts in the region. Not only are we committed to providing a luxurious and comfortable stay, but we are also dedicated to sustainability and environmental conservation. We believe in promoting local partnerships and ensuring equity in the gains and dividends through promising investments in tourism.With our exceptional facilities,

Name: Hilton Garden Inn Dubai Business Bay
Description:
Situated on Marasi Drive in Business Bay, alongside the stunning Dubai Canal, our hotel is just a seven-minute drive from renowned attractions such as the Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, and the Dubai Fountain. Additionally, Dubai International Airport is a mere 15-minute drive away, making our hotel easily accessible for travelers arriving from near and far. One of the most impressive features of our hotel is the breathtaking panoramic views it offers. Whether it's the majestic Burj Khalifa, the bustling cityscape, or Dubai's other famous landmarks, guests are sure to be mesmerized by the vistas from our rooms and common areas.

Furthermore, our guests can indulge in exquisite dining experiences at Together & Co., located on the second floor of the hotel. With a focus on creating a warm and inviting atmosphere, this restaurant is the perfect place to unwind and savor delicious cuisine after a day of exploring the city.

Name: 11 Cadogan Gardens
Description:
11 Cadogan Gardens (AA 5 Red Stars) is a member of Relais & Châteaux and comprises a 56 bedroom boutique hotel, 6 serviced apartments and all-day dining restaurant, Hans' Bar & Grill.

Guests will appreciate the hotel’s tranquillity and the peaceful leafy backdrop of a private garden square, all whilst having the city’s hustle and bustle within easy reach. The world renowned shopping destinations of Sloane Street and Harrods are just moments away and there is an abundance of choice nearby for those in search of the arts, including the Saatchi Gallery, Royal Albert Hall and the V&A Museum.

The Apartments by 11 Cadogan Gardens are separated from the hotel by the leafy private Cadogan Gardens. The apartments offer luxe contemporary living - ideal for family stays and those planning to stay for longer, at an exclusive address. Each of the six floors is home to a one, two or three bedroom luxuriously elegant apartment with expansive living areas, fully fitted Bosch kitchens and beautiful views over Cadogan Gardens.

The hotel consists of 162 rooms, with city & Haram view of the Prophet's Mosque Standard rooms: from the 1st floor to the 3rd floor Deluxe rooms: from the 4th floor to the 7th floor Plus 20 triple rooms, 49 suites starting with a room and a hall up to 4 bedrooms and a seating room.

Name: Aspen Hospitality
Description:
Aspen Hospitality is a rapidly growing premium resort chain that redefines luxury and experiential stays in North India. With a strong presence of 12 premium resorts across Uttarakhand and Uttar Pradesh, Aspen Hospitality operates 285 rooms on a daily basis, offering world-class comfort in some of the most serene and sought-after destinations. Our properties are strategically located in the tranquil landscapes of Rishikesh, Jim Corbett, Nainital, Ayodhya, and Garh Mukhteswar, allowing guests to immerse themselves in nature while enjoying refined hospitality.

Known for its excellence and innovation, Aspen Hospitality has earned prestigious accolades, including being recognized as the “Best MSME Resort Chain of the Year 2024” by the Government of India, along with honors from the Limca Book of Records and several other respected platforms. These achievements stand as a testament to our commitment to quality, guest satisfaction, and consistent operational excellence.

The brand is deeply focused on creating niche stay experiences that go beyond conventional hospitality. Aspen Hospitality caters to families, couples, pet lovers, and experiential travelers who seek meaningful and memorable escapes. Our resorts are designed to be family-friendly and pet-friendly, ensuring that every member of the family, including furry companions, feels welcomed and cared for.

Aspen Hospitality is also a preferred choice for destination weddings, corporate tours, offsites, and MICE events, offering scenic venues, personalized planning, and seamless execution. From intimate celebrations to large-scale corporate gatherings, our team delivers tailor-made experiences that leave a lasting impression.

Driven by passion, innovation, and a strong vision, Aspen Hospitality continues to expand its footprint while maintaining its core values of luxury, sustainability, and warm personalized service.

Description:
Welcome to Holiday Inn Resort Batam

Situated on a tranquil oasis in Northeast of Batam island. Holiday Inn Resort Batam is located 15 minutes’ drive from Sekupang International Ferry Terminal and 45 minutes drive to Hang Nadim International Airport and 30 minutes away from the excitement of downtown.

Our resort destination offers family-friendly hospitality with fun-filled activities, child-friendly facilities with resort-style services and amenities in a casual and welcoming safe environment. Swaying palm trees, sun-struck diamonds sparkling in the blue of the pool, while the sun loungers are specially prepared for a lazy day by the pool.

Description:

Our chic, open lobby offers all-day dining and is a great place to meet. We also proudly serve Starbucks and snacks 24-hours. Within close vicinity to the hotel are several public Car Parks with rates for 24-hour parking.

Name: Drifter
Description:
Drifter is a new generation of hybrid hotel-hostels, designed for the free-spirited and the curious.
Launched in 2024 across Australia and New Zealand, Drifter blends premium private rooms with elevated shared suite options, offering travellers the comfort of a boutique hotel and the connection of a hostel.
With properties now open in Sydney, Melbourne, Canberra, Cairns and Christchurch, Drifter and its sibling brand Little Drifter bring together a community of travellers through beautifully designed accommodation and thoughtfully curated communal spaces. Guests enjoy access to wellness studios, cinema rooms, coworking lounges, bars, libraries and social areas—each space designed to foster connection, creativity and a sense of place.
And we’re just getting started—with new Drifter locations set to open in Byron Bay, Auckland and Wellington.
Whether you're looking to rest, explore, create or connect, Drifter is designed for the young and young at heart.

Name: LIVØ
Description:
Nærvær, fælleskab og bæredygtighed
Livø er en super ramme for alle aktiviteter for organisationen på tur. Vi har fokus på samvær, nærvær, Go´mad og natur.
Øen er ejet af staten og feriecenteret der faciliterer alle aktiviteter på øen er drevet af Køgemester & Oldfrue siden 2017.
Landsbyen på Livø er det ideelle udgangspunkt for storslåede naturoplevelser rundturen om på øen. 
Men først og fremmest er her smukt og idyllisk.
Her finder Købmands café, forsamlingshus, de tidligere institutions bygninger, med feriecenterets godt 250sengepladser (hotel og vandrehjem), teltplads, udstillinger om Livø’s historie samt bondegården, der er nervecentret i øens økologiske demonstrations landbrug.

Fra april til oktober er byen rammen om Livø’s gæster og om vinteren hjemsted for 5 helårs beboere, exclusive arrangementer kaldet "Livø efter lukketid", retreats etc.

Gæster må ikke medbringe biler, hvilket gør byens gader til en sikker legeplads for børn og barnlige sjæle. 
Gåturen fra færgen er ca. 700 m og tager 10 minutter. 
Se mere på www.livo.dk
