Description: Ideally located in the heart of Dubai, UAE, Majestic Premier Hotel is only minutes away from Dubai Downtown, Dubai International Airport (DXB), and famous tourist attractions such as Historical Bastakiya, Dubai Museum, Spice Markets and the Souk. Gather your family or friends and experience a wonderful stay at Majestic Premier Hotel

Name: Pine Trails Jungle Camp Kasauli
Description:
Pine Trails Jungle Camp is an adventure resort, situated in a valley in Dharampur, Kasauli. This mountain getaway is just a 45-minute drive from Chandigarh and is surrounded by lush green pine trees, which is a relaxing retreat with all the comforts of luxury property.

This beautiful property is having 4 BHK villas, wooden cottages, alpine tents, a rooftop restaurant, a waterfall, a swimming pool, a fruit orchard, and adventure activities.

Name: ZECORP SOLUTIONS
Description:
ZECORP Solutions is a turn-key solution provider based in Dubai which was established in the year 2013. It has grown immensely dedicating itself exclusively in achieving excellence in the field of Turn-Key project solutions with integrated services in satisfying the requirements of our valued clients.

ZECORP Solutions FZE LLC is unique in the region, offering Turn-Key solutions to commercial kitchen industry . This makes us exclusive as one stop solution for all food service industry needs...such as Kitchen Design | Equipment Supply | MEP service Layout, | SS Custom Fabrication | Maintenance | Spare Parts | AMC..etc

Name: Banyan Tree Phuket
Description:
EMBRACE LUXURIOUS COMFORT IN THE PEARL OF THE ANDAMAN

Step into a world of natural beauty and unparalleled indulgence at Banyan Tree Phuket. A private paradise, this Phuket resort offers luxurious all-pool villas nestled around a lagoon and surrounded by lush greenery - making this the perfect destination for travellers seeking a romantic retreat, golf getaway, relaxing staycation, or a base from which to explore this beautiful island and its heritage, culture and stunning beaches.

Designed for anyone looking for exceptional experiences, DoublePool Villas by Banyan Tree Phuket gives you an intimate and serene environment with the luxury of space. Set within a tropical garden with twin pools in which to luxuriate, each villa also comes with the tailored hospitality services of a personal villa host.

Name: The Lodgers
Description: Experience unmatched luxury with The Lodgers Hospitality, offering six premium properties in the heart of Gurugram. As one of the best luxury hotels in Gurugram, we provide elegant 1 & 2 BHK serviced apartments designed for both short and extended stays, with modern amenities and exceptional service. Ideal for business and leisure travellers, our hotels feature spacious banquet halls for memorable events, premium dining options, and easy access to Gurugram’s main attractions. Book with The Lodgers to enjoy comfort, convenience, and luxury in prime Gurugram locations.

Name: EMBAJADORES DE MARCA GRUPO POSADAS
Description: Somos un grupo de líderes de opinión que buscamos compartir tendencias y estrategias comerciales del sector hotelero, a través de un canal digital para interactuar e integrar una comunidad que conlleve a la apertura de nuevos mercados.

Name: Bavaro Beach Dakhla
Description: Notre charmant boutique hôtel de luxe vous accueille dans un cadre paradisiaque avec une vue sublime sur la lagune. Tout y est pensé pour que vous passiez un séjour luxueux, dans une l’ambiance conviviale 100% feel good.

Name: FRANQ
Description:
FRANQ awakens all your senses! 

Feel at home in the luxurious and timeless elegance of this former old bank building building. Whether you are travelling for business or pleasure, on a city trip or on a longer break in the city, Hotel FRANQ is always your perfect destination.

Name: Hotel New Anand Palace
Description: Hotel New Anand Palace offers best rooms at reasonable price with full comfort. The hotel is only a step away from the main bus and railway stations. This hotel is perfect for those who want to spend a peaceful holiday / business meets / birthday celebrations. Certain rooms have a seating area where you can relax.

Name: Amman International Hotel
Description:
Amman International is a five-star boutique Hotel, ideally located at Queen Rania Street, within a walking distance of Jordan university and Al-Madina Al-Monawara street which is one of the most prestigious shopping centers in Amman. The hotel is about 30 minutes drive from the airport, whilst the Royal Culture center, military museum, sports city is just about 10 minutes drive from the hotel.
The 100 elegantly appointed guest rooms are spacious with stunning views of Amman and magnificent amenities, air-conditioned rooms with wireless high speed internet access, and 56” flat screen smart TV with access to YouTube and streaming on line entertainment, hot bath tub or walk in rain shower. Complimentary tea, coffee and mineral water, mini bar and the rest.
Amman International Hotel offer a range of exceptional venues with a diverse range of gastronomical experiences such as Leonardo Da Vinci Restaurant, Rouge restaurant bar, La Terrace, Dentelle Restaurant, The Grand Lounge.
The Oasis beauty and fitness spa offer an array of life style and encompassing well-being, it combines an exclusive facility focusing on fitness, movement, top beauty and aesthetics that are best in their class.
Amman International Hotel organizes special conferences, events, wedding receptions, and gala dinners in addition guided city tours and day trips around Jordan.
Free valet and security round the clock, also private parking available on site.

Name: Hotel Europa, Aabenraa
Description:
Hotel Europa – midt i Aabenraa
Vi tilbyder moderne værelser, lækre madoplevelser og professionelle konferencefaciliteter – alt sammen med personlig service i centrum.

Vores konferencegæster nyder Bent Hansen designerstole, friskbrygget kaffe, te fra Carstensens Tehandel og mad fra vores køkken, der mestrer alt fra vegetar/veganerretter til klassisk smørrebrød.
Med plads til op til 150 deltagere og fleksible opsætninger skaber vi de ideelle rammer for møder, kurser og arrangementer – lige ved gågaden, lystbådehavnen og stranden i Aabenraa.

Name: Sydney Hotel - Galle
Description: Sydney Hotel began our humble roots in the heart of the Galle city in 1921 serving and quenching the thirst of the bustling community with the most sought beverages in the island.

Name: Mövenpick Hotel Brussels Airport
Description:
Mövenpick hotel Brussels Airport is a flagship hotel of the Mövenpick Hotels and Resorts part of Accor, located near the airport and the historic center of Brussels. 

We offer 151 stylish rooms for both short and long stays, a wellness, a fitness centre, and a unique culinary experience at our rooftop Brasserie, Horizon, provided by our awarded Chef Roland Debuyst and the Parking21. Positioned as the leading premium choice within the 4* hotels at Brussels Airport, the hotel distinguishes itself through a striking, design-led interior inspired by Belgium’s iconic surrealist art. As the newest hotel on the premium market, open for just one year, it offers a fresh, contemporary experience further enhanced by the area’s most acclaimed restaurant making it the clear choice for discerning travellers seeking style, quality and excellence.

Name: Hilton Garden Inn Surat
Description: Hilton Garden Inn Surat offers an Exclusive stay, and uplifting vibes. Surat is all set to welcome you for the hospitality.

Name: Garde Hotels
Description:
Bij Garde Hotels weten we hoe het is om de behoefte te hebben het leven even on hold te zetten. Om tijd te geven aan momenten die er echt toe doen en met beide benen in het nu te staan. Tijd is ten slotte een gegeven, maar het is aan jou om te bepalen hoe en met wie je die besteedt. En de ideale locatie? Daar hebben wij voor gezorgd. 
Een plek waar verleden, heden en toekomst samensmelten. Voel je welkom in een van onze hotels, ervaar rust en ruimte en geniet van de intieme en persoonlijke aandacht in onze monumentale hotels. 

Garde Hotels verwelkomt zowel zakelijke als leisure gasten.

Name: Opentours
Description: Opentours, fundada en 1966 en Torremolinos, celebra más de 50 años de trayectoria como agencia mayorista de viajes. Su valor diferencial radica en la cercanía y el servicio personalizado que ofrece a las agencias, destacando por su capacidad de adaptación y resolución de problemas. La compra directa a hoteles les permite ofrecer precios competitivos y un servicio independiente.

Name: The Zuri Whitefield, Bengaluru
Description:
Located in the midst of a bustling business locality yet far from the cacophony of a metropolis and just 45 minutes from the International Airport, The Zuri Whitefield is a chic business hotel that offers guests a refreshing brand of hospitality with style and sophistication. Located at the heart of Bengaluru in Whitefield, The Zuri Whitefield encapsulates the essence of this vibrant city with its young and trendy soul. Optimized to cater to the global business traveler as well as the leisure seeker, there’s everything to pamper guests and ensure that they are well attended to at all times, while they are at the city popularly known as India’s ‘Silicon Valley’.

Chic in decor and detail, every room at The Zuri Whitefield is designed to keep you comfortable in style. With a choice spanning the Zuri Room, the Zuri Club Room, the Junior Suite, and the Presidential Suites, each room is well equipped with modern amenities like a multi-room entertainment system, a 32″ LCD television with satellite channels, an electronic safe, mini-bar, complimentary high-speed wireless internet and more.

Be it a business meeting, workshop, seminar, training session, wedding, social event or private dinner, there’s simply no occasion that The Zuri cannot play the perfect host to. Equipped with multiple halls that cater to different needs, it has facilities that can be customized to ensure that every experience is as unique as guests wish it to be. All are backed by state-of-the-art communications systems, presentation facilities, and banquet services.

To each one his own. That’s the delicious variety of cuisine one can indulge in at The Zuri. Start with a choice of five F&B outlets including an exquisite Pan-Asian restaurant and lounge, a poolside barbeque, and even a Cigar Lounge. No matter what their tastes are, guests can experience the most appetizing spread, courtesy of our team of renowned chefs.

Name: The Red Container
Description:
Looking for a place to reset and relax,the red container is the place for you

The red container is unique "off the grid" stay with modern decor. It is well insulated and create the perfect getaway with all the essentials you could need. The outdoor living space has ample room to roam, play, cook, and enjoy.

Take the opportunity to unplug, unwind, read a book, sit back, relax, and enjoy the scenery.
The space
Enjoy the red container with a modern flair. It is spacious enough to relax inside and you can extend the living space into the outdoor deck .
Bring your own food for grilling and use the kitchen for a feast.
An outdoor grill is readily available to enjoy grilled meat/chicken.

Experience nature in a whole new way with our incredible outdoor shower.

Bonfire is also on site to enjoy those cold nights as you watch the beautiful stars.

For sleeping, there is a queen size bed.We have all the necessary sheets/blankets/ bedding available
Guest access
Restroom and shower is available in the container .

You can cook using our gas cooker ,over a fire pit or grill. We have a few kitchen supplies pots/pans for you to use. The “kitchen” container is accessible and there are plenty of extra supplies in there. Feel free

We hope you get to enjoy the outdoor living space. It’s the real star of the show. However it gets pretty dark out here. Perfect for star gazing. But if you would like the patio lights on the switch is located inside the container
Other things to note
Enjoy the red container with a modern flair. It is spacious enough to relax inside and you can extend the living space into the outdoor deck .
Bring your own food for grilling and use the kitchen for a feast.

An outdoor grill is available ,you can enjoy some grilled meat/chicken

Bonfire is also available as you watch the stars.

For sleeping, there is a queen size bed. We have all the necessary sheets/blankets/ bedding available

Name: Condo.pl | Apartamenty inwestycyjne i Second Home

W naszej ofercie prezentujemy wyselekcjonowane produkty inwestycyjne, za którymi przemawiają przemyślane lokalizacje, projekty z najlepszych biur projektowych, odpowiedzialni inwestorzy oraz solidni wykonawcy. Description: We take pleasure in being the unique brand-new, centrally air-conditioned luxurious hotel in Sylhet, located near the magnificent Shada Pathor, Volagonj, Companignj, Sylhet. Shada Pathor welcomes you to Sylhet.

Name: Hotel Mirage Regency
Description:
Hotel Mirage Regency, located in one of the best residential and commercial hub in Kathmandu. The Hotel offers 60 modern rooms and suites to choose from.

Mirage Regency offers perfect setting for meetings, workshop and celebrations with amenities for all social and business gatherings. The hotel is located on Battisputali road in Kathmandu which is 1.8 km from Tribhuvan International Airport, 1.0 km from Pashupatinath Temple & 2.8 kms from Boudhanath. The hotel is also reachable to major tourist attractions like New Road, Malls, Durbar Marg, Thamel etc. within the radius of 5kms.

Name: Four Points Le Verdun Hotel
Description: The Four Points by Sheraton Le Verdun is ideally located 10 minutes’ drive from the National Museum, walking distance to ABC Shopping Mall, our hotel ranks among the best Beirut has to offer, as well as cultural and business hubs. Rafic Hariri International airport can be reached in 10 minutes by car. Whether you’re visiting for work or fun, you’re in for a great stay in each of our 132 modern, comfortable and spacious hotel guest rooms. Our connecting rooms are ideal for families and extended stays. Start each day with a good breakfast at Bistro, our all-day International dining restaurant & guests can explore selected best brews in the lobby bar. Get active at the Gym, and enjoy our outdoor pool, an ideal location for intimate social events. Additionally, our four well-designed meeting spaces offer everything you need for a successful event. The Four Points by Sheraton Le Verdun hotel allows comfort in travel in the cultural city of Beirut.

Description: With spectacular views from every angle, CROCO is Mykonos' newest and most current destination hotel – a sterling blend of place and space where refined luxury converges with next-level sophisticated indulgence

Name: Hotell Hehrne Kök och Konferens
Description:
Hotell Hehrne i Vänersborg erbjuder en naturnära och avkopplande miljö med utsikt över Götaälv. Hotellet har totalt 42 rum, alla utrustade med moderna bekvämligheter som gratis WiFi, kabel-TV och eget badrum.

För konferenser erbjuder Hotell Hehrne flera moderna och flexibla konferenslokaler, inklusive den historiska Villa Hehrne. Här finns plats för både små och stora möten, med kapacitet för upp till 246 personer i 12 lokaler.

Hotellet ligger i en 50 ha stor park med en stor skulpturpark med stora skulpturer från internationellt kända konstnärer.

I omgivningarna finns många besöksanledningar, såsom Hunneberg naturreservat, Golfbana. Hotellet erbjuder även aktiviteter som fiske i Göta älv, fotboll, frisbeegolf och en mängd olika aktiviteter på plats och har även bubbelbad utomhus!

Pilgrimsleden från Göteborg -  Vänersborg ansluter till Hotellets område vid Brinkeberg Kulles sluss !

Name: Fleischer's Hotel
Description: Historic and classical hotel with modern facilities in Voss, the heart of Fjord Norway. Family owned and run by the 5. generation host. Established by Fredrik Fleischer in 1864. Swiss style building dating from 1889. Hotel history with roots to 1835 in Voss. Family roots dating from 1750.

Name: Pousadela Village
Description:
Pousadela Village - Among Nature

Located in Louredo da Ribeira - Vieira do Minho, about 30 Kms from Braga, and 90 kms from Porto Airport, Pousadela Village is a 4 star tourist resort, which has 11 houses of various typologies. In a full contact with nature, these houses are quietly positioned on the green mountain slope of Cabreira mountain, with a magnificent view of Cávado river and Caniçada lagoon.
In addition to the relaxing mountain landscape, you can also enjoy our swimming pools, as well as our restaurant, bar and spa services.
In the restaurant Pousadela, you can taste several typical dishes of the region, carefully selected and prepared for you.
The Pousadela Village puts at your disposal all the means for a deep relaxation, being able to enjoy all the benefits that nature offers to renew its energies.

Our offer: 
- Accommodation: 11 houses
- Restaurant (100 people)
- Bar
- Spa
- Reception
- Exterior and interior pool
- Private parking lot
- Garden e viewpoint with leisure equipments
- Reading granary
- Activities: pedestrians, nature, nautical and radical

For more info visit our website at www.pousadela.pt

Name: Discovery SCBD
Description: Discovery SCBD presents a refined fusion of urban sophistication and upscale comfort in Jakarta's most iconic business district. Immerse yourself in world-class dining that celebrates the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesia. Perfectly positioned in the hearth of the city, our strategic location offers effortless access to Jakarta's premier attractions, business hubs, and vibrant cultural scene.
Location: Kebayoran Baru, Special capital Region of Jakarta

Name: Hotel Bonalba Alicante
Description:
Bienvenidos al Hotel Bonalba Alicante, un hotel de 4 superior situado en un entorno tranquilo y rodeado de naturaleza, en el corazón de la Costa Blanca.

Rodeado de jardines tropicales y con una amplia piscina exterior, el hotel ofrece un ambiente acogedor y relajante, ideal para desconectar.

Nuestro centro wellness pone a tu disposición masajes y tratamientos pensados para el bienestar. Y si te apasiona el golf, el campo de Bonalba es un referente en la Comunidad Valenciana.

Tanto para una escapada como para unas vacaciones junto al Mediterráneo, Bonalba es el lugar perfecto para descansar y disfrutar.

Name: Pearl Paradise Resort
Description:
Pearl Paradise Resort | Your Luxurious Escape in Paradise

Welcome to Pearl Paradise Resort, where we redefine the art of hospitality by offering an exquisite blend of comfort, elegance, and extraordinary experiences. Nestled in a stunning tropical setting with panoramic ocean views, our resort is the perfect destination for travelers seeking relaxation, adventure, and unforgettable memories.

At Pearl Paradise Resort, we pride ourselves on providing meticulously designed accommodations that cater to every guest's needs, from spacious suites to luxurious villas. Each space is thoughtfully equipped with modern amenities, elegant decor, and breathtaking vistas to ensure a truly relaxing stay.
Our culinary offerings feature gourmet dining options, showcasing local flavors and international cuisine prepared by world-class chefs. Whether you're enjoying a romantic dinner by the sea or a lively gathering with friends and family, our restaurants promise a delightful gastronomic experience.

For those seeking rejuvenation, our full-service spa & wellness center offers a range of treatments and therapies designed to refresh body and mind. Active guests can enjoy a variety of recreational activities, including water sports, golf, yoga, and guided excursions to explore the surrounding natural beauty.

Pearl Paradise Resort is also a premier venue for corporate retreats, conferences, weddings, and special celebrations. Our event spaces are equipped with modern technology and personalized services to ensure every event is executed flawlessly.

We are committed to providing exceptional service with attention to detail in every aspect of your stay. Our dedicated team strives to create a welcoming atmosphere, making every guest feel like part of our paradise.

Visit us online at www.pearlparadiseresort.com to explore our accommodations, amenities, and special packages. Whether you're planning a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or a corporate event we are here for you.

Name: Courtyard by Marriott Brussels
Description: Discover a winning blend of convenience and style in Belgium at Courtyard Brussels. Boasting an ideal city center location, our 4-star Evere hotel provides easy access to popular destinations, including fine dining, historic monuments, NATO Headquarters, the Business district, Grand Place and Brussels Airport. Inside our updated hotel, you'll find a wealth of amenities. Tackle deadlines while in Belgium in our lobby media pods or host meetings or events in one of our nine well-designed venues. Our facilities are supported by expert planning services, catering and state-of-the-art technology. Stretch your muscles in our 24-hour fitness center or rejuvenate in our sauna. Treat yourself to international cuisine and cocktails in our delicious hotel restaurant or bar. Recharge in spacious hotel rooms and junior suites featuring deluxe designer bedding, sitting areas, natural lighting and Wi-Fi. No matter what brings you to our hotel, we look forward to welcoming you at Courtyard Brussels.

Name: Hospedagem Costa Blumenau-SC
Description: Prestamos duas modalidades de atendimento em formato de hospedagem domiciliar que fornece o custo benefício durante seu passeio/trabalho. Em nossa primeira modalidade são os quartos possuem banheiros privativos e ambientes sociais compartilhados como cozinha, sala e estacionamento. Em nossa segunda modalidade são os apartamentos inteiros com banheiros privativos e todos ambientes sociais privativos.

Description:
Novotel Tainui Hamilton is a 4.5 star hotel located in the heart of the CBD on the banks of the Waikato River.
The restaurant, bar, conference facilities and accommodation rooms provide contemporary spaces and furnishings with modern technology and culturally influenced artwork.
Well situated to access the surrounding region, the hotel balances business and leisure, featuring onsite parking, gym, sauna & spa.

Name: Holiday Villa KSA || فنادق هوليداي فيلا السعودية
Description: Holiday Villa Hail is part of the Holiday Villa chain, a global hospitality company based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. The group has a long history and extensive experience in managing hotels and resorts around the world. In the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, pine collection company is the official agent for Holiday Villa, which started its operations in 2017, providing high-end hospitality services with international standards that combine luxury and comfort. The hotel is distinguished by its strategic location in the city of Hail, making it ideal for business and leisure guests. The hotel is keen to provide a distinctive accommodation experience that reflects the local heritage with the spirit of authentic Arab hospitality. The most prominent features offered by Holiday Villa Hail: • Modernly designed rooms and suites equipped with the best facilities. • Upscale services including fitness centers and spa. • Restaurants serving a variety of dishes that combine international and local flavors. • Meeting and event halls equipped with the latest technology. Holiday Villa Hail is the ideal destination for anyone looking for comfort and excellent service in an atmosphere full of distinction.

Poza szkoleniami i kameralnymi eventami Na Łąkę przyjeżdżają zespoły na workation czy prace projektowe. Łąkowe przestrzenie służą też jako tło do sesji fotograficznych i warsztatów video.

Ile jest miejsc Na Łące
 do 15 osób w opcji z noclegiem

Gotujemy na miejscu, a o naszym jedzeniu zaczynają już krążyć legendy - jest pysznie, kolorowo i aromatycznie, sezonowe produkty pochodzą od lokalnych rolników.

a na zewnątrz: tarasy, miejsce na ognisko, i już za chwilę strefa relaksu

Name: Desert Hospitality Management
Description:
Desert Hospitality Management is raising the bar for professional hotel management companies across the industry.

A fresh perspective and people-over-process mindset allows us to expertly manage properties and exceed expectations with employees, guests, brands, and owners alike. Each member of our highly engaged, service obsessed team shares a mutual passion for bringing a distinct personal brand to each property in our portfolio.

Our philosophy is deeply rooted in the importance of humility, happiness, and hard work - a customized, caring management approach that maximizes employee engagement, guest satisfaction, and community involvement to ensure long-term success.

Name: Hotel Noorjahan Grand
Description:
Soaring high above downtown Sylhet, Hotel Noorjahan Grand is an iconic landmark that offers the ultimate luxury in accommodation. Proposing a unique lifestyle experience, the hotel promises to offer nothing less than excellent service. Whether it is business or pleasure that brings you to town, our hotel address is centrally located to all major tourist attractions. Within 5mins walking distance of the top attraction of the city-Hazrat Shahjalal Mazar, our hotel is the perfect place to call home while discovering the very best this city has to offer. Our room’s chic modern style offers the amenities and style desired by business and leisure guests alike. Decorated to reflect the sophistication with wallpapers in sumptuous textures and crisp white bed linens, it is your sleek hideaway in the city. Rooms of understated elegance feature a generous workstation, crocodile leather sofas, 32-inch flat-screen TV, electronic safe, bedside charging station, coffee maker, and a fully-stocked mini bar. The elegant bathroom features a clean-lined washstand, a combination of Italian granite & tile surfaces, and a separate step-in shower. WiFi is accessible for free on the hotel premises.
We welcome you to witness our unparalleled luxury !!!

Name: AJNA RESORTS
Description:
Ajna Resorts is an upcoming 5-Star Deluxe destination in the heart of the Himalayas, nestled in the serene landscapes of Jagatsukh, Manali (Himachal Pradesh). Spanning over an acre of lush, Deodar forest land, Ajna is designed to be a sanctuary where modern luxury meets timeless nature.

With 122 thoughtfully curated keys, including 110 elegantly appointed rooms and 12 exclusive 3- to 4-bedroom villas, Ajna offers a blend of indulgence and intimacy. Every accommodation is designed to connect guests with nature — whether it’s soaking in a luxurious bathtub with panoramic forest and river views, enjoying snowfall from skylight-equipped rooms, or basking in the abundant natural light that fills each space.

Positioned above a pristine river and facing a protected reserve forest, Ajna provides an unparalleled escape — a place for relaxation, adventure, and rejuvenation. Guests can unwind in our spacious, high-ceiling reception, explore boutique shops offering locally crafted antiques and souvenirs, or enjoy refreshments at our on-site cafeteria — all within our 8,000 sq. ft. welcoming area.

Whether you're seeking a peaceful retreat or a luxury Himalayan experience, Ajna Resorts invites you to rediscover yourself in a world where nature and opulence coexist beautifully.

108 Bedrooms including 25 family bedrooms and suites
Guests enjoy complimentary access to Health and Leisure centre- including 17.5M swimming pool and outdoor hot tub.
Award Winning Spa
 Outdoor play area, 3G pitch, basketball courts, tennis courts and crazy golf for the whole family to enjoy
Landscaped Gardens that are perfect for a relaxed stroll.
Complimentary Parking and Complimentary Wifi throughout the hotel
A Leading wedding venue with spectacular views. A range of Banquet suites suit everything from an intimate civil ceremony to a large wedding reception. 
8 conference rooms suitable for any size of conference from one individual to 750 delegates.

Only 20 minute drive to medieval village of Carlingford with rich local historical heritage, the Carrickdale Hotel & Spa is the perfect choice for your holiday destination. The legendary Ring of Gullion also steeped in Celtic mythology is less than a 5 minute drive from the hotel so planning your itinerary could be your most difficult decision of your holiday

Description:
Thorbjørnrud Hotel has over 30 years of experience in accommodation, meetings, and conferences combined with excellent food and drink experiences.

We offer 82 hotel rooms, 18 meeting rooms, and an auditorium accommodating up to 130 participants in a cinema-style setting.

Cultural experiences such as Hadeland Glassverk and the Kistefos Museum are also nearby.

We have also put a lot of effort into creating a vibrant, colorful, and inspiring hotel using interior design, art, and the historical garden. The venerable Director's Residence retains its original old-fashioned romantic style and is used for meetings, events, and dinners, while the hotel wing has a modern expression with large glass surfaces and high ceilings, providing bright and airy common areas.

Thorbjørnrud Hotel is owned by 3 Norske.

Name: Disney Lillian House -Terra Verde Resort - Walt Disney World Vacation Home
Description:
Disney Lillian House at Terra Verde Resort is a magical and relaxing vacation rental located in Kissimmee, Florida just 12 minutes southeast of Walt Disney World Gates, 15 minutes south of Universal, SeaWorld, and other famous attractions of Central Florida. Located within the gates of the award winning Terra Verde Resort. Featuring 2100sqft, a fully furnished 4 bedroom 3 bathroom single family home complete with all the essentials including linens, towels, full size washer and dryer, all kitchen utensils and appliances. Each bedroom has upgraded linens, closets, dressers, night stands, and flat screen TV's with cable! The family room hosts a sleeper sofa, flat screen TV and overlooks the beautiful private pool, hot tub and community lake! A fantastic game room with pool table, foosball and flat screen TV. To help with packing the home also has a few baby essentials such as a pack and play and booster/high chair. The home also features Wi-Fi and local and long distance calling (within North America).
The award winning Terra Verde Resort Community includes a 6,000 sqft clubhouse with concierge, sauna, fitness and game room, business center, lounge with flat screen TVs. Step outside to an amazing array of activities: zero entry pool, hot tub, The Lagoon Tiki Bar & Grill, shuffle board, mini-golf, basketball, ping pong, kids play area, hammocks over-looking the tranquil community lake and so much more! 
Don't hesitate to contact us if you have any questions! HAPPY DISNEY VACATION PLANNING!

Name: Camaroncito EcoResort and Beach - On Panama's Caribbean, 5-Star Reviews, All-Inclusive Vacations
Description:
Final Chapter of an Eco-Resort Paradise

Camaroncito EcoResort & Beach, a true passion project, will close permanently on March 31, 2026. After a decade-long wait for the promised government road, the operational costs have become too high to sustain.

This is your final opportunity to experience a unique, barefoot-luxury retreat. Our last season runs from January to March 2026. We invite you to book your escape and enjoy a place where pristine rainforest meets a private Caribbean beach cove one last time.

About Camaroncito

More than a resort, Camaroncito is a sanctuary for authentic joy, located on 16 acres of untouched rainforest on Panama's Caribbean coast.

My name is Sarah, and as an avid traveler and the creator behind Camaroncito, I designed this space for those seeking to reconnect with nature and themselves. We’ve blended the comfort of a private beachfront cabana with the ease of an all-inclusive resort. Here, you get gourmet meals, an open bar, and endless adventures without a single worry.

Walk our rainforest trails, swim in a sparkling waterfall, or simply relax in a hammock, sipping a cocktail while listening to the symphony of the jungle. Our remote, limited-access location is a core part of the experience, offering an off-the-grid escape.

We are a proud sanctuary for all adults (age 6+), including the LGBTQ community, and we even welcome reliable off-leash pets.

Camaroncito: Where Barefoot Luxury Meets Pristine Rainforest on Panama's Caribbean Coast.

Book your final stay now at www.camaroncito.net/reservations.

Description:
Welcome to Lyra Hotel Plitvice – A Modern 4-Star Retreat at the Gateway to Croatia’s Natural Wonder

Lyra Hotel Plitvice is a newly opened 4-star hotel located near the world-renowned Plitvice Lakes National Park, one of Croatia’s most visited destinations with over 2 million visitors annually.

Strategically positioned near what will soon become a major state road connecting northern and southern Croatia, Lyra is an ideal base for both leisure and group travellers.

WARMTH IN EVERY DETAIL
It's the little things that matter the most. A warm smile, a thoughtful
gesture, or remembering the table you prefer to sit at during breakfast
– these seemingly simple elements, done exceptionally well, create a
lasting impression.
ELEVATED ESSENTIALS
Filipino hospitality doesn't rely on extravagant gestures or luxury
amenities. It focuses on mastering the basics – attentive service, a
clean and comfortable environment, and genuine care – and elevating them to an art form.
LASTING CONNECTIONS
By focusing on the basics done well, we foster genuine connections with
guests. It's not about creating an illusion of grandeur; it's about
creating an environment where
guests feel welcome and cared for like family.
LEGACY OF FILIPINO HOSPITALITYThe "basics done well" will be our
signature hospitality philosophy. It will be a philosophy that transcends trends, ensuring a consistently warm and welcoming experience for all our guests.

Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Berlin Ku'damm
Description:
Nur wenige Schritte vom berühmten Kurfürstendamm entfernt und direkt am hübschen Los-Angeles-Platz liegt das DoubleTree by Hilton Berlin Ku´damm. Es ist das erste Haus der Hilton-Submarke in Berlin, das dritte in Deutschland und – so Hotelmanager Hannes Dreher – „das vielleicht schönste in Europa“. 16 Monate dauerte die umfassende Renovierung des großen Gebäudes am Los-Angeles-Platz, das 1981 als Steigenberger Hotel eröffnete und lange Zeit eine der ersten Adressen Berlins war. 
Ob Alice Cooper, Marlon Brando, Luciano Pavarotti oder Tina Turner – sie alle logierten einst hier. 2019 erwarb die amerikanische Blackstone Group, einer der weltstärksten Investoren im Bereich Alternative Investments, das in die Jahre gekommene Gebäude. Betreiber wurden die Event Hotels aus Köln, die damit ihr Portfolio auf fünf Häuser in Berlin erhöhten. Das elegante wie kühne Design stammt vom mehrfach ausgezeichneten Designbüro Virserius Studio NY der Schwestern Therese und Regina Virserius. 
Mit seinen 420 Zimmern, darunter 15 Suiten, sowie einer Konferenzfläche von über 800 Quadratmetern ist das DoubleTree by Hilton Berlin Ku´damm eines der größten Hotels in der City. Das Restaurant verfügt über 260 Sitzplätze. Rechtliche Informationen (Impressum und Datenschutzerklärung) sind abrufbar unter 'Website'.

Name: Terrantai Lodge | Hotel
Description:
Terrantai is part of the so-called ‘typical zone’ of San Pedro de Atacama. For us, the preservation of the cultural heritage of this historic house is a priority. Each corner has been preserved in its original state, highlighting the identity of the Atacameño architecture.
A small native hotel in the heart of San Pedro de Atacama.
Terrantai is a historic 19th century home with a unique history and location. In 1980, the Chilean government declared the buildings constructed around the church of San Pedro de Atacama to be part of the “Historical Sector”.

The construction of the hotel was carried out in 1996. The preservation of the cultural heritage of this historic house was and is a priority. The reception and lobby areas, as well as the rooms along the original corridors, have been preserved in their original state, preserving the originality of the Atacama architecture.

Name: Blue Casas Afetivas | Travel Atelier | Family Collection
Description:
Experiências de viagem que vão além do destino.
Nós escolhemos lugares que acolhem com carinho e revelam um jeito único de viver o mundo.

Acreditamos que cada estadia deve ser mais do que apenas uma hospedagem — deve ser uma oportunidade para viver momentos inesquecíveis. Nosso propósito é proporcionar experiências de hospedagem em casas com alma, onde famílias podem se reconectar e criar memórias para toda a vida. Conhecer novas formas de viver tem o poder de transformar, e queremos que cada casa escolhida para nossas estadias proporcione isso.

A nossa curadoria é muito cuidadosa para oferecermos casas acolhedoras de verdade, criando o cenário perfeito para que famílias em períodos de férias escrevam novas histórias. Nosso trabalho acontece no Brasil e em alguns outros países, sobretudo na Europa, lugar onde não faltam histórias impressionantes. Cada uma dessas casas de férias pertence a famílias que se identificam com o nosso propósito de acolhimento e hospitalidade.

Eu sou Hellen Pareto, casada com Rodrigo e mãe da Helena e do Gabriel. Essas são as minhas credenciais mais importantes. Minha paixão por criar momentos que aproximam as pessoas foi o que deu origem à Blue. O que começou com a ideia de hospedar de maneira acolhedora executivos em São Paulo se transformou em algo muito maior. Hoje, a Blue oferece experiências em casas de férias de famílias ao redor do Brasil e do mundo, com cada detalhe pensado para que cada estadia seja repleta de momentos únicos.

Por eso, contamos con la Sala Batela, un espacio polivalente diseñado para todo tipo de eventos en 'Petit Comité': reuniones, banquetes, conferencias, presentaciones comerciales... Además, para que las reuniones de trabajo sean un auténtico éxito, contamos con el equipo culinario de 'La Jarana', el rincón gastronómico situado justo debajo del Hotel Lasala Plaza, liderado por el chef Ander González. Su amplia oferta gastronómica invita a los comensales a disfrutar de un recorrido por la cocina tradicional vasca actualizada. Así que, si estáis pensando en organizar un evento en Lasala Plaza, podréis solicitar y degustar el amplio abanico de pintxos que esconde esta oferta gastronómica.

¿Quieres saber más? Pídenos información y reúne a tu equipo de negocio en nuestra Sala Batela!

Como empresa, nos destacamos por nuestro compromiso con la sustentabilidad y la hospitalidad. Somos parte del programa "Hoteles más Verdes", participando en el nivel Bronce, lo que refleja nuestro esfuerzo por integrar prácticas sostenibles en todas nuestras operaciones.

Description:
Prepare to meet Petite Acres, a luxury space to stay, play, host, and move in the heart of New Buffalo Michigan Coming Soon

 Gorgeous accommodations for weddings, events, relaxing stays, and retreats. Name: Stella Makadi Hotels & Resorts
Description:
Stella Beach Resort & Spa
High quality accommodation services.

Located in Makadi Bay, one of the most beautiful Riviera’s in the Red Sea. Makadi is a peaceful bay with many opportunities for snorkelling and scuba diving. The semi-tropical climate makes this both a summer and winter resort. Stella Makadi Beach Resort & Spa with its warm, healthy climate and the beauties of the coral reefs, is renowned as a place to delight sun-seekers and water sports enthusiasts alike.

Makadi Bay is 30 km south of Hurghada’s  International  Airport. The location makes it easy to access the town of Hurghada, and there are many other remarkable places of interest nearby, such as the island of Giftun, which is a Marine National Park, where desert and marine life are nature reserve. In fact, much of the Red Sea areas have a protected status. Stella Makadi Beach Resort & Spa is situated direct to the beach, and has a spectacular house reef very close by, which guests may use for snorkelling.

Stella Gardens Resort & Spa
High quality accommodation services.

Located in the Makadi Bay area on the Red Sea Riviera, Stella
Gardens offers outdoor pools, a spa, a retail shopping arcade and a discotheque.

All rooms at Stella Gardens feature a balcony overlooking a
Garden or pool. Each room offers a satellite TV,Minibar and a safety
deposit box. The private bathroom includes a hairdryer, toiletries,
bath and shower.

Stella Gardens has numerous food and beverage outlets
with extensive cuisine to cater to all tastes. The restaurants serve
a-la-carte specialities and open-buffet style from Chinese & Lebanese
restaurants. Drinks are served at the Indoor lounge bar.

Name: Prime Asia Hotel
Description:
Prime Asia Hotel is a 6-story structure that serves as both a hotel and apartelle. The hotel has maintained its 4-star rating since its establishment in 2013. It is also accessible from all points in Greater Luzon via the North Luzon Expressway and other arterial highways – making it an excellent base for business and leisure. 
Prime Asia Hotel offers a variety of facilities and services that cater to various interests and preferences. 
We are one of the few hotels that are pet friendly. We are also one of the first hotels in the Philippines to offer a free EV charging station for our in-house guests.
Our all-day dining resto-bar, IMO bar, offers Asian fusion and international cuisine 24 hours a day. IMO bar overlooks amazing city views, in addition to being adjacent to our rooftop swimming pool that is open 24 hours to our in-house guests and outside visitors.
We have recently expanded our facilities to include a new spa, Nuxe, that offers a relaxing and rejuvenating experience to our guests.
Moreover, Coppa Cafe, located in the lobby, offers a variety of beverages and snacks 24 hours a day. 
Our most recent addition, Marsa Mediterranean Restaurant, offers a variety of authentic Mediterranean dishes that cater to culture enthusiasts who want to explore a unique gastronomy experience.

Description: The hotel's main building is located in the old Cutlery Mill in Fiskars Village. 24 hotel rooms have been built in the historic property, all of which have a view of the old ironworks area of Fiskars. The hotel has four meeting rooms of different sizes, a cozy lounge area and a sauna.

Name: Inn At Aspen
Description:
Conveniently located ski-in/ski-out at the base of Buttermilk Mountain The Inn at Aspen is an ideal resort for families and free-skiers alike. A ski school, ski rentals and the ticket office are all right there. Plus, it's just minutes from downtown Aspen and Snowmass.

The only ski-in, ski-out hotel located at the base of the Buttermilk Ski Resort, the Inn at Aspen Hotel is an obvious choice for a ski vacation to the Aspen area in Colorado. The Inn at Aspen is a boutique hotel property with a variety of renovated room types available featuring unique décor.

The Inn at Aspen Hotel provides family-friendly amenities and services including free wireless internet access and an onsite restaurant and bar.  Other on-site amenities include a heated outdoor pool, hot tub, steam room, health club, complimentary parking and courtesy shuttle to/from the Aspen Airport and downtown Aspen.

The Inn at Aspen is the host of ESPN television production and ESPN event staging operation teams. For reservations at The Inn at Aspen

Name: Omnia Mykonos Boutique Hotel
Description: Reflecting the island’s true spirit, the Omnia Mykonos boutique hotel, is all about dazzling indulgence, in real Mykonos fashion, at a stone’s throw from the glistening Aegean Sea. Set amidst a luscious, manicured garden, surrounded by exotic flowers and indigenous plants, Omnia is a brand new, design-oriented hotel with a pool, in scenic, cosmopolitan Ornos, just 200 meters away from the homonymous golden sandy beach, and a mere 2km from the iconic Chora.

Name: Playa Koralia
Description:
Ubicada a una hora de distancia del aeropuerto de Santa Marta; en las faldas de la montaña más grande del mundo a nivel del Mar Caribe colombiano, Playa Koralia emerge como un espejismo entre la sombra de las palmeras y la sinuosidad de una playa virgen de arenas puras que se extienden hasta donde llega la mirada.

----

Playa Koralia connects you to the natural world that is always surrounding us. Infusing spirit with a holistic touch, this boho-chic hotel is the embodiment of magical realism. For seekers, Playa Koralia is a time where everything is possible.

A unique nature hotel on the Caribbean coast near Santa Marta, Colombia. Situated along an impressive natural seashore with a luxurious barefoot chic aesthetic, distinctive architecture, and respect for traditional elements, Playa Koralia unfolds as an unparalleled experience.
Featuring art-imbued Cabañas with private hammocks, Bamboo Spa, a stylish bar and stunning beaches, Playa Koralia is the complete escape package. Relax, gaze across the breathtaking panoramic view and enjoy the peace of a virgin seashore. These are lasting emotions in the making.

Name: KUST Hotell & Spa
Description:
KUST Hotell & Spa är så mycket mer än norra Sveriges designhotell.
Det är en upptäcktsresa längs Piteälven – från fjällen i norr till hav och skärgård i söder. En berättelse i 14 kapitel, eller våningar om du så vill. Name: Park Plaza Chandigarh Zirakpur
Description: Offering scenic city views, Park Plaza Chandigarh Zirakpur is ideal for both leisure and business travelers seeking upscale, modern surroundings. Conveniently located off National Highway 5, our hotel provides easy transfer services to Chandigarh Railway Station and Chandigarh International Airport (IXC). Nearby attractions include Mahendra Chaudhary Zoological Park and Elante Mall. Unwind at our rooftop pool after a day of meetings or sightseeing. Enjoy local and international cuisine at our on-site dining venues or opt for 24-hour room service. Amenities include a fitness center, free Wi-Fi, and a complimentary breakfast buffet each morning. Plan your wedding reception or business conference in one of our six venues, accommodating up to 3,000 guests. Known as the wedding capital of the region, our elegant ballroom and outdoor lawn area offer the perfect setting for your celebration. Each venue features custom catering, audiovisual equipment, and a dedicated event staff.

Name: Residence Inn By Marriott London Downtown
Description:
Located in Canada's first UNESCO City of Music, the Residence Inn by Marriott London Downtown offers room for flexibility and freedom with our extra spacious, newly renovated suites that are much larger than the size of a standard hotel room. 

Enjoy all the city has to offer with our downtown location close to restaurants and attractions such as Budweiser Gardens, RBC Place, Western Fair District & Centennial Hall. 

Whip up a meal at your convenience with our fully equipped kitchens located in each suite and stay well fueled with our free breakfast daily and our onsite market, which is open 24 hours a day. 

Keep in shape with our onsite fitness centre and complimentary passes to the nearby YMCA and sustain your ambitious professional pace with our complimentary high speed internet and ample work areas. 

At Residence Inn we believe in openness, freedom and travelling the way you love to live. We are committed to making sure that when you travel here, you don’t just feel like a guest – you feel like yourself!

Description:
Welcome to Four Points by Sheraton Production City, Dubai
Everything you need plus the extras you love. 
Hard to leave!
The hotel is made up of two buildings, comprises a total of 239 contemporary and deluxe rooms, as well as, junior and one-bedroom suites, and provides convenient solutions for all travelers with exceptional guest service.Close to Dubai’s business areas such as Dubai Media City, Internet City, and JAFZA, and touristic areas such as Jumeirah Beach and Dubai Marina, the hotel has the perfect location to suit the needs of both business and leisure travelers. Designed for both short and extended stays, SILQ combines the comfort of a private residence with the thoughtful service of a boutique hotel. Guests can enjoy stylish accommodations, exceptional dining venues, and premium wellness facilities—all within easy reach of Bangkok’s top business, shopping, and cultural districts. Name: AC Hotel by Marriott Columbus Downtown
Description: Explore like a local and stay in style at this newly opened hotel! The AC Hotel Columbus Downtown offers a unique combination of quality, timeless European design comfort, and true authenticity. Experience the hotel's signature rooftop bar, Lumin Sky Bar and Kitchen, specializing in crafted cocktails and Spanish tapas while offering stunning panoramic views of the city skyline. Take your event to new heights in the hotel's 2,400 sq. ft. of private event space located on the 8th floor; each space featuring floor to ceiling windows, sleek design and state-of-the-art audio visual equipment. Enjoy European inspired guest rooms, 24-hour fitness center and complimentary Wi-Fi throughout the hotel. The AC Hotel Columbus Downtown is perfectly situated near entertainment: The Arena District, Short North Arts District, Nationwide Arena, Lower.com Field, the Greater Columbus Convention Center, Express Live concert venue and Huntington Park. Experience all that the city has to offer at the new AC Hotel Columbus Downtown!

Name: ALEHOST
Description:
En Alehost ayudamos a propietarios e inversores a maximizar la rentabilidad de sus activos inmobiliarios con la tranquilidad de un servicio eficiente. Ofrecemos una gestión integral, profesional y segura para edificios completos, hostales, pisos turísticos y alquileres de media estancia, eliminando las preocupaciones operativas y garantizando ingresos estables a largo plazo.

Con más de una década de experiencia en el sector hospitality y un equipo experto en revenue management, operaciones y atención al huésped, hemos desarrollado modelos de gestión flexibles y eficientes, adaptados a cada perfil de propiedad y propietario. Nos ocupamos de todo: desde la comercialización en canales como Airbnb o Booking, hasta la atención personalizada al huésped y el mantenimiento diario del inmueble.

Nuestra propuesta se basa en tres pilares clave: rentabilidad, tranquilidad y excelencia operativa. Apostamos por la innovación, el uso inteligente de la tecnología y estrategias de marketing que aseguran alta visibilidad y ocupación durante todo el año.

Ya sea mediante subarriendo garantizado o gestión directa, diseñamos soluciones personalizadas para cada necesidad. Nuestro compromiso es claro: propiedades más rentables, huéspedes más satisfechos y propietarios sin preocupaciones.

Name: Mövenpick Surabaya City
Description:
Mövenpick Surabaya City is a contemporary hotel strategically located near business districts, financial hubs, exhibition centres, hospitals, shopping centres, universities and the carnival park area. It is just 20 min by car from Juanda International Airport and 30 min from Surabaya Zoo. The hotel offers 243 rooms and suites from Superior rooms to Presidential suites, an All Day Dining restaurant, lobby bar, meeting rooms, swimming pool, gym, spa and lounge.

Conveniently located in Jalan Ahmad Yani , Mövenpick Surabaya City is surrounded by business districts and shopping malls. It is also close to Juanda International Airport.

Name: Renaissance Brussels Hotel
Description: Plan your getaway to Belgium’s capital city at Renaissance Brussels Hotel. We’re ready to make your stay at our hotel truly special, with 4-star elegance, exceptional service and a prime location. Unwind and refresh in our family friendly hotel, which features free Wi-Fi, floor-to-ceiling windows, and other home-style amenities. Our hotel is pet friendly; we welcome trained pets. Facilities include a fitness center, a heated pool and soothing spa treatments. Business travelers can make use of our hotel's flexible hotel event spaces, customized catering services and on-site business center. Our hotel is next to The European Parliament and within walking distance of Brussels attractions such as the Grand Place and the Sablon district.

Name: Hilton BNA Nashville Airport Terminal
Description:
Welcome to Hilton BNA Nashville Airport Terminal – where your travel and meeting needs are not just met, they're transcended. 

With state-of-the-art meeting spaces and a seamless travel experience from touchdown to check-in, we ensure that every journey is as memorable as the destination. Whether you're planning a corporate event or seeking a restful retreat between flights, our doors are open, promising an experience that soars beyond expectations.

Name: Fatwave Surf Resort
Description:
Open and family-run since 2014, Fatwave Surf Resort is in the middle of Surftown, La Union, and sits right at the beachfront for that priceless sunset view. With designs inspired by the vibrant and colorful ambiance of the tropics, come on over, kick back, and find your own space in our little paradise.

Whether you are a solo traveler, a group of weekenders, or a family just looking to get some R&R for a few days, we welcome you to our home. Feel free to look around and see what you’ll find at our resort, when you’re ready, let’s get you settled on the details of your stay.

Description:
Hampton by Hilton London City offers excellent proximity to some of London’s most iconic attractions such as Tower of London, London Bridge, and The O2. The new hotel is also within easy reach of the vibrant and artistic neighbourhood of Shoreditch, with its fashionable clubs, bars and eclectic dining scene. 

The hotel’s 278 rooms include a variety of comfortable and stylish accommodation types, from spacious king rooms to 30 family friendly rooms, each decorated in fresh and calming neutral tones with bold textiles and modern touches. In-room amenities include HDTV, complimentary Wi-Fi, Chromecast, and tea and coffee making facilities. 

The contemporary on-site restaurant offers the brand’s free hot breakfast, including Hilton’s signature baked-by-guests waffles. For guests on the go, Hampton by Hilton offers On-the-Run breakfast bags. 

Aldgate East is only a few minutes' walk from the hotel, with London City Airport 24 minutes away and London Gatwick 45 minutes away. The hotel is also close to Whitechapel Station, and also benefits from the Elizabeth Line.

Name: Lucania Palazzo Hotel
Description:
Lucania Palazzo Hotel es el lugar ideal para quienes buscan una experiencia de alta calidad en la ciudad de Comodoro Rivadavia, Chubut. Con una ubicación privilegiada en el corazón de la ciudad, nuestro hotel combina elegancia y confort para satisfacer las necesidades tanto de clientes de negocios como de turistas.

Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer una estadía inolvidable a través de una amplia gama de servicios y comodidades diseñadas para su confort y conveniencia. En Lucania Palazzo Hotel, nuestros huéspedes pueden disfrutar de:

Habitaciones y suites lujosas: Nuestras habitaciones están equipadas con las más modernas instalaciones para asegurar su comodidad y descanso.

Gastronomía excepcional: Contamos con un restaurante y bar donde podrá disfrutar de una exquisita oferta gastronómica.

Espacios para eventos: Disponemos de salones equipados para la realización de conferencias, reuniones y eventos sociales, con personal capacitado para atender cada detalle.

Gimnasio y Sauna: Para aquellos que buscan relajación o mantenerse en forma durante su estancia, ofrecemos un gimnasio completamente equipado y un Sauna.

Atención personalizada: Nuestro equipo profesional y amigable está siempre dispuesto a brindar un servicio excepcional y hacer de su estancia una experiencia memorable.

Ya sea que nos visite por negocios o placer, en Lucania Palazzo Hotel encontrará el lugar perfecto para relajarse y disfrutar de una atención de primer nivel. Estamos comprometidos con la excelencia y con ofrecer un ambiente acogedor y sofisticado para todos nuestros huéspedes.

Description:

We offer our guest warm, friendly and comfortable stay in high-standard rooms and facilities of different types. Biblical Mountain view and city panorama from our hotel will create an authentic atmosphere for everyone. The main entertainment venues, cafes and restaurants are located in the area. 

Our hotel will suit for any occasion you could think of: business conferences, weddings and events. We have a wide range of venues at your disposal:  conference halls, ground floor restaurant, rooftop restaurant, open cafe, lobby bar with big lounge area.

Choose a place, where you can forget about problems. Say hello to red and enjoy your staying at Ramada Hotel & Suites Yerevan.

Name: Reclutamiento Sheraton San José y Grand Casino Escazú
Description:
¿Quiénes somos?

GHL es el grupo hotelero de mayor crecimiento de la región, con experiencia de más de 50 años en el mercado, con presencia en 11 países y 63 Operaciones Hoteleras multimarcas.

Somos Creadores de experiencias!

En GHL Hoteles, entendemos que el trabajo no debe ser concebido sólo como una transacción o como un fin, desde nuestro enfoque, es un medio que posibilita a las personas la consecución de sus propósitos y metas a largo plazo, a través de nuestra visión, crear experiencias con gente feliz.

Sabemos que las personas felices son por lo general más sociables, flexibles y creativas, son más capaces de tolerar las frustraciones cotidianas y los problemas del día a día, son más compasivas con los menos afortunados y mas empáticas con los demás, por eso es parte también de nuestra visión, ser los mejores empleadores de la región.

Para esto, promovemos un buen clima laboral, la igualdad, el respeto por los derechos humanos, la no discriminación, el trabajo no forzado, el respeto por la diversidad, la inclusión y ambientes laborales saludables y seguros.

Description:
Los espacios abiertos, el pensamiento abierto y la expresión abierta abundan en el Hotel Aloft San Jose, Costa Rica.
Nuestro hotel estilo boutique cuenta con una ubicación incomparable cerca de muchos de los destinos más destacados de la zona, como Escazú, Terrazas Lindora y Plaza Momentum Lindora.
Reúnase con amigos en nuestro bar W XYZ o tome un refrigerio dulce, salado o saludable en Re:fuel.
Pruebe el delicioso menú del restaurante y lounge Backyard, que se centra en la cocina urbana costarricense y sirve desayuno, almuerzo y cena.

Ya sea que viaje por trabajo o por placer, el Hotel Aloft San Jose, Costa Rica ofrece una experiencia innovadora que no olvidará.

Name: Palmetto Marriott Resort & Spa
Description:
Escape your ordinary and chart your own course at the Palmetto Marriott Resort & Spa.  Opening Summer 2024.
Every detail, from the spacious 252 guest rooms to the Oyster River Rooftop and The Social restaurant, reflects the vision of creating a destination that celebrates its coastal surroundings. The Revive Pool, Spa, and Fitness center offer a sanctuary of relaxation, with indulgent spa treatments, state-of-the-art fitness facilities, and tranquil pools. The Beach Club at Riviera Dunes provides guests with access to a range of beachfront amenities, including a lap pool, beach volleyball court, pickleball courts, and a waterfront area with cabanas and loungers. The Resort offers a vibrant social scene, with the The Yard at South Bay Center. This multipurpose venue hosts a diverse range of events. The Social restaurant, with its tagline "Meet, Eat, Drink," creates an environment where guests can enjoy delectable cuisine and crafted cocktails while fostering connections and creating lasting memories. The 10,000 square feet of meeting space offers attendees a chance at camaraderie, networking, and education.

Whether you're a leisure traveler seeking a regal getaway or a business guest in need of a serene environment, RajMahal The Palace Orchha promises an unforgettable stay.

Name: MOLLIE ASPEN
Description:
MOLLIE Aspen is a 68-room luxury boutique hotel that occupies a prime location in downtown Aspen, Colorado. MOLLIE is designed for those with a natural curiosity and appreciation for connection and offers visitors a unique, welcoming respite in the bustling mountain town. The hotel’s name honors the town’s most successful silver mine, Mollie Gibson, which originated in the late 19th century and served as a catalyst for the town’s early economic, social, and cultural progress. Drawing inspiration from the many individuals that shaped Aspen throughout its history, MOLLIE embodies the spirit of their restless enthusiasm for the outdoors, ability to bring people together and passion for art, design and freedom of expression. MOLLIE’s warmth and graciousness as a host to visitors and locals alike can be found in the hotel’s design, food & beverage, and service. 
MOLLIE comes from HayMax, a leading local development firm, who enlisted award-winning studios Post Company to design the hotel’s interiors and CCY Architects as the project architect. Through a subtle lens of contemporary Scandinavian and Japanese design, the hotel thoughtfully embodies a sense of understated luxury. MOLLIE’s unique accommodations are social yet offer an equal amount of respite. The residential-style guest rooms are designed for the use and ease of each guest, with bespoke amenities including bath products by Swedish brand L:A Bruket, Parachute 100% Egyptian cotton sheets, complimentary Sightglass coffee and an assortment of teas, a Fellow electric kettle, Waterworks fixtures including a rainfall shower, Coyuchi organic robes, and a curated mini bar.
 The dining spaces are designed to invite gatherings, from morning coffee to evening cocktails, and consist of a lobby restaurant and bar with year-round heated outdoor seating, a laid-back all-day café, and a serviced roof terrace featuring a spa pool with unobstructed views of Aspen Mountain.

Name: Four Points by Sheraton Navi Mumbai
Palau de Congressos de Palma
Description:
El Palacio de Congresos de Palma, gestionado por Meliá Hotels International, es el mayor centro de convenciones de las Islas Baleares y goza de una de las mejores localizaciones en el Mediterráneo. Diseñado por el arquitecto Patxi Mangado, esta obra de diseño eficiente y contemporáneo (Premio de Arquitectura Española 2017) se ubica en el Paseo Marítimo, frente al mar, a tan sólo 10 minutos del aeropuerto y muy cerca a pie del centro histórico. Alberga dos modernos auditorios, una gran zona de exposiciones, diversas salas y espacios multifuncionales, una gran terraza con vistas al mar y una amplia oferta de alojamiento en la ciudad, con un hotel de cuatro estrellas superior integrado y otras 1.200 habitaciones de Meliá disponibles a muy poca distancia en la ciudad. Desde su apertura, en 2017, se ha convertido en una referencia europea de turismo de congresos y un ejemplo de gestión responsable y sostenible, que apuesta por la creación de un legado positivo y a largo plazo del turismo de negocios en Mallorca.

…

Palma Convention Centre, managed by Meliá Hotels International, is the largest convention centre in the Balearic Islands and has one of the best locations in the Mediterranean. Designed by the architect Patxi Mangado, this masterpiece of efficient and contemporary design (Spanish Architecture Award 2017) has a prime location alongside the seafront promenade, just 10 minutes from the airport and a very short walk from the historical centre. It provides two modern auditoriums, a large exhibition area, numerous event rooms and multifunctional spaces, a large terrace with views over the sea and a wide range of accommodation in the city, consisting of a superior four-star hotel and another 1,200 Meliá rooms available in the city. After opening in 2017, it has become a European benchmark for congresses and conventions and a best practice for responsible and sustainable management, committed to creating a positive long-term legacy of business tourism in Mallorca.

Name: Center Hotels
Description:
Welcome to Center Hotels, where hospitality feels like a warm family embrace! We're not just any hotel chain; we're a cozy, Icelandic, family-operated ensemble nestled right in the heart of Reykjavík's lively center. We began our journey with a small guesthouse back in 1994 and have, over the years, blossomed into a city-centered hotel chain with a family of 9 hotels in total, each boasting various services such as restaurants, bars, meeting rooms, and spa facilities.

But here's the real cherry on top: every single one of our hotels is situated right in the heartbeat of Reykjavík. That means you're smack-dab in the middle of all the cool stuff – the artsy vibes, the mouth-watering eats, and the can't-miss cultural spots.

And because we're all about keeping it real, our team is made up of folks who live and breathe Iceland. Whether you're here to explore your roots or just soak up the Icelandic charm, we're on a mission to make sure your stay feels nothing short of genuine. Trust us to be your home away from home and your insider guide to everything Icelandic.

Description:

Description:
REDWAVES HOTEL

Discover the allure of Hijazi traditions and modern sophistication at our contemporary hotel in Jeddah, KSA. Immerse yourself in a captivating blend of culture and elegance, perfect for both business and leisure travelers.  Experience the harmonious fusion of modern comforts and traditional touches in our thoughtfully designed rooms and suites.  Conveniently located in the heart of Jeddah, we offer easy access to business districts and vibrant attractions. Book your unforgettable stay today!

Name: Hotel Mercure Alameda Quito
Description: El Mercure Hotel Alameda Quito, en el corazón de la ciudad, combina confort moderno con toques locales. Ofrece habitaciones elegantes, Wi-Fi gratuito, restaurante, bar, gimnasio y salones versátiles como Cipreses, ideal para eventos. Servicio excepcional y ubicación estratégica.

Name: Moxy Istanbul Taksim
Description: Discover a hotel with an innovative design and playful soul at rates that make it accessible to all. Located near Taksim Square, Moxy Istanbul Taksim proves that affordability in midtown Istanbul doesn’t mean sacrificing style or comfort. Our 167 lifestyle hotel rooms are cleverly designed to meet the modern traveler’s needs, with a variety of room types, flexible furniture and furiously fast, free Wi-Fi. Immersive social spaces are built for co-working and play, encouraging guests and downtown Istanbul locals to intermingle.Moxy Bar is buzzy hub where cocktails and social hang out. With nearby must sees like Istiklal Avenue, Istanbul Bosphorus, Galata Tower, Hagia Sophia and Topkapi Palace right outside of the doors only one question remains. When are you making your gateway to Moxy Istanbul Taksim?

Name: Midland Hotel & Resort All Inclusive
Description: Situado a orillas del Rio Negro en el departamento de Tacuarembó, Uruguay, se encuentra Midland Hotel & Resort All Inclusive con una propuesta única en la región por su gran variedad de espacios de entretenimiento, confort y gastronomía de primer nivel garantizando una estadía familiar o corporativa asegurando las mejores postales perfectas del interior del país.
Location: Paso de los Toros, Tacuarembó Department

Name: SWISSÔTEL Poiana Brașov
Description:
Your 5-star retreat to the beauty of the Carpathian Mountains: a seamless blend of luxury and nature. Here, in Poiana Brașov, the 64 meticulously crafted rooms and apartments are now setting a new standard for Romania’s hospitality.

From the local stone accents to rich wood furnishings, we intertwine local heritage with contemporary comfort: natural stone blocks, seamless wood, and the traditional and unique blue paint from Viscri.

As you first step inside, you feel connected to Transylvanian spirit. The powerful yet warm setting is part of an uplifting feeling: the mystery of the mountain's greatness.

Everyone finds their place here.

Name: QLUSIVE HOTEL
Description: Qlusive Hotel

Name: Hotell & Spa Lögnäs Gård
Description:
Välkommen till Hotell & Spa Lögnäs Gård, en unik konferensplats där effektivitet och avkoppling möts i perfekt harmoni. Belägen i den natursköna landsbygden i Halland, erbjuder vi en inspirerande miljö för möten, seminarier och företagsevenemang.

Vår moderna konferenslokal är utrustad med allt du behöver för en framgångsrik konferens.

Efter en produktiv dag kan du och ditt team koppla av i våra stilfulla och bekväma rum. Våra boenden är designade för att ge er den bästa möjliga komforten, med en lantlig charm som reflekterar den vackra omgivningen.

Njut av läckra måltider tillagade med lokala och säsongsbetonade råvaror. Våra menyer kan anpassas efter era behov, från frukostbufféer och luncher till eleganta middagar. Vi garanterar en kulinarisk upplevelse som lyfter er konferens till nya höjder.

Stärk teamkänslan med våra skräddarsydda teambuilding-aktiviteter. Våra aktiviteter är designade för att främja samarbete och kreativitet, samtidigt som ni får chans att njuta av den fantastiska naturen.

Unna er en stund av avkoppling i vår spa-avdelning, där ni kan njuta av bastu, bubbelpool och pool. Det är den perfekta platsen för att ladda om och få ny energi efter en intensiv dag.
Lögnäs Gård erbjuder en komplett konferenslösning där professionella möten och personlig välbefinnande förenas. Kontakta oss idag för att boka din plats och upptäck hur vi kan göra ditt nästa företagsevent till en minnesvärd och framgångsrik upplevelse.

Välkommen till Hotell & Spa Lögnäs Gård – där dina konferensdrömmar blir verklighet.

Description: Visit our captivating beachfront resort, nestled along the pristine shores of the Bay of Bengal. At Pramod Lands End Resort, a member of Radisson Individuals, escape to a world of relaxation and tranquility. Refresh and recharge in one of our 100 luxurious rooms, including villas with private pool access. Walk along the private beach, unwind by the pool, or have some fun at our on-site games zone. Enjoy serenity at Olive Spa, offering a selection of relaxing spa treatments. Our marketplace-style restaurant offers a wide selection of international and local flavors. Planning an event? Our expansive banquet halls are ideal for hosting corporate events and special celebrations.

Description: Posh Outdoors partners with owners of iconic properties to bring a new luxury standard to glamping and outdoor vacations; with locations teeming with natural beauty, best-in-class glamping structures, amazing guest experiences, eco-responsible lodging practices and much more. Currently raising capital.

Name: voco Zeal Exeter Science Park
Description:
voco Zeal Exeter Science Park is IHG’s first net zero carbon hotel, opened 27 February 2025. Situated at the entrance of Exeter Science Park, home to the South West’s leading science, technology, engineering, maths and medicine businesses. Our 4-star hotel offers an exceptional stay for the environmentally conscious traveller.
 
Featuring142 stylish bedrooms, a restaurant and bar showcasing local produce, a mini gym, gardens and versatile meeting space with space adjacent for up to 200 people. Our hotel is 100% electric and has a car park with 12 EV charging points.

Name: Marriott Executive Apartments Hyderabad
Description: Seek well-appointed, apartment-style living, seamlessly melded with the five-star luxury of a hotel at Marriott Executive Apartments Hyderabad in India. Here, elegantly appointed one- and two-bedroom luxury apartments welcome you to relax in a versatile building offering an array of dining, shopping and entertainment options. Our hotel in Gachibowli is surrounded by botanical gardens and are strategically located in close proximity to the IT Hub and commercial district. You'll arrive to apartments with fully equipped kitchens, housekeeping services, ample storage and complimentary parking. Take a swim in the rooftop pool, or work out in the fitness center which boasts separate male and female steam rooms. Serving renowned cuisine from around the world at the rooftop restaurant, MAZZO beckons you to indulge in some of the city’s most delectable dishes. Whatever brings you to Marriott Executive Apartments Hyderabad, once you’re here, you'll simply never want to leave.

Name: GOTEL HOTEL MANAGEMENT
Description:
Somos una compañía Operadora Hotelera Multimarca con origen en el Interior del país, contamos con más de 40 años de experiencia en administración y operación de hoteles.

Ofrecemos servicio de administración integral de hoteles, como también servicios individuales 360 de Revenue Management, Representación de Ventas, Soporte Operativo, Consultorias.


Gracias al expertise de nuestro equipo, también brindamos servicios de Desarrollo de Nuevos Proyectos, Acompañamiento en Contratación de Franquicias Cash Management, Asset Management, Valuaciones de Activos con Certificación Internacional, entre otros.

En Gotel Hotel Management contamos con acuerdos comerciales con las cadenas hoteleras más importantes además de ser “Preferred Partner” para la Operación de Marriott International en Argentina.

Actualmente tenemos presencia en 6 ciudades, operamos 743 habitaciones con 210 en pipeline, 7050 mt2 de Convenciones y 10 Restaurantes & Bares, gran expertise en el segmento MICE.

En Gotel, buscamos dejar una huella y aportar valor a la industria de la hospitalidad en el interior del país, generando un impacto en la economía local y trabajo de calidad para los residentes, acercando las grandes marcas de reconocimiento mundial para impactar con grandes productos que se rigen bajo los más exigentes estándares.
Convertimos a cada una de las propiedades en líderes de sus respectivos mercados.
Trabajamos y accionamos con ojos de propietarios en pos del activo, la rentabilidad y el posicionamiento comercial del producto

Name: Zind Naaba Hotels
Description:
Le Zind Naaba incarne l'excellence de l'hospitalité à travers ses établissements hôteliers haut de gamme au Burkina Faso et au Togo, incluant notre tout nouvel établissement 5 étoiles à Ouagadougou. Nous sommes dévoués à offrir à nos clients une expérience inoubliable, alliant luxe, confort et service irréprochable. Que ce soit pour un voyage d'affaires ou une escapade de détente, nos équipes dévouées veillent à chaque détail pour assurer votre satisfaction. Plongez dans notre univers où chaque séjour devient un souvenir précieux.
Bienvenue au Zind Naaba,  votre oasis de luxe et de raffinement au cœur de l’Afrique !

En Grupo DESGAL, somos operadores turísticos y con una amplia experiencia en el sector servicios. Nacemos con la misión de proporcionar las mejores soluciones tecnológicas y sostenibles a todos nuestros clientes en el sector turístico. 

Somos participantes de la tercera edición de Turislab, la aceleradora de empresas para el sector turístico liderada por la Xunta de Galicia, Turismo de Galicia, la Cámara de Comercio de Pontevedra Vigo y Vilagarcía de Arousa y la Comunidad Intermunicipal Alto Minho (CIM AM), adherido al Programa Operativo de Cooperación Transfronteriza España Portugal-POCTEC, enmarcado en el área de cooperación Galicia-Norte de Portugal.
