Name: Future Hotel Leader Award
Description:
The Future Hotel Leader Award is a tribute to the future leaders within the hospitality industry – a sector driven by hospitality, efficiency, and innovation. This award has been established to illuminate and acknowledge various crucial facets of the hotel industry.

The Future Hotel Leader Award is a recognition of those who represent the hotel industry in a manner that keeps the sector dynamic, inclusive, and flourishing. It underscores the significance of future leaders and their role in shaping the future of this industry.

Name: Gran Marbella Resort & Beach Club
Description:
Perched along the serene shores of Playa del Real de Zaragoza, one of Marbella’s most tranquil beaches, Gran Marbella Resort & Beach Club epitomises the soul of Andalusia: a place where time-honoured traditions meet an inimitable glamour and joie de vivre. 

Blending cultural heritage with contemporary elegance, Gran Marbella embodies a quietly glamorous experience - one that whispers rather than shouts, where time seems to slow down intentionally, and where deep connections are forged with the rich historical tapestry of the region.

Name: Phulay Bay, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve
Description: Phulay Bay, the world’s first Ritz-Carlton Reserve property, is located in Krabi, Thailand set along the scenic shores of the Andaman Sea. Phulay Bay represents a departure from the ordinary and is designed for travelers seeking rare, exotic and authentic experiences in the most remote corners of the world. The property features 54 spacious villas with private plunge pools, rainforest showers, indoor and outdoor baths and showcases scenic tropical garden or ocean views. Amenities include an 11-room treatment spa, a selection of formal and casual dining options, infinity pool, 1,400 square-foot meeting and event space, and an array of local attractions, including white-sand beaches, coral reefs, lush rainforests, caves, waterfalls and exploration of the nearby Phi Phi Islands. Please visit www.ritzcarlton.com/en/hotels/phulay-bay.

Name: Raffles Makati
Description:
Alluring charm, endlessly enchanting with understated elegance, refined and contemporary luxury. A legendary oasis of calm and class situated in the prestigious address of Makati City. Raffles Makati fuses the timeless quality of old world charm with new world sophistication.

Raffles Makati is located at the corner of Arnaiz and Makati Avenues, home to Manila’s financial district, Ayala Museum and Greenbelt Shopping Centre with luxury boutiques, dining, and entertainment options. Location. Sophistication. Legendary service since 1887.
Our reputation travels.

Name: Four Points by Sheraton Jeddah King Fahd
Description: Four Points by Sheraton Jeddah King Fahd Road offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and style in the heart of Jeddah. Whether you're traveling for business or leisure, our hotel caters to all your needs with modern amenities and thoughtful service. Stay in one of our well-appointed rooms and suites, featuring plush Four Comfort Beds, city or front views, and complimentary high-speed internet. Savor delicious dining options that showcase local and international flavors, or unwind at our rooftop gym, spa, jacuzzi, and sauna. Host your meetings or events in one of our 7 versatile meeting rooms, which can be tailored to fit any occasion. Conveniently located near Jeddah's bustling downtown, financial hub, and popular attractions, the hotel offers easy access to shopping, museums, and sports venues. With our close proximity to major highways and only 15 minutes drive to King Abdulaziz International Airport, Four Points by Sheraton Jeddah King Fahd Road ensures a seamless and memorable stay for all

Name: Hillscourt Hotel and Conference Centre
Description: Hillscourt Hotel & Venue, the place for hotel stays and events in Birmingham. Hosting a variety of events from social events to business conferences.

Name: Flockhill Lodge
Description:
Since 1857, Flockhill has been a working sheep station of 36,000 acres in the Craigieburn Valley, New Zealand. Flockhill Lodge is nestled within the station's sprawling landscape; luxury accommodation with a silent witness to life in the majestic Southern Alps.

We would like to share with those who have an adventurous spirit, a refined taste and take delight in all things luxurious - the Flockhill experience.

Flockhill is located on the Great Alpine Highway, 1.5 hours from Christchurch International Airport. The Homestead and Villas provide an alpine escape of relaxed luxury with refined service contradictory to the rugged beauty of the surroundings. Activities exclusively within Flockhill’s wilderness are an adventure to be had - nothing manufactured. 

With a vibrant team of like-minded people, Flockhill brings a unique guest experience, with a shared passion for authenticity and quality in all things. 

At Flockhill we aim to tell stories and have our guests leave with stories to tell.

Name: Mercure Hurghada
Description: Mercure Hurghada offers a premium beachfront retreat on the Red Sea, just 10 minutes from the airport. Guests can immerse themselves in the vibrant marine life through snorkeling and scuba diving or relax with all-inclusive amenities. The resort features a variety of water and land sports, including excursions to Sharm el-Naga, Giftun Island, and Mons Claudianus. With a commitment to authentic experiences and attentive service, Mercure Hurghada ensures a memorable stay for relaxation seekers and adventure lovers alike.

Name: Taprobane House
Description:
Set in Colombo, 200 metres from Bambalapitiya Beach, Taprobane House offers accommodation with an outdoor swimming pool, free private parking, a shared lounge and a terrace. Featuring a bar, the hotel is close to several noted attractions, around 700 metres from Milagiriya Beach, 1.2 km from Kollupitiya Beach and 400 metres from Bambalapitiya Railway Station. The accommodation features room service, a concierge service and currency exchange for guests.

At the hotel every room includes air conditioning, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a bidet, free toiletries and a hairdryer. At Taprobane House the rooms have bed linen and towels.

An à la carte, Full English/Irish or American breakfast is available every morning at the property. At the accommodation you will find a restaurant serving American, Indian and Pizza cuisine. Vegetarian and halal options can also be requested.

Khan Clock Tower is 6 km from Taprobane House, while R Premadasa Stadium is 7.7 km away. The nearest airport is Ratmalana International Airport, 10 km from the hotel.

Name: Sachika hotel Guwahati
Description:
Welcome to the best exquisite luxury 4-star deluxe hotel in Guwahati, where timeless elegance meets exceptional hospitality. Nested in a totally peaceful and green environment, Sachika Hotels Guwahati is the most favored residence choice in the region, offering a luxurious treat for both business and leisure travelers.

Opposite us is Guwahati’s premium school Vandya International School. On the West is Narayana Superspecility Hospital; on the east, you can view the Green IIT Guwahati campus, and on the South is the upcoming biggest business hub, Trinity Park.

With a sleek and vibrant atmosphere, Sachika Hotels promises to deliver your experience with its well-designed and state-of-the-art amenities. Experience top-notch hospitality while you enjoy nature’s picturesque beauty that symbolizes Northeast India. This elegantly designed hotel with a restaurant is ideal and boasts luxurious suites and rooms with services and advanced facilities.

Name: Agburuike Hotels
Description:
Welcome to Agburuike Hotels – Your Home Away from Home! 
 Luxury. Comfort. Hospitality. At Agburuike Hotels, we are delighted to welcome you to an unforgettable experience in the heart of Aba! Whether you're here for business, leisure, or a weekend getaway, our world-class facilities and exceptional service will make your stay truly special.

Name: Villa Olivum Halikounas  Corfu
Description:
Brand new luxury vacation villa with pool in Corfu, Greece.

Villa Olivum is a stunning villa near the sea that can comfortably accommodate 6 people in 3 bedrooms. It offers a pool exclusively for guests, and an outdoor hot tub on the shared terrace on the first floor. The sea is just 1,5 km away, and the villa offers panoramic vistas of olive groves that spread as far as the eye can see.

Located on the southeastern area of the island, it is within easy reach of the long sandy beach of Chalikounas, Lake Korission, and the ruins of the historic Byzantine Fortress of Gardiki.

Villa Olivum is a modern property outfitted with all amenities, and is the ideal Corfu vacation house for families as well as for couples.

Name: Hyatt Place Kuala Lumpur, Bukit Jalil
Description:
Welcome to the vibrant city of Kuala Lumpur, where culture, innovation, and luxury seamlessly blend together. Nestled in the heart of this bustling metropolis is the exquisite Hyatt Place Kuala Lumpur, Bukit Jalil. With its unparalleled service, contemporary design, and convenient location, this hotel offers an exceptional experience for both business and leisure travelers.

Hyatt Place Kuala Lumpur, Bukit Jalil is strategically situated in the thriving Bukit Jalil neighborhood, known for its world-class sporting facilities and vibrant entertainment options. Whether you're visiting for a business conference, exploring the city's iconic landmarks, or simply seeking a relaxing getaway, this hotel provides the perfect base for your adventures.

Name: Ratan Villas Sariska Resort
Description: A serene retreat where the spirit of old jungle shikaar bagh lives on. Sharing boundary with the Sariska National Park, Ratan Villas looks out over the sparkling Silliserh lake and an expansive Aravalli hills which attract huge herds of game. Camp can accommodate up to 120 guests in 41 safari tent styled cottages with plunge pools and offers guided walking safaris, plus day and evening game drives (National Park is closed in monsoons but the lake is full of life).

Name: Sky Airport Hotel Cluj Napoca
Description: Aflat în imediata vecinătate a aeroportului Internațional Avram Iancu din Cluj Napoca, Sky Airport Hotel **** reprezintă o alegere ideală, atât pentru cei care călătoresc pentru business sau leisure, cât și pentru cei aflați în tranzit.

Name: Hotel Stubnerhof Bad Gastein
Description: Romantic hotel and restaurant in Bad Gastein on the boarder with the national park Hohe Tauern. Perfect location for skiing, skitouring and cross country skiing in winter and amazing place for hiking and biking in summer. All year round you can enjoy the thermal spa. We are ready to welcome both corporate and individual clients.

Name: Ponta Grande Resort
Description: O Ponta Grande Resort é uma referência no Algarve, oferecendo experiências memoráveis a famílias e casais que procuram conforto, tranquilidade e proximidade às melhores praias e atrações da região. Com empreendimentos em São Rafael e Carvoeiro, combinamos hospitalidade de qualidade, infraestrutura cuidadosamente projetada e um ambiente acolhedor.

Name: Caption By Hyatt Central Sydney
Description:
Caption by Hyatt Central Sydney is the first of Hyatt’s vibrant, select-service lifestyle brand in Australia. Designed with people and place at the forefront, connecting conscious travellers and locals in the heart of the CBD. 

Our social spaces are designed for more than just passing through, they’re a hub for conversation, collaboration, and connection over great coffee, creative cocktails, and fresh, locally inspired burgers and bowls. Whether you’re a guest, a Sydneysider, or just in the area for the day, our open, welcoming atmosphere invites you to meet, work, play, and discover the best of Sydney right outside our doors.

Name: Blue Donkey Regional Airport Suites
Description:
Boutique Business Apartments – Prime Location Near Paramaribo’s Regional Airport Situated just 2 km from the new regional airport(https://www.eagairport.sr/), our boutique apartments provide a comfortable and well-equipped stay for temporary professionals and business travelers. Designed for convenience and efficiency, our accommodations ensure a seamless experience. Key Features: - Complimentary Airport Shuttle – Effortless transfers to and from the EAG airport. - Strategic Location – 200 meters from De Surinaamsche Bank, with direct access to the city center and key commercial areas. - Proximity to Essential Services – Moments Restaurant (Oxygen Resort) within 350 meters, major supermarkets, Suriname’s largest hospital and Suriname's largest shopping mall within a 5 km radius. - Fully Equipped Units – Each apartment includes a kitchenette, air conditioning, high-speed Wi-Fi, and comfortable furnishings, ensuring a productive and restful stay. - Business Facilities – On-site meeting room available for up to six people, providing a professional setting for work engagements. Ideal for short-term professional stays, our apartments offer a practical and reliable solution in a prime business location. With a focus on comfort and accessibility, we ensure that every guest has everything they need for a productive and enjoyable stay.
Informatie over de buurt

Moments Restaurant, one of Paramaribo finest less then 350 meters away De Surinaamsche Bank, a 2 minutes walk Oxygen Resort ,a 5 minutes walk Atlantis Casino, a 5 minutes walk International Mall a 10 minutes drive Supermarkets at walking distance EAG Regional Airport , 2 kms away Presidential Palace, Independence Square, Downtown Paramaribo, Torarica about 5 kms away

Name: Pircas De Arboleda
Description: Pircas De Arboleda ...Un Lugar mágico!! donde disfrutar al máximo el volver a conectarse con la naturaleza, mirar por la ventana respirar aire puro de montaña, sentir la brisa y abrazarte de los cerros llenos de colores tener un espectáculo de flora y fauna, disfrutar de un cielo estrellado, del canto de los pájaros, la lluvia, el silencio, oler los aromas de árboles nativos y flores de estación,  todo esto y más es Pircas De Arboleda!!

Name: Neapolis 1897 Boutique Luxury Rooms
Description:
Neapolis 1897 Boutique Hotel is located in the heart of Athens, at an exceptionally convenient location for those who want to explore the city. Neapolis sit within walking distance to all museums and historical monuments downtown and also to uncountable restaurants and bars.

The building was originally built in 1897 and was fully renovated in 2022. it is a chance to experience the irresistible charm of neoclassical architecture for the 19th century in Athens. 

The hotel has 16 rooms, a rooftop that accommodates a space for breakfast and chilling during the and day and there is also a small spa in the ground floor.

Name: Hotel ADA ABODE
Description: Your gateway to relaxation in Jaunpur, India. Feel the warmth of Indian hospitality just moments away from the spiritual energy of Varanasi. Whether it's a cozy stay or a special event, we're here to make your experience relaxing and festive.

Name: SWISSÔTEL Damian Jasna
Description: Swissôtel Damian Jasná – luxusný rezort a rezidenčný komplex v srdci Nízkych Tatier. Tento 5-hviezdičkový hotel kombinuje špičkovú švajčiarsku pohostinnosť s ekologickým prístupom, čím sa radí medzi najudržateľnejšie hotely v strednej Európe. Ponúkame viac ako 230 moderných izieb a apartmánov rôznych veľkostí, ktoré spĺňajú očakávania aj najnáročnejších hostí. Naše kongresové priestory s kapacitou až 500 osôb sú ideálnym miestom pre konferencie, podujatia či firemné stretnutia. Objavte dokonalú harmóniu luxusu, prírody a švajčiarskej precíznosti.

Name: Wisby Hotel Group
Description: Wisby Hotel Group verkar inom hotell-, restaurang och mötesutveckling. Med alla våra vackra anläggningar belägna inom Visbys ringmur erbjuder vi affärsresor och privata upplevelser i världsklass. Att utveckla och driva våra anläggningar framåt är vår största prioritet. Genom vår passion, personliga touch och Visbys mysiga gator precis utanför dörren skapar vi de bästa gästupplevelserna.

Name: The Great Glamping Experience S.A.S.
Description:
En MAGNO GLAMPING encuentras cinco diseños y ambientes diferentes, Tenemos todo para ayudarte a realizar tus deseos!  

San Andres Glamping, Berna Glamping, Bali Glamping, Matrimandir Glamping y Biosphere Glamping te esperan! En cada una encontraras todas las comodidades de un alojamiento de lujo, adecuado para ti, tu pareja, amigos y familia. Además, espacio 100% privado en donde solo tendrás contacto con la naturaleza. 

SOMOS PET FRIENDLY Tu mascota es bienvenida! será atendida como un especial visitante de nuestras instalaciones, tendrá acceso a agua pura y sus platicos, su propia camita y lo más importante, tu compañía. 

De día y de noche, bajo la seguridad de nuestras instalaciones en MAGNO GLAMPING dispondrás de espacios ambientados para espectaculares fotografías, bosques de bambú, bosques tropicales, árboles frutales, y lo más importante, total descanso y desconexión. Además, tendrás acceso a actividades como senderismo y caminatas.
 
La fauna silvestre te acompañara en tu experiencia en Magno Glamping.

Nuestros expertos en desarrollar experiencias te asistirán en lo que necesites, su prioridad es tu descanso, comodidad y felicidad.

Atrévete a vivir la gran experiencia en MAGNO GLAMPING!

We welcome professionals, honeymooners, art lovers, and guests who appreciate a slower pace, timeless surroundings, and thoughtful service. Easily reached by car, train, or air, Rudby Hall feels like a hidden world — but it’s never too far away.

Come stay with us. Let the halls whisper their secrets, and let luxury unfold gently, just for you.

Name: Hostel Cubed
Description: Since 1989, over 25,000 affordable Transient Accommodation units (hotel rooms) have been lost along the California coastline.  Average daily room rates in the Coastal Zone have averaged higher than inflation and more than other California regions for decades, and that is largely due to affordable accommodations being converted to luxury hotels.  For decades, the Coastal Commission has been collecting Fees "In Lieu" of requiring developers to provide actual affordable accommodations to offset these losses, but it has been so infeasible to develop traditional hotels at an affordable price point, that the in lieu fees required to be paid by developers recently increased to $100,000 per room, and even that has not been a big enough subsidy to catalyze additional affordable accommodation development.  Part of the Coastal Commission's mission is accessibility, and the lack of affordable units has made the coastline inaccessible to many Californians.  We dream of a future where the California coastal trail is complete, and there are supportive affordable accommodations along the entire trail to make the entire coastline accessible to everyone.  And we are working with the CA State Parks, CA Coastal Conservancy, CA Coastal Commission, and other regional agencies and interested private parties to make this vision reality.

SMEŠTAJNI KAPACITETI

Kompletan koncept osmišljen je po principu kondo apart-hotela koji kombinuje smeštaj u komformnim, moderno opremljenim apartmanima i hotelski sadržaji i usluge kakve na tržištu nude konvencionalni hoteli, poput restorana, Spa centra sa bazenom, teretane, dečije igraonice, dvadesetčetvoročasovne recepcije, parkinga, garaže, brzih liftova, moderno dizajniranog lobija, letnje bašte i drugih „butique“ saržaja koji našu ponudu čine jedinstvenom na tržištu Zaltibora.

Kompleks sadrži 107 apartmana površine od 34 m2 do 105 m2, i to 9 dvosobnih, kapaciteta do pet osoba (tri odrasele osobe i dvoje dece do 12 godina), 94 jednosobna apartmana kapaciteta do 4 osobe, kao i 4 penthouse apartmana kapaciteta od 2 do 8 odraslih osoba, koliko prima najveći i najluksuzniji penthouse „Tornik“.

Svi apartmani u kompleksu luksuzno su opremljeni i imaju sopstvenu terasu i kupatilo, dok su penthouse apartmani dodatno obogaćeni luksuznim sadržajem poput prirodnog kamina, hidromasažne kade, unikatnog i dizajnerskog nameštaja..

BOUTIQUE SADRŽAJ

Svi sadržaji koji su gostima na raspolaganju posebno su dizajnirani i uklopljeni u ambijentalnu celinu, sa ciljem da boravak u objektu učine neponovljivim i nezaboravnim iskustvom. Slobodno možemo reći da smo uspeli da na ovom projektu udružimo neka od najzvučnijih imena iz regiona kada su u pitanju dizajn i unutrašnje uređenje prostora. Uvereni smo da smo kreirali na desetine tačaka u objektu koje će postati svojevrsne „selfi zone“.

Restoran Gatsby, mesto za uživanje, koje odiše hedonizmom, inspirisano 20-im i 30-im godinama prošlog veka, Ficdžeraldovim romanom veliki Gatsby i rimejkom istoimenog filma, prostor je sa naglašenim komforom kojim odiše čitav ambijent, čiji dizajn potpisuje studio „Unique Architectural Design“. Za uređenje lobija i dvorišta sa dečijom igraonicom pobrinuo se makedonski studio „Zavar“, dok nesvakidašnja umetnička dela kojima je oslikan Spa centar potpisuje domaći umetnik Andrej Josifovski – Pijanista

Name: Zala Springs Health & Golf Resort
Description:
In the immediate vicinity of Hévíz and Lake Balaton, with all the comforts and elegant surroundings, Zala Springs Health & Golf Resort awaits golf enthusiasts and all those who appreciate outstanding quality, sophisticated design and high-quality services.

Accomodation

Wake up embraced by the stunning nature of the Zala hills. Recharge on the terrace to the sound of birds singing while enjoying your morning coffee and the breathtaking panorama. Zala Springs Golf Resort is Hungary's first golf resort, unmatched in both Hungary and Central Europe. 

Events venue

The exclusive clubhouse of Zala Springs Golf Resort is a perfect venue for smaller as well as larger events up to maximum 90 guests. The 2-storey building is ideal for team buildings, company dinners and wedding parties. We provide professional equipment, microphones, free wifi and parking to our guests.

Golf
 
The designs of this high-quality and delicately traced course was envisioned by one of the best and most well-known golf course designers in the world, Robert Trent Jones Jr. The track is beautifully suited to the picturesque Zala Valley, where it is surrounded by the Zala River and hillside vineyards. The design of the golf course allows players with both the lower and higher handicaps to enjoy it.

The Estate

Zala Spring Golf Resort is the most exciting property development in the Western Balaton region and the first luxury resort in Central Europe! Within the framework of this diverse project, you will find a home that suits all your needs, from comfortable double apartments through spacious 2-bedroom suites to luxury villas. The spectrum of our future-proof investments ranges from rental services to guaranteed fixed returns.

Name: Ilha do Farol - Kite Villas
Description: On the seafront, it is a closed condominium with 11 high-luxury independent villas in front of one of the best kitesurfing spots on the Ceará coast. Its 39 apartments are integrated into villas with 2 to 4 fully equipped independent apartments that allow rentals combining privacy and exclusivity for couples, families or groups of friends. The apartments between 50 and 180m2 have gardens, terraces and private pools. The condominium will open for vacation rental in the 2023 season where we already have world-renowned kite surfing events. Mediterranean in style, its arches and white walls are submerged between the lush vegetation of its palm trees and the turquoise water. It is ideal for those seeking peace and tranquility in an incomparable setting. It also perfectly meets the needs of digital nomads because, in addition to its independent entrance, each room has its kitchen and terrace, while communicating with the central body of the villa, allowing meetings or meals with the occupants of the other rooms, always with the highest internet speed available. Located at the entrance of the famous salty lagoon, it always allows navigation in front of the villas because even at low tide we enjoy a good level of water sheltered from the waves. It is an exclusive condominium on the seafront in a kite spot without equal on the entire coast of the Ruta de los Vientos (Ceará) that is recognized as the Mecca of Kitesurfing worldwide. It allows the practice of many other water sports, such as windsurfing or stand up paddle. From Kite Villas, we have easy access not only to the airports of Jirococoara at 35Kms or Fortaleza at 190kms and the city of Itarema at only 5kms but also to iconic places like Patos, Almofala or Arpoeiras. It is a unique opportunity to enjoy the climate that never drops below 26ºC or exceeds 32ºC, the beauty of nature and the excitement of sports.

Name: Oscar Seaside Hotel & Spa
Description:
Oscar Seaside Hotel, Bodrum'un Güvercinlik Mahallesi'nde konumlanmış olan, muhteşem bir deniz manzarasına sahip bir oteldir. Denize sıfır konumuyla misafirlerine eşsiz bir deniz tatili deneyimi sunmaktadır.

Otelde Spa hizmetleriyle birlikte tam bir rahatlama ve yenilenme deneyimi yaşayabilirsiniz. Masaj, hamam, sauna ve fin hamamı gibi olanaklarla kendinizi şımartabilir, cilt bakımlarından faydalanabilirsiniz.

Oscar Seaside Hotel, sahip olduğu plajı ve iskelesiyle tatilcilerin denizin keyfini doyasıya çıkarmasını sağlamaktadır. Plajda güneşlenirken veya denizde serinlerken unutulmaz anlar yaşayabilirsiniz.

Otelin restoranı ve barı, lezzetli yiyecekler ve içeceklerle konuklarına unutulmaz bir yemek deneyimi sunmaktadır. Damak zevkinize uygun seçenekler arasından tercih yapabilir ve keyifli bir akşam geçirebilirsiniz.

Animasyon ekibi, hareketli ve eğlenceli aktivitelerle misafirlerin tatillerini renklendirmektedir. Gündüzleri su sporları veya plaj aktivitelerine katılabilir, akşamları ise canlı müzik ve gösteriler eşliğinde keyifli vakit geçirebilirsiniz.

Otelin tüm odaları balkonlu olup, muhteşem deniz ve havuz manzaralarına sahiptir. Bu sayede güne güzel bir manzarayla başlayabilir ve huzurlu bir atmosferde dinlenebilirsiniz.

Oscar Seaside Hotel, konumunun güzelliği, spa hizmetleri, plajı ve iskelesi, restoranı ve barı, animasyon ekibi ve konforlu odalarıyla unutulmaz bir tatil deneyimi sunmaktadır. Burada geçireceğiniz zamanın keyfini çıkarabilir ve tatilinizi en iyi şekilde değerlendirebilirsiniz.

Name: Hotel Kongress
Description:
Direkt im Zentrum gelegen, ist das Hotel Kongress seit vielen Jahren verlässlicher Hotelpartner der regionalen Wirtschaft. Die Gäste schätzen die Gastfreundschaft und den Service im Herzen der Montanstadt Leoben. 

Die modernen Klimaanlagen in den Business- und Greenwing-Zimmern sorgen auch bei sommerlichen Temperaturen für angenehmen Schlaf.  Morgens liefert Ihnen das reichhaltige Frühstücksbuffet (mit über 100 Köstlichkeiten) jene Energie, die es braucht, um anspruchsvolle Arbeitstage erfolgreich zu absolvieren. 

Durch die gute Verkehrsanbindung erreichen Sie rasch zahlreiche Unternehmensstandorte in der gesamten Steiermark. Nach einem erfolgreichen Arbeitstag stehen Ihnen alle Annehmlichkeiten der Stadt Leoben (Gastronomie, Unterhaltung, Kultur) fußläufig zur Verfügung.

Sie profitieren von unserem direkten, internen Zugang zum neu errichteten Konferenzzentrum LIVECONGRESS der Stadt Leoben. Als Veranstaltungs- und Kongressbesucher nutzen Sie diese direkte Verbindung, ohne das Haus verlassen zu müssen.

Gemeinsam mit unserem Schwesterbetrieb Hotel Kindler 2.0 erhalten Sie bei uns über 100 Zimmer aus einer Hand. Daher sind wir auch für Ihre Anfrage zu Gruppenreisen, Betriebsausflügen oder Busreisen aller Art gerne für Sie da!

Unserem Motto "Weil Zufriedenheit kein Zufall ist" folgend, steht unser Team Ihnen für alle Wünsche und Anliegen gerne zur Verfügung.

WIr freuen uns, Sie oder Ihre Mitarbeiter schon bald in Leoben begrüßen zu dürfen.

Description:

Located by the water in Hagaparken and designed by the award-winning architects at Wingårdhs, Hagastrand is shaped by the idea of contrast – stillness and movement, fire and ice, solitude and connection.
The hotel features a 2,500 sqm spa, waterfront restaurant and bar, spacious lounges, and dynamic meeting and event spaces tailored for modern business needs. From intimate strategy sessions to full-scale conferences, Hagastrand offers inspiring environments designed to support focus, creativity and well-being.
Created for conscious travelers, teams and leaders who seek more than just a venue – Hagastrand invites you to connect, reset and recharge in an environment where design, nature and presence come together.

İstanbul’un Avrupa Yakası’nda, Tüyap Fuar Merkezi ve iş merkezlerine yakın konumumuzla seyahatinizi kolaylaştırıyoruz!

For wellness and fitness, the hotel features Bodylines Fitness & Wellness Club, complete with a rooftop pool, gym, sauna, and steam rooms.

Whether you're hosting a meeting in one of the high-tech meeting rooms or relaxing after a long day, Nova M delivers a well-rounded hospitality experience in a prime location.

Name: De Ruwenberg Hotel | Meetings | Events
Description:
De Ruwenberg is een 4-sterren conferentiecentrum en is gelegen in een eeuwenoud park met een prachtig en origineel middeleeuws kasteel in het centrum. Het kasteel is omgeven door 4 vleugels met 40 uitstekende conferentie- en vergaderzalen, allemaal met grote ramen met uitzicht op het park. De uitstekende conferentie- en vergader accommodatie is uitgerust met state-of-the-art technologieën.

De 196 kamers zijn voorzien van moderne comfort en hebben gratis toegang tot internet. Daarnaast beschikt De Ruwenberg over squash- en tennisbanen, een volledig uitgeruste fitnessruimte, een joggingbaan, een golfbaan, een groot zwembad en diverse sauna's.

----

De Ruwenberg is a 4 star conference centre hotel and is located in a centuries-old park with a beautiful and original medieval castle at its centre. The castle is surrounded by 4 wings with 40 excellent conference and meeting rooms, all with large windows with view on the parc. The excellent conference and meeting accommodation is equipped with state-of-the-art technologies.

The 196 guest rooms are equipped with modern comfort and have free Internet access. Additionally, De Ruwenberg has squash and tennis courts, a fully equipped fitness area, a jogging track, a golf driving range, a large swimming pool and several saunas.

Name: Hotel O3zone****
Description:
Hotel O3zone**** is located in Baile Tusnad, a resort internationally renowned for its therapeutic effects on cardiovascular diseases as well as for its extraordinary natural setting and ozonated air. 
The hotel is opened on the basis of the concept of Nature, Spa & Conference, located in the center of the resort, facing the Falcon’s Rock, has the leading position both in terms of location and quality of services offered.
We offer accommodation in 114 rooms of which 36 Double Double Rooms, 51 Double Twin Rooms, 21 Touch of Nature Double Rooms, 4 Standard Apartments, 1 Family Apartment and 1 Deluxe Apartment.
Our conference rooms are appointed with modern equipment and can accommodate from small meetings to large scale events!
In the hotel the restaurant offers guests unparalleled cuisine, combining classic and regional cuisine, while adding elegance to every meal served, be it breakfast, lunch or dinner.
The spa offers programs for both guests who come specifically for wellness and other guests staying at the hotel. A wide range of pampering services awaits you. Here you'll find a swimming pool and jacuzzi for relaxation, as well as steam and dry saunas for invigoration. In addition, mini fitness rooms are available for spending active time. O3zone Spa also offers a variety of massages and therapies to invigorate body and soul. A place where you can completely relax and recharge.
We believe that our services and the positive experiences you can live in our hotel will put O3zone on the top of the most beautiful places you have visited.

Name: Peppers Manly Beach
Description: Make yourself comfortable at Peppers Manly Beach. Managed by Accor Vacation Club, this property boasts a fantastic location at the southern end of Sydney, NSW’s famed Manly Beach, just steps from the very best boutiques, restaurants, and entertainment, our hotel embodies the relaxed sophistication for which this part of the world is known.

Description: Holiday Inn is located on the Chandigarh- Shimla highway away from the maddening crowd at the foot of the Morni Hills & next to Panchkula Golf Course, the Hotel is in the close proximity of Chandigarh International Airport & Railway Station, with multiple dining options, leisure facilities, business centre, tailor-made meeting and event space, Holiday Inn welcomes you to an unparalleled experience that will make your stay stylish fresh and comfortable. Name: Biologen Herdla
Description:
Biologen er et historisk bygg fra 1922 som nå er et moderne hotell i vakre omgivelse på Herdla, 45 minutter fra Bergen.

Biologen fungerte opprinnelig som marinbiologisk forskningsstasjon med både internasjonale vitenskapsmenn og kongelige som tidligere besøkende. Nå tilbyr Biologen kulinariske opplevelser med lokale råvarer, et rikt vinkart, ro for sjelen og en fantastisk seng å sove i.

Biologen er stedet for møter og konferanser i rolige omgivelser og en avslappende atmosfære. Vi tilbyr lokaler til alle typer samlinger, som konferanse, kick-off samling, styremøte, strategimøte, seminar og teambuilding med påfølgende middag. Vi anbefaler alle å kombinere møter og konferanser med en overnatting i ett av våre topp moderne hotellrom.

Description: Bienvenido a voco Guadalajara Neruda Nuestro nombre deriva de la palabra latina que significa invitar o reunir , así que lo primero que notarás en voco es el calor de la acogida. Disfruta de una experiencia superior sea cual sea la ocasión en nuestros modernos y únicos espacios Tapatíos ubicados en una de las mejores y más privilegiadas zonas de la ciudad, conocida por albergar corporaciones internacionales, boutiques exclusivas y restaurantes de lujo. Elija entre una variedad de vibrantes experiencias gastronómicas y lugares de encuentro sin salir del edificio. Dé un paseo tranquilo y respire el aroma fresco de la variedad de árboles a lo largo del Andador Neruda, a solo unos pasos de nuestra puerta principal. Disfruta la comodidad y el encanto único de Jalisco, los aromas, colores y sabores de la tierra del Tequila y el Mariachi.

Description:
Somos un Beach Club y Hotel de playa ubicado en la isla más linda, tranquila y cercana a Cartagena - Tierra Bomba (está a solo 15 minutos en lancha del centro histórico), puedes venir y quedarte o disfrutar de un pasadía en la playa con comida deliciosa y un bar con cocteles únicos.
Si buscas un hotel en Cartagena y quieres privacidad, Fénix es una gran opción. Somos un lugar lleno de magia y rituales con fuego y música, aquí nos gusta celebrar desde un eclipse hasta las épicas fiestas en la playa que hacemos en varios momentos del año. Somos un hotel con alma, consciente con el medio ambiente y comprometido con Tierra Bomba, la comunidad que nos ha visto crecer.

Name: Hotel Bosnali
Description:
Hotel Bosnalı: A Harmony of Tradition and Innovation

Located in the vibrant city of Adana, Hotel Bosnalı is a beacon of cultural elegance and a symbol of simplicity, strength, and authenticity. Here, history and modernity fuse, crafting a unique experience for every guest.

Our Philosophy: We celebrate true self-expression, commitment to originality, and excellence in all we do. Every detail, from decor to service, resonates with the virtues of control, protection, and emotional resonance.

Accommodations: Our rooms and suites are carefully designed to provide comfort with a touch of sophistication. Both leisure and business travelers will find their needs met in a setting that speaks to their uniqueness.

Culinary Excellence: Experience the rich culinary heritage of Adana at our in-house restaurant. We honor local flavors with contemporary flair, offering a delightful array of dishes that pay homage to regional gastronomy.

Business Amenities: Our state-of-the-art conference rooms stand ready to host your meetings and collaborations. With modern facilities and attentive service, we support your pursuit of innovation and success.

Your Experience, Our Commitment: At Hotel Bosnalı, guest satisfaction is paramount. Every stay is crafted to be memorable, reflecting our strong values, integrity, and a dedication to fulfilling your every need.

Explore Adana with Us: Immerse yourself in the warmth, culture, and flavors of Adana at Hotel Bosnalı. We are your gateway to an enriching experience that's as intricate and fascinating as the city itself.

For reservations, events, or more information, please visit our website or contact our dedicated team. We look forward to extending our hospitality to you.

Name: Sonesta St. George Hotel & Nile Cruises
Description:
Welcome to five-star splendor on the banks of the Nile in a city of ancient pharaonic treasures, the Sonesta St. George Hotel Luxor redefines magnificent contemporary style. The hotel is luxurious, sophisticated and above all, elegant.

Come and enjoy a sweeping terrace with majestic views of the Nile, a grand entrance of polished marble and handsomely appointed furnishings with exquisite detail, a sumptuous health spa, an array of fine dining choices and every amenity to please the most discerning traveler. With the mystical Nile just a whisper away and the temples of Luxor and Karnak preserved in time, experience a city of fascinating antiquity and indulge in the rich splendor of the Sonesta St. George Hotel Luxor.

Name: The Beekman, a Thompson Hotel
Description:
The Beekman, A Thompson Hotel has been restored into a luxury lifestyle hotel featuring the sophisticated interior design of Martin Brudnizki and the culinary caché of celebrated chefs Tom Colicchio and Daniel Boulud. 

Featuring 287 guest rooms, The Beekman boasts two signature duplex penthouses with private rooftop terraces. The heart of this 19th century architectural gem is its extraordinary Victorian atrium and pyramidal skylight. In the epicenter of Lower Manhattan’s New Downtown, walking distance from One World Trade and The Brooklyn Bridge, The Beekman is a masterpiece rediscovered.

Name: Hilton Garden Inn Pune Hinjawadi
Description:
Hilton Garden Inn Pune Hinjawadi is a contemporary business and leisure destination located just off the Mumbai-Pune Expressway, in the heart of Pune’s thriving IT hub. Description:
Stay and play at downtown Austin's newest hotel located near University of Texas at Austin's campus. 

Downright Austin, a Renaissance Hotel offers 367 rooms and suites that are bold and inviting, featuring views of the Texas State Capitol and downtown. 
From our style to our hospitality, we're full of unexpected delights. Soak in the sun at our urban oasis: a resort-style outdoor pool surrounded by our lush Lawn. 

We are a vibrant destination with 31,000 sq ft of flexible indoor and outdoor event space in Austin, TX; including the Capitol Ballroom for up to 1,200 guests, plus multiple breakout rooms and outdoor venue options. Downright, the most convenient downtown Austin hotel, is within walking distance of 6th street nightlife, UT campus & stadium, the Moody Center, concert venues (Mohawk, Waterloo, Stubbs), and the Capitol. Toss your keys to the valet or ditch your car in our on-site parking garage.

Name: Nebu

Explore the unique features that distinguish Nebu — a lifestyle beyond the ordinary starts here at this exceptional destination.

Name: The Rothschild Hotel, Tel Aviv's Finest
Description:
The Rothschild Hotel, located on Tel Aviv’s most prestigious boulevard, offers a unique blend of elegance, history, and warm hospitality. Its luxurious rooms are a top choice for couples celebrating wedding nights, anniversaries, and special occasions. Tourists return time and again for the exquisite architecture, refined design, and unbeatable location.  

Designed as a tribute to Baron Edmond de Rothschild, a visionary philanthropist whose contributions laid the foundation for modern Israel, the hotel embodies his pioneering spirit. His investments and dedication resemble a modern startup—where vision meets reality, success and adaptation go hand in hand. Throughout his lifetime, the Baron visited Israel five times, overseeing and refining his initiatives.  

The hotel’s design reflects subtle interpretations of his personality and legacy, housed in an eclectic historical building that stands among Tel Aviv’s most beautiful architectural gems. Staying at The Rothschild Hotel is more than just an experience it’s a journey through history, elegance, and innovation.

Whether you're visiting for a romantic getaway, a special occasion, or simply to enjoy Tel Aviv’s vibrant energy, the hotel offers an atmosphere of sophistication and charm in the heart of the city.

Name: Hotel Indigo Tuscaloosa Downtown
Description: Experience the true spirit of Tuscaloosa at Hotel Indigo Tuscaloosa Downtown, the city’s first waterfront hotel overlooking the Black Warrior River. Admire river views from our rooftop bar, or grab one of our bikes on loan and head to the Tuscaloosa Riverwalk to watch paddleboats and kayaks ride the current. Less than a mile away from the University of Alabama, we offer the perfect place to stay for the electric excitement of football games and graduations. You’ll find a myriad of unique shops and restaurants downtown, and you can see both local and nationally touring acts at Tuscaloosa Amphitheater, the largest outdoor music venue in West Alabama. Inside the hotel, locally inspired murals fill the walls — we also host a gallery expansion from the Kentuck Art Gallery just across the river — and our restaurant and bar feature authentic Southern food and drinks. Even your room will reflect the neighborhood’s tradition of culture, education and industry through modern décor and rustic furnishings that are distinctly Alabamian.

Name: SENHORA DA ROSA, Tradition & Nature Hotel
Description:
Localizada na ilha de São Miguel, nos Açores, a menos de 4 km da cidade de Ponta Delgada e perfeitamente localizado entre as montanhas e o mar, o Hotel Senhora da Rosa oferece o descanso perfeito misturando tradição, natureza e elegância. 

Estamos inseridos numa antiga quinta do Século XVIII com 3ha onde a laranja era colhida diariamente. A quinta foi totalmente recuperada, principalmente as estufas, onde foi desenvolvido um espaço para dar a conhecer aos turistas a história que guarda este maravilhoso lugar.

Com 35 quartos elegantes, entre várias suítes e dois quartos especiais, inspirados nos antigos cafuões da quinta, os hóspedes podem desfrutar da natureza como um todo. Entre um mergulho na piscina exterior, relaxar no spa, fazer uma partida no campo de padel e muito mais, os nossos hóspedes contam com uma ampla variedade de opções para tornar a sua estadia num momento agradável e enriquecedor.

Name: Travelarii
Description:

With our vast network of travel experts and resources, we make it easy for you to discover the perfect destination, whether it's a tropical beach, mountain, bustling city, serene countryside, or an adventurous mountain escape. We understand that every traveler is unique, so we tailor our services to meet your specific preferences and interests.

Whether you're looking for a cozy cottage, a luxurious villa, a beachfront condo, or a charming cabin in the woods, we have a wide range of options to suit your needs.

At our travel business, we believe that travel is not just about visiting new places; it's about creating unforgettable memories. Let us be your trusted travel partner, guiding you to your dream destinations and ensuring you have a comfortable and memorable stay. Start your journey with us today and let the adventures begin!

Name: Eden Resorts and Spa
Description:
Discover a haven of tranquility and luxury at Eden Resorts & Spa, where we have been redefining hospitality for the past decade. Nestled at Pahalgam, our resort offers an unparalleled retreat for those seeking an escape from the ordinary.

Eden Resort & Spa has been more than just a destination – it’s a journey into the heart of hospitality. From our humble beginnings, we have grown to become a cherished retreat, known for our warm service, exquisite accommodations, and a commitment to creating unforgettable experiences for our guests. 
Indulge in the lap of luxury with our thoughtfully designed accommodations, each meticulously crafted to provide the perfect blend of comfort and sophistication. Whether you’re seeking a romantic getaway, a family retreat, or a corporate escape, Eden Resort & Spa offers a range of accommodations to suit every taste and preference.
Eden Resort & Spa is more than a resort; it’s a destination where dreams take flight and memories are etched in time. Join us on a journey of relaxation, adventure, and unparalleled luxury. Your escape to paradise begins here.
We look forward to welcoming you to Eden Resort & Spa – where every stay is a story and every guest is family.
At the core of our ethos is a dedication to providing unmatched hospitality. Our team is passionate about curating an environment where every guest feels not just welcomed but embraced. From the moment you arrive until the time you bid farewell, our staff is devoted to ensuring your stay is nothing short of exceptional.
As stewards of the environment, we take pride in our commitment to sustainability. We believe in creating not just a beautiful space but one that respects and preserves the natural beauty that surrounds us.

Name: Eibarrooms, Auto Check-In
Description:
Allá por el 2017, los socios fundadores de Eibarrooms Auto Check-in deciden invertir parte de sus ahorros en un negocio familiar. Sabían bien que la que llaman la ciudad Armera (Eibar), ahora convertida en una ciudad más de servicios, tenía la falta de uno en concreto: una planta hotelera acorde a las necesidades de la ciudad.  Por ello, deciden crear Eibarrooms: un alojamiento sencillo, confortable y novedoso. 

Unos años antes en un viaje a Londres, experimentan en persona el servicio de un alojamiento auto check-in que resultó ser una experiencia de diez. Habiendo sido usuarios de este sistema, se dan cuenta que podría ser factible introducirlo en su nuevo negocio. 

Eibarrooms nace de la necesidad de ofrecer un servicio a las empresas de la ciudad y la comarca por lo que nace por y para lo que ha sido motor y ADN de Eibar: su Industria. Por lo tanto, el auto check-in ayudaría a todas aquellas personas que se desplazan a Eibar por trabajo a tener un acceso más sencillo y más rápido. 

Empresa pequeña y familiar, cercana, colaboradora en la ciudad, sacada adelante con esfuerzo hace que la ciudad le dé el nombre al establecimiento, ya que esto son valores que otras empresas nacidas aquí llevan siempre por bandera, y se han convertido en el ADN de Eibar y de sus vecinos. Por lo que Eibarrooms, significa orgullo por nuestras raíces.

Description:
Best hotel in Surendranagar

Hotel Shiv International in its true reflection of the name international, comprises of 38 tastefully furnished rooms and suites. It is a contemporary-styled hotel, boosting of modern architecture and flawless services. The hotel offers warm personalized service and gracious hospitality in elegantly furnished rooms to soothe and satisfy the needs of even the most discerning guests since 1998. The ambience & style make the hotel blend the architectural wonder with contemporary feel.

All air conditioned rooms and suites are equipped with large LCD multi-channel televisions, refrigerators, tea coffee makers, electronic safes and private phones with STD/ISD service. Well-appointed en suite bathrooms have hot water, hair dryers and vanity mirrors. Most of the suites have their own private balconies.

The hotel restaurant offers sumptuous & delicious meals.
The Gujarati meals are a must try! The restaurant also offers a la carte service for a variety of other cuisines like Punjabi, Chinese, South Indian, etc. The same can also be available Jain style

Description: Somos el Grupo Inmobiliario con mayor desarrollo en El Bajío enfocados en la inversión nacional,  contamos con el mayor número de hoteles en México franquiciados con la cadena Hilton y estamos aprobados para operar las marcas Hyatt y Marriott.

Name: JW Marriott Reston Station
Description:
Ascend to new heights of luxury at JW Marriott Reston Station, a majestic 28-story beacon of sophistication in the heart of Northern Virginia. Situated along the Silver Line Metro and perfectly positioned between Dulles International and Reagan National airports, our hotel offers distinguished travelers unparalleled access to the capital region and beyond.

At JW Marriott Reston Station, we invite you to be mindful and present — to pause and truly live in the moment, inspired by the legacy of J. Willard Marriott’s daily rituals. Here, guests can nourish the soul, caring for mind, body, and spirit with thoughtfully curated experiences designed to rejuvenate and inspire.

Our vibrant urban oasis is the crown jewel of Reston Station, offering world-class dining and entertainment just steps from our doors, blending convenience and splendor seamlessly. More than a place to stay, JW Marriott Reston Station is where people come together for meaningful moments, connecting with family, friends, and colleagues in spaces crafted for connection and celebration.

Experience elevated luxury, heartfelt hospitality, and an inspiring sense of place — all coming soon to Reston Station.

Name: JW Marriott Dallas Arts District
Description: A member of Marriott International, the JW Marriott Dallas Arts District opened in July 2023 as the first JW Marriott in Dallas. Designed to reflect the beauty of the natural world, this hotel offers spaces to meet in style and opportunity to connect with those who matter most.

Name: Kroppefjäll B&B
Description: Vårt bed & breakfast ligger mitt i Kroppefjälls skogar i Dalsland, mindre än två timmars bilfärd från Göteborg och Karlstad. Vi värnar om att våra gäster ska må bra och tror starkt på vikten av att vistas i naturen. Här kan du vandra, springa, cykla, träna i utomhusgymmet, bada, basta och mycket mer. Testa gärna att laga något av våra matkoncept över öppen eld!

Name: Kufri Holiday Resort
Description: Kufri Holiday Resort is designed to calm and delight your senses. Spectacular views, peaceful and quiet ambiance and the pull of action and adventure sports such as nature trails and hiking make the experience one of its kind. Come and enjoy our unique hospitality and let us take your worries away as you harmonies your mind, body and spirit with the exquisite Himalayan surroundings and our excellent hospitality services, which will have you coming back for more.

Name: The Skirvin Hilton Oklahoma City
Description: This contemporary-classic hotel offers the finest in guest accommodations with 225 recently renovated rooms, upscale amenities, and 18,500 square feet of versatile meeting and event space. This iconic hotel is also at the epicenter of Oklahoma City’s vibrant culture with so many of the city’s biggest attractions nearby.

Name: Maslinica Hotels & Resort
Description:
Nestled in the picturesque bay of Rabac on Istria's eastern coast in Croatia, Maslinica Hotels & Resort offers a harmonious blend of comfort, nature, and recreation. Our Resort comprises three elegant 4-star hotels and a charming 3-star campsite, all situated just steps from the Adriatic Sea.

Guests can indulge in relaxation at our four outdoor and two indoor swimming pools or rejuvenate at the contemporary Olive Garden Spa & Wellness center. Culinary delights await at our seaside restaurant, where local flavors meet stunning views.

Whether seeking adventure or tranquility, our Resort caters to all. Enjoy activities such as boat excursions, water sports, tennis, mini-golf, and more. Families will appreciate our mini club and engaging entertainment programs designed for all ages.

At Maslinica Hotels & Resort, we are dedicated to creating memorable experiences that capture the essence of Croatian hospitality.

Name: KolleKolle Hotel & Konferencecenter
Description:
KolleKolle er omkranset af den skønneste natur med både skov, sø og marker som nærmeste nabo. Her er der rig mulighed for at tilføje aktiviteter til jeres møde, med alt fra Teambuilding til walk-and-talk. 

Indenfor byder vi velkommen til professionelle rammer, hvor mødeoplevelsen er sat i centrum både når det gælder forplejningen, indretningen og de tekniske hjælpemidler.

Vi er et hold at dedikerede og imødekommende medarbejdere, hvis primære fokus er at skabe tryghed og ro, så I kan koncentrere jer 110% om indholdet i jeres møde.

Du finder os nemt i Værløse lige nord for København.

Kontakt os på telefon +45 44 98 42 22 eller email: info@kollekolle.dk - og besøg os på https://kollekolle.dk.

Name: Lodge Caleta Gonzalo
Description: Lodge Caleta Gonzalo is your perfect base of operations to discover and venture into the beautiful Pumalin Douglas Tompkins National Park. Surrounded by the sea, rivers, mountains, ancient forests and volcanoes, the Lodge Caleta Gonzalo with its rustic and comfortable little cabins and restaurant -designed, built and decorated by Doug and Chris Tompkins- will give you all the support you need to make this trip to Pumalin in North Patagonia and the Carretera Austral an unforgettable experience.

Name: Delta Virginia Beach Waterfront
Description: With panoramic water views, Delta Suites by Marriott Virginia Beach Waterfront is an oasis on the shores of the breathtaking Chesapeake Bay. Embrace effortless relaxation in beautifully appointed suites with complimentary Wi-Fi, signature amenities, luxurious bedding and breathtaking bay views. Thrill your palate with fresh oysters, fish and coastal cuisine at our distinctive hotel restaurant, featuring inspiring water views. Enjoy an ideal location near diverse water activities on Chesapeake Bay, near First Landing State Park and Virginia Beach Sportsplex. Host flawless weddings, meetings and social galas in our dynamic indoor event space or inspiring outdoor venue. After an unforgettable day on our private beach, refresh in the sparkling waters of our outdoor pool or exhilarate your body at our modern hotel fitness center with cardio equipment and free weights. Discover scenic luxury in a beautiful travel destination at our Virginia Beach hotel.

Name: Beds2B
Description:
Beds2B es una empresa de desarrollo tecnológico aplicado al sector turístico, ofreciendo herramientas tecnológicas destinadas a hacer más eficiente los canales de venta. 

Beds2B Rewards como única plataforma de fidelización de agentes de viajes desarrollada al servicio de los hoteleros, siendo una de las marcas de Beds2B.

Beds2B PRO es un motor de reservas B2B que permite a los agentes de viaje reservar directamente en los hoteles sin intermediarios.

Beds2B Academy es un módulo que permite a los hoteles disponer de un aplicativo para la formación de sus agentes de viaje.

En Beds2B dotamos además a los establecimientos hoteleros de herramientas tecnológicas que facilitan su gestión comercial y de operaciones. Contamos con un equipo propio de desarrollo con amplia experiencia en el sector.

Name: Sunday Warwickshire Walton Hall Hotel & Spa
Description:
Located just a stone's throw away from Shakespeare's birthplace, the 4-star Mercure Walton Hall Hotel & Spa is 16th century Grade II listed building with a wealth of character. Situated within 65 acres of private grounds, the hotel is tucked away amid woodland and beautifully maintained greenland. Ideal for couples, the hotel is equipped with an in-house bar & restaurant as well as leisure facilities, including spa treatment rooms, a swimming pool and a gym.

Away from the hotel, guests are free to explore the surrounding villages before returning for a feast of local cuisine at The Orangery restaurant. A stone's throw from Stratford-upon-Avon, it's the ideal retreat for a short, rejuvenating break. Close to Stratford Upon Avon, Warwick, Leamington Spa and Warwick Castle. Set in 65 acres of unspoiled Warwickshire countryside, the hotel is a perfect wedding venue. With leisure and fitness facilities on-site, theres no better place to relax and escape everyday life.

Set in 65 acres of land, unspoiled Warwickshire countryside, lovely walks, near small town with local amenities, quiet, close to large towns.
197 Bedrooms 
23 Meeting Rooms 
Leisure Facilities 
320 Car Parking Spaces

Situated between Luanda and Talatona, this is a destination for a wide range of business, sports and private events. feel thoroughly spoiled as you explore the temples and tombs of ancient Egypt with Our Escaleeh dahabyia ,

Description:
Vassa: Your Oasis for Holistic Luxury Experience the pinnacle of luxury hospitality and wellness at Vassa. 

Our integrated approach combines exquisite boutique hotels, world-class wellness clinics, and exclusive private member's clubs to deliver an unparalleled experience.

Name: The Welcombe Hotel BW Premier Collection
Description:
Let yourself be swept away by the grandeur of our Neo-Jacobean country mansion, brimming with character and charm. Just a mile from the heart of Stratford-upon-Avon, we offer the perfect retreat to explore the plethora of tourist attractions in Shakespeare's birthplace.
 Opulent Accommodation
Step into our Grade II-listed Neo-Jacobean building and prepare to be captivated. With a serene atmosphere and a range of room options to suit every guest, whether it's a romantic getaway, family vacation, or business trip, staying with us is always a delight. Choose from our 85 supremely opulent bedrooms, including classic doubles, four-poster beds, and suites offering stunning views over our vast landscaped grounds.
 Fine Dining in Warwickshire
Indulge in gourmet meals or unwind with a wide selection of locally sourced gins at our bar and restaurant. Our menus are diverse and constantly evolving to impress even the most discerning palates.
 Tee Off
Take on the challenge of our beautiful 18-hole, par 70 golf course, offering testing pins and excitement for players of all levels. Whether you're on a golfing break or squeezing in a few holes between sightseeing, our course promises a memorable experience.
 Weddings
Discover why The Welcombe is one of Warwickshire's most sought-after wedding venues. Our stunning Italian gardens, outstanding facilities, meticulous wedding planners, and gourmet food combine to create unforgettable celebrations.
 Spa & Leisure
Relax and rejuvenate in The Welcombe Spa. Experience the soothing sauna, invigorating ice fountain showers, and a range of decadent treatments, including a trail of ancient Roman thermal suites, ensuring a truly indulgent escape.
Ready to experience the elegance and charm of The Welcombe Hotel? Reach out to us for bookings, inquiries, or any assistance you may need.
 Email: info@thewelcombehotel.co.uk
 Phone: 01789 295252
We look forward to welcoming you to The Welcombe Hotel, where every moment is filled with l

Name: Nobel Hotel Group
Description:
Our story begins in 2023, when we founded the Nobel Hotel Group with passion and vision
aiming to set new standards in the hotel industry. At the heart of our business is a dedication to providing an unforgettable experience to guests, and thatwe achieve through our unique portfolio of hotels. We currently have three gems in our collection:

Nobel Hotel Gallery, Nobel Hotel Palace and Nobel Hotel West. Each of them represents a connection luxury, sophisticated style and business charm.
The Nobel Hotel Group prides itself on its consistent and continuous pursuit of excellence
by improving their services. Our commitment to guests is reflected in the unique atmosphere that we create in each of our hotels. With a total of three objects in our portfolio, we present
top standard in the catering industry.

Our mission is to follow the needs of the present, modern business and quality expectations
tourist and business services. Nobel Hotel Group is more than accommodation; we provide an experience that leaves lasting memories. Our hotels are places where elegance and comfort come together, creating the perfect setting for vacations, business meetings or special events.
We are convinced that our ambitious expansion of the portfolio to new hotels will further enrich it offer and provide guests with even wider choices. 

Nobel Hotel Group continues to set up standards in catering, following world trends and raising the bar of practicality and luxury.

Welcome to the Nobel Hotel Group, where traditional hospitality and modern service come together, and the guests become part of the story that is constantly being written. 

Your comfort and satisfaction are our priority and we proudly continue to provide unforgettable experiences that exceed expectations.

Name: Kasteel Steenenburg
Description: Ontdek de charme van een historisch landgoed en het comfort van een modern hotel. Je verblijft midden in het groen, waar luxe, gastvrijheid en comfort samenkomen. Kasteel Steenenburg ligt in Drunen, vlak bij de A59, met genoeg parkeergelegenheid. Vanuit hier ben je in 10 minuten bij de Loonse en Drunense Duinen of in de gezellige steden Heusden en ’s-Hertogenbosch. Verwachte opening: derde kwartaal 2025.

Name: Relais & Châteaux Weeshuis Gouda
Description:
WSHS is a unique hide away waar het verleden en het eigenzinnige heden elkaar tegen komen. Slapen, eten, bewonderen, verwonderen en pamperen; WSHS biedt een totaalbeleving. Het hotel bestaat uit 25 luxueuze suites – elk met een eigen stijl – die erop zijn ingericht gasten een onvergetelijke tijd te bezorgen en alle zintuigen te prikkelen. 

De ligging in het Cultuur Historisch kwartier en een samenwerking met de buren, Museum Gouda, onderstrepen dat kunst- en cultuurliefhebbers hier hun hart zullen ophalen.

Het is gastronomisch genieten in het in-house fine dining restaurant LIZZ*. Daarnaast wordt de dag rustig gestart in The Breakfast Bar met een waanzinnig ontbijt of juist succesvol afgesloten met een cocktail bij coffee & cocktailbar COCO aan de andere kant van de middeleeuwse binnenplaats.

Never a dull moment bij Relais&Chateaux Weeshuis Gouda.

Name: Yemaya Reefs
Description:
Yemaya Reefs: It is a place of virtually untouched beauty, where land and sea conspire to form a delicate natural ecosystem. 
Named after the African mother goddess who is said to preside over the oceans’ waters, the hotel sits on a generous stretch of habitat that includes all-oceanfront casitas, a chef-driven restaurant, and an array of land and water activities. 
Here, we invite you to experience joyful island living at its finest.

We currently offer 16 oceanfront casitas, five with plunge pools. Intuitive by design, each room features a natural tone-on-tone palette and local artisan textiles. 
All casitas are steps away from the ocean.

Name: NUSUK AL ZAHBI
Description: Nusuk_Al_Zahbi is based in Makkah Saudi Arabia. We manage and operate different Hotels in Makkah & Madinah on behalf of property owners or investors. As a hotel operator company we offer other services in booking such as Hotel Booking, Transportation, Accommodations and Religious tours.

Name: Radisson Hotel Antwerp Berchem
Description:
Just ten minutes from the airport and Antwerp’s central station, the Park Inn by Radisson Antwerp
Berchem places you in the perfect location, whether you’re traveling for business or leisure.
Designed with a contemporary touch for modern travellers, our 142 guest rooms come with modern
amenities and all the comforts of home.

Name: Hotel Aquastar Danube
Description:
Održavajući autentičan duh prelepe plave Dunava, Hotel Aquastar Danube pruža gostoprimstvo na jedinstvenom nivou. Smešten nedaleko od gradske plaže, sa atraktivnom pozicijom tik uz obalu reke, hotel nudi nezaboravno iskustvo boravka.

Sa svojih 53 smeštajnih jedinica i brojnim sadržajima prilagođenim maksimalnom užitku svakog posetioca, Aquastar Danube garantuje vrhunsku uslugu i neponovljiv provod.

Nakon renoviranja 2024. godine, hotel je obogaćen dodatnim sadržajima za još veći užitak i komfor. Uz smeštaj, gosti mogu koristiti izuzetno opremljene konferencijske sale idealne za simpozijume, skupove i gala večere ili razne business prijeme.

Sadržaji koji izdvajaju naš hotel:
•	Restoran Terasa – Beskrajni izvor gastronomskih čarolija i ribljih specijaliteta
•	La Perouse Bar & Restoran – Ambijent i kuhinja inspirisani kulturom daleke Australije
•	Maxim brod – Jedinstvena barka za nezaboravna krstarenja Dunavom i Đerdapskim krajem
•	SPA & Wellness centar – Oaza opuštanja i revitalizacije sa profesionalnim tretmanima
•	Hotelski bazeni – Savršeno prilagođeni ambijent i temperatura za inspirativno uživanje

Uz svoje bogato nasleđe i modernu udobnost, Hotel Aquastar Danube je idealan izbor za vaš boravak u Kladovu. Doživite harmoniju prirode i luksuza uz svaki trenutak proveden u našem hotelu.

Name: PT PURI INSANASIH (PIA Hotel Group)
Description:
PIA Hotel Group was founded in 1992, 350+ rooms, 150+ teams, 6 hotels accros two provinces (java and sumatera), and still expanding.

Every person who travels has their own idea of what makes for a good hotel, but most agree that there are six qualities that make for an exceptional stay. These include service, cleanliness, price, location, management, and the hotel's environment.

As a Group with a long history, we are committed to serve at the highest standard, above six qualities with a touch of compassion.

Name: The Westin Yokohama
Description: Stay at The Westin Yokohama and let our signature wellness programs empower you. Offering a prime location in the Yokohama Minato Mirai 21 CBD we're the newest lifestyle wellness hotel in Japan’s Kanagawa Prefecture. From restful slumber on our Heavenly Bed to nutritious, energizing dining cuisine on our Eat Well Menu, our hotel helps you be your best on the road. Our 373 spacious hotel rooms and suites offer a relaxing retreat in the heart of Yokohama with replenishing amenities and views of Mount Fuji in select rooms. Host memorable meetings, weddings and social events in one of our 13 versatile function spaces accommodating up to 530 guests. Savor enticing cuisine at 5 distinctive restaurants and bars serving a variety of dishes sure to delight your palate. For the health-conscious guest, our integrated wellness floor will revive your senses with our original Heavenly Spa By Westin and WestinWORKOUT Fitness Studio. Stay Well no matter what brings you to Japan at The Westin Yokohama.

Name: Americas Outdoor Adventure Park
Description: AOA Park is a 600-acre off-road adventure destination built for thrill-seekers, families, and outdoor lovers alike. With miles of SXS-only trails, high-octane attractions like drag racing and RC tracks, and unique amenities including cabins, camping, pools, restaurants, and VIP lounges, AOA Park offers an unforgettable mix of adrenaline, comfort, and community. Whether you’re tearing through the trails, relaxing poolside, or enjoying a weekend of live entertainment, AOA is where adventure meets experience.

Name: Square hotel KTM
Description: Soaring above Kathmandu Valley’s upscale commercial hub, Square hotel blends in modern minimal architecture with a traditional boutique atmosphere from the golden era. It is located within the vicinity of many national and international organizations, major tourist attractions, airport, and the rich cultural and colorful nightlife of Nepal. At Square discover the collection of dining, exclusive lounges, elaborate conferences and banquets and heated pool experiences. Join us and explore the beauty of Kathmandu valley and local culture, cuisine, and entertainment through our esteem team.

Name: Kotimaailma Apartments Finland
Description:
Furnished apartments all around Finland. Great choice for a pleasant stay whether it´s for a few days or several months.

Kotimaailma Apartments Finland tarjoaa yritys- ja julkiselle puolelle sekä vakuutusyhtiö- ja yksityisasiakkaille kalustettuja kodinomaisia asuntoja ympäri Suomen. Vuonna 2007 toimintansa aloittanut yritys toimii valtakunnallisena ketjuna ympäri Suomea. Löydät valikoimastamme laadukkaasti varustellut kodit, hyvien kulkuyhteyksien ja palveluiden lähellä ympäri Suomen.

Hintamme sisältävät aina kotivakuutuksen, liina- ja vuodevaatteet, loppusiivouksen, vesi- ja sähkömaksut ja kaiken sen varustelun, joka on jokaisessa Kotimaailman asunnossa. Väliaikaiset asuntomme ovat täysvarusteltuja, jolloin asiakkaidemme tarvitsee tuoda mukanaan vain vaatteet ja hygieniatarvikkeet.

Lemmikit ovat meille tervetulleita.

Name: Botel Marina
Description:
Vítejte na palubě botelu Marina!

Už jste někdy strávili noc na lodi? Chcete se probouzet při východu slunce v okolí klidné řeky? Nabízíme vám jedinečný zážitek, na který jen tak nezapomenete.

Jsme místo, které vás zavede do oázy klidu, štěstí a naprosté pohody. Dáme vám pocit domova a odjíždět budete plní nezapomenutelných okamžiků.

Okolní příroda, kouzlo řeky a naprostý klid je to, na co budete vzpomínat po návratu domů.

Vydejte se na vlnu splněných přání s námi.

Name: Discover Resort Karjat
Description: Nestled in the foothills of the Sahyadri Mountains is the perfect hideaway from the bump and rumble of city life, Discover Resorts. This privileged sanctuary is set around a tranquil signature lake pool. Our residences are aesthetically designed to accentuate self-indulgence and pampering. Discreetly located to ensure privacy, each of our opulent studio lofts and stylish studios come fully equipped with every creature comfort, a private pool facing terrace all decked with wooden flooring and round the clock hospitality.

Name: Marriott Dallas/Fort Worth Westlake

Name: Hotel Antonio Conference ***
Description:

Nasze położenie zapewnia spokój, a jednocześnie szybki dostęp z autostrady A4, co sprawia, że jesteśmy doskonałym miejscem na biznesowe spotkania oraz relaksujący wypoczynek.

 Lokalizacja:
Znajdujemy się zaledwie 8 minut (9 km) od autostrady A4, a podróż do Wrocławia lub Opola zajmuje zaledwie 20 minut (50 km). To idealne miejsce dla podróżujących służbowo, turystów i miłośników piękna okolicznej przyrody.

 Oferta dla Firm:
Oferujemy kompleksowe usługi dla biznesu, w tym organizację konferencji, szkoleń i imprez integracyjnych. Nasze nowocześnie wyposażone sale konferencyjne zapewniają idealne warunki do efektywnej pracy, a strefa paintballa i mini ZOO dodają niezapomnianego smaku relaksowi po intensywnym dniu.

 Restauracja Steak&Grill:
Zapraszamy do naszej restauracji, gdzie nasz Szef Kuchni kreuje wyborne dania, łącząc smaki lokalnych produktów z kulinarną pasją. Wybór idealny zarówno na kameralne spotkania, jak i wyjątkowe bankiety.

 Atrakcje na Terenie Hotelu:
Spróbuj swoich sił na Paintball Arenie, odwiedź nasze Mini ZOO, a potem skorzystaj z licznych atrakcji integracyjnych, które zorganizujemy specjalnie dla Ciebie i Twojego zespołu.

 Wyjątkowe Wydarzenia:
Jako doświadczony partner w organizacji wydarzeń, gwarantujemy profesjonalizm i indywidualne podejście do każdego projektu. Nasze wydarzenia to nie tylko spotkania biznesowe, to doświadczenia, które pozostawiają trwałe wspomnienia.

 W otoczeniu Przyrody:
Przyjedź i odkryj urok osiedla Skarbimierz-Osiedle oraz okolic. Spaceruj po zieleni, delektuj się świeżym powietrzem i ciesz się pięknem krajobrazu.

 Współpraca Biznesowa:
Szukasz partnera biznesowego? Chętnie współpracujemy z firmami organizującymi eventy, dostarczając unikalne atrakcje i wspierając rozwój biznesowy.

Dziękujemy za odwiedzenie naszego profilu LinkedIn!

Name: Avernakø Landhotel
Description:
- Landidyl
- Fordybelse
- Feriestemning
- Lystfiskeri & Fiskelodge
- Kreative udfoldelser
- Nærvær og kontakt i øjenhøjde
- Smuk natur

Dette er nogle af de ord som kan beskrive et besøg på Avernakø Landhotel.
Avernakø Landhotel blev etableret i 2009 i øens nedlagte skole og vi råder nu over 30 senge, restaurant, og butik.
Det hele startede i 2006 med produktion af kødgeder og gårdbutik, hvor gedekød, skind og hornsmykker har været i fokus. Siden har vi udvidet med kaninkød og skind, eget syltetøj, saft og urtesalt mm.

Bæredygtighed er i højsædet her hos os, da netop det at udnytte alt fra slagtedyr og øens frugt, bær og urter og gøre det lokalt er blevet mit varemærke og min stolthed. Stolthed fordi jeg på den måde er med til at fremme økologien, optimal udnyttelse af ressourcer samt støtte lokale arbejdspladser. Som naturligvis alt sammen smages i Restauranten og spiller en stor rolle i vore produktioner og visioner.

Efterspørgslen på gedekød er stadigt voksende og jeg har haft rigtig svært ved at følge med, hvorfor jeg har indgået aftale med det økologiske gedeostemejeri Øselund, der nu leverer geder og sikrer et stabilt udvalg her i vores butik og i restaurantens køkken.

Gitte har valgt at kalde sit utraditionelle sted for et Landhotel, fordi vi tilbyder vores gæster værelser med opredte senge, håndklæder til badet og mulighed for fuld forplejning under opholdet. Vores gæster kan forvente en hjemlig atmosfære med masser af hygge og god hjemmelavet mad. Vi øser gerne af vores viden om øens seværdigheder og ø-livet som sådan og hjælper gerne med at planlægge cykel eller spadsereture på øen. Stedets rolige og fredlige atmosfære indbyder desuden til fordybelse og eftertænksomhed, hvis man vil opsøge dette. 

Om foråret og efteråret har vi særligt fokus på lystfiskere som vil besøge det sydfynske Havørred Paradis som er Avernakø!

Følg os på Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AvernakoeLandhotel
Følg os på Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/avernakoe_landhotel/

Name: Spaarnwoude Park Hotel
Description:
In het recreatiegebied Spaarnwoude Park ligt één van de grootste golfbanen van Europa: Golfbaan Spaarnwoude. Deze openbare golfbaan met 66 holes, driving range en oefengreens bestaat sinds 1977 en trekt jaarlijks veel (inter)nationale bezoekers. De eigenaar en exploitant van de golfbaan heeft het initiatief genomen om op de locatie een duurzaam en klimaatadaptief hotel te ontwikkelen.

Het eco-luxury Spaarnwoude Park Hotel wordt een 4-sterren hotel met 137 kamers, wellnessfaciliteiten en vergaderruimtes. Het gebouw is circulair, natuurinclusief en toekomstbestendig ontworpen door Mulderblauw Architecten. Het energieneutrale gebouw krijgt een BREEAM-NL Excellent **** certificering en Madaster materiaalpaspoort. Het is een ontwikkeling van Heerenstede Vastgoed in samenwerking met Amstelius Green Building Group.

Het gebouw met hotel- en golffaciliteiten wordt zorgvuldig ingepast in de natuurlijke omgeving van de golfbaan Spaarnwoude gelegen in het natuur- en recreatiegebied Spaarnwoude te Velsen-Zuid.

Met de komst van het hotel krijgt Spaarnwoude Park een meer divers aanbod aan overnachtingsmogelijkheden; daarmee sluit het aan op de Visie Spaarnwoude Park 2040.

Casa das Penhas Douradas, Burel Expedition Hotel** has opened in 2006 and has 17 rooms. It is a boutique hotel, located at 1500m high and counts with a unique relationship with the surrounding nature.

Casa de São Lourenço, Burel Panorama Hotel*** has opened in 2018 and has 20 rooms. It is a member of Design Hotels, located at 1250m high (just 4km away from Casa das Penhas Douradas) and counts with unique views of the Zêzere Glacial Valley. It was one of the first four Pousadas de Portugal, that opened in 1948, and the firs 5-star hotel in the region. Casa de São Lourenço was awarded several times, such as: Prémio Nacional de Turismo 2021; 2022 and 2021 Chave de Prata Boa Cama, Boa Mesa.
