Name: Ästad Vingård
Description:
Genuint jordnära med anor från 1940-talet och full fart framåt.
Ästad Gård är ett familjeföretag. Från början ett traditionellt lantbruk, men numera prisbelönt som Nordens mest inspirerande miljö för möten och aktiviteter. Utmärkelsen togs emot av syskonen Linda Petersson, Mattias Carlsson och Daniel Carlsson som växte upp på Ästad Gård och som idag driver den framåt. Det är full fart, med många och vilda idéer och mycket som dessutom blir verklighet.

Rustik elegans och jordnära njutning finns med i allt - från de annorlunda och roliga aktiviteterna till maten och miljön på Ästad Gård. Här i utkanten av naturreservatet Åkulla Bokskogar är sjöarna många och kristallklart rena. Naturen runt Ästad Gård är ekologiskt odlingslandskap. Vi har 50 hektar åker och lika mycket ängs- och betesmark, men också 15 000 vinstockar i vackra rader på en solig sluttning. Vinodlingen är vår senaste dröm som nu blir verklighet. Ästad Vingård är Sveriges största vingård.

Name: Hotel Costanero - MGallery Collection
Description:
Ubicado frente al mar en el barrio Pocitos, cerca de los principales centros de negocios y a solo 20 minutos del aeropuerto, el Hotel Costanero Montevideo MGallery ha sido diseñado para resaltar el mar y el cielo en cada detalle. Con 92 habitaciones que ofrecen espacios perfectos para su comodidad lejos de casa, incluyendo 3 maravillosas Suites Deluxe con Terraza y vista al mar. El hotel cuenta con salas multifuncionales para eventos corporativos, sociales y una oferta gastronómica increíble.
Disfrute de las facilidades de un hotel boutique de lujo, un gimnasio equipado, piscina exterior, sauna, sala de tratamientos, WIFI de cortesía, estacionamiento y servicio de valet parking, todos estos elementos harán que su estadía sea memorable.
Nuestro Restaurante & Bar Cauce, con ubicación privilegiada y una hermosa vista al mar y a la emblemática Rambla de Montevideo. Cauce recrea lo mejor de la cocina internacional de autor con toques creativos y eclécticos de los mejores platos locales.
Ingles

Name: Park Inn by Radisson Ayodhya
Description:
Experience the Best Stay in Ayodhya at Park Inn by Radisson 

Discover unmatched comfort and elegance at Park Inn by Radisson Ayodhya, the Best Hotel in Ayodhya — perfectly located near the city center and the sacred Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Temple.

Relax and rejuvenate in our 80 spacious, stylish, and well-appointed rooms, designed for both business and leisure travelers. Enjoy world-class hospitality and personalized services that make every stay unforgettable.

 Dine & Delight: Savor an array of international cuisines and authentic local delicacies at our signature restaurant, curated to offer an exceptional culinary experience.

 Celebrate Grandly: Featuring Ayodhya’s largest banquet hall and lawn, our hotel is the best destination wedding venue in Ayodhya, ideal for weddings, social celebrations, and corporate events. From elegant décor to bespoke menus, our dedicated team ensures every event is a masterpiece.

 Whether you’re planning a sacred journey, a business conference, or your dream wedding in Ayodhya — Park Inn by Radisson Ayodhya is your perfect destination for luxury, comfort, and celebration.

#ParkInnByRadissonAyodhya #BestHotelInAyodhya #DestinationWeddingAyodhya #WeddingVenueAyodhya #LuxuryHotelAyodhya #RadissonHotels #StayInAyodhya #RadissonIndia #BanquetHallAyodhya #AyodhyaWeddings #TravelAyodhya #HospitalityExcellence

Name: Novotel Bahrain Al Dana Resort
Description: The only International branded 4 star resort set in landscaped tropical gardens in the capital of Manama.

Name: Renaissances Tlemcen Hotel
Description: Le Renaissance Tlemcen est un hôtel cinq étoiles situé à Tlemcen, en Algérie, sur le plateau de Lalla Setti, qui se trouve à proximité de l’aéroport Messali El Hadj et de la gare de Tlemcen. Nos 204 chambres spacieuses et raffinées offrent une literie de luxe, le Wi-Fi gratuit et un espace de travail moderne pour vous assurer le plus grand confort lors de vos voyages d’affaires comme de loisirs. Éveillez vos sens dans nos six restaurants innovants, notamment l’Arabesque Steakhouse and Grill, l’Al Bustan avec sa cuisine méditerranéenne ou encore notre bar lounge Alcazar. Une piscine extérieure, un centre de fitness entièrement équipé, deux courts de tennis et de grandes installations de spa de jour vous permettent de profiter d’un large choix d’activités de loisirs et de relaxation. L’hôtel dispose d’espaces de réunion et de conférences modernes, parfaitement adaptés aux réunions de grande ampleur, aux réceptions et aux mariages. Le Renaissance Tlemcen Hotel est situé à proximité de sites d’intérêt tels que le palais El Mechouar, le parc national de Tlemcen et le musée de Tlemcen.

Name: InterContinental Lusaka
Description: ZAMBIAN HOSPITALITY IN THE HEART OF THE DIPLOMATIC DISTRICT

Name: SANU
Description:
"Live with Nature." 
SANU is a lifestyle brand where we envision a world where people co-exist harmoniously with nature. Under our brand concept "Live with Nature", SANU offers a subscription 2nd Home in local nature. 

「自然と共に生きる。」
SANUは⼈と⾃然が共⽣する社会の実現を⽬指すライフスタイルブランド。「自然と共に生きる」 ブランドコンセプトの下、身近な自然で生活を営むためのもう一つの家を持つ、サブスクリプションサービス「SANU 2nd Home」を運営。

Name: NH Copenhagen Grand Joanne
Description:
Welcome to Grand Joanne!

A magnificently beautiful, newly restored 1800s building in the heart of Vesterbro, Copenhagen.

Kindness transcends the entire house and circulates from Grand Joanne into Vesterbro, towards passionate, kind people, traveling or looking for a place to meet and hang out.

Grand Joanne is a lifestyle hotel, and we are all about being nice, local, inclusive and the good neighbour. 

We want to bring people together to create shared memories over music, food, drinks, and culture.  We want to create a space where you come as you are and leave inspired full of beautiful memories. 

We want our employees to be themselves, and make our guests feel as they are in their own living room surrounded by diversity, culture and niceness. 

Grand Joanne is a part of Vesterbro, and Vesterbro is a part of Grand Joanne.

Grand Joanne is an abundance of experiences 
…with a hotel on top

Name: Radisson Blu Hotel Ranchi
Description: Conveniently located 12 minutes from Airport (IXR) and just seven minutes from the Ranchi Railway Station, it makes Radisson Blu Hotel Ranchi a ideal central downtown hotel. We offer 115 well appointed rooms & suites, 5 food & beverage outlet and a state of art spa & salon.

Name: Hooks Herrgård
Description:
In the heart of the Småland forests, surrounded by Lake Hokasjön and winding gravel roads, Hooks Herrgård's majestic building folds out – and has been doing so since the 14th century.

When we, the Edberg family, took over in 1960’s we aimed to create a place unlike any other. We saw the possibilities in the manor, the location and surrounding nature and decided to take advantage of it. Golf and conferences became the core of Hooks Herrgård, but we have since then branched out in many directions – but stayed true to the core of wanting to create the silver lining in life. Today we are a blooming family business with the third generation acting as the CEO and the fourth generation pouring you coffee in the restaurant.

Our main goal is to create a unique experience and make you feel like you’re part of the family. We dare to say we probably managed to create more "honorary Edberg’s " than lost golf balls over the years, and we’d love for you to be next.

Name: British Colonial Nassau
Description: British Colonial Nassau is a captivating blend of Bahamian history and modern sophistication, beckoning guests with its enduring rogue spirit and endless allure. As a tribute to the hotel's rich 100+year history, every inch of the property is infused with an air of charming adventure, lush nature, and boundless intrigue.

Name: Crowne Plaza Adelaide Mawson Lakes
Description:
Embrace elevated hospitality at our hotel, conference and events venue in the heart of Mawson Lakes - where modern comforts meet a taste of South Australia at its best.

Welcome to Crowne Plaza Adelaide Mawson Lakes, positioned just 25 minutes from Adelaide CBD and Adelaide Airport, we offer guests an enriching experience in premium hospitality and dining.

Crowne Plaza Adelaide Mawson Lakes is not just a hotel; it's a vibrant community with everything you need in one light-filled haven of sophisticated refinement. 

Located just moments from the University of SA Mawson Lakes Campus, Parafield Airport and Technology Park, Crowne Plaza Adelaide Mawson Lakes is the premium choice for accommodation, functions, meetings, conferences and events in northern Adelaide.

Our hotels convenient location ensures our guests are able to easily connect to the Edinburgh Defence Precinct, RAAF Base Edinburgh, hospitals, Gepps Cross Sports Precinct, as well as renowned South Australian wineries of the Barossa Valley, and beyond to Port Wakefield and the peninsular. Crowne Plaza Adelaide Mawson Lakes is well position for work, play, gatherings or a blend of everything in between.

Choose your perfect accommodation type from our 155 contemporarily designed rooms which have been thoughtfully created with tech and premium touches. Enjoy our convenient services which include on-site secure car parking, guest laundry, dry cleaning, 24-hour reception, 24-hour gym and 24-hour room service.

Create memorable events in our unique function spaces including 442SQM Shoalhaven Ballroom, Inparrila Atrium with 17m high ceiling, Ember & Vine restaurant and Aviator Bar.

Our team are available for everything you need from concierge services to 
creating memorable events that cater to the needs of both business and leisure travellers, whilst providing a place for guests to unwind and enjoy the uninterrupted views towards Adelaide Hills.

Name: Turimar Business Hotel
Description:
Desde 1942, o Turimar Business Hotel tem sido sinônimo de tradição, conforto e excelência em hospitalidade. Localizado em Benguela, na privilegiada região do Porto do Lobito, Restinga, nosso hotel se destaca por oferecer um ambiente sofisticado e acolhedor para viajantes a negócios e turistas que buscam qualidade e conveniência.  

Com décadas de experiência, combinamos um serviço de alto padrão com instalações modernas, garantindo uma estadia confortável e produtiva. Seja para reuniões corporativas, eventos especiais ou momentos de lazer, o Turimar Business Hotel é a escolha ideal para quem valoriza tradição e excelência.  

Seja bem-vindo ao nosso legado de hospitalidade!

Name: The Isolano
Description:
The Isolano is a boutique adults friendly (12+) hotel with a beach lounge located in Cres, Croatia. 
It is situated in the pine grove overlooking the Adriatic sea, offering breath-taking views. Located just about 15min waterfront stroll to city of Cres. The resorts stands out with its geometric building through the Mediterranean vegetation but at the same time is well-integrated thank to its natural materials. It comprises two outdoor heated pools with restaurants, bar lounge and 500m2 wellness area with spa and gym.The prime location of The Isolano allows guests to immerse themselves in the unspoiled nature of the island without sacrificing luxury and comfort as well as the opportunity to visit the nearby town

Name: Alila Hinu Bay
Description: Enjoy our Luxurious Rooms & Villas in the Heart of Omani Nature, a Beach Lovers Paradise. Discover Solitude in the Majestic Coastal Area Located Between Jebel Samhan & Arabian Sea. 87km from Salalah Airport. Fishing Destinations.

Name: Merya Hotels
Description: Specialized in hotels operating and management

Name: Palm House
Description:
Welcome to Palm House, where modern luxury meets timeless elegance in the heart of Palm Beach. 

Located on the prestigious Royal Palm Way, just a short stroll from the pristine beaches, iconic Worth Avenue, and the Royal, Palm House is set to become a new symbol of refined hospitality on this storied island.  
Our 79-room property is not just a hotel; it’s a destination—a place where the charm of Palm Beach’s rich history blends seamlessly with a fresh, contemporary vision of luxury living.
At Palm House, we are dedicated to crafting bespoke experiences that reflect the unique desires of each guest. From the moment guests step into our vibrant Palm Bar, adorned with exquisite Murano glass chandeliers, to relaxing by our serene Sunset Pool Deck or unwinding in our expansive, elegantly designed suites, every detail is thoughtfully curated to create an atmosphere of relaxed exclusivity and personalized service. 
Our mission is to honour the enduring allure of Palm Beach while establishing new traditions for the next generation of discerning travellers.

Palm House is a Proud Member of the Iconic Luxury Hotels Collection and marks its first property in United States. 

Iconic Luxury hotels, is a collection of distinct properties, in either Iconic Buildings, Iconic addresses or Iconic Destinations, and while each property has its own distinct architecture, cultural positioning, character, traditions and stories, they all share a common commitment to delivering outstanding experiences.  
The current portfolio includes some of the world’s most famous hotels, from Cliveden House, one of England’s finest country estates, to Italy’s Hotel Excelsior, home of the Venice International Film Festival.  

Other UK hotels include Chewton Glen on the South Coast, The Lygon Arms in the Cotswolds, 11 Cadogan Gardens and The Chelsea Townhouse, both in Chelsea and The Mayfair Townhouse, in the heart of Mayfair.

Name: Cavas Wine Lodge Relais Chateaux
Description: Cavas Wine Lodge es un exclusivo hotel de tan solo 18 habitaciones, con servicio personalizado, que nace desde la naturaleza, cerca de las bodegas y con todo el confort de un hotel de lujo. A tan solo media hora de la ciudad de Mendoza

Name: The Aficionados
Description:
A wonderful world of 100+ hotels, design and travel culture bound under The Aficionados (@theaficionados). 

We’ve been connecting the dots of creativity since 2009 in a deliberate line-up that cleverly knits the threads of travel, design, craft, and architecture. Join us. Explore the website online and discover our fabulous member hotels, guesthouses and private hire houses – each independent hotel is defined by its creative owners, the interior design and original style. 

We also publish several magazines for those who love to travel in style and stay in hotels that break the rule book of mundane. A guide to the rare outposts, a reference for travel and perfect design candy for interior enthusiasts.

Name: Airy Hotels & Leisure
Description:
Com 20 anos de experiência, atuamos no desenvolvimento de empreendimentos únicos, sustentáveis e de alto padrão.

Com forte atuação internacional, especialmente na Europa e América Latina, escolhemos o Brasil como destino estratégico para investir, vislumbrando seu grande potencial de crescimento e diversidade de oportunidades.

Nosso compromisso é entregar projetos inovadores, que aliam qualidade, responsabilidade ambiental, tecnologia e hospitalidade. Tudo isso só é possível graças à expertise e dedicação do nosso time, que atua com excelência e profissionalismo.

Conheça a Reserva do Abiaí, com um projeto inserido em uma mata de área de três milhões e quinhentos mil metros quadrados.

 Asenza Beach Resort, um resort all inclusive exclusivo na Paraíba.

 Morada das Falésias, nosso condomínio horizontal.

 Acquaí Park, o primeiro parque aquático da Paraíba.

Name: Four Points by Sheraton Al Ain
Description: Set in the heart of UAE's only Oasis city, Four Points by Sheraton Al Ain is located just minutes away from Al Ain's best attractions including the Al Ain Zoo, Wadi Adventure, Jebel Hafeet (the UAE’s highest mountain) and the city's famous Bronze Age Ruins. Adjacent to Hili Mall, the hotel is the go-to destination for business, leisure and adventure travelers alike. The state-of-the-art lobby is both a place of welcome and gathering, offering free Wi-Fi and a restaurant catering to every taste. Our thoughtfully designed rooms and suites, overlooking the hotel's Olympic pool and terrace, provide spaces for both work and relaxation. Food lovers will relish sampling all that the three international restaurants and coffee shops have to offer. The property also caters to our guests' fitness needs, boasting a fully equipped fitness center, steam room, sauna and tennis court. Whether your visit is for work or fun, you'll enjoy a great stay at Four Points by Sheraton Al Ain.

Name: Kempinski The Boulevard Dubai
Description:
Kempinski The Boulevard Dubai
Nestled in the vibrant heart of Downtown Dubai, Kempinski The Boulevard Dubai embodies luxury lifestyle and sophistication. This majestic
5-star hotel offers an unparalleled experience with 198 meticulously designed rooms and suites boasting stunning views of Burj Khalifa and the
bustling city skyline. Catering to both leisure and business travelers, it provides a sanctuary of indulgence, gracious hospitality, and top-notch
amenities. Inspired by European finesse, the hotel exudes old-world charm and understated luxury, with curated artworks adorning the walls,
floors, and ceilings, each narrating a unique story.
With its convenient location, Kempinski The Boulevard Dubai offers its guests to be in close proximity to retail, cultural, and leisure attractions.
An indoor direct access connects the hotel to the world's largest shopping destination, Dubai Mall and iconic landmarks such as Burj Khalifa
and The Dubai Fountain. For business travelers, the hotel is conveniently located near Dubai International Financial Centre and Dubai World
Trade Centre, easily accessible via Sheikh Zayed Road and the Dubai Metro.

Name: Crowne Plaza Ankara
Description: Located in the city center, Crowne Plaza Ankara connects its visitors, business and leisure, to the heart of Ankara.

Name: Radisson RED Tbilisi
Description:
Welcome to Radisson RED Tbilisi, where vibrant design meets urban sophistication. Enjoy stylish accommodations, innovative dining experiences at POSTA Restaurant and POSTA Cafe, and vibrant events at our RED Yard. With modern amenities, personalized service, and a prime location in the heart of Tbilisi, we REDefine your travel experience with fashion, music, and art. 

With 111 uniquely designed rooms, three versatile meeting spaces, and a fully-equipped gym, we accommodate every traveler's needs

Name: Allure Suites
Description:
Welcome to Allure Suites — where refined living meets timeless style. Allure Suites has been thoughtfully transformed into a residential sanctuary designed for modern professionals, couples, and families seeking comfort, convenience, and class. Every corner whispers elegance, and every detail is curated for long-term serenity.
This calming hotel makes its guests feel quite at home, even if home is far away. It is favorably located proximate to Dubai’s dominant commercial street (i.e. Shaikh Zayed Street), within 10-minutes walk from the ‘Internet City Metro Station’. Many cultural, commercial, social and educational centers as well as bowling clubs, restaurants, malls and Spa are situated nearby, which is very convenient for the guests who would prefer to combine business and pleasure. It takes about 30 minutes to get to the hotel from the airport.

Name: ROOTS HOTEL
Description: فندق روتس المزيج الرائع بين الرفاهية والراحة

Name: Mercure Kathmandu Sukedhara Heights
Description:
Nestled in the heart of vibrant Kathmandu, Mercure Kathmandu Sukedhara Heights offers a serene escape with 104 elegantly designed rooms crafted for discerning travelers. Our hotel provides the perfect balance of comfort and sophistication. Indulge in exquisite dining at our signature Indian specialty restaurant or unwind at the cozy lobby bar. Guests can rejuvenate at our state-of-the-art fitness center, relax in the steam & sauna, or soak in the breathing views from the rooftop infinity pool and bar.

Ideally located near embassies and just 20 minutes from the city center, the hotel ensures easy access to key destinations, making it ideal for both leisure and business travelers. Conveniently situated 4 kilometers from Tribhuvan International Airport. Designed to cater to diverse needs, the hotel is well-equipped for Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, and Exhibitions (MICE) with distinctive and spacious ballrooms. Our Food & Beverage options are perfect for both local guests and international Traveler.

Name: Steyn City Hotel by Saxon
Description:
Steyn City Hotel by Saxon offers an unmatched experience within Johannesburg's prestigious Steyn City lifestyle resort, surrounded by serene green landscapes and a member of Leading Hotels of The World. 

Every detail is designed to offer guests an immersive retreat, with luxurious rooms, gourmet dining, state-of-the-art conference facilities, and a sophisticated co-working space.

Name: Addmania Service Marketing
Description: ADDMANIA operates as a marketing and promotion agency, specializing in providing customized and cost-effective promotional solutions for hotels, restaurants, resorts, and bars. We serve as an outsourced promotion partner, offering tailored sales strategies designed to enhance customer traffic, improve customer retention rates, elevate brand awareness and loyalty, and ultimately ensure guest satisfaction over the long term.

Name: Hotel Verde Zanzibar-Azam Luxury Resort and Spa
Description: As the island’s greenest hotel, it is one of a kind. Set just outside historic Stone Town and only a mere 15 minute drive from the airport, it is the ideal location for all travel purposes; family holidays, special events, adventure or business travel. Each room offers luxury accommodation with a private balcony and ocean-facing views of the coast or the mangrove forest.

Name: Byens Hotel
Description:
Vi ønsker at skabe et brand for unikke hoteller indrettet i smukke bygninger med historie og karakter.

Vores hoteller skal have både placering og hjerte på rette sted. De skal emme af en klar holdning til stil, kvalitet og have referencer til det enkelte hotels kontekst, lokalområde og historie. 

Vi ønsker at skabe nyt liv i ikoniske bygninger og gøre dem til foretrukne samlingspunkter med personlige restauranter og gode hoteller med en effektiv og professionel konference- og selskabs-virksomhed i personlige omgivelser. 

Gæster skal opleve en sammenhængende fortælling, der når ud i alle grene af virksomheden.

Hotellerne i Byens Hotel skal netop være det personlige og gedigne valg. Et alternativ til mere rutineprægede hotel-tilbud. I hotellerne skal man som gæst hele tiden fornemme, at der er en klar holdning til alt, hvad der serveres. At indretningen, den grafiske identitet, tonalitet, udtryk og service nøje afstemmer gæstens forventninger. At alle dele af serviceoplevelsen på samme måde er gennemtænkt i forhold til det centrale koncept, at det er nærværende og personligt.

Vi starter i Horsens og fortsætter i …?

Byens Hotel

Name: The Met Hotel - Thessaloniki
Description:
In the vibrant city of Thessaloniki, where history and art constantly inform a forward-thinking business culture, THE MET HOTEL, a distinguished member of Design Hotels, offers discerning corporate and leisure travelers a sophisticated and inspiring metropolitan experience.

Conveniently located in the new harbour area, one of the city’s most lively quarters, and within easy reach of the monument-studded city center, THE MET HOTEL is an ideal choice featuring luxury accommodations, gourmet dining, state of the art business conferencing facilities, and a top class spa & rejuvenation center, all supported by outstanding services and meticulous attention to detail. During your stay at The Met Hotel, you can use our Free Shuttle bus transfer from and to the Aristotle Central Square. Our 212 guestrooms and suites, offering great city and port views, welcome guests to a relaxed and sophisticated ambiance of refined aesthetics, advanced technology and luxurious comfort. In total, 13 conference and meeting areas are available for high end conferences and meetings. Moreover, our experienced and dedicated staff will assist you with all details, ensuring a successful event from A to Z. THE MET HOTEL guests have a great opportunity to sample creative Greek and contemporary Asian delicacies prepared by our dedicated staff using only the finest ingredients. Our M’ SPA rejuvenation center offers a wide range of exclusive personalized treatments, deluxe restorative services and state of the art facilities that make our guests' stay as relaxing and enjoyable as possible.

Name: Angsana Teluk Bahang Penang
Description:
Angsana Teluk Bahang, Penang, the first Angsana brand in Malaysia, is part of Banyan Group. An independent, global hospitality company with purpose.

The vibrant resort located on idyllic Teluk Bahang beach, open on 10 October 2020. The resort offers 231 unobstructed sea view rooms and suites with contemporary Peranakan-inspired interior designs, complete with modern amenities and colorful tapestries by internationally acclaimed designer Omar Khan.

The resort has 5 restaurants and bars, 1 Ballroom, 3 meeting rooms, an infinity pool, a kid's pool with water splash feature, an interactive kids’ club, a gallery, a spa and a fitness center. The resort is located just a stone's throw away from some of the top attractions in Penang such as Tropical Spice Garden, Penang Batik Factory, Entopia by Penang Butterfly Farm, ESCAPE theme park Penang, Penang National Park, Monkey Beach and more.

Name: OpsTechPro
Description:
(Formerly "SP Square Systems Inc") 
Looking to revolutionize your hotel's asset management and guest experience? Look no further than OpTechPro, a Florida-based technology company committed to delivering smart solutions for operational excellence and exceptional customer experiences.

With OpTechPro's advanced asset management, hotels can proactively identify and address maintenance needs, resulting in higher-quality facilities and equipment, and a better guest experience. Plus, with our personal concierge Jeanie providing warm, personalized support via smart messaging, your guests will feel right at home.

Here's what sets OpTechPro apart:

    Lightning-fast rollout and painless customization, including to large hotel portfolios and team sizes.
    Full training for your staff when you need it, with system set-up and onboarding services tailored to your specific needs.
    The industry's only custom-designed Advanced Asset Management System.
    Customized corporate-level analytics that provide a performance overview of your entire portfolio in a single report.
    Corporate-level, highly customizable reporting that lets you review the ranking and performance of your entire portfolio within seconds letting you achieve specific results.

Partner with OpTechPro and experience the benefits of a friendly, personalized, and smart approach to achieving your operational goals. With our sophisticated, smart solutions designed to empower your success, you'll minimize costs and stress while maximizing your potential for growth and success.

Name: Verdi Hotels
Description:
At Verdi Hotels, we extend an invitation to you, to embrace local living and soak in the surroundings of the vibrant communities we call home.

A new and fresh era of hospitality begins. We’re a comforting retreat for explorers like you, constantly seeking to enjoy meaningful and authentic local experiences.

Imagine honing in that sense of belonging wherever your journey takes you, being part of the world you’re exploring. Our hosts, guests and local communities come together to share stories and a deep-rooted passion for discovery. Whether you’re exploring nearby treasures or venturing afar, uncovering hidden gems or immersing in the city’s events, we bring the world to your doorstep.

We’re not just about visiting new places; it is about Verdi becoming an integral part of your world, through the experiences you’re about to embark on.

Name: The Westin and Le Meridien City Centre Bahrain
Description:
The Westin and Le Meridien City Centre are attached to City Centre Bahrain, one of the most popular retail and leisure destinations in Bahrain with over 340 retail stores.

The Westin City Centre Bahrain

The Westin Bahrain City Centre is the first ever Westin Hotel to grace the island. Thoughtfully devised with a host of novel and innovative facilities that include the city’s first Heavenly Spa, guests adore the opportunity to sample the unique Westin feel-good promise when staying for business or leisure.

Westin's Food and Beverage outlets include FURN Bistro. A contemporary restaurant where guests can enjoy the best international cuisine with a modern twist. FURN Bakery is a mesmerizing display of the true art of the oven demonstrated by our skilled artisan bakers while FURN Rotunda offers a perfect stop for a cup of coffee or light meal after shopping at City Centre Bahrain. NASMAT Lounge on the third floor offers a distinctive ambiance of al fresco dining by the pool. Mezzanine Lounge, the comfortable atmosphere with private pods makes for an ideal escape or an intimate gathering. Our newest dining addition SALERO Spanish Restaurant offers an amazing experience through live Flamenco entertainment and authentic Spanish dishes. https://www.marriott.com/hotels/travel/bahwi-the-westin-city-centre-bahrain/

Telephone: +973 1717 1000

Le Meridien City Centre Bahrain

Le Meridien City Centre Bahrain is just a short drive away from local attractions such as Bahrain Fort, Al Fateh Mosque, Manama Souk, and Bahrain National Museum, a perfect catalyst for discovery. It offers contemporary guest rooms and suites; all outfitted with the signature Le Méridien Bed.

Baharat is well known for its theme nights such as BBQ Night and Seafood Night plus the award-winning Sweetest Brunch. It also serves signature Le Méridien breakfast where diners can experience classic dishes and local delights. The trendy Butcher and Buns Lounge presents an element of discovery as it transforms.

Name: HOTEL CAMINO REAL SANTA CRUZ
Description:
Conveniently located in Santa Cruz’s thriving business district, just eleven kilometers from Viru Viru International Airport and across the street from the largest mall in Bolivia, Hotel Camino Real is the first choice of hotels among discerning business travelers, tour groups, couples and families. Our hotel is framed by lush gardens and is the only hotel in Santa Cruz to offer an indoor pool and an outdoor pool with a giant waterslide. Upon arrival, you’re welcomed into a bright, chic atrium-style lobby appointed with contemporary furnishings and a man-made waterfall. Most afternoons, our front door is visited by native parrots, offering a touch of local charm. 

Each of our 175 well-appointed Equally suitable for corporate or leisure stays, we bring together spacious, luxury accommodations, delicious dining options and warm, personalized service to ensure a relaxing, rewarding stay. 

Our rooms and suites offers the ideal urban retreat with guest comforts ranging from free Wi-Fi and flat-screen televisions with cable channels to minibars, plush pillowtop beds and room service. In addition to the beautifully landscaped freeform outdoor pool, the hotel features a well-equipped gym and spa. La Tranquera Restaurant serves a sumptuous buffet breakfast and enticing local as well as international specialties for lunch and dinner. Novo Café Lounge is a vibrant spot, where guests can gather for cocktails, light bites and live music. Or you can dine poolside at Tapeque Bar, which features sandwiches, snacks, drinks, ice cream and smoothies. Guests hosting meetings, weddings or social events have access to nine sophisticated function venues along with the full support of our experienced catering team.
Location: Santa Cruz, av. San Martin calle k

Name: Cartesiano Boutique & Wellness Hotel
Description: Cartesiano offers a luxurious Wellness Journey where accommodation meets purpose, and its rich history and art are the heartbeat of this boutique sanctuary in the beautiful city of Puebla, Mexico.

Name: Samsø Strandhotel
Description:
Følg med her og se hvordan vi omdanner grunden fra en udtjent cementvarefabrik til Samsøs smukkeste strandhotel i vandkanten. 

En nyfortolkning af det danske badehotel - i en endnu uset hybrid:

Hotellet udvikles som et fullservice spahotel, i en størrelse og med intimiteten som et dansk badehotel. Et landskabshotel, hvor bygningen føjer sig ind i den genoprettede natur langs kysten.

27 værelser, restaurant, pejsestue, vinkælder, fitness, spa i kælderen, på tagterrassen, og i små mobile enheder i terrænet 

Naturgenopretning, lokale arbejdspladser og biogene byggematerialer 

Med en aktie på 50.000,- kan du blive en del af projektet - i øjeblikket er der omkring 120 aktionærer.

Name: Kusthotellet Styrsö
Description: I hjärtat av Göteborgsskärgård, där havet möter himlen i en tidlös dans, tar en ny historia form. Det är berättelsen om Kusthotellet Styrsö.

Name: Dragsholm Slot - Relais & Châteaux
Description:
Dragsholm Slot is awarded a Michelin star in Michelin Guide Nordic 2017
No. 4 in Denmark & no. 8 in the Nordics in The White Guide Nordic 2017

“One of the coolest hang-outs in the world” / Mr Porter

“One of the 7 best hotels in Scandinavia” / The Global Blue

The castle is one of Denmark's oldest, and has stood on the beautiful Odsherred peninsula for more than 800 years, as wars have raged, noblemen and women have been married in the castle church and prominent prisoners led over the castle courtyard. Today, Dragsholm Castle is open to the public as a hotel with 34 double rooms, two acclaimed restaurants, as an events, courses and conference centre and a church for weddings and services. Our ambition remains to welcome our guests with a total experience. The art is to preserve and convey the historical authenticity and the character of the region, while also bringing the castle and its cultural history into the 21st century's functionality and aesthetic.

In its 800 year-old castle the past, present and future converge in a harmonious interplay between history, local produce and gastronomy. And this must be both seen and tasted. The castle's two recognised and prize-winning restaurants are based on changing menus using the season's ingredients from the Baron's reclaimed Lammefjord.
The surrounding countryside has been designated as Denmark's first and only Geopark by UNESCO and offers plenty of activities. Dragsholm Castle's exciting history can be experienced in a guided tour, and the castle's 34 hotel rooms are decorated with Hästens beds, so guests can get a well-deserved good night's sleep.

Name: Hotel Polaris
Description:
Hotel Polaris at the U.S. Air Force Academy welcomes guests to a stay where exploration, legacy, and ever-modern hospitality come together in awe-inspiring ways. Located alongside the Rocky Mountains and set against the backdrop of Pikes Peak, the hotel offers stunning views and direct access to the natural beauty of Colorado Springs. Inspired by the spirit of exploration and named after the North Star, the hotel connects guests to something bigger, whether it’s the surrounding views, the history of the Academy, or the excitement of discovery.

The resort-style property features 375 upscale guest rooms, six unique dining outlets, and over 45,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor meeting and event space, all designed to inspire connection and awe. Guest amenities include a full-service spa, a heated outdoor pool, and the only in-hotel flight simulators in the United States, along with many more experiences that reflect the spirit of the Academy and the Colorado landscape. Hotel Polaris welcomes a diverse mix of leisure, business, group, and government guests, each seeking something meaningful, energizing, and distinctly Colorado.

As a conduit between the Academy and the public, Hotel Polaris offers an approachable way to engage with the values and vision that define this historic institution. Our team is proud to provide inspiring service, create moving moments, and uphold the promise to always look forward. At Hotel Polaris, our passions are our compass.

Name: IntercityHotel Bawshar Muscat

All guest rooms are thoughtfully equipped with amenities, including a desk, safety deposit box, flat screen smart TV with international satellite channels, coffee and tea facilities and a private bathroom with walk-in shower. Hotel offers excellent venue for your events featuring 5 meeting rooms with natural daylight, podiums, the latest conference facilities and two spacious outdoor terraces.  Whether it's a corporate meeting, cocktail reception or an event for up to 87 delegates in theatre style or 160 delegates in a cocktail reception, our facilities cater to your diverse needs.
Explore a range of dining options at our hotel, offering something for every taste.  The Gourmet House - all day dining restaurant serving international and Omani Cuisine. Name: The Municipal Hotel & Spa Liverpool - MGallery
Description:
The Municipal Hotel & Spa Liverpool – MGallery is now open on Dale Street in the heart of the city. 

Originally built in 1868 for Liverpool City Council, the building’s unique design was inspired by both French and Italian architecture, with its exterior façade featuring 18 sandstone figures representing the arts, sciences and industries of Liverpool and an iconic clock tower.

Now the UK’s only MGallery hotel, the building has been transformed and now features 179 opulent bedrooms and three unique dining and drinking areas. The hotel also offers six state of the art boardrooms and Weightman Suite provides a private dining option for up to 60 guests.

The jewel is the stunning Palm Court which sees the original council building atrium transformed into a beautiful bar perfect for those informal coffee catch ups or an alternative to working from the office or home.

Also available is the beautiful Botanic Afternoon Tea room, serving delicious afternoon tea daily and a luxury spa with 16m swimming pool, sauna, steam room and laconium.

Name: Severin
Description:
Severin er et moderne kursus- og konferencecenter i Middelfart på Fyn. Vi hjælper dig med at afholde møder, kurser og konferencer, og vi gør det med øje for leg, læring og kreativitet - og ikke mindst suveræne faciliteter. Vores fineste opgave er at sende gæster glade ud ad døren med en følelse at, at de har haft en god og autentisk oplevelse, at de har nydt vores skønne mad, gode atmosfære og inspirerende miljø, og særligt, at de har mærket den severinske ånd, som vi altid vil holde fast i.
 
Vi går på arbejde med hjerte, smil og involvering - og med ansvar for omverden. Severin støtter lokalsamfundet og hjælper borgere i arbejde som virksomhedscenter i Middelfart.
 
Du finder os på en bakketop 150 meter fra vandet med skoven som nabo. Hos os kan du læne dig tilbage, nyde panoramaudsigten over Lillebælt og de 2 broer og overlade resten af dit ophold til vores servicemindede Severinere.
 
5 hurtige om Severin:

- Nr. 1 på TripAdvisor i Middelfart målt på service
 
- 4-stjernede kursusfaciliteter midt i Danmark med smukke omgivelser
 
- Green Key-certificeret og Økologisk Spisemærke - 30-60% økologi
 
- Central beliggenhed i Middelfart på Fyn - kun 100 meter fra motorvejsafkørsel 58
 
- Mødefaciliteter til 5 - 300 personer, 107 værelser og 4 restauranter
 
Når du besøger Severin, vil du blive mødt af en stab af ildsjæle med en uhøjtidelig, venlig og professionel stil, som alle sætter en ære i at give dig gode oplevelser under dit ophold. 
 
Vi arbejder hver dag på at yde den bedste service og på at det gode værtskab. Derfor gør vi os umage for at være gode kollegaer og hjælpe hinanden med at finde det gode frem hver dag. Det gavner os selv, vores kollegaer og dig. Men det handler om mere end det. Vi bærer et ansvar, og vi skal værne om vores omgivelser. Derfor arbejder vi konstant på at tage mest muligt miljøhensyn. 
 
Vil du også holdes opdateret på nyheder, tilbud og arrangementer? 
Tilmeld dig nyhedsbrevet: severinkursuscenter.dk/tilmeld-nyhedsbrev

Discreetly situated just off Ennis Town centre, a short walk through the warm glow of the Victorian lamps in the cobblestoned courtyard leads our guests to the heart of the historical and vibrant town of Ennis. Temple Gate Hotel is the perfect location to explore the Wild Atlantic Way and the rugged West Coast of Ireland including The Cliffs of Moher.
 
The Hotel rests on the site of a 19th century Convent of Mercy with a fascinating and eventful history. 
 
We look forward to welcoming you to the Shannon Springs Hotel in the near future!

See www.templegatehotel.com for further details.

Description:

Många gäster kommer hit för läget, för att bo med horisonten och hämta energi i Sveriges enda Thalassospa. Andra kommer för vår nya bistro som bjuder in till gemenskap och serverar kärlekskryddad mat tillagad med lokala råvaror, de härliga strandpromenaderna eller för att träna sig trött i vår träningsanläggning. De flesta kommer för den unika helhetsupplevelsen. Kom närmare havet med dina kära, arbetskamrater eller dina tankar. 

Varbergs Kusthotell erbjuder:
-	Möten och konferenser
-	Affärslogi
-	Privat vistelse
-	Spavistelse och behandlingar

Varbergs Kusthotell ingår i den Danska hotellkoncernen Comwell Hotels som är en av Danmarks starkaste varumärken inom konferens. Förutom Varbergs Kusthotell och Aspenäs Herrgård i Sverige har vi hela 16 systerhotell i Danmark.

Name: Hotel Sofitel La Reserva Cardales
Description:
Sofitel La Reserva Cardales es un resort natural ubicado a solo 40 min. de Buenos Aires, rodeado de lagunas, vegetación y un entorno que invita a desconectar sin alejarse de la ciudad. Nuestro propósito es crear estadías memorables integrando confort, diseño contemporáneo y una atención dedicada en cada momento.
El hotel cuenta con más de 150 habitaciones con vistas a la naturaleza. Su arquitectura prioriza la amplitud, la luz natural y la conexión con el entorno, generando una atmósfera que equilibra lo moderno con lo natural. Cada ambiente está diseñado para ofrecer comodidad y funcionalidad, tanto para huéspedes de ocio como para quienes viajan por trabajo o eventos.
La propuesta gastronómica combina técnicas internacionales con productos regionales, utilizando ingredientes frescos y estacionales. Nuestros restaurantes, bares y terrazas se integran al paisaje y ofrecen experiencias culinarias ideales para familias, parejas, grupos o eventos corporativos.
Contamos con spa, piscina in/out, piscina exterior, gimnasio, canchas, jardines, solariums y actividades al aire libre. Para familias, ofrecemos Kid’s Club y propuestas recreativas para todas las edades. Para quienes buscan bienestar, disponemos de espacios diseñados para promover calma, descanso y equilibrio.
Sofitel La Reserva Cardales es también un referente MICE, con centro de convenciones, salones versátiles, áreas al aire libre y equipamiento técnico para reuniones, conferencias y eventos de distintas escalas. La infraestructura, la ubicación estratégica y el servicio personalizado permiten recibir desde encuentros íntimos hasta grandes convenciones.
Como parte de Sofitel, seguimos estándares internacionales de calidad, seguridad y hospitalidad. Además, formamos parte del programa ALL – Accor Live Limitless, que brinda beneficios exclusivos a viajeros frecuentes.
Nuestra misión es crear experiencias cálidas, profesionales y en armonía con el entorno.
Location: Buenos Aires, Autonomous City of Buenos Aires

Name: Andaz Tokyo Toranomon Hills - A concept by Hyatt
Description:
ハイアットが手掛ける革新的なラグジュアリー ブティック ホテルが日本初上陸！
アジアヘッドクォーター特区に指定されている東京都港区虎ノ門の超高層複合ビル「虎ノ門ヒルズ」内に、日本初のラグジュアリー ブティック ホテル「アンダーズ東京（Andaz Tokyo）」が2014年6月に開業しました。
アンダーズのブランドコンセプトは、各都市の文化や個性を反映させた特徴あるデザインと居心地の良い空間、お客様のスタイルに合わせた“柔軟かつフレンドリー”なサービス、創造性を刺激する活気に満ちた社交スペース、固定観念にとらわれず自由な発想を持ち、好奇心旺盛で、自分のライフスタイルを確立している高感度な人々をターゲットに、現在ニューヨークやロンドン、上海などの世界の主要都市とリゾート地で展開しているホテルブランドです。
ホテル本体は47階から52階までの高層6フロアを占めます。47階〜50階に機能性と快適性を追求した164の客室、51階にはご宿泊のお客様が寛いでチェックインできる「アンダーズ ラウンジ」とオールデイダイニングを揃えるほか、最上階52階には、日本の高層ホテルとしては初めてのオープンエアスペース付きペントハウス バー、アウトドア テラスのあるイベント スペース「ルーフトップ スタジオ」、独立型チャペルの3施設を設けます。また世界各地のアンダーズ同様、様々な分野で才能を発揮する地元のクリエイターやオピニオンリーダーを招聘し、ライブパフォーマンスやコンサート、展覧会や講演会など、ホテルゲストや地域コミュニティの創造性と独創性を刺激するソーシャルイベント「アンダーズ サロン」を定期的に開催いたします。

Description:
Located right on the beach, in the heart of the Costa Brava, Camping L’Àmfora offers a privileged natural setting with open views and a refreshing sea breeze, perfect for those seeking comfort and tranquility.

During the low season, it becomes an ideal environment for retreats, team building, training sessions or workshops that deserve an authentic natural backdrop. A space of calm, comfort and connection for personal development professionals, retreat organizers, corporate teams, artists, athletes, and more.

L’Àmfora is a family-run campsite that continues to evolve, combining warm hospitality with innovation, sustainability and first-class services. Our accommodations (bungalows, mobile homes, apartments) are designed for a relaxing stay, surrounded by nature.

Since 1986, we have been committed to conscious tourism. With a strong environmental focus, we promote responsible travel where every experience has meaning. As a family business, we pay attention to every detail and are proud to have been recognized with awards such as the DCC Europa-Preis (the only Spanish campsite awarded in 2025) for quality and sustainability, as well as the ACSI Awards for our facilities and services.

None of this would be possible without our consolidated and highly committed team. Many of them have been with us for years, know every corner of the campsite, and embody the values of closeness, innovation and respect for the environment that define us.

We warmly welcome all those who wish to create, learn, share… or simply pause.

Name: hotel-ami.com
Description:
Gastgebersuche im Hotelführer hotel-ami.com für Deutschland, Europa & weltweit

Mit mittlerweile ca. 500.000 gelisteten Gastgebern ist hotel-ami.com eine der weltweit größten Hotelvermittler. Dank feinster Filterkriterien, sorgfältiger & minutenschneller Datenpflege sowie der ausführlichen Darstellung der Gastgeber finden potentielle Gäste schnell und einfach ihr individuelles Wunschhotel.

Im Unterschied zu anderen Online-Hotelportalen erhebt hotel-ami keine Provisionen von den Hotels oder den Gästen, sondern lediglich einen fairen Jahresbetrag von den Gastgebern.

Hotelgäste zahlen direkt beim Gastgeber
Die Buchungssoftware booking-ami.com
Schluss mit Provisionen an externe Buchungsplattformen

Die Buchungsmaschine booking-ami.com von hotel-ami führt potentielle Hotelgäste direkt auf das Buchungssystem des Gastgebers. Sie wurde so entwickelt, dass sie sich in die Gastgeber-Website integriert. booking-ami.com  läuft auf jedem Endgerät oder Betriebssystem und ist in der Basis-Funktion kostenlos.

Allen Gastgebern, die über kein eigenes Buchungssystem verfügen, stellt hotel-ami ein kostenfreies System zur Verfügung. Darin eingeschlossen ist ein Reservierungsformular über eine sichere SSL-verschlüsselte Verbindung. 

Die Vorteile der booking-ami.com Buchungsmaschine:

√ keine Einrichtungsgebühr
√ keine Buchungsprovision
√ keine versteckten Kosten
√ keine Software-Installation auf dem eigenen PC

Ein Paket, das Ihren Bedürfnissen entspricht 
Für eine einmalige Jahresgebühr im Gegenwert einer Kleinanzeige erstellt hotel-ami auf seiner Seite eine aussagekräftige Web-Präsentation des jeweiligen Gastgebers zusätzlich mit

√ Bildern zum Hotel & allen Zimmern 
√ allen Serviceleistungen des Hauses
√ kostenlosem Anruf zum Gastgeber

Hier fanden Generationen ein Zuhause und für Reisende auf dem Weg nach Norden oder Süden war Stafler’s Gut einst als Poststation und seit 270 Jahren als Unterkunft stets ein weltoffener und gastfreundlicher Ort. Heute erwarten Sie in Stafler’s Gut das 4*-Romantik Hotel samt gepflegtem Park, Restaurants mit 4 Hauben und 2 Sternen sowie ein großzügiger Wellnessbereich.

Name: Marriott Culiacan
Description:
BUSQUEDAS INSPIRADORAS Y COMODIDADES ELEVADAS EN CULIACÁN
Descubra la combinación perfecta de lujo y comodidad en nuestro hotel en Culiacán, México. Situado a solo 13 minutos del Aeropuerto Internacional y en el centro del nuevo distrito comercial de la ciudad, a pocos minutos de universidades y hospitales, los huéspedes encontrarán un refugio tranquilo en el corazón de ciudad. Para actividades activas y descubrimientos locales, disfrute de una ronda de golf en el cercano Country Club, dé un paseo por el Jardín Botánico, descubra nuevas modas y saboree los sabores locales en el Centro Comercial La Ceiba, o pase el día en las pintorescas playas de Altata. sólo una hora de distancia. Durante su estadía, cene con estilo en el restaurante Huyama, que sirve platos de inspiración local de la región de Sinaloa. Al final del día, nuestras habitaciones están cuidadosamente diseñadas con ropa de cama de lujo y artículos de tocador convenientes para garantizar una noche de sueño reparador. Ya sea que esté aquí por negocios o para explorar, nuestros servicios intuitivos y citas bien pensadas harán que su estadía sea realmente inspiradora y acogedora.

El trato familiar de nuestro personal junto con la dedicación por el detalle y una excelente relación calidad – precio es lo que nos caracteriza y nos diferencia.

Porque sabemos que la diferencia entre lo bueno y lo excelente es siempre un poco más de esfuerzo.

Name: Hotel Kuretakeso Kemang
Description:
Wake up to a magical day and enjoy all that Jakarta offers with a stay at Hotel Kuretakeso Kemang.
The facilities and services provided by Hotel Kuretakeso Kemang ensure a pleasant stay for guests. Post your pictures and answer your emails whenever you want, with the hotel's free Wi-Fi internet access. The hotel provides taxi services to help you find what you want in Jakarta. Parking is available and free, provided by the hotel for guests with their own transportation.
While lodging at this wonderful hotel, the helpful staff at the front desk can assist you with multiple services that include luggage storage and safety deposit boxes. The hotel's on-site laundry service helps you keep your favorite travel outfits clean so you can pack less. In-room conveniences include room service and daily housekeeping, so you can relax and enjoy your stay. Smoking is restricted to the designated smoking areas.
Experience high-quality room facilities during your stay at Hotel Kuretakeso Kemang. The hotel provides linen service and air conditioning in some rooms for the benefit of guests. Keep your entertainment options wide, even in your room, with a range of facilities, including cable TV available in select rooms. The hotel also provides guests with bottled water, a coffee or tea maker, instant coffee, instant tea and mini bar in some rooms.
Knowing that bathroom amenities play an important role in increasing guests' satisfaction, the hotel provides a hair dryer, toiletries, bathrobes and towels in some select rooms.

Name: Bornholm Hotels
Description:
Bornholm Hotels is a hotel community of Rønnes three biggest hotels: Green Solution House (Hotel GSH), Fredensborg Badehotel and Griffen Spahotel.
Hotel GSH, Fredensborg Badehotel and Griffen Spahotel are all owned by C.E. Mogensens Fond. Among other things, the foundation aims to develop the three hotels to create jobs and the development of the whole of Bornholm. The foundation thus reinvests all profits in the hotels in order to constantly create even more sustainable development for the benefit of both guests and the Bornholm community.
Bornholm Hotels create a world, where social, economic, and environmental development go hand in hand. We work with the UN’s 17 world goals. 5 of them are a priority. We are well conscious of the effect of what we are doing, and want to change the world into a sustainable direction.
With Green Solution House as flagship, we seek to explore circular sustainability. Hotel GSH is constantly striving to develop its green solutions. Products and initiatives are tested, tested and retested to find the optimal solution. Experiences from the operation of Hotel GSH are implemented to the greatest possible extent at the sister hotels, so that all three hotels are constantly developing their sustainability.

Name: Mamaya Resort and Spa
Description:
Nestled amidst a sprawling 14-acre mango orchard, Mamaya Resort & Spa - By Four Leaf Hotels beckons travellers seeking an idyllic escape. This contemporary haven, a masterpiece of architectural finesse, offers a unique blend of rustic charm and sophisticated luxury. Immerse yourself in a world of vibrant hues, where rows of emerald green mangoes mingle with a kaleidoscope of 30 diverse fruit varieties and 40 distinct vegetables, all cultivated with meticulous care.

At Mamaya, every detail is meticulously curated to ensure an unforgettable stay. The resort boasts 50 elegantly appointed rooms, each a haven of tranquillity. Indulge in culinary delights at our exquisite multi-cuisine restaurant, where farm-to-plate experiences take centre stage. Savor the freshest organic produce, transformed into delectable dishes that tantalize the taste buds. From the moment you arrive, superior service awaits, with our dedicated staff anticipating your every need.

Name: Heritage Boutique Hotel
Description:
Nestled in the cliffs of Uluwatu, Heritage Boutique Hotel offers a serene retreat where Balinese culture, refined design, and meaningful guest experiences come together. We are more than a hotel. We are a living story of heritage and hospitality, designed to nourish the senses and the soul.

With 20 carefully crafted suites, Heritage Boutique Hotel combines timeless elegance with modern comfort. Guests are invited to connect with Balinese culture and experience sincere, personal hospitality throughout every moment of their stay.

At Mr. Gusti, our fine dining restaurant and rooftop bar, we serve culinary storytelling on every plate. Inspired by Indonesian flavors and reimagined with global finesse. From sunrise breakfasts to golden hour cocktails, taste and atmosphere blend seamlessly.

At Ms. Bu Yogastudio, guests and locals find balance through daily yoga classes, mindful movement, and holistic rituals. All set against the lush natural beauty of Uluwatu.

During the day, our pool and pool bar offer an elevated yet relaxed setting where wellness meets indulgence and every drink tells a story.

What makes Heritage unique is our commitment to meaningful luxury. From curated art and cultural references to intuitive service and sustainability, we believe in small moments that leave a lasting impression for our guests and our community. Our professional team brings warmth, expertise, and passion to every detail, ensuring an experience that feels both effortless and unforgettable. We look forward to welcoming you at Heritage Boutique Hotel.

Name: Minaro Hotel Tokaj - MGallery Collection
Description:
Adult only 5 star Minaro Hotel Tokaj by MGallery is set among the vineyards in the UNESCO World Heritage region of Tokaj. Design is inspired by the former mine setting, while subtle touches reflect the history. The World Heritage Wine Museum and local wine tasting tours are within easy reach, ideal ways to spend time in the region. We are an hour drive from Debrecen International Airport, while Budapest Airport is 2.5 hours away. The hotel also boasts convenient rail connections with Budapest.

Our expansive spa facilities include a heated indoor adventure swimming pool, outdoor adventure pool, jacuzzi and wellness relaxation areas. Our salt chamber, sauna, treatment rooms and L´Occitane treatments make tranquility easy to find. Guests can dine at the elegant Tortuga Restaurant or visit Viracocha Bar for world-class mixology. For healthy treats, our Margarita bar is a perfect oasis of relaxation. Our Eldorado meeting rooms let business travelers stay in the loop during a stay.

The 5* Minaro located in Tokaj which is a world heritage site, inspired by the late andezit mine. The design of the Hotel origin from the milieu of the mine while the gentle details come from another culture. Let's explore the hidden treasures of Tokaj!

,,Lets create new memories together at our resort, the hidden gem in Tokaj vineyards where the nature´s touch, human attentiveness, everlasting entertainment, culinary art and relaxation lead to the stories that stay with you."

Dana Janigova, Hotel Manager

Name: Bygagergaard
Description:
Bygagergaard er etableret på et helhjertet og visionært livsstils- og oplevelseskoncept med fokus på bæredygtighed. 

Bygagerggard tilbyder naturnær overnatning, retreats og firmaevents på en firlænget bondegård fra 1861 med udsigt over markerne mod Fanefjord kirke. På naturhotellet finde café med fokus på økologi og lokale varer samt desuden sauna, udebade og store fælles arealer med fokus på regenerative grønne arealer og køkkenhave. Gæster kan bruge alle områder og hvile mellem sommerfugle, bier og plukke mad i køkkenhaven som tilberedes i stedets køkkener. Vi støtter vores gæster i naturoplevelser og fællesskabsoplevelser med fokus på inde og ydre bæredygtighed med afsæt i regenerative tanker. 

Vi tiltrækker naturelskere og bæredygtighedsinteresserede, som ønsker en oplevelse af at være tæt på naturen med adgang til moderne faciliteter som køkken, bad, sauna og tilbuddet om god nærende mad i caféen - dette både private og virksomheder. 

Vi har gæster fra hele verden med en hovedpart Danmark, Tyskland og Holland. Cykelruten Berlin-København går lige forbi ligesom vandreruten Camønoen.

Description:
Terreno Barrio Hotel: el hotel del futuro llega a El Terreno
 
Terreno Barrio Hotel nace con la ambición de ser el hotel del futuro: un lugar donde la cultura, el diseño, la arquitectura y la sostenibilidad no son solo un discurso, sino la base de todo lo que hacemos.
 
Ubicado en Avenida Joan Miró, 73, abriremos en primavera 2026 con dos edificios únicos:

· Edificio histórico protegido: 21 habitaciones conceptuales y de diseño, con terrado, bar y nuestro restaurante DESTAPE, un espacio donde la gastronomía y la vida del barrio se cruzan.

· Edificio moderno: 20 habitaciones con balcón, construido bajo estándares Passivhaus y con certificación LEED Platinum. Aquí encontrarás: cafetería a pie de calle, coworking abierto al barrio, sala de reuniones, rooftop con piscina para clientes, gimnasio, spa con piscina climatizada y hammam, cine para 40 personas y parking para clientes.

Con 41 habitaciones en total, Terreno es un hotel urbano con alma de barrio, profundamente conectado con la energía creativa de El Terreno. Un espacio vivo donde viajeros y locales se cruzan, y donde cada rincón está pensado para sentirse, habitarse y compartirse.
 
Queremos construir algo más que un hotel: un lugar donde nuestro equipo forme parte del proyecto desde el primer día, donde el detalle, el oficio y la pasión por lo bien hecho sean parte de la experiencia.
 
Buscamos Terreneros: personas con actitud, curiosidad y ganas de sumarse a un proyecto que cree en el impacto positivo, el cuidado de los espacios y la experiencia humana. Porque en Terreno, no se visita solo, se vive.

Name: Four Points By Sheraton Chennai OMR
The Lobby Boy
Description:
The Lobby Boy PMS is a cloud-based Property Management System designed for hotels, hostels, and B&Bs. Built to simplify daily operations and reduce manual work, it offers a centralized solution for managing bookings, guest services, invoicing, and more — all accessible remotely and in real time.

With The Lobby Boy, properties can:

Automatically update availability and rates across multiple booking channels, keeping calendars accurate and preventing overbookings

View all new, modified, or canceled reservations instantly through a live, centralized calendar

Manage the full guest cycle — from check-in and check-out to payment tracking, room status, and reservation modifications (cancellations, extensions, etc.)

Maintain complete guest records — including contact details, stay history, and notes — to support personalized service and efficient operations

Track and bill for additional services such as food, beverages, and other extras, avoiding under- or overcharging

Generate and manage invoices, integrate payment data, and monitor outstanding balances with ease

The platform integrates with leading OTAs like Booking.com, Airbnb, Expedia, Agoda, Hostelworld, Hotelbeds, and many more.

The Lobby Boy PMS is continuously evolving through direct feedback from hospitality professionals, ensuring every feature we develop serves a real need.

Created by hospitality operators — for hospitality operators.

Name: Hotel Plaza Grande
Description:
Situado en el corazón de la ciudad, junto a la Plaza de la Independencia, el Hotel Plaza Grande te invita a adentrarte en una experiencia única. Con más de cinco siglos de historia, este emblemático hotel ha sido testigo de los momentos más importantes de Quito.

 

Desde sus inicios como la primera casa construida durante la fundación de la ciudad en el siglo XVI, el Hotel Plaza Grande ha acogido a las familias más reconocidas de la época y ha sido parte fundamental de la historia de Ecuador. A lo largo de los años, ha sido restaurado y transformado en el primer hotel de lujo de la ciudad.
Hoy en día, el Hotel Plaza Grande es un verdadero tesoro arquitectónico de estilo ecléctico, que destaca en medio de las casas coloniales de Quito. Su ubicación privilegiada te brinda una vista impresionante del Palacio Presidencial de Carondelet, la majestuosa Catedral, las cúpulas de antiguas iglesias, el icónico Panecillo y el imponente Palacio Municipal.

 

Cuando cruzas las puertas del Hotel Plaza Grande, te sumerges en un mundo de elegancia y sofisticación. Sus 15 habitaciones están meticulosamente decoradas con exquisitos detalles, brindándote una experiencia de alojamiento sin igual. Además, podrás deleitarte con la gastronomía ecuatoriana en nuestro restaurante especializado, o bien, disfrutar de platos internacionales.

 

Si estás planeando un evento especial, nuestro Salón de Eventos es el lugar perfecto. Con capacidad para 120 personas, podrás celebrar desde bodas y eventos sociales hasta almuerzos y reuniones empresariales, rodeado de la atmósfera única que ofrece el Hotel Plaza Grande.

 

Ven y déjate cautivar por la historia y la belleza del Hotel Plaza Grande en Quito. Permítenos ser tu anfitrión mientras exploras los encantos de esta fascinante ciudad. Tu estancia en nuestro hotel será inolvidable, llena de lujo, comodidad y una atención excepcional. Te esperamos con los brazos abiertos!

Description:
Since its opening in 1964, through the expansion in 1978. year, until a thorough renovation and redesign in 2021, Hotel Turist became and remained an unavoidable part of life in Varaždin. 
It created the most beautiful memories of generations of locals, but also visitors and members of the hotel team. Although the hotel has changed its color palette and decoration over the years, one thing has remained the same – Hotel Turist is still a popular meeting place for people from Varaždin, a place where locals and visitors negotiate business or relax in the company of loved ones, while enjoying delicious food and drinks. The professional hotel staff continues to nurture the well-known hospitality of Varaždin and is at your service at all times.

Name: Best Western Nairobi Upper Hill
Description: Located in the serene business district of Upper Hill,The Best Western Nairobi Upper Hill offers convenient access to the two main airports as well as the central business district.Take advantage of the view from the terrace garden and complimentary Wi-Fi

Name: Central Apartment Group
Description:
Central Apartment Group is a subsidiary organisation of Prime Group Australasia. All the associated companies in the group strive to create 4.5 star quality and service with an experience that meets the needs of discerning business and leisure travellers.
 
Central Apartment Group operates apartment hotels in Caloundra, Toowoomba, Cairns, Townsville, Gladstone, Brisbane, Emerald, Melbourne, Newcastle and Perth.

 Central to the group's aim is exceptional quality, service and affordability which lead to the ideal of "Relaxing in Affordable Luxury".
 
This is our commitment to guests and clients who stay at our apartment hotels for business and leisure. This ability ensures satisfied customers and repeat business.

We look forward to welcoming you to our apartment hotels.

Name: Hotel Aahøj
Description:
Hotel Aahøj, datidens velkendte hotelpension, i Sæby indbyder til hjemlig hygge i uformelle luksuriøse rammer. Hotellet er placeret i en skøn diskret oase omgivet af grøn frodighed ved Sæby Å med blot få minutters gang til centrum, god badestrand, havnemiljø og Sæbygård Skov.

Hotellets 10 værelser er velindrettet og giver et lyst og let indtryk. Her findes store dobbeltværelser med altaner, rummelige familieværelser med opredninger samt almindelige dobbeltværelser.

Vinterhaven og terrasserne er stedet for samling med dine nærmeste, hvad enten det er til lyden af den knitrende pejs med et godt glas vin i hånden eller en skøn kop kaffe – i et afslappende øjeblik – med udsigt udover hotellets prydhave.

På Hotel Aahøj serveres hver dag morgenmad for de overnattende gæster. Køkkenet er baseret på de bedst tilgængelige råvarer og produkter, med fokus på leverancer fra lokale avlere, mejerier og producenter. Hver morgen byder således på det bedste fra de lokale og selvfølgelig tilpasset sæsonens fineste – med vægt på kvalitet og små overraskelser.

Hotel Aahøj tilbyder nye møde- og konferencefaciliteter, heraf lokaler til henholdsvis 12 og 40 personer. Lokalerne er indrettet lyst og moderne, men samtidig med fokus på at bevare Aahøjs karakteristiske sjæl og charme. Lokalerne indeholder alt i AV-udstyr samt højhastigheds-internet.

Vi glæder os til at byde dig velkommen!

Name: The Brown Hotel
Description:
Acerca de The Brown:
Bienvenido a The Brown, una joya arquitectónica en el corazón de Guatapé, Antioquia. Inaugurado en 2023, nuestro hotel redefine el estándar del lujo en Colombia, ofreciendo una experiencia donde la sofisticación se encuentra con la serenidad.

Nuestras Habitaciones:
Disponemos de 116 habitaciones distribuidas en cuatro torres, todas con impresionantes vistas al embalse de Guatapé. Contamos con cinco tipologías diferentes, diseñadas para satisfacer las necesidades y preferencias de todos nuestros huéspedes.

Instalaciones y Servicios

Restaurantes: 
Disfruta de una experiencia culinaria inigualable en nuestro restaurante principal Pismo y el exclusivo restaurante de playa Praia con playa privada.

Zona Húmeda: 
Relájate en nuestra zona húmeda con piscina y áreas de descanso.

Club de Playa: 
Vive momentos únicos en nuestro club de playa.

Gimnasio: 
Mantén tu rutina de ejercicios en nuestro gimnasio completamente equipado.

Centro de Eventos y Convenciones: 
Perfecto para reuniones de negocios y eventos especiales, con 700 m² y capacidad para 340 personas.

Sala de Reuniones / Prensa: 
Espacio versátil de 200 m² con capacidad para 80 personas.

Jardín Botánico: 
Un impresionante espacio de 1,000 m², ideal para eventos al aire libre, con capacidad para 480 personas.

Rooftop y La Cava: 
Próximamente inauguraremos nuestro rooftop Tomori y La Cava, elevando aún más el nivel de lujo y exclusividad.

Experiencia Única: En The Brown, no simplemente te alojas; te sumerges en una atmósfera de elegancia y comodidad. Cada rincón del hotel está meticulosamente diseñado para proporcionar una experiencia que combina la belleza natural de Guatapé con el lujo contemporáneo.

Name: Embassy Suites by Hilton Tampa Downtown Convention Center
Description: The beautifully appointed Embassy Suites by Hilton Tampa Downtown Convention Center, located steps from the Tampa Riverwalk and Amalie Arena, is directly connected to the Tampa Convention Center via skybridge. Featuring complimentary made-to-order breakfast and Evening Reception, the renovated all-suite hotel includes a refreshing outdoor pool with views of Tampa Bay, TASTE Restaurant & Bar and upscale meeting & event space.

Name: Chateau on the Park - Christchurch, a DoubleTree by Hilton
Description:
Chateau on the Park Christchurch, a DoubleTree by Hilton is back, with a refreshed interior that complements the historical setting it is renowned for.
Designed to provide a tranquil escape just 2.9km away from the city, our 5-acre property boasts a moat, vineyard, and a beautiful rose garden for Guests to enjoy.

Our 192 spacious rooms and suites provide contemporary interiors with high-end and sustainable amenities.

Our seven dedicated event spaces and business kiosk are perfectly situated for all your business needs.

Explore our 5 acres of gardens, a full fitness center, heated swimming pool, restaurant, and bar, all come with our warm cookie welcome ethos.

Enjoy your next getaway in the garden city at Chateau on the Park – Christchurch, a DoubleTree by Hilton.

Name: Hotel Passage Brno
Description:
Hotel Passage je novým hotelem s velkým kongresovým zázemím v centru města Brna. Disponuje dostatečnou kapacitou parkovacích míst ve vlastních hotelových garážích a nachází se pouze 100 metrů od zastávky MHD. Nabízí ubytování ve 4* standardu, restauraci s denním barem a kongresové zázemí s kapacitou až 1 000 osob.

Těšíme se na Vaši návštěvu v hotelu Passage!


Hotel Passage is a new hotel with large conference rooms in the city centre of Brno. The hotel offers private parking in its own hotel garage and is located just 100 meters away from a tram station. It offers a 4* accommodation, restaurant, bar and conference rooms with the capacity for up to 1 000 people.

We are looking forward to welcoming you at Hotel Passage!

• High speed internet

Name: Goa Villagio Candolim Resort
Description:
Experience Goa Villagio Resort and Spa Retreat
Beach Resort in Goa, enclosed amongst the palms and paddy fields where the waves of the sea mingle with the charming magic of local culture induced by the coastal breeze.
