Name: E-Memorybook
Description:
MUTLU MİSAFİR GERİ DÖNÜŞLERİNİZİN ARTIŞINA İNANAMAYACAKSINIZ!
* Misafirlerinizin zaman geçirdikleri wifi ve enerji erişimi olan tüm kapalı alanlarda kullanabilirsiniz.
* Unutmayalım! mutsuz misafir her yerde mutlu misafir hiç bir yerde bahseder.
* Hediye tatil ve teknolojik çekiciliği, kolay kullanım ve yönlendirmesi, eğlenceli arayüzü ve fotoshot etkinliği ile ilgi alanı olarak mutlu misafirlerin çekim alanı olacak.
* 4 farklı derecelendirme sitesi ile entegre çalışan sistem tüm sitelerden yorum yapma şansı ve teşviki sağlar.
* Yorum yapan tüm misafirler alacakları kod ile diledikleri zaman paylaşımlarına ulaşabilir.
* Her paylaşımın her yıldönümünde hatırlatma notları ile sadık misafir oranlarınızı sürekli arttırır.
* Tatil ikramiye çekilişleri sadece tam puan verenler arasında yapılacağı gibi sistemin bu hissiyatı sağladığı için düşük puan olasılıkları sürekli  düşüş gösterecektir.
* Doğru noktalarda konumlandırma ve doğru yönlendirmeler ile alınacak hızlı ve pozitif sonuçlara çok şaşıracaksınız.
* Aylık raporlamalar ile tüm sitelerin ve genel oranların en basit ve anlaşılır grafikleri ile doğru noktalara odaklanma ve çözüm hedefleme yapar.

Name: Villa Breen
Description:
På Villa Breen får dere et helt hotell for dere selv! Moderne møterom, hotellrom med splitter nye bad – kombinert med masse sjel og personlighet og en spennende historie. Sentralt og lett tilgjengelig bare 45 minutter fra Grünerløkka og 25 fra Gardermoen.

Villa Breen ligger fredelig til i et vakkert bølgende landskap. En stor hage til avslapning, flotte turmuligheter rett utenfor døra, og masse muligheter for opplevelser i nærområdet. Velkommen til oss!

Name: Novotel Auckland Ellerslie
Description:
Avoid the hustle and bustle of the city at Novotel Auckland Ellerslie, while only a 10minute drive or rail journey to Auckland's CBD with a popular restaurant and garden bar and conference facilities for up to 360 people. 

Novotel Auckland Ellerslie is the perfect choice for events, weddings and a haven for travellers on business as much for those wanting a family break with spacious rooms, and complimentary accommodation and breakfast for up to two children under 16 sharing existing parents rooms. 

Like our page to learn about events in the area, tips for travellers and to learn more about our team which strive to provide the best guest experience

Name: The Zabeer Dhaka
Description: The Zabeer Dhaka is a Luxurious Business hotel conveniently located within a minute's drive from The Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport in Dhaka, Bangladesh. We have 42 Luxurious guest rooms including 7 suite rooms, two world-class restaurants, a Gymnasium, Spa, Bar, and many other best-in-class amenities. We also have a Lobby café lounge-Café 24 serving Gourmet Teas, Starbucks coffees, juice, ice cream, pastries, and delicious snacks. All-day dining restaurant Taste of Heaven serves multi-cuisine food. Indulge in the luxury and comfort that define The Zabeer Dhaka. Our dedicated team is committed to making your stay both memorable and fulfilling. From the moment you arrive, you will experience exceptional service tailored to meet your every need. Relax in our beautifully appointed rooms, some offering stunning views of the airport, enjoy exquisite cuisine at our restaurants, rejuvenate at our spa, or maintain your fitness routine in our gym.  We pride ourselves on seamlessly blending business efficiency with luxurious comfort, ensuring you have everything you need for a productive and relaxing visit.

Name: AA Nature Hotels & Resorts
Description: AA nature is established by a group of leaders in hospitality space best known for their taste and perfection assuring you to manage your holidays by providing clean, comfortable and value for money accommodations.

Name: MODE - Eco Mood Hotel
Description:
Mode Hotel sarà il primo hotel veramente green di Rimini, non green washing ma GREEN fin dal processo di costruzione. L’intera filiera dei fornitori, sia durante la realizzazione che post costruzione, sarà selezionata sulla base di criteri fondanti in primo luogo sulla sostenibilità ambientale, il risparmio energetico e l’uso di energia pulita, l’utilizzo di materiali naturali e di riciclo, contro gli sprechi e l’inquinamento.
Mode Hotel si posizionerà come un hub di sperimentazione sui temi della sostenibilità sia per i progettisti che per le aziende coinvolte.

Name: Hotel Caledonian
Description: Somos una cadena de establecimientos de 3** con ubicación en Barcelona, una de las ciudades más importantes en España. Nuestras instalaciones cubren todas las necesidades de cualquiera de nuestros huéspedes. Espacios de cuidado interiorismo y mimada decoración, donde vanguardismo y tradición se funden para dar lugar a establecimientos cálidos y acogedores. En ellos, nuestros huéspedes sienten el confort del propio hogar, sin renunciar a las ventajas y comodidades de las más modernas instalaciones y los equipamientos tecnológicos de última generación.

Name: The Chifley, an All-Suite Luxury Hotel by Hilton
Description:
As this city of culture and growth continues to evolve, The Chifley will represent Houston at its best. We bring a confident attitude and tons of creativity to an area full of big box hotels. 

We are the outlier. We’re intriguing and different, bringing the distinctive energy of our bustling city to a sea of hotel sameness. Experience the shopping, dining, and fun that only Uptown and Galleria Districts, River Oaks, and Highland Village can offer. We also love our four-legged guests, so don’t forget to bring your furry friends with you.

Name: Hotel 4:30
Description:
Welcome to Hotel 4:30. We take immense pride in providing extraordinary experiences for discerning travelers, offering state-of-the-art facilities and top-notch hospitality in the heart of Botswana. Our vision is to redefine luxury and comfort, ensuring that every moment of your stay with us becomes an unforgettable memory.

Conveniently located in Gaborone, our hotel is a sanctuary of relaxation and refinement. Whether you're visiting for business or leisure, our dedicated team is committed to exceeding your expectations and making your stay truly exceptional.

At Hotel 4:30, we believe in the art of personalized service, tailoring each aspect of your experience to suit your unique preferences and needs. Our luxurious accommodations, gourmet dining options, and world-class amenities are designed to create a seamless and indulgent stay.
Join us at Hotel 4:30 and immerse yourself in a world of unparalleled luxury and warm hospitality. Discover the true essence of refined living, where every detail is crafted to perfection. Your journey of extraordinary experiences awaits.

Name: Kigali Paramount Hotel
Description: Indulge in the elegance and comfort of our luxury hotel, where every detail is designed for your ultimate relaxation. Discover a sanctuary that combines sophistication with world-class amenities.

Name: Quality Hotel Richard With
Description:
Vesterålens største hotell på Stokmarknes. Hotellet ligger perfekt til i sjøkanten i Stokmarknes sentrum, og åpnet i mai 2023!
Bygget har to fløyer som er knyttet sammen på bakkeplan. Vi skal ha 154 rom, kurs- og konferanse fasiliteter, treningsrom, restaurant og bar. Hos oss er alle velkommen, både fra fjern og nær.

Name: Donoma Las Terrenas, Autograph Collection
Description: Donoma Las Terrenas Beach Resort & Spa es un refugio exclusivo frente a Playa Las Ballenas, donde el lujo se expresa en la atención personalizada, el diseño elegante y la armonía con el entorno. Con villas y suites de alto nivel, gastronomía gourmet, spa y experiencias únicas, ofrece un ambiente ideal para el descanso, el bienestar y la celebración de eventos memorables.

Name: Strand Hotell Borgholm
Description:
Strand är ett av de mest populära hotellen på Öland och är också en av sydöstra Sveriges ledande konferensanläggningar.

Här jobbar vi aktivt för att er konferens ska bli lyckad på alla sätt! Allt från det mindre mötet till storslagna jubileumsfestligheter.

Sommartid har vi vår omtyckta restaurang Dockside öppen, som ligger utmed hamnen. Vi har en gästhamn med hamnservice för 150st båtar och en sjömack.

Name: Camp Sambhar
Description:
Camp Sambhar is a prime camping destination at Sambhar Salt Lake, one of the most pristine locations situated in the suburban town of Rajasthan around 80 km from Jaipur. We were established in 2020, with the intent to provide the most memorable camping experience by the lakeside. 

Impeccable meals with a view of Sambhar Salt Lake will make your visit magical. The edgy infrastructure is surely an addition to one of our stand-outs. It is surely going to be pinned in your memory lane for its delicate meals combined with a never seen view. The multifacetedness of this resort would prompt many more visits.

Name: Aparthotel Vučko, Jahorina | Pale
Description:
Aparthotel "Vucko" continued the tradition of exclusive hotel built for the Olympic Games in Sarajevo "Winter '84."

"Vucko" is named after the official mascot of the XIV Winter Olympic Games, it was designed to accommodate VIP guests, and among the first guests "Vucko" were the Swedish King Gustav, Juan Antonio Samaranch and other officials XIV ZOI.

Continuing this tradition, Aparthotel "Vucko" offers guests superb accommodation and service as well as a variety of activities for a more beautiful and pleasant holiday.The hotel is located in the center of the tourist complex just 30 meters from the ski lift.

Name: Castillete
Description: "Una Isla, Dos Lugares! Tu Hotel en Cartagena, tenemos dos opciones para ti: Nuestras cabañas rodeadas de naturaleza y vista al mar, o nuestra casa de playa frente al mar, ambas con un estilo auténtico y relajado del Caribe."

Description: Vliersche Veld Groepsaccommodaties is een perfecte vergaderlocatie voor zakelijke bijeenkomsten, vergaderingen, brainstormsessies, heisessies en teambuildingsactiviteiten. Name: Holiday Inn Express Jakarta Wahid Hasyim
Description:
Smart Modern Hotel In Jakarta City Center

The Smart International Hotel in Wahid Hasyim for Savvy Travelers. Welcome to Holiday Inn Express Jakarta Wahid Hasyim! It's an honorable time to serve you as our valued guest. Set in the heart of Jakarta, Holiday Inn Express Jakarta Wahid Hasyim offers you to enjoy the most comfortable place to stay in the city center of Jakarta, close to the Central Business District and the National Monument (Monas). It is near to Jakarta Golden Triangle, within minutes away to reach Grand Indonesia, Plaza Indonesia, Sarinah, Thamrin, Bundaran HI, The Djakarta Theater and popular textile market Tanah Abang. Located at Wahid Hasyim, you can easily explore Jakarta using Bus, Train, Subway Train and other common public transportation. All accommodations come with Free Wi-Fi access available throughout the hotel and a Free Express Start Breakfast or a choice of Grab & Go option for guests who are in a hurry. Each room features comfortable signature bedding with a choice of soft & firm pillows for a great night’s sleep.

Name: Rochambeau Roadside Inn
Description:
Boutique independently owned and operated 22 rooms blending vintage charm with modern amenities.

Originally built in 1954 as the Rochambeau Motel and thoughtfully renovated in 2024 by a hometown team. A limited service property offering guests a modern day basecamp for their Williamsburg and surrounding area adventures.

Name: The Nest Luxury Resort
Description:
The Nest Resort, Jaipur is an urban destination in The Pink City. Offering a soothing balance of indoor and outdoor venues, The Nest has become one of the most sought-out locations for destination weddings, corporate getaways and social celebrations.
The Nest is committed to preserving our valuable resources by creating a sustainable operation that benefits our guests, colleagues, the local community and our planet equally.
The Nest Resort has taken some serious environmentally sensitive and meaningful steps to maintain our commitment to sustainability.

Name: Richmond Suites Hotel
Description:
Richmond Suites Hotel in Bogotá offers a luxurious and sustainable stay in the heart of the capital city. With spacious rooms featuring unique amenities, exceptional customer service, and a prime location, it’s the perfect choice for both business and leisure travelers. Committed to sustainability, the hotel is equipped with solar panels on its facade and roof, making it an eco-friendly option for conscientious travelers. Discover the best of Bogotá with the comfort and convenience of Richmond Suites Hotel.

For more details, stay and visit us: richmondsuiteshotel.com

Name: Aston Canggu Beach Resort
Description: Aston Canggu Beach Resort is a modern and stylish four-star hotel nestled in the heart of Canggu, the trendiest destination in Bali. Canggu is renowned for its vibrant atmosphere, dynamic surf culture, trendy dining experiences, and a laid-back local lifestyle. Our hotel offers an enthusiastic atmosphere and breathtaking sunset views from Batu Bolong Beach

Name: LAGO HOTEL
Description: Göz alıcı tasarımları ve kullanışlı yapılarıyla estetik ve konforu bir araya getiren, farklı zevk ve ihtiyaçlara uygun olarak dizayn edilmiş odalarımızda, size evinizi aratmayacak keyifli bir tatil deneyimi sunuyoruz!

Name: The Innkeeping Co. Hotels
Description:
The Innkeeping Co.'s hotels are a distinguished collection of intimate & small luxury hotels, located in some of the India’s most evocative destinations. 

The Innkeeping Co is cared for and looked after by The Bureau of Innkeepers — a curious and devoted fellowship of hoteliers, dreamers, and custodians of charm. 
 
At the heart of every Bureau hotel is a sense of place, elevated by considered architecture and interiors that reflect the spirit of the destination. Yet, it is our people who truly define the experience. Every member of our team is carefully chosen for their individuality and warmth, and then rigorously trained to deliver a standard of service that is both intuitive, unobtrusive and exacting — marked by grace, authenticity, and genuine care. This is obsession, ritual, and romance — all in service of places that feel deeply lived in, and impossible to leave.

Name: AMALTAS THE VIEW
Description:
Amaltas The View | Luxury Hotel Apartments 

Amaltas The View redefines modern living with fully furnished luxury hotel apartments designed for comfort, style, and convenience. Nestled in a prime location, our property offers the perfect blend of home-like warmth and hotel-grade service — ideal for both short-term stays and long-term living.

Whether you’re a business traveler, an expat, or a family seeking a premium lifestyle, Amaltas The View provides:
 Spacious, elegantly furnished apartments
 Scenic views and prime city connectivity
 Flexible stay options — from short visits to extended stays
 Hotel amenities with the privacy of your own home

Discover a new way to live, stay, and experience luxury at Amaltas The View.

Name: Hotel Euro Suite Campinas
Description:
Localizado no centro comercial e financeiro da cidade de Campinas, o hotel oferece um conjunto de serviços, tais como: lanches, coffee break, buffet´s, cocktail´s, drink´s, garagem privativa, sala de repouso, sauna, bar e salões para eventos.
A satisfação de nossos clientes é fundamental para nós do Hotel Euro Suite Campinas.

Name: Feathers Hotel & Restaurant
Description:
The beautiful Feathers Hotel, with its authentic half-timbered Tudor façade, is a landmark building in the heart of the picturesque market town of Ludlow.

The Grade 1 listed property has been recently renovated and refurbished to preserve and celebrate its unique historic character and deliver a sumptuous hospitality experience for guests.

Name: Tryst Hotels
Description: Tryst Hotels are a collection of luxury boutique hotels that offer an upscale, inclusive experience for guests seeking high-end accommodations with a vibrant, social atmosphere. Founded by tech entrepreneur Tristan Schukraft, Tryst Hotels are located in some of the world’s most popular LGBT destinations, providing guests with unique experiences, exceptional service, and a commitment to community and sustainability. Each property offers a one-of-a-kind stay where you can experience your best self, even on your worst behavior.

Name: Courtyard by Marriott Sheffield
Description: Whether you are travelling for business or pleasure Courtyard by Marriott Sheffield hotel provides a great base to explore Sheffield & beyond. Just a short distance from the bustling City of Sheffield the hotel occupies a prime position on the Advanced Manufacturing Park, easily accessible from M1 Junction 33, with ample parking and EV charging points. Enjoy our proximity to Meadowhall Shopping Centre, Peak District, Magna Science Adventure Centre, Ponds Forge International Sports Centre, Utilita Arena & AESSEAL New York Stadium Rotherham. Family friendly attractions include Gulliver's Valley Theme Park & the beautiful gardens at Wentworth Woodhouse, all within easy reach. Relax in our stylish and comfortable rooms with free WIFI, smart TV, & plush bedding. For a pawfect stay for all the family some of our rooms are dog friendly too. Dine at Aspen Restaurant & Bar which offers all-day dining, a tasty Yorkshire Sunday Roast & local cuisine which can be enjoyed in the Restaurant or outdoor terrace.

Name: THE VRINDWOODS HOTEL
Description:
High Quality Accommodation Services.

This fine property is located at ‘Braj Bhoomi’ in Vrindavan place-tourist destination with the ultimate in world class service and facilities, combined with the group’s traditional reputation for genuine hospitality experience. It is characterized by long corridors and walkways, lush-green lawns , banquets and parties .

The VrindWoods Hotel, Vrindavan has 20 rooms with four variants, Deluxe, superior, executive, mini suite. The rooms are decently decorated with comforting furniture and pastel shades. The bathrooms are equipped with basic toiletries.
Bankey Bihari Temples & Iskcon Temple and other tourist places are quite nearby and transportation is easily available round the clock.
We organise corporate meetings and parties and also memorable destination weddings.

Name: Actor Hotel & Spa Center
Description:
Welcome to Hotel Actor, the newest addition to the vibrant and charming city of Skopje, North Macedonia. Our hotel boasts 50 luxurious rooms, a state-of-the-art spa, a world-class restaurant, and an awe-inspiring architectural design that will leave you breathless.

From the moment you step into our sleek and sophisticated lobby, you'll know that you've arrived at a truly exceptional destination. Each of our rooms has been thoughtfully designed to provide you with the ultimate in comfort and serenity, with plush bedding, elegant furnishings, and all of the modern amenities you need to make your stay a memorable one.

Our spa offers a range of pampering treatments and rejuvenating therapies that will leave you feeling relaxed and refreshed. And our rooftop restaurant, helmed by a team of world-class chefs, serves up savory dishes and delectable desserts that are sure to satisfy even the most discerning palate. The open-air rooftop terrace has breathtaking views of the nearby Mountain Ranges and gives a great sense of tranquility.

Royal Raj Offers Access for All
Royal Raj Hotel & Condominium understands that every customer has different needs and we aim to make our hotel facilities available and accessible to all of our guests equally. In rare instances where this is not possible we will endeavour to offer a suitable alternative.
Our hotel offer a range of facilities for guests with a perspective on disability including the following:
• Designated Blue Badge car parking
• Accessible facilities – restaurant and meeting rooms
• Accessible bathroom
• Accessible bedrooms
• Menus available in large print
• Induction loops
If requested in advance, one of the accessible guest rooms in the aforementioned hotels can be equipped with a hoist. It is important to note that the ceiling track in the bedroom is separate from that in the bathroom, so the hoist needs to be unhooked and carried through. Guests are advised to bring their own slings. For more information, please contact the hotel directly.

Name: Tanoa Hotel Group
Description:
Established over 50 years ago, Tanoa Hotel Group is a family owned and operated business trusted by travellers and locals alike. With 8 hotels across Fiji, Samoa and Tonga, every member of our team lives and breathes our Tanoa values, from our executive team to our heart of house staff.

The tanoa bowl is a Pacific symbol of coming together. This warmth and hospitality are integral to Tanoa Hotels and a hallmark of our desire to make you feel at home, with family and friends while you are away from your own.

Tanoa Hotel Group is part of Reddy Group, one of the Pacific’s most well-respected businesses.

Reddy Group began as a small construction company in Fiji in 1947. Over the years it has broadened significantly to become a highly diversified company with interests across a wide range of asset classes and sectors, with investments spanning the wider Pacific and multiple continents.

Today, Reddy Group is led by Rohit and Kamini Reddy, two of the late chairman, Mr. Yanktesh Permal Reddy (CF, OBE) children. Fondly known as YP Reddy, his legacy is embedded into the many facets of Reddy Group, Reddy Foundation and Tanoa Hotels.

Sample sustainable local fare at our popular waterfront restaurant, or pick up tasty to-go items designed to savor as you explore Baltimore. Name: Marchica Lagoon Resort
Description:
Marchica Lagoon Resort, une véritable perle nichée au cœur d'un cadre naturel d'exception. Situé sur les rives enchanteresses de la lagune de Marchica, notre Resort offre une expérience unique qui allie harmonieusement luxe, détente et nature.
Lorsque vous franchissez les portes de notre établissement, vous entrez dans un monde où le confort et le bien-être sont les maîtres-mots. Nos chambres et suites spacieuses offrent une vue imprenable sur la lagune ou les jardins luxuriants, vous invitant à vous immerger dans une atmosphère de sérénité absolue.
Le Marchica Lagoon Resort propose également une gamme d'installations et de services de premier ordre pour répondre à tous vos besoins. Détendez-vous au bord de notre piscine à débordement, offrant une vue panoramique sur la lagune, ou profitez de moments de relaxation dans notre spa luxueux, où des soins inspirés de traditions ancestrales vous attendent.

Pour les amateurs de gastronomie, notre resort vous invite à un voyage culinaire d'exception. Nos restaurants mettent à l'honneur des saveurs locales et internationales, préparées avec soin par notre équipe de chefs talentueux. Profitez d'un dîner romantique avec vue sur la lagune ou découvrez les spécialités marocaines dans une ambiance conviviale.
Outre ces plaisirs, notre resort offre également de nombreuses activités pour agrémenter votre séjour. Explorez les environs à vélo ou en kayak, participez à des excursions en bateau ou découvrez la richesse culturelle de la région grâce à nos visites guidées. Que vous soyez en quête d'aventure ou de tranquillité, vous trouverez votre bonheur parmi nos nombreuses propositions.

Chez Marchica Lagoon Resort, nous croyons en la préservation de notre environnement naturel et en la responsabilité sociale. Nous sommes fiers d'être engagés dans des pratiques durables et de soutenir les initiatives locales qui contribuent à la préservation de notre écosystème unique.

#MarchicaLagoonResort #LuxeNaturel #ExpériencesInoubliables

Situated in the heart of Edinburgh's historic Old Town, our premium classic hotel offers unrivalled access to the iconic Holyrood's Palace, The Scottish Parliament, and major attractions like the Royal Mile, Arthur's Seat, Edinburgh Castle, and Dynamic Earth. With exceptional connectivity to the rest of the UK and European destinations, our prime location places Edinburgh's Waverley station within walking distance and only 30 minutes from the international airport.

Edinburgh Marriott Hotel Holyrood, proudly stands as the flagship Marriott hotel in Scotland's capital, embodying the perfect blend of heritage and innovation. Whether you're a history enthusiast, seeking a rejuvenating spa getaway, exploring the city's vibrant culture, or conducting business, our hotel is dedicated to exceeding your expectations at every turn. Discover the harmonious fusion of old-world charm and modern sophistication at Edinburgh Marriott Hotel Holyrood.

Name: Hotel Strandlyst Badehotel - Møder ved Vesterhavet
Description:
Et af Danmarks hyggeligste og ældste badehoteller.
Badehotel anno 1895

Hotel Strandlyst er et lille badehotel, placeret blot 800 meter fra en af Danmarks bedste badestrande, Tornby Strand. Hotellet er bygget i 1895 og gemmer efterhånden på mange gode historier.

Hotellet ligger placeret i naturskønne omgivelser, herunder tæt på Tornby Klitplantage, hvor gode vandre- og cykelruter forefindes. Derudover ligger sommerbyen Lønstrup kun 20 minutters kørsel fra ejendommen.

Færgeterminalen i Hirtshals ligger kun 7 minutters kørsel fra ejendommen, hvorfra der går afgange til både Norge, Island og Færøerne.

Hotel Strandlyst råder over 30 værelser, fordelt på henholdsvis små og store dobbeltværelser samt enkeltværelser. Derudover har vi ét familieværelse med plads til fire personer og ét Superior-værelse med plads til tre personer.

Alle værelser er hyggeligt indrettet med eget toilet og bad samt siddearrangement. Vi følger den gamle danske badehotels-tradition, hvorfor alle værelser er uden tv og radio. WIFI er tilrådighed overalt på hotellet.

Hotellet har mange hyggelige fællesstuer med blandt andet bar/lounge og flygel. Om sommeren kan man nyde solen, en kop kaffe eller et glas køligt rosé på hotellets store fælles terrasse.

Hotel Strandlyst serverer hver dag lækker morgenmadskomplot for overnattende gæster, og i sommersæsonen vil der på udvalgte dage også være mulighed for at bestille Dagens Ret til aftensmad.

Vi glæder os til at byde jer velkommen.

Guests can indulge in water sports, explore the rich marine life, or simply unwind in the peaceful ambiance. The resort's renovated rooms and excellent dining options make it an ideal destination for a rejuvenating getaway, where the beauty of Oman meets exceptional hospitality.

Name: HDG Legacy, LLC
Description:
Founded as a small, family business, HDG Hotels has grown into one of the largest hotel development and management companies in Central Florida, with two distinct divisions: Impact and Legacy.  The driving force for HDG Legacy continues to be the same principles that propelled growth from one hotel asset to over two dozen hotel assets.

HDG Legacy, led by Navroz Saju, prioritizes the core belief that stakeholder value is maximized when hotels provide quality lodging and service to guests, while also taking care of team members and maintaining and thoughtfully investing in the hotels.  

We seek hotel developments in markets where the hotels serve as catalyst for uplifting the community.  Our experience has shown that the coming of a new hotel in smaller communities changes the economic trajectory of the municipality by providing employment to residents and driving visitation which, in turn, leads to more local investment and development.  We fully embrace “technology best practices,” and “green best practices” which increase operational efficiency, improve the guest experience, while also providing an ROI to our investors. Currently, HDG Legacy has several newly built hotel projects in the pipeline where technology has been thoughtfully specified to futurize the hotel.  

Over more than 25 years, we have an established reputation for living out our vision to “positively impact” and our mission of “being brilliant in the basics of hospitality”, all while offering stakeholders exceptional industry experience and results.  With values of teamwork, leadership, innovation, communication and resourcefulness applied to every aspect of our business, we provide a slate of services ranging from turnkey hotel management to turnkey hotel development.  

Follow along and see what HDG Legacy has to offer you!

Name: Peppers Silo Hotel
Description:
Bringing history alive on the banks of the idyllic Tamar River, Peppers Silo Hotel provides a unique place to stay in Launceston. Stylish rooms and suites are housed in vertical silos and the latest addition of the North Tower offers sweeping views over the Cataract Gorge, North Esk or Tamar River. 

The onsite Grain of the Silos Restaurant offers a contemporary dining experience, combining some of the best local produce with the latest culinary trends. We’ve met each farmer, each maker, each talented Tasmanian who brings something extraordinary to an ever changing list of dishes. It’s a bit off the beaten track but Grain of the Silos sits proudly in a patch of Tassie brimming with good food and people who care.

The hotel is also a sophisticated meeting and conferencing venue, with distinct spaces to cater for all functions, including intimate meetings of 10 through to events for 120 delegates. Whether you’re planning a formal presentation, business conference, chic cocktail evening or formal banquet, we will ensure your event is successful, seamlessly managing decoration, lighting, music, food and drinks, not to mention guest accommodation.

Hotel Services also include Silo Day Spa and onsite gym but if you need more, you can meet our resident canine ambassador Archie the black labrador. Usually found snoozing in the lobby and always up for some cuddles or a walk along the Tamar River.

Featuring modern guestrooms, world-class dining, and state-of-the-art banquet and conference facilities, the hotel offers an unmatched blend of sophistication and comfort. Guests can enjoy breathtaking views of Taipei's iconic skyline, including the renowned Taipei 101. Located in the heart of the city’s emerging commercial hub, Taipei Marriott Hotel is close to major business districts, technology parks, and exhibition centers. It also provides seamless access to cultural attractions such as the National Palace Museum, Shilin Night Market, and the vibrant Ximending district. The prime location offers convenient access within a short walk to shopping malls, cinemas, bars, golf driving range and a wide range of entertainment options. With just a 6-minute walk to the MRT station and a 10-minute drive to Taipei Songshan Airport, the hotel offers unparalleled convenience and accessibility.

Description:
HotelREZ strategically acquired Best Loved Hotels in 2018 as its consumer-facing soft brand, complementing its business-to-business operations. Today, Best Loved Hotels showcases a diverse collection of independent hotels, aparthotels, and hotel groups worldwide, promising guests experiences that go beyond the ordinary.

Founded in 1993, Best Loved Hotels has built a distinguished reputation in the international hospitality industry, with a heritage spanning over three decades. It has earned widespread recognition within the agency landscape, with its iconic and now historic Gold Book once a staple on the desks of numerous travel professionals.

Honouring this legacy, HotelREZ members now proudly receive the Best Loved plaque, symbolising their association with the brand. Best Loved Hotels also represents the entire HotelREZ portfolio, including hotels seeking membership via Cvent on an affiliate basis. This comprehensive platform further enhances HotelREZ’s reach and offerings within the hospitality industry.

For more details, please contact info@bestloved.com

Name: North East Hotels Association
Description: The North East Hotels Association is one of the largest of its kind in the region and represents almost 50 member hotels in Tyne & Wear, Northumberland, County Durham and Tees Valley. Our members include independent hotels and chain hotels located in city centres as well as rural and coastal settings. With over 5,000 bedrooms members attract leisure, business, conference and events business and contributes significantly to the regional economy. Total annual sales are over £200 million with spending power on goods and services, many supporting local businesses, close to £80 million. Nearly 3,000 full-time equivalent jobs are supported across all aspects of the sector and we work with local education providers to attract entry level young graduates. We meet regularly throughout the year to discuss current matters in the hospitality sector and have a guest speaker programme to engage our members with partners, suppliers, industry bodies and local government.

Name: JW Marriott Hotel Madrid
Description: The 5 Star JW Marriott Hotel Madrid is ideally located in the heart of the city, near main city sights like Puerta del Sol, Royal Palace, or Plaza Mayor. From our haven, you can breathe a luxury commercial atmosphere or stroll in the Art Walk, included in the UNESCO World Heritage List as The Landscape of Light, where you will find the best art museums in the world: El Prado, the Thyssen-Bornemisza and Reina Sofia. Inspired by the principles of mindfulness, the hotel’s warm décor resonates with the building's historical past, revealing the old 19th century wrought iron columns. Our 139 rooms and suites, most with private balconies, boast ample havens with elegant touches to provide our guests with a holistic well-being experience. On top floors, you can marvel with incredible views of Madrid. Reconnect in our lobby or discover tradition with a gourmet twist by Michelin-star chef Mario Sandoval at QÚ Restaurant. Modern facilities, wellness area and intentional service to ensure a luxurious experience

Name: Tempest22
Description:
We are military veterans and experienced investors who believe the families that serve their country and communities have EARNED access to the types of assets normally reserved for the few, wealthy, investors in-the-know.

We serve a strong community of accredited AND non-accredited investors learning and investing side-by-side in niche opportunities - always striving for high-profit, passive investments. 

TEMPEST:  Like the storms that inspired our name, Tempest22 disrupts traditional investing by combining the best of real estate and private equity through our expertise in Hotels. We invest in the property AND the people who make it successful to bring our assets to peak performance. 

 TWENTY-TWO:  In honor of the 22 veterans lost daily to suicide, Tempest22 is committed to creating opportunities for Military/LEO/First Responder families to gain access to investments that can reduce some of the financial stress of the difficult transition from the front lines to the home front.  As a disabled veteran-owned and operated business, we know our commitment to excellence reflects directly on the legacy of the friends we've lost while providing a light to our brothers and sisters-in-arms.

Our Investor Circle - where we educate on emerging opportunities and invite to invest -  recently joined us on our 5th successful project in the last two years, made possible by our combined 35+ years of success in building truly passive real estate investment opportunities. 

Join Us !

Name: Golden Tulip Kin Oasis Kinshasa
Description:
L’hôtel Golden Tulip Kin Oasis est idéalement situé sur l'Avenue de la Libération, à proximité de l’Hôpital du Cinquantenaire, dans la commune dynamique de Bandalungwa, à Kinshasa, en République Démocratique du Congo. À seulement 25 km de l’Aéroport International de Ndjili (40 à 60 minutes), il bénéficie d’un emplacement stratégique, à mi-chemin entre la zone industrielle, la cité administrative et le cœur de la ville.

L’avenue de la Libération est une des principales artères de Kinshasa, reliée aux grands axes de transport et quartiers majeurs, facilitant l’accès aux institutions, entreprises et attractions touristiques. Véritable oasis urbaine, l’hôtel offre 187 chambres spacieuses à partir de 26 m², dont certaines avec balcons privés et vue panoramique sur la ville. Ses 34 suites luxueuses (de 47 à 60 m²) et une suite présidentielle accueillent les voyageurs en quête d’un confort raffiné.
Chaque chambre est équipée de climatisation centralisée, Smart TV connectée, salle de bain moderne et literie de luxe pour un repos optimal. Les services incluent une conciergerie personnalisée, check-in/check-out flexibles, room service, sécurité 24/7 et transfert aéroport.

Le restaurant L’Atelier propose une cuisine internationale en buffet ou à la carte, accompagnée d’un bar à vins et cocktails. Le Jardin d’Orient, lieu élégant inspiré de la Route de la Soie, marie cuisine chinoise authentique et touches africaines : canard laqué, dim sum, woks revisités par notre chef.

Pour vos événements, la salle Jacaranda, située au rez-de-jardin, accueille conférences, séminaires ou célébrations privées. Elle offre : équipement audiovisuel complet, climatisation, Wi-Fi haut débit, restauration sur mesure et accompagnement dédié.

À découvrir à Kinshasa :
L’Échangeur de Limete, surnommé la "Tour Eiffel de Kinshasa"
Le Musée National du Congo, vitrine de l’héritage culturel
Le Marché Central, cœur vibrant de l’artisanat et du commerce local

Name: Alaska Kenai Adventures
Description:
Adventure is in our DNA! Alaska Kenai Adventures Lodge, located on the world-famous Kenai River in Soldotna, Alaska, is an all-inclusive destination offering unforgettable experiences. From corporate retreats and team-building events to family getaways, breathtaking scenic fly-out trips, and world-class fishing excursions, every moment here is crafted to create lasting memories. With exclusive access to our private fishing spots on the stunning glacier blue Kenai, we provide world-class opportunities to reel in large Sockeye & Coho salmon and immerse yourself in Alaska’s breathtaking wilderness.  

All trips are customizable to include exactly what you would like to do and see! We specialize in creating personalized adventures that bring people together, inspire connection, and leave lasting memories. Whether you’re reeling in trophy salmon, trout, or halibut, bonding over a team-building challenge, or relaxing in the serenity of Alaska’s natural beauty, we’re here to make your dream trip a reality. Check out our Google and TripAdvisor reviews to see for yourself what our clients have been saying! Your Alaskan adventure starts with us!

Name: The Ruby Hotel & Bar
Description: Upon visiting The Ruby site in early 2016, the owners found a partial love letter addressed to a “Dearest Ruby” in a pile of leaves and trash. The only buildings on the site at that time were a home (which is now The Ruby Bar) and a few sheds. The letter was pocketed and, along with some torn pages of a scrapbook found later, eventually formed the brand inspiration for the hotel. The Ruby brand is inspired by a fictional Ruby, who we imagine lived in small-town Round Rock. Inspired by a changing world and challenged by a generation defined by tradition, Ruby set out to find her own voice after graduating from high school around the 1930’s. We imagine she traveled - first to Chicago, then New York, and as her ambitions grew, San Miguel, Paris, and London. Ruby sparked her share of conversations as she collected her friends, her memories, and well, … her collection. The music of Etta James, Sam Cooke, and Chet Baker provided the soundtrack to the gatherings she curated around the tables she set. In this dappled spot along Brushy Creek, the delight of mingled surroundings is evidence of a life well lived. A cozy place Ruby called home.

Name: Pearl Hotel & Spa, UAQ, UAE
Description:
Rooms, Spa, Restaurants & our Alcohol retail store! So many services, a one-stop-shop, all under the same roof!

Wake up to the sound of swirling waves and the smell of sea air with a breathtaking sea view from our suites designed for your comfort.

The finest hotel accommodation to make your perfect holiday even more memorable. We make sure that you don’t miss any of the luxuries you are accustomed to even though you are miles away from home. We bet you would be longing to return to the tender loving care of our hospitality once you go back to the comfort of your home sweet home.

We believe that comfort doesn’t always translate into high prices. Reasonably priced, the refined and relaxed ambiance of our resort ensures that our guests take back memories from one of the best holidays of their lives.

Name: Ambiente A Landscape Hotel
Description: Ambiente Sedona is a sanctuary of serenity, seamlessly blending luxury with nature. Nestled in 40 private glass Atriums, feel the awe of Sedona's Red Rocks and skyline—a soul-stirring retreat where nature's beauty intertwines with luxury, inviting you on a journey of tranquility. 2024 Best New Hotels Winner from @afarmedia, Winner of 2 MICHELIN Keys @michelinguide2024 & member of @leadinghotelsoftheworld.

Name: Ibiza Feeling Group
Description:
Ibiza Feeling is one of the youngest and most dynamic hotel management companies on the island but with its roots going back to the pioneers of tourism in Ibiza.

In 1949 a local baker and entrepreneur, named Antonio Cardona Torres constructed his first hotel in Sant Antoni de Portmany, at that time a little village, also known as San Antonio Abad, and thus he started to create and maintain a small family empire dedicated to the hospitality business.

*************************************************

The PURPLE is a dream come true in Ibiza!

Until this place received a complete refurbishment and rebranding in 2014, it was operated under a different name as one of the numerous no-frills hostels in town for several decades.

Now we call it The PURPLE. And it is the first and only accommodation in San Antonio / Ibiza, dedicated exclusively to the LGBT market, - more than gay friendly.

Chill-out in the tranquil courtyard at the pool, or to enjoy delicious cocktails and mouth-watering snacks or other excellent food on the embellished terrace, sitting under one of the sunshades. 

--------------------------------------------------

•	The RED Hotel, 
•	The BLUE Apartments and 
•	The WHITE Apartments 

are real landmarks in San Antonio, which are situated very close to the famous "Egg of Columbus". They are also good alternatives as quality accommodation for your holidays, weekends or business trips if you are looking for a very central location! If you want to feel the heart beat of Ibiza, you can't get any closer to it than here, the strategic location on the promenade. Just go downstairs for dining or shopping. Everything is at your footsteps... And from most balconies you have a stunning view of the bay and the skyline of San Antonio with the marina and its excursion boats and yachts or the beach of "Es Regueró".
Location: Sant Antoni de Portmany / Ibiza, Balearic Islands

Name: Kamienny Ogród Holiday Park
Description:

Great guest opinions :)

Name: Mercure Paignton
Description:
Open Now! 

We are the Mercure Paignton, a brand new four star hotel in Paignton.

Situated in a prime location on the seafront, with stunning views of the coast, promenade, pier and beach, the Mercure Paignton is an art deco inspired hotel with 161 stylish bedrooms. It features a spacious glass fronted restaurant, Latitude 50, and a two tier style terrace complete with an outside bar, serving locally-influenced food and drinks. 

The Mercure Paignton provides standard doubles and luxurious Privilege sea-view rooms. Business visitors are also catered for, with two flexible event spaces for conferences and meetings, and options to combine a stay with the many team orientated activities on offer in the area, from adventure sports to coastal hikes.  

Inspired by the golden age of the English Riviera, the hotel’s elegant interior combines calming colour schemes with striking dark wooden and brass features, giving guests a taste of the illustrious grandeur of the historic seaside resort, with a modern twist. 

The Mercure Paignton is owned by Singapore-based Fragrance Group, franchised by the world class Accor group and operated by RBH Hospitality.

To find out more about the Mercure Paignton and book a stay, please visit: https://www.mercurepaignton.com/

If you would like to leave a review of the hotel, please go to Google Reviews and select 'Write a Review': https://bit.ly/43Uf7zL

Name: Hotel kazakiwi Luxembourg
Description: kazakiwi is a hotel located in the heart of Luxembourg city. Offering long stays & short stays, it will be ideal for your business trips or for a weekend in the heart of the capital. The rooms are decorated with taste and equipped with high quality bedding. Enjoy the bar in-house.

Name: Vesper Hotel
Description:
Time is an invention. It tells us where to be, how fast to go, when to arrive, how to get things done. Vesper doesn’t understand time. It tells the clock to stand still. Makes the watch unnecessary. It is a moment to stop and discover.

Vesper is packing up and wandering off the beaten path, because Vesper is freedom. It’s pleasure. It’s taking a step back from responsibility, taking a break from the grind, finding a retreat that inspires the senses. Vesper is connecting with nature. It is jogging along the beach with the wind in your face. It is the sound of the sea murmuring in your ear and saying: “Relax, take your time, enjoy the sun as it sets.”

Vesper is a sense of play. It’s the discovery of a laugh, an embrace, the thrill of trying new things. It’s letting someone care for you just when you think you’ve forgotten what that means.

Vesper is no worries. Not today.

Standing on the beach as the sun sinks over the horizon, the water turning a deep purple while the light crawls unhurriedly forward, that’s when time stops. That is the Vesper moment you’ll never forget.

Vesper, because leisure is an art.

Name: Hotel Prestige Agadir Boutique & SPA
Description:
Découvrez le summum du luxe à Agadir ! 
Laissez-vous choyer dans notre hôtel 5 étoiles et vivez une expérience inoubliable.

- Le Kids Club de l'Hôtel Prestige : où les rêves des petits aventuriers prennent vie. Des activités amusantes, des sourires radieux et des souvenirs inoubliables vous attendent.
- Plongez dans l'expérience culinaire ultime de notre hôtel ! De nos somptueux buffets aux dîners à thème exquis, de la détente au restaurant de la piscine aux délices du room service, découvrez un festin pour tous les sens.
- Découvrez notre salle de conférence de classe mondiale. Un espace élégant et fonctionnel conçu pour inspirer la créativité et la productivité.

Name: Beach House Hotel Seahouses
Description:
Ideally located on the seafront in Seahouses offering breath taking sea views of the Farne Islands and Northumberland coast. Boasting a selection of stylish, contemporary bedrooms that vary from sea view to private gardens, family and dog friendly. Our restaurant and bar are open daily, offering a wide range of delicious dishes using the highest quality, locally sourced ingredients coupled with a tantalising wine and cocktail list.

Our location serves as an ideal base for walkers, hikers, cyclists and water sports enthusiasts looking to explore the numerous trails, routes and beaches on our doorstep. Whether you’re planning a leisurely stroll, a family seaside holiday or an adventurous weekend away, our hotel offers the ideal starting point for your outdoor adventures. Complimentary wifi and onsite parking available.  All hotel guests receive complimentary use of pool and spa at Ocean Club Spa a few minutes walk away. Golf, bike, watersports equipment storage also available at an additional charge.

Discover the charm of the Northumberland coast. Secure your room at Beach House Hotel and relax knowing your next adventure awaits!

Name: Dusit Thani Krabi Beach Resort
Description:
Nestled in tropical flora just steps away from pristine white sands, a luxury Krabi family resort awaits with private beach and gracious Thai hospitality.

Set on Klong Muang Beach and surrounded by the exotic landscape of Krabi province, Dusit Thani Krabi Beach Resort is only moments away from beautiful cliff formations, lush forests, waterfalls and caves.

With 240 guest rooms and suites, two inviting beachfront pools, a variety of restaurants and a tranquil spa set in lush tropical gardens, this luxury resort is the perfect Krabi luxury resort for families, just a short flight from Bangkok

Description: Stardom Resort, Jaipur is a unit of Kailash Hotels & Resorts. We strive to provide our guests with the best by providing luxurious stay facilities & delicious food. We have 3 banquets, 3 lawns, a restaurant, a bakery, a swimming pool and all the amenities to make your events even more special.

Description: Sainte Jeanne Hotel Boutique & Spa sobresale en el corazón de la calle Güemes como uno de los espacios más exclusivos de Mar del Plata, ofreciendo 27 habitaciones distribuidas en tres pisos donde predomina la  intimidad, confort y pasión por los detalles.

Being part of Marriott International means being part of a proud history and a thriving culture.

Name: Elegant Suite Hotel
Description: Elegance Redefined. Experience luxury beyond compare at Elegant Executive Suites.

Name: Europa Palace
Description:
Europa Palace è lo storico hotel di Sanremo, punto di riferimento dell’ospitalità della riviera ligure dal 1874, destinazione nella destinazione per chi sogna la vacanza in Italia all’insegna del relax e della privacy, ideale sia per una fuga romantica che per un soggiorno più lungo, alla scoperta delle bellezze della regione.

70 camere e suite vista mare o vista casinò dal design elegante e moderno, che esprimono una filosofia di ospitalità assolutamente contemporanea. 

L’esperienza gastronomica si snoda attraverso due outlet ristorativi, di cui un Bistrot con zona privé per cene esclusive fino a 10 persone.

Nel Centro Benessere con piscina, sauna, hammam, bagno turco, doccia emozionale, gli Ospiti possono effettuare massaggi e trattamenti, mentre la palestra è dotata di attrezzature all’avanguardia.

Europa Palace ha una spiccata vocazione vacanziera, ma è ideale anche per meeting, convegni e viaggi incentive grazie alla collaborazione con il vicino Casinò, che mette a disposizione le sue sale per piccoli eventi business. Inoltre è presente in hotel una Break out room di 18 mq in prossimità della hall.

Gli Ospiti di Europa Palace hanno a disposizione parcheggio e spiaggia convenzionati a pagamento.

Name: Ocean House Costa del Sol Affiliated by Meliá
Description:
Complejo hotelero situado en Torremolinos, Málaga. 

Cuenta con una ubicación privilegiada, con acceso directo a la playa de la Carihuela y a pocos pasos de Puerto Marina. 

Posee unas amplias habitaciones tipo suite con fantásticas vistas del mar mediterráneo y el puerto deportivo. 

5 refrescantes piscinas situadas frente al mar donde disfrutar de un amplio programa de actividades tanto para adultos, como dirigidas los más pequeños. 

Gimnasio con gran variedad de máquinas de musculación y cardio. Complementado con un amplio programa de actividades deportivas y asesoramiento por parte de los instructores integrados en el equipo de animación. 

Zona privada de hamacas en la playa de la Carihuela, justamente frente al complejo, cruzando el paseo marítimo. 

Un exclusivo Rooftop con acceso incluido en habitaciones premium. Terraza con piscina privada y fantásticas vistas, solo para adultos (+16) con servicio de hamacas, camas Balinesas, menú de snacks y la mejor coctelería. 

Playbar, con gran variedad de aperitivos y bebidas pensados para ser disfrutados en compañía. Con piscina, acceso a la playa, sesiones de DJ y espectáculos musicales que hacen las vacaciones aún más vibrantes. 

Lobby Bar y The Buffet, espacios recientemente renovados, con un toque más moderno y fresco, donde disfrutar un amplio menú de bebidas y una oferta gastronómica variada, dinámica e internacional. 

Establecimiento rodeado de gran cantidad de servicios turísticos y con buenas conexiones de transporte.

Name: Kings Quarter Hospitality
Description: Owner/operator of top rated boutique hotels on St Thomas, US Virgin Islands. Hotel 1829 and At Home in the Tropics and Lavalettes resturant. Experience Old St. Thomas with stunning harbor views, Caribbean inspired menu items, beautiful guest rooms. Follow us on Instagram Facebook and Twitter.

Name: Extended Suites Hoteles
Description:
Primer cadena de Estancias Extendidas en México.
FÁCIL
Puedes rentar una suite por semana, por mes o por año, sin aval, sin fianza y sin obligados solidarios.
Nuestros clientes son aquellas personas, que por la causa que sea, están buscando un lugar para vivir / hospedarse, que sea accesible, limpio y seguro.
Cuentas con la flexibilidad de comprar tus alimentos en la tienda de conveniencia y cocinar en tu Suite.
Cuentas con una lavandería de autoservicio con 6 lavadoras y 6 secadoras de ropa.

ACCESIBLE
Estamos conscientes de lo importante que es tener un precio accesible.
Te ofrecemos únicamente los servicios que realmente necesitas Nosotros no te cobramos lo que no utilizas!
Siempre hay cambio de planes, somos flexibles y entendemos tu situación particular.
Ofrecemos el mejor precio-beneficio para estancias prolongadas. No hay duda.

LIMPIO
Contamos con personal altamente capacitado que utiliza equipos de limpieza y productos de alta tecnología, por esta razón siempre encontrarás habitaciones impecables.
Nos aseguramos de exceder tus expectativas de limpieza.
Cada vez que un huésped nuevo llega a su suite, esta se entrega como si fuera nueva.

SEGURO
La seguridad es uno de los valores principales de Extended Suites, es por eso que contamos con:
Más de 45 cámaras ubicadas en todos los accesos y zonas públicas estratégicas del hotel; esto nos permite ser proactivos en brindarles seguridad a nuestros Huéspedes y empleados.
Todos los accesos al hotel y sus habitaciones están controlados con chapas electrónicas de proximidad, que nos permite tener un mayor control de seguridad para nuestros Huéspedes Nuestras tarjetas de acceso nunca se desprograman!
A todos los Huéspedes mayores de edad les solicitamos su identificación oficial con fotografía. Esto brinda mayor seguridad para nuestros Huéspedes.
Hacemos un minucioso proceso de check-in con la finalidad de proteger a nuestros Huéspedes.

Name: Pula Golf Resort
Description: El Hotel Pula Golf Resort está en el TOP de los resorts de golf de Europa. Nuestra razón de ser es la satisfacción del cliente. Somos el primer hotel y campo de golf regenerativo competitivo, lo que significa que aportamos al medio ambiente y a nuestro entorno más de lo que nos da.

Name: The Kabo Luxury Boutique Hotel
Description: Situated at the centre of Srinagar and overlooking the historic city park with a panaromic view of the summer capital city of Jammu and Kashmir as far as the eye can reach The Kabo offers a location like no other hotel. Guests looking for a luxury dining experience in Srinagar can choose from our food outlets each with its own distinctive character. The hotel offers exclusive meeting and banquet venues making it the ideal choice for the selective traveller and promises total commitment to service, quiet luxury and discreet sophistication.

Name: Mercantile Hotel Dublin
Description: Since 1835, The Mercantile Hotel has stood as a landmark of comfort and elegance in the heart of Dublin. We are excited to announce that something extraordinary is on the horizon.

Name: Virtual Tour Media
Description:
In the fast-paced hospitality industry, maintaining top-tier guest experiences can be nothing short of an uphill battle.

The risk of a negative guest review and damage to the hotel's reputation is always on the cards. 

Despite hotel manager's relentless battle with high staff turnover and training limitations.

The fact of the matter is. 

Hotel managers simply lack time and expertise to provide effective and regular onboarding and upskilling.

Especially during busier periods when staff are already stretched.

It requires more than a one and done training demonstration. 

Our mobile-first training for hotel frontline staff revolves around your unique work environment and tailored precisely to your distinctive procedures.

One that inspires staff to strive for flawless performance and outstanding guest reviews.

Without management's constant supervision.

We're here to shake up your hotel frontline staff.

And the best part? 

It’s available around the clock on any device. 

Ready to see what it’s all about? 

Book a free 15 minute discovery call below

https://calendly.com/virtualtourmedia/hoteltraining?month=2023-12

Name: Trilogy Hotel Downtown Huntsville
Description:
Trilogy Hotel Huntsville, Autograph Collection is a 214-room boutique hotel inspired by mid-century modern design and Huntsville’s legacy in the 1960s space race. Located in the heart of downtown, Trilogy offers full-service amenities including valet parking, concierge, and room service. Guests enjoy walkable access to Big Spring Park, the Von Braun Center, and the city’s top cultural attractions.

Part of Marriott’s Autograph Collection, Trilogy blends elevated hospitality with immersive storytelling and sleek design. Host meetings or weddings in our signature event spaces, offering the best views of Big Spring Park in the city. From business travel to weekend getaways, Trilogy delivers a stay that’s rooted in history and built for what’s next.

Name: The Royal Senchi
Description:
The Royal Senchi Hotel & Lodge is the first 4-star luxury resort in Ghana. It stands on 35 acres of lush greenery with a magnificent view of the Volta River. We offer a unique blend of fauna, flora, traditional architecture, and modernity of the highest standards. The Royal Senchi Hotel & Lodge is known as West Africa's most romantic hotel destination. We are also an ideal venue for business meetings, conferences and other special events.
The hotel has more than 80 rooms and suites. These are designed to take advantage of the refreshing environment of the Senchi River and the commanding views that surround it. Each luxury dwelling boasts of a distinctive tribal-meets-elegance décor that will make your stay a treat for the senses.

We have facilities and services that make business and pleasure a completely convenient and enjoyable experience. You will find a restaurant, bar, and lounge that will cater to your gastronomic needs. Enjoy the use of our conference venues, swimming pool, fitness center, spa and salon, playground, and tennis grounds. These are all maintained to suit luxury resort standards.

The Royal Senchi Hotel & Lodge has won a number of coveted awards and is proud to be considered one of the finest hotels in West Africa.

Name: Barretos Country Park & Resort
Description:
No Barretos Country Park & Resort, a escolha é sua: desfrutar das 40 atrações do Parque Aquático e relaxar no Resort, ou relaxar no Resort para depois se aventurar nas 40 atrações do Parque Aquático.

Seja qual for a ordem, o resultado é sempre o mesmo: diversão garantida no maior complexo temático country do Brasil.

Oferecemos diversas opções de acomodações, incluindo nossos ranchos, que proporcionam uma autêntica experiência de fazenda para quem deseja escapar da correria e relaxar em meio a leveza e bem-estar, aproveitando nosso exclusivo atendimento pé na areia.

E para completar, você ainda pode curtir uma enorme praia artificial com 35 tipos de ondas e muitas outras atrações no Parque Aquático, como as opções radicais, que incluem toboáguas e uma tirolesa especial.

Para a criançada, a Fazendinha é o lugar ideal, oferecendo diversas atividades em contato com a natureza. Todas as brincadeiras são acompanhadas de perto por recreadores especializados e por uma equipe profissional de guarda-vidas, garantindo a alegria com segurança.

No Barretos Country, a emoção dura o ano inteiro!

Name: CIKA Golden Hotel & Suites
Description:
Nous sommes fiers de vous présenter notre établissement, une oasis de luxe et de raffinement contemporains étalée sur onze étages. Chez CIKA GOLDEN HOTEL AND SUITES, nous avons méticuleusement conçu chaque détail pour offrir une expérience exceptionnelle aux voyageurs exigeants d'aujourd'hui. Nos chambres et suites, baignées de lumière naturelle, sont une véritable invitation à la détente, avec leur décoration contemporaine et avant-gardiste qui évoque la chaleur d'un foyer.

Situé au cœur de notre hôtel, notre restaurant "Pergola" est le joyau de notre établissement. Dirigée par des chefs étoilés, notre cuisine vous transporte dans un monde de saveurs exquises, le tout dans un cadre élégant où le service attentionné complète cette expérience gastronomique unique.

Mais ce n'est pas tout... Au sommet de notre édifice, notre Sky Bar offre une vue panoramique à couper le souffle sur la ville de Lomé. C'est un lieu cosmopolite, animé, glamour et sophistiqué, où vous pourrez déguster nos cocktails signatures tout en admirant les fabuleux couchers de soleil de notre ville.

Nous sommes ravis de partager notre histoire, notre passion pour l'hospitalité, et notre engagement à dépasser les attentes de nos clients. Suivez notre page pour rester informé de nos actualités, de nos offres spéciales, et pour découvrir tout ce que CIKA GOLDEN HOTEL AND SUITES a à vous offrir. Merci de faire partie de notre réseau LinkedIn, et au plaisir de vous accueillir bientôt dans notre établissement.

Name: Arya Resort and Spa
Description:
Arya Resort and SPA by Tulip in Mahabaleshwar is the answer to all your holiday needs and synonymous for providing the right blend of Service & Luxury. Escape big-city life to a hill-station retreat! We welcome you in the safety and serenity of nature to heal your mind, body, and soul.

We combine elegance with untamed natural beauty of Mahabaleshwar A place that is equipped with the best-in-class facilities, amenities and services.

Enjoy any of our luxuriously appointed rooms and suites, fully equipped with amenities. The most relaxing and rejuvenating amenities are available right here for your pleasure.

To book your stay, please do contact us directly through email and phone numbers below.  94039 20006, 94048 20006, 94057 20006 | sales@aryaresortandspa.com

Name: SÄTRA BRUNN KURORT
Description:
Sätra Brunn Kurort är en spa- och konferensanläggning med en 300-årig historia. Hit har människor vallfärdat för att "dricka brunn", dvs dricka vattnet direkt från källan, något som på 1700- och 1800-talet ansågs hälsobringande. Idag är vi stolta över att bedriva modern verksamhet i varsamt renoverade kulturhistoriska byggnader. 

Vårt läge är lantligt en stadsnära, mellan Västerås och Sala, bara ca 1,5 timme från Stockholm och Uppsala. Varje årstid är magisk på sitt sätt här och många gäster vittnar om den frid som infinner sig när de landar här, och om den familjära stämningen de upplever.

Välkommen hit - låt oss ta hand om dig!

Name: YHA Haworth Partner
Description:
YHA Haworth is a Victorian Gothic mansion that was built as the family home of a local mill owner. The sweeping staircase, ornate painted glass, richly carved oak and plaster friezes hint at the building's opulent past.

The hostel is well used by groups but it is also very popular with solo travellers, families and overseas guests. We're ideally situated for backpackers travelling around the Hebden Bridge and Todmorden areas and, of course, the village is best known as home of the Brontë sisters.

You can relax in the hostel's garden or make use of our TV room and lounge. Guests can enjoy the on-site café, self-catering kitchen and laundry facilities. The hostel is located near the scenic Yorkshire Dales cycle way routes with cycle storage and a drying room available at the hostel for cyclists too.

Name: Big Bang Nature Stays
Description: BigBang is a dome glamping in a forest next to Sauce de Portezuelo´s sea in Maldonado, Uruguay. We are experienced in giving unique experiences in contact with nature for our guests.

Name: Moxy Virginia Beach Oceanfront
Description: Forget the front desk. Moxy instantly eases you into a playful stay with a *complimentary cocktail to go along with your room key when you check in at the bar. We’re accommodating like that.

Name: AGA Hotels Partner
Description:

Name: Hotel Casa Vaganto
Description: Hotel Casa Vaganto, ubicado en el animado barrio de Poble Sec en Barcelona, combina perfectamente el confort moderno con la rica historia y cultura de la ciudad. Este hotel boutique ofrece un santuario de relajación en medio de las bulliciosas calles de Barcelona. Con su elegante diseño inspirado en la arquitectura catalana, cada habitación emana calidez y sofisticación, brindando a los huéspedes un refugio tranquilo después de un día de explorar los tesoros de la ciudad. Ya sea saboreando auténticas tapas en los restaurantes cercanos o paseando por el icónico Barrio Gótico, Casa Vaganto invita a los huéspedes a sumergirse en la esencia del encanto y la hospitalidad de Barcelona.

Name: Bloom Arjaan by Rotana
Description: Located in Bloom’s prestigious Park View development on Abu Dhabi’s Saadiyat Island, Bloom Arjaan by Rotana is set to open in February 2026. The property features 217 fully serviced hotel apartments designed for both long and short stays, complemented by a stunning floating infinity pool, chic dining outlets, a signature bar, and a state-of-the-art fitness centre. A pet-friendly deluxe hotel, Bloom Arjaan blends comfort, lifestyle, and community — offering guests a vibrant destination where every stay is memorable.
Location: Al Saadiyat Island, Abu Dhabi Emirate

Name: Roc Hotels
Description:
Here at Roc Hotels we have 4 star hotels and 3 key apartments in Illetas and Palmanova, in Mallorca. All our accommodation is individual, with options to suit each type of traveler; those looking for the comfort of a hotel and all the amenities that come with that, and those who prefer the independence of an apartment stay but without having to sacrifice certain services and facilities. Both Hotel ROC Illetas & SPAand Apartamentos Roc Portonova are the ideal place to enjoy an unforgettable stay in the Mediterranean paradise of Mallorca.

Hotel ROC Illetas & SPA, on the southwest coast of Mallorca, is located just 10 km from Palma, in an area which has a large number of Beach Clubs and restaurants. It combines tranquility with a range of activities to suit all tastes.

It has three beaches: the main sandy beach of Playa de Illetes and two smaller coves, Cala Oli and Cala Comtessa. These all overlook the small islets that give the place its name.

Apartamentos Roc Portonova are located in Palmanova, in the municipality of Calvià, which has a wide bay and three sandy beaches: Son Maties, Na Nadala and Es Carregador, just where our apartments are located.

Book your next getaway to these fantastic destinations with the best online price guaranteed. Come and find out for yourself!

Name: Agrotourism Letnica
Description:
Agrotourism Letnica is a Country House offering accommodation services all year round as well as local food to guests, here in Letnica, near to Zielona Góra, in Poland.

The Agrotourism ranch has been going for over thirty years but in the Summer of 2022 David and Elena James purchased this bijou location from the retiring former owners and seek to continue the same good work with former guests as well as new ones.

The hotel is animal friendly, not a good choice for those disliking animals or a rural setting but a good choice for those who do. From June to August we keep an unheated 12*6*1.5 metre swimming pool working for the use of guests.

We have extensive adaptations for wheelchair users and other disabled people and have been awarded two certificates from the Polish Organisation for Tourism, namely Tourism Without Barriers (with a view to our investments for disabled guests) and Rural Tourism (due to local food and sustainability practices).

We have always had a rating of more than 9 on Booking.com, since joining in September last year.

Name: Ko’coo Mx
Description:
En Ko'coo Mx, nos apasiona el mundo de los cocos y creemos en su potencial para crear experiencias únicas y auténticas. Somos una empresa especializada en ofrecer soluciones innovadoras en el campo de la fruta del coco y el marketing orgánico.

Nuestro enfoque se basa en la integración del potencial visual del coco con los objetivos de marketing de nuestros clientes. Trabajamos de cerca con hoteles, resorts y empresas de la industria del turismo para crear conceptos únicos y atractivos que cautiven a sus clientes.

Desde nuestra fundación en 2016, hemos colaborado con las mejores cadenas hoteleras de la Riviera Maya para ofrecer "The Real Coconut Experience", un concepto que ha transformado la forma en que las personas disfrutan de los cocos en México. Nos enorgullece haber creado experiencias memorables y contribuir al éxito de nuestros clientes.

En Ko'coo Mx, nos distinguimos por nuestra atención meticulosa a los detalles, nuestro enfoque estratégico y nuestra pasión por la innovación. Trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con nuestros clientes para entender sus necesidades y brindar soluciones personalizadas que generen resultados exitosos.

Mantenemos un compromiso constante con el aprendizaje y la mejora continua. Nos mantenemos actualizados sobre las últimas tendencias y avances en la industria del coco y el marketing orgánico para ofrecer a nuestros clientes las mejores prácticas y enfoques vanguardistas.

Estamos abiertos a nuevas oportunidades de colaboración y estamos ansiosos por establecer conexiones con profesionales y empresas inspiradoras en nuestro campo. Si buscas una empresa apasionada, creativa y comprometida en ofrecer experiencias únicas en torno al coco, no dudes en contactarnos.

Gracias por visitar nuestro perfil! Esperamos poder conectar y trabajar juntos para llevar la magia del coco a un nivel completamente nuevo.

Name: Tranquility Beach Anguilla
Description:
Tranquility Beach Anguilla is the #1 Best of the Best Small and Boutique Hotel in the Caribbean according to Tripadvisor and is located on Anguilla's top-ranked Meads Bay Beach. Our boutique resort offers 15, beachy-chic luxury condominium suites and penthouse villas for luxury vacation rental or turnkey ownership. Read our reviews on Tripadvisor, google and our website.

Private amenities in each spacious retreat -- including terraces with private hot tubs, kitchens and ensuite laundry -- are complemented by a host of guest and owner services including gym, concierge, daily housekeeping and beach chairs with butler service.

Our Turnkey Management & Rental Program and 60:40 owner-to-developer revenue split (the most generous in Anguilla) ensure carefree living on the perfect beach and provides a worry-free investment when owners are away.  Natural landscaping and thoughtful design keep HOA dues low. 

British Caribbean Anguilla is a stable tourism destination and country of laws. Just 35 square miles, the island is known as the Culinary Capital of the Caribbean and was ranked number one in the Caribbean, Bermuda and the Bahamas by Travel + Leisure readers year after year. It is home to 33 all public beaches,100 bespoke restaurants, perfect weather and the most welcoming people. The island is safe and easy to explore by rental car or taxi. 

As the most northern member of the Leeward Island chain in the Eastern Caribbean, it is easily accessible by air or sea, including daily direct flights between Miami, Baltimore, Newark and Boston and Anguilla (AXA) and via a 25-minute sea shuttle or 8-minute flight from international gateway airport St. Maarten (SXM). 

Anguilla effortlessly merges a low-key vibe with upscale accommodations, luxury service and an endless choice of outdoor recreation without any cruise ships, chains or tourist traps spoiling its beauty. English is the primary language and the US dollar and major credit cards are widely accepted.

Name: The Grange Hotel, grange-over-sands
Description: This luxury four-star hotel is located on the idyllic southern fringe of the beautiful English Lake District. The Grange Hotel enjoys an unrivaled position in the pretty little coastal town of Grange-over-Sands. This lovely setting, with its breathtaking panoramic bay views, is only fifteen miles from Lake Windermere, and provides an ideal gateway to the awe-inspiring majesty of the Lake District National Park.

Name: Marriott St. Louis Grand
Description:
Marriott St. Louis Grand is a circa 1917 historic downtown hotel in St. Louis, Missouri with 917 modernized guest rooms and 48 suites including a Peloton suite, stunning Great Room lobby space with big screen TV, 18th floor concierge lounge with dedicated service and great views of the city, Zenia Bar & Grille, 8th Street Pantry, Starbucks, a bi-level fitness center featuring 2 Pelotons, and 68,000 square feet of flexible meeting space, and 2 Ballrooms on the National Register of Historic Places.

A preferred choice among hotels in downtown St. Louis, we are located across the street from the America's Center Convention Complex. Marriott St. Louis Grand offers a countless combination of flexible event spaces and a great team to customize and execute your business or personal events with precision.

Features at the Marriott St. Louis Grand include WiFi, streaming services, a CVS self-serve kiosk, on site Federal Express services, and a gift shop. Steps away from Washington Avenue you can choose from numerous boutiques and 60+ restaurants and bars. And just a short walk away is Busch Stadium, the iconic Gateway Arch, and the unique City Museum making us an ideal downtown location. With a staff that epitomizes St. Louis passion and pride, and service that stands out as the very best, this is the place where you will find Wonderful Hospitality. Always.

Name: Hotel Meraden Opus
Description: Meraden Opus, Goa comprises of 22 well appointed rooms and suites. Located on the flea market road just 1 km from Anjuna Beach. Meraden Opus is an upmarket boutique hotel with swimming pool, WiFi connectivity is all around the hotel including rooms and public areas for those who likes to remain connected. Old Goan - Portuguese hospitality is evident in the well trained and polite staff.

Name: El Palauet Royal Suites & Events
Description:
Declarado Patrimonio Histórico-Artístico de Barcelona en 1979, El Palauet se emplaza en la antigua Casa Bonaventura Ferrer, emblemático edificio modernista situado en el número 113 del Paseo de Gracia, obra del arquitecto Pere Falqués i Urpí en 1906.

El edificio, íntegramente remodelado en 2010, es hoy un edificio de lujo que conserva el encanto modernista original combinado con elementos de última tecnología, para proporcionar una experiencia única donde belleza, historia y confort son los protagonistas.

Name: Grand Hotel Italia ***** Cluj-Napoca
Description:
Grand Hotel Italia ***** din Cluj-Napoca face parte din prestigiosul grup hotelier Select Hotels Collection și vă invită să descoperiți o experiență autentică de lux.

Cu o panoramă spectaculoasă asupra orașului, oferim un cadru elegant și servicii de înaltă clasă, pentru ca fiecare sejur să fie definit de confort și rafinament. Ne aflăm într-o locație ușor accesibilă, la doar 20 de minute de Aeroportul Internațional Cluj-Napoca și aproape de centrul istoric al orașului.

Vă punem la dispoziție 187 de camere spațioase, un American Bar unde vă puteți bucura de cocktailuri și seri muzicale, două restaurante cu preparate sofisticate, un centru de conferințe echipat la cele mai înalte standarde, un SPA dedicat relaxării și cea mai mare sală de fitness din Cluj-Napoca.

Vă așteptăm să descoperiți eleganța, confortul și ospitalitatea care definesc Grand Hotel Italia - Wellness & SPA!

Name: Sandipani Hometel
Description:
Sandipani Hometel by Symbiosis is the only University hotel in India. It provides beautifully curated suites and rooms near Symbiosis International University, Lavale Pune.

Sandipani Hometel is one of the best places in West Pune with our Leadership Development Centre, a premium residential training facility. Located in the picturesque setting on a hilltop admit lush green mountains at Lavale. It is part of Symbiosis International University campus. 

We have total 98 fully furnished comfortable rooms. All rooms are equipped with a Television set with DTH, Tea/Coffee Maker, Mini Fridge and Air Conditioning etc. 

Inhouse we have two restaurants - Mkahawa Café - Multi Cuisine All Day Dining, Cibo Bello - Pizza Restaurant. 

We have 12,000 sq. ft. lawn which can be used for Yoga Sessions, team building exercise etc. 

We have 8 training/ banquets rooms. All these banquet rooms are air conditioned, LCD Projector, AV System, White Board and comfortable seating. 

Sandipani Hometel is close to Hinjewadi IT Park, NH4, Pirangut MIDC with easy access to the major sightseeing attractions in and around Pune City.

Name: Jhore Jole Jongole
Description: The Jhore Jole Jongole Resort offers cost-effective accommodation amidst the wilderness of Sundarbans. It is a popular option that offers you not only a unique wildlife experience but also a taste of nature. This exclusive property in Sundarbans National Park is truly unique due to its stunning exterior and aesthetic interior. While staying here, you can also enjoy beautiful sunrises and sunsets on the confluence of Matla & Herobhanga Rivers. The Sundarban resort is surrounded by a lake where you can see gorgeous migratory birds, whose sweet chirping is something that one cannot resist even in dreams.

All rooms come with bed linen. Guests can enjoy a variety of breakfast options, including à la carte, Full English/Irish, and Asian. The hostel provides bike hire for cycling enthusiasts. Name: Zaffron Resort Santorini
Description: As its five stars generously give their light, Radisson Blu Zaffron Resort sets the most brilliant example of how the ideal escape from everyday life can be. This adults-friendly resort is a discreet, luxurious oasis of relaxation, where two timeless elements, the boho-chic and the Cycladic, complement each other, building an incomparable mosaic of aesthetics. But accommodation is not a mere matter of forms. The gastronomy, the facilities, and the staff are part of a lively, unforgettable hospitality experience.

Name: Sandman Signature Glasgow Hotel
Description:
The brand-new Sandman Signature Glasgow Hotel will open in spring 2023. Whether you’re joining us for business or leisure, a seamless mixture of modern luxury and Scottish charm will make for the perfect stay. 

Within the property itself, this modern 4* hotel boasts 179 stunning bedrooms and suites along with two event spaces for private dining, corporate events and intimate parties. Elsewhere, guests will find a fitness centre and a stunning onsite bar and restaurant, Chop Grill & Bar.

Situated in-between Glasgow City Centre and the West End, allow us to be your base as you explore Glasgow’s fabulous shopping, incredible food scene and vibrant events industry. History and culture more your thing? Mere steps away you’ll find Glasgow Cathedral, Glasgow Necropolis and Kelvingrove Art Gallery and Museum to name a few.

Name: Hotel City Maribor****

The Terasa restaurant on the fifth floor of Hotel City Maribor**** will enchant you with its large terrace and its exceptional view of the surroundings. Indulge in gourmet pleasures and indulge your taste buds, with uniquely prepared food adapted to the seasons and accompanied by top wines.
