Name: Orange County and Resorts Private Ltd
Description: Orange County Resorts and Hotels Ltd., a public limited Company incorporated under the Companys Act 1956, opened its first resort at Coorg in 1994. Built on the theme of Coffee, Spice & Plantation Life to reflect the true spirit of Coorg, the resortï¿½s target was the discerning up market traveler. The resort is situated amidst three hundred acres of coffee and spice plantations, flanked on one side by the Dubare Reserve Forest and the river Cauvery on the other. From its inception, this beautifully themed working plantation resort has married the finest guest facilities with outstanding service standards to offer its guests an idyllic retreat into a bygone, more relaxed era of gentleman planters.

Name: The Punarnava Wellness Resort
Description:
The Punarnava Resort is nestled in the scintillating sublime region of Uttarakhand Himalayas in Northern India and exhibits harmonic coexistence with nature. Renowned as ‘Devbhumi’, Uttarakhand (A land of the Gods), this region is blessed with natural beauty, divinity, and spiritual vibrations.

We welcome you at this unique luxurious wellness destination aesthetically parked in the dense forest of Mussoorie with a spectacular & stunning George Everest Mountain View. Imbibe the holistic Lifestyle experience in this awe-inspiring existential nature of mystical divinity. Rejoice in the transformation of inner rejuvenation and inner awakening

Name: Hotel Balkan Belgrade
Description: Located at the corner of Terazije and Prizrenska Street in the heart of Belgrade, the iconic Hotel Balkan has stood since 1860 as a symbol of cultural heritage. Despite numerous renovations, the hotel has preserved the unique spirit of its original era, making it a cherished destination for both Serbian and international cultural elites. Today, Hotel Balkan invites you to experience a seamless blend of modern design and timeless tradition in its luxurious rooms and suites. The hotel features 75 rooms, a special national restaurant, conference room and a spa facility.

Name: HOTEL TAMISA GOLF
Description:
El nuevo Hotel Tamisa Golf ofrece una experiencia inigualable, combinando lujo y naturaleza con vistas espectaculares a la montaña y al campo de Mijas Golf de primer nivel y a tan sólo 10 minutos de las espectaculares playas de Fuengirola y La Cala de Mijas. Ubicado en un entorno idílico, el hotel se integra perfectamente con el paisaje, ofreciendo a los huéspedes un refugio de tranquilidad y sofisticación.

En nuestro hotel, cada estancia se convierte en una experiencia única, donde el confort, el estilo y la belleza natural se combinan para crear recuerdos inolvidables. Las habitaciones y suites están diseñadas con un estilo único, elegante y contemporáneo.

Name: Bizz The Hotel
Description:
BIZZ the Hotel, Rajkot, reflects the capital city, then of Saurashtra’s spirit in a harmonious blend of contemporary sophistication
and western outfit. Recognized as a pioneer and an icon amongst luxury and business hotels in Rajkot, BIZZ the Hotel Rajkot, is the
first hotel to offer a 24 hour Butler service. Its exquisite interiors, impeccable service and fine cuisine combine to make it amongst
the most graceful and elegant downtown hotels in Gujarat.
BIZZ the Hotel, Rajkot is ideally located in the city center on Dr. Yagnik Road near government / corporate offices, shopping,
financial and business districts. The hotel is a 07 minute drive from the airport and 11 minutes away from the Rajkot railway station.
BIZZ the Hotel offers an exciting range of dining options that include multi-cuisine dishes, a rooftop barbeque` restaurant, a 24
hours Coffee Shop, the cake shoppe and the private dining room, especially for Elite Guests wishing to dine in a very private
environment.
The hotel's business centre offers private meeting spaces with a focus on comfort and convenience. Unrivalled in meticulous
appointments, refined design details and impeccable service, it offers the best of modern technology. Extensive conference and
banquet spaces provide an ideal venue for larger events and meetings.

Name: The Campbell House Lexington, Curio Collection by Hilton
Description:
In the heart of the bluegrass, where modern equestrian character meets a storied past. 

Featuring 250 guest rooms and suites, and 25,000 square feet of flexible function space, we can accommodate everything from board meetings to conventions. The Campbell House Lexington, Curio Collection by Hilton is the perfect location for business travel, groups, meetings and social events.

Convenient and centrally located near downtown, our hotel is just 4 miles from the legendary Keeneland Racecourse and Blue Grass Airport. The Campbell House Lexington, Curio Collection by Hilton is moments away from the Kentucky Horse Park, University of Kentucky, local corporate parks, government offices, St. Joseph’s Hospital and other medical facilities. We are in close proximity to many local dining, shopping and entertainment venues.

Whether you are seeking a personalized experience for your next business trip, an inspirational setting for your next meeting or the perfect backdrop for an unforgettable wedding, your adventure into a world of beauty, luxury and tranquility awaits you at The Campbell House Lexington, Curio Collection by Hilton!

Name: Vacbid

Name: Four Points By Sheraton Queretaro
Description:
Travel differently in our modern Queretaro, Mexico hotel
Located in Juriquilla, Four Points by Sheraton Queretaro Norte is perfectly situated for business travelers and pleasure seekers. Our hotel is near the Queretaro Trade Center and the industrial park for easy access to meetings and local companies. Vacationing visitors will love how close we are to Parque Bicentenario, a family-friendly theme park, and Antea Life Style Center, the biggest mall in Latin America. Everything you need for a pleasant stay can be found in our spacious rooms. Stay in touch with complimentary Wi-Fi, ergonomic workstations and our business center. Work out in our well-equipped fitness center, then swim in our refreshing outdoor pool to cool off. Gather with friends, family, or colleagues in our restaurant and bar, where only the freshest ingredients are used. If you’re planning a meeting or event, our professional team will help you choose from our function rooms and plan every detail. At the end of the night, get a peaceful night of sleep at Four Points by Sheraton Queretaro Norte.

Name: Ramada Encore by Wyndham Lucknow Airport
Description:
Welcome to Ramada Encore by Wyndham Lucknow Airport Hotel, your perfect home away from home as you travel. Step off the aircraft and step in to comfort and care, without missing a beat. 

The hotel offers modern design and comfortable amenities, making your stay a pleasant experience. Guests can enjoy our Express Breakfast and complimentary Wi-Fi, ensuring a seamless start to the day. For travelers needing a quick refresh before their flight or during short stopovers, our unique Hourly Stay Offers provide the perfect solution. Plus, discover a better way to eat with our delicious range of millet-based dishes, adding energy and nutrition to your journey.

Name: Hotel Parichey
Description: Hotel Parichay in Rewari H O, Rewari is a reliable name in the industry as they aim to deliver the best experience to their customers. This has helped them build up a loyal customer base. Name: The Hardiman
Description:
An Iconic Galway Landmark With An Intriguing History.
Standing proudly on the famous Eyre Square since 1852, The Hardiman Hotel offers generous hospitality with a familiar, easy charm that makes guests feel right at home. For over a century and a half, this Grand Old Lady has played host to many notable guests and countless special occasions. Now it’s your turn to be part of this long tradition.

The Hardiman is a flawless combination of Victorian grace and opulent luxury. Located right in the heart of Galway City, just a one-minute walk from the main transport hubs. Whether you are joining us for pleasure, or are here on business, the beating heart of our city is right on your doorstep.

Perfectly positioned – Within strolling distance of all the best amenities that Galway has to offer. From bars and theatres to restaurants and historical sights, you’re right in the centre of Galway’s bohemian social scene.

Name: Golden Tulip Hotel Bahrain Manama
Description: The 5-star Golden Tulip Bahrain hotel features banqueting and conference rooms. A Health club including a Swimming Pool, exercise rooms, steam room, sauna, and massage rooms is also available.

Name: Hotel Crystal Pashupati
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Hotel Crystal Pashupati, a distinguished hospitality establishment in Kathmandu, Nepal and a proud member of the Trade Tower Group. Located just steps away from the iconic Pashupatinath Temple and less than 1 km from the International Airport, we offer a unique blend of comfort and cultural immersion.

At Hotel Crystal Pashupati, we uphold the values of excellence and service that define the Trade Tower Group. Whether for business or leisure, our accommodations, including double and family bed configurations, are designed to meet diverse guest needs. With modern amenities and a focus on guest satisfaction, we strive to ensure every experience is exceptional.

Join us on our journey as we deliver authentic Nepalese hospitality and uphold the highest standards of hospitality within the Trade Tower Group family.

Name: Albion Hotel Freshwater
Description:
Set against the dramatic backdrop of Freshwater Bay, The Albion is a four-star coastal hotel offering understated luxury on the edge of the Isle of Wight. 

Recently reimagined, the hotel pairs raw natural beauty with refined comfort, where tidal rhythms meet calm interiors and every detail is designed to feel both effortless and exceptional.
 
With a heritage stretching back over 300 years, The Albion has long been a place of rest and retreat. That legacy lives on through a quiet dedication to genuine hospitality,  warm, attentive, and deeply personal. 
 
At the heart of the hotel is The Rock, our 100-seat restaurant with spectacular sea views. Airy and relaxed, its full-length windows open out to a sun-drenched terrace just steps from the shore. The menu is as inviting as the setting, thoughtful, seasonal and full of flavour. It’s a place to unwind, indulge and take in one of the most beautiful views the island has to offer.
 
Whether you're planning a peaceful escape, a special celebration or simply a long lunch by the sea, we’d love to welcome you to The Albion.

Name: Bliss Hoi An Beach Resort & Wellness
Description:

Name: Roatel Holding AG
Description: Roatel ist ein innovatives Unternehmen aus Düsseldorf, das die Hotellerie revolutioniert und ein einzigartiges Hotelkonzept bietet: Hier in Deutschland werden Überseecontainer recycelt und zu hochwertigen Mikrohotels mit vier komfortablen Einzelzimmern umgebaut, die allen Bedürfnissen eines Gastes gerecht werden. Von einem Duschbad, über einen Tisch mit Sitzgelegenheit bis hin zu einem gemütlichen Bett mit Smart TV und kostenlosem WLAN - alles auf 7.5 Quadratmetern. Die Lieferung und der Aufbau des Roatels dauern nur einen Tag. Es ist vollständig mobil und kann überall und jederzeit auf- und abgebaut sowie modular erweitert werden. Das stellt einen großen Vorteil im Vergleich zu herkömmlichen Hotels dar. Auch der Instandhaltungsaufwand ist minimal, da die Roatels dezentral verwaltet werden und keine Rezeption benötigen. Gebucht und eingecheckt wird digital über das Smartphone! Die eigene Buchungs- und Vertriebsplattform basiert auf einem CRM-System und einem Projektmanagement-Tool sowie smarter Technologie wie künstlicher Intelligenz, die das System noch effizienter machen soll. Zusätzlich arbeiten wir aktiv an der Entwicklung eines KI-basierten Chatbots und fortschrittlicher Datenanalyse.

Name: Willa Kraj
Description:
„Willa Kraj”, to pełen uroku i elegancji pensjonat, położony w samym sercu uzdrowiska Ustroń. Nasza doskonała lokalizacja, niedaleko od Rynku (ok. 200 m) i rzeki Wisły (ok. 300 m) stanowi niebywały atut dla naszych gości, którzy doceniają łatwy dostęp do wszystkich atrakcji uzdrowiska, oraz bliską odległość do tras pieszych, narciarskich i rowerowych. W pobliżu naszego obiektu, przebiegają liczne trasy oraz piesze szlaki turystyczne wiodące na góry: Równicę, Czantorię, Trzy Kopce i inne. 
Dla miłośników „białego szaleństwa”, jest równie blisko do wyciągu narciarskiego Zawodzie (2 km) oraz do kompleksu rekreacyjnego Extreme Park (6 km). Odległość od Cieszyna i Bielsko-Białej,  wynosi odpowiednio 15 i 33 km.

NASZA HISTORIA

Wartym podkreślenia jest fakt, iż posiadamy ponad stu letnią, uzdrowiskową tradycję. Nasz obiekt, mieści się bowiem w zabytkowym budynku z 1900 r., 
w którym to, już od ponad stu lat wypoczywają kuracjusze zażywając nie tylko zdrowego, górskiego klimatu ale również odmładzających zabiegów czy spacerów wśród zieleni miejskich parków.

DLACZEGO MY?

„Willi Kraj” to kameralny, położony wsród gór i zieleni pensjonat, który 
oddaje do Państwa dyspozycji stylowo urządzone, eleganckie  pokoje z łazienkami oraz komfortowe apartamenty z wannowym systemem  hydromasażu. Po wspaniale przespanej nocy, serdecznie zapraszamy naszych gości na znakomite śniadania, do naszej willowej restauracji.
Pensjonat „Willa Kraj” wyróżnia się bogatą ofertą dla Zdrowia i Piękna, oferując szereg usług kosmetycznych, pedologicznych, fryzjerskich oraz własne studio budowania sylwetki.
Posiadamy również biznesową ofertę dla firm, oferując pobyty dla grupy szkoleniowych, organizację konferencji czy imprez integracyjnych, oddając do Państwa dyspozycji przestronną, bogato wyposażona  salę konferencyjną na 60 osób.

Dodatkowo, dysponujemy dla naszych wszystkich gości, zewnętrznym ogrodem z miejscem do grillowania oraz wspólną, w pełni wyposażoną kuchnią.

Name: Entre Os Ríos - Casa Rural y Enoturismo
Description:
Un Casa rural por habitaciones en A Pobra do Caramiñal, en el campo, a 3 kms. de las playas de la plácida Ría de Arousa, provincia de A Coruña, Galicia.
Entre Os Ríos es una pequeña aldea de antiguos molineros con 300 años de antigüedad situada en medio del río Pedras que se abre en dos formando una isla, de ahí el nombre de Entre Os Ríos.
En el año 2001 se terminó la rehabilitación de todas las casas manteniendo la idea original de los antiguos molineros; edificios integrados entre sí, cada uno cumple una función determinada,  dispuestos alrededor de una pequeña plaza, de ahí viene la definición como casa de aldea.

Desde el 2010, la casa rural cuenta con la Q de Calidad turística  distintivo que se otorga a aquellos establecimientos turísticos que cumplen unos mínimos requisitos específicos exigidos en el Instituto de Calidad Turística Español (ICTE) en cuanto a prestación de servicio.

Nuestra filosofía es ofrecer a nuestros huéspedes un trato familiar y cercano, centrado en la atención al detalle para que nuestros huéspedes se sientan como en casa y puedan disfrutar de ese descanso en la naturaleza que se merecen. 
El agua, la tranquilidad y el vino albariño son las señas de identidad de esta casa rural.
Location: A POBRA DO CARAMIÑAL, A Coruña

Name: ONENESS Rishikesh - A Luxury Wilderness Resort
Description:
Cocooned in the embrace of the Lower Shivalik mountain range, emerges ONENESS, a harmonious tapestry of river, flora and fauna.

A luxury wilderness resort located 30 km beyond the town of Rishikesh in a riverside forested area, ONENESS is accessible exclusively on our private rafts. Our 12 Luxury Cottages are flanked on either side by 2 private white-sand beaches while the majestic River Ganga flows sinuously by.

We share this vibrant mountain with monkeys, langurs, wild cats and the elusive Black Bear and the skies with hundreds of bird species, including the enchanting Scarlet Minivet, melodious Himalayan Bulbul and River Lapwing. The canvas of ONENESS is painted with a rich palette of Sal, Haldu, Figs, and Mulberry trees, creating a biodiverse haven. The Camp's commitment to ecology is evident in the meticulous plantation of 30,000 saplings of over 50 medicinal plants, not merely for beauty but for environmental balance. Every tree becomes a guardian, contributing to the thriving ecosystem that underlines the camp's ethos.

As the Ganges flows below, echoing the sacred energy of Devprayag, located 30 km away via road, spirituality becomes intertwined with the very essence of ONENESS. The presence of the old Badrinath pilgrimage pedestrian pathway nearby, worn smooth by generations of seekers, elevates the Camp's inherent ambience.

We welcome you to a sanctum where every step is a dance with the Himalayan breeze, and every breath harmonises with the mountains' heartbeat—a testament to the eternal pursuit of ONENESS.

Name: Riad Botanica
Description:
Opened in Jan 2023 Riad Botanica is a place to reconnect to yourself, indulge your senses and reinvigorate your curiosity and wonder of the beauty that is LIFE, where luxury meets tranquillity. 
Recently renovated to an immaculate standard, this project has been a labour of love for an Australian/ Moroccan team merging art deco styles from both countries with careful consideration to the traditional craftsmanship of the local artisans and the awareness of the need for spaces and places for people to unwind and reconnect, with nature and themselves ... 

We invite you to discover an oasis for your soul in the historic 10th-century Medina of Marrakesh. Riad Botanica has undergone an enormous renovation journey that celebrates local Moroccan artisans’ skills and uses traditional materials that all come together with an Australian flair. 
We have the pleasure of offering four deluxe suites a two-bedroom suite, a pool, a dining terrace and a rooftop bar. 

They say Paris is for lovers, we say Marrakech is also for lovers of design and culture. Marrakech is a vibrant fusion of Africa, Middle Eastern, and European influences. This ancient city is a pilgrimage-worthy destination for fans of architecture and design and one of the most quintessential expressions of Moroccan style are Riads.
Learn more https://riadbotanica.com/

Located at a premium area, the hotel offers guests a magnificent panoramic view of the Mediterranean Sea, all the way from the sunrise above the Cavo Greco to the sunset over the Ayia Napa Marina and beyond.

Name: Aaradhay Management Services

Aaradhay Management Services is a leading hotel management company committed to redefining hospitality standards. Based in Mahabaleshwar, India, we specialize in providing comprehensive management solutions that enhance hotel operations, elevate guest experiences, and maximize profitability.

With a team of seasoned professionals, we offer expertise in property management, revenue optimization, branding, staff training, and customer service excellence. Our goal is to help hotel owners and investors streamline operations while delivering unparalleled hospitality.

At Aaradhay Management Services, we believe in a customer-centric approach, leveraging innovation and industry best practices to create seamless and memorable experiences. From boutique hotels to luxury resorts, we tailor our solutions to meet the unique needs of each property, ensuring operational efficiency and sustainable growth.

Our commitment to quality, service excellence, and strategic management makes us a trusted partner in the hospitality industry. Whether you are looking to enhance guest satisfaction, improve operational efficiency, or boost revenue, Aaradhay Management Services is your go-to expert for success in the dynamic world of hospitality. 

Our success is driven by a team of seasoned professionals with diverse backgrounds in hospitality, management, and technology. Each member of our team brings a wealth of experience and a passion for excellence that permeates every project we undertake. We believe that a collaborative culture and a commitment to continuous improvement are key to delivering exceptional results. Our team is dedicated to staying at the forefront of industry trends, investing in training and technology that enable us to offer innovative solutions tailored to the evolving needs of our clients.

Name: Prins Hendrik Suites
Description:
Welcome to "Prins Hendrik Suites"

We are located in one of the beautiful monumental buildings in the historic heart of Paramaribo.

Prins Hendrik ( Schwerlin, 19 april 1876 ) was married to Queen Wilhemina of the Netherlands. Suriname was a colony of the Netherlands from 1667 until 1954. In 1954 Suriname became a sovereign country within the Kingdom of the Netherlands and became independent in 1975 as the Republic of Suriname. 

Rest, relax or read a book in one of the hammocks in our beautiful garden and enjoy the benefits of being on walking distance to all main attractions and restaurants.

Since 2023, Queen Maxima has been opened as a new location. We offer three independent and fully facilitated apartments with a kitchen, big garden, balcony, and jacuzzi. At Queen Maxima we also offer a luxurious and spacious villa, called Claus-Casimir. With all conveniences and privacy, our guests have the possibility to relax in the hammock's or jacuzzi and enjoy the garden.

Make yourself at home in one of our luxurious suites at our different locations in the heart of Paramaribo, each stylishly furnished for your convenience with free use of wireless internet, minibar and other amenities that the business or leisure traveler needs. 

Prins Hendrik Suites and Queen Maxima are smoke- and pet free. We also offer free off-street parking.

Never pay too much, booking directly with Prins Hendrik Suites is always cheaper!

Name: Saillant Hotels
Description:
Saillant Hotels is een collectie van kleinschalige en unieke hotels, allen gelegen in het prachtige Zuid-Limburgse heuvelland.

Overnacht u bij Saillant dan bent u verzekerd van een geweldige ervaring. Wij onthalen u met bourgondische flair en gastvrijheid en helpen u graag het beste uit uw verblijf in Zuid-Limburg te halen.

De Saillant Hotels vormen een ideale uitvalsbasis voor een gastronomisch weekend, een heerlijke wandel- of fietsvakantie of een spontane lastminute. Bekijk onze verrassende hotelarrangementen en aanbiedingen en laat u inspireren!

Bangalore | Chikmaglur | kabini

Jungle Trailz resort started as a small entity serving guests near Nagarahole National Park, having 10 yrs of experience in hospitality industry It expanded its operations at Masinagudi, Mudumalai Wildlife Sanctuary (Now Closed) then at Kabini (Home stay) , Bheemeshwari, Sakleshpur, Chikmagalur and now in Bangalore (Adventure Hub).

With vast experience we always have maintained the properties very hygienic, neat bathrooms and surroundings. As we are basically into nature conservation, Trekking, Camping and Wildlife Photography. We extend all these services to our guests.


Srikanth Kumar GP Founder & Director, himself is into wildlife photography & conservation & has 20 yrs of experience. He believes strongly in giving best Food & Bed experience to the guests, which has showed a good success rate in past.

Name: Balvanyos Resort
Description:
Balvanyos Resort is located in the heart of Romania, on foothills of Carpathian Mountains within a privileged protected natural area, offering a unique view of the surrounding mountains. The Resort offers the ideal conditions for an unforgettable escape from the hectic urban life, every season for both individuals and families as well as for groups and corporate clients.

The Resort encompasses two 4-star hotel: Grand Hotel Balvanyos**** and Peakture Hotel Balvanyos****, the unique wellness center - Grand Santerra Spa, Balvanyos Adventure Park, and 4 restaurants each with different specialty.

Balvanyos Resort offers 170 individually designed rooms, with high standard facilities offering comfort, relaxation and unforgettable experiences while savoring the breathtaking views.

Grand Santerra Spa is an oasis of tranquility offering complete experiences with 2 different Spas - a Spa for Adults Only and one dedicated to families with children.
The treatments and activities that we offer are suited to all those, who are looking to improve their lifestyle and wish to recharge their batteries or chose to start to implement certain preventative rituals/treatments in their daily lives. 

We belief that health needs a new approach, and prevention is the medicine of the future. The spa is representing a concern for better health for centuries. 

Nature gives us all the necessary tools for a healthy living and even for healing.

Name: Borghamn Strand
Description:
Mitt på Östgötaslätten, utmed Vättern, reser sig Omberg där Borghamn Strand vilar i en naturskön miljö. Hela området är byggnads- och kulturminnesmärkt och ett arbetslivsmuseum. Det är också Vadstenas enda industriella kulturminne och en fantastisk plats för möten, aktiviteter, konferenser och fester i en historisk miljö, strategiskt placerad mellan Göteborg och Stockholm.

Här finns en historisk promenadslinga med informativa skyltar. Två grillplatser står till gästernas förfogande, med möjlighet för en vildmarkskonferens där ni själva kan laga mat. Zipline finns inom en mils avstånd, vandringsleder och kajakuthyrning finns utanför dörren. Bastu och badtunna hittar ni ute på piren.

Vår restaurang och vårt café lagar all mat från grunden. Vi serverar bland annat fisk från Vättern, vilt kött, såsom hjort och vildsvin, samt veganska- och vegetariska rätter utifrån egna recept med lokalproducerade och ekologiska råvaror så långt det går. 

Ni kan även övernatta i våra 84 bäddar som är fördelade på 29 unika, TV fria rum i fem olika byggnader med olika standard, allt från hotellrum med dusch och toalett, till enkla och fräscha vandrarhemsrum med dusch och toalett i korridoren. Vi har även små stugor med dusch och toalett i annan byggnad, flerbäddsrum och ett familjerum med sex bäddar. 

Två större konferenssalar för 120 personer och ett mindre grupprum för 12 personer finns till våra konferensgästerns förfogande. 
Mer information hittar ni på vår hemsida
https://www.borghamn.com/
Maila till oss gärna om offert på info@borghamn.com 
Välkomna

Description: Welcome to Maritim Resort Calabria, the place where you can experience much more than just a simple vacation. Thanks to our All-Inclusive formula, the beauty of a unique resort in Southern Italy, the quality of the services offered, and the warm smile we’ve always been known for, every stay at Maritim is made unforgettable. Name: Azevim Nature, Turismo
Description:
Azevim Nature - Turismo Lda é um projeto familiar que iniciou em 2020, através da paixão por bem receber e da paisagem apaixonante do Parque Nacional Peneda-Gerês.
Este projeto surgiu da lacuna existente na gestão de propriedades turísticas na região do Alto Minho, que levou os fundadores a largar a vida da cidade pela pacatez da vida do campo e investir na sua paixão pela natureza e pelo carinho de bem receber quem
visitava o norte de Portugal.
Ao longo dos anos, mais proprietários demonstraram as suas preocupações e levaram a que este projeto ganhasse asas e se tornasse na marca Azevim Nature.
E assim nasceu um projeto integrado de gestão de alojamento turístico, organização de atividades de entretenimento turístico e Agência de Viagens e Turismo no Alto Minho.
O seu objetivo é promover e divulgar experiências num ambiente rural, onde os clientes podem combinar o conforto do alojamento com atividades da natureza. E os proprietários obtenham um usufruto mais rentável, despreocupado e de qualidade do seu imóvel. Aqui encontrará espaços especialmente preparados para desfrutar de uma estadia agradável e memorável, com um ponto em comum: estar num ambiente rural rodeado pelas mais belas paisagens do Parque Nacional Peneda-Gerês e do maravilhoso Alto Minho!

Name: SIFNOS HOUSE
Description: Sifnos House offers hospitality in the comfort of a house and the luxury of a hotel.

Name: Hotel Kanalhuset
Description:
Kanalhuset opened in 2020 in a historic building from 1754.
On the historic island Christianshavn you will find Kanalhuset along the Christianshavn Canal. With a view over the canal and the tall masts we are located in the middle of Copenhagen; 300 meters from Christianshavn metro station and across the bridge from the Royal Theatre, Nyhavn, Amalienborg Castle and the main shopping street Strøget. The building contains 12 hotel rooms, large and small meeting rooms, 14 hotel apartments, a Bar and a restaurant where we share a meal every evening at 19.00 in the Dining room.
Yoga, Crochet & Knitting, Running Club are also activities that takes place during the week at Kanalhuset

We are open every day from 7.00 am – 10 pm for breakfast, lunch, coffee, dinner and drinks.

Name: Two Bridges Hotel Dartmoor
Description:
The iconic Two Bridges Hotel can be found in a stunning riverside setting in the heart of Dartmoor National Park. The comfortable and characterful bedrooms include cosy country-style rooms and indulgent Premier rooms with the added luxury of an antique four poster bed. Dine on some of the best  Devon ingredients of the season, and taste fine ales from the hotel's own Dartmoor Brewery. The elegant Fountain Room provides the perfect setting for memorable wedding celebrations, special occasions, conferences and meetings. 

The Two Bridges Hotel is the perfect spot for a break away in the heart of Dartmoor National Park, and also offers a full range of facilities for meetings, conferences and events, including:

The Fountain Room - the hotel's flagship events space, seating up to 110 for banqueting and conferences

The Georgian Room - private dining and meetings for up to 20

The hotel's stunning gardens, surrounded by Dartmoor's unique natural beauty, have plenty of space for team-building activities and relaxation.

Name: Dolce by Wyndham Hollywood
Description:
A Heavenly Escape to Hollywood!
Boutique hotel with Sabbath amenities near Seminole Hard Rock Casino and Hollywood Beach.
Framed by swaying palm trees and conveniently situated in the center of the city, Dolce by Wyndham Hollywood is an inspired vacation destination in sunny southern Florida. Located 12 miles from Fort Lauderdale - Hollywood International Airport (FLL), our modern, non-smoking hotel is minutes from 24/7 gaming at Seminole Hard Rock Casino, the warm white sand of Hollywood Beach, and the lively Hollywood Beach Boardwalk—boasting shops, bars, and restaurants. Catch a performance at the ArtsPark at Young Circle, enjoy native vegetation and wildlife on a stroll through the mangrove wetland at Anne Kolb Nature Center, or play a lush course like Hollywood Beach Golf Club. 

Our hotel is thoughtfully tailored with amenities like a kosher rooftop restaurant and bar, Shabbat elevator that automatically stops on every floor, and manual room keys. Take a dip in the sparkling rooftop pool and stay fit in the state-of-the-art gym. You’ll love relaxing in one of our 100 spacious guest rooms, appointed with luxurious mattresses and bedding, a floor-to-ceiling black marble bathroom, and flat-screen HDTV with premium movie channels. For the ultimate Hollywood visit, book a retreat with a private balcony featuring scenic city views. Stay connected with free high-speed WiFi and a business center, look your best thanks to dry cleaning and laundry service, and take advantage of valet parking. Our 24/7 front desk staff is on standby for anything you need.

Name: Frich´s hoteller og spisesteder
Description:
Frich´s er en fremtredende kjede innen hotell- og restaurantbransjen, kjent for sitt brede spekter av overnattings- og spisesteder. Med en årlig omsetning på over 160 millioner kroner, er kjeden en betydelig aktør i bransjen, og støttes av omtrent 350 dedikerte medarbeidere.

Kjedens mangfoldige tilbud inkluderer Frich´s Hotel Hamar, Wood Hotel by Frich´s, Frich´s Rudshøgda, Jafs Rudshøgda, Maihaugen by Frich´s, Kunstkafeen by Frich´s, Telemarkstunet by Frich´s, Ilsetra by Frich´s, Dale-Gudbrands Gard by Frich´s, Frich´s Dombås, Jafs Dombås, Ljoshaugen by Frich´s, Basecamp Hjerkinn, Kongsvold Fjellstue by Frich´s, Frich´s Alvdal, Jafs Alvdal, Frich´s Åndalsnes, samt Dovre & Lesja Aktiv. Alle disse stedene drives under Frich´s Management, som bidrar til å gjøre Frich´s til en av de mest betydningsfulle lokale aktørene i regionens overnattings- og restaurantbransje.

Name: Nawan Hotel Serrano
Description: Located at the gateway to the North of Cordoba, on National Route 9 in Sinsacate, a few kilometers from Jesús María, NAWAN invites you to live a unique experience in our comfortable and modern facilities; where architecture, hospitality, recreation, landscape and tranquility combine to offer you a perfect stay. We have private  spaces and the best service to organize all your business events.

Name: Sitaram Retreat
Description:
For over 104 years, Sitaram has stood as a beacon of authentic Ayurveda, caring for generations with integrity, wisdom, and a healing touch. Rooted in the timeless traditions of Kerala and guided by an unwavering commitment to quality, we continue to be a trusted companion for those seeking balance, vitality, and true holistic wellness.

We believe that true healing in Ayurveda rests on two pillars: the wisdom and guidance (kaipunya) of an experienced doctor (Vaidya), and an environment that nurtures recovery. With this understanding, Dr Vignesh Devraj MD (Ay), an Ayurvedic physician founded  Sitaram Retreats, a sanctuary where clinical experience  meets the healing power of Nature.

Our Retreats

Sitaram Beach Retreat, Thalikulam: On the gentle shores of the Arabian Sea lies Sitaram Beach Retreat, a sanctuary where ocean waves become your healing soundtrack. The seaside energy, open skies, and Ayurvedic treatments create a rare space of deep calm. Here, healing feels effortless and as natural as the rhythm of the tides.

Sitaram Mountain Retreat, Munnar: Nestled amidst misty tea plantations, the Sitaram Mountain Retreat offers a cocoon of serenity. The cool mountain air, panoramic landscapes, and quietude make it a haven for introspection and renewal. Every sunrise in Munnar is an invitation to reset and rediscover balance within.

The Postcard Ayurveda Retreat, A Sitaram Ayurveda Experience: Amid the historic soul of Old Goa lies Sitaram X The Postcard Hotel, overlooking serene forest reserves. Anchored by a majestic 300-year-old banyan tree, this retreat embodies stillness and heritage. Here, Ayurveda meets soulful living, where every stay is intimate, restorative, and uniquely yours.

Name: Errigal Country House Hotel
Description:
Welcome to the 4 star Errigal Country House Hotel in Cootehill, County Cavan
 Best rate guarantee Located 90 min from both Dublin and Belfast  In the heart of Irish Countryside.

Name: Belong
Description:
“If to be is only to be, then to belong is to be long, adding time, setting root and enduring the ever-changing landscape.”
Belong was born in 2012. It came from a vision, a bound between place and being, and tried to give shape to a meaning, establishing a notion of community, while setting in motion a circular economy.
It also brought sense and order to different areas, from farming and gastronomic experiences, to hospitality and nature.

Name: Aldrov Resort
Description:
Horský rezidenční komplex s hotelovými službami.V osmi horských chatách bude umístěno celkem 139 moderních apartmánů v dispozicích 1+kk, 2+kk, 3+kk a 4+kk o velikosti od 37 do 119 m². Apartmány budou nabízeny jako plně vybavené včetně kuchyně, nábytku a veškerého vnitřního zařízení. Ke každému apartmánu náleží jedno podzemní parkovací stání a sklepní kóje pro uložení sezónního vybavení. Další dvě samostatné budovy pak budou vyhrazeny službám prvotřídního horského hotelu – recepci, službám concierge, wellness & spa, snídaňové lounge, restauraci s vinným barem nebo vlastní pekárně.

Aldrov Apartments & Resort se nachází doslova několik metrů od skiareálu Aldrov ve Vítkovicích v Krkonoších, který nabízí celkem pět sjezdových tratí všech stupňů obtížnosti a dva vleky včetně čtyřsedadlové lanovky. K dispozici je zde i dětský vlek a lyžařská škola. V dojezdové vzdálenosti 10 minut autem nebo skibusem leží Špindlerův Mlýn, který bude od roku 2021 propojen s Hromovkou a Svatým Petrem, čímž vznikne největší lyžařské středisko českých hor s celkovou délkou sjezdových tratí 40 km.

Name: Casa della Capra

We are located right in front of beautiful Lake Mergozzo, in northern Piemonte, near Val Grande National Park, Ossola Valley, Lake Maggiore and the Borromean Islands.

Name: Setsu Niseko I 雪ニセコ
Description:
Setsu Niseko offers an exemplary collection of 190 luxury hotel suites encompassing a beautiful synthesis of Japanese design with contemporary luxuries, to create a strong ‘sense of place’ and deep rooted respect for the surrounding alpine landscapes.  At Setsu Niseko, we believe that your holiday goes beyond the beauty of Niseko, to encompass the unique and special experiences and warm hospitality you enjoy along the way. With an elevated culinary and wellness experience, Setsu is a destination unto itself for every season. 

和の意匠と現代的なラグジュアリーの美しい融合が、周囲の山々への深い畏敬の念とこの場所に対する特別な想いを生み出す、雪ニセコの190室の贅沢な客室とスイートルームのコレクション。雪ニセコでの休日は、ニセコの美しさだけでなく、旅の途中で出会う一期一会の特別な体験や、温かいおもてなしも含めてお楽しみいただくものであると私たちは考えています。厳選された美食とウェルネス体験の待つ雪ニセコは、四季を通じてそれ自体が訪れるに値する旅の目的地です。

Name: The Grand Hotel In Asansol
Description: THE GRAND hotel is a landmark of luxury situated in the heart of Asansol. Luxuriously positioned with 60 rooms of different categories. Swimming pool and gym facility. Enjoy the f&b in separate multi cuisine vegetarian and non vegetarian restaurant.

Name: Embassy Suites by Hilton Orlando Sunset Walk
Description:
Experience the perfect blend of comfort and convenience at Embassy Suites by Hilton Orlando Sunset Walk. Featuring contemporary design, an atrium pool, and complimentary made-to-order breakfast, you can choose between spacious Studio, 1-Bedroom, or 2-Bedroom Suites for a relaxing stay.
 
Take advantage of our fitness center, outdoor heated pool, and daily evening reception offering complimentary snacks and drinks from 5-6 PM. Located just half a mile from Island H2O Water Park and a quick 10-minute drive to Walt Disney World Resort, the hotel puts you close to top attractions.
 
Guests can also enjoy complimentary WiFi and a shuttle service to the Promenade at Sunset Walk, a vibrant destination with boutique shops, diverse dining options, and live entertainment. Whether unwinding at the hotel or exploring nearby attractions, Embassy Suites by Hilton Orlando Sunset Walk ensures a memorable getaway.

Name: Hotel Avalon Suites

 Accommodation Options:
The hotel features a range of fully furnished, self-catering apartments:
- Studio Apartments: 40–45m² with queen beds and en-suite bathrooms.
- Two-Bedroom Apartments: 80–95m², including garden units, with two queen beds and modern kitchens.
- Three-Bedroom Apartments: Spacious 110m² units ideal for families or business groups, featuring three queen beds and two bathrooms.

Each apartment includes a fully equipped kitchen, high-speed Wi-Fi, DStv, air conditioning, and in-unit laundry facilities.

 Amenities & Services
-Swimming Pool: 12m outdoor pool set in landscaped gardens.
- Shuttle Service: Reliable transportation for guests.
- On-Site Generator: Ensures uninterrupted power supply.
- Pre-Arrival Shopping: Option to have groceries stocked before arrival.

 Prime Location
The Max Hotel Sandton is ideally situated with quick access to:
- Sandton City: A premier shopping and dining destination.
- Gautrain Stations: Sandton and Rosebank stations for easy airport access.
- Wanderers Stadium and Golf Club: For sports enthusiasts.
- Melrose Arch: A vibrant mixed-use precinct.

Guests have praised the hotel for its cleanliness, friendly staff, and comfortable accommodations. 

For more information or to make a reservation, visit themaxhotelsandton.com.

Name: Villa Krokvik
Description:
Välkommen till unika Villa Krokvik som vi påstår är Europas minsta konferenscenter. Villa Krokvik erbjuder en väldigt unik mötesplats för max 8 personer och är beläget endast 15 minuter från Växjö centrum ute på en udde direkt vid Torsjöns strand. Här får ni alltid det lilla extra som gör att er viktiga konferens, kundmöte, utbildningsdag, planeringsdag alltid blir väldigt lyckad och minnesvärd. 

Wowfaktorn är extremt hög här på Villa Krokvik och här hänger ni som om ni vore hemma i ert eget vardagsrum och alla sällskap är alltid helt själva här ute på Villa Krokvik förutom personalen. Miljön är oerhört lugn och rofylld, ni har full tillgång till hela utomhusmiljön med allt från lusthus, spabadet på loungedäcket, bryggan med lilla mötespiren, grilludden och varför inte ta det viktiga mötesbeslutet roendes eller puttrandes på Torsjön ”ala Harpsund” med blekingesnipan ”Putt putt”

 Villa Krokviks inomhusmiljö är en blandning mellan modern ljus, rymlig enkelhet och en äldre 50-tals retromiljö i konferensdelen med många små spännande äldre detaljer. Samtidigt så finns alla moderna hjälpmedel såsom fiber och stor TV-monitor samt nödvändig modern konferensutrustning för att er mötesdag ska bli riktigt lyckad.

Villa Krokviks utomhusmiljö är en fröjd för ögat med det lilla lusthuset som är integrerat med det stora trädäcket med utekök, grill och matplats. Trädäcket knyter sedan ihop allt samman ut till den lilla bryggpiren med de trevliga ljugarbänkarna. Bakom det väldoftande kryddlandet sträcker sig den långa spången ut bland ljung, lingonris och blåbärsris. Halvvägs ut till loungedäcket med spa-badet kan ni ta en paus vid kärleksbänken och bara sitta och beundra all denna fantastiska Krokviksnatur. Lite längre bort finns grilludden där ni framåt kvällen sitter mysigt i skymningen framför den sprakande och värmande elden. 


En dag på Villa Krokvik är en unik och garanterat minnesvärd dag, med mycket god lokalproducerad mat som ger er den ultimata upplevelsen

The Modern Building (1982): Includes a dining hall with breathtaking panoramic views.

The Berkeley Oceanfront Hotel boasts an outdoor swimming pool with a serene seaside setting, giving guests the chance to soak up the sun, unwind in private cabanas, or lounge on comfortable sunbeds, while also offering a 24/7 fitness center, restaurant, indoor lounge, and other luxurious amenities. This historic locale is not only perfect for hosting weddings or other special events in New Jersey, but is famously a photo shoot destination favorite for newlyweds.

Name: Oddfellows Chester
Description:
Nestled in the vibrant heart of Chester, just moments away from the serene River Dee is the esteemed five-star hotel, Oddfellows Chester. Prepare to be captivated by the charming and whimsical Georgian Townhouse, which once served as an Oddfellows Hall, a sanctuary for society's misfits and dreamers. Today, this historic building has been artfully transformed into a breathtaking boutique hotel, renowned for its award-winning conversion. 
 
Step inside and discover a realm of unparalleled beauty and personalised luxury. The 23 individually designed bedrooms exude character and charm, offering a truly unique and enchanting experience for guests. Also offering a range of five beautifully designed apartments for those looking for a home away from home. 
 
Indulge in your senses at the fabulous cocktail bar, where expert mixologists craft exquisite concoctions and experience culinary bliss at the renowned restaurant, where delectable dishes are skilfully prepared using the finest ingredients. The hotel also encompasses a serene ambience with its Secret Garden, a hidden oasis within the city walls. 
 
For those seeking the perfect venue for their special occasions, the Georgian palace offers an array of remarkable event spaces. From breathtaking weddings to memorable celebrations and productive meetings, these versatile spaces can accommodate your every need. Ascend to the terrace, where a captivating atmosphere sets the stage for unforgettable moments. Additionally, Oddfellows Chester offers private dining spaces, including a whimsical tea room inspired by Alice in Wonderland, providing an intimate setting for exclusive dinners and joyous celebrations.

Ons hotel in Kalfort, nabij Puurs, is een van de weinige hotels in deze omgeving waar zakenmensen thuiskomen en toeristen een onvergetelijke tijd beleven.

Name: Northern Lodges
Description:
We started out with the goal to offer more than just another accommodation where you can stay in between your daily travel activities. We focused on quality time whether it's alone or together with someone, on nature and on sustainable traveling. Staying with us is the true experience of northern Sweden and Norrland. 

This is where you get away from your daily life, all the stress and must do’s. There is no TV. There are no neighbours. There are no chores. BUT, there is nature, there is a fire and there is time.

Staying with us is an amazing experience just as it is. Eat a local dish from our partner restaurant,  light a fire and just enjoy the break from your daily life on top of our mountain. And maybe, if you're lucky, you will fall asleep looking at the northern lights through the roof windows right from your bed.

This is the Northern Lodge experience.

Description: HotellI Grövelsjöfjällens vänliga vildmark ligger en riktig pärla – Ett klassiskt fjällhotell där du äter gott, bor bekvämt och njuter av en storslagen natur precis utanför dörren. Storsätra Fjällhotell bjuder alltid på en fyrstjärnig upplevelse. På Storsätra fjällhotell bor du med helpension och har tillgång till vår relax med bastu och utomhuspool. Beroende på säsong finns vandringsleder och längdskidspår precis utanför dörren. Grövelsjöfjällen är dessutom känt för sina fina fiskevatten.

Name: Kungshaga Hotell & Konferens - Orsa
Description:
Kungshaga Hotell ligger där Orsasjön glittrar som vackrast och lugnet hänger kvar – även när vi har fullt hus.
Här blandar vi värdskap, god mat och utsikt så att både konferensgäster, weekendfirare och förbipasserande känner sig hemma.

Vi tror att det bästa värdskapet är det som känns i magen – i en perfekt stekt köttbit, ett nybryggt kaffe på terassen eller ett skratt i restaurangen sent på kvällen.

Hos oss hittar du:

Konferenser med det lilla extra – när ni vill jobba, äta gott och bara vara.

Upplevelser i Orsa – från natur och musik till god mat och lokala möten.

Ett varmt välkomnande – varje gång, oavsett om du kommer för en natt eller en vecka.

Välkommen till Kungshaga Hotell – där möten blir minnen.

Name: Saint George Hotel Beirut
Description:
Nestled on the shores of Beirut's historic bay, the Saint Georges Hotel is a symbol of the city's golden era and a testament to its resilience. Since its opening in 1934, the hotel has embodied luxury, hosting global celebrities and dignitaries. 
Its story is intertwined with Lebanon's tumultuous history, including civil war destruction, political battles, and urban encroachment.
The Saint Georges stands as a defiant landmark, representing both the charm of Beirut's past and the ongoing fight against corruption and monopolization in its redevelopment.

Guests can open their doors and amble down to the foreshore parklands to watch the sun set behind the city before heading back though ‘Bay Central’ for fresh produce or enjoying a meal cooked to perfection within the new Dining Precinct overlooking Woolooware Bay. Head into the city via nearby Woolooware Station or lap up some of the most incredible ocean views of Kamay Botany Bay National Park just next door.

Forma parte del grup gastronómico Cal Blay, con más de 40 años de experiencia en eventos.

Name: Jagdhaus zum Waldblick
Description:
Eingebettet in die wunderschöne Naturlandschaft Nordsachsens  liegt das 120 m² große Jagdhaus  Mit herrlichem Waldblick  und einem 2.600 m² großen Garten ist Urlaubsstimmung garantiert. 

Das gemütliche Ferienhaus  mit seiner hochwertigen Ausstattung hat drei separate und individuell ausgestattete Schlafzimmer , einen Wohn- Essbereich  und zwei Bäder. 
Der Dachboden mit 4 Einzelbetten  steht für Gäste bereit.
Dazu bietet das Schlaffass Platz für 2 Personen. 
Bis zu 12 Personen können sich hier erholen! 

Das Haus ist ideal für Familien  mit Hunden oder Jägern  für den Jagdurlaub.
Gern können Sie auch Ihren FKK Urlaub hier verbringen. 

Unsere ruhige Lage inmitten der Natur gibt Ihnen ein stressfreies Urlaubsgefühl. Genießen Sie eine Oase der Ruhe, in der Sie sich zwischen Wäldern und Seen, beim Schwimmen, Sonnenbaden, Wandern und Radfahren völlig entspannen können.

Name: AC HOTEL NASHVILLE/BRENTWOOD
Description: Experience an upscale stay and discover something new at AC Hotel Nashville Brentwood. Conveniently located on Maryland Way in the heart of the Hill Center, directly across from Maryland Way Park, our hotel is just minutes from popular attractions like Crockett Park, Dyer Observatory, and Belle Meade Historic Site. Try local cuisine from many eateries within walking distance, including Del Frisco’s, Mooyah Burgers, and Jeni’s Ice Cream. Our European-inspired breakfast provides a perfect start to your day. After a day of exploring, reward your productivity with a visit to the AC Lounge, where our bartenders carefully craft signature cocktails while you indulge in delicious tapas as you take in views from our top floor bar, American Ace. Relax in one of our guest rooms featuring floor-to-ceiling windows, sleek hardwood floors, and modern essentials. Our hotel offers a European-style experience for our guests, but it's also a short drive to the Music City! Welcome to the AC Hotel Nashville Brentwood!

Name: Ropewalks Hotel
Description:
Situated in the trendy Ropewalks area of Liverpool city centre, Ropewalks Hotel is surrounded by a lively and eclectic mix of independent restaurants and shops and exciting bars, cocktail joints, music and arts venues. 

Just beyond (in a comfortable walking distance through the Liverpool One shopping area - with flagship department stores and smaller favourites) is the river Mersey where you’ll explore a few of the city’s cultural and heritage sites; the famous ferry, Albert Dock, M&S Arena, Beatles museum, Maritime museum, and many more along the iconic waterfront. 

Ropewalks Hotel offers a range of high-quality amenities that are designed to make your stay as comfortable and enjoyable as possible. From the luxurious beds to the modern facilities, you'll appreciate the attention to detail that has gone into every aspect of the hotel's design. And with a friendly and attentive staff on hand 24 hours a day, you can rest assured that your every need will be taken care of.

The Clubhouse, our recent addition to the hotel, is a stylish, modern and flexible event space perfect for weddings, private occasions and corporate events.

Description:
Wir bieten 23 Zimmer mit insgesamt 60 Betten für die unterschiedlichsten Raumbedürfnisse. All unsere Zimmer sind mit eigener Dusche/WC sowie gratis WIFI ausgestattet. Das moderne Interieur der neuen Zimmer entspricht allen Ansprüchen des heutigen 3-Sterne Gastes und B&B-Freundes.
Warme Brauntöne von der Wandfarbe bis zur Holzoptik und liebevolle Details, wie das Napfpanorama über dem Bett garantieren für den Wohlfühlfaktor und das heimelige Willkommen in unserem B&B-Hotel.
Der Gemeinschaftsbereich besteht aus einer Wohlfühl-Stube im gemütlichen Bauernhaus-Stil und einem lichtdurchfluteten Frühstücksraum. Kaffee, Tee und Wasser und Willisauer Ringli stehen den Gästen rund um die Uhr kostenfrei zur Verfügung.
Das barrierefreie B&B Hotel mit stufenfreien Badezimmern sowie einem rollstuhlgeeigneten Zimmer heisst alle herzlich Willkommen.
Beim Frühstücksbuffet wird auf regionale Produkte gesetzt. Das B&B Hotel wird seit Eröffnung mit 100% ökologischen Reinigungsprodukten gereinigt. Dies ist für alle Gäste und für Allergiker sehr angenehm.

Name: Courtyard Kingston Highway 401/Division Street
Description: Refresh your travel routine during your stay at Courtyard Kingston Highway 401/Division Street. Our newly renovated hotel boasts a paramount location along Highway 401, giving you access to popular destinations including Kingston's Waterfront Pathway, Thousand Islands and Leon's Centre (formerly the K-Rock Centre). Free amenities such as high-speed Wi-Fi and on-site parking provide added value for business and leisure travellers alike. In your free time, enjoy a workout in our 24-hour fitness centre and relax in our indoor pool. The Bistro, our hotel's on-site restaurant, is your place to go for a healthy breakfast in the morning and signature snacks and beverages in the evening. If business brings you to Canada, bolster productivity at your ergonomic workstation before plunging into plush bedding for a restful night of sleep. Whether you're visiting Ontario for handshaking or sightseeing, Courtyard Kingston Highway 401/Division St

Name: Pelorus Private Island
Description:
Pelorus Private Island is the latest jewel in the Northern Escape Collection crown, offering travellers an utterly secluded and indulgent hideaway amongst the World Heritage-listed Great Barrier Reef. 

Embraced by pristine waters, superb fringing reefs, and a lush verdant hillside, Pelorus Private Island boasts a naturally isolated single, sprawling residence featuring four luxurious suites, making it the only luxury private island residence in the region. 

Accessed via a 30-minute helicopter journey from Townsville or a private superyacht, guests are invited to indulge in relaxation and barefoot adventure with a range of bespoke activities on offer including diving and snorkelling, guided jet ski and sea bob tours, reef fishing, access to the Museum of Underwater Art (MOUA) and boat charters. The island also provides access to the untouched wilderness of Hinchinbrook Island.

Name: Hotel Heemskerk
Description:
Ten noorden van Heemskerk, tussen Haarlem en Alkmaar in, in een prachtige omgeving vol bos, duin en natuurlijk de Noordzee, ligt Hotel Heemskerk op Landgoed Marquette. Een oase van rust en toch het mooie dorp Heemskerk op vijftien minuten wandelen.

Het is heerlijk wandelen over ons oude landgoed, prachtig gelegen in het groen, waar unieke flora en fauna te vinden is. Fijn voor als je een nachtje weg bent. De omgeving leent zich ook perfect voor (buiten)activiteiten. Uitwaaien op het strand kan natuurlijk ook, op rustige stranden zoals dat van Castricum. De drukte opzoeken? Het historische centrum van steden als Haarlem en Alkmaar zijn binnen 20 autominuten te vinden.

Name: Hotel Pazo de Bieite
Description:
El Pazo de Bieite es un bello conjunto cuyo origen se remonta al siglo XVII, hoy reconvertido en hotel dotado de todos los elementos que conformaban su entorno:  una majestuosa avenida de acceso, un jardín privado amurallado, unos prados rodeados por un camino de arbolado y un monte robledal en su cara norte.
Rodeado de un paisaje rural de extraordinaria belleza, nos deleita con una perspectiva de prados y robledales que parecen invitarnos a aventurarnos en la magia del bosque atlántico gallego.

When the Bull opened in 1536, it was a coaching inn, a place for tired horses to recover and prepare themselves for the next long ride. The new Bull aspires to offer the same service to anyone on a journey who might need a moment to catch their breath.

18 beautifully appointed bedrooms.
Soft, calming tones to all bedrooms are achieved with a mineral-based lime wash, natural organic textiles and furniture that channels an imperfect finish at every juncture.

2 distinctive restaurants. 
Fuelled by a love for local produce, culinary craftsmanship and the joy of hosting, Bull has two restaurants and a bar for guests to enjoy.

Description:
En Ibis Estación Central, te ofrecemos una experiencia de hospedaje cómoda y accesible en una de las ubicaciones más estratégicas de Santiago de Chile. Situado junto al Terminal de Buses Santiago y con conexión directa a la red de transporte público, nuestro hotel es el punto de partida perfecto para explorar la ciudad, ya sea que viajes por negocios o por placer.

Contamos con habitaciones modernas y funcionales que se adaptan a diferentes necesidades: desde habitaciones individuales para viajeros de negocios hasta opciones familiares y habitaciones accesibles para personas con movilidad reducida. Nos esforzamos por ofrecer a nuestros huéspedes una estancia placentera y sin preocupaciones, con servicios de alta calidad que incluyen desayuno buffet, Wi-Fi de alta velocidad gratuito en todas las áreas, y un lobby diseñado para trabajar con comodidad fuera de la oficina.

Somos más que solo un hotel; somos un equipo dedicado a brindar una experiencia inolvidable. Nuestro personal amable y profesional está siempre dispuesto a ayudarte, garantizando que cada detalle de tu estancia sea perfecto. La seguridad de nuestros huéspedes es primordial, por eso contamos con seguridad táctica 24/7, proporcionando tranquilidad en todo momento.

Además, en Ibis Estación Central, somos orgullosamente #petfriendly. Tu mascota también es bienvenida a disfrutar de una estancia cómoda y segura junto a ti.

No te pierdas nuestras promociones especiales y nuestras deliciosas opciones gastronómicas en nuestro restaurante, que ofrece desde un desayuno completo hasta platos de la cocina internacional preparados con ingredientes frescos y locales.

Visítanos y descubre por qué Ibis Estación Central es la elección ideal para tu próximo viaje a Santiago! Haz tu reserva hoy mismo a través del link en nuestra biografía. Te esperamos con los brazos abiertos!

Name: Pico Vineyards | Wine Boutique Hotel
Description:
Pico Vineyard is a wine retreat rooted in the Atlantic soul of Pico Island.

Between ancient basalt walls and open views to the iconic Pico Mountain, we offer an experience of authentic luxury — where time slows, nature speaks, and every detail connects guests to the land's enduring spirit.

Inspired by the UNESCO-protected vineyard landscape, Pico Vineyard blends contemporary minimalism with local tradition, creating a serene, adults-only sanctuary. Here, simplicity meets sophistication: from curated wine tastings and locally rooted gastronomy to architecture that honors the silence and beauty of the island.

We believe true luxury lies in authenticity, in the quiet celebration of nature, and in time experienced with intention.

Name: Dom Pielgrzyma "Przystanek Wiara" Częstochowa
Description:

Nasz baza noclegowa to 32 pokoje z łazienkami, łącznie dla 102 osób. Dysponujemy obszernym parkingiem, na terenie jest boisko do siatkówki, grill, altana, ognisko oraz duży ogród.
Dla gości mamy możliwość pełnego wyżywienia. W budynku jest darmowe Wi-Fi. Mamy także salę konferencyjną, salę rekreacyjną, kawiarenkę i oczywiście kaplicę.

Oferujemy również pomoc w organizacji przyjęć okolicznościowych, takich jak imieniny, urodziny, stypy, jubileusze, chrzciny, komunie, noclegi dla gości weselnych i wiele innych.

Süitlerimiz, Antalya havalimanına kuş uçuşu 1 km kara yolu ile 5,5 km. mesafede, şehir merkezine 10 dk. uzaklıkta ve cazibe merkezlerine çok yakın konumdadır. 2023 yılından itibaren siz değerli misafirlerini ağırlamaya başlayan Ethica Suite güvenli, hijyenik, tam donanımlı ve modern süitleriyle, güler yüzlü samimi saygılı ve profesyonel çalışma arkadaşlarıyla sizleri misafir etmekten mutluluk duyacaktır. Name: Mercure Sibiu Arsenal
Description:
Awaken your appetite for discovering the past while embracing the comforts of the present, at our 4-star hotel. With 121 thoughtfully designed rooms, we provide a comfortable stay that embraces the city's rich medieval history and architectural wonders. Located across from the city’s most enjoyable park, you can connect with nature's beauty right in front of the hotel. Indulge in culinary delights at our two renowned restaurants, where local flavors harmonize with international cuisine. Unwind in the tranquil indoor pool or stay active at our
well-equipped fitness center. Explore the city's historic streets and landmarks, then retreat to our hotel for a soothing sanctuary that captures the essence of our charming destination.

Name: Rooms of Renown
Description:
Rooms of Renown comprises three luxe art deco apartments in the rear of 36 Kurrajong Avenue, Leeton. This beautiful period building was established in 1915 and expanded by the Panaretto brothers in 1920 to house The Renown Refreshment Rooms. 

Ideal for couples and visiting professionals, as well as those looking for longer term stays, each self contained apartment includes beautifully appointed kitchens and bathrooms, high quality Sheridan linen, rich colours and gorgeous deco touches. The apartments also have direct access to Leeton's main street and secure rear parking via an electric gate. We invite you to explore each of our suites at www.roomsofrenown.com.au. While Rooms of Renown is listed on multiple booking sites, the best rates are reserved for clients who book directly via our website.

Rooms of Renown is the passion project of Leeton locals James and Liane Gawne — avid lovers of vintage items and heritage experiences. Their transformative restoration of 36 Kurrajong Avenue, including the original commercial premises at the front of the site, was undertaken between 2022 and 2023.

Name: Teveltunet
Description:
Teveltunet AS er et kurs- og konferansesenter i naturskjønne Teveldalen i Meråker, kun én time fra Trondheim og nær svenskegrensen. Vi hjelper bedrifter å skape inspirerende samlinger med faglig innhold, opplevelser og sosialt fellesskap – langt unna kontorlandskapet.

Vi tilbyr moderne konferanse- og møterom tilpasset både små og store grupper, med teknisk utstyr og fleksible løsninger for kick-off, strategisamlinger, styremøter og workshops.

Hos oss kan dere kombinere møter med skreddersydde aktiviteter som styrker samhold og skaper minner for livet:

Aktiviteter dere kan velge mellom hos Teveltunet:
	•	Teambuilding og lagaktiviteter i fjellet
	•	Rebusløp og naturbaserte konkurranser
	•	Fjellturer og guidede turer i Meråkerfjellene
	•	Jakt- og fiskeopplevelser
	•	Bålkos og uteservering med lokalmat
	•	Kurs i overlevelse og friluftsliv
	•	Snøaktiviteter om vinteren (ski, truger, akebakker)
	•	Skreddersydde samarbeidsøvelser med instruktører
	•	Sauna og avslapning i rolige omgivelser
	•	Sosiale kvelder med lokal mat og drikke

Vi er opptatt av å skape en helhetlig opplevelse – fra det faglige innholdet i møterommet til de uformelle samtalene rundt bålet. Våre kokker byr på lokalmat laget fra bunnen, og vårt vertskap sørger for personlig oppfølging fra start til slutt.

Teveltunet er stedet der bedrifter bygger kultur, styrker relasjoner og skaper resultater – i rolige omgivelser, tett på naturen.

Name: The Pocklington Luxury Accomodation
Description:
The Pocklington is a boutique aparthotel in the heart of Leicester, offering a perfect blend of elegance, versatility, and convenience.

Nestled in a beautifully restored Grade II listed building, our 10 spacious luxury apartments are designed to suit the needs of corporate travelers, relocators, and families hosting loved ones.
Tailored for Corporate Clients
The Pocklington is the ideal choice for professionals visiting Leicester for business:

* Event Room for Meetings: Our on-site event room provides the perfect space for corporate meetings, team-building sessions, or client presentations. Equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi and AV facilities, it’s a professional setting with a luxurious touch.
* Seamless Work & Stay: After a productive day, retreat to your private, fully equipped apartment to relax or continue working in comfort.
* Exclusive Buyouts: Need more privacy for a corporate retreat or large event? Book the entire aparthotel and enjoy exclusive use of the event room – perfect for team gatherings followed by a luxurious overnight stay.

Perfect for Relocators
If you’re moving to Leicester or working on a short-term project, our apartments are your ideal base:
* Fully Equipped Kitchens: Prepare your own meals with ease or let us arrange breakfast for you.
* Spacious Comfort: Larger than standard serviced apartments, with luxurious amenities to make your stay truly feel like home.
* Prime Location: Situated in the city center, everything you need is right on your doorstep.
Host Family & Friends in Style
No space at home for visiting family or friends? Let us take care of them:
* Luxurious Apartments: Treat your loved ones to the comfort and style of our high-end apartments, complete with roll-top baths and balconies.
* Exclusive Use for Gatherings: Book the whole aparthotel and host your guests in style. Enjoy free use of our event room for celebrations, ensuring everyone has their own space to relax afterward.

With a relaxed and friendly vibe, a look that lives up to the reputation of Scandinavian design, and a wide range of services and facilities, you couldn't make a better choice for your stay in Copenhagen. We're located right in the heart of city, and we have our own bar where travelers meet and connect, both with fellow travelers and Copenhagen locals. Name: Avenue 18  Resort
Description:
Avenue 18 is located in the foothills of the Himalayas in northern India, Rishikesh. Often known as the ‘Gateway to the Himalayas’ and ‘Yoga Capital of the World’, Rishikesh is a place that will charm you with its culture and life. It welcomes people from all walks of life and gives them an experience crafted as per their individuality. From someone who is looking for a spiritual journey or someone who is bored with the monotony called life and is willing to take the next step to break the patterns; Rishikesh is a home for everyone who visits.

Not only is it home to everyone, but it is also home to some of the most iconic places and streets you will witness in India. Taking the spirit of street art much further, Rishikesh Street Art is not just limited to streets but spreads across buildings, broken tin roofs, bridges, and more. Apart from this, the city is over-flowing with delicious food with a plethora of cuisines available like German, Italian, Tibetan, and of course Indian. In fact, we won’t bat an eyelid to say that Rishikesh has the best vegetarian food to offer.

Name: Amber Lombok Beach Resort
Description: Set along the turquoise shores of south Lombok, Amber Resort is a beach-lover’s dream. You’ll be spoiled for choice with exquisite meals, house crafted cocktails, and lush surroundings. Description:
Reckless development threatens to destroy this pristine Bahamian paradise.

Developer Yntegra Group and Rosewood Hotel Group have brought in dredging and land-clearing equipment to damage the island and seagrass meadows for profit.

Sign the Change.org Petition to Halt Environmental Clearance for Rosewood Yntegra Sampson Cay Project.

Description: Courtyard by Marriott Santa Cruz is ideally located two blocks from sandy beaches and the famous Santa Cruz Beach Boardwalk amusement park; easy walking distance to Santa Cruz Wharf and downtown Pacific Avenue. Name: Home 2 Suites by Hilton Milton
Description:
Home 2 Suites by Hilton Milton: Your Ideal Stay in the Heart of Ontario. 

Nestled in the charming town of Milton, Ontario, Home 2 Suites by Hilton Milton offers a perfect blend of modern comfort and local culture. Our hotel provides an excellent base for both business and leisure travelers. 

EXPLORE MILTON'S ATTRACTIONS: Discover the unique blend of historic charm and modernity that defines Milton. Popular local restaurants and sports bar located at Market Drive and Downtown Milton. Visit the picturesque Mill Pond, the innovative Mattamy National Cycling Centre, and the vibrant FirstOntario Arts Centre Milton for a taste of the local arts scene. Enjoy the great outdoors with trips to Conservation Halton Parks, Hilton Falls, and the Halton County Radial Railway Museum. For a deep dive into the area's heritage, spend time at Country Heritage Park.

COMFORTABLE AND SPACIOUS SUITES: After a day of exploring, relax in our comfortable and spacious one-bedroom or studio suites with free WiFi. Each suite features a living area, a full-size pull-out sofa bed, as well as a fully equipped kitchen with a refrigerator, dishware, and microwave. A pool for a refreshing swim and two patios equipped with a fire pit and barbecue grill.

START YOUR DAY RIGHT: Kick off your morning with our complimentary breakfast, offering a variety of favorites such as waffles, fruit, eggs, and oatmeal. Enjoy hot, fresh coffee and tea any time in our Oasis. For a quick snack, visit our 24-hour Home2 MKT Store. Stay active in our Spin2 Cycle facility, where you can multitask with a workout and a laundry.

PERFECT FOR MEETINGS & EVENTS: Our function rooms and boardrooms ideal for small meetings and events, providing a professional and comfortable setting for any occasion. Whether you're hosting a business meeting or a social gathering, you'll find everything you need for a successful event. 

BOOK YOUR STAY AT HOME2 SUITES BY HILTON MILTON NOW! And experience the best of what Milton has to offer.

Name: Raht Hotels
Description:
Raht Hotels & Resorts is a curated collection of soulful, land-led boutique retreats designed for travelers seeking stillness, authenticity, and meaning. Built on the philosophy that where you stay should feel inseparable from where you are, Raht creates sanctuaries where the outside world fades away and presence takes over. 

Each property is intentionally small (12–30 keys), architecturally rooted in its landscape, and thoughtfully crafted using local materials, natural palettes, and indoor-outdoor living .

What sets Raht apart is its integrated approach to experiential dining, holistic wellness, and curated beverage journeys—not as amenities, but as core brand pillars. From story-led, chef-driven dining concepts to forest bathing rituals, fire and water ceremonies, and structured wellness retreats delivered with trusted partners, Raht offers immersive experiences that are consistent yet deeply place-specific. 

With its first retreat at Manmatha, Udaipur, and a vision to expand across mountains, forests, coasts, and heritage locations, Raht is building a new benchmark for boutique hospitality in India—one that prioritizes stories, soul, and long-term legacy over scale alone
