Situated in the centre of the Geraldton CBD, & only 100 steps to the beach, The Gerald Apartment Hotel brings luxury & relaxation together for a hotel experience like no other. 
The Gerald features a range of fully serviced apartments & onsite Conference & Event facilities as well as the Old Man & The Sea Rooftop Bar & Bob's Boutique Bar.
With super fast WI-Fi & large work spaces in each room, it's the perfect base for the business traveller. Secure car parking & storage (for windsurfers, kites, surf boards, fishing gear, diving equipment & more) makes it the perfect base for the leisure traveller. 
Wheelchair accessible facilities are featured throughout our hotel & conference areas.

Name: Ristinge Strandhotel
Description: Genopførelsen af Ristinge Strandhotel på Sydlangeland ﬁnansieres ved salg af 375 b-aktier af 45.000 DKK. Det eksklusive strandhotel, med 12 værelser og en lille restaurant, ﬁk i sommeren 2023 de nødvendige myndighedsgodkendelser.

Name: WSI Hotels Goa
Description: WSI Hotels is a leading chain of hotels operating in the travel industry since 2009. We have established ourselves as a trusted name in the hospitality industry, offering our guests the perfect blend of luxury and comfort. Our hotels are strategically located in some of the most sought-after destinations, providing guests with easy access to local attractions and activities. At WSI Hotels, we believe that every guest is unique and deserves a personalized experience. Our team of experienced professionals is committed to ensuring that every guest’s stay is memorable, from the moment they arrive until they depart. We take pride in providing our guests with luxurious accommodations, exceptional service, and an unparalleled experience. At WSI Hotels, we are committed to delivering a superior level of hospitality that exceeds our guests’ expectations.

Name: Riad Anayela
Description: Morocco is also famous for its hospitality and the friendliness of its people. In the Anayela you encounter a new dimension of service – warm, attentive, personal. Staying at the Anayela is an authentic, cultural, luxury experience for the soul and brain. A calm place for relaxation but also subtle inspiration and stimulation of the senses. We care about each guest and want to make your stay unforgettable! Our biggest reward is the smile on your face. Anayela – A place of Inspiration!

Name: Tuki Llajta Pueblo Bonito Lodge
Description:
Tuki Llajta Pueblo Bonito es un lodge ubicado en el corazón del valle del Mantaro, considerado como el mejor mirador del valle. 

Contamos con bungalows preparados para que el huésped pueda disfrutar del campo, de una chimenea acogedora y de un paisaje único. 

Estamos entre los pueblos de San Jerónimo de Tunán y Quilcas, a sólo 30 minutos de la ciudad de Huancayo y a 45 minutos del Aeropuerto de Jauja.

Ven, respira y vive los Andes!

Name: The Trilogy Hotel - Montgomery
Description:
Welcome to Trilogy Hotel Montgomery, Autograph Collection—a premier destination for travelers and guests who want the best that life has to offer. After five years of redevelopment, Trilogy Hotel reopened in 2023 with a brand-new look and feel. The three-building hotel, located in the heart of the city, has undergone a complete overhaul and now welcomes guests with open arms and incredible experiences.

The Trilogy Hotel has always been known for its sophisticated elegance and timeless charm. From the moment you step inside, you will be greeted by the warm and inviting atmosphere, complete with well-appointed furnishings, high-end amenities, and state-of-the-art technology. The hotel’s guest rooms feature plush bedding, stylish furniture, and décor that seamlessly fuses elements of its iconic past with fresh, modern flare. 

Whether it’s your first or hundredth visit, we invite you to discover the all-new Trilogy Hotel Montgomery.

Name: iHotels Group
Description:
I am a specialist in the Commercial Assets and Hotel Business in Portugal.

I have over 30 years' experience as an entrepreneur, with a background in Applied Mathematics, I have dedicated the last 8 years of my career to the real estate market, specializing in Investment Funds, Yielding Products and Hotels.

My certifications:

CIPS - Certified International Property Specialist and the most recent
CIC - Certified Real Estate Consultant APEMIP

Name: Boutique hotel de statie
Description:
Boutique Hotel De Statie is een stijlvol en eigentijds hotel, gelegen in het bruisende hart van Valkenswaard. Onze unieke locatie – midden tussen de bedrijvigheid, winkels en horeca – maakt ons de ideale uitvalsbasis voor zowel zakelijke gasten als levensgenieters.

Met 26 sfeervolle kamers – zowel één- als tweepersoons – bieden wij het perfecte verblijf voor iedere gast. Elke kamer is zorgvuldig ingericht om rust, luxe en beleving samen te brengen. ’s Ochtends serveren wij een uitgebreid luxe ontbijt aan tafel, zodat u de dag ontspannen en met kwaliteit begint.

Daarnaast bieden wij de mogelijkheid om zakelijk te dineren in ons bijgelegen restaurant Bij Jantje op de Statie, waar culinair genieten en gastvrijheid hand in hand gaan.

Of u nu komt voor een ontspannen weekend weg, een zakelijke overnachting of een bijzondere gelegenheid: bij De Statie ervaart u gastvrijheid op zijn best, midden in het centrum van Valkenswaard.

Name: The Grand Resort and Spa
Description:
Welcome to The Grand Resort & Spa!
Our beautiful Resort is comprised of four interconnected properties:

The Worthington, The Grand Resort, Alcazer, and Villa Venice.
The Resort offers 96 guest rooms, suites, and penthouses. We pride ourselves on being South Florida’s largest all-male clothing-optional Resort, boasting beautiful garden walkways that connect our four swimming pools, three hot tubs, multiple sun decks, and full-service day spa.

As the longest-running gay male Resort in Fort Lauderdale, we are only two blocks from the Atlantic Ocean and a 15-minute walk to Sebastian Beach. The thriving gay scene on Wilton Drive is also just a 15-minute drive away!

Feel free to reach out to us with any questions. We hope to see you soon!

Name: Levi Spirit Luxury Villas & Resort
Description:
Levi Spirit was born, a place where awe-inspiring nature meets the unique and welcoming spirit of the local people. You may be in cold climate, but you feel warm inside. Levi Spirit has all the elements that make special holidays and memorable times together. This unique resort is a combination on comfort and arctic wilderness, which is not found anywhere else.

After visiting this magical part of the globe where we breath the purest air in the world, drink water straight from the rivers and streams, and where the snow is always white… You will see the world in a different way, and you will know why we call this place Spirit.

Name: Pateo dos Solares Charm Hotel
Description:
Pateo dos Solares Charm Hotel is a 4-star boutique hotel in the heart of Estremoz. It features a serene garden, an outdoor pool, and a cozy atmosphere. The iconic Estremoz Castle, with its tower, Queen Saint Elizabeth’s Statue, old prison, and viewpoints, is just a 5-minute walk away.

The classic rooms are decorated in crème and brown tones, offering satellite TV and a mini-bar. Some also feature fireplaces. The hotel’s bar has a terrace opening onto the garden, while the Alentejo à Mesa restaurant serves authentic regional cuisine and fine Alentejo wines.

Pateo dos Solares is also an ideal venue for private events, including weddings, meetings, and celebrations. Guests can explore the vast plains, visit historic towns like Marvão, Évora, and Elvas, or tour the region’s famous vineyards along the Wine Route.

Name: Na mú dušu
Description:
Na mú dušu,
Valašsko vás zve!
Na úpatí hor, kde sa šum lesů mísí s ozvěnú dávných časů. Kde vás ticho každé ráno vítá a lišky dávají dobrú noc. Tam stojí Na mú dušu. Místo, kde sa můžete vrátit k dávným tradicím a začít svoju dlúhověkú cestu.

Name: AlMughni Trading Company
Description:
Since its formation in 2016, Al Mughni Trading company W.L.L Hotels Accessories Trading W.L.L  has  track  record  second to none in meeting the requirements of Hospital, Hotels, Restaurants, Event Organizers or hospitality needs in general. Due to our vast experience, market knowledge and services we have established a cliental not only in Bahrain, but also from G.C.C and African countries.

We can as per budget out lay, help you in all your requirements with quality goods at reasonable prices. We are catering the necessities of clients ranging from 2 Star Hotels/ Restaurants to 7 Star Hotels/ Restaurants.

All your requests, with well knitted logistic staff to ensure the well timed delivery in any part of U.A.E, Kingdom of Bahrain , Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and Kuwait .

Name: Si Como No Resort
Description: Somos un hotel sostenible en Manuel Antonio, que cuenta con más de 30 años siendo eco-amigable con el medio ambiente. Transmitimos nuestro Pura Vida a las personas que nos visitan rodeado de la madre naturaleza.

Name: FREI Hospitality Group
Description:
In the dynamic and ever-evolving hospitality industry, the demand for exceptional service and seamless guest experiences is paramount. At FREI Hospitality Group, LLC, we specialize in delivering professional staffing solutions tailored to the unique needs of key hotel departments, including Housekeeping, Food & Beverage (F&B), and Banquet Events. Our commitment to excellence, customer focus, and impactful service distinguishes us from traditional contract or temporary labor firms. Our associates are not only highly trained and authorized to work in the United States but are also supported by a Senior Leadership Team with extensive experience in renowned brands such as Marriott, Hilton, IHG, and Hyatt.

OUR CORE VALUES:
1) Excellence: At the core of everything we do is a commitment to excellence. This value drives us to consistently deliver the highest quality of service and solutions to our clients and candidates. We set high standards for ourselves and continuously seek ways to improve and excel in every aspect of our business. 

2) Customer Focus: Our clients and candidates are our top priority. We center our efforts on understanding their unique needs, challenges, and goals. By putting them at the forefront of our decision-making and tailoring our solutions to meet their specific requirements, we ensure a customer-centric approach that builds trust and lasting relationships. 

3) Impact: Making a positive impact on the hospitality staffing industry is our overarching goal. We believe in contributing to its growth, sustainability, and betterment. Whether it’s through innovative solutions, ethical practices, or community engagement, we’re dedicated to leaving a meaningful mark on the industry and the communities we serve.

Name: Thon Hotel Ski
Description:
Thon Hotel Ski is perfect for both business and pleasure. We have 110 rooms and 7 meeting rooms, the biggest with capacity for 230 conference attendees. Our food is made with love and care from our highly skilled kitchen team with focus on local produce and minimizing food waste. We were fully refurbished in 2021 and we are located 100 meters from Ski train station with only 12 minutes to Oslo central station.  We collaborate with Tusenfryd amusement park in the summer and are just a short drive from amazing beaches and hiking tours in the forest.
We strive to have the best accommodating staff, and we take our part in developing the right people with the right tools seriously. 
At Thon Hotel Ski you will find a lot of knowledge and resource among the staff. Welcome to Thon Hotel Ski!

Name: Forest Inn
Description: Nestled in the heart of Lataguri, Forest Inn Resort welcomes you to a tranquil haven amidst lush greenery. Our resort offers a blend of comfort and nature, providing well-appointed accommodations, delectable cuisine, and immersive wildlife experiences. Discover serenity in the lap of nature at Forest Inn Resort, your perfect escape.

Name: Hotel Posta Livigno
Description: Hotel 4 stelle situato nel centro di Livigno, direttamente sulla piste da sci. Ristorante a la carta, tennis, centro benessere e servizi per famiglie e sportivi

Name: Vila Guesthouses
Description: Vila Guesthouses is an hotel company managing small charm guesthouses in Lisbon.

Name: Fundación Pristine
Description:
En la Fundación Pristine, nos dedicamos a catalizar el desarrollo de un Triple Impacto positivo en las comunidades locales que rodean nuestros Camps. 
Nuestra misión es crear y fomentar acciones ambientales sostenible y regenerativas, donde el bienestar social, ambiental y económico converjan para forjar un futuro más brillante y equitativo.

Name: Novallure
Description:
At Novallure, we want a great stay for everyone. During your stay, you will be submerged into luxury. Stylish interiors, great beds and a marble bathroom with golden details.

But, at the same time, we’re not your classic type of hotel. By digitalizing check-in, check-out and hotel services, your luxury stay will have a budget price-tag.

Name: Holiday Inn Express Chiayi 嘉義智選假日酒店
Description:
台灣嘉義及雲林地區首家國際連鎖品牌酒店，由飯店步行僅5分鐘即可抵達嘉義火車站搭稱阿里山森林火車、步行20分鐘即可抵達嘉義著名文化路夜市品嚐在地美食及步行5分鐘亦可前往嘉義市轉運中心搭乘高鐵快捷公車前往嘉義高鐵站搭乘高鐵。

酒店提供154間佈置現代、溫馨的客房，房內提供各種便利設施，包含免費Wi-Fi、平面電視、保險箱及小冰箱等，所有客房均有獨立戶外陽台，可欣賞嘉義市景或遠眺阿里山、玉山山脈陵線。

位於酒店2樓的智空間提供輕鬆自在的用餐、交誼環境並於每日早晨提供每一位下榻房客免費自助式早餐，此外，飯店提供停車位，方便自駕前來住宿的房客。

無論是商務出差還是休閒旅遊，嘉義智選假日酒店都為每一位造訪嘉義的旅客提供了一個舒適、便利和優質的住宿體驗。

Discover a warm-welcoming hotel nestled in a serene street surrounded by shops and restaurants. Just a 5-minute walk from Chiayi Train Station and a 20-minute stroll to the famous Wenhua Rd Night Market. All 154 guest rooms are modern and comfortably appointed with complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, safety box and mini-fridges. Enjoy a hassle-free self-service breakfast in our Great room, and take advantage of our lounge and meeting spaces. Parking is available for self-drivers. Whether you're on a business trip or leisure travel, our hotel offers a comfortable, convenient and unique staying experience in Chiayi city.

Name: Sorobon Luxury Beach Resort
Description:
With a rich history spanning over 20 years, Sorobon Luxury Beach Resort Bonaire invites those who seek unspoiled enjoyment in nature and a profound love for serenity. Sorobon Luxury Beach Resort is nestled by the natural salt bay of Bonaire,
renowned as one of the world’s top windsurfing spots and an exceptional wellness destination. Discover yourself immersed in beauty and adventure during your next unforgettable holiday!

Name: B&B HOTEL NYON
Description: Brand new 117 rooms 3* Hotel, Opening July 2022

Name: The Campingo
Description: TheCampingo is a one-stop shop for all your camping needs. We are an online marketplace that offers a wide selection of camping sites and services, from basic campgrounds to fully-equipped and luxurious glamping spots.

Name: Hotel Gran Regente
Description:
Gran Regente Hotel & Apartments de Oviedo combines modern comforts with classic charm. We offer a warm, family environment and we can recommend a selection of activities to guests so they can discover the best of Asturias. Located just a stone’s throw away from the emblematic Bulevar de la Sidra, our hotel is the perfect location for those who want to immerse themselves in the atmosphere of the typical Asturian sidrerías (cider bars) or enjoy the typical cuisine of the region.

If you need a place for a meeting in the centre of Oviedo, Gran Regente Hotel & Apartments is the perfect choice. A virtually unique offering in the city, we have 1,000 m² of space especially for meetings and events distributed across nine fabulous function rooms, all bathed in natural light.

The function rooms have Wi-Fi, audiovisual equipment, private internet room, coffee and snack area, business lunch service, among other details. We offer a personalised service that will guarantee a perfect event.

Name: Tambohus Kro & Badehotel
Description:
Vores grundlæggende filosofi for Tambohus Kro & Badehotel er et fælles mål om kvalitet, nærvær, troværdighed & kreativitet. Lige fra råvarer til gæsteoplevelsen.

Vi laver både ærlig kromad samt overraskende gourmetmiddag. Fælles for begge er dog at kvaliteten skal være i top. Her er ingen hurtige måltider til gengæld er maden tilberedt med kærlighed helt fra bunden. På Tambohus Kro & Badehotel bager, sylter, henkoger og braser vi nemlig selv.

Troværdighed er en meget vigtig værdi hos os. Det, vi siger, er det, vi gør.  Samtidig er det vigtig for os, at alle husets gæster får en autentisk oplevelse. Der er tilvalgt & fravalgt nøje i vores menu- & vinkort, så det afspejler præcis os.

Autentiske råvarer er en del af vores troværdighed. Derfor får vi mange af råvarerne fra området omkring os. Muslinger & hummer fra Jegindø. Fisk fra Vesterhavet. Grøntsager fra Jegindø. Vildt fra Klosterheden. Gris fra Ausumgaard.

Nærvær handler om at være i nuet. Det handler om at slå forstyrrende og unødvendige tanker ud af hovedet og være til stede. Derfor foreslå vi at I pakker mobilen væk & nyder hinanden i stedet. Skulle du dog få brug for at gå online er koden til netværket: 7790thyholm

På Tambohus Kro & Badehotel er nærvær en af vores vigtigste værdier. Vi ønsker at være til stede og være opmærksomme. Det gælder alle vores relationer både i forhold til gæster, kunder, samarbejdspartnere, leverandører og kolleger.

På tallerkner lader vi kreativiteten folde sig ud. Vi elsker at komponere smukke tallerkner ligesom vi gør en dyd ud af dække et traditionsrigt bord med stofservietter, friske blomster & levende lys.

Name: Dimora Caiammari Luxury Hotel & Spa
Description:
La dimora nobiliare Caiammari è stata sapientemente ed elegantemente restaurata senza modificarne l’antico fascino, restituendo alla villa l’eleganza e lo splendore che ne hanno fatto una residenza nobiliare del ‘600 tra le più importanti della Sicilia orientale.

prossimità dell’Area Marina Protetta del Plemmirio e immersa in un antico Giardino Botanico, la dimora Caiammari dispone di 17 camere caratterizzate dalla luminosità degli spazi e da un arredamento ricercato.

La cura dei dettagli, la calorosa ospitalità e l’atmosfera intima e rilassata sono il risultato della passione e della professionalità di una famiglia, il cui obiettivo è offrire un’esperienza ricercata e confortevole.

La Dimora Caiammari ha mantenuto l’antico aspetto di villa nobiliare, composto da più plessi che godono di diverse corti riservate e romantiche.

Name: Casa Flora Paguera | Mallorca Workation
Description: Ihr Zuhause im Urlaub! Unsere freistehende Villa im Ferienort Paguera ist nur wenige Minuten Fussweg vom Strand und dem Stadtzentrum entfernt und trotzdem ruhig gelegen. In einem 400 qm großen Garten gelegen, bietet sie mit ihrem großen Wohn- und Esszimmer, 2 Schlafzimmern, 2 Bädern, einer geräumigen Küche und ihrer Terrasse Platz für 4 Personen. Ein zusätzliches klimatisiertes Arbeitszimmer mit Schreibtisch, Monitor und Drucker bietet die Möglichkeit, Arbeit und Erholung perfekt miteinander zu verbinden.

Name: Bona Hospitality
Description:
Bona Hospitality is committed to delivering an unmatched guest experience through our dedication to service, innovation, and integrity. We prioritize the well-being and satisfaction of each guest, ensuring their stay is as memorable as it is seamless.

At Bona Hospitality, our mission is to create exceptional experiences by blending world-class service, comfort, and innovation. We are dedicated to setting the standard in the hospitality industry, ensuring every guest feels valued and at home across our distinguished properties. Through commitment to quality, integrity, and personalized care, we strive to make every stay not just a visit but an unforgettable journey.

Since our inception in 2006, we have grown to manage and operate five premier properties: Courtyard By Marriott East, Hampton By Hilton Ottawa, Hilton Garden Inn Airport, Fairfield By Marriott Airport, and the Ottawa Conference and Event Centre. Over the years, our journey has been one of continuous growth, driven by a passion for excellence and a deep commitment to our guests.

With a diverse portfolio of esteemed hotel brands and an exceptional event center, Bona Hospitality stands out for its unparalleled service and attention to detail. Whether you are seeking a luxurious stay or the perfect venue for an event, our properties are designed to cater to your every need with professionalism and warmth.
Our Properties
•	Hampton By Hilton Ottawa since 1999 with 179 rooms
•	Ottawa Conference and Event Centre since 2006 with 36,000 sq ft of meeting space
•	Hilton Garden Inn Airport since 2008 with 326 rooms
•	Courtyard By Marriott East since 2012 with 397 rooms
•	Fairfield By Marriott Airport since 2018 with 232 rooms

Bona Hospitality is proud to be a cornerstone in the hospitality landscape, where we don’t just meet expectations—we exceed them. Our team is dedicated to fostering a welcoming environment that resonates with comfort, luxury, and personal connection.

Name: Mediterráneo Hotel Spa y Eventos
Description:
En la ciudad de Rosario, Mediterráneo hotel & Spa, es una gran opción a la hora de planificar sus eventos corporativos.

El mismo se encuentra ubicado en una zona estratégicamente comercial, a 100 metros de Av. Pellegrini, a escasos metros de la peatonal y con un rápido acceso desde las diferentes rutas que llegan a la ciudad.

Cuenta con el Centro de Convenciones con capacidad para 120 personas, paneles acústicos, Wifi y sistema de audio e iluminación de última generación y una Sala de reuniones con capacidad para 30 personas.

Sus 31 habitaciones se encuentran totalmente equipadas con pisos de parqué, camas extra grandes, frigo bar, TV LCD, cajas de seguridad, entre otros y un estupendo desayuno buffet incluido.

En el segundo subsuelo podrá disfrutar del Spa, el cual cuenta con piscina climatizada, jacuzzi y sauna.

La comodidad de sus instalaciones en sus 12 pisos, una atención personalizada y gran variedad de servicios hacen de Mediterráneo Hotel & Spa el lugar ideal para desarrollar todo tipo de eventos, congresos, convenciones, reuniones empresariales y lanzamientos de productos.

Name: Ibis Styles Bucharest Airport
Description:
Design economy hotel, open to creative minds
The ibis Styles Bucharest Airport hotel is 800m from Henri Coanda International Airport, making it an ideal base before flying. A free shuttle bus gets you to the airport in no time. The hotel has 84 modern guest rooms and one aviation-themed meeting room, perfect for business meetings and conferences. Our stylish restaurant offers an à la carte menu serving international and Romanian cuisines. Private parking is available, and you can easily travel to Bucharest Old City Centre, just 16km away.
Our ground floor 10-person meeting room is set up perfectly for small business conferences. There's a big screen for presentations, free Wi-Fi and space where you can enjoy a well-earned coffee break. Enjoy a trip to one of many nearby attractions and landmarks. Therme Aqua Park, Baneasa Mall, Tiriac Skating Arena, Eden Adventure Park and Snagov leisure area are all close to ibis Styles Bucharest Airport.

Ibis Styles Bucharest Airport is located close to Henri Coanda Bucharest Airport, at 800 m away. You can reach the hotel by car from North via E60 or DN1, and from A3 Highway exit at 15 km far away.

Name: Gagal Home | Luxury & Corporate service Apartment
Description:
Gagal Home Service Apartment Pvt Ltd was founded in 2014 with a clear vision: to provide premium, cost-effective hospitality services that meet the diverse needs of travelers in Mumbai. Whether you're visiting for business, leisure, or both, we have the perfect accommodation solutions tailored to your requirements.

With over 9 lakh satisfied customers and a strong portfolio of 300+ multinational companies including renowned names like Mahindra, TCS, Amul, Elanco, and Sunpharma, our reputation for delivering exceptional service speaks for itself. Our partnerships with top organizations reflect our commitment to quality, comfort, and convenience.

At Gagal Home, we specialize in serviced apartments located in the most sought-after areas of Mumbai such as Borivali, Kandivali, Malad, Goregaon, Andheri, Santacruz, Bandra Kurla Complex, and Navi Mumbai, Ghansoli, opposite the Reliance Corporate Park. Whether you're in town for a short business trip or an extended stay, we offer a wide variety of apartments that cater to your unique needs. From spacious 1 BHKs to luxurious multi-bedroom suites, each apartment is equipped with modern amenities to ensure a comfortable and hassle-free experience.

Gagal Home is more than just a place to stay; it’s where comfort meets convenience, and where every guest is treated like family. Our clients trust us to offer high-quality accommodations that combine luxury with affordability, making us the preferred choice for both corporate clients and leisure travelers.

Our mission is simple: to provide a home away from home, with flexibility, comfort, and reliability at the heart of everything we do. Get in touch with us today to explore our wide range of serviced apartments in Mumbai and Navi Mumbai, and experience hospitality that goes above and beyond.

Name: The Lismore Hotel
Description: The Lismore Hotel is a sleek and modern full-service hotel with robust amenities and a prime location in vibrant downtown Eau Claire. Amenities include a casual restaurant with scratch-made fare, a coffee shop cafe and bakery, and a rooftop cocktail bar, as well as 14,000 sq ft of meeting and event space that can accommodate up to 1,000 guests. Streamlined rooms offer a boutique vibe, free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs, plus mini-fridges, coffeemakers, and ergonomic desk chairs. Upgraded rooms add sitting areas.

Name: M'kango Golfview Hotel
Description:
M’kango Golfview Hotel in Lusaka is the premier budget-friendly destination for accommodation and conferencing. Nestled on expansive 18 acres of land, this modern hotel offers a perfect break for even the most seasoned travelers during a busy week. With 78 rooms, including 59 Standard Rooms, 12 Executive Rooms, and 7 Apartments/Suites, you can choose the one that suits your needs and budget.

Relax in the pool or work out at the exclusive gym reserved for our guests. Enjoy a refreshing cocktail at the Chatters Bar and savor a gastronomic experience at the restaurant. We look forward to welcoming you soon. Serving you with pride!

Name: Kimpton Theta New York - Times Square
Description:
High-End Luxury Hotel in New York City
Relax and recharge at Kimpton Hotel Theta, a calm New York City boutique hotel near Times Square. A respite from bustling Midtown Manhattan, Hotel Theta’s modern decor, generously sized spaces and unexpected details will appeal to travelers and locals alike, whether they’re grabbing a coffee at the lobby’s to-go window or catching up with friends over seasonal spritzes up on the rooftop bar.

Name: Ecoisleta
Description:
En Ecoisleta trabajamos para ofrecerte una gran experiencia sostenible, basados en los productos de cercanía, la vida en nuestra ciudad y todo lo que el entorno nos ofrece para sacar el máximo partido a la Ecovida.

Ecotienda de productos frescos de cercanía, granel y ultramarinos para tus compras sostenibles.

Ecocasa Mamadou, una vivienda vacacional con la esencia de la vida en Las Palmas.

Ecoturismo: Playa, surf, senderismo, bicicleta, historia, cultura y experiencias en nuestros alrededores.
Location: Las Palmas, Las Palmas de Gran Canaria

Name: Reclutamiento ORCHID HOUSE HOTELS
Description: Somos una cadena de Hoteles Boutique de Lujo, en los que hemos descubierto que hay un exquisito equilibrio entre estar lejos de casa y tener a la mano las lujosas comodidades de un hotel.

Name: Inteligencia Artificial y Hospitality
Description: Un punto de encuentro donde expertos en tecnología desvelarán los aspectos técnicos y su relación con el turismo y dónde los principales players del sector compartirán su visión presente y futura de la oferta y la demanda en relación a este nuevo paradigma.

Name: Novotel Christchurch Airport
Description:
4.5 Star Novotel Christchurch Airport Hotel, conveniently located outside the international and domestic terminals of Christchurch Airport, offers 200 comfortable rooms which feature modern décor, ergonomic comfort and high end amenities. Other features include on-site dining option, Food Exchange, featuring international cuisine with panoramic views of the Southern Alps, flexible conference options for your next meeting or event, and high tech fitness centre.

Novotel Christchurch Airport hotel is the perfect base for corporate travellers or those seeking a hotel located near the airport. With easy access to public transport options, you can venture to Christchurch city centre in less than 15 minutes. Our prime airport location provides a convenient post for exploring Christchurch. Less than 15 minutes from the city centre and affording access to Christchurch surrounds, scenic nature and wildlife parks including Orana Wildlife Park.

Christchurch is known for it's old heritage buildings and English style charm, combining the new with the old and offering lots of expansive green spaces. Meander along the iconic Avon river or cycle along the bike paths on its banks.

Name: Invisible Forest Lodge & Spa
Description:

Name: Rimforsa Strand
Description:
I en värld av konstant rörelse behövs platser att stanna till på. Platser för livets små stunder, minnesvärda möten och stora händelser. Platser som låter livet hända, bara man ger sig själv lite tid för det. Tiden är ju vad den är förstås, den står inte stilla här heller. Men du får göra det. Medan du tänker på annat, tänker vi på dig. För livet och minnena man bär med sig är inte det som händer när man springer så fort man kan. Utan från de stunder när du stannat upp, vid sidan om vardagen, på platser som Rimforsa Strand. 

Vi har inte den senaste teknologin, maxade bubbelbad eller flashiga gym. Vi har inte ens TV på rummen. Men vi har omtanke, vänskap och värme, precis vad vi tror att världen behöver. Tillsammans med lite lugn och ro förstås. Så skulle vi skaffa något att bada i förutom sjön här bredvid skulle det troligtvis inte ha bubblor. Bubblor passar bättre i champagne. (Vi har också en gnutta humor, om vi får säga det själva.)

Med naturskön omgivning, lugn atmosfär och närproducerad kvalitetsmat gör vi allt för att du ska få sakta in och fokusera på det som är viktigt för dig. Vi har fått lite av din dyrbara tid och du ska få mycket av vår omtanke. Tillsammans ser vi till att du får ut det mesta av din tid.

Name: Holenberg Home of cabin ANNA
Description:
Leven in de natuur
ANNA droomt van een groene wereld waarin we leven in de natuur. Elk mens, elke dag verbonden met de natuur. Een diepere connectie met elkaar en jouw omgeving op dagelijkse basis. Leven in een omgeving waar jij écht onderdeel van bent. 
Op Holenberg verblijf je in Cabin ANNA. Leven, slapen en werken in de natuur. De vrijheid om te leven met de elementen in een comfortabele omgeving. Hier is leven in overvloed. Laat je volledig onderdompelen en geef je over aan de elementen.  

Een werelds design
Cabin ANNA is ontstaan uit een verlangen om dichterbij de natuur te leven. Je kunt ANNA volledig aanpassen naar de gelegenheid, jouw stemming of het weer. Wijzig eenvoudig haar opstelling door te variëren met haar lagen. Cabin ANNA is als een nieuw organisme in het ecosysteem waarin je leeft en reflecteert de veranderingen die buiten plaatsvinden. In 2021 heeft Cabin ANNA één van 's werelds meest prestigieuze awards gewonnen voor het design!

‘Eén van de meest eco vriendelijke resorts van Europa’
Holenberg is in 2021 benoemd tot één van de 10 meest eco vriendelijke resorts van Europa door de gerenommeerde Britse krant The Guardian. De krant prijst de duurzame benadering van Holenberg: ‘Verscholen in een bos nabij de Maashorst vind je Cabin ANNA, met verschillende safari-, fiets- en wandelmogelijkheden in de directe omgeving. Jouw ecologische voetafdruk is tijdens een verblijf zoveel mogelijk gereduceerd’.

Geniet van Brabantse gezelligheid
Holenberg is onderdeel van Charme Camping Hartje Groen. Laat ons je verrassen door onze persoonlijke benadering en service. Geniet enerzijds van de natuur en privacy rondom jouw ANNA in het hart van het Holenbergbos. En zoek anderzijds juist de gezelligheid op met een hapje of drankje bij De Boshut of het ruime buitenterras. Kortom, het beste van twee werelden!

Holenberg is gelegen aan de voet van de Maashorst, het oergebied van Brabant. Ontdek tijdens je verblijf de overweldigende natuur van dit natuurgebied.

Description:
ADM SOLUÇÕES HOSPEDAGENS
Agência de Hospedagem para Obras

Gerenciamos hospedagens e serviços para empresas em obras de trecho em todo o país, com vagas fixas ou temporárias em hotéis, flats, pousadas, repúblicas e alojamentos.

Cuidamos da logística fora do canteiro de obras, entregando conformidade, economia e tranquilidade à administração, e qualidade de estadia aos trabalhadores.

Contamos com profissionais oriundos tanto de obras quanto da hotelaria, criando uma fusão de competências que nos permite entender profundamente a rotina do trabalhador em campo. Assim, entregamos ao usuário conforto e qualidade, e ao cliente final economia e aumento de produtividade.

Nosso propósito é claro: assumir a logística fora do canteiro, eliminando essa dor de cabeça da gestão, e entregar aos trabalhadores espaços bem estruturados, adaptados a diferentes culturas, gostos e hábitos.

Planejamento Assertivo: fornecemos números reais de hospedagem já na fase orçamentária.

Redução de Custos: gestão profissional evita desperdícios, desvios, passivos e autuações.

Segurança & Conformidades: alinhamento às normas regulamentadoras e práticas de hotelaria profissional.

Aumento da Produtividade: trabalhadores satisfeitos fora da obra rendem mais dentro dela.

Melhorar Performance: cuidamos da hospedagem para você cuidar da obra!

Description:
Il Villa Rosa Hotel 4* Superior a Desenzano del Garda è il luogo ideale per soggiorni di lavoro o eventi di successo: comfort e servizi business e meeting a vostra disposizione con professionalità e disponibilità.
La posizione eccellente, facilmente raggiungibile in treno o in auto, rende l'Hotel la location perfetta per poter organizzare un meeting aziendale o uno workshop.
Attrezzature moderne, ampia sala conferenze fino a 120 posti, assistenza efficiente, ristorante gourmet pronto ad accontentare qualsiasi esigenza: avrete a vostra disposizione tutto il necessario per poter organizzare un evento di successo.

Name: Boutique hotel Nautilus & restaurant Goldie
Description: The 4 star Boutique Hotel Nautilus is located on the hostorical Zizka square, at Tabor center. The hotel offers accommodation in 22 luxury rooms several categories, including a unique President Suite. Part of the hotel is also a newly built wellness center and BIB Gourmand Michelin winning restaurant Goldie offering a high level of gastronomy.

Name: Hotel Indigo Leeds
Description:
Welcome to Hotel Indigo Leeds

This stylish urban retreat captures the dynamic spirit of the city. Contemporary rooms feature unique artwork and vibrant designs inspired by Leeds' industrial heritage.

Guests can savour locally sourced cuisine and signature cocktails at The Banksia Bar & Restaurant, blending Mediterranean and Asian flavours.

Name: Hotel 3 Paardekens
Description: Oldest 3-star boutique hotel in the heart of Mechelen with view on St Rumbold's Cathedral.

Name: Hotel Vie Via
Description:
Vie Via is 'Just a Room' and not a traditional hotel. The perfect room from which to discover Leeuwarden. The starting point of your adventure to blend in and live like a local.

Via Via is an energetic alternative to the standard hotel experience and proves that low service does not mean that you have to compromise on lifestyle or comfort.

Name: ARIO Hotels Group
Description:
ARIO Hotels Group – Introduction
ARIO Hotels Group is a distinguished hospitality brand committed to redefining the art of luxury living and international hospitality. With a vision to create world-class destinations, ARIO Hotels Group blends elegance, innovation, and cultural richness to deliver unforgettable experiences.

 Our Vision
To become a global leader in hospitality by offering exceptional services, iconic hotels, and inspiring environments that reflect both tradition and modernity.

 Our Focus
Hotel Development: Designing and building luxury hotels that set new benchmarks in architecture and comfort.

Hospitality Excellence: Delivering premium guest experiences with personalized services and international standards.

Resorts & Leisure: Creating destinations that combine relaxation, entertainment, and cultural immersion.

Global Expansion: Establishing ARIO Hotels as a trusted name in diverse markets worldwide.

 Our Values
Luxury: Crafting refined experiences that embody exclusivity and elegance.

Innovation: Integrating smart technologies and modern design into every property.

Cultural Harmony: Celebrating diversity and connecting East and West through hospitality.

Sustainability: Building responsibly with a commitment to the environment and future generations.

 Our Mission
ARIO Hotels Group is more than a collection of hotels—it is a movement to inspire, unite, and elevate hospitality. With every property, we aim to create lasting memories and set new standards for luxury and service across the globe.

Name: THE ONSEN HOT SPRING RESORT
Description:
The one and the only natural hot spring resort and Japanese restaurant in Batu, Malang of East Java. It is ideally located in the amidst of lush pine trees scenery of the mountainous background in Batu, Malang. This is the ideal place for relaxing your mind and body .
Our 24 hour friendly staff will welcome you with fresh welcoming drink, and will lead you to the true Japanese villas and also the Japanese bathing culture and experience: ‘Onsen’. It is believed that enjoying onsen will be beneficial for your well being
Feel the uniqueness of our Japanese ambience and relaxing moment at The Onsen Hot Spring Resort.
東ジャワ州マラン地方バトゥ市で、日本料理店のある唯一の温泉リゾートへようこそ。
その素晴らしい立地と緑あふれる山々の自然の風景は、皆さまをリラックスさせる理想的な場所です。
弊社の親切なスタッフとウェルカムドリンクが、24時間皆さまを歓迎致します。
皆様のご健康のために、日本的なプライベート天然温泉の別荘をご案内致します。

Name: AYA Resort
Description: Step into an adults-only realm of divine elegance and pure pleasure. Here, Myconian architecture meets the worshipped, untamed beauty of Ayia Napa, in Cyprus. AYÃ Resort, with just 48 luxurious suites—some with private or swim-up pools—offers a sanctuary for those who seek refined indulgence.

Name: Udsigten Faxe
Description:
Danhostel Faxe Vandrerhjem er mere end blot et sted at overnatte, her lægger vi også STOR vægt på at servicen er i orden, således jeres overnatning er en god oplevelse. Vi tilbyder blandt andet comfort værelser af hotel standard, spændende natur og et smukt kalkbrud blot ét stenkast fra vandrerhjemmet.
Vi har plads til 88 mennesker fordelt på vores 21 værelser.
Vi hjælper også gerne med jeres næste arrangement, vi har forskellige lokaler til enhver lejlighed. Vores dygtige kok skal nok sørger for spændende og velsmagende mad, så tøv ikke med at kontakte os og få et uforpligtende tilbud på jeres næste arrangement.

Vi er en rummelig social arbejdsplads, hvor vi bl.a. beskæftiger p.t. 18 medarbejdere som alle er førtidspensionister, men som med deres arbejdsevne har ressourcer til at bidrage til arbejdsmarkedet, dette til glæde for gæster på Danhostel Faxe.

Name: RAK Rooms
Description:
RAK ROOMS prides itself on offering warm and personalized hospitality to all its guests, aiming to create memorable experiences that exceed expectations. Each property is thoughtfully designed to provide modern amenities, comfort, and convenience for both leisure and business travelers

As a company, RAK ROOMS is committed to upholding the highest standards of service, ensuring guest satisfaction is at the core of their operations. They prioritize integrity, ethical practices, and environmental responsibility, striving to be a responsible player in the tourism sector.
With a customer-centric approach and a dedication to continuous improvement, RAK ROOMS seeks to further expand its reach, offering more travelers the opportunity to enjoy their signature hospitality across various destinations.

Our Vision
The company's vision is to become a leading provider of exceptional hospitality experiences, setting new standards for guest satisfaction and loyalty.

Our Mission
Our mission is to create warm, welcoming spaces where guests can enjoy personalized service, modern amenities, and a home-away-from-home environment.

Core Value
Excellence, integrity, and customer-centricity drive RAK ROOMS. We embrace innovation, collaborate with respect, value sustainability, and are committed to continuous improvement, employee development, community engagement, and inclusivity.

Name: The American Colony Hotel Jerusalem
Description:
The American Colony Hotel - One of Jerusalem's premier Boutique hotels.

A historic part of this ancient landscape, The American Colony Hotel in Jerusalem is steeped in the stories of the city. Once the site of an American-Swedish commune, the hotel retains its utopian ideals with tranquil spaces dedicated to relaxation and contemplation.

The soft curves of Ottoman-inspired architecture reveal hidden courtyards and corners, with fragrant gardens in abundance. Creamy Jerusalem stone walls and vaulted ceilings are dappled with endless sunlight from graceful arched windows. From the summer suites with shaded terraces to the authentically-appointed winter rooms, every floor and room has a character of its own. Expect beds made in Italian Frette linens, and bathrooms stocked with Aqua di Parma toiletries and snow-white bathrobes.

Name: Novotel Den Haag City Centre
Description: Feel Welcome on the page of the Novotel Den Haag City Centre, a 4 star, 113 bedroom hotel located in the monumental Passage in the centre of the beautiful city of The Hague.

Name: Kasteel Ter Wallen
Description:
Boutique Hotel Ter Wallen bevindt zich in het hartje van de stad Izegem in een oase van rust en gezelligheid. Ontdek de zes unieke kamers en ervaar 100% charme in een hedendaags perspectief. 

Het iconische kasteel is de perfecte locatie om uw gasten te ontvangen, te vergaderen met collega's, een weekend door te brengen met vrienden of om gezellig te ontbijten.

Name: TripJD.Com
Description:
TripJD Hotel Reviews is India’s fast-growing and most trusted hotel review platform, dedicated to delivering honest, experience-based insights for travellers across the country. We explore a wide spectrum of properties — from budget-friendly rooms, hostels, homestays, and boutique hotels to premium luxury resorts and 5-star experiences. Every review we publish is based on a real stay, real experience, and real interaction with the property, ensuring genuine transparency for our audience.

Our mission is simple: to empower travellers with accurate, unbiased, and practical information that helps them make informed decisions. In a world where digital promotions often overshadow reality, TripJD stands on the values of honesty, clarity, and authenticity. We evaluate stays across multiple essential parameters including room quality, cleanliness, staff behaviour, amenities, food experience, location advantages, price fairness, and overall value for money.

At TripJD, we believe travel content should not just inspire — it should simplify decision-making. Our review format is structured, research-driven, and created to match the expectations of modern travellers, families, corporates, and digital nomads. With India’s travel landscape rapidly evolving, our channel serves as a reliable guide to help travellers discover the best stays, hidden gems, and trustworthy hotel options across metropolitan cities, tourist destinations, pilgrim routes, business hubs, and offbeat locations.

We collaborate with hotels, travel brands, tourism boards, and hospitality professionals to bring verified insights and storytelling-driven content that resonates with a wide audience. TripJD continues to grow as a credible voice in the Indian hospitality content space, aiming to uplift service quality and enhance guest experiences through transparent reviews and meaningful feedback.

TripJD Hotel Reviews –
Real Stays. Real Experiences. Real India.

Name: GrowersGo Boutique Hostel Huelva
Description:
Primer hotel boutique de Huelva. Tu oasis de paz, salud y crecimiento en la ciudad de Huelva.

4 cascadas de agua, aromaterapia, musico terapia, ventanales gigantes y techos altos en espacios comunes, habitaciones y baños.

Gastronomía rica, saludable, fresca y local.

Mas de 20 talleres para reducir estrés, para personas, empresas e instituciones. 

Espacios para eventos y coworking únicos, exteriores e interiores, llenos de vida natural  inspirando conexiones y creatividad.

App única en el mundo que combina crecimiento personal y jardinería en un juego, para ayudarnos a aprender, cuidar el medio ambiente y y crecer un poquito cada día

Name: Four Points Ciudad Juarez
Description: Our new and modern hotel is located in one of the fastest growing financial areas north of Ciudad Juárez, in Plaza Cantabria, a lively spot with restaurants, bars and business offices. Enjoy an uncomplicated stay in one of our 139 spacious and comfortable rooms. Start every morning with a complimentary breakfast buffet and meet and mingle with friends and colleagues at the end of the day to enjoy the best local craft beer from our Best Brew program, or a delicious meal with fresh ingredients in our bar and restaurant. Keep fit in our 1,000 sq. ft gym or take a dip in our outdoor rooftop swimming pool while enjoying the city views. If you are planning a business meeting or social event, our modern meeting rooms are equipped with the latest technology, to accommodate from 10 to 250 people. All the amenities you love plus free extras like high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the hotel and parking.

Name: Noden 2 Hotel & Apartment
Description: NODEN 2 is a trendy hotel in the heart of the city, providing a range of room options and modern amenities for both leisure and business guests. The hotel boasts a prime location, fully-equipped kitchens, dedicated workspaces, a state-of-the-art gym, and a stunning rooftop pool with breathtaking panoramic views.

Name: Cibola Hospitality
Description: Med erfarenhet och känsla för gästupplevelser och effektiv hotelldrift utvecklar vi hotell som stärker framtidens destinationer.

Name: Reserva Alto Agrelo
Description:
Reserva Alto Agrelo es una propuesta única que fusiona el sello de excelencia de Duhau con la inmensidad de la montaña mendocina, creando un nuevo paradigma en estilo de vida e inversión en Argentina y América Latina.

Ubicado a solo 35 kilómetros de la ciudad de Mendoza y 35 minutos del Aeropuerto Internacional El Plumerillo, este destino inigualable ofrece vistas panorámicas privilegiadas al Cordón del Plata y al volcán Tupungato. 

En sus más de 400 hectáreas, Reserva Alto Agrelo albergará:

 Casa Duhau | Un hotel 5 estrellas de villas exclusivas.
 116 Lotes Residenciales | Chacras de lujo en un entorno natural incomparable.
 Bodega Agrelia: una experiencia boutique de alta gama con el asesoramiento de Michel Rolland y Marcelo Pelleriti.
 Casa David - Wine & Horses | Club hípico con instalaciones de primer nivel.

Impulsado por el compromiso y la visión de las familias Scalesciani y David—referentes en hotelería y desarrollo en Argentina—Reserva Alto Agrelo marca un hito en la región. Este ecosistema hotelero y residencial redefine el concepto de exclusividad, combinando autenticidad, innovación y el potencial incomparable de Mendoza.

Bienvenidos a un destino donde la naturaleza y la excelencia se encuentran.

Name: Wellness hotel WINDSOR / Restaurace LEGENDA / Hotel ZÁTIŠÍ
Description:
ABOUT THE HOTEL
A four-star hotel with a welcoming atmosphere and a long tradition since 1894 of offering comfortable accommodation in the centre of Špindlerův Mlýn with views of Medvědín and Svatý Petr. For many years, it has been one of the most popular hotels in the Giant Mountains.

Wellness Hotel Windsor Spindleruv Mlyn is an ideal place for family holidays, stays with children or for those who are looking for active holidays, wellness stays, adrenaline ....
Wellness Hotel Windsor consists of two buildings, which are not interconnected.Wellness Hotel Windsor consists of two buildings, which are not interconnected.
The main building has 36 rooms, a restaurant, conference facilities, children's playroom, bar CUBAR, manicure and pedicure salon.
Wellness building (depandance) is located just 8 m from the main building. It has 20 rooms, wellness, Tawan massage parlour and underground parking.

Name: Villa Heidebad
Description:
De meest inspirerende vergaderlocatie van de Veluwe. Een sfeervol en gastvrij hotel. Een bosrijke ontmoetingsplaats. Een pittoreske plek waarbij culinaire kennis en kunde centraal staat. Conferentiehotel Villa Heidebad is het allemaal. Kom dus ook naar deze unieke en betaalbare vergaderlocatie.

Conferentiehotel Villa Heidebad heeft 45 hotelkamers en biedt in totaal ruimte aan maximaal 135 personen. Zakelijke gasten vinden hier een oase van rust waardoor ze optimaal gefocust op de Veluwe kunnen zijn. Iedereen wordt bij ons warm ontvangen!

Name: The Oasis Hotel, Llandudno
Description: The Oasis Hotel on Llandudno seafront is a haven of relaxation, where modern comfort meets coastal charm. Nestled in the heart of this charming Victorian town offering picturesque views of the sea, The Oasis welcomes guests to tastefully decorated interiors and boasts a warm and welcoming ambiance. Wake up to the inviting aroma of a freshly cooked breakfast, a highlight of your stay. Served in our charming dining area, the breakfast at The Oasis features a delectable spread of locally sourced ingredients. From hearty English breakfast classics to lighter options, our chef ensures a culinary experience that complements the tranquil surroundings of Llandudno's seafront. Whether strolling down the promenade or enjoying the vibrant local culture, our seafront hotel provides a delightful retreat for a memorable stay in Llandudno.

Name: Hotel Abigail Goradia’s shirdi
Description:
Established in 1998, Hotel Abigail Goradia’s is one of the pioneer business class star hotels in Shirdi combining luxury with serenity located on footsteps of Shri Sai Baba temple. The premier hotel is an ideal stay over for holiday with friends and family, transit stay on way to Pune, Mumbai, and Nashik to give a quick homage to the Shrine and even corporate business cum leisure traveler. Situated off Pimpalwadi Road, the hotel offers easy access to highways and to entry and exit points. Shirdi is a major pilgrimage as well as leisure destination and people visit the city throughout the year because of Shri Sai Baba.

Shirdi… You know your lord will listen to your prayers, no matter where you are. Shirdi Sai Baba has innumerable followers across the world, which has turned Shirdi into a major pilgrimage destination in India. Due to it’s spiritual and meditation culture, Shirdi is also a major leisure destination for those who seek relief from their stressful life and work pressure.

The hotel is located less than 100 meters away from Shri Sai Baba temple, so close that you may hear Baba’s aarti right inside your room. The hotel is centrally located just 1 km away from Shirdi bus stand, 3 km from Shirdi Sainagar railway station, 14 km from Shirdi International Airport and 75 kms from Shani Shingnapur.

We are waiting to welcome you to Shirdi!

Name: Treffen House Doha
Description:
Set in the business district, this casual hotel is an 11-minute walk from shopping at Souq Waqif. It's also 1 km from waterfront walks on the Doha Corniche and 15 km from the New Airport.


The relaxed rooms have flat-screen TVs, minibars, and tea and coffee-making facilities. Wi-Fi and 24-hour room service are available. Suites add separate lounges.

Amenities include a gym, a sauna, and a hot tub, plus an outdoor pool with sunloungers. There's a relaxed Mediterranean restaurant, a French cafe where breakfast is served, and a steakhouse with a bar and city views.

Name: Norte Suites Boutique
Description:
Norte Suites Boutique: lujo frente al mar para líderes que buscan más que una simple estadía.

En el exclusivo destino de El Ñuro (Los Órganos - Piura, Perú), Norte Suites Boutique, redefine el concepto de desconexión ejecutiva y reconexión estratégica. Con solo 14 suites frente al mar, combinamos arquitectura contemporánea de lujo, privacidad absoluta y un servicio personalizado que entiende las verdaderas prioridades de quienes lideran.

Aquí, el tiempo se transforma en un aliado: baja el ritmo, se aclaran las ideas y surgen nuevas posibilidades.

Somos el lugar perfecto para:

 Escapadas ejecutivas que equilibran descanso, inspiración y enfoque estratégico.
 Retiros corporativos boutique donde los equipos se fortalecen en un entorno seguro y privado.
 Eventos privados, lanzamientos de marca o celebraciones en un espacio exclusivo y seguro.
 Vivir tu boda soñada, pedidas de mano, luna de miel, renovación de votos.
 Programas de bienestar diseñados para renovar cuerpo y mente de líderes y colaboradores.
 Viajes de reconexión personal y profesional en sintonía con la naturaleza.

Cada experiencia en Norte está cuidadosamente diseñada para equilibrar productividad con bienestar. Ya sea en una suite con vista al mar, en una cena privada con cocina contemporánea regional  o en una sesión de yoga al amanecer, todo en Norte invita a tomar decisiones con claridad, conectar con propósito y avanzar con energía renovada.

Somos el único hotel boutique en la idílica playa El Ñuro, el paraíso natural de las tortugas y las majestuosas ballenas. Estamos ubicados dentro de un condominio privado, con 5km de playa libre para explorar en total privacidad.

Te esperamos en nuestro hotel donde la tranquilidad no es un lujo, sino una estrategia.

 Escríbenos directamente o conoce más en nuestras redes sociales.

Name: Hotel Avail
Description:
Whether it's all-business or business with a side of adventure.

Experience the elevated charm of Hotel Avail, part of the Tapestry Collection by Hilton, and redefine your Northwest Arkansas visit.  

Hotel Avail is an elevated lifestyle hotel, designed to blend business and pleasure, offering upscale amenities and efficiencies at every touchpoint, allowing guests to tailor their stay to create the experience they want.  

Situated in the heart of Pinnacle Hills, Hotel Avail offers easy access to top attractions, just steps from the convention center, Walmart Arkansas Music Pavilion, and Topgolf. Enjoy convenient shopping at the nearby Promenade and bike access to the Razorback Greenway. Your adventure begins at Hotel Avail—where endless possibilities await.

Name: Eco Wild Glamping
Description: Nestled on a mountainside in Belihuloya, Eco Wild Glamping hosts five fully furnished tents and five pop-up tents all with spectacular views of Bambarakanda Falls. Surrounded by three and a half acres of un-spoilt forest, tea bushes and vegetable farming. It is the perfect place to disconnect from the hustle and bustle of city life and to reconnect with nature to sooth your soul.

Name: EMPIRE INN UK
Description:
Your coastal escape in the heart of Blackpool.

Empire Inn is more than just a place to stay — it's a destination where seaside serenity meets everyday comfort. Nestled in the heart of Blackpool, we offer a warm and relaxed atmosphere that invites guests to unwind, explore, and make lasting memories.

Our inviting interiors and thoughtful touches create spaces where travelers — whether solo, with friends, or as a family — can feel at ease. From calm mornings by the shore to peaceful evenings in your room, every detail at Empire Inn is designed to make you feel at home.

At Empire Inn, we believe in the beauty of slowing down.
Here, guests can step away from the rush of daily life and reconnect — with the sea, with loved ones, and with themselves.

Whether you're in town for a getaway, a celebration, or simply passing through, Empire Inn offers the comfort and care that makes every moment feel special.

Empire Inn — Where the coast meets comfort.

Name: Alino Hotel New Manila
Description:
WARMTH IN EVERY DETAIL
It's the little things that matter the most. A warm smile, a thoughtful
gesture, or remembering the table you prefer to sit at during breakfast
– these seemingly simple elements, done exceptionally well, create a
lasting impression.
ELEVATED ESSENTIALS
Filipino hospitality doesn't rely on extravagant gestures or luxury
amenities. It focuses on mastering the basics – attentive service, a
clean and comfortable environment, and genuine care – and elevating them to an art form.
LASTING CONNECTIONS
By focusing on the basics done well, we foster genuine connections with
guests. It's not about creating an illusion of grandeur; it's about
creating an environment where
guests feel welcome and cared for like family.
LEGACY OF FILIPINO HOSPITALITYThe "basics done well" will be our
signature hospitality philosophy. It will be a philosophy that transcends trends, ensuring a consistently warm and welcoming experience for all our guests.

Name: Hotel Hubert Brussels
Description:
If you like your atmosphere funky with a side of extravagance, you’re going to love this place.

Hotel Hubert is a great option for travellers looking for a hotel in Brussels’ city centre. All rooms have air conditioning and free Wi-Fi. They also have a flatscreen TV, safety deposit box and private bathroom equipped with a hairdryer and specially designed toiletries. Last but not least: there’s a refrigerator for guest convenience.

"Hassle free" is a word we hold dear at Hotel Hubert, so easy mobile check-in, check-out and spotless rooms are key to us.

The hotel shares its ground floor with The Foodmaker, where guests can enjoy the healthiest breakfast in Brussels that €15 can buy. From 4 o’clock in the afternoon, you can get a snack at the food truck. Food truck? Yes, there happens to be an actual food truck in the lobby. One that sells extraordinary gourmet hot dogs and has an ever-changing menu. 

The bar is open until 11 PM. If you’re hungry or thirsty after that time, you can get your own drinks and snacks at the Grab&Go, which is open all night.

Feel like pumping iron? Or going for a run? Hubert’s got you covered: there’s also a gym where guests can work out on state-of-the-art equipment. 

The hotel is conveniently located for travellers looking for fun things to do in Brussels as well as for business purposes. It’s just a 6-minute walk to the iconic Grand Place. Brussels Central Station is a 5-minute stroll from Hotel Hubert, while Mont des Arts is located only 7 minutes away by foot. The nearest airport is Brussels Airport, about 15 km from Hotel Hubert.

Name: Øvre Sem Gård
Description:
Nyt en deilig natt!

På Øvre Sem Gård har det vært hotelldrift i en årrekke. Med et personlig preg, historisk sus, lokal mat og sentral plassering kombinerer vi det landlige og luftige med det praktiske og tilgjengelige. Vi tar imot overnattingsgjester i grupper, i tilknytning til arrangementer og individuelle bestillinger.

Vårt historiske hotell
består av totalt 47 rom, hvorav 2 er juniorsuiter, 20 dobbeltrom, 5 familierom og resten er single. Nyt en himmelsk frokost med råvarer fra lokale produsenter.

Kurs og Konferanse
Vi har kompetanse, fasilitetene og det tekniske utstyret til å gi ditt neste arrangement de beste forutsetninger. Konferansesaler og møterom i ulike størrelser, overnatting for tilreisende og et unikt kjøkken. Name: DUKE Host S.L
Description:
At DUKE Host, we are more than just a company that manages rentals of apartments for touristic use in Madrid; we are in the pursuit of a greener, more sustainable future. Since 2004, we have been deeply ingrained in the real estate world, and in 2017, we ventured into managing touristic rentals.
In the ever-evolving world of touristic rentals, we saw an opportunity to make a significant difference. We strongly believe that responsibility should be a vital feature in the industry. With this conviction, we embarked on a mission to professionalize touristic rentals, aligning them with ecological values and circular economy principles. 
We understand the importance of responsible tourism, and we strive to lead by example.

Name: Skjolden Hotel Luster
Description:
Unikt overnattingssted innerst inne i Sognefjorden, ved foten av Jotunheimens perler.
La drøm bli til virkelighet og legg turen til Skjolden Hotel og la deg begeistre i naturskjønne omgivelser.
Hotellet har 41 rom, hvorav 25 med fjord utsikt. Total renovert i 2016. 

Vi høster bær, frukt og urter fra egen hotelhage. Sopp og ville vekster plukker vi i skogen. Å sylte, safte og forvelle av naturens mangfold er ett privilegium. Lokale bønder leverer geitost, kalv, okse, hjort og spekemat til vårt kjøkken. 

Nasjonalparkene  Brehiemen, Jostedalen og Jotunheimen ligger i umiddelbar nærhet og gir tilgang til eventyrlige naturopplevelse. Vi har gleden av å skreddersy turer til våre gjester daglig. Fossefall, elvestryk, fjellturer, isbre-vandring, fjordsafari, kajakk padling, Stavkirker, verdensarvsenter, fjellturer og sykkelturer høyt og lavt, er drømmeturer klar for å  oppleves. 

Randonèe, langrennsløyper eller trugetur helt frem til juli for de mest ivrige.

Dagen starter gjerne med ett forfriskende bad i fjorden før frokost nytes.

Ettermiddagen tilbringes fjerne på terrassen med noe kaldt forfriskende fra eget bryggeri eller Skjolden Sideri.

Hotellet holder åpent fra midten av april til slutten av september hvert år.

Description:

Beautiful Cycling Routes are passing right in front of EnjoyNature like the loop around Lake Vesijärvi 84,3 km, Hollola kirkonkylä (Hollola Village) loop from Messilä 18,3 km, Hollola kirkonkylä – new bike path loop from Messilä 30,2 km and many more.

All EnjoyNature rooms are with own toilet and shower. With bigger rooms suitable as family room. The rooms are completely accessible. We serve a delicious and varied breakfast or you can make your own food in a shared kitchen included in the room rate. Check our rooms here!

Name: The Morgans Collection
Description:

Comprising 4* boutique hotel Morgans Hotel, 4* guest accommodation Morgans Townhouse, 5* luxury guest accommodation The Georgian Swansea, and the Queen’s Hotel pub, the Morgans Collection is a well-respected, independent Welsh business and its properties are recognised as some of the best in the city.

The Morgans Collection takes its name from its owner and founder Martin Morgan, who grew up in Brynhyfryd, Swansea and worked as a welder, before taking on a travel agency business and eventually founding Morgans Hotel in 2002 in a stunning Grade II listed building, the former headquarters of the Swansea Harbour Trust, at the gateway to Swansea’s Maritime Quarter.

Today, Morgans Hotel is recognised as the number one hotel/place to stay in Swansea, as ranked by verified guests and visitors on TripAdvisor and Booking.com, with sister site The Georgian Swansea right behind it in second place!

For the hardworking team at The Morgans Collection, no task is too big and no ask is too small – they’re dedicated to ensuring every guest feels supported during their stay and is equipped with everything they need or desire.

Name: Gran Claustre Boutique Hotel Restaurant & Spa
Description:
HOTEL GRAN CLAUSTRE, RESTAURANT & SPA
Hotel boutique único en la Costa Dorada.

El hotel Gran Claustre es uno de los hoteles más singulares y exclusivos de la Costa Dorada.

Está situado en el casco antiguo de la villa medieval de Altafulla, en la provincia de Tarragona, a 1 km de la playa y a 15 km de la ciudad de Tarragona.

Está considerado un hotel de edificación singular, ya que uno de sus edificios data del siglo XVIII, y se encuentra dentro de “La Vila Closa” de Altafulla, declarada bien cultural de interés nacional.

El Hotel Gran Claustre es un hotel con encanto que ofrece una combinación perfecta entre su estructura tradicional y una decoración moderna. Dispone de 39 habitaciones, todas distintas y distribuidas en dos edificios.

Su restaurante gastronómico Bruixes de Burriac, by Jaume Drudis, es el complemento ideal para deleitarse con la cocina autóctona mientras se disfruta de una escapada o de unos días de vacaciones en la Costa Dorada. El hotel Gran Claustre también te invita a relajarte y cuidarte en su acogedor spa.
__

A unique boutique hotel on the Costa Dorada.

The Hotel Gran Claustre is one of the most unique and exclusive hotels on the Costa Dorada.

It is located in the old quarter of the mediaeval village of Altafulla in the Tarragona province, 1km away from the beach and 15km away from the city of Tarragona.

It is considered a monument hotel as one of its buildings dates back to the 18th century, and it has been declared a cultural asset of national interest.

The Hotel Gran Claustre is a charming hotel, offering the perfect combination of traditional structure and modern decoration. It has 39 rooms, everyone different from the rest and distributed over two buildings.

Its gastronomic restaurant, Bruixes de Burriac by Jaume Drudis, is the perfect way for you to enjoy local cooking while enjoying a short break or holiday on the Costa Dorada.

The Hotel Gran Claustre also invites you to relax and treat yourself in its welcoming spa.

Name: Broomhall Castle Hotel
Description:
Broomhall Castle Hotel is a historic hotel located near Menstrie, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. The hotel is set within a 19th-century baronial mansion, which gives it a distinctive and charming character. The castle's architecture and interior design reflect a blend of traditional Scottish elements and modern comforts.

The exterior of Broomhall Castle features classic stone walls, turrets, and towers, evoking the atmosphere of a traditional Scottish castle. The surrounding grounds offer picturesque views of the Scottish landscape, creating a serene and peaceful setting for guests.

Inside, the castle has been transformed into a hotel with comfortable accommodations and various amenities. The rooms are equipped with modern facilities while retaining a touch of historic charm. Guests can expect cozy and tastefully decorated rooms with en-suite bathrooms, comfortable furnishings, and all the amenities needed for a comfortable stay.

The castle also features event spaces that can be used for weddings, conferences, and other special occasions. The grandeur of the castle's architecture adds an elegant and memorable backdrop to any event held there.

While Broomhall Castle Hotel isn't explicitly themed around the Harry Potter series, its historic castle setting might evoke a sense of magic and fantasy that aligns with the spirit of the series. It offers a unique opportunity for guests to experience a stay in a traditional Scottish castle while enjoying modern conveniences.

Name: Best Western Plus Västerviks Stadshotell
Description:
Västerviks Stadshotell är ett fyrstjärnigt fullservicehotell i hjärtat av skärgårdsstaden Västervik. Vi ligger på Storgatan, bara 75m från havet, den livliga strandpromenaden. Under vårt tak finns en uppskattad spaavdelning, festvåning och i vår restaurang Gustawas Kök & Bar möter gamla tider nya. 

Med 102 rum och 10 konferensrum är vi Västerviks största hotell- och konferensanläggning. Att vara störst är dock inte det viktigaste för oss. Att ge en personlig service, hålla en hög kvalitet och att våra gäster har det lite bättre än hemma är vårt mål. 

Våra konferensrum har modern teknik och är personligt inredda. Här möts från 2 personer och upp till drygt 200. Är man fler än så, så tar vi hjälp av någon av våra samarbetspartners. För oss är det viktigt att du uppnår ditt mål med mötet eller konferensen. Därför underlättar vi genom att hantera allt runtomkring, så att du kan koncentrera dig på dina egna punkter. Vi fixar all mat och fika runtomkring men även aktiviteter om ni önskar det. Det kan vara allt från en vinprovning på ett nytt sätt, till att grilla ute i skärgården eller åka Ferrari, och till att dina deltagare får lära sig att sabrera en vinflaska. Vi har många aktivitetsförslag - men tar gärna emot dina andra önskemål!

Name: SEPHS Hotel
Description:
Bij SEPHS Hotel geloven we heilig in dromen.  In de dromen van de talenten op het Watersley Sports & Talentpark, van de topsporters die hier groeien, van jou als onze gast. 

En of je hier nu verblijft om te herstellen en op adem te komen. Of je nu komt omdat je in de buurt moet zijn of om met nieuwe dromen terug naar huis te gaan.  

Slapen bij SEPHS betekent dat je onderdeel bent van het Watersley Sports & Talentpark. Een plek waar we samen met een nieuwe generatie de wereld een beetje mooier maken. Waar topsport en talentontwikkeling centraal staan. Waar je profiteert van alles wat er nodig is om het beste uit jezelf te halen. Maar ook: een plek waar je met jouw verblijf een waardevolle bijdrage levert om de topsporters om je heen te helpen groeien.

Want zo doen we dat hier bij SEPHS. Samen, met elkaar. Want je kunt nooit te groot dromen. Samen kun je een heel eind komen en dromen laten uitkomen.  

Blijf geloven. Blijf dromen.

Name: Thorskogs Slott
Description:
Thorskogs Slott är beläget i en underbar engelsk park trettio minuter norr om Göteborg. Med tinnar och torn, vackra personligt inredda rum och salonger, värdskap i världsklass, utsökt mat, trolska omgivningar och guldkant på tillvaron erbjuder vi en upplevelse utöver det vanliga.

Thorskogs Slott har varit inspelningsplats för Stjärnorna på Slottet, Miffo, Åsa-Nisse, Fallet och nu senast En del av mitt hjärta. 

Vi har 40 rum varav 9 sviter, 24 dubbelrum och 6 grand-litrum samt 1 enkelrum fördelade dels på själva slottet och dels i övriga byggnader av historiskt ursprung i den vackra engelska slottsparken. Det finns sex matsalar och sju konferenslokaler med plats för upp till 100 gäster. Vårt kök bjuder på utsökta upplevelser för såväl öga som gom.

Svartedalens trolska urskog är vår närmsta granne och erbjuder avkopplande naturupplevelser med mossar, badsjöar och vattenfall och i slottsparken finns en sexhåls pitch- och puttingbana, bouleplan, kubb, krocket, vedeldade kar samt bastu och inne på slottet finns biljard och dart. 

Vi anordnar vildmarksdagar, matlagningsaktiviteter, mordmysterier, choklad-, vin- eller champagneprovningar, lerduveskytte i skogsgläntan mm. 

Vi erbjuder mysiga weekendpaket, storslagna fester och bröllop samt kreativa konferenser.
 
Varmt välkomna till en annan värld!

Name: Hotel Stelor
Description:
Hotel Stelor är ett gotländskt boutique gårdshotell 25 min söderut från Visby. Här på gården finns det stora stenhuset ifrån 1700-talet som består av 7 unika rum och kök, vår röda stora lada som är perfekt för konferens, bröllop, fest och event. Restaurangen som är öppen på kvällarna för god mat och skönt häng och sist men inte minst vår trädgård – där vi odlar och låter hönsen gå fria.

Här på Hotel Stelor älskar vi att laga god mat på säsongsbetonade och lokala råvaror som tillsammans med våra duktiga producenter och lokala bönder omtänksamt tagits fram med hänsyn till djur, jordhälsa och miljö. 

Tillsammans vill vi skapa en dynamisk, rolig och avslappnande plats där ni som besöker oss kan känna er som hemma och njuta av vår natur som vi har runt omkring oss. Dels i vår trädgård men också vid stranden som ligger bara några hundra meter bort. Låna en av våra cyklar så kan ni också bege er längre bort och utforska västra kusten på Gotland. Ni får också gärna följa med oss när vi skördar hos odlaren Gunnar eller hälsar på våra djur som vår granne och bonde Torbjörn föder upp åt oss.  
Vill ni rida, golfa, eller surfa när ni besöker Gotland så har vi dessa aktiviteter bara runt knuten ifrån oss och vi hjälper er gärna att boka.
Vi lovar det även finns grejer att göra på Gotland året om.

Name: Casa Divina Eco Lodge
Description: Situated just outside of the town of Mindo, in the Pichincha province, Casa Divina Eco Lodge offers elegant, environmentally conscious accommodations nestled in the pristine Ecuadorian cloud forest. Our spacious, private cabins are handcrafted from locally harvested timber and are the perfect landing place for rest and relaxation after a day of exploring this beautiful place we call home. We are locally owned, operated, and located in the Choco Andino Pichincha Biosphere Reserve, an internationally recognized biodiversity hotspot home to some of the best birdwatching in the world. Fresh, homestyle meals are prepared with local flavor and international flair. We’re happy to accommodate special diets as needed, either way, we prepare meals with love and you’ll be able to add to your birding life list right from the breakfast table. Our staff is ready to attend to your every need so you can relax and enjoy the magic of this paradise we call home. If you’re looking for more than rest and relaxation, be sure to inquire about booking private tours through our sister company, SabinaTour Operator. We’ll help you customize a premium package of activities that pique your interest and maximize your enjoyment of all our region has to offer.

An estate of 18 hectares, cultivated organically are the great commitment and passion of our farm, we have recovered a native grape variety "Ritrovamento" that has returned to produce for us grapes from which we now obtain a small production of our "house wine". 
A place to find silence and the pleasures of good Mediterranean cuisine, where the slow rhythms of country life coexist harmoniously with the most modern comforts.

Name: Hilltop Boutique Hotel
Description:
Our story
It starts in 1960 when Mr Schoeman drove along the mountain path looking for a beach in Victoria Bay. He, by chance, found the land that Hilltop is built on and decided that this is the perfect location to build their family holiday home.  Hilltop was transferred to his son, Hennie, in 1967. Hennie and his wife revamped Hilltop into a bed-and-breakfast, known as Hilltop Country Lodge, receiving their first guests 24 December 1998. They hosted guests from all over the world, sharing the magnificent view and creating lasting memories that guests fondly reminisce on. After 24 years of enjoying their labour of love, it is time to transition into their new life phase and hand over the custodianship of Hilltop.

In April 2022, the new team at Hilltop received the role of continuing the legacy and spirit of what Hilltop embodies: Eden. We decided to create a brand that aligns with the legacy and class of Hilltop. Now known as Hilltop Boutique Hotel.

Our team feels privileged to host you and our desire is that you come to refresh, recharge and realign. Take a moment to be still and reconnect to True North.

Name: Jantzens Hotel ApS
Description:
Velkommen til Jantzens Hotel i Gudhjem.

Med 150 år som hotel i drift er Janztens Hotel Gudhjems ældste hotel og én vigtig del af Gudhjems historiske bybillede. 

Jantzens Hotel ligger i pittoreske Gudhjem på Bornholm, hvor den ikoniske ejendom daterer sig helt tilbage til 1872. Hotellet er både storslået og intimt med en farvestrålende historie. Og det har fået lov til at stå som et nutidigt vidnesbyrd om Gudhjems historie. 

Beliggende anden række fra havnen og havet, men forsat med en storslået havudsigt, er man tæt på sommerens puls og alligevel trukket så meget tilbage, at hotellets charmerende gård og klippehave henfører en til en helt anden verden. 

Gårdhavens lodrette klippevæg og mange forskellige terrasseniveauer giver stedet en nærmest sydlandsk stemning, og med sin placering midt i byen, er hotellet utvivlsomt Bornholms smukkeste byhotel.

Name: Nadi Nature Resort
Description:
Nadi Nature Resort is a relaxing and spacious eco-resort of 4 tented villas suitable for adults and young adults 12 years old and above. Each tent is situated amongst the lush jungle ravine with views of waterfalls, mountains, and rice fields.

Each tent is private and equipped with AC and a ceiling fan, an indoor ensuite bathroom with hot water, and a private deck leading into a garden space. Relax and be immersed in the beautiful views of the natural jungle, river, and scenic rice paddies of Jatiluwih, Bali.
- View of mountains + rice paddies
- Cooler climate
- 3 rivers (clean + clear water, bamboo forest spring)
- 2 waterfalls on-site
- Eco glamping experience
- Adults only (must be 12 years old and above)
- No pets allowed (only welcome at Nadi Farm Cafe)

Nadi Farm Cafe is set in a permaculture farm with views of rice terraces to the south and an edible garden looking up to three volcanic mountains to the north. The Farm Cafe uses naturally grown produce harvested from its own farm and neighbouring farms located within 5-30 minutes from the farm kitchen, creating a low-carbon impact menu.

Passionate about regeneration, Nadi Farm Cafe ensures that its organic compost waste is returned to the land so the soil can continue its cycle with the next harvest and future ingredients.

Name: The Angel Hotel

Name: Jimbaran Bay Beach Resort & Spa
Description:
Welcome to The Jimbaran Bay Beach Resort & Spa, an independent, family-friendly retreat, just footsteps from Kedonganan Public Beach and the spectacular Jimbaran Bay.  Catering for domestic and international business and leisure travellers, and perfect for couples and families, our contemporary-styled Bali Resort opened in 2016, providing service from the heart, comfortable accommodation and quality facilities at an affordable price.

Jimbaran Bay Beach Resort & Spa presents 117, secure and quiet, air-conditioned guest rooms and suites within 11 different categories over four floors. Supporting facilities include two restaurant, a spa, swimming pool with sundecks, gym, hospitality lounge, a wine lounge, pool bar and rooftop bar with unique design of furniture and art deco inspired by traditional Jimbaran fisherman village overlooking into 360 degrees view of Jimbaran Bay, internet corner, free WIFI throughout, a multi-functional meeting room, and a ballroom that spills out onto a rooftop terrace, complete with glorious sunset views over the bay – ideal for weddings, parties and events. The grace and hospitality of the Balinese people is evident in the friendly smiles and attentive, yet unobtrusive, service of our thoughtful staff, who are on hand to look after your every need.

Jimbaran lies on the western side of Bali’s narrow isthmus, a sweeping bay that curves from the southern side of the Ngurah Rai International Airport and the start of the Bukit Peninsula. The peaceful Jimbaran Beach is an alluring crescent of golden sand lapped by calm blue waters. Every morning, the fishermen return to the shore in their gaily-painted boats to trade their marine harvest at the bustling Kedonganan Fish Market. In the late afternoon, another attraction demands attention in the form of a legendary Bali sunset, while visitors take front-row seats in the famous Jimbaran seafood restaurants, which line the beach and serve up the catch of the day.
