Name: River Drive Motel
Description:
River Drive Motel is a five-room boutique motel located in the coastal town of Tarwin Lower, just a two-hour drive away from Melbourne. Tucked alongside the Tarwin River, the motel, sitting within 1 acre of garden offers tranquil riverside accommodation and breezy strolls to local activities. It’s a relaxed getaway for all - family, romantic or solitary.
Soak in the charms of the river and enjoy the slower side of life. Go on scenic walks or take out the fishing rods. Local IGA, post office, cafe and pub are all within walking distance so you can settle right in. Hit the beach at Venus Bay just up the road. If you’re up for a daytrip, drive down to Victoria's largest coastal wilderness at Wilsons Promontory National Park.

The motel has been lovingly refurbished, featuring modern Australian design throughout. With a nod to holiday nostalgia, the result is a cosy atmosphere for everyone to kick back, relax and make lasting memories.

River Drive is a self-contained motel. You will be given a unique code to access your room throughout your stay. Once you are in we wont disturb you unless you need us! Each room also has a dedicated on-site parking for your convenience.

Amenities have been thoughtfully provided. For your extra grazing needs, available for purchase in the mini bar are locally sourced wines, beer, and treats.

Guests are invited to enjoy the outdoor space complete with outdoor shower, BBQ's and sink for washing up all the fish you catch, along with picnic tables, other seating space on the grass and bike parking.

Guests have access to THE SHED where we keep all the extra fun bits such as lawn games, extra fridge space for all your fishing needs and a communal ice machine - required!

Name: Hotel Corona de Castilla

Name: Hotel Niza
Description:
Hotel de 3 estrellas*** en primera linea de playa con los mejores servicios:

- En el restaurante del hotel niza podrás disfrutar de un un desayuno completo, comidas, cenas y room service.

- WIFI. Disponemos de wifi gratuito en todo el Hotel.

- AIRE ACONDICIONADO. Disponemos de aire acondicionado en todo el establecimiento y en todas las habitaciones.

- LAVANDERÍA. Servicio lavandería y planchado.

- CAJA FUERTE. Disponemos de cajas fuertes individuales en recepción.

- GARAJE. Disponemos de plazas de garaje de pago limitadas, por lo que es aconsejable reservarlas con antelación.

- BICICLETAS. Disponemos de bicicletas gratuitas para uso de clientes.

- INFORMACIÓN. En nuestra recepción, nuestro personal plurilingüe le informará de todas las actividades y servicios que necesite durante su estancia.

- CONSIGNA. Consigna de equipajes.

Además de contar con una historia emblemática.

Dª Juana Eguren, nacida en Zumárraga, de familia dedicada a la hostelería (Hotel Paraíso, Zumárraga), llega a San Sebastián a principios del siglo y compra el Hotel Biarritz en la plaza de Zaragoza. Casada con D. Juan Juantegui, tiene cuatro hijos: Amparo, Maritxu, Carmen y Antonio.

En 1908 compra la villa de la calle Zubieta y construye el Hotel Niza. La Dirección del Hotel es llevada por su sobrina Dª Mª Luisa Alvaro. Los inviernos permanece cerrado y se trasladan a vivir al Hotel Biarritz, donde Dña. Juana, mujer de una personalidad extraordinaria, llevaba todos los asuntos en cuanto a economía, control, gerencia…..

Durante la guerra civil, se construyen dos plantas más en el Hotel Niza, altura que tiene en la actualidad. El bar Biarritz fue el lugar del Restaurante donde los clientes alojados y en régimen de pensión completa degustaban los platos preparados por el Sr. Linder, ex cocinero del Kaiser alemán.

En 1970 se quedan como únicos propietarios Eduardo Chillida, su mujer Pilar Belzunce y sus ocho hijos. Se inicia una ambiciosa reforma quedando como está en la actualidad.

Name: Taigaschool, Eco-Hotel. Finland.
Description:
Taigaschool Eco Resort, beautifully located in the pristine nature of Kuusamo near the enchanting Lake Kitka, is excited to announce that we are expanding our offerings with a unique Tensile Treehut stay. As pioneers in Finland for this type of accommodation, we aim to become the largest treehouse hotel in Finland by the summer of 2024.

Our resort offers five meticulously designed rental units that seamlessly combine comfort and sustainability, along with the option to stay in our traditional log cabin by the lake. We take pride in our extensive eco-initiatives that promote deep ecological awareness and sustainable practices among our guests.

An increasing number of visitors choose Taigaschool for the 'Sisu Plus' 360-degree wellness experience, which includes advanced breathwork, sauna, and cold exposure techniques—all set within an ultimate natural environment. The absence of excessive light, noise, radiation, traffic, and crowds reinforces that nature is a special place for connection and reconnection.

Located just 10 minutes from Ruka, Finland's number one winter sports destination, and surrounded by four national parks, our resort provides easy access to both adventurous and relaxing activities. Additionally, the airport is just a 30-minute drive away, ensuring smooth arrivals and departures.

At Taigaschool Eco Resort, we strive not only to offer exceptional accommodations but also to create an unforgettable connection with nature. Our special arrangements for high-end groups, families, and yoga groups focus on well-being, stress management, and restoring natural connections. By continuously improving our facilities and services, we meet and exceed our guests' expectations, offering a stay that is not only enjoyable but also contributes to a better world.

Name: Wyndham Houston near NRG Park & Medical Center
Description:
When you stay with us, you will find yourself situated within easy travel distance of some of the biggest attractions, conferences, trade-show, and events in Houston, including NRG Park Arena, George R. Brown Convention Center, Houston Toyota Center, and all the best Houston has to offer. The hotel is also located near leading educational institutions such as Rice University, Texas Southern University, and University of Houston Main Campus. If a business meeting or a visit to the Texas Medical Center is what brings you to town, look no further as we’re close to it all.

The Wyndham Houston near NRG Park/Medical Center first hosted guests in 1969 as the famed Astroworld Hotel servicing visitors, famous musicians, politicians, and celebrities alike. Since then the historic hotel has been a well-known local gem in the Houston community. Steeped in tradition, community leaders and multiple family generation have been known to hold their social and wedding events here. In total, the hotel boasts 62,000 square feet of space for events that can be arranged to host 25 separate meetings, including multiple majestic ballrooms and a number of banquet receptions and meeting spaces. Weddings, celebrations, soirees, seminars, presentations, and more – if you can dream it, we can host it. 

Plan an important business gathering or fantastic celebration with 22 versatile event venues that can accommodate up to 2,500 guests at our top-rated event venue. In addition, our hotel boasts 393 non-smoking rooms and suites with ample onsite parking. Extras like our on-site restaurant and bar, state-of-the-art fitness center, outdoor pool, business center, and gift shop ensure a stress-free stay.

We invite you to contact our expert Events, Groups, and Wedding Planners directly at (713) 795-8414 or email sales@wynhou.com for more details.

Name: Mama Shelter Belgrade
Description:
Perched at the very top of the Rajićeva Shopping Center, in the pedestrian zone of Knez Mihailova Street, Mama Shelter Belgrade brings a unique blend of design, atmosphere, and experiences to the heart of the city.

For years, it has been a must-visit destination for anyone seeking more than a classic hotel stay- beloved by both locals and travelers from around the world.

The hotel features 125 rooms across seven categories, combining functionality, comfort, and a distinctive visual identity. Whether you're in Belgrade for business or leisure, Mama offers the perfect balance between the warmth of home and the pulse of the city. 
Some rooms even boast spectacular views of Kalemegdan Park and the Belgrade Fortress.

Mama’s restaurant area is just as impressive: renowned for its abundant Sunday brunch, which has become a beloved ritual for many Belgraders, as well as for its lively weekend music program. Thursday and Saturday DJ sets, Friday live bands, and a diverse food and drink selection give every evening at Mama its own rhythm. 

The space is pet-friendly and exudes a casual yet thoughtfully designed atmosphere.

In addition to its gastronomic offerings, Mama Shelter also provides multifunctional ateliers-perfect for meetings, workshops, presentations, or private gatherings.

With its blend of hospitality, design, and character, Mama Shelter Belgrade remains one of those places you don’t visit just once - you keep coming back, each time with the same feeling of coming home.

Name: Ritual de Terra Jávea y Moraira Resort & Spa
Description:
RITUAL DE TERRA RESORT & SPA – JÁVEA Y MORAIRA

Ubicados en la deslumbrante Costa Blanca en Alicante, Ritual de Terra Resort & Spa Jávea y Ritual de Terra Resort & Spa Moraira son un refugio exclusivo en donde el lujo y la naturaleza se entrelazan para ofrecer una experiencias de relajación en cuerpo, mente y espíritu en un entorno de incomparable belleza.

En Ritual de Terra, cada día está repleto de posibilidades para explorar, consentirse y desconectar de la rutina diaria. Desde aventuras en aguas turquesas hasta caminatas por senderos rodeados de naturaleza, relajarse en un spa de lujo o descansar en tu propia suite con terraza, este destino te invita a experimentar el Mediterráneo desde una perspectiva completamente renovada. La oferta culinaria dirigida por el reconocido y galardonado estrella Michelin, Nazario Cano, incluye auténticos sabores mediterráneos elaborados con ingredientes locales y de temporada, creando un viaje gastronómico que complementa a la perfección la experiencia de bienestar.

Ritual de Terra Resort & Spa en Jávea y Moraira te invita a vivir una escapada que trasciende lo común: un descanso de lujo para reconectarse con uno mismo, disfrutar del arte de vivir bien y descubrir una nueva forma de experimentar el Mediterráneo.

 Descubre más en: www.ritualdeterra.com

Name: Twin Peaks Lodge
Description: We are an ecologically conscious residential facility which integrate sustainable architecture with regenerative farming which provides an opportunity to reconnect with nature and experience simple village life. The facility comprises of a lodge and a mud house. There are 5 bedrooms, 2 kitchens and 2 sitting areas. The facility is located in Ayun, Chitral in Pakistan's northern areas surrounded by the Hindukush mountain range. it is only 18 Km from the fabled Kalaash valley which is home to one of the oldest surviving cultures in the world. The area is famous in the province for its pristine beauty and serene environment. It is a preferred getaway for those who want to have a peaceful place to unwind and relax. The lodge and mud house can be booked for individuals rooms or in their entirety for families.

Name: Statek Samsara
Description: Samsara je sanskrtský výraz pro kruh života. Je synonymem neustálého putování a znovuzrození. Díky naší výhodné poloze, perfektnímu zázemí a prvotřídní kuchyni je Samsara ideální základnou nejen pro vaše firemní konference, teambuildingy a svatby. K dispozici vám bude konferenční sál pro 80 osob nebo komornějsí salonek pro 12 osob, audiovizuální technika, spolehlivá wifi a samozřejmě dostatek soukromí. Nebo naopak můžete využít našich venkovních prostor a spočinout pod baldachýnem. Ubytujeme vás v některém ze sedmi dvoulůžkových pokojů, jednom rodinném pokoji, apartmánu s balkonem nebo luxusním studiu s celkovou kapacitou 32 osob. Zrelaxovat můžete v našem jedinečném wellness, kde si vychutnáte finskou či parní saunu a následně se ponoříte do vířivky s nádherným výhledem do malebné krajiny Moravského krasu. Jsme dokonalým místem nejen pro vaši svatbu. K vaší duševní i fyzické pohodě přispějí i naše zvířata, která jsou nedílnou součástí našeho Statku. Pro váš aktivní odpočinek vám rádi doporučíme zážitkové aktivity v našem okolí. Budeme vás hýčkat!

Name: The Elite Narasapura, a member of Radisson Individuals
Rahulihomes Furnished apartments Jyvaskyla
Description:
Apartments are brand new and are located in a wonderful location in Jyväskylä next to Lutakko Square, in a building that was completed in 2022. The balcony of the apartments has a direct view of Lutakko Square, the center of Jyväskylä, and Jyväskylä harbor & lake. The view is absolutely amazing! Each apartment has its own sauna.
City center is a 6-8 minute walk.
Jyväskylä Paviljonki, train station, supermarket, restaurants are 2-5min walking distance.
In the living room you can enjoy the nice scenery or the 55" TV and enjoy Finnish design as Marimekko and Vallila

The apartments have 2 bedrooms, both of which have blackout curtains & blinds and 2 x 80cm beds, which can also be combined into double beds. As well as high-quality pillows and blankets. In addition to this, the apartment has a guest bed.

The kitchens in the apartments are well equipped, e.g.
Moccamaster coffee machine
Fridge
Freezer
Induction hob and oven
A microwave oven
Kettle
Toaster
Iittala dishes, glasses and cups

There is enough storage space. Each bedroom and hallway has a large wardrobe and, in addition, a separate wardrobe.
The apartment has its own washing machine, iron, ironing board and clothes steamer.

The apartment also has its own parking space in the parking garage on the ground floor of the building.
Guest access
There is keyless access to the apartments using Pindora smart locks. On the check-in day at 2:05 p.m., you will receive a code and a link that will allow you to enter the apartment. For same-night bookings, the code comes max 20 minutes after booking. The same code applies to the outside and the apartment door. The code starts working at 4 pm, which is also the check-in time. In addition, a traditional key is waiting on the table in the apartment, which is also at your disposal.
Other things to note
Silence is between 22:00 and 06:00. All our apartments are non-smoking. Residents can park for free in the yard of parking hall of downstears of the building Vitosparkk

Santé boasts luxury accommodation, a world class Day Spa, Health Optimizing Clinic and Bio Energy Centre and an elegant tranquil Conference Centre.

Surrounded by magnificent mountains, Santé is the ultimate sanctuary for anyone who wants to re-energize, rejuvenate and revitalise the body and mind. Enter a haven with serene spaces and uncomplicated luxury full of heart with generous hospitality and exquisite, honestly healthy cuisine.

At Santé high-tech and high-touch approaches are blended to define a service formulated around each individual. Programs start from 2 days and are customized to suit our guests, each with their own unique requirements and health status.

Name: White Grass Ocean Resort & Spa
Description:
Located on Tanna, in the south of Vanuatu's beguiling Archipelago, lies White Grass Ocean Resort & Spa.  Nestled on an idyllic stretch of coral reef coastline, The 18-room Resort boasts spectacular sunsets over the South Pacific ocean. 

The resort's ocean view restaurant serves modern cuisine featuring organic island produce, sustainably caught seafood, lobster, prawns, organic beef and the famous island-grown Tanna Coffee.   

The onsite PADI Eco Dive Centre, Volcano Island Divers, offers daily shore and boat dives.  

Daily tours to Mount Yasur Volcano, Blue Cave, Lowanatweiu Waterfall and Louniel black sand surf beach, Port Resolution, the Giant Banyan Tree and unique kastom villages. 

Ocean view swimming pool set amongst tranquil, manicured tropical gardens. 

Nabisa Day Spa features massages, wraps, scrubs and facials using organic ingredients sourced on Tanna including coconut and Tamanu oil. 

The resort is the perfect destination to relax, unwind, explore and discover authentic kastom villages, breathtaking waterfalls, dramatic marine landscapes and the majestic Mount Yasur.

Enjoy our complimentary social hour 3 days a week and our hot breakfast served daily. You can relax in our Courtyard, unwind by a Fireplace in the Great Room or stay productive by getting your laundry done with our free laundry machines while you stay on top of your fitness routine in our fully equipped 24-hour Fitness Center.

Name: Radisson Hotel Paramaribo
Description:
Welcome to Radisson Hotel Paramaribo, your premier destination for comfort, business, and leisure in Suriname.  

Located in the heart of downtown Paramaribo, Radisson Hotel Paramaribo offers world-class hospitality, modern accommodations, and exceptional service for locals, business and leisure travelers.

Whether you're visiting Suriname for a corporate trip, a relaxing getaway, or an extended stay, we provide the perfect blend of luxury, convenience and great service.

-Accommodations & Amenities

Spacious Rooms & Suites – Experience elegant, well-equipped rooms with modern decor, high-speed WiFi, and comfortable bedding for a restful stay.  

Micro Rooms – Our Micro Rooms are designed for solo travelers, business guests, and digital nomads seeking a stylish yet budget-friendly stay. Featuring space-efficient layouts, modern interiors, and all essential amenities, these rooms are perfect for those who value comfort, functionality, and affordability.
 
- Dining Experiences

Sazón – An authentic Peruvian restaurant led by Chef Daniel Paz , serving flavorful dishes inspired by Peru’s rich culinary heritage.  

Rumors Bar & Grill – A stylish spot for cocktails, wines, and premium spirits in a vibrant setting.  

Puro Café – The go-to place for gourmet coffee, fresh pastries, and light bites.

- Meetings, Events & Experiences

 Conference & Meeting Rooms – Modern facilities for corporate events, business meetings, and private gatherings. 
 Rooftop Venue – A breathtaking space for special events, corporate parties, and weddings with stunning city views.  

Radisson Hotel Paramaribo is more than just a place to stay it’s a destination for memorable experiences. Whether you’re here for business, leisure, or long-term accommodation, we are dedicated to making your stay unforgettable.

Take the train into Downtown Denver, surrounding metro areas, or straight to Denver International Airport. You'll thrive at Residence Inn with the conveniences you need, like spacious suites with a fully equipped kitchen ready for your favorite cuisine and complimentary hot breakfast to start mornings off right. Work up a sweat in our 24-hour fitness center or swim a few laps in our refreshing indoor pool. Name: Hotel Donaldson
Description:
Luxury heritage hotel in the heart of Downtown Fargo. Hotel Donaldson offers far more than a place to sleep. Art-filled rooms; beds you’ll linger in; artisan cuisine paired with wine, beer, and spirits; and friendly, experienced staff members create a memorable experience.

After more than 100 years as a fraternal lodge and hotel, the building took on its current life in 2003 after a three-year renovation process. Since then, The Hotel Donaldson has become recognized for its exceptional hospitality and its role as a central location for downtown Fargo’s nightlife, dining, and culture.

Name: Morgan & Mees Rotterdam
Description: Our hotel is situated in a stunning Bauhaus-style monument constructed in 1938, and now accommodates 20 rooms and suites, a penthouse, spacious restaurant, cocktail bar, and covered terrace.

Name: LAS OLAS BEACH RESORT
Description:
Located on Playa La Barqueta, the longest beach on the Pacific coast of Panama, stretching 14 kilometers, Las Olas Beach Resort offers an unparalleled experience of relaxation and connection with nature. This oceanfront resort features 50 rooms, each designed to provide comfort and spectacular ocean views.

The resort is situated within an agrotourism finca known for its rich biodiversity. Visitors can enjoy an environment surrounded by exotic birds, horses, and cattle, and experience authentic farm life.

The resort’s philosophy is based on the "Farm to Table" concept, ensuring that the food served to guests comes directly from the products cultivated on the finca. This guarantees a fresh, healthy, and delicious culinary experience.

In addition to its natural setting and focus on sustainability, Las Olas Beach Resort offers a variety of services and activities:

Rooms: 50 rooms with ocean views and all modern amenities.
Dining: Fresh and organic menus inspired by the "Farm to Table" concept.
Nature: Agrotourism finca with a great diversity of fauna and flora.
Activities: Enjoy nature-related activities such as bird watching, fishing, horseback riding, and exploring the finca. We also offer kayaking, surfing, yoga, and a spa.
Sports and Leisure: 4 tennis courts, a pool for adults and children.
Meetings: Convention center with a capacity of up to 400 people, ideal for social and corporate events.
Las Olas Beach Resort is located just 20 minutes from Enrique Malek International Airport in David and 45 minutes from Costa Rica, making access to this coastal paradise convenient.

Residency Options: For those who wish to make this paradise their home, we offer real estate options in the area surrounding the resort, allowing interested parties to relocate to this beautiful natural setting.

Name: Hotel Madinat Córdoba
Description:
En el corazón de la antigua medina de Córdoba, a escasos metros de su gran Mezquita-Catedral, entre callejas blancas y empedradas, en el área de mayor relevancia patrimonial del Conjunto Histórico, Patrimonio Mundial de la Humanidad por la UNESCO, se encuentra el Hotel Madinat, en un edificio protegido con categoría cuatro estrellas donde emerge la esencia de la ciudad milenaria y cuyo nombre rinde homenaje a las tres medinas que albergó la Córdoba Califal: Madinat al-Zhara, Madinat Al-Sira y Madinat Qurtuba.
Hoy en día, el Hotel Madinat conserva la fisonomía de una antigua Casa-Patio de estilo señorial, cuya estructura y muros ahondan sus raíces en el siglo XVIII. Su belleza actual se remonta al último tercio del XIX y principios del XX, donde, regentada por la burguesía de la época, adopta un estilo modernista y ecléctico que se hace presente en numerosos elementos de la casa: el zaguán, con suelo tapizado de teselas que conforman coloridos juegos geométricos, cuya portada evoca el orientalismo en un intento de emular la filigrana califal y cuya reja sólo permite dejar paso a la vista de curiosos y a las corrientes de aire que limpian y refrescan la casa; la escalera, con baranda flanqueada por dos efigies gemelas, cuyo pasamanos en noble madera se contonea para indicarnos que desde el techo nos vigilan cuatro cariátides, representantes de la rica yesería ornamental. Las baldosas hidráulicas semejan una exposición de tapices destinados a vestir los suelos, y los vidrios y ventanales se prodigan anhelantes de un mar cercano.

Name: Visit IOI Resort City
Description:
The “Think Again” campaign is the most comprehensive initiative from IOI Properties Group Berhad’s Hospitality & Leisure Segment, uniting all our hotels, leisure attractions, and IOI City Mall within our flagship township of IOI Resort City under the new brand, Visit IOI Resort City.

This dynamic campaign aims to raise brand awareness, drive visitation to our destination, and establish IOI Resort City as the premier choice for both domestic and international tourists. We invite visitors to explore our new website, visitioiresortcity.com, to discover and learn about the multitude of activities available here.

Visit IOI Resort City is an independent destination marketing agency dedicated to promoting IOI Resort City and its unique offerings. Our mission is to reshape perceptions and elevate the brand, ensuring that locals and visitors alike discover the vibrant experiences and attractions that make IOI Resort City a must-visit destination.

This bold new brand showcases the vibrant pulse of IOI Resort City, featuring four internationally branded hotels, an 18-hole golf course, and the iconic IOI City Mall, the largest shopping mall in Malaysia. With 2.54 million sq. ft. of net lettable area and over 700 shops, it attracts approximately 3 million visitors monthly. Additionally, the Palm Garden Golf Club, which recently reopened with upgraded facilities, and the newly launched Pickleball Park at the Palm Garden Hotel enhance the area's appeal to both golf enthusiasts and leisure seekers. 

Surrounded by premium residential offerings, luxurious retail spaces, and a state-of-the-art convention center, IOI Resort City is a comprehensive destination for stay, work, and play. Notably, it is home to Malaysia's first Moxy Hotel and boasts the highest concentration of Marriott Bonvoy hotels, including the Le Méridien Putrajaya and Putrajaya Marriott Hotels.

Name: Amor Laut
Description:
Established in 2017 and operational since 2021, Amor Laut emerged from the shadows of the former Vistamar Beach Resort. The 2-hectare coastal property harbors 14 spacious suites, an alfresco grand restaurant, two elegant pools, and a lavish garden and multipurpose area that can host events up to 200 pax at the time.

At Amor Laut, we carry personal and quality time for our guests in our highest banners. All our suites come with high-quality bedding and linens, multiple split-type air conditioning units, a furnished balcony or terrace, and a two-person rain shower for your convenience. Our pools undergo daily cleaning, and our restaurant combines Western specialties alongside the local traditional dishes with an extra flair. The garden offers a relaxing environment where numerous rare birds have found their home and nesting space.

Only a few hours from Manila and located in Mabini, Batangas, the resort finds itself in the center of a region well-known for its biodiversity in marine life, often referred to by experienced divers and photographers as unique and outstanding. As the home of Crestamar Dive Pro, this hideaway establishment comes with a highly experienced and well-equipped dive center, along with knowledgeable dive guides and instructors, able to entertain any level of diver or student. 

Amor Laut takes pride in providing its guests with an exquisite location for events suitable for any occasion. From business events to corporate meetings, weddings to team-building outings. Everything is feasible with a detailed and personalized outlay.

With phase 1 complete and phases 2 and 3 in the pipeline, Amor Laut is already setting a new standard of quality, dedication, and service in the area, with the constant aim to keep our guests happy and returning for many years. 

Amor Laut. Your home away from home.

Name: Himmelsby Spa & Konferens AB
Description:
Välkommen till Himmelsby SPA & Konferens – en upplevelse utöver det vanliga

I hjärtat av Östergötland ligger vår exklusiva anläggning där lyx, återhämtning och effektivitet möts. Vi välkomnar både affärsresenärer och privatpersoner som söker en högklassig upplevelse i en miljö präglad av omtanke och hållbarhet.

Vår stolthet är den 2500 m² stora Romerska simhallen med pooler, jacuzzis och bastur – en unik och storslagen miljö för total avkoppling. Här erbjuds även professionella behandlingar i vår rogivande spa-avdelning.

För företag erbjuder vi moderna konferensrum utrustade med den senaste tekniken. Här kombineras produktivitet med återhämtning, och vi erbjuder flera populära aktiviteter – Westernkampen är en uppskattad favorit bland våra konferensgäster.

Boendet är smakfullt inrett med komfort och lugn i fokus, och vår restaurang Jordnära serverar gastronomiska upplevelser med lokala råvaror – lika passande för affärsluncher som för romantiska middagar.

Vi värnar om miljön och arbetar aktivt med hållbarhet i hela verksamheten – från energismarta lösningar och miljövänliga städ- och köksrutiner till återbruk och långsiktiga val.

Utöver spa och konferens erbjuder vi även gym samt närhet till naturnära aktiviteter som vandring och cykling.

Hos oss möter du ett engagerat team som sätter personlig service i första rummet. Oavsett om du besöker oss för affärer, vila eller fest – vi ser till att du känner dig sedd, välkommen och inspirerad.

Välkommen till Himmelsby – där kropp och själ får återhämta sig i en miljö utöver det vanliga.

Name: Krusenberg Herrgård
Description:
Välkommen till Krusenberg Herrgård – en historisk pärla intill Mälaren, strax utanför Uppsala och med bekväm närhet till Arlanda. En sagolik plats för alla typer av arrangemang. Här får du och dina gäster eller deltagare mingla i vackra salonger och konferera i historiska lokaler. Detta kombinerat med matupplevelser, aktiviteter och total avkoppling med behandlingar, vedeldad bastu och grönskande omgivningar.

Varmt välkomna!

Name: Unity Tampere
Description:
Ennen täällä tehtiin sukkia ja neuleita. Nyt on tarjolla yösija unohtumattomassa ympäristössä – ja paljon muuta. Pyynikin vanhalla Trikootehtaalla on nimittäin UNITY Tampere. 

Olemme uudistaneet tehtaan paikaksi, jossa voit yöpyä mukavasti viikonlopun verran tai asua kätevästi vaikka kuukausia. Samalla teimme siitä uudenlaisen työelämän vilkkaan keskuksen ja majakan kaikille matkustajille.

Kun tulet UNITY Tampere Trikootehtaalle, haluamme että olet kuin kotonasi. Trikootehdas voi olla sinulle vaikka loma-asunto kaupunkirannassa. Jos taas etsit väliaikaista kotia, se on arkesi turvasatama. Kaupungin keskustan humu on kivenheiton päässä ja Pyynikin luonto vielä lähempänä. Voit myös vaan olla ja nauttia.

Boutique- tai design-hotelliksikin meitä voisi sanoa, ennen kaikkea olemme koti matkustajille ja pitempää väliaikaista majoitusta tarvitseville. Täällä Trikootehtaalla voit elää kuin kylässä kaupungin kainalossa. UNITY Tampereella on 148 studioasuntoa, joista valita. Ne sopivat vähän tavallista mukavampaan asumiseen ja lomailuun.

Meille voit tulla myös tekemään töitä. Täältä löytyy jaettu uWork-työtila, jossa ideat sinkoilevat ja eri alojen ammattilaiset kohtaavat. Kaikenlaiset tapahtumat onnistuvat nekin kokous-ja juhlatiloissamme. Ja löytyy meiltä vuokrattavaksi myös Tampereen hienoin sauna Pyhäjärvinäkymin ja isolla terassilla varustettuna. Kokoustekniikkamme on uusinta uutta ja jos järjestelyissä kaivataan apua, me autamme.

UNITY Tampere Trikootehtaan löydät järven rannalta, metsän katveesta, Tampereen keskustan kupeesta.

Description:

Enjoy homestyle Italian dishes, inventive craft cocktails, and a wide selection of beer and wine at Cascata Italian Cuisine, located inside the hotel. The 4 star Holyrood Hotel, known for its stunning location, its fantastic facilities and the warmth of its welcome. Located in the heart of Bundoran, the Holyrood has a beautiful Blue Flag beach practically on its doorstep and offers breathtaking views of the Atlantic Ocean.
Known as the ‘jewel in the crown’ of the North West of Ireland, Bundoran is Donegal’s most southerly town and it’s most popular seaside resort. It’s also a main stop on the famous Wild Atlantic Way. 
It’s no wonder given its breathtaking beauty. Here you can stroll along the headland, breath in , clean air and feel the ocean spray on your face. There really is no better way to blow away the cobwebs!
Bundoran not only offers a fantastic selection of amenities, it’s the perfect base from which to visit sites of historical and cultural interest. In fact, there’s so much to see and do in the area, you’ll be spoilt for choice.
The Holyrood Hotel attracts holidaymakers of every kind and in particular couples, surfers and families with children.
The Holyrood Hotel offers a number of dining options. All of our food is fresh, locally sourced and prepared on the premises each day. We pride ourselves on the quality of our cuisine and the wide selection of meals and beverages that we offer. We cater for all dietary needs and look to ensure our vegan, vegetarian and coeliac guests enjoy their meal to the highest quality. 
We have a modern leisure club and a luxury new spa - The Spa @ Orchids. Our Japanese themed Spa with relaxation room, single and couples treatment rooms , nail stations, pedicure room, brow bar, treatment baths, outdoor hot tub and sauna. Treat yourself to pure indulgence in an oriental sanctuary of peace and tranquility. Our Experienced therapists are ready to pamper you.

From intricately designed interiors inspired by Jaipur’s timeless craft traditions to modern amenities that ensure a seamless stay, Saur Homestay is more than just a place to rest – it’s an experience. Guests can indulge in authentic Rajasthani flavors, unwind in serene common areas, and immerse themselves in the city’s vibrant art, architecture, and history.

 Why Choose Saur Homestay?

Boutique accommodation with personalized hospitality

Handpicked design elements reflecting local culture

Comfortable, spacious rooms with modern amenities

Quiet yet accessible location in Jaipur

Perfect for solo travelers, couples, and small groups

At Saur Homestay, we believe in slow living, meaningful interactions, and creating memories that last beyond the stay. Whether you’re here for leisure, work, or exploration, our home welcomes you with open arms.

 Jaipur, Rajasthan |  Boutique Homestay |  Authentic & Personalized Stays

Name: UNITY Tampere Trikootehdas
Description:
Ennen täällä tehtiin sukkia ja neuleita. Nyt on tarjolla yösija unohtumattomassa ympäristössä – ja paljon muuta. Pyynikin vanhalla Trikootehtaalla on nimittäin UNITY Tampere. 

Olemme uudistaneet tehtaan paikaksi, jossa voit yöpyä mukavasti viikonlopun verran tai asua kätevästi vaikka kuukausia. Samalla teimme siitä uudenlaisen työelämän vilkkaan keskuksen ja majakan kaikille matkustajille.

Kun tulet UNITY Tampere Trikootehtaalle, haluamme että olet kuin kotonasi. Trikootehdas voi olla sinulle vaikka loma-asunto kaupunkirannassa. Jos taas etsit väliaikaista kotia, se on arkesi turvasatama. Kaupungin keskustan humu on kivenheiton päässä ja Pyynikin luonto vielä lähempänä. Voit myös vaan olla ja nauttia.

Boutique- tai design-hotelliksikin meitä voisi sanoa, ennen kaikkea olemme koti matkustajille ja pitempää väliaikaista majoitusta tarvitseville. Täällä Trikootehtaalla voit elää kuin kylässä kaupungin kainalossa. UNITY Tampereella on 148 studioasuntoa, joista valita. Ne sopivat vähän tavallista mukavampaan asumiseen ja lomailuun.

Meille voit tulla myös tekemään töitä. Täältä löytyy jaettu uWork-työtila, jossa ideat sinkoilevat ja eri alojen ammattilaiset kohtaavat. Kaikenlaiset tapahtumat onnistuvat nekin kokous-ja juhlatiloissamme. Ja löytyy meiltä vuokrattavaksi myös Tampereen hienoin sauna Pyhäjärvinäkymin ja isolla terassilla varustettuna. Kokoustekniikkamme on uusinta uutta ja jos järjestelyissä kaivataan apua, me autamme.

UNITY Tampere Trikootehtaan löydät järven rannalta, metsän katveesta, Tampereen keskustan kupeesta.

Name: Vitale Retraites
Description: Déchargez-vous et rechargez-vous dans un endroit incroyable. La Vall de Gallinera est située en contrebas de Valence, loin du tourisme de masse de la Costa Blanca. Un secret que les Valenciens préfèrent garder pour eux. L'un des 8 villages est Benissivà, une petite vallée et au bord, à côté de l'église de San Miguel, se trouve Casa Gallinera, une finca avec 9 belles chambres et une piscine avec de belles vues. Mais le véritable secret réside dans l'intérieur préservé avec vue sur la montagne de La Foradà, où vous pourrez toujours profiter d'une paix sereine et d'une vie tranquille. C'est le point de départ idéal pour des randonnées, alternant entre montagne et mer. Déchargez et rechargez à la Casa Gallinera. La maison, restaurée en 2000, avec vue panoramique sur la chaîne de montagnes de l'Ombrie, dispose d'une belle piscine utilisable presque toute l'année grâce à son orientation et de plusieurs terrasses et d'un verger. La maison est donc idéale pour des groupes de 14 à 24 personnes. Idéal pour une réunion de famille, lieu de mariage idéal et également inspirant comme lieu de travail pour les entreprises et bien sûr aussi comme magnifique maison de vacances. Avec 9 chambres spacieuses, dont une suite de luxe et une chambre familiale, meublées avec goût et détails, toutes équipées de climatisation, chauffage central et salle de bain privée. D'excellents matelas et vous n'avez pas besoin de masque car il fait noir et très calme : tout pour une bonne nuit de sommeil. Une cuisine équipée d'équipements de cuisine, notamment d'un four micro-ondes, d'un minibar et d'un véritable four à pizza à bois, est à votre disposition. Vous pourrez vous détendre dans le salon, bien au chaud en hiver avec le poêle et un bon livre de notre bibliothèque et en été, vous pourrez vous rafraîchir ici. Oh oui, et chaque matin, je vous offre un petit-déjeuner car tout le monde a droit à un petit-déjeuner bon et sain et à commencer la journée détendu.

Name: Iraipe Hoteles
Description:
Somos Iraipe Hoteles, un grupo hotelero de la zona norte de España que empezó su historia en el año 2014, con la apertura del Iraipe Hostal Pamplona. No hemos parado de creer: actualmente tenemos 12 establecimientos ubicados en las ciudades más icónicas del norte del país.

Nuestra filosofía se basa en el concepto “smart hotel” y en el uso de la tecnología para crear alojamientos inteligentes y eficientes.

Regentamos los siguientes establecimientos:
- Hostales: Hostal Pamplona y Hostal Izaga (Noáin, Pamplona)
- Pensión El Camino Urban Rooms, en Pamplona
Apartamentos Burgos Centro, en Burgos, Castilla y León
- Hoteles de 1 estrella: Hotel Gorbea, en Vitoria, y Hotel Ongi, en Oñate, Guipúzcoa
- Hotel de 2 estrellas: Hotel Achuri, en Miranda de Ebro, Castilla y León
- Hoteles de 3 estrellas: Hotel Logroño, Estella Rooms, en Estella, Navarra, y Hotel Santuario de Arantzazu, en Oñate, Guipúzcoa

También contamos con restaurantes de gastronomía tradicional y producto de cercanía, y con amplias salones destinados a la celebración de eventos.

Via Hotels Group is a leading Albanian Hotel Selection with properties across the main cities : Durres, Tirana and Saranda. From optimally located urban hotels and practical aparthotels to tranquil beach and country resorts. 

Elegant VIA HOTELS showcases an authentic variety of the finest comfort Albania has to offer, and smart VH HOTELS promises guests urban practicality and flavour.

Additionally, we offer 22 versatile meeting rooms, fully equipped with the latest audiovisual technology, perfect for events of any size. Our facilities can host everything from small meetings to large conferences and banquets, with capacity for up to 700 people.

Name: Hotel Nikko Kaohsiung
Description:
ホテル・ニッコー高雄は、台湾第二の都市として成長を続ける高雄市に開業いたします。高雄は古くより東北アジアから南太平洋に抜ける交通の要衝として栄え、現在も台湾最大の国際港として重要な役割を果たし、港周辺には、企業の拠点が点在しています。また、風光明媚な景色が楽しめる港は観光スポットとしても人気を集めています。首都機能を有する台北までは新幹線（台湾高速鉄道）で約90分と至便なアクセスも魅力です。
ホテル客室は標準面積約36㎡、総客室数は約260室を予定しております。日本料理、オールデイダイニング、中国料理をそなえ、最上階の21階には高雄のシンボルともなっている港を一望できるルーフトップバーを設え、ビジネスとレジャーのお客様の幅広いニーズにお応えしてまいります。


HOTEL NIKKO KAOHSIUNG
Kaohsiung is Taiwan’s second largest city, with a thriving international harbor strategically located on the busy shipping lanes between Northeast Asia and the South Pacific. A number of Japanese companies have offices around the harbor, one of Kaohsiung’s sightseeing spots offering visitors fine views. It takes about 90 minutes by Taiwan High Speed Rail from the city to Taiwan’s capital city Taipei.
The hotel will offer 260 guest rooms, each with a standard area of about 36 sq meters. It will feature a wide range of restaurants, including Japanese cuisine, Chinese cuisine and all-day dining, and a rooftop bar on the 21st floor where guests can enjoy stunning views of Kaohsiung harbor. The hotel’s facilities will meet the diverse needs of guests staying for both business and leisure.

Name: Overo Lodge & Selva

Name: Courtyard by Marriott Brisbane South Bank
Description: Set on the fringe of the Brisbane CBD, Courtyard Brisbane South Bank offers an ideal location near the South Bank Parklands in Brisbane, Australia. Experience everything the vibrant state of Queensland has to offer from our family-friendly hotel. We're just steps away from public transport options for easy travel to world-class eateries, shops, gardens and entertainment venues. Before you begin your day in South Brisbane, energise with a workout in our 24-hour fitness centre or take a swim in our heated indoor pool. For those on business in the South Bank, our hotel features on-site catering and event planning professionals who help organise meetings, corporate events and social celebrations. Both corporate and leisure guests love our well-appointed hotel accommodation, ranging from modern rooms to ultra-spacious suites with galley kitchenettes. Whatever the reason for your visit to Queensland, Courtyard Brisbane South Bank brings the city’s best within reach.

Name: CBD Hotel
Description:
CBD Hotel, an award-winning name in the hospitality industry brings to you a premier Central Business District (CBD) Hotel in Tanzania, offering upscale accommodation for modern and business travelers. Favored for its location, in the heart of the commercial hub of Dar es Salaam, we are your choice of Hotel with only 20 minutes drive from the Julius Nyerere International Airport, also serving as entry point to major business areas of the city.
Stay in one of our spacious 90 fully air-conditioned rooms featuring modern facilities for your convenience; speedy Wi-Fi, flat screen cable connection, tea-coffee and dedicated work space, all in the comfort of your room. Our desirable location makes it easy for you to predict rush hours, enjoy city-views and organize your day. Enjoy our 24 hours room service with co-operative staff dedicated to make your stay a pleasure.

At CBD Hotel you will also find a restaurant and a fitness centre, meeting/conference facilities, luggage storage, laundry facilities and free parking.

Name: Quattro Suites
Description:
Quattro Suites is made for the modern traveller who seeks a stay experience in Monemvasia characterised by contemporary comfort and minimalist design, with a touch of urban, boho-chic flair. Quattro Suites is a hotel complex, comprising 28 suites in total split across 4 buildings within a well-kept estate in the area of Xifias in Monemvasia.

The views here are sensational, with endless sea vistas and the Monemvasia rock basking in the background. The property is located 6 km from the legendary Monemvasia rock and Medieval fortress-city, 1,5 km from Ambelakia beach and proposes an urban hideaway that blends sleek lines and minimal, boho-chic appeal. The spaces consist of high-grade, modern elements interchanged with natural materials such as stone and wood, to exude a soothing variation of urban minimalist boho design.

The facilities include a buffet & à la carte breakfast, a salt-water swimming pool, an all-day food & bar menu and a delightful garden that surrounds the property. In the property’s immediate vicinity you will find a quality restaurant that can be reached by foot from Quattro Suites with a range of others to try within a 2-7 km radius.

Name: SpringHill Suites by Marriott - Eau Claire
Description:
SpringHill Suites by Marriott in Eau Claire, WI is scheduled to open early 2025. The 127-suite hotel, located at 1111 Menomonie St. Eau Claire, WI 54703, will operate as a Marriott franchise, owned by Pablo Group and managed by GF Hotels and Resorts.

Whether traveling for business or leisure, the SpringHill Suites Eau Claire offers guests convenient access to The Sonnentag Center, Carson Park, UWEC/CVTC, Hospitals, River, and Bike Trails.

The Springhill Suites is a great hotel option for those wishing to experience Downtown Eau Claire with access to shops, food, rivers, bike paths, art, and attractions.

Ideal for business and leisure travelers alike, the new hotel offers a little extra space with suites larger than a typical hotel room. Separate living, working, and sleeping spaces provide guests with flexibility and functionality. The hotel offers comfortable beds, soft linens and plush pillows to allow for an optimum night’s sleep. Each suite also features the SpringHill Suites’ custom, three-in-one, West Elm sofa which converts from a sofa to a daybed to a trundle bed – without sacrificing its stylish good looks, and a stylish West Elm Swivel Chair offering additional space for relaxation. The designated workspace offers a well-lit desk space to ensure maximum productivity for those who need to get down to business.

Featuring a brand-new design that adds depth and sophistication to the décor, the hotel’s lobby is a great venue for conducting casual meetings or simply to socialize with SpringHill Suites’ enhanced evening experience.

Daily complimentary breakfast is filled with hot, healthy and indulgent choices. This is SpringHill Suites’ way of making sure guests have a good start to their day. The hotel also offers business services, complimentary Wi-Fi, guest laundry facilities, a 24/7 Market, an indoor swimming pool and a fitness center. The property also maintains meeting space to accommodate meetings and functions.

Name: Hampton by Hilton Monterrey Galerías Obispado
Description:
We are conveniently located at the main medical area in Monterrey, we also are within walking distance of Plaza Real, Galerias Monterrey shopping mall and casinos, our 223 rooms and suites offers spectacular views of the surrounding mountains.

Come and enjoy our outdoor pool or work out in our modern and well-equipped gym.

Next to Obispado Medical Area, our hotel features a free shuttle, Monday through saturday (7am – 3pm) to Obispado Medical Area, and some other spots within 10km.

Name: SN Eco Resort and Waterpark
Description: SN Eco Resort & Water Park, nestled in the serene Saptasajya Hills of Odisha, spans 22 acres of lush greenery, offering a perfect blend of luxury and nature. The resort features deluxe accommodations with breathtaking views, a multi-cuisine restaurant, and a state-of-the-art water park with thrilling rides, slides, and pools. Guests can enjoy adventure activities, sports facilities, a boating club, a floating restaurant, and a tranquil meditation center. With its holistic offerings and impeccable service, the resort promises a memorable escape for relaxation and adventure alike.

Name: Quimics
Description:
Welcome to Els Químics Aparthotel, where comfort meets convenience in Girona. Our newly designed apartments offer a pleasant and cozy atmosphere, with a size of approximately 40m2. Each apartment boasts ample natural light and stunning views through large windows.

With 36 fully equipped apartments, we ensure a comfortable and functional experience for our guests. Our multilingual staff is dedicated to providing attentive service, combining kindness, professionalism, and confidentiality.

Enjoy a peaceful night's rest in our bedrooms, featuring comfortable furnishings, a choice of 2 single beds or 1 double bed, and spacious wardrobes. The dining room provides a comfortable living space, complete with a cozy sofa (or sofa-bed), perfect for relaxation and family privacy. Stay entertained with a TV, satellite channels, and Wi-Fi internet connectivity.

Our fully equipped bathrooms feature modern amenities, including a refreshing shower, a heater for comfort, and a hairdryer for your convenience.

Experience the culinary traditions of Catalonia in our complete kitchen, equipped with all necessary utensils, a glass ceramic hob, an oven, and a fridge. Prepare delicate meals using fresh ingredients sourced from the city.

Additional amenities include accessibility for disabled guests, a common room with a washing machine, dryer, and iron for your laundry needs, surveillance cameras within the building to ensure your security, and a dedicated high-security bike room for those looking to explore Girona on two wheels.

At Els Químics Aparthotel, we strive to make your stay in Girona unforgettable, providing a harmonious blend of comfort, convenience, and exceptional service.

A favourite destination in the twin cities of Hanamkonda and Warangal. Hotel Ashoka as all attractive in services to be adored by anyone, besides it maintains standards and quality to offer the best of the services.

Name: Peace & Quiet Nature Hotel
Description:
Peace & Quiet story
The founder of the intimate floating glass room fell in love with Jokkmokk and his Sámi wife more than 10 years ago. Trained as a mountain guide in Austria this was the perfect place to settle down to create a family and enjoy mountain life. Five years ago he lost his beloved Anna-Maria to cancer and was left alone with his two daughters Maja 2 and Helga 5 years old. Peace & quiet hotel is their new way into the future, Björn's way to take care of his daughters future.

Peace & quiet hotel, situated in old pine and spruce forests and surrounded entirely by the pristine, untouched wilderness of the Lule River close to the border of Laponia world heritage in the remote municipality of Jokkmokk, a part of Swedish Lapland. Accessible only by dogsled, snowmobile, boat or trail the journey to Peace & quiet hotel gives you the true feeling of a departure from your daily life. You will have an unforgettable experience of Sápmi, the land of the Sámi people, and its wildlife. Adventure- filled days are enhanced by local produce during sustainable dining, beverages and the chance to relax in Goahte-style guest rooms.

Description: The Five Stars Hotel of Gaza

Name: Sunset Kuakata Hotel & Resort
Description:
যুগের সেরা নির্ভরযোগ্য বিনিয়োগ!

সানসেট কুয়াকাটা হোটেল এন্ড রিসোর্ট বাংলাদেশ গভর্নমেন্টের পাবলিক লিমিটেড কোম্পানি আইন দ্বারা নিয়ন্ত্রিত ও পরিচালিত একটি প্রতিষ্ঠান। আমাদের উদ্দেশ্য এথিকাল হসপিটালিটি প্রদান এবং ট্যুরিজম শিল্পকে সমৃদ্ধ করা। এ লক্ষ্যে বাংলাদেশে ট্যুরিজমের অন্যতম কেন্দ্র সাগরকন্যা কুয়াকাটা সমুদ্র সৈকতের পশ্চিম বীচে, লেবুরবন সংলগ্ন বেড়িবাঁধ এর সাথে আন্তর্জাতিক মানের হালাল ৫-স্টার হোটেল এবং রিসোর্টের স্বপ্ন নিয়ে আমাদের শুভযাত্রা।

কুয়াকাটার পশ্চিম বীচ পাড়ের সানসেট পয়েন্টে প্রায় ২.৫ একর জায়গার উপর গড়ে উঠছে - কোলাহলমুক্ত পরিবেশে সানসেট ভিউ হোটেল ও রিসোর্ট। ট্যুরিজম কেন্দ্রিক সহজ যোগাযোগ সুবিধা সহ রিক্রিয়েশন ফ্যাসিলিটি। যা আপনার ভ্রমণ অভিজ্ঞতাকে আরও বিলাসবহুল, স্বাচ্ছন্দ্যপূর্ণ ও আরামদায়ক করে তুলবে। ট্যুরিজম আর হস্পিটালিটি বাংলাদেশের জনপ্রিয় ২ শিল্পের সমন্বয়ে ট্যুরিস্ট হাব কুয়াকাটায় গড়ে উঠেছে  দীর্ঘমেয়াদী বিনিয়োগ সুযোগ। আপনিও হতে পারেন যুগের সেরা নির্ভরযোগ্য বিনিয়োগের গর্বিত অংশীদার।

Name: Java Boutique Hotel
Description: Luxurious boutique hotel in the heart of Usambara mountains.

Name: Pegaz Holiday Resort
Description:
Hotel sa jedinstvenim sadržajima u srcu Vrnjačke Banje koji raspolaže sa prostranim apartmanima, Wellness centrom namenjenom potpunom oporavku i relaksaciji i restoranu Adut koji je prepoznatljiv po neprikosnovenoj ponudi hrane i pića, jutarnjem švedskom stolu, vikend svirkama, kao i nedeljnom branču.

Hotel se nalazi se u Vrnjačkoj Banji, jednoj od lepših i razvijenijih Banji u našoj zemlji, a iz bilo kog dela Srbije, za oko 3 sata, možete stići do nas, što naš hotel čini sjajnom opcijom ukoliko razmišljate o vikend izletima u bilo koje godišnje doba. 

Namenjen je svim kojima je potreban odmor u prirodi, beg iz gradske vreve i čist vazduh, rad od kuće uz opustanje u biblioteci, degustaciju lokalne hrane i pića, a prvi je hotel u Vrnjačkoj banji koji u sklopu svog objekta, ima igraonicu za decu uz obavezan nadzor animatora.

Veliki akcenat stavljamo i na van hotelske aktivnosti, tako da ukoliko ste avanturističkog duha i ne drži vas mesto, na raspolaganju su vam različite organizovane ture, kao što je izlet na planinu Goč, skijanje, šetnja Vrnjačkom Banjom uz organizovanog vodiča, Yoga, poseta Zoo vrtu i slično.

Potreban vam je hotel koji pruža mogućnost organizovanja Tim bildinga, a ujedno i fleksibilnosti prostora za poslovne sastanke i rad? 

Ukoliko su vam takve ideje nedavno padale na pamet, obratite se našem Sales timu, kako bi vam pomogli u pravljenju plana i organizacije uspešno održanog Tim bildinga.

Name: Scandic Sydhavnen
Description:
Vi er varme og imødekommende og byder alle velkommen med åbne arme og en åben indstilling. Vi nærer omsorg for vores medmennesker, vores jord og samfundet omkring os.

Vi er os selv. Vi hylder vores mangfoldighed og værdsætter de fordele, som vores forskellighed giver os – præcis som vi også møder hver gæst i øjenhøjde og behandler dem som et unikt individ.

Vi er pålidelige og leverer en altid høj og ensartet kvalitet. Men vi går også længere end det, der forventes af os, og vi ved, at nøglen til succes handler om at fokusere på hver enkelt detalje og hele tiden stræbe efter at blive bedre. 

Vi har modet til at gøre tingene anderledes, bryde vores vaner og bruge mere tid på at se fremad end bagud. På den måde stræber vi efter at være en inspiration for vores gæster, for hinanden, for vores ejere og for samfundet.

Why Azura?
A place to feel grounded and free.

Azura is more than architecture, it’s alignment.
Every detail is designed to reflect the island’s soul: granite peaks, soft green walls, and the whisper of palms in the morning light.

Created for those who seek more than a holiday:
Digital nomads in search of flow. Families looking for presence. Investors who feel inspired by meaning and returns. Rooted in wellness. Powered by innovation.

Azura offers a new kind of living – elevated, easy, and deeply intentional.

Name: Stiftsgården Åkersberg
Description:
På Stiftsgården Åkersberg har du nära till allt som Skåne har att erbjuda av mat, dryck, natur och SPA. Ända sedan 1700-talet har människor samlats här på Åkersberg. För att tänka och fatta beslut, för att dela livets olika skiftningar med vänner, familj och kollegor och för att vila och samla kraft.

Idag är vi en mötesplats där våra gäster får möjlighet att dela tankar och erfarenheter kring arbete, vardag, mål och mening, det kan vara på konferens, under en måltid, en privat stund med nära och kära eller en avkopplande stund i vårt spa. Hos oss får du lov att stanna upp och pausa i en tid som präglas av ständig rörelse och informationsbrus, vårt Andrum Spa och Frihetens kapell erbjuder en plats för lugn och återhämtning. Vi är en mötesplats för både kropp och själ. Självklart finns vi även till för livets högtidsdagar, jubileum och andra festligheter.

Varmt välkommen till oss på Åkersberg!

Deseamos que todos los que nos visiten puedan gozar de experiencias únicas con propósito de aprender sobre el campo y divertirse. Description:
Welcome to the enchanting world of City Garden B&B Valencia, where urban elegance merges with absolute tranquility. Opened in March 2017, our hotel has been meticulously crafted in every detail, designed to provide a relaxing, comfortable, and welcoming atmosphere.

Located in the heart of Valencia, every element of City Garden has been carefully chosen to ensure an unforgettable experience for our guests. Our spacious terrace, bathed in Mediterranean sun, offers a perfect urban retreat to relax and enjoy breathtaking views of the city. Here, you can savor our delicious Mediterranean breakfast, a tribute to the freshness and variety that characterizes local cuisine.

Our beds are an invitation to rest and relaxation, with comfortable mattresses and high-quality sheets, ensuring restful sleep after an intense day exploring the wonders of Valencia. City Garden's privileged location in the vibrant heart of the city allows easy access to all major attractions, restaurants, and shops, providing a genuinely urban experience.

What truly sets our hotel apart is our friendly hosts, always ready to make your stay memorable. With attentive and personalized service, we strive to exceed your expectations and make you feel at home away from home.

A stay at City Garden B&B Valencia is a harmonious blend of the vibrant rhythm of city life and the absolute tranquility of a cozy retreat. We are ready to welcome you and show you the authentic beauty of Valencia, offering an experience that goes beyond just accommodation: it's a journey into the heart of a city that will capture your heart.

Description:

This small village of Haut-Béarn nestled in the Barétous valley is located on the edge of the Basque Country and in the heart of the Pyrénées Atlantiques (64). You are surrounded by meadows, hills and peaks. HERE, the mountain is grandiose and gentle, the lights are beautiful and the seasons flamboyant.
HERE, it will be good to slow down, take the time to read in the garden, hesitate between peaks and piedmont for walks, bike rides, skis or snowshoes, fill up on nature, laze in the hollow of a deck chair or mark a pause in the hot waters of the Nordic bath.

Name: Bintan Exotica Resort by Waringin Hospitality
Description:
Welcome to Bintan Exotica Resort, your second home nestled in the pristine beauty of Bintan Island. As a new addition to the hospitality industry, we are passionately committed to providing an unparalleled holiday experience that leaves lasting memories and cultivates a warm, family-like atmosphere.

Though we are new to the industry, we hold a firm belief in the potential of our beach resort to transform every visit into a unique and cherished experience. Our resort goes beyond offering accommodations – it is about crafting a unique, holistic journey that allows our guests to immerse themselves in the charm and allure of Bintan, whilst enjoying our world-class amenities and service.

Our team, a blend of enthusiastic professionals driven by a shared passion for hospitality, is dedicated to realizing every guest's dream vacation. We take pride in our commitment to outstanding customer service and tailored amenities, always striving to exceed expectations at every opportunity.

In an industry that is continuously evolving, we embrace the power of social media and modern technology for strategic decision-making. Our effective use of platforms like Booking.com and Agoda has been instrumental in expanding our reach and accessibility.

Above all, we value the feedback of our guests, understanding that it paves the way for our growth and improvement. We believe in learning and evolving with each guest's experience to consistently improve our services and amenities.

As a proud member of the local community, we adhere to sustainable and ethical practices that respect our environment and contribute positively to the local economy.

We invite you to connect with us to discover more about our unique offerings, explore career opportunities, or discuss potential collaborations. At Bintan Exotica Resort, we don't just create holidays; we craft lifelong memories and make you feel like part of our extended family. Your feedback is our stepping stone to excellence.

Name: Hilton Samarkand Regency
Description:
Hilton Samarkand Regency is a luxurious hotel located within the Silk Road Samarkand complex. The hotel offers elegant rooms and top-tier amenities, ensuring guests experience the ultimate pleasure during their stay. 
The Hilton Samarkand Regency features several restaurants and bars where guests can enjoy exquisite cuisine and a variety of beverages.

The hotel’s banquet halls are perfect for hosting a wide range of events, including formal receptions, conferences, and meetings.

In addition, Hilton Samarkand Regency offers its guests the Nephrite SPA & Wellness center, indoor and outdoor pools, and other leisure and entertainment facilities.

Guests also have access to laundry services, currency exchange, and a 24-hour front desk.

Name: Grupo Kindermann
Description:
Há mais de três décadas, o Grupo Kindermann constrói sua história guiado por um propósito essencial: cuidar de pessoas. Tudo começou em 1988, em Caçador (SC), a partir de um gesto familiar que transformou um lar em acolhimento e esse espírito permanece vivo até hoje.

Ao longo dessa trajetória, crescemos com responsabilidade e visão de futuro. Em 2017, o grupo assumiu a gestão do Hotel Brivali Eventos e, em 2018, passou a administrar também o Hotel Brivali Centro, ampliando sua atuação e fortalecendo sua presença regional. Mais recentemente, em outubro de 2024, inauguramos o Hotel Kindermann Chapecó, marcando um novo capítulo de expansão e consolidando o grupo em um dos principais polos econômicos do Oeste catarinense. 

Mais do que oferecer hospedagem, desejamos proporcionar experiências que transmitam aconchego, confiança e proximidade, para que nossos hóspedes e clientes se sintam em casa. 

Aqui, cada detalhe importa, da hospitalidade ao cuidado com a gastronomia, dos espaços para negócios e eventos ao relacionamento próximo com clientes e parceiros. E, acima de tudo, valorizamos as pessoas que fazem tudo isso acontecer: nossos colaboradores, que são parte fundamental da nossa história e da nossa Família.

Grupo Kindermann. Aqui, você faz parte da Família.

Name: The Chateau Hotel & Conference Center
Description:
Located in Bloomington, Illinois just 2 hours south of Chicago, The Chateau Hotel and Conference Center is in a bustling area with excellent shopping and restaurant options, many within walking distance! The property itself consists of 180 specially appointed rooms (singles, doubles and suites), WiFi throughout the hotel,  indoor pool, hot tub, exercise room, library area with fireplace and over 6000 square feet of meeting space for any type of function.  

The Children's Discovery Museum and Miller Park Zoo are a few of the very popular family attractions here in town and for those in need of "Retail Therapy" can visit The Shoppes at College Hills (directly across from the hotel) or Eastland Mall which is 2 miles away or any of the other many shopping facilites in town. Looking to enjoy an event or a game while in town? See what's happening with Illinois State University sports at Redbird Arena or catch a big name act in town at Grossinger Motors Arena. Take an opportunity to explore the area's outdoor beauty with activities like biking or hiking, by way of the expansive Constitution Trail, which you can access of right behind the hotel! 

With so much to do and being so centrally located, you will find The Chateau Hotel and Conference Center  
THE place to be when in  Bloomington-Normal!

Name: Boutique Hotel Bed & Bos
Description:
Wij bieden u een kleinschalig, intiem hotel gelegen in de bossen van de Sonse Heide. Het pand heeft een luxe uitstraling in een warme ambiance. Omgeven door al het groen komt u helemaal tot rust! U hoort de vogeltjes fluiten en met een beetje geluk zie je er zelfs een reetje.  

Het hotel heeft een uitstekende ligging en is makkelijk bereikbaar, slechts 3 minuten vanaf A2, A50 en A58 en toch in de natuur gelegen. Het is slechts 15 minuten rijden naar Eindhoven Airport.  Er zijn tal van mogelijkheden om uw zakelijke bijeenkomst bij ons te organiseren

Name: The Cottages at Lake Hayes
Description:
Escape to pure luxury at The Cottages at Lake Hayes, a serene lakefront haven located just 20 minutes from Queenstown and a short 10-minute drive from Arrowtown. Our 5 private cottages offer stunning views of the lake, 2 en-suite bedrooms with private terraces, luxurious interiors, and a curated art collection to enhance your stay. Cozy up by the wood-burning fireplace in your lounge for a peaceful evening in.

For a truly indulgent experience, choose a cottage with a private hot tub and unwind while watching the sunset over the lake, surrounded by the sounds of nature.

Whether you're seeking a private escape or an extended group getaway, The Cottages at Lake Hayes are the ideal destination. Book now to treat yourself to the ultimate luxury experience.

Name: Lentohotelli
Description:
Tarjoamme majoituspalveluiden lisäksi monipuolisia kokous-ja koulutustiloja, erilaisia palveluita tyky- ja tyhy-päiviin sekä herkullisia tarjoiluja. Meiltä löytyy tiloja muutaman hengen 
neukkarista 200-paikkaiseen auditorioon, useita saunatiloja, juhlatiloja ja majoituskapasiteetti jopa 500 henkilölle. Kaikki palvelut joustavasti ja räätöiltyinä juuri teidän yritykselle!

Hotellissamme on useita eri huonevaihtoehtoja. Hotellihuoneidemme lisäksi tarjoamme sesonkiaikaan hostel-majoitusta. Tapahtumien aikaan pystymme tarjoamaan majoituksen jopa 700 hengelle. Useimmissa huoneissa on lisävuodemahdollisuus. Hotellihuoneiden sisustuksessa on suosittu kotimaisia ja paikallisia tuotteita.

Name: Chayabithi Riverview Resort
Description:
CHAYABITHI RIVER VIEW RESORT is very close to Dhaka City. It is only 4.4 kilometers from the Gabtali Bus terminal and 8.7 kilometers from Jatiya Sangsad Bhaban. The destination is just a 30-minute drive from Dhaka City.

Chayabithi Riverview Resort is located on approximately 18 bighas of lush land, offering a serene oasis for leisure and corporate travelers just a short distance away from Dhaka. The resort features a harmonious blend of natural beauty and modern comfort, with 10 private and spacious cottages and 12 premium deluxe rooms that provide guests with a peaceful sanctuary to unwind and rejuvenate amidst the picturesque surroundings.

For outdoor enthusiasts, the resort features a serene lake perfect for leisurely boating and fishing excursions. Meanwhile, sports enthusiasts will delight in the expansive playground, where they can enjoy cricket and football matches under the open sky.

The resort also boasts indoor entertainment options, such as facilities for table tennis and carrom, which ensures endless hours of fun for guests of all ages. And for those looking to beat the heat, the resort has the largest swimming pool in the vicinity, providing a refreshing escape from the summer sun.

In addition to its leisure amenities, Chayabithi Riverview Resort caters to corporate gatherings and events. The spacious conference room comfortably accommodates up to 25-30 individuals, while the restaurant can be transformed into a conference hall suitable for larger groups of 70-80 attendees.

Chayabithi Riverview Resort promises an unforgettable retreat where guests can unwind, recharge, and create lasting memories.

Description:
Un écrin d’exception au cœur du Perche pour vos séminaires, événements et shootings.

Situé à seulement 2 heures de Paris, le Val Gaudry est un domaine unique alliant charme et modernité. Avec ses espaces chaleureux et modulables, ses hébergements haut de gamme (28 couchages), et son cadre naturel inspirant, il est idéal pour :
	•	Séminaires d’entreprise : Offrez à vos équipes un moment privilégié dans un cadre ressourçant.
	•	Événements privés ou professionnels : Mariages, lancements de produits, ou dîners exclusifs sous tente chauffée.
	•	Tournages & shootings : Lieux spacieux, intérieurs au caractère affirmé et parc arboré, parfaits pour des visuels percutants.

Profitez d’un accompagnement sur-mesure pour transformer chaque projet en une expérience mémorable. 

Vous cherchez un lieu qui allie prestige et convivialité ? Le Val Gaudry vous ouvre ses portes.

Name: AC Hotel Phoenix-Biltmore
Description: The AC Hotel Phoenix Biltmore welcomes you with classic design and intuitive service. Our boutique hotel is located in the heart of the affluent Biltmore area. Designated as a LEED Silver Certified hotel, our minimalist-style guest rooms offer the best, from free Wi-Fi and HDTVs with streaming capabilities to mini-fridges and deluxe bedding. Start your mornings sunny side up with European inspired fare at AC Kitchen, then join us for cocktails and tapas at AC Lounge in the evenings. Stay on top of your fitness at our 24-hour fitness center, and make a splash in our heated outdoor pool. During your stay, visit top Phoenix, AZ attractions including Camelback Mountain, Chase Field and Old Town Scottsdale, all of which are no more than 20 minutes away. Reserve our versatile event space and host a business or social function, with indoor and outdoor space that leads to our pool. Whether you're in Arizona for business or for a personal getaway, you'll love a sophisticated experience at AC Hotel Phoenix Biltmore.

We're within walking distance of some of the area's best destinations including the Golden 1 Center (home of the Sacramento Kings), DOCO (Downtown Commons), the California State Capitol, and SAFE Credit Union Convention Center.

Here you'll find some of the city's best dining. Enjoy inspired cuisine from Executive Chef Ravin Patel at 7th Street Standard. Or, delight in craft cocktails and tasty bites at the Clayton Club, our famous rooftop lounge whose namesake once featured the likes of Billie Holiday, Louis Armstrong and Cab Calloway.

Name: Citadines Abha by The Ascott Limited
Description:
Home to the serene Aseer mountains, Abha enjoys a mild climate throughout the year, making it a popular local getaway spot to locals and international guests alike. 
 
An approximate 7-minute drive from the Abha International Airport, the 140-unit hotel apartment welcomes short escape travellers and long-stay guests on leisure and business. Step into our property, furnished with stylish interiors, vibrant spaces and a comprehensive lifestyle. 
 
Featuring exclusive studios, one-, and two-bedrooms, each of these Abha apartments are adorned with chic minimalistic designs to optimise spacious living and dining areas. Parallelly, each apartment offers floor-to-ceiling windows with breathtaking views of the serene outdoors. 
 
Whether one has a day planned at Citadines Abha, either within the privacy of their apartment or to unwind and indulge within the property, we offer a range of services and facilities that include a restaurant, resident’s lounge, gymnasium, swimming pool, business centre and a meeting room to suit every lifestyle.

Name: HOTEL ALPHA CENTER
Description:
Hotel Alpha Center is among the most preferred budget hotels in Pune for both business travelers and tourists seeking a comfortable stay.

It features contemporary rooms with modern amenities like a flat-screen TV, air conditioner and attached bathroom with hot and cold water supply.
Further, room service, 24-hour CCTV surveillance for maximum security, round-the-clock power backup and complimentary Wi-Fi access are provided for added convenience.
Our trained and hospitable staff at the front desk is always at your service, leaving no stone unturned in making your stay with us pleasant and enjoyable.

Name: DEV Hotel & Conference Centre
Description:
Set on 75 scenic acres along the St. Lawrence River, DEV Hotel & Conference Centre provides an ideal backdrop for conferences, special events, and sports team training. With 70,000 sq. ft. of customizable meeting spaces designed for groups of all sizes, our central location and unique amenities offer the perfect combination for seamless meetings and unforgettable gatherings. 

Whether you're seeking fitness and recreation, casual dining, or spaces to work, meet, play, or unwind, you'll find everything you need for productivity, relaxation, and well-being. Our outdoor spaces provide the perfect vantage point to take in river views while exploring the lush grounds or relaxing on one of our serene outdoor patios.

Whether you're here for business or leisure, our accommodations offer a comfortable retreat with all the essentials of home.

Niché au cœur d’un terrain de 75 acres le long du fleuve Saint-Laurent, le DEV Hotel & Conference Centre est l’endroit idéal pour les conférences, les événements spéciaux et les équipes sportives. Nos 70 000 pieds carrés d’espaces de réunion polyvalents peuvent accueillir des groupes de toutes tailles, notre emplacement central et nos installations uniques en font l’endroit idéal pour organiser des réunions sans soucis et des rencontres inoubliables. Que ce soit pour déjeuner sur le pouce ou pour savourer un repas tranquille après une journée productive, vous pourrez faire le plein d’énergie à toute heure de la journée et profiter des délicieux repas offerts à notre restaurant et notre pub.

Profitez des nombreuses commodités offertes, dont un centre de remise en forme entièrement équipé, un sauna et un gymnase double. Que vous choisissiez d’explorer les jardins luxuriants ou de vous détendre sur nos paisibles terrasses extérieures, nos espaces extérieurs offrent de magnifiques vues.

Que vous soyez ici pour affaires ou pour le plaisir, nos chambres vous offrent un havre confortable avec tous les essentiels de la maison.

Offering stunning harbour views, contemporary accommodations, and thoughtful amenities, our hotel provides the perfect setting for business and leisure travelers alike.

Guests can expect seamless service, well-appointed guest rooms, and versatile meeting spaces, all designed to deliver an elevated experience. Whether visiting for a corporate stay, a weekend getaway, or a special event, every guest is welcomed with our signature DoubleTree chocolate chip cookie—a symbol of the hospitality that defines us.

From our prime downtown location, guests have easy access to St. John’s business district, local attractions, and the city’s vibrant culture. Whether it’s a productive work trip, a relaxing escape, or a memorable gathering, DoubleTree by Hilton St. John’s Harbourview is the place to stay.

Name: Lares de Chacras
Description:
Lares de Chacras es un espacio que armoniza confort y simpleza en un entorno natural y saludable. Esta Casona Rural está ubicada en el corazón de Chacras de Coria, a dos cuadras de la plaza principal. Chacras es una zona residencial y polo gastronómico a 15 Km. de la Ciudad de Mendoza.  Nuestros huéspedes pueden acceder a pie a una variedad de negocios y restaurantes que ofrecen diversas especialidades. El hotel posee 10 habitaciones lo que garantiza un ambiente íntimo para nuestros huéspedes.
 
Contamos con una innovadora cava de vinos abierta al huésped que desee elegir personalmente el vino de su agrado. El restaurante y el bar están disponibles para huéspedes únicamente, así como la piscina y el jacuzzi ubicados en el jardín de la casona.

Name: LUZ Culinary Wine Lodge
Description:
Immersed between the ocean and countryside Luz is a well kept secret to retreat and enjoy architecture and the natural beauty that surrounds it. 
Exclusivity, wellbeing and sustainability are our main pillars. 
LUZ is an exclusive Culinary Wine Lodge with a bohemian style. It is set within 35 acres of stunning private landscape only few steps away from the famous beaches of Jose Ignacio. 
The charming calm rustic spaces have soft lines and calm colours, taking inspiration from the traditional Moroccan architecture. Simple and sophisticated, our rooms invite you to enjoy the nature from within.
With only eight unique suites surrounded by vineyards, olive trees and a lake, our guests are given the true exclusivity and privacy.
Every room has a unique view of the landscape. The spaces transmit an inner calm where we invite our guests to relax and forget the stresses of everyday life.

Luz offers a culinary experience based on the abundance of fresh local products. Simplicity combined with a creative twist is our motto. When possible we choose organic production and aim to KM 0 in the supplier selección, seeking to complete a genuine and authentic experience for all senses. 

We pursue that our guests can reach a state in which physical and mental condition provide feelings of satisfaction and tranquility. 
With a design that honors Jose Ignacio, our three varieties; Tannat, Merlot and Tempranillo, pay tribute to the sun light and the ocean richness. As of 2022, its management its totally organic. 
Our olive tree plantatios with an undulating design completes the unique landscape of LUZ. Enjoy our exquisite blend of Coratina and Arbequina.

LUZ is a platform to show the world the best of Uruguay.

Richmond Hotel Apartment - Dubai

Name: Hotel Jana
Description:
Hotel Jana is a premium hospitality venture and a proud sister concern of Alliance Builders Ltd, expanding the group’s success into the tourism and service industry. Strategically developed to offer elegant, comfortable, and affordable accommodations, Hotel Jana caters to business and leisure travelers alike. With world-class service, smart infrastructure, and cultural warmth, it stands out as a trusted name in modern hospitality.

Backed by Alliance Builders’ real estate and financial strength, Hotel Jana ensures strong foundations, both in construction and business growth. Shareholders benefit through annual profit sharing, asset appreciation, and exclusive perks like discounted stays. With plans for nationwide expansion, franchise opportunities, and sustainable operations, Hotel Jana offers long-term, diversified returns. It’s more than a hotel—it’s a profitable journey, designed for investors who value trust, transparency, and growth.

Name: Clopy Hotels
Description:
Clopy Hotels se dedica a la gestión integral de negocios hoteleros, un sector que experimenta un crecimiento continuo y muestra resiliencia frente a la inflación. Nos hacemos cargo de optimizar cada aspecto de las operaciones hoteleras, abarcando desde la administración de ingresos hasta las actividades diarias, con el objetivo de maximizar el beneficio operativo bruto (GOP) y asegurar una coordinación efectiva entre todas las áreas de negocio de cada establecimiento.

Nuestra fortaleza radica en nuestra eficiencia y en la capacidad de aportar un valor significativo a los propietarios, desarrollando estrategias conjuntas con inversores del sector inmobiliario (Real Estate) para incrementar el valor de sus activos. Además de gestionar las operaciones diarias, facilitamos contratos de arrendamiento con socios estratégicos y ofrecemos apoyo a los propietarios que desean desinvertir en sus hoteles, asegurando la continuidad de los proyectos con inversores Propco confiables y comprometidos con el éxito a largo plazo.

Name: Greenland Motel and Lounge
Description: Lodging, bar and hospitality services to suit your budget. Friendly staff and spacious rooms.

Name: Welbeck Manor and Golf
Description:
Nestled among the picturesque Devonshire countryside sits Welbeck Manor Hotel and Golf Course, a country house rich with history, charm and beauty.

Built by Isambard Kingdom Brunel in 1847, the manor has kept almost all of its original features, although its recent refurbishment under new ownership has uncloaked its true potential as an elegant and stylish location for a relaxing and luxurious getaway.

Name: Løgumkloster Refugium
Description: Refugieophold tilbydes hver dag hele året rundt. Refugium betyder tilflugtssted. Indenfor biologien er det et sted, hvor dyr og planter kan overleve i ellers hårde tider. På samme måde kan vi som mennesker have brug for at søge hen til et et sted, hvor der er plads og ro til at være. Løgumkloster Refugium er sådan et sted. Her kan du finde plads til fordybelse, personlig vækst og fællesskab - alt efter dit behov. Tusindvis af gæster har i årenes løb oplevet, at et ophold her på Refugiet netop har været det åndehul, de havde brug for. Hvor energien og livsmodet er blevet fornyet, og hvor den uløste opgave fandt sin form.
