Name: Plesners Badehotel
Description:
𝐕𝐞𝐥𝐤𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐢𝐥 𝐏𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐁𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐡𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐥 - 𝐢 𝐡𝐣𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐞𝐭 𝐚𝐟 𝐒𝐤𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐧. 
~
Vores klassiske badehotel er smukt beliggende i hjertet af Skagen. Her er du tæt på det hele og samtidig trukket væk fra det pulserende natteliv. På Plesners Badehotel mærker du byens charme og historiens vingesus. Her er der højt til himlen, en jordnær atmosfære samt god tid til at nyde roen, sænke skuldrene og dyrke nærværet. Alt er renoveret med omtanke for historien og den originale Plesner-atmosfære. Vi har kælet for detaljerne og går ikke på kompromis med kvaliteten.

På Plesners Badehotel kan du kombinere motion og afslappende wellness i intime omgivelser. Vores motionsrum og wellness-område er dedikeret til personlig velvære, og er indrettet med sans for høj kvalitet og æstetik. Hos os kan du træne og slappe af i rolige omgivelser, og skabe en harmonisk balance mellem aktivitet og afslapning.

Ansvarlighed og omtanke er en naturlig del af vores værdigrundlag. Hotellet er i slutningen 2023 og start 2024 blevet renoveret, og her har vi prioriteret løsninger, der kan reducere vores vandforbrug. I vores fransk/nordisk inspireret køkken er der stort fokus på at bruge lokale råvarer, som findes i naturen omkring om os.

Name: TRES El Triángulo del Esfuerzo
Description:
"TRES: El Triángulo del Esfuerzo" es una obra  que introduce una metodología de gestión empresarial única y medible en el ámbito de la operación hotelera. Este enfoque innovador se basa en tres pilares esenciales: sistemas de información, administración por objetivos y cambio de paradigma en recursos humanos. La singularidad de este enfoque radica en su capacidad para automatizar y unificar procesos, fomentando una cultura empresarial colaborativa y valorando el esfuerzo de los empleados.

El libro desglosa detalladamente las nuevas tecnologías y sistemas de información, haciendo que estos conceptos sean comprensibles para cualquier lector, independientemente de su área de especialización. Aporta claridad y profundiza en el trabajo del departamento de Sistemas en la industria hotelera, abriendo este campo a un público más amplio y democratizando el acceso a este conocimiento especializado.

El objetivo principal de esta obra es proporcionar una visión global y práctica de estas tecnologías y su aplicación en el sector hotelero. Con un lenguaje claro y sencillo, el libro se convierte en una guía personalizada para construir una red de información a medida de las necesidades específicas de cada hotel o cadena hotelera. Este enfoque permite la implementación de la administración por objetivos y la gestión de un nuevo paradigma de talento, con el propósito de optimizar las operaciones, atraer y retener el talento, y, en última instancia, aumentar la rentabilidad del negocio.

"TRES: El Triángulo del Esfuerzo" es una invitación a dejar atrás las soluciones empresariales convencionales y a abrazar un enfoque integral que fomenta la eficiencia, la colaboración y la motivación de los empleados. Los beneficios incluyen la optimización de las operaciones, la mejora de la satisfacción del cliente y la retención de talento, todos elementos clave para prosperar en el cambiante mundo empresarial de hoy. Esta obra es una hoja de ruta hacia el éxito en la gestión hotelera y represe
Location: Estado De Quintana Roo, Quintana Roo

Name: Hotel Sin-Kom
Description:
Hotel Sin-Kom, otvoren 1. jula 2009. godine, predstavlja pravu oazu u srcu grada. Posluje na principu noćenja sa doručkom (bed&breakfast) i kategorisan je kao Garni Hotel sa 3 

Smešten je u najlepšem delu Pirota gde su se uz nekadašnju kaldrmu nalazile najstarije trgovačke radnje. Danas je ovo deo grada u kome pored starog graditeljskog jezgra dominiraju potpuno nove  moderne građevine. Na samo 200m od glavne autobuske stanice, u pravcu koji vodi ka industrijskoj četvrti, i na 100m od skretanja ka Parku prirode Stara Planina , Hotel Sin-Kom sagrađen je na raskršću ovih puteva. Tako je ovaj objekat i lokacijski i sadržajno okrenut: poslovnim ljudima, gostima u tranzitu, ali i ljubiteljima  prirode i bogatog kulturno-istorijskog nasleđa pirotskog kraja. Takođe, Hotel Sin-Kom domaćin je i brojnim sportskim, kulturnim manifestacijama i takmičenjima. 

Glavni adut Hotela je pozitivna energija našeg uvek nasmejanog tima na koji smo ponosni. Svi naši zaposleni su pažljivo odabrani, pa je sa razlogom ocena osoblja neverovatnih 9.8! 

Naš hotel je dizajniran da zadovolji sve potrebe modernog poslovnog sveta. Uz siguran parking i video nadzor, možemo vam obezbediti prostor za seminare i konferencije, a u konfornim sobama imate besplatan pristup internetu. 

U skladu sa globalnom Kovid- 19 pandemijom, odlučili smo da boravak u Hotelu učinimo sigurnijim, čistijim i bezbednijim za sve naše goste. Već 14 godina Sin-Kom važi za Hotel čiji je imperativ čistoća na prvom mestu. Danas, više nego ikada naša poslovna načela dolaze do izražaja. 

Ukoliko ste u prolazu, a želite da se odmorite  ili je Vaš poslovni put vezan za grad Pirot i okolinu, posetite nas! 
Dobrodošli.

Discover elevated Southwestern cuisine at St. Cruz, our chef driven restaurant and bar open for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Or if work is on your agenda, we offer flexible meeting rooms with over 1,500 sq. ft of space. There is also ample opportunity to focus on your health and wellness at our state-of-the-art onsite fitness facility or nearby outdoor recreation destinations. Whether you're traveling for work, attending events at University of Arizona, or exploring the Sonoran Desert, The Leo Kent provides an ideal Tucson hotel location for both business and leisure

Name: The Hotel Chalet
Description:
Set on the campus of The Chattanooga Choo Choo, an iconic train station, hotel, and entertainment complex, The Hotel Chalet at The Choo Choo reflects two years of meticulous planning and renovations. Drawing from the US Railways history of constructing lodges and chalets to encourage travel and adventure, the property embraces the spirit of rail travel, inviting its guests to journey to the surrounding mountains, explore arts and entertainment, and partake in après voyage libations.
The Hotel Chalet offers 127 guest rooms, including 25 rooms in restored Victorian train carriages. Guests of the hotel can enjoy a variety of on-property experiences and amenities, including the restaurant Elsie's Daughter, complimentary Wi-Fi, a fitness center, an alpine pool, and a series of beautiful indoor/outdoor lounge spaces.

Name: Olives Apartments Old Town Gdańsk
Description:
At Olives Apartments we know that business travel is about more than just a work - it’s about finding balance, comfort, and a sense of home wherever you are in the world. Our carefully designed apartments offer a seamless blend of business functionality and homely comfort, giving professionals a perfect environment to work, unwind, and recharge.

Each of our apartments is thoughtfully furnished to help you feel at ease, with ergonomic workspaces, high-speed internet, and all the amenities you need to stay productive and connected. But we also go beyond the essentials. At Olives Apartments, we believe in the importance of relaxation and personal well-being, so we’ve created spaces that invite you to truly unwind - warm colours, soft materials cozy and stylish interiors that bring a sense of calm after a busy day.

Conveniently located near key business areas as well as the heart of historical Old Town of Gdańsk yet tucked away enough for tranquility, Olives Apartments is designed for professionals who value both: productivity and personal space. We are here to make your stay smooth and enjoyable, offering personalized support so you can focus on what matters most.

Whether it’s a short trip or an extended stay, discover a place that feels like home - because we believe that true comfort lies in the balance between work and rest. Experience Olives Apartments, where business and well-being find their perfect blend.

Description:
Punta Bermeja Premium Beach Hotel es un resort de nueva construcción situado en El Puerto de Sta. Mª, en una de las mejores playas de la Bahía de Cádiz. A 18.5 km del Campo Ocean Golf Club de Costa Ballena y a 20 km del Sherry Golf Jerez. A 24 km de Cádiz,  a 26 de Sanlúcar de Barrameda y 116 km de Sevilla.

El Hotel cuenta con 172 habitaciones, de las cuales 50 son Junior Suites y Suites. Muchas de nuestras habitaciones, disponen de piscina privada o piscina tipo Swim-Up donde podrá disfrutar de atardeceres de ensueño. 

Punta Bermeja Hotel dispone de un amplio restaurante buffet con show cooking, con terraza donde le ofrecemos una variedad de platos de cocina mediterránea e internacional con productos de máxima calidad y muchos de ellos de km 0. Nuestros huéspedes podrán degustar todo tipo de bebidas en nuestra Terraza Bar mientras disfrutan de las agradables vistas a nuestra infinity pool y la Bahía de Cádiz. En nuestro grastro bar, les ofrecemos una amplia carta con productos de máxima calidad. 
 
INSTALACIONES: El Hotel ofrece actividades e instalaciones para el disfrute de adultos y niños: animación, restaurantes, bares, piscinas de gran tamaño, solárium, gimnasio y un magnífico centro de spa, además de parking privado.

Name: Καμάρα (Kamara) cave suites
Description:
Καμάρα (Kamara) cave suites located inside the traditional Greek village of Pera Triovasalos in Milos. A place where the modern design harmoniously intertwines with the traditional Cycladic architecture.
A research for the perfect balance between the traditional all-white Theran architecture and the high-end modern design trends, Kamara promises you an unforgettable stay in a nouveau-Cycladic layout. It’s our great pleasure to welcome and meet travelers from around the world.
For reservations or general inquiries feel free to email us at info@kamaracavesuites.com

Name: ASTON Inn Pandanaran Semarang
Description:

An ideal for corporate, group and leisure travelers with strategically located in the heart of Semarang City and city's key landmarks such as Lawang Sewu, Tugu Muda, Simpang Lima, Sam Poo Kong temple with convenient access to government office (Balaikota).

Aston Inn Pandanaran Semarang features 175 rooms from superior, superior double city view, Deluxe, Deluxe Premier, Executive Suite, Family room, and Aston Suite with completed amenities and facilities. Inside the hotel, a range of hotel facilities ideal for business, social events or vacations, with 7 meeting rooms and one ballroom on the 2nd and 3rd floor, 40Lane Cafe, G40 Gym, Savitri spa, Altitude Sky Lounge for breakfast with the stunning view of Semarang on the rooftop, Al Fitri Mosque and attractive infinity sky pool on the top floor of the hotel alongside with the Altitude Sky lounge.

Name: MERAVIA Leonardo Limited Edition
Description: Welcome to the recently refurbished Cora Hotel & Spa, a distinguished 5-star retreat in Chalkidiki, Greece. Taking inspiration from the profound legacy of Aristotle, this establishment pays homage to the birthplace of the ancient philosopher, whose work set the “core” for today’s philosophy and science. With 181 rooms and suites perched atop a hill, Cora Hotel & Spa is a haven of tranquillity, surrounded by lush forests and verdant trees. Boasting captivating views of the Aegean Sea, dedicated beach area, outdoor pools, a luxurious spa, and exceptional dining options, this hotel caters to both individuals in search of serenity and families with children aged 12 and above.

Name: twoller
Description:
Hola! Somos twoller, la startup de hotel compartido que cambiará tu forma de viajar  . Las personas que reserven y compartan una habitación de hotel a través de nuestra plataforma online, podrán ahorrar cerca de la mitad del coste del alojamiento, al mismo tiempo que conocen a personas afines, ¿Te animas? 

Somos la alternativa perfecta para aquellos que quieren viajar al mejor precio, pero sin renunciar al confort y tranquilidad de alojarse en una buena habitación de hotel. Podrás elegir el destino y con quien compartir la habitación antes de realizar la reserva, filtrando por intereses en común, aficiones o planes durante el viaje.

¿Cuales son las ventajas de viajar con twoller?

1. Tranquilidad en cada viaje: no nos centramos únicamente en tu ahorro, sino también en tu seguridad, ofreciéndote la comodidad y tranquilidad de alojarte en un hotel tradicional, pero con coste reducido. Todos conocemos historias de alojamientos económicos que no terminan bien; espacios extremadamente reducidos, escasa limpieza, cámaras ilegales, desaparición de equipajes... la tranquilidad de tu viaje es una prioridad para nosotros.  

2. Elegir la compañía de viaje a tu medida: podrás conocer los intereses, aficiones, hobbies y gustos de cada perfil, para escoger a la persona ideal para cada uno de tus viajes. La principal desventaja de los hostales y de alojarse en habitaciones de viviendas de particulares es que las y los viajeros se ven obligados a convivir con personas completamente desconocidas. Con twoller, podrás además encontrar compañía para ir a conciertos y eventos, aventuras al aire libre, aprender idiomas o, simplemente, conocer personas nuevas con las que ahorrarás en el precio de tu alojamiento.

3. Ya no tendrás que pagar el precio de una habitación doble, si viajas sola o solo.
Descubre los destinos nacionales e internacionales que ofrece twoller y disfruta del viaje!

Name: Waterstate Wellness Hotel Goes
Description:

Gelegen aan de rand van Goes, met uitzicht op het water, biedt het hotel wellnessfaciliteiten, diverse arrangementen en zakelijke opties. Bij Brasserie Westerkade geniet je van ontbijt, lunch en diner, en bij Rentalshop Vlot ontdek je Zeeland per fiets of over het water. Sportcentrum Fitland ligt ook op loopafstand. Perfect voor een hotelovernachting in Zeeland of weekend weg.

Het hotel beschikt over 57 comfortkamers, 16 luxe kamers, 3 luxe business kamers en 8 spa suites. Als deze kamers zijn te boeken voor zakelijke overnachtingen. En wist u dat wanneer u 25 of meer overnachtingen op jaarbasis bij ons boekt u gebruik kunt maken van een aantrekkelijke korting?

Daarnaast beschikken we over verschillende vergadersuites voor groepen tot 8 personen. U huurt deze per dag of per dagdeel. Wij verzorgen graag de hele dag voor u. U kunt uw vergadering uitbreiden met verschillende luxe extra's. Denk bijvoorbeeld aan een lunch of diner of fruit tijdens de vergadering. Maar ook een overnachting, ontspannende massage bij Vitae Wellnessresort Goes, een sportsessie bij Sportcentrum Fitland of een van de vele mogelijkheden bij onze inhouse Rentalshop Vlot voor een leuke activiteit op een e-scooter. Neem voor meer informatie of een rondleiding contact met mij op. 

Wij maken uw dag(en) bij ons graag tot een groot succes voor u, uw collega's en klanten.

Name: Mercure Rouen Centre Champ-de-Mars
Description:
Fully renovated in 2024 under the direction of architect Fabien Roque and Atypio Hotel Experience, the Mercure Rouen Centre Champ-de-Mars welcomes you in an elegant and modern setting. This 4-star hotel and restaurant, paired with the Ibis Rouen Champ-de-Mars, is the perfect choice for a romantic getaway, a family trip, or a friendly stay to explore the rich history and culture of Rouen.

Just a few minutes from the Rouen Cathedral, a Gothic masterpiece immortalized by Monet, and the Musée des Beaux-Arts, the hotel is an ideal starting point to discover the city's treasures. Wander through medieval streets, learn about the history of Joan of Arc, or enjoy the vibrant atmosphere along the Seine riverbanks.

The hotel features:

107 elegant and comfortable rooms, perfect for unwinding after a day of sightseeing or work.
12 meeting rooms equipped with the latest technology, ideal for professional events.
A Ciné-Lounge, for moments of relaxation and conviviality.
A bar and a "À l'Épicerie" restaurant, offering terroir cuisine and cheese specialties that celebrate French culinary heritage.
The Mercure Rouen Centre Champ-de-Mars invites you to immerse yourself in the history, art, and beauty of Rouen in a warm and contemporary atmosphere.

Description:
Bryllup, stor fest, møde eller konference…
Mulighederne er mange hos Hotel Harmonien i Nakskov. Vores store balsal kan rumme op til 300 spisende gæster eller 400 siddende på stolerækker, men uanset om I er mange eller få, kan I hos os skabe de perfekte rammer om jeres fest eller møde.
Udover balsalen har vi andre mødelokaler i forskellige størrelser.
Om det er balsalen eller den lille festsal der passer jer, kan I vælge selv at står for jeres arrangement og kun leje lokale med borde og stole hos os, eller I kan vælge at bede os om at klare alt for jer og selvfølgelig også noget ind imellem.
Restaurant Surt & Sødt bor på hotellet og vi samarbejder gerne med dem. De kan levere pakkeløsninger i forskellige prisklasser og står også gerne for særlige ønsker som bryllupskage og lignende.
Hotellet har 56 værelser fordelt på 14 enkeltværelser, 27 standard dobbeltværelser, 11 superior dobbeltværelser med mulighed for opredning samt fire små lejligheder – til en eller to personer med mulighed for opredning i to af dem.

Description:
Caiçara Hotel foi inaugurado em 1952, desde então vem fazendo história com sua tradição e sua excelente localização na cidade de Santos. 


Em 2020 uma nova gestão assume o desafio de unir o tradicional com a modernidade, desenvolvendo a excelência na hospitalidade.

Name: Further
Description:
A história da Further teve início como uma pequena agência de turismo, mas seu propósito sempre foi ir além do comum, proporcionando passeios pelo Rio de Janeiro de maneira única e encantadora. Ao longo do tempo, a empresa naturalmente expandiu seus serviços, passando a oferecer também opções de hospedagem para seus clientes.

O que começou com apenas um quarto disponível para aluguel, hoje se transformou em uma gestão exemplar de mais de 40 espaços não apenas no Rio de Janeiro, mas também em outras localidades do Brasil. A essência da Further permanece inalterada, e seu compromisso em oferecer uma experiência diferenciada tanto para os hóspedes quanto para os proprietários é sua prioridade.

Se você busca a solução ideal para o seu imóvel, não hesite em entrar em contato conosco. A equipe Further terá imenso prazer em ajudar a encontrar a melhor opção que atenda às suas necessidades.

Name: Best Western Heritage Hotel Official
Description: Experience the best of Cox’s Bazar at Heritage Hotel, the premier choice for accommodations in this stunning coastal destination. This five-star hotel offers a range of 231 well-appointed rooms, each designed to provide comfort and convenience. As the best hotel in Coxbazar, we pride ourselves on offering modern amenities, including 42-inch LED TVs, tea and coffee makers, safety lockers, parking facilities,  and free Wi-Fi. With spacious rooms that start at 650 sqft, guests can enjoy plenty of space to relax and unwind. Most rooms also feature balconies, providing breathtaking views of the surrounding beauty. Whether you’re visiting for leisure or attending a MICE event in Coxs Bazar, Heritage Hotel ensures a five-star memorable stay. Discover the tranquility, soak in the magnificent views, and experience the best Cox’s Bazar has to offer at our esteemed establishment.

Name: CityRest Motels
Description:
CityRest Motels owns and operates two hotels in Colombo's key locations; 

CityRest Fort
Located on Hospital Street (Colombo 1), CityRest Fort is a 3-star city hotel serving both business and leisure travellers. Strategically located within 10-15 minute walk from Colombo's primary transport hub (rail and bus), it serves as an ideal transit spot for both inbound and outbound travellers before heading to their ultimate destinations. Book online at www.cityrest.lk

City Motel
Situated along Old Moor Street (Colombo 12) City Motel is a 2-star budget hotel catering primarily to business travellers and families. Located within a stone's throw from the bustling Pettah business area, it's the ideal spot for anyone looking to fulfil their purchasing and marketing needs.

Name: Hotel Alexander Minnesota
Description: Nestled in the heart of downtown Mankato, Hotel Alexander is honored to offer upscale hospitality within one of the region’s beautifully preserved historic buildings. Ideally located for exploring the city, attending a sporting event, or simply getting cozy and ordering in, our intimate, charming setting make Hotel Alexander the premier location for your weekend getaway or work travel stay.

Name: Naama Bay Hotel & Resort
Description: Naama Bay Hotel & Resort is the cornerstone of its most famous of bays, offering breathtaking views of the warm Red Sea and the golden Sinai mountains, yet, a split of a second away from the exceptional dinning and nightlife attractions of Naama Bay.

Name: Holiday Inn Express Brussels Airport
Description: Welcome to the Holiday Inn Express Brussels - Airport, newly opening on September 16th 2024. Located just minutes from Brussels Airport, our hotel features 208 modern rooms, complimentary breakfast, a bar with all-day dining, a crew lounge, and a state-of-the-art meeting room. Connect with us for updates and opportunities. We look forward to welcoming you soon!

Name: The Holman Hotel
Description:
The Holman Riverfront Park Hotel, Tapestry Collection by Hilton is located across the street from the Salem Convention Center and just a few blocks from the Oregon State Capitol. The Holman aims to become a living room for the city – a memorable destination for travelers and a favorite haunt for locals. Guests are invited to enjoy the simple comforts of a modern home away from home with open, light-filled interiors, consisting of 127 guestrooms including extended stay rooms and 3,200 square feet of flexible meeting space. The 3,200 square feet of meeting space includes the 1,330 square foot ballroom, as well as the Mary Purvine Room, Anna Duerksen Room, Chloe Willson Room and the Joseph Holman Boardroom. 

The Holman is near Willamette University and is less than one hour drive from Portland Oregon and the Portland airports. 

Contemporary in design and personality, The Holman provides guests and locals with a vibrant, connected, artful experience that represents the energy of city life while celebrating the growth and complexity that is modern Salem. Inspired by the pioneers, artists, and government leaders that have brought modernity, comfort and affluence to Oregon, The Holman’s architecture exemplifies contemporary modern design and craftsmanship while reflecting the scale and profile of buildings that came before. 

Dining: The Holman currently offers Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner in Cora Coffee. Opening soon at the Holman is Pacific Standard Salem, a sister bar and restaurant to the highly acclaimed Pacific Standard in Portland, Oregon. Pacific Standard is a creation of celebrity bartender Jeffrey Morganthaler.

Name: Hotel Woolstore 1888 Sydney - Handwritten Collection
Description: Hotel Woolstore 1888 Sydney – Handwritten Collection, located in Pyrmont near Darling Harbour, blends heritage charm with modern luxury. Ideal for business travellers, we offer seamless connectivity, tailored services, and a serene ambiance. Enjoy elegant accommodations, state-of-the-art facilities, and quick access to Sydney's business hubs, ensuring a productive and comfortable stay.

Name: JustStay Hotels & Apartments
Description: JustStay – this is Germany`s first entirely digital brand in the hotel industry: from booking to checking-in to invoicing. We offer our guests an unseen value for money experience with smart rooms, exclusive designs and contemporary services. Cool lounge and co-working spaces are just as much a part of the JustStay experience as modern gyms and really fun gaming areas. Everything always included and simply good!

Name: Naturlogi AB
Description:
På Naturlogi finns tid att umgås och hitta det lugn och kreativitet som naturen ger. 

Att mötas i skogen och runt lägerelden gör något unikt för kreativiteten och samtalet. Vi ordnar aktiviteter  för större och mindre grupper där fokus är skogen, matlagning och teambildning. 

I våra skogsrum finns plats för ca 10 personer. Här upplevs skogsnatten i en bekväm dubbelsäng nerbäddad bland täcken och filtar.

Name: Fletcher Boutique Hotel Slaak-Rotterdam
Description: Fletcher Boutique Hotel Slaak-Rotterdam bevindt zich in een historisch gebouw en is in 2010 benoemd tot rijksmonument. Na een lange dag op pad kunt u heerlijk vertoeven in restaurant ’t Slaakhuys. Hier geniet u van een luxe eetervaring met verfijnde gerechten, pure ‘mouth teasers’, prachtige wijnen en exclusieve cocktails in de kosmopolitische bar, maar ook een dj op iedere vrijdag- en zaterdagavond. Tot slot komt u volledig tot rust in één van de luxe, ruime hotelkamers. Voor zakelijke bijeenkomsten bieden wij twee multifunctionele vergaderruimtes en een breakout room om uw bijeenkomst tot een succes te maken!

Name: Carrigart Hotel
Description:
Nestled at the base of the Rosguill Peninsula, in one of the most remote, yet scenic parts of the country, the Carrigart Hotel epitomises the enchantment of the Irish countryside. Once a symbol of elegance and history, the newly refurbished hotel now offers a taste of Victorian grandeur with a modern twist.

Whether you come to savour a drink, enjoy a dinner, or spend the night, our hotel awaits you, offering a perfect blend of rich heritage and modern luxury. Our dining options feature exquisite seasonal dishes, offering a culinary journey that celebrates the finest local ingredients. For a traditional Irish pub experience, our bar provides a warm and inviting atmosphere, perfect for enjoying a pint and good company.

The Carrigart Hotel is ideally located for golfers seeking to play at the local courses. Enjoy easy access to the renowned courses in Rosapenna, just 4 miles away, the course at St. Patrick’s, a mere 3 miles from the hotel, and the picturesque Portsalon course, only 12 miles away.

Name: Dev Royale Hotel - Gurugram
Description: Dev Royale Hotel a luxury hotel located in Gurgaon. Hotel is designed to provide you with an unforgettable experience in comfort and hospitality. Our spacious rooms with front and back balcony, feature with modern amenities, including attached bathrooms that are equipped with the latest fixtures to ensure your stay is comfortable and enjoyable.

Description: We have everything you need to stay productive while on the road. When staying at our new built Fairfield Inn & Suites in North Bay enjoy the comfort of our large guestrooms & suites, free Wi-Fi throughout the hotel, 24-hour business centre and 24-hour Market for your convenience. Flexible meeting space is also available.

Name: Ibis Den Haag City Centre
Description:
Looking for a stylish place in the heart of The Hague? ibis Den Haag City Centre offers modern fresh rooms, equipped with a work desk, free WiFi, flat-screen TV and a private bathroom - what do you need more? Our comfortable Sweet Beds guarantee a good night's sleep after a busy day of sightseeing or a night out. An extensive breakfast buffet can be enjoyed everyday from 06:30 till 12:00, so no need to get up before sunrise. The hotel also offers a laid-back café and bar for lunch, dinner and drinks.

Enjoy the many craft shops and trendy bars in the Spuistraat and Venestraat, make a boat trip on the canals or visit Scheveningen beach for some relaxation. Not done yet? Go to Madurodam for beautiful miniature versions of all famous buildings! The ibis Den Haag City Centre is located in the heart of the 'court city', a stone's throw from the Grand Church and the old City Hall. Get your culture groove on at the Knight's Hall at the Binnenhof and visit the Mauritshuis later on for art.

Our hotel is ideally located in the heart of the city centre. There are numerous trams- and bus stations surrounding the hotel. The Hague's central train station (Den Haag HS) is within a 15-minute walking distance.
Parking is available at Q-Park City Parking and Q-Park-Torengarage, both paid.

Name: The Aurora Subic Hotel
Description:
As the Flagship Development of Aurora Subic Leisure Inc. (ASLI),
The Aurora Suites and Pavilion aims to bridge the gap between the Ecotourism and Industrial dual character of Subic. It is envisioned to be a preferred lifestyle destination of Local and International Tourists in the Subic Bay Freeport Zone.

The Development consists of a Hotel and Serviced Apartment Building complemented by a curated Retail Pavilion which will serve as a venue for Food, Leisure, Entertainment and Lifestyle Establishments where both Private and Public Events can be held.

Name: Renaissance Toledo Downtown
Description:
Explore the unexpected... Renaissance Toledo Downtown Hotel is the ONLY AAA 4 Diamond Hotel in the Market. Situated on Maumee River, let your senses go wild as you indulge in the finest cuisine & libations. 

No matter what you are looking for you can find it here.
Enjoy dining experiences with panoramic views of Maumee River or take your breath away and visit The Heights Rooftop Restaurant and Bar. Renaissance Toledo features spacious meeting space with a 11,000 Sq. Ft. Ballroom and comfortable guest rooms with amazing views! 

Come see for yourself all that Toledo has to offer.

Name: Dragon Beach Hotel
Description:
The Dragon Beach Hotel, Amwaj Islands – Bahrain
Overlooking the shimmering Arabian Sea, surrounded by fresh ocean breeze and breathtaking views, The Dragon Beach Hotel stands as the first and only luxury beachfront property on the stunning Amwaj Islands.
Here, every stay is designed around you. From the moment you arrive, a dedicated team ensures every detail exceeds expectations. Whether it’s a special request or a personal indulgence, your private butler is ready to make it happen, effortlessly and elegantly.
A true architectural masterpiece, The Dragon was designed to reflect its legendary name. Its shape resembles a sleeping dragon, with its neck stretching across the water and a conical head gazing over the Arabian Gulf, a majestic guardian of the sea. The hotel’s dragon scale façade has become an iconic landmark in Bahrain.
Just 10 minutes from Bahrain International Airport and 40 minutes from the Saudi Causeway, The Dragon Beach Hotel blends modern sophistication with serene coastal living. Its collection of luxurious villas, chalets, and suites feature contemporary yet understated design, offering the perfect setting for both relaxation and indulgence.
Guests can savor exotic culinary experiences among the many F&B outlets, unwind by the private beach, or simply bask in the beauty of the sea. At The Dragon Beach Hotel, exceptional service, majestic views, and refined comfort come together to remind you that paradise truly exists right here in Bahrain.

Name: Cora Hotel & Spa
Description: Welcome to the recently refurbished Cora Hotel & Spa, a distinguished 5-star retreat in Chalkidiki, Greece. Taking inspiration from the profound legacy of Aristotle, this establishment pays homage to the birthplace of the ancient philosopher, whose work set the “core” for today’s philosophy and science. With 181 rooms and suites perched atop a hill, Cora Hotel & Spa is a haven of tranquillity, surrounded by lush forests and verdant trees. Boasting captivating views of the Aegean Sea, dedicated beach area, outdoor pools, a luxurious spa, and exceptional dining options, this hotel caters to both individuals in search of serenity and families with children aged 12 and above.

Name: Helnæs Mølle
Description: Stenladen på Helnæs Mølle er et unikt mødelokale i den smukke sydfynske natur. Her får I en helt særlig ramme om jeres dagsmøde, workshop eller strategiseminar – med højt til himlen, ro til fordybelse og naturen lige udenfor døren. Mødelokalet i Stenladen kan selvfølgelig kombineres med overnatning i vores luksuriøse ferieboliger og gode madoplevelser i restauranten i den gamle mølle.
Location: Helnæs By, Region of Southern Denmark

Name: Crowne Plaza Milan City
Description:
Crowne Plaza Milan City – un affascinante Urban Resort nel vibrante quartiere di Porta Nuova, a pochi passi dalla Stazione Centrale e ben collegato alle principali attrazioni di Milano grazie alla metropolitana adiacente all'hotel. Questo hotel combina design ricercato, comfort e ospitalità per offrire un'esperienza esclusiva nel cuore della città.

Dispone di 109 camere moderne ed eleganti, un ristorante e lounge bar con vista su un ampio giardino, spazi meeting con luce naturale, area fitness & wellness e parcheggio interno. L'esclusiva area esterna dispone di un Pool Bar e piscina dove rinfrescarsi durante l'estate milanese, rilassarsi e godersi un aperitivo a bordo piscina con i sofisticati cocktail dei nostri mixology specialist. Ideale anche per eventi privati o aziendali.




Crowne Plaza Milan City – A charming Urban Resort in the vibrant Porta Nuova district, just steps from Central Station and well-connected to Milan's main attractions. This hotel blends sophisticated design with comfort and hospitality to provide an exclusive experience in the heart of the city thanks to the adjoining metro stop.

Featuring 109 modern and elegant rooms, a restaurant and lounge bar overlooking a spacious garden, meeting spaces with natural light, a fitness & wellness area, and internal parking. The exclusive outdoor area includes a Pool Bar and pool where you can cool off during Milan's hot summer, relax, and enjoy a poolside aperitif with the sophisticated cocktails prepared by our mixology specialists. Ideal for private or corporate events.

Name: Hyatt Place|Hyatt House Mississauga Airport Corporate Centre
Description:
OVERVIEW
Welcome to Hyatt Place & Hyatt House Mississauga Airport Corporate Centre, proudly owned by West Fraser Development Ltd. and expertly managed by OK Hospitality. Our hotel stands as Canada’s first dual Hyatt property, combining the best of both worlds in hospitality. With a commitment to providing exceptional service, modern amenities, and a prime location just minutes from the airport, we cater to both business and leisure travelers alike.


ABOUT US
At Hyatt Place & Hyatt House Mississauga Airport Corporate Centre, we believe in creating a memorable experience for our guests. Our dual-brand approach allows us to offer the ideal accommodations for every traveler. Hyatt Place features spacious rooms equipped with modern conveniences, perfect for a productive stay, while Hyatt House provides a home-like atmosphere with fully equipped kitchens for longer visits.

Owned by West Fraser Development Ltd., we take pride in our commitment to excellence and sustainability. Our partnership with OK Hospitality ensures that every aspect of your stay is managed with the utmost care and professionalism. From our complimentary breakfast and 24-hour business center to our fitness facilities and meeting spaces, we are dedicated to making your stay comfortable and convenient.

Whether you are in town for business, a family getaway, or a quick stopover, Hyatt Place & Hyatt House Mississauga Airport Corporate Centre is your premier choice for hospitality in the heart of Mississauga. Come and experience the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and personalized service!

Name: H24 Hotels
Description:
Die H24 Hotels laden Dich ein, die Zukunft der Hotellerie zu erleben. Inspiriert von der Vision smarter Gastlichkeit, verbinden wir digitalen Komfort mit Persönlichkeit – bei uns bist du zu Gast bei Freunden.

Wir glauben, dass Technologie nicht unpersönlich sein muss. Unsere Hotels sind Orte, an denen moderne Digitalisierung auf echte Herzlichkeit trifft. Erlebe, wie unkomplizierte Prozesse Dir mehr Raum für das Wesentliche bieten: Dein Erlebnis.

Mit 6 Standorten in Berlin, Wolfsburg und dem Schwarzwald und weiteren 8 spannenden Projekten wachsen wir stetig. Jeder unserer Standorte hat seinen eigenen Charakter, aber alle teilen dieselbe Philosophie: Gastfreundschaft, die verbindet.

Bei uns findest Du nicht nur einen Job, sondern eine Berufung. Wir leben "New Work" mit flexiblen Arbeitsmodellen, flachen Hierarchien und einem Umfeld, das Kreativität und Eigenverantwortung fördert. Werde Teil einer Gemeinschaft, die Wissen in Bereichen wie Marken-Partnerschaften, Management, Projektentwicklung und Consulting teilt. 

Unser Ansatz: gemeinsam wachsen, nachhaltig erfolgreich sein.
Besuche uns und entdecke, was es bedeutet, Gastfreundschaft und Arbeit neu zu definieren. Bist Du bereit, Teil unserer Geschichte und Zukunft zu werden? Vernetze Dich mit uns und beginne Deine Reise in die Welt der H24 Hotels.

Name: Motel Molly
Description:
Meet Mollymook's newest boutique hotel. In a calibre of its own on the spectacular South Coast, a short road trip from Sydney, Motel Molly offers classic coastal charm with a cool, curated twist. 

Expect a unique seaside experience of Moroccan inspired décor, a soul soothing colour palette and service delivered with local love. Indulge in seaside splendour and curated luxury, just a few sandy steps to Mollymook’s famous beach.

Name: Andaz Turks and Caicos at Grace Bay
Description: Designed for those with a global sensibility, Andaz hotels are grounded in their local surroundings and infused with local culture. Under the guidance of Hyatt’s Lifestyle Group, the Andaz brand is entering a new era of refinement to best align with the luxury lifestyle vision. Global in scale while local in perspective, Andaz hotels weave the sights, sounds and tastes of their surroundings into each property for an experience that immerses guests in the culture of each local destination.

Name: Aldebarán Boyacá
Description:
Si buscas experiencias estimulantes, Aldebarán Boyacá (Duitama, Boyacá - Colombia), es tu lugar. Somos un hotel rural de acogedores domos, con comodidades y servicio personalizado que nos catacteriza y destaca.  

Realiza una visita guiada a nuestro cultivo de gulupa, punto central de nuestro proyecto agroindustrial de transformación de las gulupas del cultivo en diversos licores fermentados y destilados; los que podrás degustar, experimentar y aprender sobre los procesos para obtener un licor de alta calidad. 

Ven, desconéctate de la rutina y reconéctate con la naturaleza, con deliciosa comida con ingredientes del huerto, tipi - picnic con divertidos juegos y una esplendorosa fogata a cielo abierto. 

Las experiencias que hemos diseñado para tí, con nuestros licores, son variadas y enriquecedoras, aprenderás sobre nuestros procesos mientras entrenas tus sentidos y disfrutas degustando y saboreando deliciosos licores fermentados y destilados, completamente artesanales y de la más alta calidad. 

Estamos a solo 2:30 horas de Bogotá por carretera, todo el trayecto es doble calzada. 
Te esperamos en Aldebarán!

Name: Grupo ECCO
Description:
Grupo ECCO es una red de cinco negocios interconectados cuyo objetivo es transformar Cuatro Ciénegas, México, a través de sostenibilidad, turismo responsable e innovación científica. Trabajamos para generar un impacto positivo en la comunidad y el medio ambiente, promoviendo un desarrollo económico, social y ecológico.

Grupo ECCO forma parte activa del Plan 2040, una asociación sin fines de lucro establecida en 2016. Colaboramos con autoridades e instituciones para transformar Cuatro Ciénegas, mejorando el tejido social y la movilidad de las nuevas generaciones. Nuestro trabajo se enfoca en 5 pilares: Juventud y Familia, Salud, Economía Familiar, Educación y Espiritualidad.

Creemos que el futuro de Cuatro Ciénegas es posible gracias a un esfuerzo colectivo y sostenible que transforma el bienestar de la región, con un impacto positivo y duradero.

Nuestras marcas:

Tierra María: Un destino boutique en Cuatro Ciénegas que ofrece hospedaje de lujo y experiencias únicas en un entorno natural. Con un enfoque en sostenibilidad y apoyo al talento local.
Síguenos en Instagram: @tierramaria.destino

Hotel Marielena: Un hotel que honra las tradiciones locales y dona el 100% de sus ganancias a proyectos comunitarios.
Síguenos en Instagram: @marielena4c

Génesis Museo y Laboratorio: Centro científico enfocado en la investigación sobre biodiversidad local y biotecnología sostenible.
Síguenos en Instagram: @genesis4c

Playitas del Desierto: Parque ecoturístico que promueve experiencias inmersivas y protege el ecosistema natural de Cuatro Ciénegas.
Síguenos en Instagram: @playitas4c

Caminos San José: Experiencia espiritual única en el desierto, recorriendo 20 km en 3 días con 14 estaciones que representan momentos clave de la vida de San José.
Síguenos en Instagram: @caminosanjose4c

Name: The Hawai'i Hotel Alliance
Description:
The Hawai'i Hotel Alliance (HHA) was formed to be a trusted and powerful voice for Hawai'i’s hotel and lodging owners and operators.

Launched in February 2021, HHA provides collaborative engagement with the communities we are privileged to serve. Our members and partner sponsors own and operate more than 29,000 rooms across the state.

HHA is the only association in Hawai'i whose membership consists exclusively of owners and operators of hotel and lodging properties in the islands. HHA also is the only association that is led exclusively by hotel and lodging industry professionals – in other words, men and women who worked their way up the ranks in the hotel industry.
The Hawai'i Hotel Alliance is the exclusive partner of the American Hotel & Lodging Association in Hawai'i – a partnership that harnesses the experience and resources of industry leaders across the state and nation to advance state and local advocacy interests of the lodging industry.

Name: Mercure Birmingham West Hotel
Description: Conveniently situated less than 5 miles from Birmingham city centre. The hotel is well located to explore local interests and those further afield, as it is near the M5 (JNC 1) with links to other major motorways and good access to public transport. Guests also have complimentary access to our onsite leisure facilities, including a gym and an indoor pool.

Name: Golden Tulip Muscat
Description:
Golden Tulip Muscat hotel offers 175 modern rooms blending contemporary style with Omani charm.
MHT License Number: L1147189
Each room features plush amenities ensuring a comfortable stay. Culinary delights await at the hotel's dining venues, serving local and international cuisine. Relaxation options include a refreshing outdoor pool, a fitness center, and indulgent spa treatments. Business travelers can utilize versatile meeting spaces equipped with state-of-the-art technology. Conveniently located near Muscat's attractions, including shopping areas and beaches, the hotel provides an ideal base for exploring the city. With impeccable service and luxurious accommodations, the Golden Tulip Muscat promises an unforgettable stay steeped in Omani hospitality.

Name: Somerset Al Mansoura Doha
Description:
Somerset Al Mansoura Doha is strategically located in the heart of the commercial and business hub of Doha, a 20-minute drive from Hamad International Airport.

A highlight amongst Doha serviced apartments, the property is in close proximity to shopping malls, schools, restaurants and parks. It is also a 10-minute walk to Al Mansoura Metro Station.

Local attractions such as the Souq Waqif, Art Center, Museum of Islamic Art and Al Koot Fort are all within a 15-minute drive away.

Each room comes with a fully equipped modern kitchen, separate living and dining areas, an en-suite bathroom, and a private balcony. The rooms also feature a central air conditioning system with individually controlled thermostats, a modern IPTV system that includes a smart TV, high-speed Wi-Fi, as well as daily housekeeping services.

At Somerset Al Mansoura Doha, one can spend their day lounging in the privacy of their own room or engage in various activities within the property. There is a wide range of services and facilities to indulge in, including restaurants, a gymnasium, a rooftop pool and a kids' club

Name: Un Alto En La Huella Hotel Spa & Wellness Resort
Description: Somos un Hotel Spa que brinda una experiencia con instalaciones especialmente diseñadas para personas que quieran desconectarse de la rutina y volver a conectarse con uno mismo, con la naturaleza y con el sentirse bien.

Name: Fairfield Inn & Suites Orlando International Drive/Convention Center

For this reason, we put all our passion and vocation into offering quality service so that our clients feel at home.

Welcome to by numb3rs

Name: Fredriksten Hotell
Description:
Fredriksten Hotell ligger i fantastiske omgivelser på historiske Fredriksten festning i Halden. 

Enten du ønsker å overnatte i flotte, historiske omgivelser, eller benytte en særpreget arena for ditt møte eller konferanse, er Fredriksten Hotell et godt valg.

Her er det i århundrer blitt utkjempet viktige slag og sluttført harde forhandlinger. Den historiske rammen på Fredriksten gir inspirasjon for veien videre.

Hos oss kombineres et hyggelig opphold gjerne med et historisk innhold. Vi arrangerer gjerne en historisk vandring på Fredriksten festning for ditt selskap.

Description: We promise a great night's sleep in a clean room. Our amenities include Free, grab-and-go breakfast, high-quality, bean-to-cup coffee, comfortable workspace with easy-to-reach USB ports, total room black-out shades, modern design and friendly service that’s there whenever you need it.

Name: Borgo La Chiaracia Resort & SPA
Description:
Incastonato nella campagna umbra, ai confini tra Lazio e Toscana, Borgo La Chiaracia è un posto impareggiabile, testimone vivente di una visione, concepita anni fa, che vede sposarsi in un ambiente assolutamente naturale il concetto di fuga moderna. Un piccolo mondo a parte dove concetti innovativi che riguardano la persona, nel suo essere e nel suo comunicare, si combinano con l’essenza della tradizione umbra e della sua splendida campagna. Il disegno architettonico incarna in una visione contemporanea l’essenza della tradizione, in cui le forme si fondono con lo spirito del luogo, accogliendo in un abbraccio gli ospiti fin dal loro arrivo. L’equilibrio fra tradizione e modernità è visibile in tutta la struttura, valorizzata da materiali innovativi per una maggiore consapevolezza del risparmio energetico e della sostenibilità ambientale. Tuttavia nulla è stato tolto al fascino degli antichi casali umbri. Borgo La Chiaracia è un ambiente caldo, lussuoso e intimo dove gli ospiti godono di un servizio personale e preciso. La clientela può ospitarvi eventi importanti, festeggiare momenti speciali o semplicemente allontanarsi dalla vita quotidiana e cambiare ritmo. Borgo La Chiaracia Resort & SPA rappresenta una destinazione in cui un passato ricco di storia e il comfort di moderne tecnologie s’intrecciano con il piacere del palato e del benessere per creare un’esperienza unica di soggiorno, di vacanza, di lavoro. Di vita. È raccomandato dalla Guida Michelin e dalla Guida del Touring Club.

Reception 24/24

Percorso al coperto e riscaldato per unire i casali del   Resort

Name: Arkady Hof Hotel & Restaurant
Description:

Come and savour a special setting with magnificent period vaults that has been writing its own story for more than 300 years. Name: Best Western Premier Marvella Nha Trang Hotel
Description:
Located on the famous Tran Phu street, Best Western Premier Marvella Nha Trang is an international 5-star hotel with a prime location that directly looks out to the enchanting Nha Trang Bay. On the other hand, BW Premier Marvella Nha Trang is only a 35-minute drive from Cam Ranh International Airport, so transporting from and to the hotel becomes a breeze.
Within a short distance, our guests can visit various tourist’s attractions, shopping malls, movie theater and much more, making discovering the city easier than ever. 
With a total of 334 luxury rooms and suites, BWP Marvella Nha Trang is designed to provide stylish accommodation and facilities while matching all of your entertainment and working needs. The interior is inspired by Art Deco patterns - giving the hotel a classic yet modern style, adding a playful touch of novelty to the vintage beauty. In addition, all rooms have balconies or glass doors with sea-view, ensuring no matter what room you choose, the Nha Trang Bay can always be seen. 
In total, BWP Marvella Nha Trang has an extensive amount of 11 room types, ranging from 31m2 to 68m2, to meet your diverse requirements, from standard Deluxe rooms to luxurious Executive Suites, sweet Romance Suites and an exclusive Presidential Suite. These rooms & suites are here to redefine your luxurious stay.

Description:
The Ruskin Hotel has 130 bedrooms with 47 Premier, 24 Club and 60 Standard bedrooms, alongside our 300+ seater Rembrandts Cabaret Lounge with live  top class entertainment every evening.

Rolys Bar is open daily for guests and non-residents serving the very best in food and drink, with both a daytime & evening menu, also don’t miss our famous Afternoon Tea. We serve amazing cocktails all day long.

Rubens Restaurant will feature a freshly cooked to order menu, a new steak menu and market fresh daily specials. Same great taste and quality but now with more choice, a fresh modern vibe and amazing new wine list.

We have lifts to all floors and our Reception is open 24-hours a day, Porters are on hand to assist you with your luggage, and we have 16 private garage parking spaces.

Super-Fast FREE Fibre Broadband WIFI throughout the hotel.

Name: Abstract Hotel
Description:
Abstract is Auckland’s freshest new vibe, blending hotel and residences for urban adventurers wanting to immerse themselves in the city’s vibrant culinary, artistic and nightlife scene.
Economical in space and price but generous in design, service and value, Abstract delivers staying or living residences that are beautifully appointed and effortlessly stylish. As well as on-site management, you’ll enjoy access to co-working spaces, a guest lounge and library bar, a restaurant, a luxury spa and an onsite gym. 
Abstract offers the freedom to be energised, elevated or cocooned in calm. 
Come and stay as long as you want, whether for work, play or a family vacay. After all, the best stories happen in hotels.

Name: Crowne Plaza Shell Cove Marina
Description:
Crowne Plaza Shell Cove Marina offers the perfect blend of relaxation, celebration, and collaboration on the stunning South Coast of NSW. Enjoy breathtaking views across the marina and ocean, complemented by sea breezes, as you settle into a retreat designed for every kind of getaway - be it a romantic escape, a family adventure, or a productive business trip.

Unwind on our open-air pool deck, complete with poolside bar or indulge in a culinary journey at our waterside restaurant and bar. Our expansive conference and events space, including the grand marina ballroom, set the stage for memorable events. 

Located on the water's edge with unsurpassed views, we are nestled in the heart of the Shell Cove waterfront precinct, perfectly positioned for you to explore the region's most popular attractions. 

Let our passionate team warmly welcome you with seamless service, ensuring a truly memorable stay.

Name: Le Rivage Eco Motel & Spa
Description:
Le Rivage Eco Motel & Spa is the first ever Green 5 Star Hotel in Bangladesh. It’s located at KUAKATA. A Sea view 20 storied green establishment. Our commitment is to PEACEFUL CO-EXISTS WITH NATURE & EARTH. We dream of a world where Recreation, Income & Nature can walk together side by side. We believe quality & responsibilities comes first; profit is logical sequence. Unplanned investment gifted us a slum of RCC. It’s damaging our nature, earth, environment & eco systems. Which one is the reason for climate change. Considering above all we designed the green hotel project for you. Here you all will enjoy profit almost ten times than residential project by showing respect to the nature.
Le Rivage Eco Motel & Spa an ongoing green hotel that promises to provide a sustainable and luxurious experience to its guests including all 5 Star Hotel facilities. The motel is being built on a sprawling piece of land located in the heart of nature surrounded by greenery and sea beach. The motel will incorporate the latest green technologies, design principles & materials to ensure that it is environmentally responsible and energy-efficient.Investing in the Le Rivage Eco Motel & Spa is an excellent opportunity for those who want to support sustainable tourism and be a part of a growing trend towards green business. The project committed to offer a unique experience to guests who want to enjoy luxurious travelling while being responsible towards the environment.

Name: Casa rural****La Posada de los Sentidos, antiguo convento Jesuita construido S.XVI, "FREEVIRUS".
Description:
La Posada de los Sentidos fue un antigua casa convento que fundo San Francisco de Borja. Construida durante el S.XVI, en piedra, madera y adobe con más de 350 m2, distribuida en cinco habitaciones, bodega, cocina, sala de estar. Reformada con las mismas técnicas y materiales originales.
Una casa alegre y muy acogedora. Puede alojar a cinco familias o grupos de amigos que quieran vivir una experiencia única en la comarca de la Vera, en un entorno natural autentico.

Jarandilla de la Vera, en pleno centro de la comarca de la Vera, rodeado de cerezos, robles, olivos, almendros, próximo al monasterio de Yuste, construido por el Emperador Carlos V para su descaso y pasar el final de sus días.
Naturaleza, paisajes, lagos, puestas de sol, excursiones y paseos a caballo. Pueblos, iglesias y construcciones conservadas con encanto que han visto pasar los siglos. 

El Alojamiento:
5 habitaciones con baño individual completo y cama de matrimonio XXL.
Sauna y baño turco.
Secador de pelo.
Se entrega la habitación en perfecto estado, sabanas, toallas, servicio de té, café y pastas.      
Si se reserva con tiempo, se puede ofrecer servicios y productos adicionales de interés a los clientes.

Description: Hyatt Centric San Juan Isla Verde places you at the center of the action, within a block of Isla Verde Beach’s golden sands. Dive into island living with elevated amenities, like our private oceanfront beach club, signature restaurant, open-air beer garden and tranquil outdoor pool set in a tropical landscape. With more than 16,000 square feet of event space and proximity to Luis Muñoz International Airport, this modern boutique hotel is well-equipped for both leisure and business travelers.

Name: The Angel Hotel and Suites
Description:
Founded in 2020, The Angel Hotel & Suites is a modern hospitality destination located in Sector 38, Gurugram, near Medanta Medicity. We offer a refined stay experience designed for business travellers, families, and long-stay guests who value comfort, space, and reliability.

Our hotel features thoughtfully designed rooms and spacious 2BHK suites, complemented by elegant interiors, a calm ambience, and essential modern amenities. With a focus on cleanliness, functionality, and warm service, we aim to deliver a seamless and comfortable experience for every guest.

Whether visiting for work, medical care, or leisure, The Angel Hotel & Suites provides a peaceful environment with excellent connectivity to major business hubs and key city locations.

Name: Fowlescombe Farm
Description:
Fowlescombe Farm is a luxurious and intimate retreat combining beautifully designed accommodation and highly personalised service.

Our location at the heart of a regenerative farm influences every aspect of the experience. From immersive farm-to-table dining to a broad programme of authentic, imaginative activities both on and off the farm, we are building a unique destination where guests can rejuvenate, connect with nature, and enjoy an experience that goes beyond traditional hospitality.

Name: Utne hotel
Description:
Let us take you on a journey – to the taste of Hardanger, to dew fresh apples and to the scent of clean nature. This picturesque atmosphere makes Utne hotel a perfect venue for special occasions such as anniversaries, conferences or family gatherings. All the 17 rooms at Utne hotel are unique with historical features, furniture and styles. 
 
Our conference room at "Tingstova" suit approximately 20 people. 
And if you wish you bring together a dinner party, our  dining room can host parties of up to 60 guests.

Name: Vida Cayman
Description:
Located on Conch Point Road, adjacent to the entrance to Barkers National Park, Vida Cayman is boutique sustainable hotel offering luxury accommodations off the beaten track, on the outskirts of Barkers Beach and Barkers National Park.  Beautifully crafted and impeccably curated, the property has been transformed into 16 individually designed apartments that combine sustainable architecture with elegant, contemporary design.

For a more discerning guest VIDA offers adventure and wellness like no other destination in Cayman. Our strategic partnership with Cayman Kitesurf brings kiting, foiling and windsurfing to your door. Free diving, scuba diving, sailing, deep sea fishing, horse back riding, ATV tours, E bike tours can all be arranged with our local partners.
 
Guests at VIDA will experience luxurious accommodations and a highly personalised service with tailor made concierge style service.

Name: Bewave Homes
Description:
A Bewave Homes é uma empresa de gerenciamento de propriedades para locação por temporada, conhecida por sua abordagem humanizada e compromisso com a excelência. A equipe dedicada se esforça para proporcionar experiências excepcionais para hóspedes e proprietários, garantindo qualidade e atenção aos detalhes em cada propriedade.

Com um foco contínuo na inovação e na melhoria dos serviços, a Bewave Homes oferece um atendimento personalizado que atende às necessidades específicas de cada cliente. Transformar cada estadia em uma experiência única e inesquecível é a nossa missão.

Name: Hotell Jæren
Description:
Hotell Jæren ligger midt i Bryne sentrum!

Else Strøm Larsen og Mette Vigre overtok nøklene til hotellet i 2020. På tre måneder totalrenoverte og åpnet vi det som skulle bli nye Hotell Jæren. 
Etter over 18 år sammen i bransjen skulle vi endelig få realisere hotelldrømmen.

Vi utvidet teamet med flere håndplukkede nøkkelpersoner, som i dag utgjør selve kjernen i Hotell Jæren. Denne gjengen stod parat under nyåpningen i juni 2020.

I 2023 tok vi sats igjen og utvidet med 43 nye hotellrom. Hos oss har alle rom sin egen personlighet, med en mer eller mindre kjent person illustrert bak sengen og noen velvalgte ord å sovne til. I dag utgjør Hotell Jæren 95 hotellrom og har kapasitet til huse 500 personer i selskap og konferanser. 

Hotellet har samlet et mangfoldig team, vi er stolte av vår jærske personlige tilnærming, strekker oss langt for gjestene og tror på verdien av å bygge ekte relasjoner.

Hotellet har unik plassering med Jærstrendene i umiddelbar nærhet og kort kjøretur til noen av Norges mest kjente turer. Preikestolen, Kjerag og Trollpikken.

Stemningsfull lobby med peis, matbar med varme og kalde retter og du kan sitte i det hjørnet du liker aller best.

25 minutters kjøretur unna Sola flyplass . Med fokus på profesjonalitet og begeistring i alle ledd skal vi levere kurs og konferanser, selskap og matopplevelser fra øverste hylle.

Hotell Jæren ligger ved siden av Fritz Røed skulpturpark og kun 3 minutter fra togstasjonen på Bryne. Flybussen stopper også på togstasjonen, direkte fra Sola flyplass flere ganger daglig. Vi har gratis god parkering rett utenfor inngangsdøren, det skal være enkelt å bo hos oss.

Velkommen heim!

Description:
Nestled in the heart of Kaslik, Serab Residencia offers a refined escape where comfort meets understated elegance. Designed for travelers seeking a unique and intimate stay, our boutique hotel blends contemporary style with warm hospitality.

Whether you're here for business or leisure, Serab Residencia provides a serene retreat with thoughtfully designed rooms, exceptional service, and an ambiance that feels like home. Our prime location places you near the best of Kaslik’s dining, shopping, and cultural experiences, ensuring a stay that’s as enriching as it is relaxing.

Experience hospitality redefined—where every stay is more than just a visit, it's a memory in the making.

Name: Stay Easy Plus Hotel
Description: The Stay Easy Plus Hotel first welcomed guests in April 2023. It is situated near Enttoto Park on Sululta Road in Addisu Gebeya, Addis Abeba. The five-star business and leisure hotel is ideal for both short-term and long-term business trips, relocations, and leisure travel.

Name: Delta Hotels Orlando Celebration
Description:
There’s no better getaway than our full-service resort, where 20 acres of lush landscape surrounding a gorgeous lake, superb shops, exceptional dining, championship golf courses, and America’s most sought-after theme parks are at your fingertips. It’s easy to see why downtime is unheard of at The Grand Orlando Resort at Celebration. And, when you’re not busy exploring, feel free to melt away in our well-appointed accommodations, pleasant amenities, and unmatched service.

Our Central Florida resort offers all the amenities and services under the sun. Your family can enjoy endless recreational fun with three swimming pools (equipped with a waterfall and slides), and two tennis courts.

Business travelers can easily stay connected by utilizing our well-equipped business center. Have a meeting? Explore 10,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor event and meeting space.

Name: Omni Royal Orleans Hotel
Description: Omni means all. All the things we say and do make a difference in the lives of each other, our guests and our community. We’re all in. That’s what makes us feel more like a family than a company. We are large enough to provide diverse career opportunities in a variety of venues, yet small enough to know you by name. We are committed to developing leaders from within — we call that “Growing our Garden”. We’d love to have you join our family.

Name: Savoy 1918
Description:
Savoy has always been more than a hotel. For over a century, it has been a home for travelers, a gathering place for Oslo, and a stage for stories both grand and intimate. Today, our house is undergoing a complete renovation, a transformation that both renews and preserves the character that has defined us for generations.

When our doors reopen in July 2026, you will be welcomed into 92 individually furnished rooms, event spaces and meeting rooms designed for both relaxation and celebration, and a new restaurant and bar where the city and its guests meet once more. For moments of calm, our wellness facilities, from sauna to relaxation area, will provide the quiet luxury of restoration.

Here, tradition is not only remembered; it is lived. Every detail is chosen with care, from curated antiques to thoughtful comforts, so that your stay carries the elegance of the past and the ease of the present.

We look forward to welcoming you to the new Savoy. Until then, consider this your first greeting from a house that is not only to be visited, but to be returned to.

Warm regards,
Hotel Savoy

Name: Chateau Kvirike · შატო კვირიკე
Description:
შატო კვირიკე 6 ჰექტარზე გაშენებული დასასვენებელი სასტუმრო კომპლექსია, რომელიც ქობულეთში, უნიკალურ მიკროკლიმატურ ზონაში, ზვასა და მთას შორის მდებარეობს. ტერიტორიის 2 ჰექტარზე გაშენებულია როგორც კივისა და თხილის ბაები, ასევე სხვადასხვა ჯიშის ყურძნის ვენახები. დანარჩენ ტერიტორიაზე კი მდებარეობს სასტუმროს მთავარი შენობა 23 თანამედროვე ნომრით, კერძო ვილა, ია აუზი და მის ირგვლივ განლაგებული 15 უნიკალური კოტეჯი საქართველოს სხვადასხვა კუთხეების სახელით.

---

Chateau Kvirike is a multifunctional hotel complex built on 6 hectares and is located in Kobuleti, within a unique microclimatic zone nestled between the sea and the mountains. Two hectares of the property are dedicated to kiwi and hazelnut orchards, along with grape vineyards featuring various varieties. The primary hotel building, which includes 23 modern rooms, a private villa, an open pool, and 15 unique cottages located around it, can be found on the remaining portion of the property. Each of these cottages is named after different corners of Georgia.

Name: The Kee Resort & Spa
Description: Located in the heart of Patong Beach, within 240 m from Patong Beach and 150 m from Bangla Road's vibrant nightlife area, The Kee Resort & Spa is a stylish, boutique resort with a modern retro vibe. Praised by guests for being in a great location, attentive staff, a great pool bar and good cleaning standards, the property is in high demand, especially the Deluxe Pool Access Rooms, from a wide range of nationalities. Featuring spacious (40 sqm or more), comfortable rooms with modern interiors, a lagoon-style pool, a yacht-shaped rooftop bar with amazing sunset views, a quality on-site spa to get you back on your feet after a night of fun, The Kee is a hidden oasis. Rooms have contemporary furnishings with a splash of Thai elegance and convenient amenities for the savvy traveler seeking a comfortable stay. Perfect for solo travelers, friends, couples or families, The Kee promises a unique holiday experience in Phuket. Discover a calmer side to Patong Beach, away from the hustle and bustle but within walking distance to all of the action, at The Kee.

Name: Assemble Boise
Description:
A boutique hotel located five minutes from Downtown Boise and fifteen minutes from the airport, built for teams who want privacy, clarity, and effortless retreat logistics.

Our design-driven studios draw inspiration from renowned physicists, each offering a private bathroom, workspace, and queen or king bed. Every room is engineered with rare STC 60 soundproofing and acoustically optimized windows for exceptional quiet—creating a space made for deep rest and focused work.

Amenities include flexible meeting spaces with 65" displays and whiteboard lounges, outdoor dining areas, and modular gathering spaces. A full wellness circuit featuring a cedar sauna, hot tub, cold plunges, and an outdoor gym provides true retreat-level restoration. Guests also enjoy curated snacks, bikes, and convenient on-site parking.

Name: Keryas Boutique Hotel
Description:
Nestled in the heart of Isfahan, Keryas Hotel beckons you to an enchanting blend of past and present.

A mere two-minute stroll from the UNESCO World Heritage site of Naghsh-e Jahan Square and the majestic Shah Mosque, our boutique haven stands as a bridge between history's whispers and today's comforts.

Within our walls, modernity and tradition waltz in harmony. Explore a tapestry of rooms, each a unique chapter in your story, from timeless elegance to contemporary chic.

And when the day's adventures beckon, our restaurant awaits, a culinary odyssey of flavors, where local heritage dances with international flair.

Welcome to Keryas Hotel, where every step echoes with the echoes of a storied past, and every moment blooms with the promise of a timeless future.

Name: Hayal Apartmani
Description:
Hayal Apartments are located in a quiet and natural part of Ilidža in the city of Sarajevo near Vrelo Bosne. We are only 3 km away from the International Airport. A few minutes away is the center of Ilidža with all the necessary facilities such as markets, pharmacies, restaurants, etc. We are only 3.6 km from the Sarajevo War Tunnel, 11 km from the Latin Bridge, and the city center and Baščaršija are at a distance of 11 km. A special benefit is the proximity of the mountains Igman and Bjelasnica.
Our accommodation capacity includes 18 rooms and 4 suites. All apartments are equipped with air conditioning, wi-fi network, have a private bathroom with hairdryer, terrace, mini bar, and there is certainly a garden space.
There is also a beauty salon within the facility, which provides massage, professional make-up and eyebrow drawing techniques with henna.
As part of the Hayal apartments, in addition to accommodation services, we provide private transport services, as well as the possibility of renting a car.
Location: Ilidža, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

Name: Palais Nouhass
Description:
Welcome to Palais Nouhass, where elegance meets tradition in a unique blend of modern luxury and cultural heritage. Nestled in the prestigious Palmeraie neighborhood, the palace offers an exquisite escape into a world of refined sophistication. 

Each of the 18 suites and rooms is thoughtfully designed, reflecting the charm and history of our surroundings, while providing the utmost comfort and convenience. The entire hotel, including the terraces and bathrooms, is crafted with luxurious marble and traditional tadelakt finishes. Handcrafted wooden doors, intricate paintings, and beautifully adorned ceilings elevate the timeless ambiance, further enhanced by our handmade copper wall lights and chandeliers.

At Palais Nouhass, we pride ourselves on exceptional service, ensuring that every guest’s experience is unforgettable. Our facilities include a fully equipped gym, a serene spa + hammam for ultimate relaxation, and a semi-Olympic swimming pool. Guests can also enjoy a variety of recreational activities, including billiards and ping pong, within the expansive living spaces. The beautifully landscaped gardens offer picturesque views of the pool from every corner, creating a tranquil oasis.

Rooms/suites are equipped with modern amenities such as safes, minibars, and 55-inch TVs, ensuring your stay is as comfortable as it is luxurious. Indulge in our gourmet dining options, unwind in our spa, or explore the cultural landmarks just steps away from our doors. Whether you're here for business or leisure, Palais Nouhass promises a stay that is both opulent and memorable. Discover the perfect balance of tradition and modernity, where your journey into timeless elegance begins.

Name: Tangent Inc.
Description:
Tangent Inc

Founded in 2005, Tangent Inc is a trailblazer in providing comprehensive white paper solutions tailored for standalone hotels, resorts, and wellness centers. Our journey began with a focus on travel solutions, offering extreme adventure and rich heritage tours across India. By 2015, we pivoted to revolutionize the hospitality industry with our innovative services, addressing the unique needs of this sector.

At Tangent Inc, we offer a wide range of solutions designed to drive success for our clients. Our services include advanced marketing and sales strategies, OTA management, professional tele-calling services, and complete management support for hospitality establishments. Our end-to-end approach ensures seamless integration of marketing and sales efforts, delivering exceptional results.

Recognizing the importance of digital transformation, we launched Chord Technologies in 2020. This subsidiary specializes in cutting-edge digital marketing solutions, enabling our clients to maintain a competitive edge in the digital era. Through Chord Technologies, we provide the latest tools and strategies to enhance online presence and drive business growth.

Our commitment to excellence and innovation positions Tangent Inc as a trusted partner for hotels, resorts, and wellness centers seeking to enhance their operational efficiency and market presence. We pride ourselves on our ability to deliver tailored solutions that meet the unique needs of each client, ensuring their success in a competitive industry.

With a team of dedicated professionals and a client-centric approach, Tangent Inc continues to set new standards in the hospitality sector. Our mission is to empower our clients with the tools and strategies they need to achieve unparalleled success.

Tangent Inc – Driving Success Through Innovation and Excellence in Hospitality.

The resort stands on a high cliff overlooking the Arabian Sea and a long wide beach of powdery white sand. The Travancore Heritage is conceived and developed as a Heritage Property to bring to life the age-old traditional architectural splendor of the region with its typical timber houses and 'Nalukettus' with tiled roofing, which allow for living in communion with all the elements of Nature Travancore Heritage, the glistening brand new heritage property of 15 acres built with recreated palaces and 'nalukettus' of vintage Kerala is situated on the pristine beach front of Chowara, south of Kovalam, near Trivandrum, Kerala, India. Travancore Heritage is a venture of Joy's Resorts and Hotels

Name: Hotel 2000 Kavaklıdere
Description:
Hotel 2000 Kavaklıdere – Ankara’nın Kalbindeki Konforlu ve Güvenilir Adresiniz 

Hotel 2000 Kavaklıdere, Ankara’nın en prestijli bölgelerinden biri olan Kavaklıdere’de, Bestekar Sokak üzerinde misafirlerine merkezi konum avantajı ve yüksek kaliteli hizmeti bir arada sunmaktadır. “Ankara Kavaklıdere otelleri” arasında öne çıkan otelimiz; iş seyahati, turistik geziler veya özel konaklamalar için modern, rahat ve güvenilir bir deneyim sağlar.

 Merkezi Konum Avantajı
Bestekar Sokak otelleri içinde yer alan Hotel 2000 Kavaklıdere, Kızılay, Tunalı Hilmi Caddesi ve Bakanlıklar gibi şehrin en önemli noktalarına yürüme mesafesindedir. Ankara’nın kültürel merkezlerine, iş dünyasının kalbine ve alışveriş bölgelerine kolay erişim sayesinde misafirlerimiz zamandan tasarruf ederken, şehrin tüm güzelliklerini keşfetme imkânı bulur.

 Konforlu ve Modern Konaklama
Otelimizdeki odalar, konforlu yatakları, özenle seçilmiş mobilyaları ve modern donanımlarıyla hem iş hem de tatil amaçlı konaklamalara uygundur. Misafir memnuniyetini esas alan anlayışımız ile her ayrıntıyı düşünerek konforlu bir konaklama deneyimi sunuyoruz.

 Zengin Hizmet ve İkramlar
Her sabah özenle hazırlanmış kahvaltı menümüz, misafirlerimizin güne enerjik başlamasını sağlar. Ayrıca güler yüzlü ve profesyonel ekibimiz, günün her saatinde sizlere yardımcı olmaktan mutluluk duyar. Otelimizde konaklayan misafirler, “Ankara otel” deneyimini sıcak, samimi ve güvenilir bir atmosferde yaşar.

 Misafir Memnuniyeti Önceliğimizdir
Hotel 2000 Kavaklıdere olarak, misafirlerimizin yorumlarına önem verir, her geri bildirimi hizmet kalitemizi artırmak için bir fırsat olarak görürüz. Personelimizin özverili çalışmaları sayesinde “Ankara Kavaklıdere otelleri” arasında tavsiye edilen, tekrar tercih edilen bir otel olmanın gururunu yaşıyoruz.

 İş ve Tatil Seyahatleri İçin İdeal
İster iş toplantılarınız ister kültürel gezileriniz için Ankara’da olun, doğru adres Hotel 2000 Kavaklıdere!

Ofrecemos tarifas corporativas especiales, beneficios exclusivos para empresas, atención personalizada en reservas y servicios adaptados a cada tipo de huésped. Además, nuestros equipos locales trabajan día a día para mantener el equilibrio entre la hospitalidad tradicional y la innovación que caracteriza a la marca Austral.

En Hoteles y Paradores Austral, creemos que cada estadía es una oportunidad para generar vínculos, experiencias y recuerdos positivos.

Porque más que recibir viajeros, cuidamos personas: su descanso, su confort y su bienestar.”

Name: Hilton Pennywell St. Louis at the Arch
Description:
STORIED AND SPIRITED—
JUST LIKE OUR CITY

If you pause for a moment at the intersection of Olive Street and North 4th Street, you can see and feel the incredible energy that has inspired so many throughout St. Louis’ rich history. At The Pennywell St. Louis Downtown, a Hilton Hotel, we are proud to be a part of the past, present, and future—honoring the stories of those who came before us and helping to lay the groundwork for an incredible tomorrow.

The fascinating eight-story structure we call home began life as an idea in 1885. Facing financial difficulties and numerous setbacks, architect Stephen D. Hatch and his associate L. Cass Miller worked through years of challenges to complete construction in 1888. A few years after the building opened, one of its most prominent tenants, Laclede National Bank, merged with Merchants National Bank, giving the building a name that’s still used today: the Merchants–Laclede Building.

The building has seen its ups and downs over the years, but it has always been a celebration of everything that makes St. Louis great. Today, it proudly guards the intersection of Olive and 4th, a symbol of entrepreneurship, vision, dedication, and triumph.

After nearly two decades as the Hilton St. Louis Downtown at the Arch, the hotel in the Merchants–Laclede building is now known as The Pennywell St. Louis Downtown, a Hilton Hotel. The name pays homage to the building’s incredible past. Throughout the hotel, you’ll find numerous historical elements, such as the original 1888 vault doors, vintage décor, and intricate architectural details, a reminder of where we’ve been and inspiration for what lies ahead.

Throughout this beautiful building that embodies the history and heart of St. Louis, we hope you’ll find the perfect home base as you dream, embark, explore, and rest.

Contact us to make your reservation at this iconic St. Louis landmark.

Description:
Casa du Vélo  es un Hotel concevido por ciclistas para ciclistas del mundo. Un Hotel donde el turismo de lujo, aventura y relajación convergen para crear un lugar apacible para cada uno de nuestros huéspedes.

Euidistantes a las ciudades de Pereira (PEI) y Armenia (AXM), Colombia, Casa du Vélo ofrece la posibilidad de estar en un radio cercano a las principales atracciones del eje cafetero colombiano: Haciendas cafeteras, Salento, Valle del Cocora, Parque del Café, Panaca, Mariposario, entre muchas otras que ofrecen un amplio portafolio turístico en el interior de Colombia.

Contamos con 10 Habitaciones en acomodación doble y jardín, con una vista que entrega los atardeceres de nuestro corazón verde colombiano, junto una cocina de montaña que lleva nuestra horno de leña en cada uno de sus platos. Igualmente, contamos con un Spa y un baño turco para aquellos momentos especiales y de relajación en pareja, y un spot de ciclismo para alquiler de bicicletas Specialized Turbo Creo, Turbo Levo, ambas asistidas, así como bicicletas musculares hechas a mano en Colombia y un taller equipado con todas las herramientas necesarias para atender todas sus necesidades ciclistas.

Un honor poder atenderlos y los esperamos en Casa!

Petit Hotel är en fantastisk samling av Svenska unika hotellpärlor. Här hittar du de små guldkornen som bjuder på extra allt i service & matupplevelse.
Petit Hotel ingår även i ett av världens största privat nätverk under namnet "Global Alliance of privat hotel" En samling av världens guldkorn. 

Petit Hotel includes 20 of Swedens finest small private hotels. Most of them are located in the countryside I beautiful, peaceful surroundings. With highly creative kitchen, often based on on fresh local and organic produce, these hotels offer indulgence for both body and soul.
Petit Hotel - small hotels with great kitchens included in   Global association of Private Hotels. The alliance includes ring hotels Germany, Small Danish Hotels, Naturidyll Hotels Austria and Charme & Caractère hotels. In total more than 800 private hotels all over the world with the same idea.

Description:

Este histórico cortijo andaluz ha sido meticulosamente restaurado para ofrecer a nuestros huéspedes el máximo confort y una atmósfera de tranquilidad absoluta. Rodeado de 160 hectáreas de paisajes naturales, cada rincón de la finca está diseñado para brindar una sensación de serenidad y conexión con la naturaleza.
