Whether it’s cycling along winding trails, hiking through lush landscapes, or simply immersing oneself in the tranquility of the surroundings, every moment here is a step into a dream.

A true escape, Hotel Vall Amagada del Moli embraces the essence of sustainability without ever compromising on the comforts of exquisite cuisine , fine wines, and unparalleled service . This boutique hotel is where the heart of adventure meets the soul of hospitality, offering a perfect blend of active exploration and moments of relaxation.

Vi vill gärna bidra till minnesvärda dagar i Sveriges bästa skidort Stöten, oavsett om du är här privat eller med ditt företag på konferens. 

Vi tar gärna fram förslag som ger hela företaget en positiv kick med tid för samtal, aktiviteter, gemenskap och massor av ny energi. 

Med ett perfekt läge mellan pisten och dalen, får ni minsta möjliga spilltid mellan konferens och aktiviteter. Hotellet erbjuder 104 bäddar till säsongen genom vår utbyggnad med åtta nya lägenheter för 6–8 personer. Mountain Lodge förmedlar även nya moderna lägenheter/stugor i nära anslutning till hotellet med ski-in/ski-out läge.

I vår konferenslokal Toppen kan vi möblera för 80 personer i biosittning. Här bygger vi ut med två grupprum för ca 10–15 personer.

Ingen fjällkonferens utan Aprés ski! Baren/restaurangen på våning tre har en perfekt inramning för “Pistvakt-tema! med Ockelboskoitrar och stollift i taket. Självklart blandar vår bartender Bäverhojt och Zingo till de som vill ha alkoholfritt.

Name: Kemet Boutique Hotel
Description:
Kemet – ancient name of Egypt, km.t, which means black land, likely referring to the fertile black soils of the Nile flood plains, distinct from the deshret (⟨dšṛt⟩), or “red land” of the desert.

Located in the historic area of the Giza Plateau, our hotel is just a short walk from the iconic Great Pyramids of Giza. The breathtaking views of these ancient wonders from our property serve as a daily reminder of Egypt’s timeless allure.

Our mission is to enrich cultural travelers with a deep understanding of ancient Egypt while providing an exceptional modern-day travel experience. We are dedicated to offering genuine Egyptian hospitality, organized with Dutch reliability, ensuring that every guest enjoys a seamless and memorable stay. we believe in creating experiences that go beyond the ordinary.

At Kemet Boutique Hotel, we focus on what truly matters: you. Every aspect of your stay is tailored to your interests and desires, ensuring a unique experience that reflects the spirit of Egypt.

Each of the 31 rooms,  named for a legendary queen, offers a bold escape for the curious, the cultured, and the creatively inclined. From our speakeasy-inspired Ghost Light Room to the hidden inner court lounge, every corner whispers intrigue.

Whether you're in Stratford for the festival, a romantic retreat, or simply to wander, you'll find yourself at the front-row of the scene, steps from the theatre, immersed in eclectic design, and embraced by service that’s discreet, sincere, and unforgettable.

Description:
The Bedford Hotel can be found in the heart of the award-winning Devon market town of Tavistock. The hotel's 31 bedrooms range from comfortable and well-equipped standard rooms to indulgent Premier rooms complete with four poster beds, all individually styled to reflect the rich heritage of this grand townhouse hotel. Warm, traditional hospitality is the order of the day, with an award-winning restaurant showcasing the best local ingredients, and a bustling bar popular with locals and guests alike. The Bedford boasts a variety of events spaces, from elegant private dining rooms to the striking Gallery 26 function suite which beautifully combines the historic setting with contemporary facilities.

In addition to offering the perfect base for a leisure stay on the doorstep of Dartmoor National Park, the Bedford Hotel also offers a full range of services and facilties for business and corporate use:

Gallery 26: 
An award-winning air-conditioned function suite at the heart of the hotel, offering banqueting and conference facilities for up to 120.

The Tavistock Room:
An intimate and characterful oak-panelled room, perfect for a private dinner party of smaller meeting.

The Portrait Room:
A bright and airy space for meetings, conferences and private dining, with a beautiful veranda opening onto the hotel gardens.

Bar, lounge and restaurant:
Open for morning coffee, lunch, afternoon tea and evening meals.

Mitt på den västgötska schlätta, där åkrar möter småstäder, ligger Lumber & Karle Hotell och Konferens. Inspirerad av den romerska villans harmoniska form har vi skapat ett vackert hotell där vi möter dina behov.

Hos oss väntar 45 trevliga rum, moderna konferenslokaler för både små och stora grupper samt en välkänd restaurang där köket bjuder på matupplevelser i toppklass. Här finns även egen bowlinghall med åtta banor, ett avkopplande SPA-bad och ett litet men välutrustat gym.

Vi gör vårt yttersta för att din vistelse hos oss ska bli något alldeles extra.
Varmt välkommen till Lumber & Karle i Kvänum – en plats fylld av upplevelser, året runt, med spännande event och aktiviteter du inte vill missa.

Name: Gulf Inn Group of Hotels
Description:
Just a short walk away from Salahuddin Metro Station, Dubai’s major shopping centres and business district, City Star Hotel offers comfortable and well-furnished rooms and suites along with international evening entertainment options.

City Star Hotel is just 10 minutes away from Dubai’s international airport. The hotel’s convenient location allows you to enjoy many of Dubai's attractions. City Star’s reception staff are available 24-hours a day for any requests you may have.

Each room at City Star is elegantly designed and decorated and offers a high standard of comfort. The rooms also feature a modern bathroom facilities and an electronic locking system on the doors.

Start each day with a delicious breakfast buffet, if part of your room rate. In the evening, you can enjoy a choice of entertainment in one of the 4 international pubs and clubs at City Star. There are also plenty of restaurants and bars in close proximity to the hotel.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 8.0 for a two-person trip.

Description: Capitane Hotels er en privat aktør i det norske hotellmarkedet. Selskapets ambisjon er å utvikle og drifte hoteller i sentrale områder i landet og utvikle de beste konsepter for morgendagens hotellkunder.

Name: Olive County Resorts and Hotels Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
At Olive County Resorts and Hotels, we craft unforgettable hospitality experiences, blending luxury, comfort, and the charm of nature. With our current portfolio of two exquisite properties in India, we are committed to redefining the art of hospitality while laying the foundation for a future that spans across multiple destinations.

Nestled in the serene landscapes of Manali, Olive County Manali is a 4-star, 43-room riverfront retreat that offers breathtaking views, impeccable service, and a signature on-site brewery that adds a unique flavor to the stay. Each moment here is designed to immerse guests in tranquility and indulgence.

In the heart of Kashmir, near the iconic Dal Lake, Olive County Srinagar invites travelers to explore the rich cultural tapestry of the region while enjoying world-class amenities. This property serves as a gateway to the beauty and heritage of the valley, ensuring a memorable experience for every guest.

With an unwavering focus on quality, personalized service, and sustainable practices, Olive County Resorts and Hotels is more than just a place to stay—it’s a destination to experience life’s finest moments. As we look to the future, we aim to expand our presence, bringing the Olive County brand of hospitality to more breathtaking locations, ensuring our guests experience luxury wherever they travel.

Name: Rustic Inn at Jackson Hole
Description: Experience all the rugged beauty and wild adventure of Jackson, Wyoming while enjoying the comfort of luxurious resort accommodations. Rustic Inn Creekside Resort and Spa offers the amenities, the rustically refined environs, and knowledgeable concierge team to ensure your experience around the Teton and Yellowstone National Parks is everything you’ve dreamed of.

Name: Vondice Hotel Amsterdam
Description:
Your own little house in the center of the city
This is our hotel. Vondice Hotel is a historical heritage site, a former pumping station, mostly created from natural materials, recycled and handmade. 21 meters long and furnished with love makes it one of a kind.
Today this is where you’ll come to expect luxuries like a king-sized bed (200×200 cm) with a super deluxe mattress, a sunny first-floor balcony with views over the river, and a private terrace. You reach the center of Amsterdam within 15 minutes. A bakery and supermarket you’ll find in a 2-minute walk.
Because we have built the unusual shape of the little house, you will find two more beds (180×60 cm) for adventurous children under the stairs.

Description:
Located in an emerging, colorful neighborhood of the city, Corendon Amsterdam New-West, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel, is the hotspot of the local social scene. Here, the cultural richness and diversity of the area are celebrated in a stylish way, making everyone feel welcome.

Our hotel offers private parking and is conveniently located close to the city center. It’s just a stone’s throw away from tram line 2, which passes by landmarks such as Vondelpark, the Concertgebouw, Museumplein, Dam Square, and Central Station. Additionally, the metro lines provide connections to the RAI Convention Center (7 minutes) and Schiphol Amsterdam Airport (20 minutes).

Name: The Oriana, Orange
Description:
The Oriana Retro Hotel and Resort in Orange NSW is located 3.5 hours drive from Sydney through the Blue Mountains or a quick 1 hour flight. Centrally located within close walking distance to many attractions and only minutes away from the stunning Duntryleague golf course and wineries.
The Oriana is a complete luxury escape featuring sophisticated cocktail bars, plush salons, and the glamorous Peacock Room Restaurant and seasonal outdoor kitchen offering guests the full resort experience.
This 4.5 star property exudes elegance with antique chandeliers and lush velvet lounges.
The Oriana caters to individual and group accommodation bookings ranging from large corporate groups to local events and special occasions. From Standard Single Rooms with an emphasis on quality comfort to exceptional King Poolside Suites, options include spacious living areas, designer furniture, premium bedding, and luxury robes.
The Oriana is your perfect base to explore one of Australia’s favourite food and wine regions.

Name: Hotel Sejour Royal
Description:
Sejour Royal Hotel offers clean, comfortable, and private rooms across 3 floors, each with an attached bathroom and modern amenities. Ideal for solo travelers, families, groups, bulk bookings for official trips, or personal stays, our hotel ensures a seamless experience with a focus on privacy, comfort, and hygiene.

Guests enjoy free Wi-Fi, hot water, daily housekeeping, and attentive service. Located in the convenient area of Chennai Kolathur, Sejour Royal Hotel provides a peaceful and hassle-free stay with everything you need for a relaxing experience.

Ideal for corporate groups, family reunions, large-scale bookings, or personal getaways, we offer flexible accommodations to meet your needs. Book with us for a smooth, comfortable, and professional stay.

Name: Hotel Demänová ****
Description:
Hotel Demänová **** „Hotel pre každého“

Hotel Demänová je nový hotel, ktorý svoje brány otvoril v zimnej sezóne 2021. Poskytuje 23 útulne zariadených izieb naozaj pre každého. S radosťou Vás ubytujeme aj s Vašimi domácimi miláčikmi, nakoľko je hotel Pet friendly. Na výber máte zo šiestich typov izieb od ekonomických Štandard izieb až po prezidentskú Suitu. Nezabudli sme ani na rodiny, kde je ideálnym výberom Family Apartmán alebo možnosť prepojenia dvoch izieb do jednej.

S radosťou môžete využiť aj naše trojposchodové wellness. Sú pre Vás pripravené sauny, perličkový kúpeľ, či čistotou voňajúce oddychové miesta. Pre hostí je tu ďalej mnoho relaxačných služieb, napríklad vybrané masérske procedúry, o ktoré sa postarajú naši maséri.

Počas celého dňa si u nás môžete dopriať jedinečný gastronomický zážitok v reštaurácii. Ak máte chuť si len tak posedieť pri kvalitnej káve alebo si vychutnať cigaru, je tu pre Vás lounge & cigar bar. Pre širokú verejnosť sme si pripravili v rámci pracovného týždňa bussines obedové menu, ktoré si celoročne cez pracovný týždeň môžete vychutnať v našej reštaurácii alebo terase. 

V súčasnosti hotel disponuje aj depandancom v podobe siedmich apartmánov a jedného penthousu, ktoré sú vzdialené od hotela necelých 300m.  

V areáli hotela možete nájsť už aj novotvorenú svadobno-konferenčnú sálu HUMNO DEMÄNOVÁ s kapacitou 150 osôb pre svadby a 220 na konferencie. Humno je spustené v prevádzke od Júna 2024.

Name: Resort Tre Fontane **** Luxury
Description:
Resort Tre Fontane****Luxury is nestled within a historic park, in a corner of paradise surrounded by the lush greenery of our gardens and the azure waters of the magnificent Gulf of Naples. 
Our enchanting property, located in Portici away from the hustle and bustle of the city, is just a stone's throw away from numerous points of interest, including the significant historical sites of Pompeii and Herculaneum, the renowned center of Naples, the picturesque Mergellina waterfront, and the stunning Sorrento coastline. 
Choosing Resort Tre Fontane means treating yourself to a 
getaway marked by tranquility, exclusivity, and convenience! 
The contemporary design of our rooms and the genuine hospitality of our team, combined with the charm and 
flavors of Naples, will make your vacation unforgettable.

Name: AMMOA Luxury Hotel & Spa Resort
Description:
Welcome to AMMOA Luxury Hotel & Spa Resort, the utopian ode to luxury vacations occurring in a divine getaway, perfectly developed for business and leisure wanderers. The beachfront property features an enthralling multiplicity of amenities to make your stay a memorable one. Harmonically settled like an oasis for every adventurous guest, this unparalleled heaven on Agios Ioannis sandy beach is the quintessence of upscale and refined hospitality.
 
In an enviable location of poetic landscapes, AMMOA Luxury Hotel & Spa Resort incarnates your desire for the most body-recharging and soul-nourishing stay, on the strength of 179 phenomenal guestrooms and bungalows with a private pool. Extolling its reputation as a miscellaneous paradise, this unprecedented resort coalesces the finest restaurants and idyllic bars, an energizing Fitness & Spa Center orchestrated by talented wellness experts, and spacious premises destined to turn the personal or business events into a splendid existence.

Name: Ampelia Hotel Kassandra
Description:
LOCATION
This apartment hotel is situated about 800 m from the beach, in a quiet location some distance from the city centre – ideal for those who appreciate tranquility or would like to stroll through Hanioti. Guests can reach bus routes within about 550 m.

FACILITIES
The apartment hotel was modernised in 2019. The hotel has 25 apartments. Amenities include a baggage storage service and a safe. Wireless internet access in public areas allows guests to stay connected. A garden provides extra space for rest and relaxation in the open air. Guests arriving by car can park their vehicles in the car park for a fee (subject to availability). Other services include a car hire service, medical assistance and a transfer service. Active guests can make use of the bicycle hire service (for a fee) to explore the surrounding area. A photocopier is available for guests' business needs.

ROOMS
Rooms feature a living area and a bathroom, and air conditioning ensures just the right temperature. Guests can enjoy the garden view from a balcony or terrace. Separate bedrooms are available. Extra beds are available upon request for a fee. Guests may securely store their valuables in a safe. The kitchenette comes with a mini fridge and a stovetop. Other features include a telephone, a flatscreen television and WiFi (no extra charge). Slippers are included. Bathrooms are equipped with a shower and a hairdryer. For extra comfort in the bathrooms, guests are offered cosmetic products. 1 family room is available for parents with children.

MEALS
There is a bar on the premises. Bed and breakfast is offered as a catering option. A continental breakfast buffet guarantees a great start to the day. Special meals, including vegetarian dishes, are also available. The apartment hotel also offers snacks. For a fee, there are also non-alcoholic beverages and alcoholic beverages.

PAYMENT
The hotel accepts the following credit cards: VISA and MasterCard.

Name: Hotel Magic Mountain, Spa & Conference Center
Description:
Located at the base of the majestic Arenal Volcano in La Fortuna, Costa Rica, Hotel Magic Mountain combines modern comfort with authentic local charm.

Proud recipient of the Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice Award in 2023 and 2025, we are recognized among the top hotels worldwide thanks to our guests’ trust and satisfaction.

Our property features 108 rooms, including suites with exceptional volcano views, along with a restaurant, swim-up pool bar, spa, jacuzzis, a fully equipped conference center, and more—all just five minutes from downtown La Fortuna.

At Hotel Magic Mountain, every stay is designed to be memorable, whether for adventure, relaxation, or celebration.

Name: Cabanas da Viscondessa
Description: Cabanas da Viscondessa offer a unique experience in the Azores at Sao Jorge island. Built on a beautiful estate known as the Quinta da Bacelada that allows you to merge with nature on the sun deck of your cabin without having to leave behind the coziness of modern living.

Name: Chalets at Blackheath
Description:
Tucked away among one million hectares of national parkland, Chalets at Blackheath is a secret spot of solace in Australia’s Blue Mountains. Arranged across freestanding chalets and spread over expansive retreat grounds, this is alpine bliss at its peak. Wake up to the sound of nature as the forest comes to life each morning, use your days to explore, and stargaze in tranquil comfort on your private deck as the evening draws in.

Modern and well-proportioned, the chalets are a celebration of luxury with an eco-sensitive edge. Think floor to ceiling windows framing breath-taking bush views, oversized bathrooms and twin rainfall showers that cascade UV-filtered mountain water. Design touches from sustainable Australian brands offset the organic interior palette, culminating in a space that’s both opulent and environmentally thoughtful. Light, bright and spacious, it’s the perfect setting for a cosy couples retreat – and an ambient space to opt for an in-room massage.

With UNESCO listed beauty on your doorstep, and bustling Sydney just a drive away, quintessential Australia is yours to enjoy. Hike the bush trails, explore the spectacular Jenolan caves or abseil a waterfall; visit boutique vineyards and take a culinary tour of the exceptional local restaurants. While away the evenings by the firepit, toasting marshmallows and sizzling a barbecue supper.

Description: Hotel De La Poste Le Chable is one of the best hotels in Le Chable. The location is in the heart of the Le Chable village and has several options of rooms and suites with beautiful views over the valley and mountains village to enhance your visiting experience. Name: Kirkebyfjellet AS
Description:
Kirkebyfjellet er et hyggelig samlingssted for alle anledninger! Det ligger vakkert til i Fagerlia i Meråker, med overnatting- selskaps og konferansefasiliteter i ett. Hos oss byr vi på personlig og ekte atmosfære. 
Kombiner god mat og drikke i fjellbistroen med frisk luft og friluftsliv. Sommer som vinter, høst eller vår. Alle årstidene er vakre, enten du velger deg fjell og skog på egen hånd, en aktivitetspakke sammen med våre samarbeidspartnere, eller avslappet nyter utsikten fra hytta.

Uansett anledning så er vakker utsikt, raus og god servering - noe som byr på hyggelige møter og opplevelser!

Over the years we have become a classic in the city: people know us and our guests continue to choose us, offering them year after year the best comfort and quality within the framework of a classic and renewed decoration. Name: Funaberia
Description:
Spędź niezapomniany weekend ze znajomymi, rodziną, kolegami z pracy w POSIADŁOŚCI NA MAZURACH.
Połącz wypoczynek  w luksusowej WILLI Z SPA z pracą zdalną
Zorganizuj wyjątkowe spotkanie biznesowe lub rodzinne w MAZURSKIM LESIE
Zaproś znajomych do NIEBANALNEGO MIEJSCA na imprezę urodzinową lub okolicznościową 

Obiekt jest miejscem, gdzie można aktywnie spędzić czas z dala od sąsiadów. Do dyspozycji gości  jest 25 ha pięknego urozmaiconego terenu z wielofunkcyjnym boiskiem (tenis, siatkówka, koszykówka), 2,5 kilometrowy tor do jazdy quadami (dostępne na miejscu), zarybiony staw, rowery, a w 400 m2 willi : tenis stołowy, bilard, piłkarzyki, dart a także domowe SPA z sauną i jacuzzi. Dostępne są też stoły i sprzęt do organizacji małej konferencji lub szkolenia.
Posiadłość jest oddalona od innych zabudowań. Wieś Skop leży pomiędzy miastami Ryn i Giżycko na szlaku Wielkich Jezior Mazurskich w odległości kilku kilometrów od pięknych jezior, nieopodal posiadłości znajdują się ślady starożytnego grodziska Galindów, szlaki piesze i rowerowe, stadnina koni.
Funaberia oferuje gościom 4 przestronne  sypialnie:
•	Pokój 1 z łóżkiem małżeńskim, rozkładaną sofą i dostawką,
•	Pokój 2 z  dwoma łóżkami jednoosobowymi,
•	Pokój 3 z podwójnym łóżkiem i rozkładaną sofą
•	Pokój 4 z dwoma łóżkami jednoosobowymi
Każda sypialnia posiada własną łazienkę w standardowej zabudowie prysznicem.
W Funaberii może być zakwaterowanych maksymalnie 14 osób.

Name: BON Hotel Five Seasons Palm Resort Ghana
Description: Discover BON Hotel Five Seasons Palm Resort in Prampram, Ghana, a beachfront hotel near Accra offering luxury accommodation, conference facilities, and authentic Ghanaian hospitality.

Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Chattanooga Downtown
Description:
The Doubletree by Hilton Hotel Chattanooga Downtown is a fantastic place to stay! Its prime location in downtown Chattanooga, surrounded by shops, restaurants, and attractions along the Tennessee River, offers guests a convenient and vibrant experience. The proximity to the Chattanooga Convention Center and the airport makes it an ideal choice for both business and leisure travelers.

The hotel's amenities, including complimentary internet access, dining options at the Grove Restaurant & Lounge, an outdoor heated pool, and a fitness center, provide guests with everything they need for a comfortable and enjoyable stay. Additionally, the extensive meeting space and event facilities make it a great option for conferences, functions, and weddings. 

With a dedicated and seasoned events team and state-of-the-art A/V equipment, hosting an event at the Doubletree by Hilton Hotel Chattanooga Downtown seems seamless and professional.

Enjoy our fitness center or a massage at our spa.

Name: Aangan Resort Ranthambore
Description: Aangan Resort Ranthambore sits in the lap of nature away from the hustle and bustle of the city. The structural finesse, picturesque surroundings, and mesmerizing beauty will offer you peace and serenity. The staff of the hotel is highly amicable and takes care of all your request. Aangan Resort Ranthambore makes a perfect place for little rendezvous, family get together, birthdays and parties. It is fit for every flawless evening that one wants to cater. Aangan Resort Ranthambore will feel like a home away from home.

Name: AVANTÉ Hotel, Petaling Jaya
Description:
AVANTÉ Hotel, nestled in the heart of Petaling Jaya, is strategically connected via a 5-10 minutes’ walk along the elevated covered walkway to Bandar Utama MRT Station and one of the World’s largest shopping malls, 1 Utama. The annex of convenience to explore the vibrant city.

Whether on a business trip or city break, comfort is our priority in each of our 610 guest rooms and suites, designed to offer a contemporary and homely experience. Guests can pick from Superior, Deluxe and Suite rooms (equipped with kitchenette). 

On the facilities deck, guests can enjoy the saltwater infinity pool, connected jacuzzi and wading pool, CHXpress Fitness 24/7, Beauty & Wellness Centre and the Kiddies Club. With an array of tantalising dining options: Chek’s Coffee House (all-day dining), Pool Bar and SkyDeck rooftop dining. 

The hotel also houses over 2,000 square meters of meeting and conference facilities across Level UC, G and 1, with a pillarless Grand Ballroom and 11 meeting and conference facilities of various sizes. The best of both business and leisure, under one roof.

Name: Vibäck10 AB
Description: Den 1/5 2024 väcker vi liv i pensionat Vibäck10 igen!Hos oss kommer ni att trivas, oavsett om ni väljer att bo i någon av våra fina stugor med självhushåll eller om ni parkerar husbilen på en av våra ställplatser eller förtöjer båten över natten vid en av våra bryggor. Havet, skogen och skärgården är våra närmsta grannar. Slå dig ner på Terassen, Vibäcks egna kafé med fantastiska glasskreationer, ta en promenad i skogen, bada på vår sandstrand, ta en tur till Kolmårdens djurpark eller naturreservat Stendörren. Eller så låter ni lugnet på Vibäck smitta av sig, luta er tillbaka i en solstol och njut. Forma er vistelse precis så som ni vill ha den. Välkomna!

Name: Citrus Hikkaduwa
Description: Discover the eclectic paradise of Hikkaduwa, and explore the surrounding beaches amd countryside and the vibrant nightlife as you bask in idyllic bliss amidst the sun kissed beaches of southern Sri Lanka. Providing you with the perfect accommodation for your beach vacation, there is no better place to experience this enchanting city than Citrus Hikkaduwa. Famed for its shallow fringing reef, Hikkaduwa is perfect for water sports such as snorkeling, scuba diving, surfing and glass bottom boat rides. Discover your “place of joy” at Citrus Hikkaduwa.

Name: Samawa Living
Description: Samawa is short for “samawati,” which refers to the vast blue of the skies and turquoise waters of Africa’s tropical paradise, Zanzibar. Located inland, southeast of the island, Samawa is a 30-room palm-fringed boutique eco-resort, as vibrant as its surroundings. With a focus on sustainability and integrating into local culture, our guest experiences will be centered around wellbeing. The resort’s convenient location is the perfect base to explore the island’s stunning beaches, watersports, colorful markets and the historic Stone Town.

Name: HomeDunes
Description:
Welcome to HomeDunes, where we offer exceptional accommodation and services to both corporate clients and holidaymakers. Our goal is to provide our guests with a comfortable and convenient stay, no matter the reason for their visit.

For corporate clients, we understand that work trips can be stressful, which is why we offer fully furnished apartments with all the amenities you need to work and relax in comfort. Our apartments feature high-speed internet access, comfortable workspaces, and fully equipped kitchens, making it easy to maintain your daily routine while away from home. We also offer additional services such as printing, scanning, and courier services to ensure that you can stay productive and organized during your stay.

For holiday makers, we provide a range of properties located in some of the most beautiful destinations across the country. Our properties are equipped with everything you need to enjoy your stay, including fully equipped kitchens, laundry facilities, and comfortable living spaces. Whether you are looking for a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or an adventure trip, our properties are the perfect choice.

In addition to our exceptional accommodation, we provide a range of services to make your stay as comfortable and enjoyable as possible. Our team of friendly staff is available 24/7 to assist with any needs or requests you may have, from arranging airport transfers to booking local tours and activities. We also provide regular cleaning and maintenance services to ensure that your stay is as comfortable and hassle-free as possible.

At our serviced accommodation provider, we are committed to providing our guests with a memorable and enjoyable stay. Whether you are traveling for business or leisure, we have the perfect accommodation and services to meet your needs.

Name: Park Inn By Radisson Bilaspur
Description: A perfect melange of comfort and luxury, Park Inn by Radisson Bilaspur provides a modern retreat for business travelers and families alike.

Name: Cristal Resort Zanzibar
Description:
Cristal Resort Zanzibar – Eco-Luxury in Paradise 

Nestled on the stunning white-sand beaches of Paje, Cristal Resort Zanzibar offers a unique experience where luxury meets sustainability. Our eco-friendly resort blends exclusive comfort with a deep respect for nature, providing guests with a tropical sanctuary in perfect harmony with the environment.

 Unparalleled Experience: Relax in our beachfront villas and bungalows, swim in crystal-clear waters, and witness breathtaking Zanzibari sunsets.

 Eco-Conscious Commitment: We prioritize sustainability with responsible practices, from renewable energy to marine conservation initiatives.

 Authentic Gastronomy: Enjoy fresh, organic dishes crafted with locally sourced ingredients, blending Swahili flavors with international cuisine.

 Unforgettable Adventures: Explore the island’s beauty with customized experiences, including kitesurfing, diving, jungle excursions, and cultural tours.

At Cristal Resort Zanzibar, we offer more than just a stay—we invite you to experience paradise in its most authentic, relaxed, and sustainable form.

 Discover natural luxury. Discover Cristal Resort.

 Paje Beach, Zanzibar |  www.cristalresortzanzibar.com |  Contact us for bookings and collaborations

Name: Convento Francescano Experience Hotel
Description:
Il Convento Francescano è un Experience Hotel nel cuore del Parco Nazionale del Cilento, sito UNESCO noto per la sua bellezza naturale e il suo patrimonio culturale. Fondato nel XIV secolo, questo convento offre un'esperienza unica di lusso rurale, dove la tradizione incontra l'eleganza. Situato in una delle regioni più affascinanti d'Italia, il Convento Francescano è un rifugio di pace e autenticità, ideale per chi cerca una vacanza immersiva, lontano dal turismo di massa.

Il progetto di Alberto e Maria Chiara, coppia di 27 anni, nasce come una scelta di vita: dopo anni nella frenesia di Milano, lasciare la città per investire nel Cilento, terra d’origine del padre di Alberto. 

Ogni aspetto del Convento è stato pensato per onorare il territorio, combinando design esclusivo e comfort in un contesto storico. Le camere, la piscina in pietra e il ristorante nel chiostro rendono questo luogo perfetto per una clientela sofisticata e internazionale, interessata a esperienze di viaggio che celebrano l'autenticità, il benessere e la cultura locale. Offriamo esperienze personalizzate, sia per soggiorni che per eventi esclusivi, come matrimoni, ritiri aziendali e congressi.

La nostra missione è creare una connessione profonda con i nostri ospiti, mostrando loro le meraviglie del Cilento, dalle spiagge di Capo Palinuro e della Masseta fino ai borghi storici e ai sentieri naturalistici. Con un forte impegno per la sostenibilità e la valorizzazione dei prodotti locali, ci proponiamo come punto di riferimento per chi cerca un'esperienza di viaggio unica nel Cilento.

Seguici per scoprire di più su ciò che rende speciale il Convento Francescano e il nostro impegno per un'ospitalità di alta qualità.

L'apertura è prevista per Primavera 2025.

Name: FRU LARSEN HOTEL OG RESTAURANT
Description:
Fru Larsen Hotel og Restaurant er en lille perle i et naturskønt område af Østjylland i den lille landsby Laurbjerg mellem Aarhus og Randers. Siden oktober 2021 har vi, Karina Kannegaard og Christian Neve, forpagtet stedet. Vi kommer med stor erfaring fra restaurationsbranchen, hvor vi begge har været på nogle af landets bedste restauranter. Vi er begge så heldige, at vi er blevet kåret til Danmarks bedste tjener, hvilket vi sætter en stor ære i.

Hotel:
På Fru Larsen råder vi over 16 charmerende hotelværelser fordelt i to bygninger.
Vi har 8 værelser beliggende i den oprindelige fløj som er byens gamle missionshus tilbage fra 1985. Værelserne er yderst charmerende & hyggelige og alle indrettet med himmelseng, åben pejs, sprosser foran vinduerne og autentiske møbler, de 4 værelser på 1. sal er med badekar på badeværelset.

Vi har ligeledes 8  værelser i vores ”nye” fløj som er fra 2008. Disse værelser er designet med et større værelse samt badeværelse og stilen her er mere minimalistisk, lækker og stilren. De 3 værelser på 1. sal er suiter og indrettet med henholdsvis en sfslappende sofagruppe eller udendørs terrasse med udsigt over vores hyggelige gårdhave.

I denne fløj er der i værelses loungen en sofagruppe som er perfekt til at slænge sig i enten med en avis, et brætspil eller måske en kop kaffe.

Restaurant:
Vi glæder os til at byde jer på en uforglemmelig gastronomisk oplevelse. Vi serverer god og ærlig mad med lokale, skånsomt dyrkede råvarer. Vores menu skifter derfor når sæsonen tillader os det og når nye spændende råvarer er i sæson.
Stemningen i den gamle hovedbygning hvor restauranten befinder sig afspejler hygge & nærvær med en service hvor alle sanser vil blive forkælet til det ypperste.

Name: Sofia Homes
Description:
A Sofia Homes é a líder em Campinas na gestão de imóveis próprios e de terceiros voltada para estadias de curta duração. Acreditamos que os imóveis podem gerar mais do que renda passiva; eles podem proporcionar experiências memoráveis e uma rentabilidade superior ao aluguel tradicional. Nossa missão é transformar imóveis em investimentos altamente lucrativos e sem complicações para seus proprietários.

Para alcançar isso, oferecemos uma gestão completa e integrada que cuida de cada detalhe: desde a divulgação em diversas plataformas, processos de limpeza e manutenção, gestão inteligente de precificação, até a logística de entrada e saída dos hóspedes. Nosso atendimento dedicado aos locatários garante uma experiência excepcional durante toda a estadia.

Com a Sofia Homes, proprietários e investidores têm a tranquilidade de saber que seus imóveis estão sendo geridos com excelência e profissionalismo, proporcionando uma rentabilidade de 30% a 50% superior ao aluguel tradicional. Nossos processos otimizados asseguram uma experiência superior para os hóspedes, eliminando qualquer necessidade de envolvimento direto dos proprietários.

Name: DormLink
Description:
DormLink is a university-exclusive travel network created by students, for students. We aim to connect students across the globe through a verified, secure platform that makes travel more affordable, safe, and community-focused. With DormLink, you can find a trusted place to stay or offer a space to fellow students, building lifelong connections along the way.

Our mission is to foster a community of students and alumni who support each other, creating an environment where travel is about more than just getting from one place to another—it's about connecting, sharing experiences, and feeling at home wherever you go. DormLink is designed to ensure that you can explore new places while staying within a network you can trust, supported by safety features tailored to student needs.

We believe in the power of shared experiences and the value of building a supportive community for students worldwide. Whether you're studying abroad, attending a conference, or just exploring a new city, DormLink is here to help you travel confidently and comfortably.

Our premium quality restaurant serves delicious and nutritious south Indian garhwali and north Indian cuisines prepared in the utmost hygienic environment throughout the year. We are a 5* rated hotel in Chamoli.

Name: The Hop Merchant's House
Description:
Welcome to The Hop Merchant’s House, a luxury place to stay in the heart of historic Worcester. Once the merchant’s office and house for the busiest hop market in England.

Within walking distance of the train station and the picturesque River Severn, The Hop Merchant’s House offers you all the comforts of a deluxe hotel, with the convenience of your own kitchen, giving you the choice of eating in or dining out. We operate self check-in coded access for your convenience.

Our superior sized beds will guarantee comfort and relaxation.

In this beautiful period house, we have a lovely roof top garden, 1st class Wi-Fi system, a car park opposite and even bike storage.

With a family room and 4 deluxe double rooms to choose from or even the whole house for larger gatherings, we promise you our personal attention, making your stay in The Hop Merchant’s House a memorable one.

Name: Fortune Park Kufri Shimla
Description: Enveloped in the heart of Kufri valley surrounded by lofty mountains, in a dense trail of coniferous trees and sprawling apple orchards, rests Fortune Park Kufri Shimla. Here, nature turns a kaleidoscope of colors through the seasons. In summers, you wake up to the first blush of sunrise and the snow-clad winter tide turns misty mornings into a story of nostalgia and magic. Paired with warm hospitality, impeccable services, and mesmerizing views of the valley from all corners of its spread, Fortune Park Kufri Shimla is an ideal destination to unplug from the chaos and unwind.

Name: Grupo Omotebako Hospitality
Description:
The Omotebako Hospitality Group is committed to delivering exceptional experiences and creating memorable moments for our clients through the embodiment of Omotenashi, the spirit of Japanese hospitality.

In every interaction, we are deeply inspired by the teachings of our ancestors and their legacy. We approach every aspect of our business with creativity, innovation, and meticulous attention to detail, ensuring the highest level of customer satisfaction.

Name: The Seraya Resort Komodo
Description:
The Seraya is a boutique island resort and adventure operator located on Seraya Kecil Island, just off the coast of Labuan Bajo, Indonesia. Positioned at the gateway of the world-renowned Komodo National Park, The Seraya combines barefoot-luxury accommodation with curated marine and island experiences designed for modern travelers seeking comfort, nature, and adventure.

Through our dedicated fleet—Dalliance Expedition Cruiser and WAHOO Speedboat—we offer a complete range of day trips, sunset cruises, and multi-day liveaboard journeys. Each vessel is crafted for comfort, safety, and effortless exploration, enabling guests to experience the park’s most iconic destinations including Padar Island, Pink Beach, Komodo Island, Manta Point, Taka Makassar, and more.

Our signature vessel, Dalliance, is a 22-meter expedition cruiser built with ironwood and teak, featuring spacious sun decks, semi-private cabins, communal lounges, and snorkelling facilities that make every voyage both scenic and relaxing. WAHOO, a high-powered aluminium speedboat, allows guests to explore the park’s further reaches efficiently—perfect for half-day or full-day adventures.

With professionally managed tours, personalised service, and access to pristine marine environments, The Seraya delivers immersive travel experiences that highlight the beauty, culture, and biodiversity of Komodo National Park.

We are a short stay accommodation providers and corporate renters with best properties in the market, we believe that staying in an accommodation while travelling for work or leisure should feel like home away from home with a wow factor, just send us a message as we have range of accommodations on offer. The space

Dan bent u hier op de goede plek. Ons hotel vindt u op de 1e en 2e verdieping van een pand met een eeuwenoude geschiedenis in het historische centrum van Weesp boven Café Restaurant De Eendracht. Geniet van de rust en luxe in onze sfeervolle en smaakvol ingerichte kamers. Hier kunt u zich heerlijk terugtrekken en genieten van een ongestoord verblijf. • Rapidly deploy Boonlive’s ISO9001 smart-hotel platform (400,000+ rooms) with wireless, low-disruption retrofits.

• Faster repositioning: wireless retrofits accelerate time-to-market and brand upgrades.

Platform highlights
Enterprise keyless access · Intelligent lighting & scene control · Touch-panel & voice control · Automated A/C, air purification, curtains & TV · Guest app & multimedia integration · Smart sleep systems · Multilingual service + operational telemetry

Ready to future-proof hospitality assets and capture measurable returns?
Explore opportunities and our trade platform: www.trade.capinvestlux.com | www.capinvestlux.com

Name: Voador Brasil
Description:
O Voador Brasil é um refúgio único para eventos e vivências imersivas no coração da Natureza, a apenas 1h15 de São Paulo, em Atibaia rodeado pela Mata Atlântica.
 
Somos especialistas em desenhar experiências transformadoras, ideais para empresas que buscam sair do óbvio e criar conexões verdadeiras entre suas equipes. Nosso propósito é simples: combinar criatividade, acolhimento e Natureza para proporcionar jornadas que inspiram, renovam e fortalecem vínculos.

Somos o único acampamento sem perrengue do Brasil, com estrutura completa de hotelaria dentro de um parque natural – o Monumento Natural Estadual da Pedra Grande. Uma unidade de conservação na Mata Atlântica, com trilhas, paisagens incríveis e áreas exclusivas para atividades ao ar livre.

Não são pacotes prontos, nem agendas engessadas. Recebemos grupos corporativos em jornadas sob medida – pode ser team building, encontro de lideranças, planejamento estratégico ou simplesmente uma pausa consciente no meio da correria.

Name: Innreach
Description:

El huésped gestiona todo sin descargar apps: check-in express y pagos, llave digital opcional, pedidos de comida/amenities, mantenimiento, actividades y preferencias de limpieza.

Nuestro Concierge IA responde 24/7 con tus políticas y menús; el Inbox omnicanal convierte conversaciones en acciones (tickets, órdenes, cobros) con SLA y trazabilidad; y los módulos de Housekeeping inteligente, Mantenimiento predictivo y Upsell Engine reducen costos operativos y aumentan ingresos.

Nos integramos con PMS/POS, pasarelas de pago y cerraduras líderes. Seguridad y privacidad por diseño (tokenización, auditoría, GDPR).

Resultados típicos: −20–40% llamadas al front desk, 35–60% de consultas resueltas por IA y +2–5% RevPAR por upsells.

Agenda una demo y ve cómo implementarlo en semanas, no meses.

Name: Kiviks Hotell
Description:
Det som idag är hotell på Moriabacken 22 på Kivik, bestod ursprungligen av en byggnad som kallades Emiliero. Villan uppfördes 1908 åt advokaten och affärsmannen Åke Hjort och hans hustru Emilia Persson från Malmö. Parets adopterade son Olof kom senare att sälja villan till överste Einar Wikland och hans maka Ruth år 1917.

Einar Wikland var under en tid adjutant åt kronprins Gustaf Adolf, sedermera kung Gustaf VI Adolf, och företog med denne flera resor av diplomatisk karaktär. Fru Wikland var lärarinna i franska och av ytterst förfinad karaktär. Det sägs att hon, när maken blev sjuklig, körde traktorn själv iklädd både kappa och hatt, som det anstod en riktig dam. Apropå hattar har vi faktiskt kvar adjutant Wiklands tjusiga höga hatt i tillhörande hattask här på hotellet! Den visar vi gärna upp på begäran.

Sommaren 1934 besökte kronprinsparet Emiliero, som då kallades ”Wiklands villa”, i samband med invigningen av den restaurerade Kungagraven (Bredarör). Anledningen den gången var, att prins Eugen vid tillfället hyrde villan. Det hade han gjort även somrarna 1931 och 1932, lockad av det speciella ljuset vi har här på Österlen – konstnär som han var.

1957 köptes Emiliero av Kristianstads läns Landsting och omvandlades till konvalescenthem. Man byggde ut villan med en flygel som inkluderade rum, matsal och kök. I den ursprungliga villan rev man ut mycket av interiören och tyvärr togs ett antal fina kakelugnar bort. I vår bröllopssvit finns dock en mycket vacker kakelugn bevarad och den gör verkligen rummet alldeles särdeles romantiskt.

1992 lades hemmet ner och villan såldes till en restaurangverksamhet.

Idag drivs och vårdas Kiviks Hotell av familjen Linde från Lund som förvärvade hotellet 2007. Efter en totalrenovering av hela fastigheten slogs dörrarna åter upp för gäster på våren 2008.

O destaque de sua experiência no Hotel Kindermann será, sem dúvida, nossa oferta gastronômica. Além disso, nosso Jantar Colonial serve pratos excepcionais que celebram os sabores locais em um ambiente acolhedor e elegante.

Para eventos memoráveis, desde corporativos a celebrações familiares, oferecemos espaços versáteis e de primeira linha. Nosso compromisso é criar eventos que superem suas expectativas, apoiados por uma equipe atenciosa e experiente.
Pensando em todos os detalhes, o Hotel Kindermann dispõe ainda de facilidades como estacionamento cortesia, espaços acessíveis para PCDs, e é pet-friendly, assegurando que cada membro da sua família, incluindo os de quatro patas, desfrute de uma experiência acolhedora.

No Hotel Kindermann, cada visita é uma oportunidade para criar momentos especiais e memórias duradouras. Nossa equipe, conhecida por seu serviço caloroso e personalizado, está sempre à disposição para garantir que sua estada seja excepcional. Seja para uma viagem de negócios ou lazer, esperamos dar-lhe as boas-vindas e fazer você se sentir em casa, longe de casa.

Name: Sabana Beach Resort (Blue Tops Trading PLC)
Description:
Sabana Beach Resort was opened in 2008 (G.C.) and operates under the trading name of Blue Tops Trading PLC., one of Ethiopia's pioneers in the hospitality industry since the 1980s. 

The resort lies on 6 hectare beachfront plot on Lake Langano, at the heart of Ethiopia's Great Rift Valley. The tranquil resort boast 34 en-suite bungalows and villas, with capacity to accommodate 100+ guests. Facilities include a large restaurant, a beach bar, a wellness center, a conference hall and a roofed boat parking area. 

Sabana beach resort has built its name over the past decade as one of Ethiopia's best kept resorts, providing guests with a unique offering.

Name: Wirgan AlNoor, Tapestry Collection by Hilton
Sky Hotels
Description:
We are an extension of your hospitality team. 

Since 2014 we’ve enjoyed partnering with hotels around the world to develop new and existing properties. We provide our clients with vast research into all aspects of hospitality properties, and then work together to move swiftly from concept to design to opening.

Description:

El Hotel te ofrece 350 habitaciones de lujo, las cuales cuentan con balcón privado con excelentes vistas a jardines, albercas, playa o al Mar de Cortez, todas ellas con equipamiento de primera clase y ofreciéndote las comodidades necesarias para garantizar una estancia memorable.
Location: San José del Cabo, Baja California Sur

ABOUT US Company Our mission is to elevate industry standards through innovation, unparalleled expertise, and a firm commitment to environmentally and socially responsible development.

Description: A new complex of touristic apartments located in Girona, just 5 minutes away from the city center and the high-speed train station.

Name: Domani Hotels Group
Description: Domani Hotels is a boutique hotel chain in full expansion with focus on small-scale hotels in AA locations in tourist cities with unique self check-in concept. Today, the group has 6 hotels in Ghent, Aalst and Antwerp (Belgium).

Name: Basq House
Description: A discrete 32-room hotel hideaway in the heart of Byron’s coastal village. Offering guests an oasis of calm and sophistication, and a place from where you can explore the hinterland, vibrant restaurant scene and renowned beach-culture.

Name: Estate Glory
Description:
Estate Glory is a dynamic real estate and hospitality company with a strong presence in Banja Koviljača and beyond. In addition to operating a renowned four-star hotel, we are expanding our portfolio with luxury residential and hospitality developments.

Our ongoing and upcoming projects include Project Lagator, nearly completed apartment buildings, and Project Šabac, which will bring modern residential spaces to the area. We are also developing a five-star luxury hotel in Banja Koviljača, further elevating the region’s hospitality offerings.

With a focus on quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, Estate Glory is shaping the future of premium living and hospitality experience

Name: San Francisco Marriott Fisherman's Wharf
Description: Discover the Bay Area while staying at San Francisco Marriott Fisherman's Wharf. Our hotel is located near world-famous attractions like the Golden Gate Bridge, AT&T Park, and Pier 39. Spend an afternoon tasting the foods of Fisherman's Wharf or explore the mysteries of Alcatraz Island. The aesthetic and atmosphere of the city continue through our hotel rooms and suites, complete with stylish decor. As you lay on the pillowtop beds, you can stream your favorite shows on our Smart TVs, or get to work with high-speed Wi-Fi and large workstations. Start your day the right way at our on-site eatery, Red Fin Restaurant, or enjoy craft cocktails at Red Fin Lounge. Venture out to Chinatown for a cultural experience or elevate your San Francisco adventure with a ride in the cable cars. Feel the burn in our fitness center with cardio equipment and free weights. Whether in town to see the sights or to meet with clients, San Francisco Marriott Fisherman's Wharf makes sure your stay is a memorable one.

Name: Hard Days Night Hotel
Description:
The Iconic Beatles hotel in Liverpool
A 'Fab Four' star Liverpool hotel. Hard Days Night Hotel is the world’s only Beatles inspired hotel, combining the highest quality facilities in a truly unique environment. Located at the heart of Liverpool's 'Beatles Quarter' offering luxurious accommodation and exclusive event space with a twist. Housed in the magnificent Grade II listed Central Buildings, dating back to 1884, the beautifully restored hotel is steeped in history.

All 110 rooms are individually designed around the contours of the original building and elegantly furnished with specially commissioned Beatles-inspired artwork adorning the walls.

Sitting adjacent to the world famous Cavern Club where the Beatles rose to fame, and an array of the city's famous Beatles landmarks, the hotel not only offers the perfect getaway for visitors, but is much loved by art lovers, music lovers, and food lovers alike. There are places to remember, then there is the Hard Days Night Hotel.

Name: The Loutrel
Description:
At the intersection of Charleston’s past and present, The Loutrel is a luxury
boutique hotel that captures the city’s finest hour. Architecture and design firm
Michael Graves drew from Charleston’s bounty of private gardens to create
an upscale retreat with a deep sense of place. With 50 guest rooms and suites
defined by elegance, The Loutrel features bespoke furnishings enhanced by
natural materials with a vivid palette of greens, blues and gold, capturing a
refined yet welcoming spirit. Distinct local references throughout include the
Lowcountry swing bed to the ethereal mural by artist Linda Fantuzzo. A lush
rooftop terrace for gazing at panoramic views is accessed through an airy lobby
that somehow feels like home, with an adjacent Veranda Lounge for socializing
and grazing on seasonal dishes and botanical craft cocktails.

Additional amenities include a private Clubroom with locally curated treats and
a meeting space and state-of-the-art fitness studio. The Loutrel is the place to
discover Charleston’s best-kept secrets, thanks to carefully selected partnerships
that includes private walking tours, a ‘meet the author’ series and other
immersive experiences.

Name: F-Zeen Boutique Hotel Zanzibar
Description: Combining the principles of good living, or εὖ ζῆν in ancient Greek, and the beauty of African nature, F-Zeen Boutique Hotel Zanzibar offers a tropical heaven tucked away in Uroa village. Located on a 250-meter pristine white-sand beach, our oceanfront premises offer an authentic island getaway with kid-friendly facilities and modern amenities.

Description: Xhosteller is hostel managament company in Bali that offers various solution to the market and industry, enhancing our management system with technology and pricing strategies to achieve high occupancy rates and profitability. Description:

The condo is in the center of the building overlooking the pool when entering the front door in a 60 unit complex with a pool, Secure Vision for endless cable TV channels, strong Internet, and local landline phone for safety.

Name: Zuri Express Jimbaran by ZHM
Description: Zuri Express Jimbaran is designed for those who appreciate comfort, convenience, and good value. Efficiently designed to be modern and minimalist. Featuring a café with an outdoor eating area overlooking a swimming pool, we also provide two function rooms for events or meetings. All guestrooms are equipped with a 32-inch flat-screen LED TV with satellite channels and Zuri Dream by Kingkoil bedding. Guests can enjoy easy access to the city’s must-see destinations: 5 minutes to Garuda Wisnu Kencana (GWK), Jimbaran and Pandawa beaches are 15 minutes from the accommodation, Jimbaran Corner is 700 m from the property, Ngurah Rai International Airport is 6 km away, and the popular Kuta beach is only 15 minutes drive away

Description: Somos uma agência apaixonada por personalização, dedicada a criar para você a experiência definitiva. Nossa missão é garantir que cada viagem seja única e inesquecível, deixando memórias que durarão para sempre. Seja bem-vindo à excelência em turismo!

Our commitment to personalized service ensures that every guest is treated like royalty, making your stay truly exceptional. Indulge in delectable cuisine at our on-site restaurant, unwind with a cocktail at the rooftop bar, or rejuvenate in our spa and fitness center. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, Crown Palace Resident is your perfect choice, promising a delightful stay in the vibrant city of Dhaka

Name: Marco Zavatta - Consulenza per Booking.com
Description:
Sono un ex dipendente di Booking.com e mi occupo di consulenza alberghiera e formazione.
Gestisco direttamente alcune strutture ricettive (1 Resort in Madagascar, 2 Hotel sulla Riviera Romagnola, 1 B&B a Santarcangelo di Romagna e Case Vacanza al mare ed in montagna) e quindi capisco le esigenze dell'albergatore.

La mia esperienza accademica (1 laurea triennale, 2 lauree magistrali, 2 master internazionali) e quella lavorativa (esperienze alle Nazioni Unite, in Eden Viaggi, in Booking.com, in società di consulenza alberghiera e come imprenditore) mi permettono di avere una visione chiara e lungimirante. 

Nel 2024 ho formato direttamente più di 50 hotel, oltre ad aver tenuto lezioni e seminari in scuole professionali, università e sedi di catene alberghiere.

Mi occupo sia dell'ottimizzazione di Booking (e delle altre OTA), sia dell'iscrizione iniziale.
Offro consulenza e formazione per l'acquisto (e l'eventuale cambio) dei principali software alberghieri: PMS, Channel Manager, Booking Engine e preventivatori (CRM).

Si offre una consulenza completa di revenue management a massimo 5 strutture ogni anno (il 2025 è già al completo).

Name: Crib Surfer
Description: We are dedicated to providing luxurious yet budget-friendly apartments to our guests for their next stay. Our goal is to provide a True Home Away From Home experience.

Description:
Located right at the heart of Hanoi, Bao Son International Hotel is proud to be as an international hotel of prestige and comfort.

With 100 comfortable rooms & suites, 3 function rooms, 2 restaurants, other entertainments: casino, gymnasium, indoor seasonal swimming pool,... Bao Son is an ideal place for domestic and foreign traveler whenever having a business trip or traveling with friends to Hanoi.

Bao Son not only brings customers the exquisite characteristics of Asian and Western cuisine, but also has a perfect and various types of entertainment provided. Let's stay in Bao Son International Hotel and make your trip the most enjoyable and pleasant experience.

Name: Kalimera Kriti Hotel & Village Resort
Description:
Kalimera Kriti Hotel & Village Resort is a premier luxury resort nestled on the stunning island of Crete, offering an unforgettable blend of relaxation, recreation, and natural beauty. Spread across 240,000m² of lush Mediterranean gardens and pristine sandy beaches, we create the perfect backdrop for both families and adventure seekers.

Our world-class tennis facilities, including 20 clay courts, 6 artificial grass courts, and 2 padel courts, cater to players of all levels, making us a top choice for tennis enthusiasts. After a day of sports, unwind with breathtaking sunsets, fine dining, and unparalleled hospitality.

At Kalimera Kriti, we provide not just a place to stay, but a destination that feels like home in paradise.

Name: St. Giles Mid Valley Kuala Lumpur
Description: St. Giles Gardens Kuala Lumpur is a premier 5-star hotel that embodies the philosophy of "Where Business Meets Pleasure." Located in the heart of Mid Valley City, our hotel offers seamless connectivity to The Gardens Mall and Mid Valley Megamall, providing guests with unparalleled access to corporate offices, dining, and entertainment. We are a leading destination for business travel, corporate events, and leisure stays.

Name: Hotel Bnbusa
Description:
Hotel Bnbusa is a renowned hotel chain that offers guests excellent accommodations and unparalleled services. The hotel chain has been operating for several years and has established a reputation for providing exceptional hospitality and top-notch amenities to its guests.

One of the key features of Hotel Bnbusa is its commitment to providing a comfortable and enjoyable stay to its guests. The hotels offer spacious and well-appointed rooms that are equipped with modern amenities like flat-screen TVs, air conditioning, complimentary Wi-Fi, and more.

In addition to the comfortable rooms, Hotel Bnbusa provides a range of services and facilities to make your stay as enjoyable as possible. For example, the hotel offers 24-hour front desk service, housekeeping, and laundry facilities to ensure guests have everything they need during their stay.

For those looking for dining options, Hotel Bnbusa has an on-site restaurant that serves a variety of delicious cuisines. The hotel also offers a complimentary breakfast buffet each morning, ensuring that guests start their day off right

Name: Hofgut LEO Cooperative eG
Description: Das Hofgut LEO Cooperative eG ist der Kompetenzort für regenerative Lebens- und Arbeitsmodelle. Die im Jahr 2021 gegründete Genossenschaft entwickelt in Gresgen, einem Ortsteil von Zell im Wiesental, ein Modellprojekt für regionale Dorfentwicklung. Das Hofgut für Wohlfühl-Ferien, Auszeit & Seminare, Kultur & Bildung mitten im schönen Naturpark Südschwarzwald.

Name: West Side Hotel
Description: West Side Hotel provides Superior, Comfort and Budget rooms for both businesses and individual customers. We have been in the accommodation business since 1997. Whatever is your accommodation need - whether it's one night in a hotel or serviced apartment for a 6-month project at the shipyard - let our local knowledge and experience help you with that.

Name: Retreat Lodge Schürmatt
Description:
Retreat Lodge Schürmatt -Live like Swiss
The "Retreat Lodge Schürmatt" is located on the elevated southern hillside of the Jura, 7 km north-east of Solothurn. The charming house with garden is ideal for families and groups looking for a quiet and inspiring environment, nature, sun and views of the Alps. From here you can hike or bike in the Jura, shop or dine in Switzerland's most beautiful baroque town, explore places of interest, climb in the Balmberg rope park or work in the home office, writing and making creative plans.

Name: V Sarovar Portico MI Road
Description:
V Sarovar Portico on MI Road in Jaipur is an embodiment of Rajasthan's cultural heritage intertwined with modern-day comfort. Our 106 thoughtfully curated rooms are more than just spaces to rest; they are sanctuaries that transport guests into the majestic realm of Rajasthani culture. Adorned with intricate designs and equipped with contemporary amenities, each room narrates a story, offering a serene retreat in the heart of the city.

Culinary indulgence takes centre stage at our restaurant, where flavours from India and around the world converge, creating an exquisite dining experience. The bar is a haven of relaxation, offering an array of beverages amidst an ambience that encourages unwinding and socialising.

For business or pleasure, our venues cater to every need. The boardroom is designed for seamless meetings, boasting cutting-edge technology and professional services. Meanwhile, the expansive banquet hall adds grandeur to weddings, social gatherings and corporate events, ensuring each occasion is unforgettable.

Name: Gardan Hotel
Description: Gardan Hotel olarak, konaklama sektöründeki uzun yıllara dayanan deneyimimizle öne çıkıyoruz. Tecrübelerimiz ve sadık müşterilerimizin desteği sayesinde, kalitemizi ve konforumuzu sürekli geliştirmeye devam ettik. Uygun fiyatlarla lüks konaklama deneyimini sektöre kazandırdık.

Description: Amber Rooms is a quirky colourful hotel situated in the heart of Porvorim City. Central to any place you might want to go in Goa. The hotel has 22 budget-friendly rooms and 2 suites with best-in-class amenities.

Name: Hotel Omega Amsterdam
Description:
Welkom bij Hotel Omega! 

Hotel Omega is een klein 3-sterren hotel in een rustige wijk in Amsterdam-Zuid. Het hotel is de ideale uitvalsbasis om de highlights van Amsterdam te bezoeken. Hotel Omega is direct in de buurt van het trendy Cornelis Schuytkwartier, met veel winkels restaurants en cafés. Ook de beroemde dagelijkse Albert Cuyp markt is op korte afstand van het hotel te vinden, evenals het Vondelpark, het grootste park van Amsterdam. 

Graag tot ziens bij Hotel Omega!

Name: Western Camp Resort
Description:
Western Camp Resort to kompleks wypoczynkowy położony w malowniczym Zatorze, na północ od słynnych Wadowic. Nasz obiekt, stylizowany na klasyczną westernową wioskę, przeniesie Cię w klimat amerykańskiego Dzikiego Zachodu, niczym z filmu! Kompleks Western Camp Resort oferuje blisko 600 miejsc noclegowych w komfortowych, klimatyzowanych domkach, oryginalnych indiańskich tipi oraz kowbojskich wozach. Stawiamy na wypoczynek i świetną zabawę!

Niezaprzeczalną zaletą naszego obiektu jest położenie obok największego w Polsce Parku Rozrywki Energylandia. Western Camp Resort znajduje się tylko 3 minuty samochodem lub 17 minut pieszo od Energylandii!

Western Camp Resort oferuje 3 różne możliwości noclegu w Zatorze, których nie znajdziesz nigdzie indziej! Jak na prawdziwą indiańską wioskę przystało, nasi goście mogą spędzić noc w domku szeryfa, kowbojskim wozie lub indiańskim tipi! Jesteśmy przygotowani na wizyty pojedynczych gości oraz małych i większych grup.

Name: The Westin St. Louis
Description: The Westin St. Louis features 263 oversized modern loft-style rooms and suites within the heart of the downtown St. Louis business district. Enjoy on-site amenities including Clark Street Taphouse and Grill, The WestinWORKOUT Fitness Studio and versatile hotel event spaces. Whether traveling for business or leisure, our hotel positioned in historic Cupples Station is located within walking distance to top attractions in St. Louis. Cheer on The St. Louis Cardinals at Busch Stadium or explore the St. Louis Riverfront along the Gateway Arch Trail. Our St. Louis business hotel is also conveniently located near the Federal Courthouse, Enterprise Center, America’s Center (Convention Center), Edward Jones Dome and Washington Avenue. During your visit, explore the city via the MetroLink light rail system with a stop just outside our hotel doors. There is so much to see and do just steps away from The Westin St. Louis. We look forward to hosting you.

Name: Viseu Ryokan - Hospedaria Japonesa & SPA
Description:
Reconhecidos como um dos tipos de alojamento mais antigos do mundo, os ryokan são desde sempre associados à hospitalidade dos seus proprietários.
Nestas tradicionais hospedarias, onde noutros tempos se alojaram samurais, comerciantes e nobres, todos os esforços são feitos para que os seus hóspedes se sintam o mais bem-vindos possível.
Imagem de marca da milenar e tão intensa cultura japonesa, o ryokan é a materialização do omotenashi (おもてなし): um sentimento profundamente enraizado no povo japonês, que vai muito além da hospitalidade e que, para os japoneses, se refere ao ato de servir bem que vem do coração!
Naquele que será o primeiro Ryokan em Portugal e um dos primeiros do mundo fora do Japão, procuramos um perfeito equilíbrio entre a cultura e costumes nipónicos e a nossa própria história.

Name: Snoozz Hotels Bolsward
Description: Snoozz Hotels is a Smart Hotel (read: self-service hotel). The hotel is located in a monumental building, right in the heart of Bolsward. Service and technology are our priorities. We have no reception, so there is no struggle with cards or keys. By sending a link, the entrance and hotel room door can be opened by phone. This means that our guests can check in 24/7. Luxury and comfort sum up our hotel rooms. Most rooms also have a beautiful view of the city centre. There are romantic rooms with French balconies, rooms with pantries for longer stays, tower rooms with cosy sofas; in other words, enough space and luxury for a wonderful stay.

Description:
At Harbor Hotel & Casino Curaçao we are devoted to providing highly personalized service and gracious hospitality in an informally elegant atmosphere. 

Showing the beauty of our island in a unique way, we create 
personal experiences that will be treasured for a lifetime. While utterly individual, we provide a haven of elegance and serenity, in the heart of a city that celebrates the joy of colors.

Name: Hotel Hogo Inđija

Name: Shangri-La Springs
Description:
Built in 1926, Shangri-La Springs is a historic hotel located on more than 8 acres in the heart of beautiful Bonita Springs, Florida. Our stately property offers a boutique hotel experience and a variety of unique services including an organic restaurant, full-service organic spa, organic garden and meeting & event spaces.

Our historic property has long been known for its invigorating and restorative powers. The Spa at Shangri-La Springs offers organic serenity whether you’re looking for rejuvenation or relaxation, you’ll feel like you’ve turned back the clock in more ways than one. Enjoy a full complement of organic spa treatments by our highly skilled and licensed staff. 

Our organic farm-to-table restaurant, Harvest & Wisdom, provides a menu crafted with seasonal produce picked fresh from our on-site organic garden along with locally-sourced organic proteins and beverages.

The history of the springs begins hundreds of years ago with the Calusa Indians who were the original inhabitants of this area. They used the natural spring water for medicinal and trading purposes. Then, in the early 1500s, Juan Ponce De Leon discovered the spring in his quest for the Fountain of Youth. Many believe the natural mineral waters running through the spring have special healing properties.

This natural mineral spring, which is still flowing on the property today, is the very spring for which the city was named – Bonita Springs.

Name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Winnipeg
Description:
Delta Hotels by Marriott Winnipeg isn’t just a place to stay — it’s where connections come to life. Perfectly positioned in the heart of downtown and directly connected to the RBC Convention Centre, we’re the hotel of choice for business travellers, event-goers, and urban explorers alike.

From hosting dynamic meetings to unforgettable celebrations, we bring people together with ease and intention. Guests can enjoy sweeping skyline views from our rooftop pool, recharge in our modern, thoughtfully designed rooms, or step out into Winnipeg’s vibrant arts, culture, and culinary scene — all just steps away.

At Delta Winnipeg, we’re proud to reflect the rhythm of the city. We move with its pulse, its people, and its energy — delivering seamless service and meaningful experiences that feel both elevated and effortless.

Whether you're here to collaborate, explore, or unwind, Delta Winnipeg offers the space and service to make every moment count.

Stay connected. Stay downtown.

Name: Shashi Hotel Mountain View, an Urban Resort
Description:
Our goal is to exceed the expectations of the global business traveler with a more innovative, premier, and genuine hospitality experience.

We expect and provide more. Driven by a commitment to service and by a desire to be the most innovative in the industry, we provide guests with an elevated hotel experience that is welcoming, engaging, green, and seamlessly connected.

Just as our guests are more than the typical business traveler, we are more than just your typical hotel.

Name: Panorama Farm
Description:
Founded in 2021, Panorama Farm is Friends of Puerto Rico's agrotourism lodge in the Panoramic Route of Las Marías, Puerto Rico.

Our agricultural farm has low-cost lodging and provides a space to learn about conservation, sustainability, cultural immersion, and eco-tourism. 

The farm is the house of our signature social impact coffee: Café Ama Love. We also harvest other local products such as papayas and plantains.

Name: Theresian Hotel
Description: Hotel Theresian is located in the very heart of Olomouc near the important historical monument, Terezská brána (Theresian Gate), after which the hotel is named. The hotel's location right in the centre of the city is ideal for exploring it. Whether you're just wandering the picturesque streets of historic Olomouc, sampling the local delicacies of the increasingly popular local gastro scene, or strolling through the adjacent parks, you'll have everything literally at your fingertips. The hotel offers modern and comfortable boutique accommodation in a historic building with a total of 33 spacious rooms in 4 different categories. Guests can enjoy a spa in the attic of the building with a beautiful view of the city or a massage with the possibility of individual consultations and tailor-made massages. For corporate clients, there is a conference room with technical facilities and the possibility of a small refreshment or buffet.

Name: Ringstad Resort
Description: Senk pulsen og finn roen hos Ringstad Resort – et unikt sted for møter, kurs, teambuilding og minnerike samlinger i majestetiske omgivelser. Vi tilbyr overnatting i komfortable fasiliteter, møterom med moderne utstyr, skreddersydde teambuilding-aktiviteter og nydelig, lokal mat, basert på sesongens råvarer. Enten du planlegger et firmaarrangement, en strategisamling eller en avslappende ferie, tilrettelegger vi for uforglemmelige opplevelser som styrker fellesskapet og gir inspirasjon.

Name: Cristal Residencial
Description:
Bem-vindo ao Cristal Residencial, onde transformamos hospedagem em uma experiência única de vida. Somos mais do que um hotel; somos um lar longe de casa, combinando o conforto excepcional de instalações residenciais com o requinte de um hotel de luxo.

No Cristal Residencial, o nosso compromisso é proporcionar aos nossos hóspedes uma estadia memorável, onde cada detalhe é cuidadosamente pensado para garantir o máximo em conforto e satisfação. Nossas acomodações elegantes e serviços personalizados refletem o nosso comprometimento com a excelência.

Com uma localização privilegiada e uma atmosfera acolhedora, oferecemos um ambiente que celebra o equilíbrio entre trabalho, lazer e bem-estar. Seja para uma estadia de curto prazo ou uma residência de longo prazo, no Cristal Residencial, você encontrará um espaço que se adapta às suas necessidades.

Junte-se a nós e descubra o que torna o Cristal Residencial uma escolha única em hospitalidade. Seja bem-vindo a uma experiência onde a elegância encontra a hospitalidade, e cada estadia se torna uma lembrança duradoura.

Name: Kanava Resort
Description:
Kanava Resort is a unique & luxurious vacation rental resort in Oravi, Savonlinna, in the Southern Savonia region of Finland. It's located on a little headland right by the historic Oravi Canal and on the shore of the beautiful Lake Saimaa.

Kanava Resort's nine identical luxury rental villas are made from Cross Laminated Timber (CLT), solid wood panels that store carbon dioxide and thus make the resort environmentally friendly.

Name: Westbourne Leisure Hotels
Description: A family owned chain of Hotels all located in the west midlands, the focus is always on providing excellent customer service and being adapting to our local market to ensure our individualism

Name: Mai Chau Hideaway Lake Resort
Description:
Mai Chau Hideaway Lake Resort is proud to be the only resort located in the heart of Hoa Binh lake, the largest man-made lake in Vietnam. Situated on a green peninsula surrounded by the tranquil waters, our resort offers a truly unique and secluded oasis for all guests.

With a deep appreciation for the local traditions and heritage, our resort showcases the rustic charm of Vietnamese folk architecture in our unique stilt house accommodations. Each room is thoughtfully designed to provide comfort and a sense of connection to the natural surroundings. From the breathtaking views of the lake to the lush greenery that envelops our resort, every moment spent here is a testament to the serenity and tranquility that defines our retreat.

We take pride in our warm and personalized service, ensuring that every guest feels welcomed and well-cared for during their stay. From exploring the breathtaking scenery to indulging in authentic cuisine, we invite our guests to embark on a journey of discovery, relaxation, and rejuvenation at Mai Chau Hideaway.

Join us and experience the perfect blend of nature, culture, and hospitality at our serene retreat in Mai Chau.

Name: فنادق السعفة | A’SSAAFA HOTELS
Description:
السعفة الفندقية  هي احد الروافد الإستثمارية  لشركة عبد العزيز بن محمد المشعل للتطوير والإستثمار العقاري , و تم إتخاذ السعفة  إسماً  و شعاراً للفندق  لتـعزيز هويتـنا و ثقـافتنا الـسعودية  وتراثـنا العـريق ،ونسـعى لتقديم تجـربة فريدة من الضـيافة الـعربية الأصـيلة في قلب المـدينة المــنورة. و يضم الفندق العديد من الغرف والأجنحة المجهزة بأحدث وأفضل التجهيزات والمرافق لجعل إقامتك في المدينة المنورة  تجربة استثنائية لا تنسى 

تتكون مجموعة السعفة الفندقية من عدة فــنادق مــن ضمنها 


فندق السعفة وهو المقــر الـرئيـسـي لإدارة الفـنادق تـــم إفـــتتـاحـه في ابـــريل 2022 و يــقــام على مسـاحـة 650 م و يتـكـون مــن 135 وحــدة ضيـافة فاخـرة.


فـندق السـعفة الذهبـيـة و هو أحدث فنادق السعفة والذي تـم إفتتـاحه في إبريل 2024م, ويقام عـلى مساحة 900 م و يتـكـون من 209 وحـدة ضيـافة فاخـرة




Assaafa Hotel Group is one of the tributaries and the hospitality sector is one of the 
investment tributaries of the Abdulaziz bin Mohammed Al Mishal Real Estate 
Development and Investment Company. 
Assaafa was taken as the name and logo for the hotel to enhance our Saudi identity, culture, and ancient heritage, and we seek to provide a unique experience of authentic Arab hospitality in the heart of Medina. The hotel includes many rooms and suites equipped with the latest and best equipment and facilities to make your stay in Medina an exceptional and unforgettable experience.


Assaafa Hotel Group consists of From several hotels, including
The Assaafa Hotel, which serves as the headquarters for hotel management, was inaugurated in April 2022. It spans an impressive area of 650 square meters and features 135 luxury hospitality units.

The Assaafa Golden Hotel is the latest addition to the Assaafa group, officially opened in April 2024. It occupies an area of 900 square meters and features 209 luxury guest units.

Description: Access the best of the North Carolina capital while enjoying the contemporary comforts of The Casso, centrally-located in the middle of the trendy downtown Warehouse District and Glenwood South. Featuring interior designs inspired by the local area, our non-smoking, dog-friendly retreat is within walking distance of shops, restaurants, museums, and parks and a quick 20 minute drive from the Raleigh-Durham International airport.

Description:
GoingZero is the group of enthusiastic people, who have taken an initiative to save the planet earth and to make it a better place to live. We are taking baby steps to make turmoil in the stay and fmcg sector.. 
 We are on the mission to promote animal compassion and conscious culture again so that we can able to reduce waste. Our marketing strategy involves the mouth of the word, digital media, events, paper media, and paid ads. Let's join hands and work for the betterment of our mother Earth.

Name: Victoria House Inn & Event Space
Description: Our newly renovated boutique hotel boast 9 spacious units (two 2 bedrooms, seven 1 bedroom) in the heart of downtown Frederiksted, St. Croix, USVI.  Our ocean front property is perfect for single travelers or couples looking for to immerse yourselves in the local culture.  Our rooms all come with AC, smart TV's, microwaves, fridges or minifridges, either king or queen beds, and coffee makers.  Steps away from the best snorkeling in STX, restaurants, bars, excursions and tours to fill your days with our island way of life!  We also have a restaurant on site, (Flyer's Bar & Grill), a courtyard bar (Ruff Night: Hair of the dog bar), a pool (coming soon!), an outdoor movie theatre, and an outdoor event space perfect for weddings, birthdays, family reunions, or other  events.  Hotel buyouts are also encouraged for these events at a discount!  Book a stay directly with us and message us on LinkedIn for a 10% discount!

Description:

Seamless, attentive service and full admiration for the astonishing gifts of the natural world, Yama Balian invites both reflection and the exploration of Bali´s west coast secrets.

 ¿Qué hacemos?

Name: EGO SPA
Description:
EGO SPA skirtas tiems, kurie žino kaip patenkinti savimeilę. Hedonistams, suvokiantiems, kaip malonu žaisti gyvenimą, altruistams, neskiriantiems darbo nuo poilsio, bet slapčia trokštantiems malonumų. Mūsų erdvė skirta tau ir tavo ego, ieškančiam išskirtinumo. 

Ego kurorte įsikūręs viešbutis atstos ir namų komfortą ir ofisą, o nesibaigiančios darbo valandos čia virs nenutrūkstančiomis poilsio dienomis, kurias režisuoji tu pats. Kas ir kada bus patiekta ant lėkštutės sprendžia tavo išlepęs gomurys, o SPA ritualais gali lepintis drąsiai ir ne po vieną kartą. Užsigeisk patirti.
