A Place Of Living On Land And Water

Lily Lagoon Resort is situated alongside the stunningly unique Lily Creek Lagoon, 2km from Kununurra's town centre, and offers a tranquil relaxing environment to stay while exploring the raw wildness of the Kimberley Region. Set amongst three acres of lush green lawns, which rolls to the lakes edge, the property houses 24 king premier rooms, 6 self catering rooms, 12 standard motel rooms and 8 budget motel rooms. All rooms are air-conditioned and come complete with ensuites, remote control TV, refrigerator, tea, coffee and ironing facilities.

A RAVI HOTELS nasceu com a missão de dar um toque mágico à hotelaria. Somos uma agência de viagens que adora proporcionar estadias inesquecíveis! Oferecemos hospedagem em hotéis e atendimento de alto nível, com o objetivo de "reluzir a emoção" em cada estadia, seja em Porto Seguro, região ou em Ilhéus. 

Nossa paixão é criar momentos memoráveis, e também buscamos ser uma Central de Reservas confiável para pousadas, hotéis, resorts e bangalôs.  Nossa equipe "apaixonada" e dedicada, está pronta para tornar cada estadia... inesquecível.

Name: Tollboden Hotell og Restaurant
Description:
Tollboden Hotel is a small and very charming hotel that opened 23rd of march 2018. Located in the center of the beautiful coasttown Kragerø, by the water. Original floors and walls from 1783 meet exclusive and modern design, creating a unique atmosphere in all our rooms. The buildings are permanently protected and were customs offices from 1822 to 1992.

With our to restaurants, a winecellar as well as meeting- and social function facilities we are looking forward to offering our guests a unique experience.

Name: Sunway Hospitality
Description:
Sunway is a full service hands on hotel management company with two corporate locations in Lenexa KS and Houston TX. We pride ourselves on working with owners to ensure we meet their goals and expectations. No job is too small. 
We assist owners in a third party capacity for FF&E procurement, we always look for how to save not spend more.
We work with our employees to make a great team working environment with options to move up in the organization. We can train you in multiple franchises and find the location best suited to you, our team member.

Name: Artotel Casa Kuningan
Description: ARTOTEL Casa Kuningan – Jakarta is a hotel in the service apartment category, emphasizing efficiency and functional design with a modern, eco-friendly style. Its target market is business travelers who frequently go on business trips. The hotel will feature 46 rooms in two types: Studio 25 and Studio 28, available for daily, weekly, or monthly stays. It will have six floors equipped with public facilities such as a communal lobby, restaurant, sports center, swimming pool, and of course, a rooftop bar.

Name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Swindon
Description: Explore the Cotswolds from our newly renovated Hotel in Swindon. Located at the gateway to the Cotswolds - Delta Hotels Swindon welcomes you with spacious, newly renovated family rooms, inspired amenities and a superb location. Our city centre hotel places guests close to historic Old Town, the Swindon train station, Swindon Designer Outlet and the Cotswolds Water Park as well as popular destinations like Bath, Oxford and Stonehenge. Recharge in our new spacious rooms and suites which feature plush bedding, flat screen TVs, ample desks and Free WiFi. Our suites boast garden views and extra living space, perfect for families travelling in the UK. Take advantage of our fitness centre, indoor pool and tennis courts. Savour locally sourced cuisine at Cast Iron Bar and Grill, our signature restaurant. Our contemporary hotel offers up to date, renovated event space for hosting memorable gatherings, corporate events and special occasions.

Name: Pearson Hotels
Description: Pearson hotels was created to bring new and emerging hotel experiences through a carefully curated selection of hotel offerings. With an acute focus on four and five star properties, we are committed to leading the market with exceptionally executed hotels.

Name: Casa Ceiba Huatulco
Description:
Hotel Casa Ceiba is a luxurious and enchanting retreat located in the exclusive gated community of "Residencial Conejos" in Bahias de Huatulco. Nestled atop a hill with a breathtaking vantage point overlooking the pristine Playa Tejoncito in Conejos Bay, this picturesque estate spans an impressive 10,500 square feet.

The hotel-boutique is a haven of tranquility and elegance, offering guests a truly unforgettable experience. With a design that seamlessly blends contemporary comforts with the natural beauty of the surroundings, it is a sanctuary for both leisure and adventure seekers. Casa Ceiba is also an amazing location for meetings and social events and boast one of the most beautiful boardrooms for 18pax, with ocean views and build in screen and projector.

It is a hidden gem in the prestigious Residencial Conejos community of Bahias de Huatulco. It offers an exquisite blend of luxury, natural beauty, and top-notch amenities. Whether you're seeking relaxation, adventure, or a romantic escape, Casa Ceiba provides an unforgettable experience that will leave you longing to return.

Name: VERSAILLES BY VIERAS HOTEL DEIRA DUBAI
Description:
Welcome to Hotel Versailles Deira, where comfort meets convenience in the heart of Dubai. A 4-star gem nestled in the vibrant Deira district, we provide a perfect blend of luxury, personalized service, and authentic hospitality.

 Why Stay With Us?

Prime Location: Located minutes away from Dubai International Airport, iconic shopping destinations, and cultural landmarks.
Luxurious Rooms: Elegantly designed accommodations with modern amenities to ensure a comfortable and memorable stay.
Culinary Excellence: Savor delectable cuisines at our in-house restaurants, featuring a mix of international flavors and local favorites.
Amenities & Services: Enjoy a rooftop swimming pool, state-of-the-art fitness center, and meeting spaces tailored to business or leisure needs.
 Whether you're traveling for business or leisure, our team is dedicated to making your stay exceptional.

 Discover Dubai with Us
From the bustling souks of Deira to the glittering skyline of Downtown Dubai, explore the city's culture, shopping, and entertainment with ease from our central location.

 Connect With Us
Follow us for the latest updates, exclusive offers, and a glimpse into the vibrant experiences awaiting you at Hotel Versailles Deira.

 Let's Create Memories Together
For bookings, events, or inquiries, visit our website or reach out to us directly.

Experience comfort. Experience luxury. Experience Hotel Versailles Deira.

Name: Hotel am Schönenbühl
Description:
Hotel "Am Schönenbühl" – Ihr Rückzugsort im Appenzellerland 

Im Herzen des malerischen Dorfes Speicher liegt das Hotel "Am Schönenbühl" – ein einzigartiger Ort, der Hotelkomfort mit Hostel-Flair vereint. Mit 15 individuell gestalteten Zimmern, einem gemütlichen Restaurant, einem großen Garten und einer idealen Lage für Wanderfreunde und Naturgenießer bieten wir eine Oase der Ruhe und Entspannung. 

Unser Fokus liegt auf Nachhaltigkeit, Agrartourismus und der Förderung des Dorflebens. Von Agrar-Erlebnissen und Reitstunden bis hin zu besonderen Events in unserem Saal und Garten – bei uns wird Natur und Gemeinschaft großgeschrieben. 

Egal ob für ein Wochenende in der Natur, ein erholsames Retreat oder eine spannende Wanderung im Alpstein – "Am Schönenbühl" ist Ihr idealer Ausgangspunkt. Kommen Sie vorbei und erleben Sie eine unvergessliche Zeit in einem einzigartigen Ambiente!

 Besuchen Sie unsere Website: www.amschoenenbuehl.ch

#nachhaltigkeit #agrartourismus #hotel #naturerlebnis #speicher #appenzellerland #gemeinschaft

Name: Hotel Olea
Description: Unique in appearance, in the colours of rocks, olives, the sea, it provides what is most important to guests - comfort, functionality and an unforgettable experience. In a complex of 124 rooms and 6 villas, every detail has been taken into account to make your stay at the Olea Hotel completely enjoyable and relaxing.

Name: Hotel Accelerator
Description:
At Hotel Accelerator, we live and breathe boutique hospitality. With years of experience owning and operating our own independent hotels, we’ve created a playbook that we swear by. 

Our mission now is to take what we already know, and help other hoteliers replicate our success.

Our hotels achieve an industry leading 85% direct booking rate and gross income 3X our market competitors. Now, we’re spilling all of our secrets. Learn how you too can transform your independent hotel and multiply your profits.

Name: ACCACIA The Hotel Supply Company
Description:
ACCACIA-is a FF&E and OS&E Supply Company for Hotel Industry in Romania and Balkan's Region. "Our mission is to be the #1 choice for Hotel Supplies & Hospitality Equipment ."

ACCACIA este o companie de încredere specializată în dotări și soluții hoteliere. Cu o experiență de 20 de ani, ne-am dedicat in a oferi cele mai bune produse și servicii pentru industria ospitalității.

ACCACIA vă pune la dispoziție o gamă completă de soluții și produse adaptate nevoilor fiecărei unități de cazare. Avem în portofoliu atât marca noastra proprie, Accacia, cât și marci internaționale renumite, pentru a vă asigura că beneficiați de cele mai inovatoare și calitative opțiuni disponibile.

Indiferent dacă aveți nevoie de mobilier de înaltă calitate, lenjerii, prosoape, saltele confortabile si rezistente, cosmetice si consumabile  pentru bai si alte spatii, produse electrice si tehnologice si multe altele, ACCACIA este partenerul ideal.

Echipa noastră de profesioniști cu experiență este gata să vă ofere consultanță specializată și să vă asigure suportul necesar pe întreg parcursul proiectului. Suntem mândri să fim partenerii dumneavoastră în atingerea obiectivelor și să contribuim la succesul afacerii dumneavoastră.

Contactați-ne astăzi și permiteți-ne să vă demonstrăm cum putem transforma viziunea în realitate!

Name: HOTEL LE SAINT-ETIENNE TRUJILLO PERU
Description:
LE SAINT-ETIENNE es un hostal familiar ubicado en el centro de Trujillo, a 4 cuadras de la Plaza de Armas. Construido por una pareja francesa peruana, el plus de ese alojamiento es la tranquilidad de la zona, perfecta para turistas y la seguridad.
Se habla 3 idiomas. Nuestras habitaciones tienen todas bañeras, una con hidromasaje. 
Ofrecemos opciones de desayuno a diario.
Contamos con cochera cerrada y vigilada.
Tambien tenemos atencion en Recepcion 24 horas a la semana.
Contamos con una mayoria de habitaciones matrimoniales pero tambien tenemos amplias habitaciones para familias con su patio para mas espacio. 
Pueden tambien relajar en el jardin disponible para el public todo el dia.
Apertura de la piscina en 2025!

Name: Regenta Inn Sambalpur
Description: Swirled in the midst of time and set in the Tribal City of Odisha Regenta Inn Sambalpur is a scenic, elegant, and midsegment hotel. It is in close proximity to the City and The Central Railway junction at Sambalpur. The hotel is a wonderful mix of corporate and boutique conveniences and promises to give its guests an unparalleled experience.

Name: Olvos Mykonos
Description: Inspired by the ancient Greek word "olvos," signifying prosperity and wealth, Olvos Mykonos embodies luxury on the idyllic island, blending comfort with elegance amidst breathtaking natural surroundings and panoramic views of the Aegean Sea. The 12 whitewashed suites evoke heavenly tranquillity, while the exceptional location allows guests to witness the amazing sunset. Seamlessly blending Cycladic tradition with contemporary architecture, Olvos exudes unpretentious class, style, and glamour, reflecting the chic barefoot luxury of Mykonos.

Name: Dillons Hotel
Description:
Discover Donegal, Discover Dillons Hotel.

Located in the bustling town of Letterkenny, in the heart of the Cathedral Quarter, everything you need is on our doorstep.

Letterkenny is located just 40 minutes from Donegal town and 30 minutes from Derry/Londonderry making Dillons Hotel the perfect place to pause and unwind on your trip. Whether you want to shop, explore the scenic wonders of the Wild Atlantic Way and play the many fabulous True Links golf courses, Dillons Hotel in the heart of Letterkenny is the perfect spot!

Our hotel boasts 91 luxury guest accommodation including standard double and twin bedrooms, accessible bedrooms, family rooms and suites so something to suit everyone. Our bright, modern and spacious rooms will help you relax.

Our guests come for our central location but return for our service. Many members of our team have had years of experience and enjoy providing a genuine welcome to our guests, that means plenty of conversation and craic, as you would expect in a traditional Irish hotel.

We recommend starting your day in Letterkenny in our Café Bar. Serving 38 Espresso Coffee and range of homemade treats including scones, Guinness Bread, sandwiches and paninis it’s the ideal way to treat yourself. For something a bit more special book our Afternoon Tea.

Our restaurant is well renowned in Letterkenny for its varied mouth watering menu. From traditional Irish cuisine to something a little bit special you’ll want to book a table. We are committed to serving the finest local produce and supporting local Irish producers in the Letterkenny and Killybegs area.

Name: Monghor Resort Sajek
Description: Monghor Resort is the perfect place to discover oneself in the idyllic bliss of rare scenic beauty and be absorbed in the rare silence away from the din and bustle of city life. Among Sajek valley resorts Monghor is A private outdoor for family, friends, and couples to spend their quality time without any hassle overlooking the hill forest and clouds alongside the aqua-inspired interiors of a plush residence perched on a perfect location offering a panoramic pristine view of surrounding natural beauty from your balcony.

Name: Scott Lake Lodge
Description: Scott Lake Lodge is a luxury fly-in fishing lodge located in Northern Canada on the border of Saskatchewan and the Northwest Territories. Next level customer service sets us apart while we entertain guests fishing for northern pike, lake trout and arctic grayling in unspoiled wilderness. Private guest cabins, fine dining, a spa, all the amenities one could ask for in a remote setting.

Name: Hotel Meridian
Description: 4* Hotel in the Heart of Transylvania, Cluj-Napoca

Name: Milano Signature Apartment
Description:
A modern and elegant apartment, packaged to meet all your expectations.
Magodo Phase 2 | Lekki Phase 1

Name: Gottskär Konferens - Event & Logi
Description: Hotell, konferens, restaurang & bar

Name: The Monarch Hospitality Tourism and Corporation
Description: Located in the heart of Pangasinan, The Monarch Hotel sets the standards in luxury and service. It’s a haven of comfort, quality service, and fine cuisine. It is as much a favorite with locals as it is with visitors across the globe.

Name: Lamaro Hotel Barcelona 5 | Preferred Hotels & Resorts | Lifestyle Collection
Description: A timeless gem in the heart of Barcelona’s Gothic Quarter

Name: Golden Age Bodrum Hotel Yalıkavak
Description:
Golden Age Hotel Yalıkavak Muğla, Bodrum bölgesinde bulunmaktadır. 16000 m2 alanda kurulmuş olan Golden Age Hotel Yalıkavak herşey dahil konseptiyle misafirlerimize hizmet vermektedir. Golden Age Hotel Yalıkavak denize sıfır konumuyla dikkat çekmektedir.

150 m uzunluğundaki sahile sahip tesisin kendine ait iskelesi vardır. Tesis 2 adet ala carte restaurant ile misafirlere özel hizmet sunmaktadır. 2 adet açık yüzme havuzu ile keyifli bir tatil yaşayabilirsiniz.

Tesis içerisinde yer alan spa, masaj hizmetlerinden faydalanarak rahatlayabilir ve kendinizi yenilenmiş hissedebilirsiniz. İhtiyacınıza göre tesisteki güzellik salonu, kuaför, market hizmetlerini kullanabilirsiniz.

Keyifli vakit geçirmeniz için tesiste bar bulunmaktadır. Odanızda bulunan merkezi klima/split klima ile oda sıcaklığınız ayarlanabilir. Konaklamanız boyunca faydalanabileceğiniz TV, kablosuz internet, telefon ve oda kasası standart odalarda mevcuttur.

Otel Milas Havaalanı'na 40 km, Bodrum'a 20 km, Yalıkavak'a 2 km, Turgutreis'e 17 km uzaklıktadır.

Name: Hotel Dolmaling
Description:
Hotel Dolmaling, not just another boutique hotel, but a hotel that offers a perfect combination of a comfortable & cozy place to stay at, while contributing to a great social cause. Hotel Dolmaling is located at Boudhanath, Kathmandu where the most popular UNESCO World Heritage Site Boudhanath Stupa of Nepal is situated. Hotel Dolmaling, a profit making business for a non-profit organisation, founded by Palnge Monastery solely with a mission and vision to support and provide to their monks from little things — school supplies, healthy snacks, sports activities, a bed to sleep in, to the big things — shelter, clothes, healthy vegetarian food, clean water, medical facility and primarily basic education and buddhist philosophy to spread Buddha dharma and to benefit society. At present, there are about 150 monks from age 9 to 65 in Palnge Monastey. 100 percent of the profit of Hotel Dolmaling goes to Palnge Monastery so, your every stay is greatly valued and appreciated.
By choosing Hotel Dolmaling for your accommodation, you not only enjoy a comfortable stay in a warm and welcoming environment but also actively participate in a noble cause. The hotel values and appreciates every guest as their stay directly supports the Palnge Monastery and its community.

Name: West Court Retreat
Description: Find tranquillity in the Berkshire countryside at our family-run hotel. Set in a Grade II listed manor house from the 16th century, West Court Retreat seamlessly blends historic charm with modern luxury. Ideal for a countryside getaway, spa break, or wellness retreat, this inviting space honours its rich heritage while offering contemporary comforts.

Name: DoubleTree By Hilton Dubai Port Saeed
Folie Marine Hotel & Beach Club
Description: Folie Marine Beach Hotel & Club epitomizes seaside elegance, offering personalized experiences, exquisite cuisine, and a commitment to sustainability. With breathtaking views and meticulous attention to detail, every aspect of our hotel reflects luxury and excellence, ensuring an unforgettable stay for our guests.

Name: Lazona Continental Hotel Dubai
Description: In the heart of Dubai with its very attractive and accessible location, La Zona Continental Hotel Dubai is just walking distance from Al Qiyadah Metro Station and Bus Station.Enjoy an outdoor swimming pool and guestrooms with free Wi-Fi. The rooms in the hotel are fitted with a kettle and an IPTV. Provides a private bathroom, and rooms Feature a fully furnished suites with kitchenette and separate seating room. Guests can enjoy a wide range of international cuisine, café and pool café area. La Zona Continental Hotel offers 4-stars Luxury accommodations with a fitness center and SPA Facilities. Our colleagues at the reception speak Arabic, English, Hindi, Tagalog, French and Dutch. The Reception team can assist around the clock with guidance on the area. The property is around 6.0 mi from Dubai World Trade Center and 9.3 mi from Dubai Mall. The property is 9.3 mi from City Walk Mall. Burj Khalifa is just 9.3 mi from the accommodations, and very close from Al Mamzar Beach Park. Dubai International Airport, is just few minutes away.

Name: Banna for Hotels
Description: A Partnership privately held company established in 1996 and owns Mazar Resort & Spa in Sharm El Sheikh, South Sinai, Egypt.

Name: Hotel Anuttara
Description:
Hotel Dolmaling, not just another boutique hotel, but a hotel that offers a perfect combination of a comfortable & cozy place to stay at, while contributing to a great social cause. Hotel Dolmaling is located at Boudhanath, Kathmandu where the most popular UNESCO World Heritage Site Boudhanath Stupa of Nepal is situated. Hotel Dolmaling, a profit making business for a non-profit organisation, founded by Palnge Monastery solely with a mission and vision to support and provide to their monks from little things — school supplies, healthy snacks, sports activities, a bed to sleep in, to the big things — shelter, clothes, healthy vegetarian food, clean water, medical facility and primarily basic education and buddhist philosophy to spread Buddha dharma and to benefit society. Name: Maison Métier
Description: Maison Métier is a luxury guest house in the heart of New Orleans. Design forward with bespoke concierge services, Maison Métier is a sanctuary for the senses. Designed in partnership with Studio Shamshiri, each piece of art and furniture in the guest house tells a story and inspires curiosity.

Name: Hampton Inn San Francisco , CA
Description:
We're three miles from san francisco international airport. Union square and downtown's café culture are within 15 minutes,
And several restaurants are within walking distance. Wifi, daily hot breakfast, and fitness center use are all free.

Name: Stagecoach Inn & Restaurant
Description: For its 150 year history the Stagecoach Inn has welcomed Texas travelers with a penchant for small towns, state history and hometown watering holes. Enjoy small town charm with big experiences.

Name: Trinity Collective Cairns
Description:
At Trinity Collective, we are passionate about redefining the very essence of coastal living in Cairns, where tropical paradise seamlessly intertwines with modern, tropical resort-style luxury. As a newly established residential complex, we are driven by a commitment to provide an unmatched tropical lifestyle experience for those who aspire to the pinnacle of refined living.

Our vision is crystal clear: to set a new benchmark for coastal living by creating an exclusive seaside sanctuary where residents can immerse themselves in the tranquil embrace of Trinity Beach. We achieve this through meticulously crafted residences that radiate sophistication and our commitment to premium accommodation.

Join our exclusive community and transform Trinity Beach into your permanent holiday destination. Contact us today to begin your Trinity Collective journey.

Name: The Dock 69°39 by Scandic
Description:
The Dock 69°39 by Scandic åpner 24. juni 2025, og blir vårt tredje signaturhotell i Norge. Signaturhotell er synonymt med sentral beliggenhet, unikt design og nyskapende konsepter. Et slikt hotell skal være en destinasjon i seg selv, med rike mat- og drikkeopplevelser og personlig, tilpasset service. 

12 etasjer, 17 300 kvadratmeter, 305 rom, velværeavdeling, utendørs løpebane på taket. Og ikke minst en historie med dype røtter i Vervet-området og den norske polarhistorien.

Name: Nashville Airport Marriott
Description: The Nashville Airport Marriott is a vibrant destination for business and leisure travelers, ideally located just minutes from Nashville International Airport and the heart of downtown. Our recently renovated guest rooms, including spacious deluxe options, offer modern amenities and a comfortable retreat after a day of exploring or meetings. With over 12,000 sq. ft. of flexible event space, including our stunning Cheekwood Ballroom, we are the perfect setting for conferences, weddings, and gatherings of all sizes. Guests enjoy a variety of dining experiences, from breakfast at Two Rivers Cafe to grab-and-go options at Fresh Connection with Starbucks coffee, and lunch or dinner at the Atrium Bar and Restaurant. Our dedicated team is here to make every stay seamless and memorable.

Name: FONO HÔTEL Sarl
Description:
Juché sur les hauteurs de la colline du village Abom, lieu dit "montée sanctuaire" arrondissement de Yaoundé V. Fono Hôtel ajoute désormais un grain de beauté dans cette périphérie de la capitale politique.

Il s'agit d'un hôtel de 34 chambres confortables, lumineuses et climatisées dont deux suites, une chambre jumelle, 27 chambres VIP, quatre chambres classiques, un bar-restaurant, deux salles de banquet d'une capacité de 100 et 150 places, deux salles de réunions modulables, une salle de sport, une réception ouverte 24h/24 et 7j/7. On retrouve aussi un room service, un service de transport client, un parking sécurisé conçu selon les normes internationales.

Name: The Harlow Hotel by Accor
Description: Less than 3 miles from Harlow town centre, this hotel is ideal for hosting events of all requirements. This venue has excellent access to Stansted Airport plus transport connections to Central London and the M11 (JCT7).

Name: Inex Olgica Hotel & SPA
Description: If you want to spend incredible & unforgettable moments in your life visit our Inex Olgica Hotel & Spa.

Name: Complejo Campo Abierto
Description:
En el departamento de Rivera, a 4 km de la ciudad, a 9 km de la frontera, hay un lugar donde el arte, la naturaleza y la gastronomía se encuentran para brindarte un espacio de encuentro, disfrute y descanso.
Campo Abierto produce sus propios eventos y propuestas de turismo de experiencia.

Name: Hotell Skogshöjd
Description: Din mötesplats i Södertälje

Name: Cousins Boutique Hotel
Description: Bij Cousins Boutique Hotel wordt gastvrijheid met hoofdletters geschreven. Naast een uitstekende hotelservice kan onze staf de gasten optimaal adviseren over alle mogelijkheden die de prachtige stad Maastricht en omgeving te bieden hebben.

Name: Hotel Sandy's Tower
Description: Hotel Sandy's Tower is an luxury Hotel in the heart of beautiful Bhubaneswar City.

Name: Sheraton Indianapolis Keystone Crossing
Description: Sheraton at Keystone Crossing is connected to the state’s premier mall, The Fashion Mall. Just a few miles away from downtown Indy and all major attractions. The hotel features deluxe rooms and suites, large conference space 30,000sf, popular restaurant and a high energy lounge. The indoor, heated pool and spa are located near a large, state of the art work out facility. The facility offers large windows with spectacular views of the wooded Keystone Crossing area.

Name: Hotel Wyndham Sail Plaza Manta & Convention Center
Description: Disfruta de las impresionantes vistas al océano Pacífico y una gran cantidad de servicios en el Wyndham Manta Sail Plaza Hotel and Convention Center. Convenientemente ubicado en el centro de la ciudad costera y a 10 kilómetros del Aeropuerto Internacional Eloy Alfaro (MEC), nuestro hotel contemporáneo está a pasos de la playa y cerca de restaurantes, bares y atracciones. Nuestra propiedad de primer nivel cuenta con una amplia piscina con borde infinito, un moderno gimnasio y una sala de cine. Disfruta todo el día de los restaurantes y bares en las instalaciones, y diviértete con el karaoke y el baile en nuestro club nocturno. Los alojamientos espaciosos y libres de humo están completamente equipados con servicios como WiFi gratis y una cafetera con café gourmet ecuatoriano.

Name: Aamani BeachVilla Resorts
Description:
Welcome to the epitome of coastal luxury at our Beach Villa Resort in the enchanting city of Bhavnagar. Nestled along the pristine shores of the Arabian Sea, our resort offers a unique and unforgettable seaside retreat, where the gentle rhythm of the waves and the soothing touch of the natural wind create an idyllic haven for relaxation and rejuvenation.

Our Beach Villa Resort is a harmonious blend of modern elegance and coastal charm, providing an exclusive escape for discerning travelers seeking an intimate connection with nature. Each villa is a sanctuary of comfort, designed to seamlessly merge with the breathtaking natural surroundings. Expansive windows and private balconies offer panoramic views of the azure sea, ensuring that every moment is accompanied by the soothing sound of lapping waves and the invigorating sea breeze.

The architecture of our beach villas is inspired by the local culture, incorporating traditional elements with contemporary design to create a sense of place that is both authentic and luxurious. Step into a world of refined tranquility as you enter your private villa, adorned with tasteful furnishings, plush amenities, and an ambiance that invites you to unwind.

Immerse yourself in the natural beauty of Bhavnagar from the comfort of your villa's outdoor spaces. Lounge on your private terrace or take a leisurely stroll along the sandy shores just steps away. For those seeking adventure, our resort offers water sports and activities that harness the power of the sea, providing an exhilarating and invigorating experience.

Indulge your senses in our exquisite dining options, where the freshest local ingredients are expertly crafted into delectable dishes by our skilled chefs. Savor the flavors of the region while dining al fresco, with the sea as your backdrop and the gentle breeze as your companion.

Whether you're seeking a romantic getaway, a family retreat, or a serene solo escape, our Beach Villa Resort in Bhavnagar

Name: Hotel Mount Kailash Resort
Description:
Hotel Mount Kailash Resort started its operation in 2009 in the heart of Pokhara, within the triangle formed by the bustling pedestrian shopping street, the fascinating Lake side and the lush green hills. Hotel Mount Kailash Resort in Pokhara is conveniently located near the bank of Fewa Lake, accessible to restaurants, shopping centers areas, banks and a museum. In addition to excellent transport links at the meeting point of airport, tourist bus park and taxi stand, the hotel is surrounded by the city center's elegant shops, cafés, restaurants, bars, and other tourist sights just across the Fewa lake.

With 51 beautiful rooms meeting with all the modern amenities, two dining spaces along with terrace dining experience,  a beautiful garden and spa. We further provide extensive conference and banquet halls to provide an ideal venue for larger events and meetings. The hotel rooms offer a panoramic view of the mountain ranges of Fishtail Mountain .

Each of our rooms are simple, fresh, warm style and welcoming colors that meets natural Pokhara design as well as comfort standards. The exception of our 14 rooms with king size single beds, every room has a queen-size double bed and a single bed. Our deluxe  rooms have LED television, high-speed internet connection, mini bar and a modern bathroom.

Our buffet breakfast includes both International and Nepali specialties. Our dining features light and tasty dishes, salads, International multi cuisines, unique Pokhareli delicacies, dinner specialties and a wide range of drinks.

We hope to welcome you soon !!!

Name: Hotel Papadopoli Venezia - MGallery Collection
Description:
Hotel Papadopoli Venezia is a refined retreat in the heart of Venice, steps away from Piazzale Roma and Santa Lucia railway station — the ideal gateway for arriving guests. As part of the MGallery Hotels collection, we blend Venetian tradition and authenticity with a distinctive, curated hospitality experience.

Set at the edge of the Papadopoli Gardens, the hotel features elegant Venetian interiors, Murano glass chandeliers, and signature mirrors, creating an atmosphere where historic charm meets contemporary comfort. Each restored room and suite reflects the city’s timeless aesthetic while offering a warm sense of intimacy and sophistication. Our commitment to responsible travel is embodied in our “Green Key” certification, supported by local sourcing and a sustainable approach to modern hospitality.

Discover the essence of Venezia through attentive service and a curated sense of place, and share your #MMoment with us.

Name: ENOTEL BEACH
Description:
Niché en bordure de mer sur le Boulevard Balmer à San-Pédro, votre havre de paix Enotel Beach vous accueille dans un cadre exceptionnel, combinant service personnalisé et installations de premier choix.
Établi sur 30 000 m², notre village-hôtel propose 48 chambres et suites sous forme de bungalows, idéales pour allier affaires et loisirs.

Enotel Beach se distingue par ses prestations de qualité : réception ouverte 24h/24, room service, pressing, navette pour l’aéroport et les gares, réservation de taxi, boutique de souvenirs, connexion Wi-Fi illimitée, parking sécurisé, et bien plus encore. Notre équipe dévouée veille à rendre chaque séjour mémorable en restant attentive à vos besoins.

Name: ClickYourStay
Description:
ClickYourStay is a next-generation B2B hospitality platform designed to bridge the gap between hotels and travel agents across India. With a strong network of over 1200+ verified agents and growing daily, we simplify and empower hotel bookings with real-time availability, exclusive offline rates, and value-added hotel deals.

Whether you're a hotel looking to boost occupancy or a travel partner aiming to secure the best stay options for your clients, ClickYourStay provides a seamless and efficient booking experience.

Why Choose ClickYourStay?
Exclusive Offline & Dynamic Rates
Access hotel rates not visible on public platforms, with real-time and negotiated options to match your client’s needs.

Wider Visibility for Hotels
We help hotels increase their pan-India visibility through B2B marketing, dedicated sales support, and strategic placement on our portal.

Trusted Travel Agent Community
Our growing network of travel professionals ensures high-quality leads and regular bookings for partner hotels.

Promotional Support
Sponsored hotels enjoy priority listings, social media promotions, email marketing, and WhatsApp campaigns to boost visibility.

End-to-End Support
From onboarding to booking to post-sale assistance, our expert team ensures smooth coordination between hotels and agents.

Our Mission
To revolutionize the B2B hospitality marketplace by delivering a smarter, faster, and more profitable way for hotels and travel agents to collaborate.

Our Vision
To become India’s most trusted B2B hotel distribution platform by combining technology, transparency, and travel trade expertise.

Let’s Grow Together
At ClickYourStay, we don’t just connect hotels and agents — we create partnerships. Join us and be part of a growing ecosystem that believes in shared success.

Name: Eileen Hotel
Description:
Are you looking for a unique and charming place to stay in Cairo? Do you want to experience the history and culture of this vibrant city? If so, you will love Eileen Hotel, a Semi-boutique hotel located in a historic building in the heart of downtown Cairo.

Eileen Hotel is housed in a stunning French Baroque building that dates back to the late 18th or early 19th century. The hotel has been lovingly restored and decorated to reflect the elegance and charm of that era. You will feel like you have stepped back in time as you admire the ornate details, antique furniture, hand Made tiles, hand-made furniture, hand-made lamps, and cozy atmosphere of the hotel.

Eileen Hotel is not your typical hotel. It's a pioneer in sustainability and innovation. This hotel is designed to produce more energy than it consumes, using solar panels, Air conditioners with inverters technology have less power loss and can save energy. All The Lighting LED. Stay at Eileen Hotel and be part of the change.

Eileen Hotel offers twenty-two spacious and comfortable rooms,  located on the last two floors of the building. Each room has a private bathroom, air conditioning, free Wi-Fi, a flat-screen Smart TV, a Minibar fridge, Kettle, a Hairdryer, and two curtains. You will also enjoy the stunning views of the historical buildings and streets from your windows.

Eileen Hotel is ideally located in the center of downtown Cairo, where you can explore the rich and diverse attractions of the city. You can walk to the Nile River in just 5 minutes, or visit the famous Tahrir Square, Restaurants, and many other cafes, restaurants, and antique shops nearby. You can also easily access the main tourist sites, such as the Egyptian Museum, the Citadel, and the Pyramids.
Eileen Hotel is 25 Minutes from Cairo International Airport,2 Minutes from 2 Metro Stations,10 Minutes from Tahrir Bus Stations, and 10 Minutes from Cairo Train Stations.

Eileen Hotel is more than just a place to sleep.

Name: Hyatt House Sacramento Midtown
Description: Discover the brand new Hyatt House Sacramento/Midtown located in the heart of the city’s vibrant art, music, and cultural scene. Situated across from Sutter’s Fort State Historic Park, be near Capitol Mall, Old Sacramento Waterfront, and much more.

Name: The Meriton
Description: The Meriton is a contemporary hotel in Nehru Place, New Delhi (near Okhla NSIC Metro, Magenta Line), crafted for business and leisure travellers who want comfort, connectivity and thoughtful design. Guests choose from well-planned rooms and suites : Standard, Premium, Junior, Empress and Presidential, each with smart layouts, a king/twin option and practical touches like an in-room pantry. Onsite, enjoy Bayleaf (multi-cuisine dining), Lotus View Café on the club floor and the Nakshatra rooftop lounge, plus spaces for meetings, offsites and intimate celebrations. Essential conveniences include a business centre, gym, library, travel desk, free parking and high-speed Wi-Fi. With quick access to city landmarks (including the Lotus Temple nearby) and major business hubs, The Meriton offers an easy, well-connected base in South Delhi.

Name: Aloft Oklahoma City Quail Springs
Description:
Aloft Hotels is open in space and spirit and Aloft Oklahoma City Quail Springs brings a new vibrant gathering place in north OKC. Soak up the sun relaxing poolside in the hotel's outdoor pool and sip something delicious from the WXYZ bar, which offers comfortable indoor seating in the open lobby with pool views. 

Plan your next OKC meeting or event at Aloft Oklahoma City Quail Springs hotel near Chisholm Creek. You'll appreciate the hotel's meeting room is larger than 1,000 square feet and located on the hotel's main level for quick access to the parking, the hotel lobby, and WXYZ Bar. 

Chisholm Creek, located minutes from the hotel, provides a wide array of dining options, shopping, and entertainment venues such as Topgolf, iFLY, Red Door Escape Room, and more. Perfect for a family trip to OKC or team building for your next meeting in Quail Springs. During your next trip to OKC, we look forward to welcoming you to the Aloft Oklahoma City Quail Springs.

Name: La Casona Hotel Boutique
Description: Our main goal is to provide our guests with an authentic experience, transporting them to past eras while they enjoy a warm and relaxing ambiance. Every detail has been carefully considered, from the architecture to the gardens, to ensure an exceptional and charming stay

Name: VentoVinte Beach Club
Description:
Experience the magic of Emboaca at VentoVinte Beach Club.
Located in the heart of Ceará, our intimate boutique eco-hotel and beach club, offers the perfect blend of comfort and water sports.
Whether you are here to enjoy your time on the pristine beach immersed in tranquillity, or coming to catch the perfect wave just outside your room, VentoVinte is your ultimate destination.

Name: Griya Santrian a Beach Resort & Spa
Description: Experience an enduring tale of traditional Balinese hospitality on the charming sunrise coast of Sanur village. This beautiful beachfront resort is unmistakably one of the most renowned landmarks to grace the shores of north Sanur in an area that first gave rise to Bali’s tourism industry. Nestled within a tropical landscape, Griya Santrian celebrates the evolving character of local design. It is a place that, even after many years of dedicated service, continues to appeal to couples, families and even business travellers alike.

Name: Anthology of Athens, member of the Leading Hotels of the World
Description: MONUMENTS GO BEYOND THE LIVES OF PAST PEOPLES, THE CHANGING VALUES, AND HISTORY, AS THEY TELL US ABOUT HUMANITY’S REBIRTH OVER THE CENTURIES.

Name: Hotel Metropole Inn
Description:

Name: Ulvsby herrgård
Description:
Ulvsby herrgård 
Herrgården en av Sveriges äldsta väl bevarade herrgårdar som dåtidens kung och drottning la beslag på. Kanske lockade den vår Drottning Kristina på grund av den vackra placeringen vid sjön Fryken i Sunne. Eller så drogs hon hit eftersom Ulvsby herrgård redan på 1600-talet var känd för sin goda mat!

Arbete och avkoppling 
Herrgårdshotellet har alltid varit en uppskattad plats för både arbete, avkoppling och fest. Resan hit är kort och platsen den allra bästa när man är många som ska samlas. Från storstadsregionerna tar man bekvämt ända till Sunne. Flygplats inrikes finns i Torsby (25 min) och internationell Oslo (2,5 tim)

Konferens
Att få åka på konferens ska både vara en känsla av lyx och nytta. Ni ska känna er utvilade och redo för att återvända mot kontoret och ta er an alla utmaningar. Skratt och god mat är självklart något som hör ihop med en bra konferens också. Vi på Ulvsby Herrgård ger er en perfekt upplevelse vid en konferens. Vi är lite “home away from home”!

Ta tåget hela vägen in till Sunne och njut av den vackra Fryksdalsbanan. Se vad Astrid Lindgren inspirerades av till sina berättelser. Låt tågresan bli en perfekt start på er konferens!

Vi på Ulvsby Herrgård erbjuder ett koncept med hela upplevelsen och konferensen i tanken, här på vår herrgård. Spelar ingen roll om det är ett mindre styrelsemöte, eller om det är en stor konferens med hela koncernen. Ni hittar det ni behöver hos oss, och det bästa av allt. Avskilt från vardagens brus, i moderna lokaler. Tänk inte på mat eller fika, det löser vi!

Deliziate il palato con i sapori autentici della regione, gustando la nostra cucina prelibata, e scoprite il giardino incantato, ricco di frutti "dimenticati" di Romagna.


A Ca' de Mazapédar, la sostenibilità è il nostro punto di riferimento. Ci dedichiamo a ridurre il nostro impatto ecologico e a proteggere l'ambiente. Con l'utilizzo di pannelli solari per un'energia pulita e l'illuminazione a basso consumo energetico, ci impegniamo a creare un'esperienza eco-sostenibile, riducendo la nostra impronta di carbonio.

Vivete l'incanto di Ca' de Mazapédar, dove la sostenibilità si fonde con l'immergersi nella cultura. Siamo pronti ad accogliervi in un ambiente eco-friendly, perfetto per ogni tipo di viaggiatore e adatto a ogni preferenza di alloggio. Prenotate ora per un'esperienza autentica che unisce il comfort moderno con la tradizione di Romagna.

Whether you’re here for sports, a family vacation, a wedding, or just a relaxing getaway, Holiday Inn Express & Suites Vaughan Southwest is your ideal home base. With our friendly staff, excellent amenities, and prime location

Name: Gandum Village - Conscious Boutique Hotel and Retreats
Description:
Redefining the future of hospitality through comfort, design, and regeneration.

Gandum Village is more than just a hotel – it’s a regenerative way of living that inspires people to live better while caring for the planet. Located in the heart of the Portuguese region of Alentejo, in Montemor-o-Novo, Gandum brings together accommodation, dining, and coworking in a space that seamlessly blends comfort, vibrant design, and positive impact.

At Gandum, we believe sustainability is not just a concept but a daily practice accessible to everyone. We demonstrate that it’s possible to rest, work, and live with purpose, in harmony with nature, without compromising on quality or comfort.

Every aspect of Gandum has been carefully designed to make a difference: from the interiors, reflecting bold Portuguese creativity, to our strong ties with the local community and sustainable practices. Our restaurant features locally sourced and responsibly crafted dishes, bridging tradition with innovation, and offering a menu that’s 50% plant-based.

Beyond hospitality, Gandum is a platform for a better future. We aim to inspire a regenerative lifestyle by showcasing practical, scalable solutions that improve quality of life while addressing urgent environmental and social challenges.

Gandum Village is where comfort meets consciousness, where design meets purpose, and where a sustainable way of life becomes a joyful reality. Join us in redefining what hospitality can be.

Description:
Seit jeher steht Helmut Marko auf Sportwägen – perfekt abgestimmt in individuellen Setups. Und genauso betreibt er auch die kleine Gruppe der Helmut Marko Hotels – vier eigenständige Hotels in Graz mit individuellen Ausrichtungen. Traditionelle High-Class im Schlossberghotel, nüchterner Strukturalismus im Augarten Art Hotel, flippig das Lendhotel und brutale Natürlichkeit im Kai 36 zwischen Fels und Fluss. Kunsthotels sind sie alle und geben Raum für über 1.000 Objekte aus Helmut Markos Kunstsammlung. Auch verbindet die Häuser die sensible Auswahl an Materialien und Lebensmitteln sowie – Dank unserer Mitarbeiter – ausgezeichnetes Service.

Sowohl der klassische Stadturlauber als auch der Businessgast fühlt sich in den Hotels von Helmut Marko gleichermaßen wohl. Die Zimmer überzeugen mit feinsten Materialien, modernster Ausstattung und der zentralen Lage von Graz. Und wer auf der Suche nach einer Location für das nächste Meeting, Veranstaltung oder eine Tagung ist, hat dazu mit hervorragender Infrastruktur die besten Voraussetzungen. Selbstverständlich - immer mit bestem Service und einem persönlichen Ansprechpartner. Die Marko Hotels bieten Ihnen jahrelange Expertise in der Planung von Leisure- und Business-Events und die nötige Kompetenz für Ihren Event mit bis zu 45 Personen.

Name: Bells Marina & Resort
Description:
Welcome to Bells Marina. This is Jud and Charlotte, the 5th generation of the owner of Bells Marina. We are an outgoing, easy-going, loving couple from California, passionate about offering guests positive experiences. 
We love traveling and exploring the world. Jud has been to more than 70 countries and Charlotte to at least 19. We enjoy nature, love camping, and hiking. We also sail when the weather and wind are good. 
Charlotte, originally from Thailand and lived in CA for many years, enjoys fine wine and cooking healthy food. You will often find her planting organic vegetables in the garden or reading travel magazines on the couch. She loves happy hours, listening to Latin music, and Salsa dancing. She used to work for the British Government and has excellent hospitality skills. She comes from a large family and loves meeting and connecting with people from different backgrounds. 
Jud is an event company owner and an international travel guide who understands hospitality and entertainment. He loves to invent new products and always has new ideas. He has a product design background and an art background inherited from his parents. His father is a famous sculptor from Mendocino, and his mother was an art professor and historian / at UCLA. Jud loves art and photography, and you will see some of our work from our trips on the walls while you stay. 
For the last five years, we have loved meeting people from different parts of the world and states. We look forward to connecting with you as hosts or fellow travelers. Our dream is to sail around the world, learning about new cultures! We will do our best to make sure you have a pleasant stay.
 
Welcome to our lakefront dream! 

Charlotte & Jud

Name: Gram Slot & Nybøl godser A/S
Description:
Gram Slot – en herregård med respekt for historien
En herregård er meget mere end blot et stort hovedhus. Ordet stammer fra “herre” og “gård” – altså en gård, der hører til en herre – og dækker traditionelt over et samlet landbrug med flere bygninger, marker og ofte små boliger til ansatte og håndværkere.

Når du besøger en herregård i dag, træder du ind i et levende miljø med mange huse, stalde, lader og omgivelser, der tilsammen fortæller historien. Det betyder, at et ophold her ikke nødvendigvis er et klassisk slotsophold med fornemme sale og riddersal – men en oplevelse midt i historien, naturen og det daglige liv på en stor gård.

Gram Slot byder på alt fra økologisk landbrug til koncerter, konferencer, god mad i vores restaurant og overnatning. Destinationen tiltrækker besøgende fra nær og fjern, som kommer for at opleve den særlige atmosfære og deltage i vores events og aktiviteter. Vi ønsker at være stedet for nærvær, bevidst bæredygtighed og ikke mindst hyggelige stunder der bliver til minder.

The complex has three luxuriously equipped apartments with a capacity of 12 guests and a wellness center including a comfortable sauna and an indoor saltwater pool.

There is a spacious children’s playground within the fenced area, while our romantic pergola offers a beautiful view of the Drina River and includes a fireplace and barbecue for a completely hedonistic experience.

Free parking is available on site, as well as a modern surveillance system.

Name: Stanford Court
Description:
Welcome to Stanford Court!

Here at the crest of Nob Hill, it’s easy to see what makes San Francisco special. While our views are amazing, it’s the city’s energy and restless spirit of transformation that quickens your heartbeat and gets your mind spinning. At Stanford Court Hotel, we’ve crafted a guest experience that plays off this buzzing atmosphere. With our cleverly designed rooms, forward-looking wellness amenities, and in-house art curation program, you’ll feel at one with the City by the Bay.

THE BAY'S BEST AMENITIES
We’re obsessed with giving you the sweetest experience possible. Stanford Court hotel amenities were thoughtfully developed to keep you efficient and feeling your best while on the road: a state-of-the-art gym, quality coffee and teas, and interesting common spaces, such as our library, music room, and digital art gallery that just might inspire you to make some new friends. Come stay—and play—with us.

GUESTROOMS
Our newly redesigned rooms are the perfect blend of edgy expression and creature comforts. The views inspire, the art intrigues and the custom furnishings and finishes never let you forget that you’re staying somewhere special.

 ¿Qué hacemos?

Apoyamos a nuestros asociados para consolidar un turismo de calidad.
Impulsamos iniciativas de sostenibilidad y economía circular.
Representamos los intereses del sector hotelero en foros locales, nacionales e internacionales.
Promovemos la cohesión entre los actores clave del turismo en Ibiza y Formentera.
 En FEHIF trabajamos cada día para posicionar a nuestras islas como referentes en el turismo global, creando un impacto positivo en la comunidad local y en el entorno natural.

 Nuestra misión: Ser el punto de referencia para los hoteles de Ibiza y Formentera, fortaleciendo el desarrollo turístico con innovación y liderazgo.

Name: La Maison de l'Ambassadeur, Carcassonne
Description:
La Maison de L'Ambassadeur is a beautiful 8 bedroom, 5 bathroom Maison de Maître located in the heart of the King Louis XV Bastide, Carcassonne. It is recognised by the Mairie as the most important house in Carcassone.  Gifted to his wife by Monsieur Ourmet, the French Ambassador to Finland, in a prenuptial agreement, it once played host to an array of dignitaries. 

Built in 1850, it famously acquired its unique Art Nouveau facade in 1910. Created by local architect Gordien and the sculptor Guilhem, it is of great architectural importance, protected by the Bâtiments de France. 

With its sweeping marble staircase, towering ceilings and wrought iron balconies you can taste the opulence of a home once used for entertaining diplomats.

You can book the whole house or individual deluxe rooms here: linktr.ee/ambassadeur

Sleeping up to 16 guests comfortably, La Maison de L'Ambassadeur has a bar, large, marble-topped kitchen and 2 generous reception rooms leading out on to a private, secluded garden with outside seating.Guests have exclusive access to all areas of the 3 Storey, 450sqm including a self contained accommodation on the top floor. Refurbished and restored in 2020 the three storey home is respectful of its heritage while offering modern comforts, including beautifully designed en-suite bathrooms.

The house is located in the Bastide de Saint Louis, only a block from the cafés, restaurants and bustling food markets of Place Carnot.

Explore Les Halles covered market and Le Musée des Beaux Arts, which are also on your doorstep.

It's central location means that it is well connected. The shuttle bus from Carcassonne airport stops nearby. Carcassonne station is 15 minutes away by foot, to take you to Toulouse (45-60 minutes) or further afield.

You are 15-20 minutes by foot from the mediaeval city and castle via the old bridge.

Stroll along the banks of the Aude, take a dip in the nearby lac de la Cavayère or ride a bike along the Canal du Midi

Name: Karlamuiza Country Hotel
Description:
Welcome to Karlamuiza, a wonderful natural and cultural-historical place in the picturesque ancient Amata Valley and in the Gaujas National Park. Since the 18th century, the owners of the manor have turned this site into a beautiful and tasteful ensemble of buildings and skill-fully integrated it into the natural landscape, which has always attracted visitors and nature lovers from near and far.

Today, hotel Karlamuiza occupies the old manor's servants’ quarters. Externally, the old building has undergone a few changes, retaining the original elegance and style. The hotel features 10 spacious suites with separate bedrooms and kitchens, equipped with modern appliances. We provide the highest level of service to our guests, making Karlamuiza one of the best accommodations to stay while visiting the areas of Cesis and Sigulda or Gaujas National Park. 

The integral part of the service and hospitality is our kitchen – the country manor cuisine. Here, guests can enjoy lovely meals made, mostly, with local and seasonal ingredients. Besides the spacious dining room, during the summer season, visitors have access to the outside terrace and our ancient apple orchard, as well as Cherry Garden House and picnic areas at the manor's park.

Name: Bhil's Kabeela
Description:
Welcome to Bhil's Kabeela Resort & Spa, a luxurious jungle resort located in the heart of Kanha Tiger Reserve. Our resort offers a unique blend of luxury, comfort, and nature, making it an ideal destination for a leisurely holiday in the lap of the jungle. Bhil's Kabeela Team has designed the resort to provide the best experience to our guests.

We offer a wide range of services, including a 24/7 front desk, a full-fledged restaurant and bar with in-room dining,. Our Spa Suites are equipped with private spa and pool facilities, ensuring that you have a relaxing and rejuvenating stay with us.

In addition to our luxurious amenities and services, Bhil's Kabeela Resort & Spa also offers an array of exciting activities for our guests to enjoy such as jungle safari to explore the natural beauty of the Kanha Tiger Reserve, or  a guided nature walk to discover the diverse flora and fauna of the jungle. We can arrange tribal dance performances on demand to showcase the vibrant traditions of the indigenous people of the region. We also offer event planning services, so you can celebrate special occasions such as birthdays, anniversaries, and more in the midst of the jungle.

As an inaugural offer, we are providing exclusive deals and packages for our guests. Our vision is to get the best clientele in class and make their stay a memorable one.

Come and experience the serenity of the jungle at Bhil's Kabeela Resort & Spa. Contact us at 8889655455 or email us at Bhilkabeela@gmail.com to make your reservation today. Visit our website www.kanhabhilskabeela.com to know more about us.

Name: Holiday Inn Express Aberdeen City Centre
Description:
Holiday Inn Express Aberdeen City Centre hotel is right in Aberdeen's West End, half a mile from the main rail and bus stations and 20 minutes by taxi from Aberdeen Airport (ABZ). The hotel is just around the corner from Union Street, Aberdeen's premier shopping destination with lively bars, restaurants and theatres. 

Doing business in Aberdeen? The hotel is located close to regional offices for Shell, Total and Statoil. Two modern meeting rooms host 35 people each, with free WiFi, natural light and air conditioning. Freshly brewed tea and coffee, plus a lunchtime buffet option, will keep meetings productive.

It's a 10-minute walk to Aberdeen's stylish Union Square shopping centre. If you fancy seeing a show, His Majesty's Theatre is just five minutes on foot. Farther afield, you can explore Aberdeenshire's Castle Trail, or visit the region's whisky distilleries – ask friendly hotel staff for tips. For golfers, the hotel is three miles away from Royal Aberdeen Golf Club, while Trump International Scotland is only half an hour's drive.

All guests enjoy free WiFi and an inclusive buffet breakfast with selected hot items. The hotel's lobby bar offers an excellent range of malt whisky, plus draught beer and wine.

Name: Cityhotel Kaiser Karl Aachen
Description:
Unser persönlich geführtes Superior Hotel liegt mitten im Herzen der Kaiserstadt Aachen. Kulturliebhaber werden vom berühmten Aachener Dom ebenso begeistert sein wie vom gotischen Rathaus und dem klassizistischen Elisenbrunnen. Aber allein das pulsierende Stadtleben mit den vielen Cafés und urigen Kneipen ist schon eine Reise wert. Das Tagungszentrum „Eurogress“, die Wellness-Oase „Carolus-Thermen“ und die historische Altstadt sind in nur wenigen Gehminuten erreichbar. Der angrenzende Stadtpark ist etwa 2,3 Hektar groß und ein beliebter Erholungsort mit alten Bäumen, Spazierwegen, Denkmälern, Brunnen, Spielplätzen und einem modernen Minigolfplatz.
Fühlen Sie sich in unserem Hotel wie zu Hause. Alle Zimmer verfügen über kostenfreies W-LAN mit 100Mbt und 42" LED-Smart TVs mit über 70 internationalen TV-Programmen.
Zu den weiteren Ausstattungsmerkmalen gehören unter anderem Zimmersafe, Schreibtisch, Kleiderschrank-System, Schallschutzfenster, Kosmetikspiegel, Ganzkörperspiegel, Haartrockner, Dusche/WC und selbstverständlich eine Klimaanlage mit HEPA-Filter. Den Zimmersafe können unsere Gäste kostenfrei in Anspruch nehmen.
Genuss rund um die Uhr! In unserem Hotel stehen Ihnen jederzeit kostenfrei alle Kaffeespezialitäten zur Verfügung – von aromatischem Espresso bis hin zum cremigen Cappuccino. Zudem bietet unser Wasserautomat erfrischendes gekühltes oder ungekühltes Wasser auf Knopfdruck. Einfach genießen!

Name: Shoni Bay
Description:
Shoni Bay is a longstanding resort on Egypt’s Red Sea coast, set along a 1-kilometre beachfront. Its unique sandy sea entrance has contributed to the development of one of the area’s top-rated house reefs, offering direct and easy access to marine life from the shore.

Located approximately 15 minutes from Marsa Alam International Airport, the resort operates on an all-inclusive basis and is positioned as a quiet, low-density property within the wider Red Sea market.

The atmosphere at Shoni Bay is intentionally natural and unforced, appealing to guests who value space, calm, and a close relationship with the sea.

As we continue to develop in Marsa Alam, our focus remains on strengthening operations, expanding thoughtfully, and working alongside tour operators, suppliers, and stakeholders who share a long-term view of the Red Sea market.

We look forward to continuing constructive partnerships as the region matures.

Name: Danske Slotte & Herregårde
Description:
Foreningen er et samarbejde til fremme af unikke oplevelser på privat ejet danske slotte og herregårde. 

Alle vore medlemmer har deres eget særlige kendetegn, og foreningen byder derfor velkommen til en kulturel mangfoldighed - et kongerige af oplevelser. Den kulturhistoriske oplevelse er vores fælles baggrund, hvorfor der venter unikke oplevelser, uanset om De blot ønsker at besøge stedet for sin historiske værdi eller ønsker at overnatte i disse fantastiske rammer.

Alle vore slotte og herregårde rummer væsentlige kulturhistoriske elementer. Som medlem optages derfor kun slotte og herregårde, som opfylder foreningens særlige krav til dette. Foreningen er den eneste af sin art og de besøgendes garanti for historisk autencitet og særlige kulturhistoriske oplevelser. På denne hjemmeside kan De gå på opdagelse i de mange muligheder foreningen byder på, og herigennem kan De kontakte de slotte og herregårde, De ønsker at besøge.

Located in the heart of Hidden Valley, our home is perfect for those looking to escape the hustle of city life while still enjoying modern conveniences and luxury.

We pride ourselves on creating a home that feels like your own, with every detail carefully considered for your comfort. Whether you’re relaxing in the spacious living areas, exploring the vast outdoor space, or taking in the breathtaking views from the balcony, The Hidden Paradise in the Valley is designed to give you a truly unique experience.

Our home offers a seamless blend of relaxation and adventure. With four beautifully furnished bedrooms, a large function room, and outdoor BBQ and pizza oven areas, it’s ideal for families, friends, or couples looking to spend quality time together. For entertainment, we provide access to streaming services on Android TVs, a variety of books, board games, and more.
br>We’re also deeply committed to maintaining high standards of safety and cleanliness. Our property is equipped with outdoor CCTV cameras, ensuring a secure environment, and we follow strict hygiene protocols to provide a pristine living space for our guests.

At The Hidden Paradise in the Valley, we don’t just offer a place to stay; we offer an experience of luxury, relaxation, and discovery in the natural beauty of Melbourne's countryside. Whether you're visiting for a weekend getaway or an extended stay, we're here to make your time with us unforgettable.


Our home offers a seamless blend of relaxation and adventure.
Immerse yourself in the heart of Melbourne’s charm.
Experience the perfect blend of luxury and comfort.

Name: Hotel Quinta Real Puebla
Description:
Imagina un lugar donde el tiempo parece detenerse, un edificio histórico del siglo XVI, donde las paredes son testigos mudos, que guardan secretos de un exconvento y biografías de viajeros que, como tú, buscan un refugio de descanso en el centro histórico de Puebla.

Quinta Real Puebla no es solo un hotel donde las suites son únicas, es parte de la esencia  de la ciudad. Sus pasillos, los patios y arcos… todo te habla, te susurra: “Aquí, tú formas parte de esta leyenda.” Ya sea para una escapada romántica o un viaje de negocios.

Name: Viceroy Washington DC
Description:
A New Modern Boutique Hotel in Downtown DC.

Our modern, artful Logan Circle hotel shows the District’s creative side. As your host, we'll get you vibing with the neighborhood and inspire you with our fresh, fearless perspective. Every guestroom and suite is spacious — a rare commodity in DC. Get settled in your very own haven and fall into the rhythm of the locals. It starts with grabbing a coffee at BPM Coffee & Wine, a buzzing spot that the neighborhood loves, or enjoying the open-air, expansive patio and shared plates at Dovetail. Expand your mind in The Salon, our gallery which highlights the work of local DC artists. We didn't open our doors to be politics as usual. You'll quickly see: Each day with us is a discovery, from our tree-lined street to the bustling 14th Street Corridor, just steps away.

Name: Suites aan de Gracht
Description:
Suites aan de Gracht is geen hotel — het is een beleving, een thuis, een verhaal.
En jij bent van harte welkom om er deel van uit te maken.
Voor elke gelegenheid een thuis. Of je nu zakelijk overnacht, een romantisch weekend in Utrecht plant, of tijdelijk in de stad verblijft: in deze suites vind je alles wat je nodig hebt. 

Elke kamer is uitgerust met een heerlijk bed, een volledig uitgeruste keuken, een ruime badkamer en een comfortabel zitje. Je stapt de deur uit en staat meteen op het bruisende Ledig Erf – waar het leven zich altijd buiten lijkt af te spelen, ongeacht het seizoen.

Name: ForRest Boutique Cabin
Description:
Világszinten megfigyelhető az a tendencia, hogy a pihenésre, kikapcsolódásra vágyók egyre inkább a kisebb, önálló, különleges helyen lévő, fenntartható szálláshelyeket részesítik előnyben a nagyobb létszámú vendégeket befogadó szállodák, panziók helyett. 
Szintén jellemző, hogy a hosszabb utazásokat mára az egyéni, az évente többszöri, rövidebb pihenés váltotta fel. A családi nyaralások mellett, egyre erősödő igény van a kettesben töltött, romantikus napokra. Leginkább csendes, természetközeli, emellett minőségi, színvonalas környezetben szeretnének a párok feltöltődni. 
Gyertek, próbáljátok ki!

Samtliga med naturen som den gröna tråden.

Name: The Georges
Description:
The Georges occupies four buildings on opposite sides of Main Street in Lexington, Virginia, a special town steeped in history and, for us, many wonderful memories. Located in the heart of the beautiful Shenandoah Valley, Lexington is truly a charming small-town escape. We love that the four buildings that make up our inn are unique pieces of the past, revitalized with fine accommodations for our guests to enjoy today. The Georges is home to Haywood’s, our casual and lively piano bar serving southern bistro style cuisine and TAPS, our lobby lounge.

When we acquired these buildings, we wanted to devote our resources, passion, and energy toward creating an inn and restaurants we think you’ll really enjoy. Our intention is to offer a place of comfort, traditional Virginia hospitality, and delicious food with regional ingredients—all in an environment that carries the history of the last couple of hundred years in its bones, and now with every modern amenity and convenience.

Das lichtdurchflutete Restaurant mit Sonnenterrasse erwartet Sie zum Frühstuck, Lunch oder auch zu einem a la Carte Essen am Abend. Veranstaltungen und Tagungen aller Art sind in 6 klimatisierten Tagungsräumen auf einer eigenen Etage im Hotel oder in 4 weiteren Veranstaltungsräumen mit separatem Pausenbereich im benachbartem Schulungsgebäude möglich.

In unserer hauseigenen Tiefgarage mit rund 150 Stellplätzen können Sie Ihr Auto problemlos abstellen und sicher parken. Zudem bieten wir zusätzlich 4 Stellplätze (je nach Verfügbarkeit) direkt vor dem Haus. Hannover ist bekannt für seinen Erlebnis-Zoo, die Herrenhäuser Gärten mit dem Schloss Herrenhausen sowie seinen Stadtwald Eilenriede. Eine Besonderheit ist auch der Bogenaufzug im Neuen Rathaus. Auch der Maschsee ist einen Besuch wert.

Unser Hotel liegt zwischen Flughafen und City. In 10 Minuten sind Sie in der Innenstadt Hannovers und die einmalige Lage direkt am Mittellandkanal ist einzigartig.

"Als modernes 4-Sterne-Hotel mit 142 Zimmern und Suiten sind wir immer in Bewegung. Seit einiger Zeit renovieren wir stetig unser Hotel für Sie. Wir freuen uns, dass wir Sie ab sofort mit noch mehr Komfort bei uns begrüßen dürfen."
- Florian STUEHMER, Hoteldirektor

Located between the central business district (CBD) and the beach, on the quieter side of the historical town of Swakopmund in “the land of the brave”, Namibia, Artemis Hotel is a short walk from anything and everything you might need. With the closest shopping center a mere 200m, The Mole Beach 250m and well known restaurants such as The Tug and The Brewer and Butcher only 200m away, we are ideally located for any business or leisure traveler.

The Artemis Hotel Swakopmund offers 21 carefully curated and decorated guest rooms in 3 differentiated categories namely Standard rooms, Comfort rooms and a Junior Suite. We also offer 3 interleading rooms for families traveling together. All rooms have private bathrooms, with a separate shower and bath, stocked with high quality amenities.

Whether enjoying our extensive  breakfast buffet in our restaurant or taking in the 360° views of Swakopmund and the Atlantic from our 4th floor roof terrace, guests can stay connected using our complimentary high speed wifi offered throughout the property.

Name: Engco
Description:
Engco is a commercial consulting and investment company based in Stockholm and Marbella. We support hotel owners, real estate developers, and hospitality businesses across the Nordics and Europe with strategy, concept development, interim leadership, and hands-on execution. Our mission is to create profitable business models and unique hospitality concepts – from idea to operational reality.

Engco also has a strong legacy in hotel ownership and investments. Founded by the Engwall family, the company has been an early shareholder in Winn Hotel Group, today one of Scandinavia’s leading hotel operators. Building on that heritage, Engco continues to combine consulting expertise with active investments in both hospitality and SaaS companies. We selectively invest in – and occasionally divest – projects where we see strong strategic potential and long-term value creation.

Through our international hospitality network, we also source and negotiate hotels and venues for corporate conferences and events, including unique concepts within golf and padel travel.

Name: LA VIE SAGE
Description:
La Vie Sage est une maison d’hôtes haut de gamme nichée sur une île de la Seine, à Villennes-sur-Seine, à seulement quelques kilomètres de Paris. Entourée d’eau et de verdure, elle offre un cadre rare et apaisant, propice à la détente, à la reconnexion et au lâcher-prise.

Premier projet d’une série de lieux uniques, La Vie Sage incarne une philosophie de vie : ralentir, ressentir et se recentrer. Chaque espace a été imaginé pour inviter à la sérénité et au bien-être, à travers une architecture lumineuse, un design épuré et des matériaux naturels.

Nous croyons que le luxe ne réside pas dans l’abondance, mais dans la justesse des détails, la qualité du silence, la beauté d’un espace qui respire. Ici, chaque élément – du mobilier au jardin, du sauna extérieur au moindre parfum d’ambiance – participe à une expérience globale d’harmonie et de reconnexion.

La Vie Sage, c’est aussi une vision à long terme : créer une collection de lieux d’exception, chacun ancré dans son environnement, célébrant la nature, l’architecture et le bien-être. Des refuges où l’on vient se ressourcer, retrouver son rythme intérieur et renouer avec ce qui compte vraiment.

Un séjour à La Vie Sage, c’est une parenthèse hors du temps – une invitation à ralentir, à respirer, à vivre plus consciemment.

Name: Boreal Ice Vending • La Startup Del Hielo
Description:
Boreal – La Startup del Hielo

La startup que ofrece soluciones sostenibles y automatizadas de venta de hielo 24/7. 

Gracias a nuestras hieleras inteligentes de autoservicio, producimos el hielo seco in situ y bajo demanda, eliminando la necesidad de transporte y almacenamiento.

 Al integrar sensores e inteligencia artificial, anticipamos el comportamiento del consumidor y fabricamos solo el hielo necesario, optimizando todo el ciclo de vida del producto.

 Nuestra alternativa a la cadena tradicional de suministro de hielo (producción–almacenamiento–distribución–almacenamiento–venta) es el Método Boreal, que simplifica el proceso a solo dos pasos: Producción–Venta.

Esto nos permite alcanzar importantes logros en sostenibilidad, alineados con el Pacto Verde Europeo:

 Ahorro energético: solo producimos cuando hay demanda
 Cero emisiones CO₂: producto sin transporte (km 0)
 Sin plásticos: no utilizamos bolsas, ni sacos, ni film de paletizado
 Ahorro de agua: sin derretimientos ni merma del producto

 Nuestras hieleras son intuitivas y fáciles de usar:
El cliente elige la cantidad, paga con tarjeta o móvil y recoge el hielo directamente en una bolsa reutilizable o nevera. Una experiencia más ecológica y autoservicio real.

 Con una capacidad de 200 kg de hielo seco para venta inmediata + producción bajo demanda, garantizamos disponibilidad constante y adaptabilidad a distintas necesidades.

 En Boreal lideramos la transición hacia un consumo más responsable, ofreciendo innovación sostenible que beneficia tanto al planeta como a nuestros clientes.

Energy Efficient Hotels - Sustainable Investments in the Future

Energy efficient hotels are a promising investment opportunity for environmentally conscious investors who are not only looking for financial gain, but also want to have a positive impact on the environment. With the growing global demand for sustainable travel and increasing awareness of environmental issues, more and more travelers are looking for accommodations that implement sustainable practices and energy efficiency. In this concept, we would like to provide you with an overview of the benefits of energy efficient hotels and how you, as an investor, can benefit from this emerging market.
The market for sustainable tourism is growing steadily. More and more travelers prefer hotels that are committed to energy efficiency and environmental friendliness. According to a 2021 study by Booking.com, 61% of travelers said they would be more likely to stay in sustainable accommodations in 2021 than before the pandemic. Another report from GlobeScan shows that 69% of travelers are willing to pay more for eco-friendly accommodations.
In addition to changing consumer trends, there is also growing regulation and legislation around energy efficiency and sustainability for hotels. Many countries and regions have introduced strict regulations on building energy consumption to combat climate change and reduce energy costs. So investing in energy-efficient hotels can benefit not only from rising consumer expectations, but also from regulatory requirements.

The benefits of LH EnergyHomes apartments and more.
Cost savings:
Our energy efficient hotels use sustainable technologies and practices to reduce energy consumption. This results in lower energy costs and long-term cost savings for hotel operations. Examples of energy efficient measures include the installation of LED lighting, energy efficient heating, ventilation and air conditioning (HVAC) systems, heat recovery systems and smart energy management systems.

Eco-friendly image:
An energy-efficient hotel can position itself as a leader in sustainability and build an eco-friendly image. This can help attract environmentally conscious travelers and increase customer satisfaction. A positive sustainability image can also lead to positive publicity and a competitive advantage.

Long-term increase in value: 

Investing in energy efficiency can increase the value of the property over the long term. Sustainable hotels are generally better protected against rising energy costs and regulatory requirements. In addition, our energy-efficient hotels may receive government incentives or tax benefits based on their sustainability practices, which can help increase value. The long-term increase in property value is particularly attractive to investors seeking sustainable investment strategies.

Risk mitigation: 
Investing in energy-efficient hotels can also reduce the risk of environmental regulations and violations. As many countries and regions implement stricter regulations on building energy use, non-compliant hotels may face higher energy costs, fines and penalties. By implementing energy-efficient measures, hotels can prevent these risks and avoid potential financial charges.


Attached are some explanations to help you understand our concept for building LH EnergyHomes - apartments and more - hotels and accommodations.

From the balcony of your room, you will witness the majestic panorama of the Hoang Lien Son mountain range unfolding before your eyes like an ink wash painting.

It is truly wonderful to behold the clouds merging with the mountains, alongside the cable cars gently ascending to the peak of Fansipan. Here, you can savor the feeling of standing on a high point, gazing down at the miniature landscape of Sapa's mountains and forests.

Not only that, thanks to its prime location, in just a few steps, you can immerse yourself in the Northwestern cultural space at the heart of Sapa – the place where Earth meets Sky.

Let KK Sapa Hotel cherish every moment, bringing you truly relaxing moments to fully embrace the beauty of Sapa.

Name: evo Hotel
Description:
Find your community at evo Hotel Salt Lake City in the creative Granary District, where we're all geared up by our mutual passion for the great outdoors. For wellness enthusiasts, discover our bouldering gym, fitness center, yoga studio and sauna. For adventure go-getters, take your adventure to new heights at our bouldering gym. For corporate retreats, reserve one of our meeting spaces that accommodate up to 50 guests. And for the weekenders, join us at our rooftop lounge, lobby cafe, and relaxing gathering spaces. Find comfortable rooms that are edgy and stylish--designed for both solo travel and group travel alike. And when you're ready for some gear or expert advice to take with you to the slopes, head over to our on-site shops, evo Salt Lake and Level Nine Sports. 

Roll with us in Salt Lake City and experience something radical while you're here.

Name: Hotel The White Tulip-best 3star hotel in Jaipur

The White Tulip is conveniently located 7.7 km from Jaipur Airport and is close to popular attractions such as Jal Mahal, Amer Fort, Jantar Mantar, Raj Mandir Cinema, Sindhi Camp Bus Station, Hawa Mahal, Nahargarh Fort, Civil Lines Metro Station, Khimsar Fort and Institute Of Urology. Formed in 2024 with the opening of our second property, The Chancery, SHG is part of the Sretaw PE DAC, founded in 2021 by Eamon Waters. The ambition of the group is to develop a collection of individual, independent hotels in Dublin city centre, located in uniquely attractive locations and committed to unsurpassed service, cutting edge technology and sustainable practice from end to end. The care we offer to our guests extends to the impacts of our properties.

EL DESTINO IDEAL PARA LOS AMANTES DEL TURISMO SOSTENIBLE Y EL CONFORT

Designed for the way you live, work and play, our boutique hotel offers the premium amenities, spacious suites and unique destination-inspired décor you expect from an upscale hotel. Our location puts you within a couple miles of Tanger Outlets, the Fort Miles Historic Area, and our world-famous Rehoboth Beach Boardwalk. Plus, some of the area’s top dining and entertainment venues are less than 2 miles away.
