Name: Hôtel Alparena**** & Spa
Description:
Surplombant la vallée de la Tarentaise face au Mont Pourri, l’Hôtel Alparena  & Spa s’impose comme un cocon chaleureux et confortable au milieu des sommets.
Situé dans le quartier des Eucherts dans la dynamique station de La Rosière à 1850m d’altitude, il bénéficie d’un accès direct aux pistes de ski ou aux chemins de randonnées.
L’Hôtel comprend 58 chambres et suites luxueuses et spacieuses, un spa de plus de 1000m²,un ski shop, une brasserie de montagne ainsi qu'un restaurant bistronomique. 
Construit en 2019, l'Hôtel Alparena**** & Spa est l'un des derniers établissements du groupe familial Les Balcons, constructeur et exploitant de Résidences de Tourisme, Hôtels et Spas en Savoie depuis plus de 30 ans.
En savoir + : les-balcons.com

Name: Baltaci
Description: We are a company with over twenty-two years of experience in the hotel and hospitality industry. We pride ourselves on quality service, raw materials and access to employees, customers and business partners. We operate accommodation, catering and catering services in Zlín, Tečovice and Napajedla. The company currently operates two restaurants, three hotels and three express restaurants - Bistros. The company's catering activities are supplemented by producing meals (lunches) and their delivery to companies and offices in Zlín and its surroundings. An essential activity of the company is also the rental of real estate. The Baltaci secondary school in Zlín complements the company's activities with education. Students find employment in the hotel, hospitality, IT and tourism sectors.

Name: Hotel Rozsutec***
Description:
Rodinný hotel sa nachádza v prekrásnom prostredí Národného parku Malá Fatra v srdci Vrátnej Doliny, 3 km od rázovitej obce Terchová. Je situovaný na južnom svahu hrebeňa Sokolie s výhľadom na hlavný hrebeň Malej Fatry, Malý a Veľký Rozsutec a blízko centra lyžiarskych aktivít, zjazdoviek Paseky a Poludňový Grúň, 4 km od dolnej stanice kabínkovej lanovky na hrebeň Malej Fatry pod Malofatranský Kriváň.

Rázovitá obec Terchová, krasové útvary Tiesňav, Dolných a horných dier pod Rozsutcom, dominanta Malej Fatry, Rozsutec, turistické trasy po hrebeňoch ponúkajú nezabudnuteľné zážitky.

For the ultimate business trip, we combine comfort and efficiency in our luxurious rooms, where tranquility and sophistication meet. Name: Keystone Adelaide
Description: Keystone Adelaide, located at 254 North Terrace Adelaide, is a $300million, 183m tall destination which aims to commence construction in 2024. The building will include a public observation deck, Westin Adelaide by Marriott and, subject to SA Government investment - AMoSAH - The Adelaide Museum of South Australia's History. This page will keep the public informed about the development of this new iconic building. The site is majority owned by the Freemasons of South Australia and the Northern Territory. A charity-focused fraternity first registered in 1834, two years before the State of South Australia came to be.

Name: Hotel M14
Description:
Situato nel centro di Padova, a 5 minuti a piedi dalla cattedrale, l’Hotel M14 offre biciclette gratuite e camere moderne. All’arrivo riceverete una mappa gratuita di Padova.

Le sistemazioni, tutte eleganti, hanno pavimenti in legno e aria condizionata. Potrete usufruire del WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura.

L'Hotel M14 dispone di un nuovo centro benessere con sauna, bagno di vapore, docce e una sala relax con pareti di sale.

Al mattino viene servita la colazione a buffet con prodotti dolci e salati.

Il personale sarà lieto di indicarvi ristoranti convenzionati a prezzi scontati, a circa 250 metri dalla struttura.

L’Hotel M14 dista 2 km dalla stazione ferroviaria di Padova Il treno vi porterà a Venezia in meno di 30 minuti.

Name: KHAS Pekanbaru Hotel
Description:

The hotel is only 15 minutes from Sultan Syarif Kasim II Airport.

The hotel is designed with a modern concept, luxurious and comfortable accommodation has 130 guest rooms, consisting of 126 Deluxe Rooms and 4 Suite Rooms with a city view of Pekanbaru, each of which is equipped with international standard room facilities with a Safe Deposit Box, LCD TV, Coffee and Tea, Minibar, High-Speed Wi-Fi and provide a praying set each room as hotel moslem friendly.

With over 30 years of experience in Hotel Management, we offer Consultancy Services for Hotels, Resorts and Restaurants. 

Through our consultancy services, we aim to identify and capitalize opportunities for growth, enabling your establishment to reach new heights of success. By leveraging our expertise, together we can uncover hidden avenues of revenue and implement strategic initiatives that will maximize your organization’s profitability.

Name: Kinkára
Description: Tucked away at the foot of Mt. Chirripó in Costa Rica's biodiverse Southern Zone, Kinkara is an experiential luxury resort for one-of-a-kind activities, personal relaxation, and collective group adventures. Whether swimming in a jungle waterfall, savoring exquisite farm-to-table cuisine, or finding inner peace through yoga, Kinkára Luxury Retreat offers moments of self-discovery, a path to renewed ideas, and amazing connections with nature.

Name: Quest Fremantle
Description: Quest Fremantle offers corporate, self contained studio, one-bedroom and two-bedroom executive apartments to make corporate stays effortless. Centrally located in the West End of the historic port city of Fremantle, our apartments feature spacious contemporary rooms with inner harbour and part ocean views.

Name: Hotel Noordzee
Description: Hotel Noordzee is een bohemian familiehotel gelegen middenin de Cadzandse duinen met een weids uitzicht op de zee, natuurgebied het Zwin en de jachthaven. Al sinds 1933 verwelkomen wij gasten uit binnen- en buitenland voor hun vakantie, weekendje weg of gelegenheidsuitje met vrienden of familie. Behalve overnachten in onze ruime en comfortabele hotelkamers kan met genieten van onze culinaire kunsten in het restaurant, maar ook weldadig ontspannen in onze wellness en zwembad.

Name: Kellers Badehotel
Description:
Hos Keller Badehotel blander vi nydelse, ro og kærlighed med drømme, humor, magi og karma, alt sammen omgivet af vand, jord og naturens elementer. Vi tror på, at nærvær og fællesskab skaber den helt særlige oplevelse.
Vores filosofi er inspireret af det gamle Kellers Konditori, hvor vi værner om traditioner og sætter en ære i at bruge lokale råvarer af høj kvalitet. Det bæredygtige og grønne er kernen i vores tilgang til livet og maden, hvor vi altid stræber efter at møde vores gæster i øjenhøjde.

Name: The Lismoyne Hotel, managed by Brightstar Hospitality
Description:
The Lismoyne Hotel offers a mix of luxury and comfortable accommodation, boasting modern facilities that cater to the needs and desires of all guests. This hotel prides itself on providing a unique experience for every guest, and it is evident in every aspect of the hotel. The Lismoyne Hotel is renowned for its delicious food and fine wine. Whether you are in the mood for a hearty breakfast to start your day, a light lunch in between meetings, or a romantic dinner for two, the restaurant has something for everyone. 

With 62 well-appointed ensuite rooms, there is a perfect option for all travellers. The hotel offers a mixture of suites, executive rooms, and standard rooms, all elegantly designed and equipped with modern amenities. Whether you are traveling for business or pleasure, you can rest assured that your stay will be comfortable and luxurious.

Located in the charming town of Fleet in Hampshire, the Lismoyne Hotel offers the perfect balance of a peaceful retreat and easy accessibility. With good transport links, guests can easily explore the surrounding areas and take advantage of the many activities and attractions nearby.

Name: ÖRUMS NYGÅRD SPA KONFERENS AB
Description: Örums Nygård är det familjära hotellet på Österlen där alla ska känna sig välkomna och omhändertagna, oavsett om du är här privat eller deltar i en konferens. På Örums Nygård upplever du en genuin atmosfär och hemmakänsla. Hotellet har 21 rymliga rum i markplan och anläggningen har även en restaurang, ett spa samt två konferensrum.

Name: Lavender Hotel , Al Khan - Sharjah
Description:
Lavender Hotel is a contemporary 4-star hospitality destination located in the vibrant Al Khan district of Sharjah. Managed by Empire Hospitality Management, our hotel offers a perfect blend of modern comfort and traditional elegance, making it ideal for both business and leisure travelers.

With well-appointed rooms, top-notch facilities, and exceptional guest service, Lavender Hotel is dedicated to creating unforgettable experiences for every guest. Our team takes pride in delivering warm hospitality, attention to detail, and a welcoming atmosphere.

Key Features:

Prime location in Al Khan, close to key attractions and business districts

Spacious guest rooms and suites

All-day dining and specialty restaurants

Meeting and event spaces

Health and wellness facilities

Complimentary Wi-Fi and modern amenities

At Lavender Hotel, we believe in continuous improvement and innovation to meet the evolving needs of our guests. Join us on LinkedIn to discover career opportunities, updates, and the latest news from our hotel.

Connect, stay, and grow with Lavender Hotel—where hospitality meets excellence.

#LavenderHotel #AlKhan #Sharjah #EmpireHospitalityManagement #Hotels #Hospitality #Careers #GuestExperience

Name: Kings Park Hotel
Description:
Nestled in the center of Podgorica, a mere 300 meters from the iconic Sat Kula (Clock Tower), Kings Park Hotel stands as a beacon of refined hospitality. This elegant 4-star establishment offers many amenities: a modern gym, private garage parking, a library, an exquisite restaurant, and a lobby bar. 

With 73 exceptionally comfortable rooms and a capacity for 140 guests, Kings Park Hotel seamlessly caters to the needs of all visitors. From single, double, and triple rooms to deluxe and superior suites, our accommodation options are designed for both convenience and luxury. Thanks to its MICE capacities – a modern conference space of 220 m2, a conference hall, two meeting rooms, and a VIP lounge – it is the perfect choice for business conferences and other corporate events. The hotel boasts a range of offerings, ensuring a memorable stay for every guest.

Choose Kings Park Hotel for your short visit to Podgorica and enjoy the benefits of being in the city center. Just minutes away on foot from important events and institutions, our location allows you to make the most of your stay, ensuring a quick transition from arrival to engagement. 

Explore the cultural tapestry of the city, with renowned landmarks such as the Parliament of Montenegro, the Natural History Museum, and the iconic Millennium Bridge, all within easy reach. For those arriving or departing, Podgorica Airport is conveniently situated just 12 kilometers away.

Name: Travessia do Sol
Description:
Contemporary and eco-friendly, Travessia do Sol was designed according to the philosophy of permaculture and well-being in mind.

This magical place was born from a shared family dream: to create a place where we could recharge and pumper ourselves, while enhancing local biodiversity and our own connection to nature. 

Here the Lima river flows next to us and between the wild Peneda-Gerês Natural Park and the ocean placing you in the right centre, the heart of the region, from where you can visit the most charming and amazing sites until Oporto city.
Location: Ponte do Lima, Viana do Castelo

Inspired by the French word trouvaille, meaning “lucky find,” this pied-á-terre amidst Miami’s famous Art Deco architecture is for those who appreciate stylish chambers, charming cocktails and a secluded exclusivity.  Hotel Trouvail is your lucky find.

Name: Hotel Elite Peak
Description:
Welcome to Hotel Elite Peak, where luxury and comfort meet to create an unforgettable experience for our guests. Our hotel is in the city's heart, offering easy access to all major business centers, shopping destinations, and tourist attractions. With its modern architecture and lavish interiors, Hotel Elite Peak is the perfect combination of style and sophistication.

Each room has modern amenities, including high-speed Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and comfortable bedding, to ensure a restful night's sleep.
We believe in providing an experience beyond a comfortable stay. Our guests can enjoy various facilities, including a rooftop swimming pool, a well-equipped fitness center, and a fine-dining restaurant serving delectable cuisines worldwide.

Experience the best of luxury and comfort at the Hotel Elite Peak. Book your stay with us today and indulge in a truly unique experience.

Name: Four Elements Hotels & Resorts
Description:
Four Elements | Not Just a Stay — A Home.

At Four Elements, we redefine boutique hospitality by offering spacious, high-end accommodations designed for families and long-stay guests. More than just a place to stay, our hotels provide comfort, warmth, and a true sense of home—where every guest feels valued and every detail is thoughtfully curated.

With a commitment to personalized service, cultural authenticity, and modern elegance, we create an experience that blends luxury with familiarity. Our mission is simple: to make every guest feel like they belong, no matter where they are.

 Not Just a Stay — A Home.

Description: Yachting Hotel Quintero frente al Océano Pacífico, 42 hermosas habitaciones con vista al mar, 7 Salones de eventos, Restaurant & Bar, Piscina y Sala de Ejercicios.

Name: Inn at the Pier Pismo Beach, Curio Collection by Hilton
Description: Located just a few steps away from the lively Pismo Beach pier and beach on Cypress Street is our ocean front hotel. This oceanside retreat offers a cozy, beach-house atmosphere with its boutique guest rooms and top-notch amenities. Guests can relax on the rooftop terrace, where stunning views of the ocean pair perfectly with refreshing cocktails and delicious dishes. Whether you're planning a leisurely escape or organizing a memorable meeting, this Pismo Beach hotel provides exceptional service and a blend of classic and modern event spaces in beautiful Pismo Beach, California.

Name: Motif Hotel on Nashville's Music Row
Description:
Welcome to the heart of Nashville's famed Music Row, where history and modern luxury converge at our brand new all-suite hotel. Perfectly situated on the iconic grounds of the former United Artists Tower, our hotel is more than just a place to stay—it's an experience steeped in the rich musical heritage of Nashville.

Our hotel caters to a variety of guests, from corporate travelers and long-stay visitors to families and their beloved pets. Each suite is designed with luxury and comfort in mind, equipped with modern amenities that make our hotel your home away from home. Whether you're in town for business, leisure, or a bit of both, our suites offer the perfect blend of sophistication and functionality.

For our business travelers, the hotel offers high-speed internet and dedicated workspace in each suite to help you stay productive. Long-stay guests will appreciate amenities such as fully equipped kitchens in every suite, a state-of-the-art fitness center, and a yoga studio, ensuring your routine stays intact.

Families and pet owners will find our hotel welcoming and accommodating. Enjoy a stroll with your furry friends along our designated pet walk, or spend quality family time at our rooftop pool. The poolside lounge offers a spectacular view of the cityscape, making it a perfect spot to unwind. For more interactive fun, visit our game lounge, complete with a ping pong table, TV, kitchen, and ample seating, ideal for socializing and relaxation.

The roof deck is not only home to our beautiful pool but also serves as a social hub with comfortable lounge areas where guests can soak up the Nashville vibe. Here, amidst the bustle of Music Row, you can relax and revel in the energy that has powered the music industry for decades.

Our location is truly unique, standing on a site steeped in musical history. The United Artists Tower, once a landmark on Music Row, inspires our commitment to celebrate Nashville's cultural heritage.

Name: Valley Bear Farms
Description: Nestled in the heart of Pisgah National Forest, Valley Bear Farms is a premier luxury resort and vacation rental company offering a unique escape into nature across more than 150 private acres between Asheville, NC, and Greenville, SC. Located just up the mountain from Brevard in Balsam Grove, NC, the resort features a wide range of accommodations—from cozy cabins and upscale homes to yurts and glamping experiences—each blending nature’s charm with modern comfort. Guests can enjoy the great outdoors through hiking, fishing, mountain biking, or simply relax and take in the serene mountain views. The property also offers a large swim pond, pickleball courts, a disc golf course, bocce ball and sand volleyball courts, a kids' playground, and even a dog park. With a passion for exploration, wellness, and connecting with the outdoors, Valley Bear Farms invites travelers to unwind, rejuvenate, and experience the magic of Transylvania County. Come explore with us.

Name: The Kanatal Arbour
Description:
Located in lower Himalayan Range, in picturesque and serene place called Kanatal, Uttarakhand away from Urban Chaos. The Kanatal Arbour offers comfortable and elegant accommodation to travelers at affordable rates. The Kanatal Arbour is a place to relax and rejuvenate with your family and friends, any time of the year. You can also enjoy the stunning view of mountains and the sunrise from most of the cottages. Unlike most other Kanatal hotels, The Kanatal Arbour has all the modern facilities and comfort to offer you which includes ample car parking space, a multi-cuisine restaurant, power back-up, Wifi, and Laundry Service and room service, etc.

The property has fully grown apple trees, apricot, and walnut trees, and a beautiful well-maintained garden varieties of flowers. You can sit and enjoy the beauty of the alluring valley from your balcony. The long leaves of the Deodar trees grow abundantly in the region, infusing the air with its pleasant aroma. The Kanatal Arbour has 13 well-furnished rooms with an attached bath and balcony. You can enjoy the panoramic view of the great Himalayas from the balcony of each cottage. Come and watch the extravaganza of the adventure and rejuvenate yourself in the foothills of the Himalayas with The Kanatal Arbour.

Name: Bravia Hotels
Description:
Bravia Hotel Ajmer is a new hotel that conveniently strengthens the accommodation capacity of the city.
The Hotel offers services to International Standards to business travelers and leisure guests. It is located in the city center, 10 minutes away from Dargah Sharif, 15 minutes away from Railway Station, and 10 minutes away from Bus Station.
It's a five-story building with a modern design that culminates in the new business area in the heart of Ajmer, Rajasthan.

Name: Jannat Baghi Hospitality Group
Description: Şirkətlər Qrupu Azərbaycan Respublikasının qanunvericiliyi ilə müəyyən olunmuş qaydada geniş çeşidli fəaliyyət növləri ilə məşğul olur. Onun əsas fəaliyyət istiqamətlərindən biri də turizmin təşkili, ölkə daxilində və xaricində turistlərə və həmçinin sadəcə istirahət etmək istəyən vətəndaşlara sərbəst vaxtlarında bütün növ servis xidmətlərinin göstərilməsi, ekskursiyaların, səyahətlərin təşkili, kütləvi idman, tamaşa, şou, konsert və digər istirahət tədbirlərinin keçirilməsi, uşaqlar üçün əyləncə tədbirləri, eyni zamanda istirahət mərkəzlərində işgüzar görüş və konfrans tədbirlərinin həyata keçirilməsindən ibarətdir. “Cənnət Bağı” Şirkətlər Qrupu bu fəaliyyət məqsədlərini həyata keçirmək üçün dörd istirahət mərkəzi yaratmışdır. Bu istirahət mərkəzləri Azərbaycanın dilbər guşələrindən olan Mingəçevir şəhəri, Xızı və Quba rayonlarında yerləşir. “Ağsaray Deluxe&Spa” – Mingəçevir, “Cənnət Bağı” – Altıağac və “Cənnət Bağı” – Quba, adlanan bu istirahət mərkəzləri artıq illərlə insanların sevimli səfər, gəzinti, görüş və istirahət yerlərinə çevrilmişdir. Bütün parametrləri ilə ekoloji cəhətdən təmiz olan bu istirahət mərkəzlərinə bir dəfə gəlsəniz, bir də gəlmək istəyəcəksiniz. Çünki buralar sözün əsl mənasında həm özünüz, həm ailə üzvləriniz, həm dost və tanışlarınız üçün əsl cənnət məkanıdır. Gəlin və görün! Bu gözəlliyi yaşayın!

Name: Sercotel Plaza Feria
Description:
Ubicado en una posición estratégica en Zaragoza, Sercotel Plaza Feria es un hotel de cuatro estrellas que ofrece una experiencia excepcional tanto para viajeros de negocios como para turistas. Nos enorgullecemos de brindar un servicio de alta calidad, habitaciones cómodas y modernas, y una variedad de servicios diseñados para satisfacer todas las necesidades de nuestros huéspedes.

¿Qué nos diferencia?

Ubicación privilegiada: situado junto al centro comercial Plaza Imperial y cerca del aeropuerto de Zaragoza, nuestro hotel es el punto de partida perfecto para explorar la ciudad y sus alrededores.

Instalaciones modernas: ofrecemos habitaciones equipadas con las últimas comodidades, un gimnasio bien equipado, y espacios versátiles para eventos y reuniones.

Gastronomía exquisita: disfruta de una experiencia culinaria única en nuestro restaurante, donde ofrecemos una selección de platos locales e internacionales preparados con ingredientes frescos y de alta calidad.

Servicio personalizado: nuestro equipo de profesionales está comprometido con la satisfacción del cliente, proporcionando un trato amable y atento para garantizar una estancia inolvidable.
Servicios Destacados:

Conexión Wi-Fi gratuita de alta velocidad en todo el hotel
Centro de negocios y salas de reuniones equipadas con tecnología avanzada
Gimnasio de uso gratuito para los huéspedes
Restaurante y bar con una variada oferta gastronómica
Servicio de transporte al aeropuerto bajo petición
Misión y Visión:

En Sercotel Plaza Feria, nuestra misión es ofrecer una estancia confortable y memorable a nuestros huéspedes, superando sus expectativas a través de un servicio excepcional y atención al detalle. Aspiramos a ser el hotel de referencia en Zaragoza, reconocido por nuestra excelencia y hospitalidad.

Sercotel Plaza Feria es más que un lugar para hospedarse; es un hogar lejos de casa. Síguenos para estar al tanto de nuestras últimas noticias.

Name: Sotupa Eco Lodge
Description:
Somos un hospedaje ecoamigable a orillas del río Tambopata. Las experiencias que ofrecemos son all inclusive, e incluyen el hospedaje, alimentación completa y excursiones guiadas por la selva. Dentro de las excursiones incluidas ofrecemos paseos en kayak y en bote por el río, caminatas diurnas y nocturnas guiadas por nuestras trochas, avistamiento de aves en nuestra collpa natural de arcilla, y búsqueda nocturna de caimanes en bote.
Todas nuestras cabañas han sido construidas con la intención de aprovechar la naturaleza que nos rodea, y tienen balcones privados con vista al río.
Contamos con varias áreas comunes para disfrutar de la naturaleza, piscina, bar, una maloka para realizar sesiones de yoga, ceremonias de ayahuasca, entre otros eventos.
También ofrecemos tours adicionales en la selva, como la visita al Lago Sandoval dentro de la reserva nacional de Tambopata, excursiones en cuatrimotos, pesca deportiva, y muchos más.

Name: HOTEL FLORIDA
Description:
In Kharar, Mohali Punjab the opulent and reasonably priced HOTEL FLORIDA provides first-rate services, lodging that includes a restaurant, and cost-free private parking for those who drive. Take advantage of the many breakfast, lunch, and dinner options at our on-site restaurant. The motel is located 7 kilometres from Kharar Bus Stand and 14 kilometres from Chandigarh University.
In each hotel room, you'll find a seating area, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a private bathroom with a shower, amenities, and towels. There are electric kettles in every room. The lodging's beds are included in each room's decor.
Every morning at the lodging, a continental breakfast is served. Chandigarh University, Mohali Cricket Stadium, and Sukhna Lake are all within a short distance of the hotel. Chandigarh University is 8 km away, the Mohali Cricket Stadium is 6.2 km, and Sukhna Lake is 12 km. The nearest bus stand is 2.7 km and the airport is 16 km away.

Name: Wyndham Atlanta Buckhead Hotel & Conference Center
Description:
Welcome to the Wyndham Atlanta Buckhead Hotel & Conference Center, a premier destination for business and leisure in the heart of Atlanta. Perfectly situated at 3405 Lenox Road NE, our hotel places you within walking distance of world-class shopping at Lenox Mall and Phipps Plaza and offers direct access to Atlanta's vibrant attractions via the nearby Lenox MARTA station.

Featuring 352 well-appointed guest rooms, including PURE allergy-friendly options and an upgraded M Club Lounge experience, we cater to the modern traveler seeking comfort and convenience. Enjoy complimentary wireless internet, on-site dining at our signature restaurant, Sunday Gravy, and access to fitness and business amenities that keep you connected and refreshed.

Our International Association of Conference Centers (IACC)-certified conference facility boasts over 32,000 square feet of versatile meeting and event spaces. From two elegant ballrooms to 16 breakout rooms and state-of-the-art audiovisual services, we are Atlanta’s go-to venue for meetings, conferences, and special events. Whether you are planning an intimate gathering or a grand celebration, our dedicated events team ensures a seamless experience.

Experience the charm of Buckhead with the reliability and quality of Wyndham. For inquiries and bookings, contact us at (404) 261-9250 or visit us online to explore how we can make your next visit unforgettable.

Name: Casa Amore Tenerife
Description:
Casa Amore in Tenerife have changed the dynamic of holidays, there is no need to go to a five star hotel, nor go to any other large luxury villa when you have Casa Amore, which is the ultimate luxury boutique villa with concierge service, exclusive private chef, private pool, jacuzzi, sauna and Ice bath for total tranquility and relaxation. 

Here at Casa Amore we want to change the way you holiday and provide you with only the upmost of luxury along with respect and privacy you deserve on a well-deserved holiday.

Our in-house team are ready to cater for your every need from the moment you book with us to the moment you step onto the aeroplane back home.

With a combined experience of over one hundred years in the industry you know you are in safe hands.

Casa Amore can accommodate up to fourteen guests in sophisticated style, with seven generously proportioned luxury ensuite bedrooms, including an incredible master suite. The villa has incredible views of the North Atlantic Ocean and Mount Teide, Tenerife's national park. This luxurious villa is ideal for practicing indoor and outdoor living. Immaculately and beautifully designed, our luxury boutique villa has amenities such as a state-of-the-art gym and fitness area, a wellness centre as well as a massage room where you can have the best professionals in the industry perform some of the most luxurious therapies you could ever imagine.

Casa Amore also has a home office equipped with a large desk and printer, a state- of- the-art games room filled with only the best games including a pool table, table football, ping pong table, air hockey, an arcade racing machine, the new Xbox X and a PS5 plus so much more.

Your Holiday is Our Priority

The Ledger Plaza offers elegant rooms with air conditioning, a mosquito net over the bed, a flat-screen TV, a wardrobe and a safe. The bathroom includes free toiletries. Some rooms have a balcony and a spa bath.
The Kaskazi restaurant, located on the top floor of the main building, serves breakfast daily. It also prepares thematic dinners of Swahili, Italian, Mediterranean and Indian cuisine. At the bar you can have cocktails.
The beauty and thalassotherapy center provides a selection of treatments, including henna tattoos. The property has a fitness center and sun loungers around the pool.

Name: HOTEL LA CASONA DEL OLIVO AREQUIPA
Description:
Somos un hotel corporativo 3 estrellas superior ubicado en Yanahuara, la zona más segura de Arequipa. Recibimos a ejecutivos, técnicos y profesionales de todo el Perú, especialmente del sector industrial, minero y logístico, que necesitan una base operativa confiable, silenciosa y estratégica para trabajar, descansar y capacitarse en el sur del país.

 Nuestro huésped ideal busca:

- Factura inmediata y sin demoras
- Cochera privada cerrada para camionetas 4x4
- Conexión WiFi premium para trabajar desde la habitación
- Habitaciones cómodas, con escritorio y buena iluminación
- Check-in ágil y check-out express
- Trato cordial y profesional
- Evitar zonas ruidosas o poco seguras

 En La Casona del Olivo resolvemos todo eso. Sabemos que cada minuto cuenta cuando viajas por trabajo. Por eso, te ofrecemos un hospedaje sin fricciones, con procesos simples, personal capacitado y una ubicación estratégica a:

- 1 cuadra del Mirador de Yanahuara
- 4 cuadras de la Av. Ejército de Arequipa (zona financiera y comercial)
- 5 minutos del Centro Histórico de la Ciudad de Arequipa
- 15 minutos del Aeropuerto Internacional Alfredo Rodriguez Ballón

 También contamos con auditorio para capacitaciones, servicios corporativos y convenios empresariales a medida.

 Somos socios activos de la Cámara de Comercio e Industria de Arequipa (CCIA) y de la Asociación de Hoteles, Restaurantes y Afines (AHORA), lo cual respalda nuestro compromiso con la formalidad, el buen servicio y la mejora continua.

 Visítanos en: www.lacasonadelolivo.com.pe

 Contáctanos por WhatsApp: 999 223 399

Tu descanso y eficiencia operativa empiezan en La Casona del Olivo.

Name: Letto di Vino Piedmont
Description:
Amid the rolling vineyards of picturesque San Marzano Oliveto, we are creating Letto di Vino: an authentic Piedmontese country house being transformed into a Relais di Charme, a boutique retreat offering refined comfort.

Our boutique retreat will feature four spacious double rooms, each with panoramic views of the surrounding hills and village landscape. We welcome adult guests only, creating a calm and relaxed atmosphere. Guests can look forward to warm hospitality, excellent local wines and relaxation by the large infinity pool filled with soft salt water.

Letto di Vino is located in the wine hills of San Marzano Oliveto, less than ten minutes from the lively towns of Nizza Monferrato and Canelli. With local wine producers as our neighbors, we are pleased to introduce the wines of the very hills you overlook. The opening is planned for 2026.

We look forward to welcoming you here.

Warm regards,
Peter and Greta

Letto di Vino Srl · Regione Chierina 2 · San Marzano Oliveto · Italy

Name: Namphung Phuket Boutique Resort
Description:
Namphung Phuket Boutique Resort is within 5 minutes walk to Rawai beach and close to restaurants, bars, convenience stores, gym, massage, and sauna shops. We are just 3 km from two of the best beaches in Phuket called Nai Harn beach and Ya Nui Beach. Free private car parking is available on site. Cable Tv and Cable fiber Wifi are being offered complimentary all over the property.

The fully furnished maisonette style apartments (75sqm) all come with a separate bedroom and a living/dining area equipped with a Western kitchen, a dining table, and a comfortable sofa. Each duplex apartment is fitted with two air conditions one in the tastefully furnished bedroom and one in the living room. Shower facilities and free toiletries are included in the private bathroom. All duplex apartments have private balconies with pool views and comfortable terraces to relax and rejuvenate after a long sunny day on the beach or swimming pool.

This boutique property has been recently renovated and a stunning picturesque waterfall tropical garden has been created. Guests can relax and unwind in peaceful and relaxing ambiance steps away from the night action of Rawai beach.

Digital Nomads are welcomed to work in the newly created co-working space and socialize while enjoying the views of the picturesque landscape.
The newly refreshed budget rooms are ideal for couples or individuals that would like to enjoy 4-star facilities without breaking the bank. A fully equipped sharing kitchen is available for all budget rooms.

**The friendly well-trained staff can assist guests with arrangements for shuttle services to the nearby attractions, laundry services, and a relaxing Thai massage, all for an extra charge. For those who want to explore the area by themselves, both car and motorbike rentals are also available.

Name: The Historic Blue Moon Hotel
Description: The building where the Hotel is located was built in 1879 by architect Julius Boekel. The building is comprised of two parcels and I purchased one of them in 1997 and the other in 2001. Beginning in or about 2002, I redesigned the five-story tenement and restored the building to function as a stately eight-story hotel. It was a five-year art preservation and design project which received huge media triumph and many awards, including one from National Geographic. The Hotel has been recognized by the Historic Districts Council as a historic site, and has received significant press attention in over 50 major articles. The Hotel has been instrumental in revitalizing commerce south of Delancey Street and has been extensively involved in community service.

Name: Casa Antares by Quartz Inn Hotels
Description:
Casa Antares by Quartz Inn Hotels is a sustainable hotel located in a rural community close to Queretaro Airport, Mexico.

We have designed this space to allow our guests to reconnect with nature, with their loved ones, and most importantly, with themselves. We understand that the definition of rest is subjective and what we offer is personalized service and genuine hospitality to give you the Casa Antares experience.

We are the closest hotel to the Querétaro Intercontinental Airport, just 3 km away. Maximize your rest time and get to your flight in less than 10 minutes. We are an environmentally responsible hotel, our construction style is industrial with materiality exposed. We are surrounded by nature both outside and inside.

We are located outside of the city in a rural community close to the airport, and close to the aerospace industrial zone. Around us, you will find wonderful magical towns, spectacular farms and vineyards, and various World Heritage Sites declared by UNESCO. We have parking, Wi-Fi, a garden and a terrace.

Our rooms have a closet, desk, minibar, water dispenser, private bathroom and shower, and following our commitment to the environment we have biodegradable personal hygiene products of natural origin.

We are very fortunate to be close to nature and the tranquility of the countryside. There is no presence of the incessant bustle of the city. You will breathe a clean and refreshing atmosphere, and forget about urban pollution.

We also have a restaurant service (breakfast and dinner) in the hotel where you can enjoy delicious homemade dishes as if you were at home. We will do everything in our power to make your stay as pleasant as possible.

Här kan du både bo, boka konferens, komma på retreat, arrangera bröllop, fest, kurs eller abonnera hela Risanäs Udde,

Our guests are offered the opportunity to see mountain, sea or city views as their preference.

Uptown, with its unique concept both inside and outside the city, is a unique facility where you can rest quietly away from the noise of the city, and where you can perform beautiful activities with its wateranasi swimming pool, walking path in pine trees.

Uptown Büyük Anadolu Hotel Girne is affiliated with Anadolu Hotels group and is a subsidiary of First Global.

When you stay in Uptown, you are not staying at any hotel. You stay in a unique city hotel that combines authentic local experiences, modern design and sincere service with the peace and security of staying in a very famous brand resort in Northern Cyprus.

Uptown is located in one of the most special areas of Kyrenia, the tourism capital of Northern Cyprus. Our hotel, which is 35 km from Ercan Airport and 1 km from the city center, has a unique view. It is in a magnificent location with a pine forest next to it, a sea on one side and a mountain view on the other.

Cosa ci distingue?

Name: Expandia Hotels
Description:
Expandia Hotels je česká síť hotelů, která sdružuje čtyřhvězdičkové hotely v Praze a na Moravě.
Každý z našich hotelů je jiný, ale všechny spojuje stejný přístup: vřelá atmosféra, péče o hosty a důraz na pohodlí.
Naším cílem je vytvořit prostředí, kde se budete cítit vítáni – ať už jste v hlavním městě kvůli práci, cestujete za odpočinkem nebo si užíváte víkend mezi moravskými vinicemi.
Věříme, že kvalita začíná u lidí – proto klademe důraz na spokojenost jak hostů, tak našeho týmu. Tento přístup je znát v každém detailu – od prvního úsměvu na recepci až po výběr lokálních surovin na snídani. Expandia Hotels nejsou jen hotely – jsou to místa, kam se budete rádi vracet.

Name: Shortgrass Resort
Description:
Welcome to the region's most elegant, private resort, specializing in creating an experience that you'll remember for a lifetime. Shortgrass is an inclusive, luxury experience.

Staying with us at Shortgrass can help you rediscover your passions, serenity, and adventurous spirit.

Shortgrass is just north of Spearfish, between the pine forests and high prairie of western South Dakota. Set on a private 52-acres on the Redwater River, Shortgrass is at the center of iconic parks, such as Mt Rushmore, Badlands, and Devil's Tower, with access to hundreds of miles of hiking trails filled with wild flowers and raspberries. If it suits you, join in on rock climbing, mountain biking, or miles of UTV trails that can push you right out of your comfort zone.

We invite you to rediscover the things we all yearn for: serenity, adventure, connection, laughter, time to reflect.

Whether you seek local food and brew at our onsite farm-to-fork Meander restaurant, climbing or cycling adventures on hundreds of miles of trails, reading a good book with a picnic on the grounds, or a campfire under the Milky Way, come rediscover your own passions.

Whether you're looking for a beautiful steak, seared walleye, or mushroom risotto, you will be served the most nutritious, freshest meal, beautifully presented. You can expect a multi-course, fine-dining experience in our Meander Restaurant.

Staying in tents harkens back to a heady time in America’s past where a person’s curiosity drove them to explore new lands.

All of our accommodations are large, unique, tents imported from Denmark that have been Capp-sized (extensively customized by Cappie, the owner) – from huge glass french doors, to designer finishes, full bathrooms with Japenese-style toilets, heated floors, a private deck, and a sky full of stars. 

Rediscover this connection while sleeping in a king-size bed and enjoying a hot shower in the beautifully tiled ensuite bathroom. It’s truly the opportunity of a lifetime.

Description:
Royal Hometel Suites, is a contemporary hotel in the heart of Dahisar, Mumbai, offering a pleasant and comfortable stay experience. Strategically located on the western express highway, this hotel is only a few meters away from Dahisar Toll Plaza, 4 kilometres from Mira Road Railway Station, and 300 metres from the Mira Road Bus Stop.

Our business hotel in Dahisar features three dining options — a fine dining restaurant serving Indian, Oriental, and Continental cuisines, a bar, and a cafe and lobby lounge ideal for meetings. Name: Sooke Harbour House
Description:
Welcome to Sooke Harbour House, a charming seaside retreat nestled on Vancouver Island's rugged west coast. With its stunning oceanfront location overlooking the Strait of Juan de Fuca and the majestic Olympic Mountains, this historic boutique hotel offers a perfect blend of classic charm and modern comfort.

Founded in the late 1970s by visionaries Sinclair and Frederique Philip, Sooke Harbour House has been a beacon of eco-friendly luxury and local culture. Our commitment to sustainability shines through our extensive gardens, where you’ll find a bountiful collection of organic vegetables, herbs, and edible flowers that grace our farm-to-table restaurant.

Each of our uniquely designed rooms and suites reflects the natural beauty of the Pacific Northwest, featuring local art, cozy fireplaces, and private balconies or terraces with breathtaking views. Whether you’re unwinding after a day of exploration or savoring a quiet morning with a cup of coffee, you'll find comfort and tranquility in every corner.

At Sooke Harbour House, we celebrate the rich history of our surroundings while embracing contemporary comforts. Our dining experience showcases the best of local cuisine, with dishes crafted from seasonal, sustainable ingredients grown in our own gardens or sourced from nearby farms.

Beyond the luxurious accommodations and exquisite dining, we offer a range of activities designed to connect you with the natural beauty and cultural heritage of Sooke. From whale watching and hiking to exploring local art galleries and artisan shops, there’s something for every guest to enjoy.

Whether you're here for a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or a special event, Sooke Harbour House promises an unforgettable experience where timeless charm meets modern hospitality. Discover a place where heritage and contemporary ease come together, creating a welcoming haven that feels both luxurious and accessible.

Name: Machangulo Beach Lodge
Description:
Set on a secluded peninsula just across the bay from Maputo, Machangulo Beach Lodge is perfectly positioned for travellers seeking both adventure and escape. Here, luxury is found not in extravagance but in the rhythm of the tides, the rustle of palm leaves in the breeze and the unspoiled landscapes that stretch as far as the eye can see. Each of our ten rooms has been thoughtfully designed to complement the environment. They are elegant yet understated and invite guests to experience comfort in harmony with nature.

The idea behind Machangulo Beach Lodge has always been simple. We want to share the beauty of this incredible peninsula with travellers looking for something truly special. Not flashy or overdone, this is an authentic Mozambican experience in one of the most unspoilt corners of Africa. What makes it unique is the chance to experience the real Mozambique, its warmth, traditions and people.

Built in 2009 and 2010, the lodge was carefully planned to fit within the dune forest without disturbing the pristine environment. From the very beginning, it was essential that Machangulo had as little impact as possible on the untouched nature of the peninsula. Over the years, we have made thoughtful improvements to enhance the guest experience while continuing to reduce our environmental footprint.

Sustainability and community are at the heart of everything we do. Local materials, labour and resources were used to bring the lodge to life. Today we are proud that all of our staff are Mozambican, with ninety nine percent coming from the surrounding area. By choosing Machangulo Beach Lodge, you are not only discovering a private paradise but also supporting a business that values its people, protects its environment and celebrates the spirit of Mozambique.

At Machangulo every day brings new discoveries from barefoot comfort and unspoilt beaches to wild landscapes and warm genuine hospitality.

Name: Sunds Retreat
Description:
Ibland vill man vara ostörd. Sunds Retreat erbjuder 11 dubbelrum i en unik miljö. Scrolla gärna genom vår sida här på LinkedIn så får ni en helhetsbild av verksamheten. 
Vilka är våra gäster?


 Styrelsemöte- är ni en mindre grupp som vill arbeta ostört med strategiska frågor? 

 Ledningsgruppen- passa på att samla alla och uppleva ett möte hos oss. Vi vill att det skall kännas kreativt och ostört för hela gruppen.

 Konferens- upp till 24 bäddar erbjuds, här har ni även ett spabad och badtunna att använda. Passar perfekt året runt när vädret kan vara varierande.

 Festen- Bröllop och fester är vanligt hos oss. Se till att planera allt i förväg, privat kock eller catering? 

 Sommar! Då är det familjer som bokar, passa på inför sommar 2025 som redan nu bokas på. Hela 3 pooler igång (den stora poolen stänger vi i september) 

 Sunds Retreat har i grunden ingen personal på plats. Vi har bra kontakt med kockar eller catering om det önskas.
Ett populärt inslag är Sunds-matkasse, det innebär att all mat för er vistelse finns inhandlat när ni kommer. Ni får dock laga maten själva i ett koncept likande ”Halv 8 hos mig” 
En teambuilding med många glada skratt. Självklart kan vi ordna kocken till er. Se bara till att boka i tid för planering. 

Hoppa att vi ses, miljön skall skapa den känsla ni behöver för att ta rätt beslut för erat företag eller förening.

/Vi på Sund

Name: Biohotel Schwanen
Description:
In unserem Biohotel mit Restaurant im Bregenzerwald geht es um nachhaltigen Genuss. Von Gault Millau mit 3 Hauben ausgezeichnet, schaffen die Wilden Weiber und Toughen Typen im Schwanen Förderliches für Gesundheit, Geist und Wohlbeﬁnden. Der Schwanen betreibt zwei Gärten – den sogenannten #wildeweibergarten in Bizau und die Solidarische Landwirtschaft im benachbarten Bezau. Gemüse, Salate und Kräuter stammen aus eigenem Anbau, alle anderen Produkte von Partner:innen aus der unmittelbaren Nähe. Im Schwanen wird bedingungslos biologisch gekocht und überwiegend nach der Lehre von Hildegard von Bingen.

Reduce to the max ist Motto und Haltung. Von allem nur das Wichtigste und vom Wichtigen nur das Beste. Im Schwanen liegt das wahre Meisterstück in der Essenz einer Sache.

Description:
En Blume Residences ofrecemos una propuesta exclusiva, casi hecha a medida,  para que nuestros huéspedes se sientan especiales y únicos.
Nuestros alojamientos se alejan de la estandarización de las grandes cadenas y tienen alma propia. Reúnen atributos extraordinarios en un contexto actual de masificación.
Nuestro ADN se basa en la singularidad y personalización de cada uno de nuestros alojamientos, una ubicación premium en edificios singulares de Madrid, una arquitectura de autor -siempre respaldada en políticas sostenibles y mantenimiento constante de los inmuebles- y,  por supuesto, en un trato cercano y personalizado con un cuidado exquisito por los detalles.

Formado por un equipo de personas con experiencia y talento, Blume Residences busca aportar solidez, seguridad y valor añadido a cada uno de los proyectos que emprende.
Con una larga trayectoria de casi 20 años en el mundo del hospedaje, nos sentimos orgullosos de mantener esta filosofía cimentada en el COMPROMISO CON EL MEDIOAMBIENTE, CON LA SOCIEDAD Y CON TODOS NUESTROS COLABORADORES internos y externo.

Somos una empresa familiar patrimonialista de capital 100% nacional, y que busca la mayor rentabilidad según los siguientes pilares fundamentales:
1.Solidez financiera y conservadora
2.Gestión ágil en la toma de decisiones estratégicas y tácticas
3.Contratación de Colaboradores externos especializados y comprometidos con nuestra filosofía y ética de empresa

All villas at Munduk Menir are carefully laid out on a hillside surrounded by vegetation. 

Each Villa offers generous space for two or a family—a sanctuary amongst nature where the jagged mountain peaks carved their way across the horizon. 

From Munduk Spice restaurant, when the weather is clear, you can see the valley and the northern coast of the island of Bali. 

For anyone who's ever wanted a retreat, Munduk Menir offers unparalleled natural beauty.

Name: Katzenpension Klosterfelde
Description:
Am malerischen Rand von Berlin, in der idyllischen Umgebung von Wandlitz, eröffnet am 01. April unsere liebevoll geführte Katzenpension. Hier erwartet Ihre Katze eine entspannte Auszeit mit allem, was das Katzenherz begehrt.

In unserer modernen und gemütlichen  Pension bieten wir:

Individuelle Betreuung: Wir nehmen uns Zeit für die Bedürfnisse jeder Katze, sei es Kuscheln, Spielen oder einfach nur Ruhe.

Geräumige Unterkünfte: Auf ca. 60 m² stehen vier liebevoll eingerichtete Räume zur Verfügung, die mit Kratzbäumen, Versteckmöglichkeiten und viel Platz zum Klettern und Entspannen ausgestattet sind.

Großzügiges Außengehege: Unsere Katzenpension verfügt über ein 150 m² großes, gesichertes Außengehege, in dem Ihre Katze die frische Luft genießen, spielen und die Natur beobachten kann – ideal für kleine Abenteurer und Sonnenanbeter.

Ärztlich abgesicherte Betreuung: In Zusammenarbeit mit einem erfahrenen Tierarzt stellen wir sicher, dass Ihre Katze jederzeit in besten Händen ist. Auch die Verabreichung von Medikamenten oder die Betreuung von Katzen mit besonderen Bedürfnissen ist problemlos möglich.

Naturnahe Umgebung: Mitten im Grünen gelegen, sorgt die ruhige Lage für ein harmonisches und stressfreies Ambiente.
Sorgfalt und Liebe: Als echte Katzenliebhaber liegt uns das Wohl Ihrer Samtpfote besonders am Herzen.

Ob für einen Kurzurlaub oder eine längere Betreuung – wir sorgen dafür, dass Ihre Katze sich bei uns rundum wohlfühlt. Vertrauen Sie uns, und gönnen Sie Ihrem Liebling eine artgerechte Betreuung mit Herz und Verstand.

Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie und Ihre Katze bald bei uns begrüßen zu dürfen!

Name: The Moorings Lakehouse
Description:
An extraordinary 5-star organic farm retreat nestled on its own serene peninsula with a 200m lake frontage, just 3.5 hours North of Sydney. 

Indulge in our luxurious lakefront barrel sauna, sundeck and private swimming jetty. Exercise in our outdoor covered yoga shala / gymnasium.  Harvest your salad from our organic vegetable garden & orchards or just take in the views across the Wallis Lake with a glass of wine as the sun sets over the Wallingat National park ridge line.  Make 'The Moorings Lakehouse' your very own garden of Eden, a wilderness sanctuary of wellbeing & relaxation.

Accommodations include the captivating Lakefront King suite, the charming Lakefront 2-bedroom Villa, or the spacious Lakeview 3-bedroom converted barn. A "whole property" booking is perfect for larger groups up to 14 guests securing exclusive use for multi family & friends holidays. The property is also a perfect venue for bespoke weddings, hosting your wellness retreat and corporate events.

Name: Grand Hotel Hradec
Description:
Grand Hotel Hradec v Peci pod Sněžkou je designový horský hotel, který nabízí prvotřídní ubytování a širokou škálu služeb pro své hosty. Jeho poloha v srdci Krkonoš ho činí ideálním místem pro aktivní odpočinek, turistiku, lyžování a relaxaci. 
Moderní prostorné pokoje jsou vkusně zařízené a nabízejí výhledy na okolní hory, což je nezapomenutelný zážitek. Hotel také disponuje wellness centrem, kde si můžete užít relaxaci po náročném dni venku.

Profesionální tým hotelu je vždy ochotný pomoci s jakýmkoli dotazem nebo požadavkem, aby vytvořil příjemnou atmosféru během pobytu. Hotelová restaurace nabízí vynikající gastronomický zážitek s místními specialitami.

Pokud hledáte luxusní horské ubytování v Peci pod Sněžkou, Grand Hotel Hradec je skvělou volbou. Doporučujeme ho všem, kteří hledají kombinaci kvalitního ubytování, výborných služeb a malebného horského prostředí.

Těšíme se na Vaši návštěvu Grand Hotelu Hradec a věříme, že si zde užijete nezapomenutelný pobyt.

Grand Hotel Hradec. Jediný Grandhotel pod Sněžkou.

Having extensive experience in the hospitality travel & tourism industry, our company explores and highlights the hidden revenue potential in your hotel so that you can increase your bottom line profits. 

PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

Name: Four Points By Sheraton, Jaipur, City Square

Description:
As the workforce becomes more and more dispersed, places where leadership teams can get together to strategize, build trust, and collaborate are more important than ever. While digital communication has advanced significantly in recent years, face-to-face meetings are still critical components of building a strong culture, building rapport with stakeholders, and connecting with your team on a deeper level. The Mahalani provides the space to gather together in a fabulous location with all of the logistics handled for you. We can even provide facilitators for you, if needed.

Located directly on the sea in beautiful Northern Bali, The Mahalani boasts three complete villas, ten air-conditioned bedrooms, two pools and tropical gardens which open directly onto the clean, black sand beach.  With private staff and authentic, family-style meals, our rates include just about everything.

While you certainly don’t need a corporate retreat in Bali for every face-to-face meeting, a quarterly or annual corporate retreat helps to co-create solutions to issues, build cross-functional relationships, engage in purposeful small talk, and address sensitive issues, all in a way that limits distractions and increases engagement. We can’t wait for you to join us for your next corporate retreat.

Name: Vinalia Conacul din Ceptura
Description:
Vinalia Conacul din Ceptura – Refugiul perfect pentru team buildinguri reușite!

La doar două ore de București, în inima podgoriilor din Ceptura, Vinalia îți oferă mai mult decât relaxare: un spațiu creat special pentru echipe care vor să se reconecteze, să colaboreze și să se bucure împreună.

Fie că vorbim despre un foc de tabără sub cerul liber, un prânz în aer curat cu meniu personalizat sau o sesiune de brainstorming într-o sală de conferințe modern echipată, aici găsești cadrul ideal pentru un team building de succes.

Vara, piscina exterioară aduce un plus de răsfăț, iar zonele verzi generoase sunt perfecte pentru activități în aer liber sau pentru câteva momente de liniște. Natura de la Vinalia îți limpezește gândurile și aduce inspirație.

Pentru iubitorii de vin, experiențele devin memorabile: degustări ghidate, vizite în cramă și un magazin de vinuri specializat, unde descoperi etichete locale rafinate, gata de luat acasă.

Distracția continuă cu mese de ping-pong, darts, biliard și alte activități menite să unească echipa și să creeze amintiri comune.

Vinalia Conacul din Ceptura este acel loc unde scapi de agitația orașului și regăsești bucuria conexiunii umane, a colaborării și a timpului petrecut cu sens. Te așteptăm să transformi un simplu team building într-o experiență de neuitat.

Name: Casa Morada
Description:
Casa Morada on Islamorada Bay—the heart of the Florida Keys—offers 1.7 acres of lush gardens, a private island, a waterfront Boathouse Bar, a private sailboat, and the historic 1917 *Blue Mist* commuter yacht, creating a true sanctuary for relaxation, romance, and adventure on the bay. Nestled off a quiet side road in Islamorada, you’ll find Casa Morada, our 16-suite boutique oasis. Our property consists of two guest buildings, the Garden Building and the Seaview Building. Nightly rates include continental breakfast, complimentary use of kayaks, paddleboards, and bicycles, as well as free yoga and water aerobics classes offered weekly.

Casa Morada is a 90-minute drive south of Miami International Airport and 90 minutes north of Key West. Guests can also arrive by boat. We are a pet-friendly hotel and welcome children aged 16 and older. Whether you're seeking a serene escape or outdoor adventure, Casa Morada offers the perfect backdrop for your stay in the Keys.

Name: Holiday Inn Vancouver Airport - Richmond, BC
Description:
Welcome to the stylish Holiday Inn Vancouver Airport!

As IHG's closest full-service hotel to nearby Vancouver Airport (YVR), you'll be minutes away to connect to your flight. Take advantage of our complimentary transportation to YVR when you're ready to take off!

Enjoy an upgraded experience, including guestrooms, meeting spaces, lobby, restaurant, lounge as well as a Fitness Centre.

If you're on business, our hotel's location will give you easy access to businesses and business parks near Vancouver Airport and Annacis Island. Our hotel also has 2,080 sq. ft. of meeting space and a Business Centre to meet your needs.

Looking to leave work behind? Spend the day exploring the local historic Steveston fishing village, shopping at Richmond Centre and MacArther Glen Outlet, or head to Vancouver to see Gastown, Stanley Park and the beautiful North Shore Mountains.

With amenities like gated parking with electric vehicle charging, our on-site Fogg n' Suds restaurant, and Fitness Centre, we go beyond regular hotels near Vancouver Airport to give you the comfort and convenience you deserve. Also, every room has free fiber optic high-speed Wi-Fi, a fridge and microwave, and a 50" + LED TV with HD programming. We look forward to welcoming you!

Name: Pousada Villa dos Leais
Description:
Inaugurada em 2015, localizada a cinco minutos do centro de Serra Negra e a 1100 metros de altitude, proporcionando incrível vista para o vale. Confortável por natureza é assim a Pousada Villa dos Leais!

Um ambiente preparado para atendê-lo com conforto e privacidade, cercada de montanhas e muito verde, perfeita para aqueles que buscam tranquilidade e romantismo em meio à natureza.

A Pousada Villa dos Leais tem uma grande preocupação com todos os detalhes, desde a entrada do hóspede, sua acomodação, sua estada e a hora da despedida. 

Atender com carinho e dedicação faz parte constante do nosso dia a dia. Unindo o rústico ao moderno, ambientes integrados com chalés para casal ou família. 

O estilo da Pousada Villa dos Leais também é sentido no nosso café da manhã, onde são servidas deliciosas guloseimas presentes em nossa região.

Desfrute de nossos amplos chalés com lareira, ar condicionado e varanda suspensa, todos com vista para o vale. Para os mais românticos e que desejam privacidade chalés com banheira de hidromassagem e piscina privativa coberta e descoberta. Contamos ainda com piscina aquecida coberta, sauna a vapor, piscina fria ao ar livre, sala de jogos e fitness.

Name: GeniusesCity
Description:
Geniuses City, LLC introduces a visionary eco-hotel designed for intelligent and affluent guests, combining mental and physical wellness with cognitive science. Located in suburban Austin, Texas, the hotel promotes creativity, relaxation and personal growth through customized programs that expand the mind and go beyond traditional hospitality.
The complex features nine uniquely designed rooms, each representing a specific type of thinking - creative, logical and analytical - that stimulate targeted cognitive processes to enrich the experience. Additional areas are dedicated to emotional intelligence, vitality and flow thinking, as well as spaces for meditation and recovery. Exclusive outdoor landscapes and thoughtfully designed interiors inspire new perspectives and create a visually stunning, photogenic environment for unforgettable experiences.
Geniuses City also hosts creative events and organizes corporate and social gatherings. Its unique combination of cognitive-driven design, vibrant atmosphere and innovative programs make it a destination for professionals, entrepreneurs and thought leaders ages 25-65.
Its proximity to technology centers, universities and startups provides accessibility to IT professionals, entrepreneurs and managers seeking intellectual growth and wellness. Corporate clients can take advantage of retreats and team building events that foster collaboration, personal development and community building.
Geniuses City offers a rejuvenating environment where guests can relax, exchange ideas and find inspiration while enhancing personal and professional well-being in an environment designed to support thriving individuals and teams.

Name: Atlanta Marriott Buckhead Hotel & Conference Center
Description:
Discover the perfect blend of business and leisure at our inviting Buckhead hotel. Ideally located steps from Phipps Plaza, Lenox Square, and the Lenox MARTA Station, we offer seamless access to the heart of Atlanta, ensuring your stay is both convenient and enjoyable.

Our 28,000 square feet of sophisticated spaces are designed to elevate your events with innovative layouts and exceptional service that cater to every detail. Whether you're hosting a business meeting or a special occasion, our spaces are tailored to enrich your experience.

Indulge in the inviting ambiance of our on-site restaurant, Sunday Gravy, where delicious Italian cuisine and signature cocktails await. It's the perfect spot to relax and savor after a productive day, and our attentive staff is always ready to make your dining experience memorable.

Our bright, modern rooms are thoughtfully designed for your comfort, featuring Marriott's luxurious bedding and stunning views of Buckhead. Choose a PURE allergy-friendly room for a breath of fresh air, or upgrade to an M Club Room for exclusive access to the M Club Lounge and its VIP amenities.

At Atlanta Marriott Buckhead, we believe every guest has a story to tell, and we're here to listen. Our heartfelt service and attention to detail make you feel important and at ease from the moment you arrive. We're passionate about creating enriching experiences that make your stay timelessly memorable. Because it's not just about where you're staying—it's about the connections you make along the way.

At Luciana Hotel by Bratus, we offer a range of rooms to suit all needs and budgets. Whether you're traveling for business or pleasure, we have the perfect room for you. Our rooms are spacious and comfortable, and come with all the amenities you need for a relaxing stay.

Name: Estello Suites & Spa
Description:
Estello est une formule unique visant le bien-être absolu.
La vue sur le majestueux Mont Mégantic, le coucher de soleil depuis votre balcon et le ciel étoilé vous amènent à voyager depuis votre suite. Permettez-vous l’évasion dans un décor apaisant avec une touche de luxe. Chaque suite possède son décor et son style pour créer une atmosphère sans précédent. L’accès à la station thermale est optionnel lors d’un séjour.

Name: Milla Serenity
Description: Milla Serenity is located in Şile, a charming town on the Black Sea coast of Istanbul. It is approximately 50 km from Istanbul. The name Şile means wild flower in Ancient Greek. It is an ideal location for those who want to escape from the crowd of the city with its lush nature and long beaches.

Name: Apartamentos Reforma
Description:
Llevamos 60 años innovando en la industria hotelera. Brindándoles la mejor opción para hospedarse en la ciudad de Guatemala. Ofrecemos apartamentos amueblado y equipados, tipo estudio, 1,2 y 4 dormitorios.  Muy amplios, iluminados y ventilados.   Los rentamos por año, mes, semana o dìa.  Servicio de  limpieza diaria, cambio de sábanas y toallas dos veces por semana, internet básico y tv por  cable.

Apartamentos Reforma busca brindarles la opción más económica, segura, limpia, y agradable para el hospedaje. Estamos ubicados en el corazón de la zona 10, la zona hotelera. Contamos con apartamentos tipo estudio, y de uno, dos y tres dormitorios disponibles para ser arrendados por día, semana, mes o año.

Name: 老爺酒店集團 Hotel Royal Group
Description:
【加入老爺．一起好好】老爺酒店集團以「一起好好」為價值承諾，致力打造包容、多元且友善的職場文化，讓每位夥伴能找到成長與發揮的空間。我們相信，「一起好好」才能創造更美好的未來。

【關於老爺】以細膩貼心的服務，創造每一個旅行的瞬間，都是值得珍藏的回憶。集團在臺灣擁有三個品牌，展現不同的旅行風貌，為旅人編織精彩故事。

【國際星級渡假酒店】結合當代設計風格與人文特色，為旅人打造奢華舒適的渡假想像，體現高品質服務美學。目前擁有五個據點：

－台北老爺酒店｜位於臺北中山商圈，委由日航酒店國際連鎖經營 
－知本老爺酒店｜位於臺東知本溫泉森林園區
－新竹老爺酒店｜位於新竹縣市中心，鄰近新竹科技園區
－礁溪老爺酒店｜位於宜蘭礁溪溫泉五峰旗風景區
－北投老爺酒店｜位於新北投溫泉商圈

【設計型精品酒店】融合東西方文化與現代創意風格，為追求設計風格的旅人，帶來隨處可拾驚喜的住宿體驗。目前擁有三個據點： 

－台南老爺行旅｜與臺南南紡購物中心共構
－台中大毅老爺行旅｜座落臺中草悟道商圈
－南港老爺行旅｜位於南港科技園區

【城市型商務旅店】專為商務出差與城市旅行設計，提供舒適便捷的住宿選擇，以貼心服務滿足旅人多元需求。目前擁有二個據點：

－老爺會館台北南西｜位於臺北中山南西商圈
－老爺會館台北林森｜位於臺北華山藝文區

【跨越國界的溫暖款待】集團在海外亦有四家投資酒店，在世界的另一端，我們也用同樣的心意迎接旅人。目前海外擁有四個據點：

－模里西斯帝王酒店
－尼加拉瓜馬拿瓜皇冠廣場酒店
－帛琉老爺酒店
－越南西貢老爺酒店

【創造精彩難忘的故事 】老爺酒店集團以「創造精彩難忘的回憶」作為品牌承諾。透過溫暖的服務、優雅的空間和深度融入的在地文化，細膩用心於每個細節，讓旅人在旅程中創造屬於自己的美好故事。

Name: Park Inn By Radisson Aziziyah , Makkah
Description:
Experience the ancient Holy City in a new light at the Park Inn by Radisson Makkah Aziziyah
A modern representation of Islamic architecture, the hotel features contemporary amenities that match a convenient location near the city’s holy attractions.

Enjoy fantastic cuisine in our inviting lobby café or the AL Sharq Restaurant, which serves fresh ingredients prepared with finesse.

Recharge and refresh in our spa and fitness area, divided into spaces for men and women, and offering hydrotherapy treatments, a steam room, sauna, hairdressers and a nail spa.

Hold better meetings with our modern business facilities, just over 80 minutes from King Abdulaziz International Airport in Jeddah.

Name: Residence Inn by Marriott Tulsa Downtown
Description: Set a pace that suits you at Residence Inn by Marriott. Whether you're with us for a few days, a few weeks, or a few months, your daily routine matters. You'll thrive at Residence Inn with the conveniences you need. Like spacious suites with separate living and sleeping areas. A fully equipped kitchen ready for your favorite cuisine. Complimentary grocery delivery service to fill your refrigerator and satisfy cravings. Free Internet for connecting to work and the outside world. Netflix, Hulu, HBO Go, Youtube enabled Smart TVs. Free hot breakfast to start mornings off right and evening bar & happy hours to end the day well. And a fitness center for strengthening your body and soul. Relax and unwind when you want. And stay focused and productive when it's essential. At Residence Inn, we'll make sure you thrive during your stay.

Name: Villa Darya
Description: Villa Darya Hotel is a luxurious hotel located in upper Hunza valley near Attabad Lake. It offers a breathtaking view of the valley, including the famous Passu Cones, Shishper Peak, and other majestic mountains. The hotel’s prime location allows guests to fully immerse themselves in the natural beauty of the region and enjoy the stunning scenery from the comfort of their rooms. With top-notch amenities and personalized service, Villa Darya Hotel promises an unforgettable stay in the heart of Hunza valley.

Name: The Cedars Ranch
Description: The Cedars Ranch is a stunning wedding & event venue and glamping resort featuring inspiring modern architecture throughout 20 acres of meandering, mature live oak trees in the heart of Texas Hill Country in Wimberley. Amenities include a resort-style pool with day beds & poolside bar, 2 pickleball courts, bocce ball, walking paths, outdoor games, and more!

Name: Cosy Spaces - Serviced Accommodation
Description:
Cosy-spaces is a leading provider of fully furnished serviced accommodation in Leeds, Burnley and surrounding areas. We specialise in offering hassle-free accommodation solutions for those who are needing accommodation for work, have issues with their main home or simply just visiting the area. 

From emergencies to work trips and for making happy memories - we cater for your accommodation needs. 

Our properties are fully furnished and equipped with everything necessary to feel at home, including fully stocked kitchens dishwashers, washing machines, and more. 

Our properties are conveniently located. 

We understand that sometimes finding the right place can be a bit of a hassle - which is why we've made the process as stress-free as possible. 

Our rates include all bills, linen, and towels, and fortnightly housekeeping. 

At Cosy-spaces, we are committed to providing quality accommodation, which is why we go the extra mile to make everyone feel at home. 


If you're looking for a reliable accommodation solution for yourself or your team, look no further than Cosy-spaces.

Name: Eco House Merisi
Description:
Our cottages are located 850 meters high in picturesque village Merisi, 50 km from Batumi. Besides healthy climate with clean healing mountain air, there is also mineral waters around.
Relax like an Instagram star in our unique hotel with glass bedrooms. Immerse yourself in luxury and enjoy mountain views directly from your jacuzzi.

Name: Cambria Hotel Fort Lauderdale Beach
Description:
Welcome to Cambria Hotel Fort Lauderdale Beach
Experience the best of Fort Lauderdale Beach from the moment you arrive. Perfectly positioned at 2231 N Ocean Blvd, our hotel places you just steps from the soft sands and shimmering Atlantic waters. Here, ocean breezes, coastal charm, and modern comforts come together for a stay that’s as relaxing as it is unforgettable. Whether you’re here to unwind, celebrate, or get down to business, you’ll find everything you need right at your doorstep.

Stay Steps from the Sand
Wake up to the sound of waves and start your day just steps from one of Florida’s most iconic shorelines. With the Atlantic Ocean across the street, guests enjoy effortless beach days, no long drives, no crowded parking lots, just sunshine and sea breezes waiting for you.
Directly across from Fort Lauderdale Beach, giving you the quickest beach access through public walkways
Beach chairs available for rent through valet, just stroll across the street, and you're there
Wake up to ocean breezes, no driving, no parking lots, just beach days made easy

Meetings & Events Near the Beach
Turn your next gathering into a memorable beachfront experience at the Cambria Hotel Fort Lauderdale Beach. Our modern, versatile spaces are ideal for:
Micro weddings & vow renewals
Corporate meetings & trainings
Networking receptions
Social celebrations & private parties
Birthday milestones & reunions
Product launches & creative workshops
With room for up to 100 guests, you’ll enjoy:
Flexible meeting rooms equipped with modern A/V technology
On-site catering options tailored to your event style
Dedicated event support from planning through wrap-up
Just steps from the beach for photo-worthy moments and post-event relaxation

A diversidade do nosso leque de ofertas e a nossa vasta experiência nas áreas da hotelaria, catering, restauração e turismo rural, permite-nos marcar a diferença e primar sempre pela satisfação total dos nossos clientes.

Name: Arkaya Group
Description:
A Legacy of Exceptional Hospitality and Service
At Arkaya Group, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional experiences to our guests, combining luxury with tranquility. Our dedication to excellence has earned us a reputation for providing unparalleled comfort and personalized service, making every stay a memorable one.

Tracing Our Path of Success
Established on the ideals of luxury and serenity, Arkaya Group has evolved into a distinguished name in the hospitality industry. With a commitment to excellence and guest satisfaction, we have redefined the concept of hospitality, staying true to our core values.

Since its inception, Arkaya Group has grown from humble beginnings to become a leading provider of upscale accommodations in Gurgaon. Our journey is marked by a passion for hospitality and a relentless pursuit of perfection, ensuring unforgettable experiences for our guests.

Elevating hospitality with luxury and convenience, providing a cosmic experience in a vibrant setting.

Arkaya Group offers luxurious accommodation with top-notch amenities in the bustling city of Gurgaon. Our commitment to excellence and passion for hospitality distinguishes us in the industry.

Our Commitment
Arkaya Group is dedicated to creating exceptional experiences for our guests, offering luxury, comfort, and tranquility in every interaction. We strive to exceed expectations and set new standards of excellence in hospitality.

Core Values
At Arkaya Group, our core values of integrity, excellence, and service guide everything we do. We are committed to upholding the highest standards of hospitality, prioritizing guest satisfaction, and fostering a culture of warmth and professionalism.

Name: Regenta Place Green Leaf Manali
Description: The Regenta Place Green Leaf Manali, your host in the lap of nature, situated at a distance of about 3 kms from the Mall, away from the hustle and bustle of the town, surrounded by nature, where nature awaits to reach out and touch you with the panoramic view of the snow capped peaks, green valley with a cascading water-stream, apple orchards and the majestic ‘Hamta range and pass covered with sheets of snow, nearby. Come and experience soulful comfort in a peaceful eco-friendly ambience of REGENTA PLACE GREEN LEAF, Manali, and at the same time a holiday with a personalized experience, where you would want to come back again and again. The resort, located at Prini, Naggar Road, Manali assures you a comfortable stay. Experience the ultimate holiday while we serve you with the best of amenities and facilities. We offer a memorable experience with our services and top-notch location advantages. Our endeavor is to provide our guests with serene, homely atmosphere blended with style, comfort and privacy. The rooms are designed with utmost care to pamper you. The Regenta Place Green Leaf also offers its very own, in-house Restobar, serving local and world cuisine with excellent view of nature, for our guests to enjoy a delicious meal along with refreshing beverages. Also, an outdoor restaurant by the cascading hill-stream offers bonfire, alfresco seating in a romantic setting. The resort also caters to banqueting and conferencing requirements. Travel desk, Gymnasium, Spa, Kids Zone and a Game Room, complete the holiday experience.

Os quartos do hotel foram projetados para garantir o máximo de conforto e privacidade, oferecendo um ambiente tranquilo e relaxante. Além disso, o Hotel Praia do Bessa conta com uma ampla variedade de serviços e comodidades para tornar sua estadia ainda mais agradável.

Além dos nossos quartos projetados com o máximo de conforto e da nossa área de lazer do hotel, os hóspedes também podem desfrutar do restaurante do hotel, que serve uma deliciosa gastronomia regional, preparada com ingredientes frescos e de alta qualidade.

Não perca tempo, venha nos visitar e garantir a sua reserva!

Name: Hotel The Knights Inn
Description:
The Knights’ Inn is a clean and appealing “Luxurious Budgeted Stay” hotel.

Situated in the clean, green and open atmosphere of Jagatpura, the very fast developing area of Jaipur, it is a stone throw away from the AkshayaPatra and the Vivacity Mall. The Sitapura Industrial Area is adjacent to this locality.

More than a dozen Engineering Colleges & Universities, Medical Colleges & Hospitals and IT & other Industries are in close proximity.

It is just 20 minutes drive away from the Jaipur International Airport and the posh locality of Jaipur, Malviya Nagar having the Jawahar Circle, World Trade Park, Gaurav Towers, Fortis Hospital, EHCC Hospital, The Lalit, Marriott etc.

Thus we are ideally located for a tourist as well as a business traveler. As we are strategically located, we offer easy access to preferred destinations ranging from airport, railway station, and bus station to the city’s best shopping malls, restaurants, hotels, hospitals of international repute, Universities & colleges and the walled city of Jaipur. While you live in a modern and sophisticated portion of the city, as a tourist you can reach the walled city of Jaipur in not more than 25 minutes.

We make sure that while you are away from your home, there is nothing that you would miss… You name it and we have it around our hotel.

Safety, Security, Sanitized Stay, Sumptuous meals are our offerings to you.

So… check-in.. stay in… be relaxed… and check out with a deep satisfied smile… Happy Stay!!!

Name: Hotel ´t Sonnehuys
Description:
Hotel ´t Sonnehuys is an authentic family hotel by Scheveningen beach in The Hague (Den Haag). The beautiful jugendstil villa from 1897 in which the hotel is housed, is located just 200 meters (2 minutes walking) from the beach. The hotel is 100 meters from the AFAS Circustheater where all the famous musicals are performed. Our hotel has just 8 rooms, creating a personal and homely atmosphere. The rooms are authentic, but modern and comfortable. All rooms have an ensuite bathroom, some with bath tub or walk-in rain shower. The hotel is very central in Scheveningen, with the famous Pier, Kurhaus, harbour and all the beach restaurants within short walking distance. Imagine waking up in a comfortable room and being able to be on the beach within 5 minutes. Hotel ´t Sonnehuys has five double/twin rooms, two 3-person rooms and one single room. The 3-person rooms are perfect for small families.

Since 2022, Hotel ´t Sonnehuys is being run by maried couple Stefanie and Stefan. They took over from Stefanie´s father, who run the hotel for almost 50 years. Before that, the building has always served as a hotel under many different names. 

We look forward to welcoming you in our comfortable family hotel by the beach.

Name: LA CASA DEL PANTANO
Description:
Julio y Júlia, padre e hija, dirigen el establecimiento con muchas ganas e  ilusión y con el objetivo principal de que sus huéspedes se sientan como en casa
Se trata de un alojamiento rural de 7 habitaciones situado en La Vall de Laguar que está pensado para ofrecer a sus visitantes un espacio de tranquilidad, relajación y armonía con el entorno natural que lo rodea. Destacan sus maravillosas vistas al #Toll Blau y al #ríogirona, así como el #paisaje verde y frondoso que se puede ver desde sus balcones y terrazas. También, para los/las más aventureros/as, al lado de la casa hay una ruta que se dirige a la #Presa #Isbert.

El alojamiento tiene dos salones donde en invierno se puede disfrutar de unos momentos junto a la chimenea leyendo un libro o jugando a diferentes juegos de mesa.

Al exterior hay una amplia terraza y una piscina que, cuando llega el buen tiempo, son las protagonistas de muchos agradables momentos.

La casa del Pantano es el lugar ideal para pasar unos inolvidables días en descanso en la mejor compañía y en el mejor entorno.

No te lo pienses, ven y disfruta!
