Name: Golf & Ski Resort Ostravice
Description:
Golf & Ski Resort Ostravice je zcela výjimečný sportovní areál na úpatí Beskyd. Mezi Lysou Horou a Smrkem se nachází vše, co vás přiblíží k přírodě a odpočinku.
Přímo v resortu najdete: 
-  **** hotel s kapacitou až 80 osob
- vyhlášené mistrovské golfové hřiště
- cvičné plochy
- špičkovou restauraci
- konferenční prostory
- wellness
- zimní osvětlené běžecké tratě

V okolí najdete také:
- ideální podmínky pro turistiku a cyklo-turistiku
- lyžařské sjezdové tratě
- překrásnou přírodu

Celý resort spravuje společnost Ostravice Sport a.s. a na jejím běhu se podílí tým více, než 40 nadšených zaměstnanců, kteří jsou připraveni poskytovat ty nejkvalitnější služby.

Golfové hřiště Golf Club Ostravice, projektované Chrisem Johnsonem, který již projektoval řadu hřišť v Evropě a Africe, má délku 6500 metrů. Jedná se o mistrovské osmnáctijamkové golfové hřiště s parem 72, typu parkland. Prvních pět jamek je velmi otevřených a hned tři z nich se hrají kolem vody, která je často strategicky umístěna a otestuje i psychické kvality golfistů. V dalších jamkách hřiště víc uzavírá nádherných zákoutí listnatých lesů, které vám dají požitek nejen ze hry, ale i z krás okolní krajiny. Zázemí areálu představuje golfový klub s restaurací Panorama a hotel GREEN INN pro možnost ubytování přímo na golfovém hřišti. Budova Driving range poskytuje třináct krytých odpališť a přímo navazuje na prostory golfového klubu.

Spolu s golfovým areálem vznikl rovněž kompletně osvětlený běžecký areál, jehož cílem je poskytovat kvalitní tréninkové podmínky pro příznivce běžeckého lyžování. V místech, kde se od jara do podzimu trénuje golf najdete mechanicky upravenou běžeckou trať v délce cca 2 km a šířce 7,5 m. 

Golf Club Ostravice otevřel ve svém resortu nový hotel Green Inn Hotel, který je ideálně umístěn v regionu pěti 18jamkových golfových hřišť - European Tour Region. Hotel je umístěn v srdci resortu a poskytuje fascinující výhledy na beskydské údolí.

Name: Hotel Dravidar, Velankanni
Description:
Mr L Muthiaha Udayar was born in the year 1912 . He joined Royal Indian Army after completing is SSLC at St Joseph’s college , Trichy .He retired as subedar, from the army after serving in the Army in the year 1946 . He came to Vailankanni in the year 1947 by using one rupee pension he got from the Indian Government he tried his hands in various business like provision stores , Meat shop , fire wood shop before opening a restaurant. Hotel Dravidar was started in 1955 under thatched roof with just one employee. It offered only breakfast - Idli being the only item sold . Idly was placed on the table and customers used to have them and make the payment themself in the cash table which was almost left unattended . It was continued by his son who expanded it further and now it is being run by the third generation .

Offering views of the Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health (a revered pilgrimage site) a 6-minute walk away, this casual budget hotel is also a 12-minute walk from Velankanni train station and 5 minutes on foot from Velankanni Beach.

The straightforward rooms come with limited Wi-Fi, complimentary bottled water and flat-screen TVs. Upgraded rooms add air-conditioning. Some quarters, including family rooms, offer sitting areas.

A low-key restaurant serves international cuisine, including breakfast. Parking is available.

We always strive to provide tasty food made in a hygienic way .

Name: Ombak Group
Description:
The Ombak Group, is one of Indonesia’s fastest growing, full service hotel resort brands, offering world class accommodation with vibrant and friendly hospitality in remote tropical island destinations.

From humble beginnings, the Ombak Group started in 1998 with a small 12 room backpacker hostel, located on the tropical Island of Gili Trawangan. This hostel has now grown to become the award winning Hotel Vila Ombak.

Over the years the Ombak Group has expanded to provide a range of hospitality and tourism products. These hotels, hostels, transportation services and theme parks enjoyed by both international and local Indonesian markets.

The Ombak Group offers a total of 2,000 rooms across 6 different accommodation facilities; it services over 50,000 guests annually; and employs over 5,000 people in Indonesia. The group offers international brands such as Hotel Vila Ombak, Hotel Ombak Sunset and Gili Ombak Express Fastboat service, as well as the local Mirah Brand offering the Mirah Hotel and Dormitory in Banyuwangi, Mirah Hostel in Bali, the Mirah Hotel and Mirah Fantasia Theme Park in Makassar.

Name: VIEJA POSADA Hotel Histórico
Description:

En el año 2005 se inicia este emprendimiento con el espíritu de transformar estas antiguas casonas en un espacio que mantenga la historia, la identidad e invite al visitante a relajarse en un cálido y acogedor ambiente. Su arquitectura permiten vivenciar la combinación perfecta entre lo autóctono, colonial y lo contemporáneo, donde el amor por el diseño y el arte es la esencia del lugar.

La Despensa Cocina& Cultura especialmente diseñada para que los huéspedes y visitantes puedan disfrutar de los sabores de la cocina Andina acompañados de buenos vinos de altura y música en vivo los fines de semana. 
Ofrecemos eventos personalizados, sociales y corporativos.

Name: Hotel ZAZZ
Description:
not your mother's motel
home of the golden banana
Hotel Zazz is the brainchild and passion project of hospitality visionary Dr. Sharmin Dharas, an Albuquerque and Nob Hill native. Her parents owned and operated the property as the University Lodge motel since 1996. This meant many long days and late nights as a child, with just the hallways, rooms, and her imagination as her playground.

Ever since then, her mission was simple: create an unforgettable immersive boutique hotel experience though unique art, a melody of chromatic visuals, and a vibration of sounds that breaks free from the ordinary. With a dream, a lot of elbow grease, and some help from local artists, she turned an old motel into a bold hotel that prides itself in it's sustainability, community, and charitable giving.

“The vibrancy and life of my culture has been at the heart of the Hotel Zazz design. I hope this project will bring a new colorful culture and experience to the already diverse Albuquerque community, in a different way than we’re used to.”

View our brand pillars below, or click here to read all the press buzz!

Name: Mini Resort Kaya Verdi
Description:
In augustus 2023 zijn wij als gezin (ik, mijn man en onze 2 kinderen) naar Curacao verhuisd 

Onze grote droom was het kopen van een mini resort met meerdere appartementen. Na een korte zoektocht is dat gelukt en zijn we sinds 16 februari trotse eigenaren van Mini resort Kaya Verdi. 

Aangezien het resort wel wat extra liefde kon gebruiken, hebben wij afgelopen maanden een grondige renovatie gedaan, en hebben we het eea gemoderniseerd en opgefrist. 

Nu kunnen we al onze gasten met een grote glimlach ontvangen en een fijne vakantie bezorgen 

Ons mini resort ligt in de veilige en rustige wijk Cas Grandi, vlakbij Jan Thiel Beach en Mambo Beach.
Het bestaat uit drie heerlijke moderne appartementen en een groot zwembad. Ook hebben we een heerlijke groene oase om ons heen en is het helemaal kindvriendelijk gemaakt

Waarom kiezen voor Mini Resort Kaya Verdi?

Centrale locatie- vlakbij mooie stranden, supermarkt en restaurants

Kimberley Hamilton & Karl Mittring

Name: Rubina Syariah Hotel
Description:
Rubina Syariah Hotel menghadirkan dimensi baru dalam dunia perhotelan dengan mengutamakan kenyamanan, ketenangan, dan ketaatan dalam setiap aspek pelayanan. Diresmikan pada tahun 2023, hotel ini dirancang sebagai akomodasi berkonsep syariah yang modern dan ramah keluarga, memberikan pengalaman menginap yang menyenangkan tanpa mengesampingkan nilai-nilai keislaman.

Didirikan oleh Yudha Prasetyo dan Titik Efianti, Rubina Syariah Hotel berada di bawah naungan MRA Group sebuah badan usaha yang juga menaungi berbagai lini bisnis lain seperti Akataraland dan YPA Architecture Studio. Dengan dukungan dari para profesional di bidangnya, Rubina hadir sebagai perpaduan antara desain arsitektur yang elegan, pelayanan syariah yang hangat, dan fasilitas lengkap yang mendukung ibadah serta gaya hidup halal.

Name: Hotel du Vin Franschhoek
Description: Ten luxury rooms in a beautifully restored Victorian building from 1904, together with award-winning wine experiences promises our guest an unforgettable stay in the centre of the Franschhoek Village, the Food & Wine Capital of South Africa.

Name: Park Hotel Helsinki

Name: ibis Amsterdam Centre Stopera
Description:
U voelt zich meteen thuis in het ibis Amsterdam Centre Stopera, een stille en rustgevende plek dichtbij de beroemde grachtengordel van de stad. Bijna alle hoogtepunten van de stad zijn te voet te bereiken, en in het hotel zelf geniet u van het comfort van onze rustgevende SweetBeds, een eigen badkamer, een flatscreen-tv en gratis WiFi. Onze receptie is 24/7 geopend en laat uitchecken is altijd mogelijk. Elke ochtend is er ontbijt en u kunt ook genieten van een heerlijke lunch of diner in de ibis Kitchen.

Amsterdam biedt de perfecte balans tussen geschiedenis, cultuur en moderniteit. Het ibis Amsterdam Centre Stopera ligt op een ideale locatie in het centrum, met het Waterlooplein, Centraal Station en Rembrandtplein op korte loopafstand. Madame Tussauds, De Dam, het Rijksmuseum en het Van Goghmuseum zijn makkelijk per metro of tram te vinden. Liever shoppen? Dat kan op de Kalverstraat, Leidsestraat en de Nieuwendijk, of neus even rond op de Albert Cuypmarkt en het Waterlooplein.

Ons hotel ligt midden in het centrum van de stad, op loopafstand van de Dam, het Rembrandtplein, de Wallen en de belangrijkste toeristische attracties en musea. Diverse metro-, tram- en bushaltes nabij het hotel.

Name: Aabach Hotel
Description:
Mitten im malerischen Zürcher Oberland direkt neben dem wunderschönen Naturschutzgebiet um den Pfäffikersee, liegt unser Aabach Hotel in Wetzikon. Der namensgebende Aabach ist nur einen Steinwurf entfernt. Ein schöner Spaziergang führt in wenigen Minuten vom Hotel zum Pfäffikersee — traumhaft zu jeder Jahreszeit. In die andere Richtung erreichen Sie Wetzikon «Downtown» ebenfalls in ein paar Minuten und sind in 20 Minuten mit dem Zug in der Stadt Zürich oder Rapperswil. Wir verfügen auch über genügend kostenfreie Parkplätze.

Unser Hotel ist einfach konzipiert und topmodern ausgestattet. Wir verfügen über acht ruhige Zimmer mit Boxspring-Betten und Klimaanlage und natürlich haben Sie Zugang zu kostenlosem WLan. Wir legen Wert auf eine herzliche und familiäre Atmosphäre — ob Sie nun geschäftlich oder privat reisen, Sie sollen unseren Service schätzen dürfen. Gerne bieten wir Ihnen indviduelle Übernachtungs-Kombiangebote mit Kulinarik, Gesundheit und Sport.

Name: Nes Gard
Description: Nes Gard er et lite og hyggelig gårdshotell i Luster, innerst i Sognefjorden. Midt i blant 3 nasjonalparker er vi det perfekte utgangspunktet for turer både sommer og vinter. Velkommen til Nes Gard!

Name: Hotel Aurora Montezuma
Description: El Hotel Aurora es un lugar muy acogedor y comodo. A 100 metros de la hermosa playa principal y frente al parque verde rodeado de jardines tropicales da la mas calida bienvenida hace mas de 32 años a sus valiosos clientes y estimados visitantes del pueblo de MONTEZUMA. Sus áreas generosas y privadas con hamacas y plantas ornamentales ofrecen vistas panorámicas hacia exoticos paisajes alrededor como el cerro llamado el Monte Zuma y el gran Oceano Pacifico. Las Junior Suite y Suites en la primera y segunda planta cuentan con altos cielo rasos de maderas tropicales para un ambiente fresco y agradable. Las habitaciones dobles y quadruples en la planta baja estan hechos de una mezcla de piedra amarilla y diferentes clases de madera. Cada habitación tiene su propio estilo y decoracion que regala un toque individual y agradable.

Buďte vítáni. A buďte jako doma.
V naší vile se i napoprvé budete cítit, jako byste sem jezdili odjakživa. Snad je to kulisami Českého ráje, možná geniem loci z dob architekta Čapka, jisté ale je, že vás zdejší prostředí a atmosféra svedou ke skutečnému odpočinku.
Půvabnou historii jsme spojili se svěží modernou a nabídku služeb ušili tak, aby se vám nechtělo odjet. A když už, tak jen na krátko. Je to přeci i Vaše vila!

Name: The Chapter Hotels
Description:
Welcome to The Chapter Hotels, your ultimate destination for affordable comfort and competitive pricing in the heart of London.

At The Chapter Hotels, we understand the importance of finding the perfect balance between quality and affordability, which is why we pride ourselves on providing budget-friendly accommodations without compromising on comfort. Our prime locations in London ensure that you have convenient access to the city's vibrant attractions, bustling streets, and cultural landmarks.

Step into our inviting lobby and experience our warm and friendly atmosphere, where our dedicated team is always ready to assist you with a smile. Whether you're a business traveler, a weekend explorer, or a budget-conscious tourist, we have the perfect room to cater to your needs.

Our well-appointed rooms are designed with your comfort in mind. Sink into plush bedding and enjoy a peaceful night's sleep after a long day of exploring the city. Stay connected with our complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi, and catch up on your favorite shows on the flat-screen TV. Our rooms are equipped with modern amenities to ensure a seamless stay.

At The Chapter Hotels, we believe that affordable pricing should never mean compromising on quality. Our competitive rates are designed to provide excellent value for your money, allowing you to make the most of your London adventure without breaking the bank. We understand the importance of offering a comfortable and convenient stay at a price that suits your budget.

In addition to our comfortable rooms, our hotels offer a range of convenient services and facilities to enhance your stay. Start your day with a delicious continental breakfast served in our cozy dining area, and fuel up for your day of exploration. Our knowledgeable staff is always on hand to provide local insights and recommendations, ensuring you make the most of your time in London.

Name: Hotel Diamond -Chittagong

Welcome to our Diamond hotel in the heart of Chittagong Metropolitan City! At our establishment, we believe in providing an exceptional experience that combines quality and affordability for both low-income and medium-class travelers.

Whether you're visiting Chittagong for business, exploring its cultural heritage, or simply passing through, our hotel is your ideal choice. Experience the perfect blend of quality, affordability, and convenience at our centrally located hotel in Chittagong Metropolitan City. We look forward to welcoming you!

Name: Bratislava Hotel Association
Description:
Naša asociácia
Naším zámerom je podporovať dobré meno bratislavského hotelierstva a cestovného ruchu v hlavnom meste.

VIAC O ASOCIÁCII
Prostredníctvom BHA vytvárame entitu, ktorá má funkciu komunikácie s celým trhovým prostredím.

V prevádzkovej oblasti diskutujeme s členmi o nástrojoch na koordinovaný rast kvality poskytovaných služieb a súčasne systémovú optimalizáciu nákladov.

Komunikujeme vzájomne i navonok nadbytočnú a nevyhovujúcu legislatívu v hotelierstve, sme otvorení spolupráci pri tvorbe a novelizácii zákonov, ktoré sa nás týkajú a formujú cestovný ruch.

Name: Lofsdalens Fjällhotell
Description:
Lofsdalens Fjällhotell är Bleck-gruppens jättemysiga nyöppnade hotell i hjärtat av Lofsdalen. Hotellet ligger omgivet av höga fjäll och sjöar, med både utför- och ländskidåkning, cykling, vandring och fiske precis utanför dörren! 

Vi som står bakom hotellet driver även restaurangerna Bleck på Södermalm och
Hellas Storstugan i Nackareservatet, så den som besökt våra krogar i Stockholm kommer känna igen sig i matsalen på hotellet. Här görs allt från grunden, vi stoppar vår egen korv, röker fisk, bakar bröd och på menyn blandar sig mindre plockrätter perfekta att dela över bordet med vällagade större rätter. Och så har vi Härjedalens bästa pizza! Vår restaurangchef ser även till att vi har en rolig och varierande vinlista
med mycket kul naturvin. 

Vi är ett gäng som brinner för mat, dryck och roliga fjälläventyr!

Name: The Spa Universe
Description:
The Spa Universe is a premier, high-end spa solutions provider catering to the discerning needs of the spa industry.
We specialize in offering a comprehensive range of products and services, including furniture and equipment supplies as well as premium hair, skin, and nail care products from the world's leading luxury brands.

Crafted by Madi International, founded in 1991.

Name: Hotel Sis Pins - Puerto Pollensa
Description:
Hotel Sis Pins is, without doubt, one of the most charming hotels in Pollensa.  A well-kept secret of timeless elegance and sophistication combined with a warmth and welcome that entices guests to return time and time again.

Opened in 1952, this traditional Mallorquin beach hotel is full of character and charm. Among the many VIP guests, legend has it that Agatha Christie once stayed at Sis Pins in Mallorca whilst writing the novel ‘Problem at Pollensa Bay’. Most beach hotels in Mallorca will struggle to compare to this hotel that is situated on the sandy beach within walking distance to the marina and shops. The short 45 minute transfer makes this a perfect holiday destination in Mallorca.

The sea view rooms must be the best located in Puerto Pollensa, this beach hotel is only metres away from the warm turquoise Mediterranean, perfect for swimming, yachting and other water-based activities. Out of all the hotels in Pollensa, Sis Pins is associated with Cappuccino Grand Café. Cappuccino Grand Café is so close to the sea, that diners can hear the sound of waves as they enjoy tasting Mallorquin specialties, including local produce and wine.

For all the beach hotels in Mallorca, Sis Pins is beautifully located on the very edge of the sparkling Mediterranean Sea in the historical, wonderfully preserved Port of Pollensa, Majorca. Pollensa itself offers guests an endless wealth of diversity from relaxing on the beach to mountain to countryside ideal for all tastes and interests. Pollensa during the day basks in sleepy sunshine and at night comes alive with quality restaurants and tapas bars.

The surrounding countryside and mountain ranges tempts with hill walking, mountain sports and cycling. The ideal location to relax, taste adventure or experience at first hand Mallorcan culture. Sis Pins (Six Pines) in Mallorca, enjoys this great location and takes prime spot in the middle of the bay, smugly enjoying uninterrupted sea views.

Name: Bellmont Hotel
Description:
Welcome to Bellmont Hotel,
A luxurious hotel chain is located in Noida, Srinagar, Shimla, and Delhi, making it easy for travelers to find the perfect stay regardless of where they're headed. We offer a total of 111 well-equipped rooms, 2 restaurants, 3 banquet halls, and 1 conference hall. 
Our rooms are designed to provide the perfect balance of comfort and luxury, featuring state-of-the-art amenities such as flat-screen TVs, comfortable beds, tea and coffee makers, personal lockers, and bathtubs. 
 Whether you're traveling for business or leisure, the Bellmont Hotel promises to provide you with a memorable and comfortable stay. With our prime locations, state-of-the-art facilities, and personalized services, we ensure that our guests have ac and enjoyable experience.

Name: Hampton Inn & Suites by Hilton Burlington Toronto
Description:

Our hotel is only 10 kilometers from the picturesque Burlington Waterfront Trail and vibrant downtown area, home to a variety of shops and dining options. Explore local attractions such as the renowned Royal Botanical Gardens and the charming Village Square, both just a short drive away, offering guests a mix of natural beauty and cultural experiences. Elevate your stay with our indoor heated pool or keep up your fitness routine at our fully equipped fitness center, featuring a Peloton bike. Have some downtime? Visit our licensed sports simulator room, The Clubhouse, and explore 13 interactive sports and activities, including golf, baseball, soccer, dodgeball, and more. For event planning, our hotel provides 1,200 square feet of flexible event space, perfect for small meetings and gatherings. We are dedicated to ensuring your visit is both productive and enjoyable.

1215 Appleby Line, Burlington, ON L7L 5H9

Name: El Cielito Hotels
Description:
El Cielito Hotels have been providing value-oriented hotel facilities in the Philippines.

El Cielito Hotel Baguio is the first hotel built in Baguio City after the devastating 1990 earthquake. Built-in 1994, the hotel sits on Engineer Hill offering a panoramic view of the city. It is also just a 5-minute walk to SM-Baguio and Session Road, the city premier commercial districts. Its clientele is mostly corporate but also serves the top inbound travel and tour agencies serving Baguio City and the other tourist spots like Banaue Rice Terraces and Sagada.

In 1998, El Cielito opened the first hotel in Sta. Rosa, Laguna. Sta.Rosa, the country premier industrial corridor. It is host to some of the most famous brands in the world like Coca Cola, Toyota, Ford, Honda, Nissan, and Isuzu. The property is located along the Sta. Rosa Tagaytay Road, which is now the most popular route to the scenic City of Tagaytay. The clientele of El Cielito Hotel Sta. Rosa is very much corporate as it serves primarily the industrial parks located in the area.

The Management and staff of El Cielito Hotels are highly motivated professionals with years of service and training in five-star hotels and other lodging establishments.

OUR COMMITMENT: A Clean Room, A Friendly Atmosphere, Professional Service.

Name: Lemaiyan Suites
Description:
Welcome to Lemaiyan Suites, Your Gateway to Tranquil Naivasha!
Are you ready to immerse yourself in an extraordinary world of luxury, serenity, and adventure? Look no further than Lemaiyan Suites, your ultimate destination for an unparalleled experience nestled in the heart of Naivasha. Join us in this exclusive sneak peek to uncover the exceptional offerings that await you at Lemaiyan Suites!
Discover Naivasha
Perched on the serene shores of Naivasha, Lemaiyan Suites offers you the perfect escape from the chaos of everyday life. Picture waking up to the whispering breeze through ancient acacia trees, and the awe-inspiring vistas of the azure waters extending to the horizon. Our resort's prime location ensures effortless access to the natural wonders and cultural treasures that Naivasha has to offer.
Unrivaled Accommodations
At Lemaiyan Suites, we believe that your accommodation should be as extraordinary as the surrounding beauty. Our meticulously designed rooms and suites boast modern amenities and decor that seamlessly blend contemporary comfort with a touch of local allure. Whether you opt for an opulent beachfront villa, a sumptuous suite with a private plunge pool, or a cozy room with a balcony overlooking Naivasha, you'll discover your perfect haven here.








Indulge Your Senses

Mathieu Batut, Hotel Manager

Perched above Hasle's idyllic old harbor and Bornholm's western Baltic coast stands the 150-year-old HOTEL KYSTEN.

A location with a unique view of yachts and colorful fishing boats, Hasle's beautiful red warehouses, the endless sky, and the Baltic Sea as far as the eye can see.

A view that in the evening transforms the sky and sea into a true inferno of intense reds, yellows, oranges, and blues as the sun dips below the horizon.

Here is your charming starting point for your vacation, party, meeting, conference, trip with friends, and more on Bornholm, with room for 50 overnight guests and 100 guests for parties, meetings, and conferences.

Restaurant Kysten indulges you with small dishes, tapas, sharing plates, and exquisite refreshments. It's easy and delicious, and wonderfully informal.

Hotel Kysten is part of J&L Hotels, which also operates Jantzens Hotel in Gudhjem on Bornholm: https://www.linkedin.com/company/jantzens-hotel-aps/

Name: Osaka Excel Hotel Tokyu
Description:
歴史が刻まれた「御堂筋」という名称は、
北御堂（きたみどう）と南御堂（みなみみどう）という二つの寺に由来します。大阪エクセルホテル東急は、御堂筋の中ほどにある南御堂の山門の上層部に建てられた珍しい建築物です。

夏…寺の境内で賑やかな盆踊りが繰り広げられます。賑やかな笛や太鼓の音につられて、地元の人たちと一緒に、あなたも盆踊りに挑戦してみては？きっと、他では体験できない楽しい思い出になることでしょう。

The name of Midosuji itself evokes history recalling two temples, Kita Mido and Minami Mido. Osaka Excel Hotel Tokyu is a singular structure built in the upper part of the latter’s main gate, right in the heart of Midosuji.

In summer, a lively Bon dance enlivens the temple precinct, inviting one and all to dance with locals to the sound of vivacious flutes and drums. Joining in such traditional cultural experience is the stuff of lifelong memories made here and only here.

Name: ANNO DOMINI 1716 apARTments
Description:
Willkommen bei ANNO DOMINI 1716, Ihrem „Zuhause auf Zeit“ im Herzen der Altstadt von Marktheidenfeld. Ideal zentral gelegen in Main-Spessart, zwischen Würzburg, Wertheim und Aschaffenburg. Seit 2011 haben wir, Uschi, Florian und Werner Jannek, uns der liebevollen Renovierung und Erhaltung historischer Gebäude verschrieben, um unseren Gästen eine einzigartige Wohnatmosphäre zu bieten. In zentralster Lage zwischen der Hof- und Wagnergasse haben wir ein architektonisch herausragendes Ensemble geschaffen, das Geschichte und Moderne in perfektem Einklang verbindet. Und seit 2024 bieten wir 5 weitere komfortable Apartments nahe dem Gewerbegebiet in der Baumhofstraße 55 mit dem Parkplatz direkt vor der Apartmenttür.

Nach dem Bau unseres modernen Stadthauses und eines architektonisch prämierten Bürotraktes mit Kunstgalerie, erweiterten wir 2018 unser Angebot. Die benachbarten, denkmalgeschützten Gebäude wurden nach einer umfassenden 18-monatigen Sanierung in exklusive Studios, Apartments und Suiten umgewandelt. Hinter den historischen Fassaden erwartet unsere Gäste heute zeitgemäßer Komfort in einem stilvollen Ambiente, das den Charme vergangener Jahrhunderte bewahrt.

Unsere Anlage bietet eine Vielzahl an Highlights: von den jahrhundertealten Sandsteinmauern über originale Kopfsteinpflaster im Innenhof bis hin zu den liebevoll restaurierten Gewölbekellern. Jeder Aufenthalt bei uns ist geprägt von der einzigartigen Verbindung von traditioneller Handwerkskunst und modernster Ausstattung – ideal für Geschäftsreisende, Langzeitgäste oder Urlauber, die Wert auf gehobenes Wohnen legen.

Opplevelser som bygger samhold.
Vi tilbyr en rekke aktiviteter som styrker relasjoner og gir energi til arbeidsdagen. VR-spill, multisport-simulator, klatring, treningssenter og et av Norges største alpinanlegg ligger rett i nærheten.

Rom for ro og restitusjon.
Velværeavdelingen vår har badstue, dampbad og rolige soner som gir en god avslutning på dagen. Hotellets 177 rom holder høy standard, og flere har utsikt mot fjellene rundt.

Et naturlig valg for næringslivet.
Quality Hotel Skifer passer for bedrifter som ønsker å kombinere faglig innhold med gode opplevelser. Vi tilpasser opplegget til deres behov,  enten det gjelder kurs, strategimøter eller større samlinger.

Kontakt oss!
Vi hjelper deg gjerne med å planlegge ditt neste arrangement.

 *Ideally situated for the M58 and M6 motorways.

Name: Turismo Gestioni
Description:
Turismo Gestioni è una società specializzata in gestione alberghiera, nata dall’esperienza consolidata di professionisti del settore turistico, immobiliare e finanziario. Offriamo ai proprietari di strutture ricettive una gestione completa, trasparente e orientata alla crescita sostenibile nel tempo.

I Nostri Valori
Affidabilità
Un team qualificato con un’esperienza significativa nel settore hospitality e nella gestione strutture ricettive.

Competenza
Un know-how multidisciplinare che integra hotel management, finanza, amministrazione, marketing e consulenza normativa.

Trasparenza
Processi chiari, dati condivisi e una gestione che garantisce visibilità totale al proprietario.

Crescita
Valorizziamo ogni struttura attraverso strategie orientate alla performance, al miglioramento costante e alla redditività a lungo termine.

La nostra realtà si distingue per solidità, affidabilità e una rete di relazioni strategiche con istituti bancari, fornitori e partner di primo livello. Questo ci consente di affrontare ogni fase del percorso di valorizzazione alberghiera — dalla riqualificazione strutturale alla pianificazione finanziaria, dal posizionamento del brand all’ottimizzazione gestionale — con piena sicurezza operativa.

Ci avvaliamo di professionisti specializzati in hospitality che ogni giorno contribuiscono alla qualità del soggiorno dei nostri ospiti: personale di accoglienza, ristorazione, housekeeping, manutenzione e servizi complementari. Figure fondamentali che assicurano standard elevati, continuità operativa e un'esperienza impeccabile.

Nestled among majestic mountains with breathtaking ocean views, our hotel offers a unique retreat from the everyday hustle. Name: Restaurant Søgaarden
Description:
Det er altid noget særligt at holde en fest, stor som lille og på Søgaarden gør vi altid noget ganske særligt ud af festen, så du trygt kan slappe af og nyde tiden sammen med dine gæster.

Vi fejrer alt lige fra helt små arrangementer til de ”store øjeblikke” og vores beliggenhed og kapacitet gør mulighederne mange med arrangementer fra 10 og helt op til 300 personer - med plads til både at spise og danse.

På Søgaarden er du naturligvis med til at vælge farven på duge og servietter, så du får festen lige præcis, som du ønsker.

	 

Søgaarden ligger roligt og uforstyrret i naturskønne omgivelser kun et stenkast fra, og med en smuk udsigt over, Sunds sø. 
Dette gør at Søgaarden er den perfekte og uforglemmelige ramme for de store øjeblikke.
På Søgaarden sætter vi en ære i, at vore gæster føler sig velkomne og, at atmosfæren er hyggelig og behagelig. 
Restaurant Søgaarden er rammen om det vigtige møde, den gode fest og det hyggelige samvær.

Aitech es una firma especializada en el desarrollo integral de destinos glamping. Su enfoque trasciende la simple construcción de domos geodésicos para centrarse en la creación de negocios de hospitalidad exitosos y rentables desde el primer día.
El modelo de negocio de Aitech consiste en gestionar y unificar cada fase del proyecto; financiera, arquitectónica, constructiva y comercial, todo bajo una sola dirección estratégica. El resultado para inversionistas y propietarios es la entrega de un negocio completamente funcional, posicionado en el mercado y optimizado para generar rentabilidad, eliminando la complejidad de coordinar múltiples disciplinas.
Más de 100 proyectos terminados respaldan el compromiso y trabajo de Aitech.

Name: Hindukush Villa Chitral
Description:
Welcome to Hindukush Villa, your ultimate retreat in the picturesque region of Chitral! 

At Hindukush Villa, we offer a unique blend of comfort, tranquility, and local charm, providing our guests with an unforgettable experience. Nestled amidst the majestic Hindukush mountain range, our guest house is an oasis of serenity, surrounded by breathtaking natural beauty.

Our well-appointed rooms are designed to ensure your utmost relaxation and convenience, offering modern amenities and a cozy ambiance. Whether you are a solo traveler, a couple seeking a romantic getaway, or a family on vacation, we have the perfect accommodation to suit your needs.

Indulge in authentic Chitrali hospitality as our dedicated and friendly staff cater to your every need. From warm greetings to personalized services, we strive to create a welcoming environment where you feel at home. Our team is always available to assist you in planning excursions, arranging transportation, and providing local insights to help you make the most of your stay.

At Hindukush Villa, we understand the importance of gastronomic experiences, and our talented chefs tantalize your taste buds with a delectable array of local and international cuisines. Enjoy mouthwatering delicacies prepared using fresh, locally sourced ingredients, showcasing the flavors of the region.

Immerse yourself in the rich cultural heritage of Chitral by exploring nearby attractions such as the historic Chitral Fort, the vibrant local bazaars, and the enchanting Kalash Valley. Engage in thrilling outdoor activities like hiking, trekking, and wildlife spotting, all within easy reach from our guest house.

Whether you seek adventure, relaxation, or a blend of both, Hindukush Villa is your gateway to an unforgettable experience in Chitral. Connect with us to book your stay and embark on a journey of discovery in the mesmerizing Hindukush region.

 Hindukush Villa: Where comfort meets nature, and memories are made!

Basado en su cultura de recibir famliares y amigos con gran atención y dedicación.   ian significa “hijo de…” y asi te recibimos, honrando el amor maternal, y con ese gustito de sentirte como si estuvieras en casa.

Nuestra Misión: Desarrollar un producto hotelero de alta calidad, que sorprenda y supere siempre las expectativas de nuestros huéspedes, basado en un equipo de trabajo profesional y con un elevado sentido de la vocación de servicio, y en proveedores elegidos cuidadosamente dentro de la comunidad, en pos del mantenimiento de esos estándares de calidad y de una excelente relación con el medio que nos rodea.

Name: Kahya Otel Ankara
Description:
Kendinize zaman ayırın… Bizim için değerlisiniz…

Kahya Otel Ankara, modern tarzını kusursuz hizmet anlayışıyla bir araya getiriyor.

İş seyahati, tatil, gezi… Ankara’ya yolunuz hangi sebeple düşmüş olursa olsun konaklayacağınız süre boyunca size otelimizde teknolojinin, damak tadının, rahat bir uykunun ve bir otelden beklediğiniz her tür hizmetin en iyisini sunmayı ilke edindik. 

Pencerelerinden Ankara’nın kalbini görebileceğiniz Kahya Otel’de, zevk, kalite ve konforun bir arada olduğu mimari anlayış ile tasarlanmış odalar ve ergonomik yataklarda seyahatinizin tüm yorgunluğunu atabilir, otel mutfağının leziz yemekleri ile damağınızı şenlendirebilir ve Ankara’nın en stratejik noktalarına en kısa sürede ve kolayca ulaşabilirsiniz. 

72 odadan oluşan otelimiz, şehrin en önemli alışveriş ve kültür merkezlerine de yürüme mesafesinde olan konumuyla şehir içi ulaşım stresinden uzak olmanızı sağlar.

Name: Rudha-Na-Craige
Description:
Rudha-Na-Craige is a beautiful Victorian house in the town of Inveraray on the west coast of Scotland overlooking the picturesque Loch Fyne with its rolling hills backdrop. 

Rated 4* Gold by the Scottish Tourist Board. 

Built in 1863 by the Duke of Argyll, the house was requisitioned by the Admiralty during the war years when the Loch shores were used for naval training. In 2006, it was completely restored to its former glory and modernised to provide what can only be described as 'Luxury Accommodation'. 

The house is situated next to the town's nine hole golf course which is open to all visitors. 

The Town of Inveraray offers many attractions such as the Jail and Castle for those on vacation and is an excellent base for touring in Argyll & Bute and beyond. 

Our six bedrooms are individually designed with fabrics, furnishings and ornaments specially chosen to reflect the character of the rooms. All have en-suite bathrooms and splendid views across the loch and garden. Only the single room does not have a loch view but compensates with a panoramic garden view. 

A combination of fresh fruit, cereals followed by porridge, kippers or a freshly made Full Scottish breakfast will get your day off to a hearty start! 

Complimentary WiFi available throughout the house.

A few hours at the SOU Eco Camp will be nothing more than a wholesome getaway one needs to break away from city’s hustle bustle. Don’t we all know the benefits of the naturals. The waters, hills, farms and jungles. Nature is indeed, good for all of us.

With the help of a good qualified and well trained local tribal staff, trained by our sister organization HariPrabha Hospitality Centre, exclusively working towards tribal enhancement and training, for your unforgettable hospitality experience and refreshing staycation.

SOU ECO CAMP is a commitment towards conservation & local community following all the eco norms.

Book with us, your moments of peace, and let us take care of rest to make it worthwhile

Name: 7 Bluff Cabins + RV Park
Description:
7 Bluff Cabins is situated along 50 acres of Pecan, Cypress, and Juniper trees on the banks of the Frio River in Concan, Texas. Towering over the property is Seven Bluff itself, a sheer limestone cliff named after the “7” emblazoned on its face.

We are sort of the quiet-type around here. We cater to families and friends looking for a good time in our backyard and share the beauty of the Frio River and the surrounding hills.

Our family relocated from Houston to Concan in 1988. Over the years, we have built a business and home that we love. We respect nature and the Frio, and we expect our guests to do the same. We don’t do loud parties, loud music, fireworks, firearms, recreational vehicles, etc.

Alexa Management, which includes two children that relocated here in ’88, has vast experience in hospitality, with both cabins and more traditional hotels. Alexa seeks to support local artists and makers, to build and operate sustainably, and earn our coworkers’ and customers’ appreciation and loyalty every day.

In the family since 1988, 7 Bluff Cabins has operated with one goal in mind: to make sure our guests have a relaxing vacation that allows for enjoying the best the Frio River has to offer.

Vi erbjuder vackert renoverade konferenslokaler belägna i brukets gamla industribyggnad där moderna faciliteter förenas med platsens historiska karaktär. Det natursköna läget intill Svartån ger dessutom en rofylld inramning och en inspirerande miljö. Perfekt för effektiva möten. 

Skultuna är mer än en plats att bara övernatta på - det är en plats att uppleva. Välkommen att boka ditt rum, er konferenslokal, en middag eller varför inte en plats vid något av våra unika evenemang. Vi ser fram emot att dela vår destination med er!

Name: Интерхотел Сандански
Description:
Интерхотел Сандански е разположен в югозападна България, регион добре познат с лечебният си климат и минерални извори. Хотелът се намира в центъра на Сандански, само на няколко крачки от живописният градски парк, главната търговска улица и в близост до редица културни и исторически забележителности.

Интерхотел Сандански разполага с един от най-големите медицински центрове за балнеолечение и рехабилитация на Балканския полуостров.

Хотелът предлага на своите гости 285 комфортни стаи и апартаменти, един класически и два тематични ресторанта, лоби бар и бар-басейн.

На разположение на гостите са три басейна с минерална вода, единият от които е термален с температура на водата до 36°C.

Комплексът разполага с пет тенис корта с високо технологична настилка, подходяща за организиране и на професионални турнири.

За провеждане на семинари, фирмени събития, работни срещи и др., хотела предлага три конферентни зали с капацитет от 30 до 220 места, място за изложбени площи и презентации.

Desde cócteles artesanales hasta música envolvente, nuestros espacios son el escenario perfecto para vivir noches inolvidables. Descubre la mezcla perfecta de diversión, cultura y camaradería en cada rincón de nuestros pubs!

 Comprometidos con la Excelencia: En Clock Group, nos esforzamos por superar las expectativas de nuestros huéspedes y clientes. Nuestro compromiso con la excelencia se refleja en cada detalle, desde la atención al cliente hasta la calidad de nuestras instalaciones. Somos más que un grupo empresarial; somos creadores de experiencias inolvidables.

Únete a nosotros en esta travesía de descubrimiento y hospitalidad en Cartagena. Clock Group, donde cada momento cuenta y cada experiencia es única! 

#Cartagena #Hospitalidad #ExperienciasÚnicas #ClockGroup
Espero que esta descripción sea de tu agrado. Si tienes alguna preferencia específica o si hay algún elemento que te gustaría destacar más, no dudes en decírmelo. Estoy aquí para ayudar!

Name: Alto Sana Eco Destination
Description: Alto Sana Eco Destination: Retreat Facility and Farm Lodge (Agroestancia) initiated operations as an agritourism vacation rental. In late 2023, we began offering retreat experiences for individuals and groups seeking empowerment and balance. This pivoting strategy aims to kindle empowerment through nature connectedness, agroecological exploration, and immersion in Puerto Rico's coffee culture and heritage. Our experiences are tailored for small to midsize groups, fostering renewal, refocus, and a deep connection to nature and self. Also, we offer educational programs about the island's biodiversity and farm-to-table culinary journeys, and we partner with local farmers for coffee cultivation and harvesting experiences. We aim to immerse participants and the community in Puerto Rico's landscape and culture and forge meaningful connections.

Name: SovanovaCottages
Description:
Sovanova holiday cottages are the perfect place for a vacation getaway, where nature and comfort create an unparalleled harmony. Located in a picturesque area, far from the hustle and bustle of the city, our cottages offer the peace and relaxation you need. Each cottage has been designed with comfort and aesthetics in mind, combining modern design with rustic charm.

The interiors of Sovanova cottages are spacious and bright, with large windows that let in plenty of natural light. Each cottage features a fully equipped kitchen where you can prepare meals, a spacious living room with comfortable sofas, a television, and a fireplace, perfect for cooler evenings. The bedrooms are cozy and comfortable, with plush beds and high-quality linens, ensuring a restful night's sleep.

Outside, guests can enjoy a private terrace with a barbecue area and space for relaxing outdoors. Surrounding the cottages are beautiful gardens and green areas, perfect for leisurely walks and enjoying nature. For those who enjoy active recreation, we offer access to bicycles, kayaks, and hiking trails that allow you to explore the beauty of the surrounding area.

Sovanova holiday cottages are an ideal choice for family vacations, a romantic weekend for two, or a getaway with friends. Our location encourages tranquility and rejuvenation while offering many nearby tourist attractions. We invite you to discover the magic of Sovanova and create unforgettable memories in our unique holiday cottages.

By booking a stay at Sovanova, you choose comfort, luxury, and closeness to nature. Experience wonderful moments in the heart of nature, where each day brings new opportunities for relaxation and discovering the beauty of the world around you. Sovanova – your place for an unforgettable getaway.

Name: Hedenstugan Bed&Breakfast Hotel
Description:
Holiday in our Hedenstugan Bed and Breakfast Hotel stands for colourful adventures in summer, for sparkling snow magic in winter, and for a hearty holiday home, where our guests simply feel comfortable. With honest hospitality and a side program that will definitely turn your holiday into a fabulous experience, we warmly welcome our guests to our home and your Hedenstugan Bed and Breakfast Hotel.

Hedenstugan brings together the traditional wood construction Scandinavian house, with an interior that is superbly modern and well designed. After 150 years of existence as a ‘poor house’, a hospital and as a residence, the Hedenstugan B&B Hotel has been renovated with clean and airy features. It incorporates the closeness of the forests and wilderness into this peaceful retreat.

A key attraction for the hotel is the vast array of activities available in the area. From the hotel, guests are only a few steps away from some of the most exciting and wild cross country tracks in the winter; during the warmer, drier months, quad bike trails and adventures are a huge draw too. Kayaking and sea fishing on the nearby coastline also bring many guests to the Hedenstugan B&B Hotel.

We offer seven modern decorated, fresh and cosy rooms of different size. Hedenstugan is a very exclusive hotel, in a remarkably quiet forest setting with nature reserve and lakes nearby. A great place to de-stress! Quad Safari, Biking, Kayaking, Cross Country Skiing, Sports, Music, Culture and Breathtaking natural beauty

At Hedenstugan B&B Hotel its now possible for guests to enjoy and relax in our wood heated Finish sauna or wood heated hot tub/jacuzzi, or take an outdoor shower. Al services are located in backyard of the hotel.

Je wordt omringd door fruitbomen, wijnranken, akkers, weiden, historische kastelen en charmante vierkant hoeves. Wandelen, fietsen, met de Vespa of "de Geit"... 

Hof van Kalenberg is jouw ideale startplaats om met vrienden of familie te genieten van al het moois dat onze fruitstreek te bieden heeft. 

Hof van Kalenberg is een oase van rust waar wilde feestjes niet zijn toegestaan!

Boek nu je verblijf en ontdek de magie van deze plek.

Name: Ana Health Spa
Description:
Das Ana Health Spa Center im Ana Hotels Europa in Constanța zählt seit über 30 Jahren zu den führenden Zentren für medizinische Prävention, Rehabilitation und Gesundheitsurlaub in Rumänien. 

Unsere ganzheitlichen Programme kombinieren modernste medizinische Therapie mit natürlichen Heilressourcen wie Sapropelschlamm, Mineralwasser und Meeresklima. 

Unser interdisziplinäres Team aus Ärzten, Therapeuten und Fachspezialisten begleitet unsere Gäste individuell auf dem Weg zu mehr Gesundheit, Lebensfreude und Vitalität. 

Unsere Leistungen: 
- Medizinische Rehabilitation (Bewegungsapparat, Herz-Kreislauf, Stoffwechsel, Atemwege)
- Balneotherapie & Hydrotherapie 
- Schlammtherapie & Elektrotherapie 
- Kinesiotherapie, Physiotherapie, Massagen 
- Präventions- und Entgiftungsprogramme 
- Ernährungsberatung und individuelle Gesundheitspläne 
- Wellness- und Anti-Stress-Programme 

Eingebettet in das komfortable Ana Hotels Europa, nur wenige Meter vom Strand entfernt, bietet unser Zentrum ideale Bedingungen für Erholung, Therapie und medizinisch betreuten Gesundheitsurlaub.

Name: Reece Investment Inc
Description:
Reece Investment, a fresh and vibrant player in Grenada's Citizenship by Investment (CBI) Program, is dedicated to making the dream of dual citizenship a reality for discerning investors. Established in 2015, we are passionate about bridging the gap between sustainable investment opportunities and the tangible benefits of global mobility.

As a newcomer in the CBI landscape, our fresh perspective allows us to approach projects with an innovative lens. Our pioneering project is the development of an environmentally friendly hotel in Grenada, a testament to our commitment towards marrying sustainable development with investor value.

Our alliance with Grenada’s CBI Program empowers our investors to become global citizens, offering not only an opportunity to contribute to an eco-friendly real estate project but also the privilege of a second passport. The program opens up a world of opportunities, including visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to over 140 countries, the ability to live, work, and study in the Caribbean, and potential tax benefits.

Reece Investment's commitment extends beyond project delivery - we endeavor to be your trusted partner in realizing your dreams of a second citizenship. Our mission, although challenging, is fueled by the tangible change we aim to bring to our investors' lives through the immense possibilities that dual citizenship offers.

Here, your passport is not just a document; it's a gateway to new horizons and a testament to your commitment to sustainability.

Description:
Located within the serene Mafia Island marine park, Kivulini Mafia Lodge offers a peaceful retreat for couples, friends, and families. With lush vegetation and gentle breezes, immerse yourself in nature’s embrace.

Established in May 2018, Mafia kivulini Lodge takes its name from the Kiswahili term for ‘under the shade’, embodying the cool comfort and tranquillity found within its natural surroundings.

Other Activities Available

Big Blu Mafia Island Dive Centre is situated in Utende beach inside the Marine Park on the south-east of Mafia Island. It enjoys a beachfront location with uninterrupted views over Chole Bay.

Big Blu is a large, fully equipped dive centre with an on-site restaurant and bar. Diving and other activities can be arranged at Kivulini Lodge the previous day and guests can even enjoy different services at Big Blu after their activities before returning back to the lodge.

The dive centre is an approximate 4 – 5 minute bicycle ride or a 2 minute drive from the lodge. A small lunch/breakfast box can be arranged in advance from the lodge.

For divers that already have a qualification for diving and would like to explore the dive sites around Mafia Island, Big Blu offer daily trips. For more information please visit:
www.bigblumafia.com/fun-diving-big-blu-mafia-island-dive-centre/

As a PADI 5* Diving Resort, they are able to offer the full range of PADI courses from beginner to professional levels. For more information please visit:
www.bigblumafia.com/dive-courses/

Located in a privileged natural setting, Redondo de Guayedra is an exclusive rural hotel designed for those seeking to disconnect from the world and immerse themselves in an experience of tranquility, discreet luxury, and absolute privacy. Surrounded by mountains and overlooking the ocean, our resort offers a unique retreat where nature sets the rhythm, and every detail is carefully crafted for the well-being of our guests.

More than just a destination, we offer a sensory experience. From the morning birdsong to golden sunsets over the sea, every moment here invites relaxation and balance. Our concept blends the comfort of premium accommodations with the untouched essence of a protected natural environment, ensuring an authentic and enriching stay.

We offer three types of accommodations—lodges, villas, and cave houses—each seamlessly integrated into the landscape to provide maximum privacy and comfort. With noble materials, minimalist design, and open spaces, our accommodations create a warm and serene atmosphere, ideal for rest. Additionally, we offer gastronomy based on local and organic products, highlighting the flavors of the land with a sustainable approach.

We also promote conscious and responsible tourism, respecting the environment and fostering a genuine connection with nature. Guests can enjoy personalized experiences, from hiking trails and cultural visits to wellness sessions like yoga and outdoor meditation. Every stay is tailored to the needs of our guests, ensuring unique moments of relaxation and exclusivity.

Description:

Traveling from Gaborone, it can be reached through the Gabane-Kumakwane route if traffic is not slow; otherwise, just like those coming from Lobatse and Ramotswa, the Boatle route provides an easier and smooth drive. For those traveling from Molepolole and Kanye (Jwaneng), the directions are clearly signposted once one gets into the Thamaga Village.

The Hotel operates on sound environmental consciousness and sustainability, where the vegetation is not disturbed, retaining indigenous fruit trees such as Mmilo, Moretlwa, Moretologa, and Morula.

Our products and services are tailored with a customer-centric focus, catering to business and leisure travelers, health and wellness enthusiasts, and conventional vacationers. Thamaga being home to Botswelelo Crafts, we expect to see the pottery lovers occasionally.

The ambiance and surroundings of The Signature Hotel allow one to indulge in “serenity and harmony.”

Nestled in Galway's Latin Quarter, The House Hotel offers a unique blend of boutique charm and modern comfort. Just steps from Quay Street and Shop Street, guests are immersed in the city's rich culture, lively festivals, and coastal beauty.

The House Hotel, a renowned boutique property in the heart of Galway’s Latin Quarter, has completed an extensive renovation of 40 guest rooms, investing €500,000 on upgrading all bedrooms, staircases, and corridors. The upgrades include modern interiors, high-end finishes, smart in-room technology, and enhanced amenities such as coffee machines and plush bedding. This marks the final phase of the hotel’s full refurbishment, following a €1.2 million ground floor renovation in 2023/24 that added seven new deluxe bedrooms and a Café Bar and outdoor seating area.

Our dedicated team ensures a warm welcome and personalized service, making every stay memorable. Whether you're visiting for business, leisure, or a special occasion, The House Hotel is your perfect base in Galway.

Designed with elegance and authenticity in mind, the hotel features well-appointed rooms and suites that reflect the timeless beauty of Moroccan craftsmanship. Whether you're traveling for business or leisure, our personalized service, upscale amenities, and central location ensure a memorable stay in one of Morocco’s most iconic cities.

Name: Rupkotha Eco Resort
Description: Our Rupkotha Eco Resort is located just Two kilometers away from Pabna City. After arriving at Pabna town, you can go to the Eco Resort within 20-minute by Auto Rickshaw. Our Resort offers easy access to luxurious rooms and organic, local, healthy, slow-cooked food. We have two restaurants at the Resort. Our café serves local and Italian food and the second restaurant offers world cuisine – a diverse culinary offering to satisfy every palette. Our food preparations are delicate and unrushed. We believe in sourcing the freshest ingredients directly from the villages and farms surrounding our properties. Taste the difference between enjoying a meal surrounded by nature. Rupkotha Eco Resorts boasts luxury rooms with flat-screen TVs and cable, spacious bathrooms, hot water, private verandahs with day beds and hammocks, and a backup generator for uninterrupted convenience. For families and children, we offer Boating and Fishing.

Name: Mhondoro safari Lodge and Villa
Description:
Nestled in the heart of the Waterberg area. In Welgevonden Private Game Reserve, a big five enviroment, lays our exclusive 5-star safari lodge and villa. We offer an unforgettable luxury experience. Mhondoro is known for the extraordinary moments when elephants drink from our saltwater #poolellie, our lodge captures the essence of African wilderness with world-class comfort and personalized service.

Our lodge offers a curated selection of immersive activities and services to make every stay unique. Besides the daily game drives, guests can enjoy guided bushwalks, stargazing sessions under Africa's clear skies, rejuvenating spa treatments, and Bushman painting walks that bring ancient history to life. For families, we offer a tailored Kids Program that engages young adventurers in exciting, educational activities.

For those seeking a private retreat, our separate villa accommodates up to six guests in unparalleled luxury. Complete with a private butler, personal chef, dedicated ranger, and exclusive pool, gym, and spa facilities, the villa is perfect for groups or families looking to experience the safari at their own pace. Every detail is crafted to ensure an intimate and exclusive experience in a stunning natural setting.

Conveniently located just a 2.5-hour drive from Johannesburg, our lodge and villa provide seamless access to one of South Africa’s premier wildlife destinations without the risk of malaria. Whether it’s the thrill of a game drive, the tranquility of our spa, or a refreshing dip in the pool with elephants nearby, every moment here is designed to create lasting memories.

Discover the magic of South Africa with us.

Name: Streamline Hotel - Daytona Beach
Description:
Guests staying at the Streamline Hotel located at the entrance to the World's Most Famous Beach find themselves in a whole New Daytona. 

Our hotel has a lot of history and after the renovations, it has become so much more than just a historic landmark. Overlooking A1A and the Atlantic Ocean we create an atmosphere that transports you outside of Daytona. 

Featuring an outdoor pool that is open year-round, a dinner restaurant and the premiere Sky Rooftop where we have DJs spinning an eclectic mix of music every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday. 

We have 44 beautiful rooms and our staff is trained to provide the best service around. We have won numerous awards for hospitality including the Award of Excellence from Trip Advisor and the AAA triple diamond award. The City of Daytona has awarded us for our preservation and beautification efforts. 

Our walls and even the elevator is adorned with one of kind photos and mementos from the History of NASCAR. 

If you are looking to break free from the run of the mill hotel stay than we are exactly what you are looking for.

Description:

Unity and a fun way to help people experience a new country, culture and earn a living and integrate into Paraguay

Description:

Genießen Sie herrliche Wellness-Stunden, köstliche Speisen, ein abwechslungsreiches Freizeitangebot und darüber hinaus noch die Möglichkeit, Top-Marken zu unschlagbar günstigen Preisen zu erstehen.
Besonders niedrige Sprit-Preise machen den Urlaub in Samnaun perfekt.

Die Familie Hangl bietet Ihnen vieles aus einer Hand!

Name: Sonesta Silicon Valley
Description:
Discover the perfect starting point for your Bay Area adventure at our newly renovated Silicon Valley hotel. Enjoy effortless access to the best of San Jose and Santa Clara County. Our location puts you near technology powerhouses including Cisco, Intel, Apple, Hewlett Packard, Google, and more. What's more, San Jose International Airport (SJC) is just 5 miles away. Use our convenient parking facilities to explore the favored attractions and activities in Silicon Valley.

Enjoy the comfort of our updated and spacious guest rooms and suites after a busy day of meetings or exploring the area. For ultimate relaxation, lounge on our sundeck beside the heated outdoor pool. Keep up with your fitness routine in our 24-hour fitness center boasting cutting-edge equipment. Indulge in tantalizing California cuisine at our on-site restaurant, Manzanita, serving a fusion of Latin and Asian-inspired flavors.

At Sonesta Hotels & Resorts, we’re so happy you’re here.

Name: Hotel Mango Verde
Description:
Somos un Bed and Breakfast ubicado en la ciudad de Piura, especialmente diseñado para hacerte sentir en casa. 
Nos encontramos en la urbanización Santa Isabel, una zona segura, transcurrida y cercana a centro comerciales, bancos, restaurantes y a 5 minutos del centro de Piura. 
El ambiente es tranquilo, hay una recepción abierta las 24 horas, una terraza, un mostrador de información turística y consigna de equipaje, así como también conexión Wi-Fi. 
Somos una excelente opción para hospedarse en Piura, ya que estamos a tan solo 4,2 km del aeropuerto. Nuestros servicios incluyen desayuno todos los días, de 07:00 a 10:00. Reserva con nosotros al 922 404 696.

Name: amba意舍酒店
Description:
amba philosophy

Life is a journey, make it fun!

Designed for the savvy urban traveler who appreciates creativity, connectivity and conservation, amba Hotels & Resorts adds an element of fun to travel through its modern, playful design, inviting social areas, and energetic team.

Feel immediately relaxed as you enter the open, flowing spaces of amba. Work smart and recharge comfortably with amba essentials. Eat well, unwind and connect with friends while enjoying a fun dining experience. Get inspired as you explore original art throughout.

The next-generation design hotel concept, amba integrates form, function, and fun to create simple, comfortable spaces with a designer twist. Eco-friendly materials and all natural products are used to advocate for a healthy, sustainable environment.                                                                                                

are you amba?
amba believes people make the brand.
If you share the following values, we would love to hear from you.
•	Have fun at work
•	Do the right thing even when no one is looking
•	Enjoy helping and taking care of others
•	Welcome each day with energy and eagerness to make a difference
•	Believe in the power of creativity and teamwork, and do whatever it takes to make customers happy
•	Have an eye for details, and take ownership of customer needs and issues

Name: Bendigo Signature Accommodation
Description: Bendigo Signature Accommodation is dedicated to managing your rental and airbnb properties, taking out the stress and having a supportive team making a profitable asset.

Name: Ascott Corniche Al Khobar
Description:
Ascott Corniche Al Khobar sets the new standards for sophisticated living, providing its guests with top-notch comforts that make them feel right at home while on their travels. From premier studios to luxury 3-bedroom penthouses, these contemporary furnished apartments in Khobar are spacious and elegantly designed, a consistent representation of the high standards expected of the Ascott brand around the globe.

In addition to the well-appointed apartments, guests will also have access to a comprehensive range of facilities that the property has to offer. Conduct business meetings in the meeting and event spaces, rejuvenate the mind and body in the health club or enjoy some quiet time within the residence lounge. There is also an amazing Shisha lounge and cafe that presents stunning views of the corniche & city skyline.

Name: Central Guesthouse
Description:
Situated 2.4 km from Aberdeen Beach and 2.5 km from Beach Ballroom in the centre of Aberdeen, Aaran Central Guesthouse features accommodation with free WiFi and free private parking. Popular points of interest nearby include Central Library of Aberdeen, Aberdeen Railway Station and Aberdeen Sheriff Court. Hilton Community Centre is 3.9 km from the guest house and Newburgh on Ythan Golf Club is 23 km away.

A microwave and fridge are also offered, as well as a kettle. At the guest house, units have a desk, a flat-screen TV and a shared bathroom.

During the colder months, guests can enjoy winter sports in the surrounding area.

Popular points of interest near the guest house include Aberdeen Art Gallery & Museum, Aberdeen Harbour and St Mary's Cathedral. The nearest airport is Aberdeen Airport, 9 km from Aaran Central Guesthouse.

Solo travellers particularly like the location — they rated it 9.3 for a one-person stay.

Name: Hotel Carrillo OSPACA
Description:
El Hotel Carrillo es un complejo turístico de 4 estrellas ubicado a orillas del lago Embalse y enmarcado por el nacimiento de las Sierras del Valle de Calamuchita, en el hermoso Barrio Embalsina de la localidad de Villa del Dique en la Provincia de Córdoba.

Por sus características únicas y el exuberante entorno natural, el Hotel Carrillo está preparado para recibir a amantes de la vida al aire libre, aficionados al tenis, jugadores profesionales, adultos y niños en busca de entretenimiento, descanso y tiempo en familia.

El hotel cuenta con 75 habitaciones, restaurante, piscina climatizada cubierta y piscina exterior, 6 canchas de tenis reglamentarias de polvo de ladrillo, amarra náutica con embarcación propia para paseos. Además, posee áreas de entretenimiento para toda la familia y dos salones para eventos y reuniones.

Name: Svabesholms Kungsgård
Description: På Svabesholm skapar vi konferenser där det finns plats för både fokus och andrum. Här möts ni i en lugn miljö på Österlen, med mat lagad från grunden och naturen som självklar del av dagen. Måndag till onsdag har ni platsen för er själva – perfekt för dagskonferenser och mindre möten där kvalitet går före tempo.

Name: Stanton House Hotel
Description:
Stanton House Hotel is open to the public and has become well known throughout Swindon and the surrounding areas.
-oo0oo-

With sensibility and insight, we are dedicated to providing products that give the highest quality service to our guests. Our aim is to always exceed our customers’ expectations.

Stanton House was purchased in 1990 and the old manor house was converted from a private dwelling into a hotel (with the addition of a large extension). With considerable re-modelling in Cotswold stone to match the original. The oldest part of the hotel was re-built in 1935 following a fire in 1932 and there have been previous buildings associated with the site for many years.

As part of the community we are active in working with Stanton Fitzwarren Parish Council, St. Leonard’s Church and support them whenever possible; in 2012 Stanton House Hotel hosted a Diamond Jubilee Party for Stanton Fitzwarren residents.

Name: Hotel Alakamanda -Anuradhapura
Description:
Surrounded by lush greeneries, Hotel Alakamanda is located in the ancient capital of Anuradhapura, a UNESCO World Heritage Site famous for its well-preserved ruins of the Sri Lankan civilization.
The hotel is a convenient 2 km from Anuradhapura Airport. Sri Maha Bodhiya is 5 km, while the famous stupa, Ruwanwelisaya is located 6 km away.

Featuring a terrace with views of the garden, air-conditioned rooms are fitted with a TV, a telephone and a seating area. Private bathrooms come with hot and cold shower facilities.

Alakamanda Hotel provides free private parking on site for convenience. Guests can visit the cultural and historical sites nearby; alternatively, Wilpattu Safari Tour and mountain bike rides can also be arranged.

The in-house restaurant serves mainly Sri Lankan dishes throughout the day. Room service is available.

Couples particularly like the location

Whether it is exhibitions at the NEC, concerts at Resort World Arena, or a trip away - we have you covered. We also offer Park, Stay and Go packages so you can catch your flight without a worry.

The Hotel is situated just off the M42 motorway, which provides easy access to the M40, the M6 and the M1, and Birmingham city centre is only 15 minutes away by train from nearby Birmingham International station.

Host a meeting for up to 200 guests in our eleven meeting rooms, with wall-mounted screens for presentations and a breakout space for networking. Our Crowne Plaza Meetings Director is on hand to take care of all the details.

At this hotel, you can enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, Energy Essentials, Sleep Advantage Programme and 24-hour room service. Our restaurant offers buffet breakfasts and delicious meals in the evening, or for a more relaxed feel you can lounge in our Lobby Bar where you can grab a Starbucks coffee, and keep your energy up with Fast and Fresh meals at any time of day. Our thoughtfully designed bedrooms all have executive work desks, and USB ports to keep you completely connected.

Name: Danish Castlehotels
Description:
Welcome to Danske Slotshotel 

With more than 45 years of experience and castle hotels spread all over Denmark, we offer tailored events that meet all our customers' needs. We have unique meeting rooms in historic settings, where the customer is at the center. 

All the castle hotels have modern and functional rooms that accommodate between 2-300 participants. 

We create extraordinary meetings where our customers offer meals in private rooms. For longer conferences, we offer accommodation in our historic rooms, all of which have their own bathroom. All our hotels can accommodate at least 100 overnight guests.

Gastronomy is paramount at our castle. Our castle kitchens follow the seasons and use local ingredients. We adapt all meals to our customers' preferences and wishes. In addition, our wine cellars offer a wide selection of our own products as well as other quality wines from all over the world. 

We are available to arrange exciting meeting breaks with activities. Regardless of whether it is a trip to the castle park, wine tasting, clay pigeon shooting or other activities, we are ready to create meaningful breaks. 

In addition to day meetings and conferences, we also organize company events, private parties, weddings, overnight stays and castle stays. 

We look forward to hearing from you. 

Specialties: Conference | Service | History | Nature | Gastronomy | Arrangement | Wedding | Private arrangement | Company arrangement | Team building |

Name: Hotel Rocanegra
Description:
Rocanegra es un hotel ubicado en el corazón del valle las Trancas, región de Ñuble, Chillán. En un lugar privilegiado y de enorme belleza natural, nuestros pasajeros disfrutan la comodidad y calidez de un hotel íntimo y a escala humana.
El Hotel tiene 2 pisos y forma parte de un terreno de varias hectáreas, que incorpora una reserva ecológica privada para visita gratuita de los huéspedes del hotel.
Los ambientes del hotel son cálidos, cómodos y luminosos. Cuenta con espacios de trabajo, esparcimiento y deporte en medio de la naturaleza. Asimismo, tiene pistas para practicar mountain bike, circuitos de trekking y de cabalgatas.
Al igual que toda la arquitectura del hotel, las habitaciones están diseñadas con un estilo rústico elegante y cada una cuenta con baño privado y todo lo necesario para el adecuado descanso. Asimismo, en el exterior del hotel existen lugares especialmente acondicionados para camping y motorhome.
Si se busca descansar y relajarse, el hotel tiene amplias y cómodas salas de estar, mesa de pool y wifi. También posee un circuito de spa que incluye sala de masajes, hot tubs, piscina y sauna seco. 
Asimismo, cuanta con una cómoda y luminosa sala para la práctica de yoga o meditación, además de terrazas y espacios para fogones. 
El hotel tiene 10 habitaciones y un departamento full equipado para 8 personas (capacidad máxima 34 personas)

Name: The Lazy Koala
Description:
Tucked away on Sri Lanka’s southwest coast, just 120km from Colombo and 20km from Galle, The Lazy Koala is a hidden gem offering sweeping views of the Indian Ocean — and the ideal balance between business and leisure. Just a five-minute drive from the heart of Hikkaduwa, this boutique hotel feels a world away from the noise, making it a perfect setting for productive management off-sites, strategic planning sessions, creative workshops, and memorable team-building or social events.

Popular with both local and international guests — from solo travellers and couples to corporate teams and larger groups — The Lazy Koala delivers high-quality, affordable accommodation in a relaxed, inspiring atmosphere. Its casually curated interiors, colourful street portraits, and warm, informal charm create a unique and uplifting vibe.

With nine spacious ensuite rooms (five Double Rooms and four Dorm Rooms), the hotel can comfortably accommodate up to 26 guests and is available for exclusive hire — making it a top pick for corporate retreats and group getaways. Eight rooms feature private balconies with stunning ocean views.

Multiple chillout spaces across the property provide the flexibility needed for breakout sessions or informal networking, while the expansive rooftop terrace is ideal for morning yoga, sundowners, or simply unwinding as the waves roll in. A sparkling pool, lush gardens, and free private parking add to the convenience.

Whether you're planning a focused team off-site or a relaxed group stay, The Lazy Koala offers the space, setting, and spirit to make it unforgettable — supported by a friendly, professional team always ready to help.

Description:

Innovamos continuamente nuestros productos para colmar las expectativas de todos los que nos visitan pero, sobre todo, mantenemos un ambiente de trabajo cercano y afable en donde nuestros empleados, a la vez que trabajan, se divierten y en donde nuestros clientes se sienten como en casa.

Hotel Boutique Las Brisas y Apartamentos Las Brisas en Santander.

Name: Hotel Rural La Encantada Riaza
Description:
Un refugio excepcional donde la serenidad del campo y el encanto de la naturaleza se fusionan para ofrecerte una experiencia única en un hotel rural con alma de leyenda.
A menos de 2 horas de Madrid, situado en la provincia de Segovia podrás vivir escapadas inigualables, donde sumergirte en la tranquilidad del entorno y disfrutar de la belleza rural que rodea cada rincón de la sierra de Ayllón.
Con múltiples actividades para realizar en sus alrededores, contamos con todo tipo de experiencias dirigidas a todos los públicos. Rutas de Senderismo, visitas a los hayedos de la Pedrosa y Tejera Negra, esquí en la Pinilla, multiaventura en los árboles, rutas a caballo y mucho más te esperan en un entorno único. 
Un espacio especial para realizar teambuildings y eventos de empresa. Catas de vino o cerveza artesana, escape rooms en la naturaleza, gymkanas, rutas a caballo, juegos de equipo, piraguas y mucho más, en un lugar donde tu equipo podrá disfrutar de la mejor gastronomía local en nuestro restaurante, caracterizado por platos caseros elaborados con ingredientes de la zona, hechos al momento.
 Con una decoración única y muy cuidada, donde predomina la madera y la pizarra vista cada habitación transporta a un lugar diferente donde el descanso y la comodidad está asegurado.

Etter ein intensiv dag kan deltakarane styrka samhaldet gjennom teambuilding, lokal underhaldning og aktivitetar i naturen. Hotellet kan òg leigast eksklusivt for kurs og strategisamlingar, med skreddarsydde opplegg for ei minneverdig oppleving.

Leadership and Team Management:

Mitigate risks and uphold safety protocols.

Name: By Flávia Governança e Treinamentos
Description:
Com mais de 20 anos de experiência em gestão operacional, treinei  equipes em facilities, implantei contratos e garanti excelência em limpeza e organização em diversos tipo de setores.

Minha formação em Comunicação Social e especializações em contabilidade, gestão de pessoas e auditorias (5S, ISO 9001/14001) me deram base sólida para liderar com empatia, assertividade e foco em qualidade.

Durante minhas viagens profissionais pelo pais, percebi o quanto a governança hoteleira pode ser melhorada em pequenos empreendimentos. Foi aí que nasceu meu propósito: levar conhecimento técnico, processos eficientes e treinamento para camareiras de  pousadas e hotéis independentes que desejam crescer com qualidade em hospitalidade.

A Governança By Flávia, tem como objetivo claro: democratizar o acesso à excelência hoteleira, mostrando que uma pequena hospedaria pode ter o mesmo padrão de limpeza e organização que os grandes hotéis. 

Em minha consultoria estão inclusos: treinamento de camareiras, diáristas e free lancers in loco, curadoria de produtos, insumos, equipamentos  e enxoval, desenvolvimento dos POP's , rotina de trabalho,  mentoria de produtos e enxoval, de acordo com sua realidade, com um custo-benefício acessível.

Desejo despertar o orgulho de servir e criar ambientes de trabalho onde o prazer em atender torna se natural e contagiante, sem perder a essência única de cada lugar. 

Acredito que avaliações positivas nas plataformas de hospedagem são reflexo direto de processos bem definidos, equipes treinadas e atenção aos detalhes. 

Quando o hóspede encontra limpeza impecável, atendimento cordial e soluções rápidas, ele não apenas volta, ele recomenda!

                                                Saber e não aplicar é igual a não saber!

Name: Sama Retreats
Description:
Sama Retreats is a luxury boutique wellness resort nestled in a lush paradise on one of the most beautiful beaches in Sri Lanka. Sama is located on the most coastal edge of Sinharaja, an ancient and vital ecological rainforest that holds historical, mythological, and cultural significance. Here we found an abandoned property full of potential and restored the 10 acres into a thriving ecosystem where diverse and abundant plants, wildlife, and nesting sea turtles coexist in harmony. 

Sama was once a vibrant fishing and stone quarrying village. Our cottages, designed to encapsulate the spirit of a typical village house, offer the simplicity and charm of living in a peaceful home by the beach, surrounded by lush gardens. We celebrate Sri Lanka’s cultural heritage and empower the local community, while inviting guests from around the world who share our values of peace and harmony.  

All are welcome here. Whether you are coming for a retreat, wellness package, or to simply relax in the lap of nature’s luxury and enjoy our delicious food and refreshments – we see anything that keeps you happy and balanced as wellness. Whether you have come here to spend time with your loved ones, experience new connections, or to be in quiet inward reflection, Sama is your sanctuary of peace and deep connection.

DBL utvikler flytende enheter og samfunnsløsninger med fokus på grønn omstilling, miljøteknologi og selvforsyning på vann. Vi opererer i skjæringspunktet mellom næringsliv og offentlig sektor, og bygger bro mellom innovasjon, bærekraft og samfunnsutvikling.

Næring – Bærekraftig reiseliv og teknologisk innovasjon

Vi tilbyr flytende hotell- og opplevelsesmoduler til aktører innen reiseliv og gastronomi, med høy miljøstandard og teknologisk integrasjon. Målet er å skape attraktive, bærekraftige opplevelser med lavt fotavtrykk.

-Bærekraftsprogram med sertifisering for miljø, kvalitet og teknologi
-Lanterneprofil for utleie til restauranter og hoteller
-App-baserte tjenester for booking, drift og gjesteopplevelse

Offentlig sektor – Flytende samfunn og grønn samfunnsutvikling

Vi utvikler modulbaserte flytende samfunn som piloter for fremtidens bo- og arbeidsformer, med vekt på miljøplanlegging, beredskap, og lokal selvforsyning. Prosjektene er rettet mot kommuner og offentlige aktører som ønsker å utforske nye modeller for bærekraftig samfunnsutvikling.

-Samarbeid med kommuner og havnevesen om lokalisering og regulering
-Modulbasert samfunn med enheter for bolig, helse, energi og matproduksjon
-Testing av grønn teknologi som osmosekraft og spiralflow
-Utvikling av økonomiske modeller som motvirker forskjeller og gir lavterskel gevinster for lokalsamfunn og kommuner.

Felles initiativer – Teknologi, forskning og grønn omstilling

På tvers av sektorene jobber vi med å utvikle løsninger som er teknologisk fremtidsrettet, miljømessig bærekraftige og sosialt relevante. Vi bygger kunnskapsplattformer og samarbeider bredt for å realisere nye standarder for flytende liv og arbeid

-Pilottesting av teknologiske løsninger
-Overvåking av vannkvalitet, lekkasje, varsling og beredskap
-Fokus på energioptimalisering, varmegjenvinning og grønn drift
-Selvrensende systemer, hygieneløsninger og sirkulær ressursbruk ombord
-Utforske FoU-samarbeid med universiteter og industripartnere
