Name: Santo Stefano Club
Description:
Il Santo Stefano Club si trova nel cuore della splendida Calabria, precisamente nel comune di Tortora (CS), una località premiata con la prestigiosa “bandiera blu” per la qualità delle sue acque e dei suoi servizi. A soli 2100 metri dal Lungomare Sirimarco e a 3500 metri dal vivace centro di Praia a Mare, il nostro hotel è immerso in un ambiente tranquillo, ma allo stesso tempo vicino ai principali luoghi di interesse turistico della zona.

La struttura è situata in una posizione strategica, che consente di godere della bellezza della costa calabrese, famosa per il suo lungomare alberato, la pista ciclabile e la passeggiata che si estende lungo la riva. Questo percorso costiero arriva fino alla località di Fiuzzi, un angolo di paradiso che offre panorami mozzafiato sull’isola Dino, un sito naturale d’eccellenza noto per la sua grotta azzurra e i fondali marini straordinari, perfetti per gli amanti delle immersioni e delle escursioni in barca.

Il Santo Stefano Club è il luogo ideale per chi cerca una vacanza all’insegna del relax e del benessere, senza rinunciare alla possibilità di scoprire le meraviglie naturali e culturali della Calabria. Le camere, moderne e confortevoli, offrono tutti i comfort necessari per un soggiorno indimenticabile, mentre il ristorante propone piatti tipici della tradizione calabrese, preparati con ingredienti freschi e locali.

Che tu voglia esplorare le bellezze naturali, rilassarti sulla spiaggia, o semplicemente goderti una passeggiata tra i vicoli caratteristici di Praia a Mare, il Santo Stefano Club ti offre la base perfetta per vivere un’esperienza unica in una delle regioni più affascinanti d’Italia.

Name: 7-Unit Multi-Family Building: Ideal Investment Opportunity
Description:
Vendo pousada a 350 metros da praia - avalia 50% em permuta.
Vendo POUSADA com 7 apartamentos com acabamento de excelente qualidade, com piscina e area Gourmet, Ar-condicionados, ventiladores de teto, sistema (INTELBRAS) de cameras, sistema (Ubiquiti UNIFI) de internet, sistema de incêndio, sistema (INTELBRAS) de interfones, tudo isso bem no centro de Coroa Vermelha (14km de Porto Seguro) apresenta uma enseada de água calmas e claras, e foi eleita a melhor praia do estado da Bahia em 2018. A localização do imóvel esta apenas 350 metros da praia homônima, lugar onde oficialmente ocorreu o descobrimento do Brasil em 22 de abril de 1500 e onde o frade e bispo português Henrique de Coimbra realizou a primeira missa em solo brasileiro em 26 de abril de 1500, sendo esse o ponto turístico mais visitado da região. O centro da Coroa Vermelha é onde se concentra o comércio da cidade e também toda sua movimentação turística, sendo esses: a feirinha de artesanatos indígenas Pataxó, restaurantes e muitas cabanas de praia. O imóvel comporta até 47 pessoas confortavelmente, ideal para aluguéis por temporada para grupos de excursões ou para grupos em família. O empreendimento é excelente para uma família que queira morar perto da praia e viver de renda ou para uma pessoa que busca tranquilidade e qualidade de vida pois um dos apartamentos possui 3 quartos e 2 suítes 100% mobiliado. Cada estadia varia entre $100 a $150 reais POR PESSOA, dependo da época do ano. O preço mínimo para baixa temporada é de $100 reais POR PESSOA. Entretanto, as datas de alta temporada na cidade são as seguidas abaixo: Semana santa ? 4 dias de estadia Férias de Julho ? 15 dias de estadia Feriadão de setembro ? 4 dias de estadia Férias de Outubro ? 4 dias de estadia Férias de dezembro ? 15 dias de estadia Férias de verão Janeiro ? 30 dias de estadia Férias de verão Fevereiro ? 30 dias de estadia Férias de Carnaval ? 7 dias de estadia Total: 109 dias de estadia 109 dias alugados x 47 hóspedes no valor mínimo

Name: ALPRIMA Aparthotel Hinterstoder
Description:
Vor der atemberaubenden Kulisse des Toten Gebirges steht in Hinterstoder ein Aparthotel der Extraklasse.
Als einzige Unterkunft dieser Art in Oberösterreich - aufgeteilt in 4 Häusern - bietet es seinen Gästen rund 330 Betten.
Ideal für alle, die in ihrem Urlaub eine preiswerte Unterkunft brauchen!
Die komfortable Ausstattung mit eigener Küche und der Concierge-Service bieten Dir alles,
was du im Selbstversorger-Urlaub brauchst – Brötchenservice, Tischreservierungen in lokalen Restaurants, organisierte Outdoor-Abenteuer und mehr.

Gestalte Deinen Urlaub so, wie Du ihn Dir wünschst. Wir helfen Dir gerne dabei!

Dank unserer zentralen Lage ist das ALPRIMA Aparthotel der ideale Ausgangspunkt für Ausflüge aller Art in der Urlaubsregion Pyhrn-Priel. Ein Skiabenteuer im Skigebiet Hinterstoder oder auf der Wurzeralm?
Eine Wander- oder Mountainbike-Tour im Toten Gebirge? Oder doch ein Kurzausflug nach Linz oder Liezen?

Ob Urlaub mit der Familie oder Sporturlaub mit Freunden – die Region um das Aparthotel hält unzählige Möglichkeiten für Freizeitaktivitäten aller Art bereit.

Name: Villa Regenhart****
Description:

Dochovaly se základní neobarokní, neorenesanční i secesní prvky, které byly doplněny starožitným nábytkem ve společenských prostorách.

Našim mottem je maximální komfort a spokojenost našich zákazníků.  Jsme pyšní na to, že vaříme výhradně ze sezonních a regionálních surovin. Náš šéfkuchař se svým týmem neustále pracují na nových specialitách, kterými potěší vaše chutě. 

O dokonalé pohodlí našich hostů se staráme v luxusním spa and wellness centru, vybaveném saunovým světem, relaxačním bazénem i privátní odpočinkovou zónou. Pro hotelové hosty je k dispozici bohatá nabídka spa procedur, zejména masáží, zábalů a jiných rituálů.

Description:
Nel cuore della più romantica città d’Italia si trova l’Hotel Giulietta e Romeo, che si richiama alla storia dei due innamorati più celebri al mondo. Le nostre stanze si richiamano alla loro vicenda, ma danno eco anche alle note delle più importanti opere liriche, la Tosca e l’Aida, che qui a Verona vengono celebrate puntualmente durante la stagione lirica dell’Arena, che sorge a due passi dal nostro Hotel.
Da noi respirerete dunque l’arte, la storia e la musica che contraddistinguono Verona, senza rinunciare al comfort e alla modernità delle nostre camere e suites.
Ma Verona non è solo cultura e divertimento: essa gode infatti di una posizione strategica che permette di raggiungere facilmente il più grande lago d’Italia, il Lago di Garda, e la splendida Valpolicella, famosa per i suoi vini.

Name: Heritage Khirasara Palace
Description:
KATHIAWAR: The vibrations and magnetism of this mysterious land of Kathiawar bestow a unique character and personality, not only to the place but also to its people. Every tree, stone, ridge, hillock, and path, and every brick remaining is a storehouse of legends and myths. Though a bit exaggerated – bards have been recorded singing ballads about the stories of courage, kindness, justice, and generosity of our kings and princes. They form the golden chapters of the history of our princely states.

KHIRASARA PALACE: legends and myths – The Khirasara Palace has a unique geography and an incomparable history of more than 450 years to unveil. This majestic palace stands a few miles away on the west of Rajkot city. Towering 150 feet above the Khirasara village, it stands imposing, majestic, and undefeated.

PREDECESSORS: Historians have recorded three phases of the Khirasara State

    Thakore Bhimaji gained Khirasara
    Thakore Ranmalji added Khirasara as the glory of Saurashtra
    Shree Sursinhji educated the people of Khirasara

The Khirasara Palace has a mysterious but legendary and true story to be narrated.

THAKORE BHIMAJI: The Taluka, a Seventh Class State, is an offshoot of the Dhrol State. The ruler, Shree Kaloji of Dhrol had seven sons of whom Sangoji was the eldest, Bhimaji the second, and Junoji the third. On Kaloji’s death, Sangoji succeeded the ‘Gaadi’ (throne) of Dhrol, the other brothers (Bhimaji and Junoji) being provided with suitable appendages. Sangoji died while fighting from Nawanagar State with a Mohammedan army.

The succession accordingly devolved on Bhimaji but he abdicated in favor of his younger brother Junoji, himself remaining content with his adored appendage of the Khirasara Castle and 12 other villages. At that time Khirasara was a small castle.

THAKORE RANMALJI: It is recorded that Khirasara Palace was built by Thakore Ranmalji, an illustrious and mighty descendent of Thakore Bhimaji, during the Ghori Empire. Thakore Ranmalji.

Description:

Stay in a prime central location in the secure embassy area at the Radisson Blu Hotel, Kyiv City Centre and get easy access to the city's historic and cultural sights. Take advantage of the proximity of the Golden Gate, the St. Michael's Golden-Domed Monastery, and the St. Sophia Cathedral, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Attend a melodic performance at the National Opera House, take a walk on Kyiv's central street Khreschatyk, or discover philosophic and colorful murals in street art paintings created by world famous and local artists. Guests that find themselves in Kyiv on business will appreciate the hotel's vicinity to the business and administrative center.

The Radisson Blu Hotel, Kyiv City Centre offers accommodation in newly refurbished upscale rooms and suites with modern design features. The minimalist design, functionality of the rooms, and modern conveniences like free Wi-Fi provide supreme comfort. Try the traditional flavors of Ukraine or unwind at the end of a long day with a refreshing cocktail at the Lobby Bar.

Do you like to start the day with a workout? You can maintain your exercise routines at our fully equipped gym. Relax after a full day with a Finnish sauna, a steam bath, or a massage.

The hotel is an ideal setting for conferences and private social events. Our Embassy Suite, Presidential Suite, and boardrooms cater to every business or social need.

Sono presenti anche una hall per ricevimenti, una farmacia, un centro fisioterapico e un centro estetico con parrucchiere. La struttura promuove sostenibilità con dodici stazioni di ricarica ultraveloci per auto elettriche.

Per un'esperienza gastronomica unica, l'hotel offre ristoranti specializzati in carne, cucina mediterranea, una pizzeria, un Poke shop e un cocktail bar, con la possibilità di cenare nei ristoranti, nel giardino d'inverno o nella privacy della propria suite. Name: Borders self-catering cabins
Description:
Peebles Self-catering Accommodation – Luxury Cabins
With rolling hills, wonderful hacking routes and some of the finest riding in all of Scotland, Castlehill Stables offers a unique and memorable self-catering holiday experience.

A stone’s throw from the royal burgh of Peebles, our recently refurbished one-bedroom attic apartment is the perfect base from which to explore the stunning Borders countryside on horseback.

Horse B&B
Your horse deserves a holiday too!

At Castlehill Stables, you can stable your horse and take full advantage of our various livery services. By day, take your pick from a number of forest riding trails, or enjoy a picnic on the hills above Peebles as you watch the Tweed wind its way through the valley below.

We also provide secure storage facilities for bikes. If you want to give your horse a well-earned rest and use a different saddle, the “mountain biking Mecca” of Glentress Forest is only 9 miles away.

And by night, you’re only 5 miles from Peebles. Sample the best of Scottish produce every evening in the impressive Peebles Hydro, or join the locals for a knees up in the cosy and traditional Crown Hotel.

Local Riding
There’s been a major push to promote riding in the Scottish Borders in recent years, and with good reason! Boasting over 200 miles of off-road trails, the South of Scotland has been the hidden gem of horse riding for too long.

At Hotel Harriet, we don’t just provide a stay – we craft experiences. Whether you are visiting for spiritual rejuvenation, a family vacation, or a business trip, our mission is to ensure your journey is enriched with comfort, care, and cultural connection.

 Our Vision
To establish Hotel Harriet as the preferred choice for travelers in Rameshwaram, known for exceptional service, modern facilities, and heartfelt hospitality. We aim to bridge tradition with contemporary travel needs, offering a space where serenity meets sophistication.

 Why Choose Hotel Harriet?
Because we believe every guest deserves more than a room – they deserve a story to remember. Our hospitality philosophy is simple: Warmth in Service, Excellence in Comfort, and Authenticity in Experience.

 Whether you are a traveler seeking peace, a pilgrim on a sacred journey, or a professional visiting Rameshwaram – Hotel Harriet is your home away from home.

Name: Equitare Rural
Description:
A Equitare Rural é um complexo turístico de agroturismo e equiturismo localizado em Miranda do Corvo, Godinhela. 

Nosso espaço é composto por um Guest House boutique temático (Alojamento Local), um restaurante tradicional luso-espanhol e um centro hípico, proporcionando diversas experiências para nossos visitantes.

No nosso centro equestre, oferecemos a prática de equitação, não apenas como uma academia e escola profissional de equitação desportiva, mas também para aqueles que desejam experimentar a equitação recreativa ou outras atividades relacionadas com cavalos, adequadas tanto para adultos quanto para crianças. Valorizamos a segurança e proporcionamos momentos únicos de conexão com a natureza através da equitação.

A Equitare Rural está localizada na encantadora Serra de Lousã, perto das aldeias do Xisto, onde a cultura e a história se misturam. Além disso, nas proximidades, você encontrará as ruínas de Conimbriga, inúmeras praias fluviais, os castelos de defesa do Mondego e a cidade de Coimbra, famosa por sua rica herança cultural e universidade centenária. E para aqueles que desejam explorar ainda mais, a praia da Figueira da Foz não está muito distante.

 Aqui, você encontrará a combinação perfeita entre diversão, aventura e tranquilidade.

Venha desfrutar da Equitare Rural, onde cada momento é uma oportunidade para criar memórias inesquecíveis e se conectar com a natureza de maneira única.

Atreva-se a viver uma experiência única: Equitare Rural, onde o sabor, a aventura e o descanso se abraçam.

O Guest House (Alojamento Local) e o restaurante ainda não estão abertos.

_fornecedor e/ou comissionamento para pequenas e médias agências e agentes de viagens;

STAY WITH PURPOSE

At The Goodenough Hotel, our story is rooted in heritage, education, and giving back. More than just a boutique hotel in Bloomsbury, we’re proud to be a not-for-profit hotel in Central London – with 100% of our profits going towards supporting Goodenough College, a renowned postgraduate residence and academic community. 

When you stay with us, you’re not only enjoying a peaceful escape in one of London’s most historic and culturally rich neighbourhoods – you’re also contributing to the future of some of the world’s most talented students – including those on low incomes or from challenging backgrounds. It’s a stay that feels good and does good.

Experience authentic London, support a worthy cause, and sleep well, knowing your visit makes a difference.

Name: Villa Marinna Pousada
Description:
Bem-vindo à Villa Marinna Pousada! 

Localizada no coração de Ubatuba, a Villa Marinna Pousada é um refúgio de tranquilidade e conforto, perfeita para quem busca uma experiência inesquecível no litoral norte de São Paulo. Com uma combinação única de charme, hospitalidade e beleza natural, oferecemos a você e sua família um ambiente acolhedor, rodeado por praias paradisíacas e a exuberante Mata Atlântica.

 Nossa Missão
Proporcionar aos nossos hóspedes uma estadia memorável, com atendimento personalizado e serviços de alta qualidade, garantindo momentos de lazer, descanso e conexão com a natureza.

 Acomodações
Nossas acomodações foram cuidadosamente projetadas para oferecer conforto e bem-estar. Com opções que atendem desde casais em busca de uma escapada romântica até famílias e grupos de amigos, cada detalhe é pensado para que você se sinta em casa.

 Gastronomia
Desfrute de um café da manhã delicioso, repleto de produtos frescos e regionais, preparado com carinho para começar o seu dia da melhor maneira. Além disso, nossa pousada está próxima dos melhores restaurantes de Ubatuba, onde você pode saborear a rica culinária local.

 Atividades e Lazer
Aproveite as diversas atividades que Ubatuba oferece: trilhas, passeios de barco, mergulho, surf e muito mais. Estamos prontos para ajudá-lo a explorar tudo o que esta maravilhosa região tem a oferecer.

 Compromisso com a Sustentabilidade
Na Villa Marinna Pousada, temos um compromisso com a sustentabilidade e a preservação ambiental. Adotamos práticas eco-friendly para minimizar nosso impacto no meio ambiente e contribuir para a conservação da biodiversidade local.

 Localização Privilegiada
Estamos estrategicamente situados, permitindo fácil acesso às principais atrações de Ubatuba, incluindo praias deslumbrantes, cachoeiras e pontos turísticos históricos.

Venha viver momentos inesquecíveis na Villa Marinna Pousada. Sua casa de praia em Ubatuba!

Name: The Exchange Hotel, Beaconsfield Tasmania
Description:
The Exchange Hotel is a family-owned Tasmanian business with a vision of creating a remarkable experience. The owners believe this development will enhance the viability, diversity, and vitality of the Beaconsfield local retail centre and the wider Tamar Valley Region.
 
The Exchange Hotel will provide a mix of family-friendly (self-contained) and boutique hotel room options to meet visitor demand. It provides an authentic Tasmanian hotel experience for guests incorporating luxury linens, duvets, and pillow tops. The heritage-styled rooms will be fitted out to a very high standard with period antiques and a colour palette that is sympathetic to the era of the Hotel. It will bring to life the history of Beaconsfield.

All rooms will have flatscreen TVs, desk/workspace, free Wi-Fi, and locally made boutique beauty products and toiletries. Guests can utilise common areas, outside on the rear deck, café, and lounge bar. Each room has a heat pump (air conditioning) to respond to the sudden changes in climate conditions. 

The Exchange Hotel will provide simple but uncompromising quality menu offerings developed and used to highlight local food, products and wines, aiming to take exceptional care of our guests. Guests can choose from the café area, charming lounge bar or relaxed outdoor seating options.

When fully open, The Exchange Hotel will showcase local produce, beverages and a range of gifts. Building hampers for travellers to enjoy. From having a full range of cheese, smallgoods, fresh seasonal items and other Tasmanian classics. Including the Tamar Valleys' finest collection of fine wines, craft beer and rare spirits.  

Rest. Renew. Explore.

Description:

The bars, clubs and restaurants on popular Simon-Dach-Strasse are just a 5-minute walk away. Alexanderplatz and the Hackescher Markt entertainment district can be reached in 10 minutes from Warschauer Straße S-Bahn station. The Frankfurter Tor underground station is a 10-minute walk from the Goldmarie.

The world-famous Club Berghain and the Eastside Gallery as well as a large part of the former Berlin Wall can be reached after a 10-minute walk. Sporting events and concerts take place at the Mercedes-Benz Arena, a 10-minute walk away.

The Goldmarie Berlin was newly opened in 2017. Each room has a private bathroom.

- Top price and top location
- Ideal for a visit to the Mercedes Benz Arena
- Quaint Berlin old building with modern furnishings.
- 24/6 hours Rewe opposite.

Fiecare camera din hotelul nostru este conceputa pentru a-ti oferi confort si relaxare. Toate camerele au vedere spre padure si munti, fiind refugii ideale pentru liniste si odihna profunda. Insa dorim sa te lasam pe tine sa alegi ce tip de camera ti se potriveste pentru urmatorul tau sejur!
Indiferent de camera pe care o alegi, confortul si relaxarea sunt garantate. Fiecare este spatioasa, luminoasa si dispune de dotari esentiale: balcon privat, baie cu aerisire naturala, seif si canapea extensibila.

Name: Millfields Hotel
Description:
Welcome to Millfields Hotel, where timeless charm meets modern comfort in the heart of Grimsby. Housed in a beautifully restored former private members’ club, our hotel blends heritage character with contemporary hospitality—offering a warm, welcoming experience for every guest.

Whether you're here for business, a weekend escape, or a special celebration, Millfields is more than just a place to stay—it's a place to feel at home. Our individually styled rooms offer comfort and personality, while our on-site restaurant showcases the best of local produce, including Grimsby’s world-renowned seafood and Lincolnshire-grown ingredients.

From elegant afternoon teas to relaxed midweek dining, every detail is thoughtfully curated to reflect our passion for quality and community. Planning a wedding, private event, or corporate gathering? Our versatile function spaces and experienced team ensure your occasion is as seamless as it is memorable.

Just minutes from Grimsby town centre and a short drive from Cleethorpes beach, Millfields is perfectly placed for exploring the coast, connecting with local culture, or simply unwinding in a setting full of character.

At Millfields, we believe in genuine hospitality, local pride, and creating experiences that stay with you long after you leave.

Stay. Dine. Celebrate. Make memories at Millfields.

This technology is implemented by NASA for the sanitization of the environment of aerospace missions. In 24/h of use of Sanixair systems is obtained the disinfection of environments from harmful and polluting elements and the destruction of the microbial load. The hotel features 437 soundproofed rooms, including 21 suites and 58 Club rooms that give exclusive access to the Sheraton Club Lounge. 1,000sqm of Spa with indoor pool and the 24/7 Sheraton Fitness allow guests to relax and stay fit while on the go. Description:
Originally opened in 1927, the Mari Jean Hotel was the first fireproof building to be built in St Petersburg. Recently purchased and fully renovated, the hotel offers Guests an amazing experience in the heart of the Grand Central District in a prime location on Central Avenue. 

The 21st Century at the Mari Jean promises to be the best she's ever seen. Catering to adults only, welcoming the LGBTQ+ community. 

The Mari Jean welcomes all Guests of any gender age 21 years or older. While not a clothing-optional resort, Guests may wear as little as they wish as long as they would feel comfortable wearing the same while walking down the street. Only service dogs are permitted but recommendations for other accommodations where pets are welcomed are available upon request. With more than 50 rooms, the majority of which have a premium Sealy Posturepedic mattress, Guests are wrapped in luxury with plush linens and towels, more bed pillows than most people need, and modern conveniences never dreamed possible in the 1920s. 

The hotel's lobby and Guest rooms are located on the second and third floors of the building with award-winning nightclubs downstairs on the ground floor and The Wet Spot Pool Bar & Day Club just outside. This boutique-style property brings a tongue and cheek approach to life through use of high-end graphics and colorful pop art.

To believe it is to experience it. To experience the Mari Jean Hotel, book online 24/7.

Name: CASTELO DE PORTUZELO
Description:
El Castelo de Portuzelo es un palacio de estilo neomanuelino que posee elementos desde el siglo XII a principios del XIX.
Tiene una superficie aproximada de 2000 m2, distribuida en dos plantas y una torre. El acceso a la primera planta se realiza a través de una escalera de piedra que parte de un zaguán, desde el que se accede a la capilla, a la mano derecha y a dos salones contiguos con salida directa a los jardines, a la izquierda.

El palacio se encuentra, por autopista, a 40 minutos del aeropuerto Sá Carneiro en Oporto y a 1 hora del aeropuerto de Peinador, en Vigo.

Santa Marta de Portuzelo (villa dónde se encuentra el Castelo de Portuzelo) y lo que muchos llaman ¨la Toscana portuguesa¨ está a tan sólo 2 km del centro urbano de Viana do Castelo, ciudad con amplia oferta de visitas culturales y gastronómicas, y a poco más de 3 kilometros de hermosas playas donde poder practicar actividades al aire libre (surf, kite surf...) y de varios campos de golf, entre los que destaca "Estela Golfe Links".
A 30 minutos por autopista podrá visitar ciudades cargadas de historia, como, por ejemplo: Valença do Miño, Vilanova da Cerveira, Braga, Guimeraes, Caminha, entre otras.

Name: Ivögården Mat & Vingård
Description:
Ivögården Mat och Vingård är precis vad det låter som. Ett Gårdshotell med egen vingård och restaurang där vi serverar vår gårdsmeny med säsongens råvaror från skogens skafferi. Gårdens egna viner finnas att avnjuta i restaurangen och vi har flera alternativ på såväl svenska som internationella viner.

Har man stort intresse eller bara är nyfiken på att få veta mer om svenskt vin, vinproduktion och odling går det bra att följa med oss på en Vingårdsupplevelse. Inga förkunskaper krävs och det provsmakas fyra olika svenska viner.

På vårt Gårdshotell har vi 15 rum fördelat på dubbelrum, tvåbäddsrum och superior rum med upp till 5 bäddar. Toaletter och duschar är placerade i gemensamma utrymmen med några få meters avstånd från varje rum. Totalt sett har vi upp till 40 sängplatser vilket gör oss till den perfekta mötesplatsen för möten med släkt, vänner och kollegor.

Hos oss är det vanligt att man hyr hela huset för konferens, bröllop och släktkalas. Vi har på våra 1200 kvm boende, konferenslokaler, festsal, restaurang och ett utespa som ingår när man hyr alla rum i gårdshotellet.

Name: Hotell Bondeheimen AS
Description:
Hotell Bondeheimen er eit av Oslos mest tradisjonsrike hotell, definert av norsk kulturarv, varme verdiar og eit vertskap som kombinerer historie med moderne profesjonalitet. Midt i Oslo sentrum tilbyr vi eit produkt med sterk identitet, der gjester opplever ein trygg, heimslig og gjennomført atmosfære i alle ledd av opphaldet.

Kaffistova, vår eigen restaurant med 125 års historie, er ein sentral del av profilen vår. Ho representerer det norske kjøkkenet på sitt mest ekte og står for ein mat- og kulturtradisjon som gir opplevinga hos oss eit forankra og unikt uttrykk. I samspel med hotellet skaper vi ei heilskapleg oppleving der kvalitet, oppfylling av forventningar og eit tydeleg kulturpreg står i sentrum.

Bondeheimen er ein møteplass for moderne reisande som ønskjer eit hotell med sjel og fagleg gjennomføring. Samtidig er vi ein arbeidsplass for medarbeidarar som vil vere del av eit lag bygd på ansvar, engasjement og stoltheit. Hos oss får folk utvikle seg i eit miljø som verdset kompetanse, initiativ og gode haldningar.
Vi jobbar langsiktig med å styrke kvaliteten i produktet vårt, utvikle teamet og vidareføre kulturarven på ein måte som gjer Bondeheimen til ei naturleg førsteval både for gjester som ønskjer ei ekte Oslo-oppleving og for medarbeidarar som ønskjer ein arbeidsplass med retning, tryggleik og verdiar i botn.

Bondeheimen og Kaffistova skal vere den heimslige møtestaden – ein stad der tradisjon, profesjonalitet og menneske møtest i ei oppleving som står seg over tid.

Name: Hotel Apogeo
Description:
L'Hotel Apogeo è parte del gruppo Bros Hotel. 
La nostra filosofia di vita: Siamo il giro in vespa nell’entroterra romagnolo, siamo il “tramontino al mare” e “l’apericena”.
Siamo piada e passatello, strozzaprete e cassone, Sangiovese e liscio.
Siamo la “vasca in centro” a guardare le signorine e la pedalata fino al porto per comprare le “poveracce”.
La romagnolezza è genetica in noi, innata; il sorriso è il nostro punto di forza, lo usiamo per accogliervi e farvi sentire come se foste nella vostra casa, portando allegria, divertimento genuino, qualche vizio, e quell'aria speciale che sa di vera vacanza.

Description:
A cozy guest house located on the slope of a post-glacial gorge in the buffer zone of the Landscape Park and on Strondowy Jar, under the strict protection of the European Natura 2000 nature protection program, surrounded by juniper bushes, brooms and other typical coastal flora.
The villa is located in a quiet area away from bars and discos, at the end of a dead-end street. Early in the morning you can see roe deer with their young, foxes and wild rabbits walking around the ravine.
Distance from the beach 400 meters, from the center 500 meters, nearest grocery stores 250 meters, ATM 400 meters. Full or half board dining room 30 meters away.
There are numerous paths and bicycle routes in the area - to Karwia, Dębki, Puck, Krokowa, Hel along the entire peninsula.

Name: Daspalla Hotel Private Limited
Description:
Founded in 1987 in Visakhapatnam, Daspalla Hotels has grown into a hospitality icon across Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. Known for its food-first philosophy, the brand gained fame through its beloved restaurants—Dharani, Dakshin, Vaisakhi, and Dimple Bar—offering hearty Andhra thalis and vibrant regional fare.

Expanding to Hyderabad in 2010, the flagship 109-room hotel in Jubilee Hills blends regal charm with modern elegance. It’s home to Circles (multi-cuisine), Dakshin (South Indian specialty), and Aqua Spirit bar—celebrated for bold flavours and consistent quality. Culinary festivals, Social events, and high-energy kitchens earned Daspalla its “food factory” reputation.

In 2014, Daspalla made history with the world’s longest dosa—54 ft 9 in—earning a Guinness World Record. This landmark reflects their bold culinary innovation.

Praised for hygiene, service, and authentic tastes, Daspalla has achieved People’s Choice recognition and ranks among the top 10% of hotels worldwide on TripAdvisor. It’s not just a place to stay—it’s a destination where tradition meets excellence. Whether you're here for business or celebration, Daspalla offers a memorable journey of flavour, heritage, and heartfelt hospitality

We meticulously organize every detail with elegance and flair, providing a stunning backdrop for your special day. With our expert team by your side, you can relax and enjoy the magic of your wedding day, knowing that every moment will be infused with love and joy. Description:

Choose to book any of our 18 air-conditioned meeting rooms depending on the size of your meeting or event. The College Suite holds up to 500 people, while the Brimpton is ideal for smaller company meetings of up to 30 people. Whatever the size, we’ll strive to meet everyone’s needs.
If you don’t want to stay indoors the entire day, you can make use of our outdoor space, including the courtyard and pagoda, for fun team-building activities. Working with our partners we can provide a range of out-of-the-box teambuilding activities. Fromescape rooms to outdoor parties, we’ve got it all.

Name: Hotel Flamingo Ampolla
Description:
Redescubre el Mediterráneo en el Hotel Flamingo, un hotel boutique ubicado en la Ampolla. Un sitio ideal donde descubrir los rincones del Delta del Ebro así como su biodiversidad, ecosistemas y playas, entre un sinfín de actividades a realizar en la zona.

Déjate sorprender por el Restaurant del Mar y de sus vistas, mientras degustas las creaciones de los productos de temporada, proximidad y marítimos presentes en sus platos, haciendote disfrutar de la gastronomía local.

Name: Wynwood Boutique Hotel
Description:
Nestled in the heart of UNESCO heritage site Pietermaai District,
you will find Wynwood Boutique Hotel.

Our fully restored buildings (2022) date back to the 1800’s however we have modernized all rooms and apartments with the latest technologies. A spot for the foody and cultural traveler who likes eclectic design combined with history and relaxation.

The newly renovated hotel has eleven rooms and two apartments to choose from. Each accommodation is unique in its own right and is fully equipped with a (mini) fridge, coffee machine, Smart TV, and QR-code (keyless) room access.

Name: Home Hotel Cardinal
Description:
Clarion Collection Hotels består av unika hotell med den genuina, mysiga "hyggekänslan". 
Hos oss finner du personlig och professionell service med fokus på detaljer. 
Vi erbjuder en lugn atmosfär där du kan sänka axlarna och slappna av. 
Ett av våra mest populära varumärkesindikationer är matkonceptet, 
där vi bjuder på både frukost, fika och kvällsmat. 
Vårt mål är att lämna ett tydligt spår av glädje till alla anställda, gäster och 
lokalbefolkning i varje ort där vi verkar. 
Kom och besök oss, så ordnar vi resten!

Name: Intle Boutique Hotel
Description: Escape to Intle; a boutique hotel set on 800 hectares of hills, valleys, thickets, and fantastic hiking and cycling trails. A beautiful piece of heaven just 45 minutes from Port Elizabeth Airport, Intle Boutique Hotel is set on a hilltop overlooking the grasslands, featuring a wooden deck with a swimming pool and 360 views from Signature restaurant where guests can enjoy seasonal dishes with a local flavour. With just nine rooms on a vast reserve, Intle is an intimate hotel experience with space to roam freely among grazing game such as giraffe, zebra, various antelope and birds of prey. A sweet spot between Knysna and Port Elizabeth - Intle Boutique Hotel lies at the centre of the best attractions along South Africa’s coast as it transitions from Garden Route forests and rugged beaches to the Eastern Cape’s dune ranges, rivers, and wild bushveld.

Name: Starlight Stays
Description: At Starlight Stays, we provide high-end, comfortable accommodation to those who travel to Cardiff, whether that be professionals, families or holidaymakers. We pride ourselves on our drive for customer satisfaction, therefore, we go above and beyond to make our properties as enjoyable as possible.

Name: Orkla Gjestebolig
Description:
Vi tilbyr konferansepakker i sjarmerende historiske omgivelser. 
Midt i det historiske og tradisjonsrike gruvesamfunnet Løkken Verk ligger Orkla Gjestebolig – et sted der historie, komfort og gode opplevelser møtes. Vi tilbyr førsteklasses mat, overnatting i autentiske omgivelser og inspirerende rammer for møter, seminarer og strategisamlinger.

Orkla Gjestebolig ble reist i 1916 av Orkla som en del av den omfattende utviklingen på Løkken Verk. Bygget ble oppgradert i 1954 i forbindelse med 300-årsjubileet for gruvedriften, og det er nettopp stemningen fra denne epoken vi har bevart. Orkla eide bygget i over hundre år før det ble overtatt av en stiftelse. I dag fremstår gjesteboligen som en unik arena for både private og bedriftsarrangementer. Vi legger til rette for ulike aktiviteter som kan skreddersys til din gruppe. For eksempel:
Vi samarbeider med NMK Orkla og kan tilby bruk av Wallenberg Arena for ulike typer bilsport
Omvisning i Gammelgruva – med mulighet for servering eller akevittsmaking inne i gruva
Besøk ved Orkla Industrimuseum, kan også kombineres med akevittsmaking.
Akevittsmaking med Thamsakevitt og historien bak, på Orkla Gjestebolig.
Foredrag om Orkla Gjestebolig, Orklas historie og Løkken-samfunnet
Tur med Thamshavnbanen (i sesong), Norges eldste elektriske jernbane.
Husvandring – vil du se hvor vi fant 24 våpen fra 2. verdenskrig gjemt i huset?
Hageparty med grilling/bålpanne - sommer som vinter!
Yoga med instruktør. Tilgang på treningssenter. 

Ta kontakt for mer informasjon og skreddersydde tilbud!

Med bil: 25 min fra Orkanger, 1 t fra Trondheim, 1 t 20 min fra Trondheim Lufthavn Værnes.

Gjesteboligen har 25 individuelt innredede rom med plass til 50 gjester, inkludert to rom tilrettelagt for bevegelseshemmede. I tillegg eier vi Bergmannshuset med 8 overnattingsrom, som gir en total kapasitet på 33 rom og 60 sengeplasser.

6 møterom
4 salonger
2 spisesaler
Gratis parkering
Elbillading

Name: Blu Wakes
Description: Discover Blu Wakes – an ultra-luxury retreat in Hoopers Bay, Exuma, where elegance blends seamlessly with the pristine beauty of the Bahamas. These two stunning four-bedroom beachfront villas, arriving in Spring 2025, are situated on the soft white sands of Hoopers Bay, just steps from the crystal-clear turquoise waters and beloved sea turtles. Blu Wakes invites you to indulge in the ultimate private escape, offering a haven of tranquility in one of the most beautiful settings in the Caribbean.

Name: Hotel Belassi Bojnice
Description:
Welcome to our cosy hotel in the historical centre of Bojnice.
Whether you are enjoying your free time or are on a business trip, you will find comfort and tranquility here after a busy day. We will provide you with a great base for all your plans in Bojnice, a stone’s throw from the busy streets with a hidden surprise in the form of a quiet garden.

We cordially invite you to experience the inviting atmosphere of the Belassi Hotel.

Name: Stone House Hotel
Description:
The Stone House Hotel, originally a large traditional country house, has elegantly been restored with tranquil gardens and outside terrace. Located in the heart of Staffordshire in the charming canal town of Stone and situated between Junction 14 and Junction 15 of the M6.

The Stone House Hotel poses an ideal stay for both the business and leisure traveller. The charming Stone House Hotel is perfectly situated in the centre of Staffordshire making it an ideal location for many local attractions, whether it be a quick stop off from a long journey or a week away to visit the surrounding area. Every traveller will feel at home at our Hotel.

The Stone House Hotel has 57 well-appointed en-suite bedrooms filled with character, as well as onsite leisure centre, bar, lounge, restaurants and function rooms. Whether you visit for a spot of lunch or host your Wedding with us, our friendly team would love to welcome you!

Name: Noha Lifestyle Hotel
Description:
Our exclusive 4-star Adults-Only resort welcomes you to the beautiful resort of Su Guventeddu in Pula.

The Noha Lifestyle Hotel is conveniently located just a stone’s throw from the crystal clear turquoise sea of Nora and the archaeological site dating from the Phoenician, Punic and Roman eras.

From the enchanting breakfast nook to the excellent restaurant, passing through the spacious rooms equipped with every comfort, our ambitious mission is to help you discover this enchanting location in the south of Sardinia, where you can spend a wonderful holiday dedicated to relaxation and well-being.

All accommodation at Noha Lifestyle Hotel is designed to make your holiday unique. We accommodate an adult-only clientele to offer you a relaxing and private holiday. Two rooms in the hotel have been designed in terms of size, architecture, and furnishings to accommodate people with reduced mobility.

Only 100 metres from the Noha lifestyle Hotel you will find the Su Gunventeddu beach. Its fine white sandy shore is about 700 metres long, while the water is a beautiful crystal-clear emerald colour.
It is very popular with kite and wind surfers. Thanks to its position, it offers impressive views of the Torre del Coltellazzo and the islet of San Macario.

Nora beach is a three-minute bike ride from the hotel. The beach is surrounded by a fragrant pine forest and is served by our facility Il Villaggio 88.

Name: Riad Africa
Description: Riad Africa comprises of four Marrakech merchant houses fused to create a truly luxurious riad and an authentic and charming hotel in the very heart of Marrakech medina. Just 5 minutes’ walk from Djemaa el Fna, Riad Africa offers a safe location and easy access to taxis, parking, restaurants and shops.

Name: Sundiata Beach Resort
Description:
Sundiata Beach Resort, is a high-end Eco Tourism Beach that offers Africanized hospitality and luxury accommodation for tourists, business international travelers and high end clientship.
Sundiata Beach Resort is strategically and conveniently located in the forested sandy shores of the ancient lake Nalubale (Lake Victoria) opposite Entebbe International Airport. The beach is also a sanctuary for primates, monkeys and baboons.
Our packages are designed by a combination of services such as accommodation, meals, activities, and other amenities, that are bundled together for a complete and enjoyable experience.

Name: Casale Doria Pamphilj
Description:
Il Casale Doria Pamphilj si trova nell’antico Borgo di Testa di Lepre, a 22 km dal centro di Roma, immerso nella natura tra i suggestivi paesaggi della campagna romana.

Il Casale sorge all’interno della storica tenuta Doria Pamphilj, annoverata tra i possedimenti della famiglia a partire dal 1649 quando venne acquistata da Olimpia Maidalchini Pamphilj, cognata di Papa Innocenzo X e amministratrice delle proprietà Pamphilj.

Un antico granaio sapientemente ristrutturato diventa oggi un’intima location in stile shabby-chic ideale per ricevimenti, meeting aziendali e brevi soggiorni all’insegna del relax.

La struttura comprende 25 alloggi autonomi, due dei quali attrezzati per disabili, bar, piscina esterna, angoli relax, ampi saloni interni e un grande giardino che sarà il luogo ideale per organizzare i Vostri eventi all'aperto.

Il Casale Doria Pamphilj è stato autorizzato dal Comune di Fiumicino a celebrare il rito civile autentico.

I terreni della azienda Doria Pamphilj producono frutta ed ortive, parte della azienda si trova nel comune di Colleferro dove si coltivano oleaginose, cereali ed ortive a pieno campo.

Name: Hotel Congreso
Description: El Hotel Congreso****, a 10 minutos de Santiago de Compostela, ofrece todas las facilidades para unas vacaciones inolvidables, reuniones de empresa o el mejor entorno para el día de tu boda.

Name: Petro House Boutique Hotel
Description:
Tọa lạc gần Bãi Trước bờ biển Vũng Tàu, Petro House Vũng Tàu là điểm đến lý tưởng để quý khách được tận hưởng những khoảnh khắc thư giãn hoàn hảo.  Với thông điệp "Your leisure home", chúng tôi mong muốn mang đến cho khách hàng sự tiện nghi và thoải mái của một “căn nhà sang trọng” khi nghỉ dưỡng. 

Petro House Vũng Tàu cao 6 tầng với diện tích rộng hơn 8.369 m2 và cung cấp 82 phòng nghỉ được thiết kế trang nhã, hiện đại, đi kèm với nhiều tiện nghi. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp các dịch vụ nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời như phòng tập gym, hồ bơi ngoài trời thoáng đãng và nhà hàng đa dạng với các món ăn đặc sắc từ Á đến Âu. Đặc biệt, khu giải trí E - gaming gồm các trò chơi hấp dẫn sẽ đem lại cho du khách những trải nghiệm thú vị và khó quên khi nghỉ dưỡng tại Petro House Vũng Tàu.

Name: Vidhave

Name: Anchor Inn Put-in-Bay
Description: The Anchor Boutique Hotel is a quirky, one-of-a-kind, couples hotel with lighthearted, mildly rebellious room details and a designer décor. With only 9 guest rooms we are small and intimate in size but we express our singularity with our quirky touches and winsome features. We are independent, eccentric with a sense of humor, and all for the surprise and delight of our guests. The 'Anchor' is a luxury hotel. Intentionally not stuffy, we stand out from the crowd because we challenge the common 'party island' beliefs. Our guests get to enjoy a quiet, classy and over-the-top place to stay that's close to everything. We pride ourselves on providing a quiet, secure, residential location without the party - the kind of place where you go to enjoy a nap, a good book, the company of friends, drinks on the patio and the beauty of an island sunset. Our casually elegant rooms and chef-inspired breakfasts are the sweet spot of the hotel.

If you’re looking for a peaceful retreat or an exciting adventure, Kanha Jungle Resort has everything for you.

Name: Club del Lago - Hotel & Golf Resort
Description:
Descubre la magia de Club del Lago Hotel & Golf Resort: un destino que te invita a explorar, relajarte y vivir al máximo.

 Nuestra Filosofía: Viviendo el Ahora 

En Club del Lago Hotel & Golf Resort, creemos en aprovechar cada momento. Aquí, te ayudamos a vivir el ahora y a crear recuerdos que durarán toda la vida. 

 Lo que Ofrecemos: 

Alojamiento Excepcional: Nuestras habitaciones y suites son refugios con vistas panorámicas al lago y comodidades de primera clase.

Sabores del Mundo: Deléitate con una cocina global en nuestro restaurante y disfruta de cócteles creativos en nuestros bares.

Aventuras en la Naturaleza: Desde deportes acuáticos emocionantes hasta rutas de senderismo y exploración, te animamos a descubrir el mundo que te rodea.

Campo de Golf de Clase Mundial: Juega al golf en un campo diseñado por expertos que te desafiarán y te inspirarán, con paisajes impresionantes.

Bienestar y Relajación: Nuestro spa y servicios de bienestar te ayudarán a rejuvenecer y encontrar equilibrio.

Eventos Inolvidables: Ya sea una boda, una conferencia o una reunión especial, nuestro resort es el lugar perfecto para celebrar momentos importantes.

Compras y Boutique: Explora nuestras tiendas para encontrar recuerdos únicos y regalos exclusivos.

Servicio Personalizado: Nuestro dedicado equipo de conserjería está siempre dispuesto a atender todas tus necesidades.

Ven y únete a nosotros para vivir una experiencia inolvidable!

Name: Holiday Inn & Suites Cedar Falls-Waterloo Event Ctr, an IHG Hotel
Description:
Welcome to the brand-new Holiday Inn & Suites Event Center Cedar Falls! Nestled within the growing development of Industrial and Gateway Park in Cedar Falls, Iowa. Our hotel is located just 3 miles from the University of Northern Iowa and 10 minutes from Waterloo Regional Airport (ALO) just off I-20 at Exit 224.

We’re also within 5 minutes of Gallagher Bluedorn and the UNI Dome. Hawkeye Community College is a 10-minute drive on I-20. We have great proximity to other nearby companies including John Deere, Unity Point Hospitals, Mercy One Hospital, Target Distribution, Viking Pump, VGM, Central Rivers, and many more.

Our hotel features spacious suites and 2 Presidential Suites which all include microwave, mini-refrigerator, large flat panel television, Keurig Brewer, along with fast and complimentary high-speed Internet. We also have a 14,000 sq ft Attached Event Center.

Guests can also experience the comforts of our indoor pool, game room including a pool table and shuffleboard, stay connected in our 24/7 business center, and maintain their workout routine in our fitness center. Guests can also enjoy a beverage at our bar or a warm freshly cooked meal at our bistro without leaving the hotel.

Name: Hotel Allinge
Description: Hotel Allinge ApS er et familiedrevet og helårsåbent hotel på toppen af Bornholm. Vi er Green Key certificerede og er med i Small Danish Hotels og Danish Bike Hotels.

Name: Hampton By Hilton San José Airport
Holiday Inn Montreal Airport
Description:
The Holiday Inn Montréal Airport is a full-service hotel conveniently located just minutes from Montréal–Trudeau International Airport (YUL). We provide comfort, convenience, and exceptional hospitality for business and leisure travelers alike.

At Holiday Inn Montréal Airport, we are committed to creating seamless stays — whether you’re connecting through the airport, hosting an event, or discovering all that Montréal has to offer.

Name: Lodge Tagua Tagua
Description:
Lodge Tagua Tagua  es un Lodge enclavado en el corazón de los Andes Patagónicos, a orillas de un lago de montaña rodeado de exuberante bosque nativo maduro y grandes extensiones de naturaleza virgen. Al ser su acceso marítimo, no tenemos conexión por tierra, por lo que la sensación de estar en una isla aparte del mundo  es tremendamente satisfactoria.

Nuestro objetivo principal es poder brindar a nuestros huéspedes una experiencia profunda de desconexión, siendo nuestras cómodas instalaciones el punto de partida para las más extraordinarias aventuras en el maravilloso entorno natural del norte de la Patagonia. La pesca con mosca es nuestra especialidad sin embargo ofrecemos también a nuestros pasajeros  un amplio abanico de actividades náuticas y terrestres para hacer de su estadía una experiencia inolvidable. Stand Up Paddle, Safari de río, trekking al Parque Tagua Tagua para conocer al Alerce, cabalgatas por las sendas gauchas de los colonos, viajes a las termas cercanas, entre muchas otras actividades son parte de la oferta que podemos organizar para nuestros huéspedes.

Name: مجتمع سیاحتی تفریحی امیرکبیر
Description:
شرکت مجتمع سیاحتی تفریحی امیرکبیر با همیاری و تشریک مساعی سازمان گسترش و نوسـازی صـنایع ایران و صندوق حمایت و بازنشستگی آینده ساز در سال 1367 تأسیس  گردیده است. این شرکت در سال 1367 با نام شرکت پارک و شهربازی لاله تأسیس شد . نـام شـرکت در سال 1382 از شـرکـت پـارک و شهربـازی لالـه به شرکت مجتمع سیاحتی تفریحی امیرکبیر تغییر پیدا کرد.
 مجتمع سیاحتی تفریحی امیرکبیر با چشم اندازی زیبا از طبیعت و معماری خاص با دارا بودن یک هتل باغ پنج ستاره، بزرگترین شهربازی غرب کشور، رستوران و سفره خانه سنتی همراه با موسیقی زنده، فودکورت مدرن، استخر سرپوشیده و روباز و سالنهای همایش، برج های مسکونی بهاران و مرکز تخصصی پخت نان و شیرینی، فضایی فرح بخش و دلپذیر را برای همشهریان و میهمانان خود فراهم دیده است.

Name: The Civic Hall | Wayth Hotels
Description: The Civic Hall is a boutique aparthotel from Wayth Hotels, offering luxury stays in the heart of Hebden Bridge. Currently being completely transformed and renovated, with doors opening end of 2025!

We have properties in fantastic locations including Cabot Circus and Waterfront. Whether it's business or leisure, we have a number of bespoke apartments suitable for any occasion!

Description: Welcome to Hotel Mirage Kashmir, where luxury and comfort meet. Our rooms are designed to cater to your every need, making your stay with us unforgettable.

Name: Ayres de Calafate - Hotel Boutique
Description: Escápate de la rutina y vive una experiencia única en El Calafate, Argentina. Nuestro hotel boutique te invita a descubrir un refugio exclusivo en la puerta de entrada al majestuoso glaciar Perito Moreno. Rodeado de paisajes de ensueño, aquí encontrarás un espacio donde la tranquilidad y el confort se combinan para enriquecer tus sentidos. Sumérgete en la belleza patagónica, disfruta de la calidez de nuestra hospitalidad y déjate envolver por el encanto de un destino que conecta naturaleza, historia y lujo.

Description: Sukh Saroj Hotels and Resorts, a place designed to provide you a serene and joyful experience. Situated in the vicinity of the upcoming Jewar International Airport and Gautam Buddh Nagar Film City and surrounded by sprawling lush green belt and fields.

Name: Fredensborg Store Kro
Description:
Midt i Nordsjællands naturskønne omgivelser ligger Fredensborg Store Kro som nabo til det smukke Fredensborg Slot. 

Bistroen byder på en høj gastronomisk oplevelse med forkælelse til både mave og gane. Af kun de bedste råvarer er vores retter inspireret af det nordiske cuisine med et fransk touch. 

Blandt de 100 værelser finder du 7 forskellige værelseskategorier. Alle værelser er helt unikke i den 300 år gamle kongelige bygning - dog helt renoveret og med et moderne touch. Du kan vælge vores romantiske værelser til dit næste getaway eller vores helt nye moderne værelser til dit næste business ophold. 

Gennem mange år har kroen dannet rammerne for både konference og fester til livets begivenheder. Vi har i alt 6 multi lokaler til konferencer, bryllup og fester, hvor du i dem alle kan opleve historiens vingesus. 

Vi glæder os til at byde jer byde jer hjertelig velkommen på Fredensborg Store Kro 

som byder på en restaurant med en højgastronomisk oplevelse, 100 hotelværelser med moderne og

Description: All Suite Hotel

Name: Sögüt Hotel & Spa Old City Istanbul
Description:
Söğüt Hotel & SPA Old City Istanbul is a 4-star facility offering service with 69 rooms in the heart of Istanbul. It offers a high-level accommodation experience with its modern architectural structure and interior decoration. Specially trained staff provide quality and comfortable service to the guests. Traditional Turkish cuisine. It promises to provide to the guests with an experience far beyond their expectations with rich restaurant repertoire that combines Turkish and international flavors and especially spa facilities.It has been working with the same vision and mission since the first day, developing and growing with each passing period, and enriching its service area with new opportunities.

Since it is located in one of the regions where urban transportation is most active, it also provides fast transportation to various parts of Istanbul. Come and experience it for yourself! Experience comfortable and quality accommodation to the fullest and embark on a historical adventure in the streets of Istanbul!

Name: Royal Rawal
Description:
“Royal Rawal” is more than just a luxury hotel; it’s a boutique experience that combines intimate décor and personalized luxury. In a world where travelers seek unique, culturally immersive experiences, boutique hotels like “Royal Rawals” offer a canvas for storytelling. Millennials, discerning and selective, yearn for meaningful journeys, and boutique hotels provide a blend of comfort, convenience, and cultural immersion.

In this evolving landscape, “Royal Rawals” stands apart by building a strong brand, ensuring that our message resonates with discerning travelers. We invite you to be a part of our journey, where every moment, every stay, tells a story worth sharing. Welcome to “Royal Rawals” – Where Luxury Meets Legacy.

Name: Fjordbris Hotell
Description: Fjordbris hotell i Stavanger er mer enn bare et sted å overnatte – det er et pulserende sentrum for kulturelle arrangementer og aktiviteter.

Name: Ramada Plaza Manoir du casino
Description:
Located just steps from the renowned Casino du Lac-Leamy and only ten minutes from downtown Ottawa, Ramada Plaza Manoir du Casino offers an exceptional stay experience in the heart of the Outaouais region. Our 4-star hotel combines elegance with comfort, providing guests with a modern and refined space complemented by attentive service. Whether you’re here for a relaxing getaway, business trip, or special event, our facilities include spacious rooms, a full wellness center, well-equipped meeting rooms, and a dining experience renowned for its quality.

Enjoy easy access to local attractions and activities while relishing the comfort of our hotel. The team at Ramada Plaza Manoir du Casino is dedicated to making your stay memorable and exceeding your expectations in a setting where luxury meets hospitality.

Name: Shree Kedarlingam
Description:
Welcome to Shree Kedarlingam — where every journey finds a home, and every guest becomes family.

Nestled in the heart of Guptakashi, we offer more than just a place to stay — we offer a place to belong. Whether you're a pilgrim seeking peace, a traveler exploring nature, or a family on vacation, our mission is to make your stay memorable, meaningful, and deeply comfortable.

We blend modern comfort with local warmth, ensuring every guest receives heartfelt hospitality, clean accommodations, delicious local food, and the serene atmosphere they deserve.

What We Offer:
Comfortable Rooms & Scenic Views
Friendly, Local Staff Committed to Your Comfort
Easy Access to Vishwanath temple Guptakashi, Tungnath Chopta, Kalimath temple, Triyuginarayan, Gaurikund, Kedarnath.
Personalized Stays & Packages for Families, Groups, and Solo Travelers

Come as Guest, Leave as Family

Follow our page for updates, special offers, seasonal travel tips, and a glimpse into the heart of Uttarakhand hospitality.

Name: Vju Hotel Rügen
Description:
Am höchsten Punkt von Göhren mitten im Biosphärenreservat Südost Rügen gelegen, ist unser Vju Hotel Rügen der ideale Ausgangspunkt für einen unbeschwerten und erholsamen Urlaub. Genießen Sie bei uns ein umfangreiches Wellness- und Relaxprogramm, finden Sie Ihre innere Ruhe bei einem Yoga Retreat auf Rügen, feiern Sie unvergessliche Feste, erholen Sie sich beim Sonnenbaden am feinsandigen Ostseestrand oder lernen Sie Rügen und seine einzigartige Natur bei Ausflügen in die Region kennen. Mit all Ihren Wünschen sind Sie bei uns bestens aufgehoben!

Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie als unseren Gast begrüßen zu dürfen.

Name: Tech Hotel Hub
Description:
Nuestro objetivo es claro: mejorar la eficiencia operativa y enriquecer la experiencia de los clientes. Trabajamos mano a mano con cada hotel para implementar soluciones que no solo optimizan su rendimiento, sino que también elevan la satisfacción y lealtad de sus huéspedes. 

Con las soluciones tecnológicas propuestas transformamos desafíos en oportunidades para que los hoteles alcancen nuevos niveles de éxito y excelencia.

Name: Camp Out West
Description: Turning an abandoned coal miners caravan park into a luxury retreat and glamping site. As seen on S4C & the BBC & featured in The Daily Express, The Mirror, The Sun, Daily Star, Google News, Coventry live, Nottingham Post, Cheshire Live, Gazette live, Hull Daily Mail, Coventry Telegraph & Lincolnshire live plus many more. Our Story:

Name: Proper Hotel Groep
Description:
Proper Hotel Group is een moderne, gastvrije en succesvolle hotelgroep, met hotels op Scheveningen. Onze hotels combineren eigentijdse elegantie met een warme en professionele uitstraling, met een sterke focus op kwaliteit, comfort en de ultieme gastbeleving.

Onze verschillende hotels spelen in op de uiteenlopende wensen van zowel zakelijke als leisure gasten en bieden faciliteiten op het gebied van eten & drinken, vergaderen & evenementen en wellness. Gasten kunnen altijd rekenen op persoonlijke aandacht en een aangenaam verblijf.

Als collega bij Proper Hotel Group kun je rekenen op een marktconform salaris, aantrekkelijke voordelen zoals bedrijfsfitnessplan, verjaardagscadeau, kerstpakket en een gezellige, collegiale werksfeer waarin je je talenten volledig kunt benutten.

Name: Saffron Valley Hotels and Resorts
Description: Discover luxury at Saffron Valley Hotels and Resort, perched atop. Ajodhya Hill in Purulia, West Bengal. Enjoy premium hospitality amidst the scenic beauty of an emerging tourist hotspot. Your affordable escape to tranquility!

Name: FairBridge Inn & Suites Canadian
Description: Enjoy free breakfast, WiFi, parking, and a 24/7 fitness center and well-appointed guest rooms at Fairbridge Inn & Suites Canadian.

Name: Quest Frankston
Description:
A bayside retreat close to town!

Location is everything when you choose to stay at Quest Frankston. With the beach, Frankston Arts Centre and Bayside Shopping Centre all close by, you have plenty to keep yourself busy when in town, while you can leave your car and hop on a train to easily get to Melbourne CBD. If you're touring the coast, Frankston is perfectly situated for trips down the Mornington Peninsula, where you can enjoy some of Victoria's most idyllic beaches, restaurants, wineries and bars. Your itinerary is sure to fill up while you're here!

Quest Frankston boasts 66 spacious serviced apartments, including Studios and 1- and 2-bedroom accommodation options. We're dedicated to excellent customer service, so lean on us for all your needs and some great local tips for getting the most out of your bayside stay.

Amenities:
- BBQ Area
- Conference Facilities
- Outdoor Swimming Pool
- Broadband Internet Access
- Interconnecting Rooms
- Non-Smoking Property
- WiFi Internet
- Wheel Chair Access

Name: Cape Charles Tiny Livin
Description: Providing Vintage Tiny Homes for our guests to experience tiny livin.

Name: ESTIVAL VENDRELL PLATJA
Description: Camping Estival Vendrell Platja, parte de la cadena Estival Group, está ubicado en Coma-ruga, El Vendrell (Tarragona). Si eres una persona dinámica, proactiva y con ganas de ofrecer la mejor experiencia a nuestros huéspedes, te estamos buscando!

Name: Akrathos Beach Hotel
Description: Located on the green hills of the Athos Peninsula, 2 km. away from Ouranoupolis village and 110 km. away from the airport of Thessaloniki “Macedonia”, Akrathos Beach 4 Star Hotel offers contemporary and stylish accommodation to the guests.

Name: Royal Paradise Beach Resort & Spa
Description:
In a place where golden sands kiss the deep blue sea, and the scent of pine mingles with sun-warmed olive groves, you’ll find Royal Paradise Beach Resort & Spa — a beachfront sanctuary where natural beauty meets refined elegance.

Nestled on the southern shores of Thassos, just minutes from the charming village of Potos, our five-star resort is designed for families seeking unforgettable Thassos vacations. Here, luxury lives in harmony with heartfelt hospitality, and every detail — from the thoughtful design to the exceptional service — is crafted to offer you a sense of completeness.

Whether you’re relaxing by the sea, indulging in wellness rituals, or simply enjoying precious time together, Royal Paradise welcomes you to experience the very best of Thassos accommodation.
Location: Potos, Thassos, Eastern Macedonia and Thrace

Name: Norias Luxury Resort - Fayoum
Description:
Norias Luxury Resort
As it is one of the hotel resorts located in Lake Qarun and near Wadi El Rayyan, not far from 10 km and 5 km from the famous village of Tunis, it has a large green area, a club overlooking the lake, and a highly experienced academic staff, and it is among the projects Fayoum University, where it is supervised directly by the President of the University

Name: Annemarie Schermerhorn
Description:
Welkom bij Finca las Calmas, een weelderig luxe boutique hotel & retreat in het adembenemende Andalusië, Spanje. Geniet van een betoverende ervaring vol sereniteit, exclusieve service en ultieme ontspanning te midden van de prachtige natuurlijke omgeving.

Finca las Calmas is een oase van rust en luxe, gelegen in het hart van Andalusië. Omringd door glooiende heuvels, weelderige natuur en uitgestrekte olijfgaarden, biedt dit hotel een ideale toevluchtsoord voor gasten die op zoek zijn naar een onvergetelijk verblijf.

Onze boutique accommodaties zijn met zorg ontworpen om een gevoel van comfort en verfijning te creëren. Elk detail is zorgvuldig gekozen om een warme en gastvrije sfeer te bieden. Iedere kamer is in een prachtige boho chique sfeer ingericht . Geniet van moderne voorzieningen, adembenemende uitzichten en ultiem comfort tijdens jouw verblijf.

Wij staan altijd klaar om ervoor te zorgen dat jouw verblijf onvergetelijk wordt. Van het regelen van excursies naar nabijgelegen historische bezienswaardigheden tot het aanbevelen van lokale culinaire hoogstandjes, wij streven ernaar om aan al uw wensen te voldoen. Geniet van de warme gastvrijheid en de persoonlijke aandacht die u verdient.

Ben jij een yoga instructeur en op zoek naar een unieke en luxe plek om retreats te organiseren? Dan ben je bij ons aan het juiste adres. Met ons prachtige yoga-platvorm, serene omgeving en onze all-in service zorgen we ervoor dat jouw retreat een inspirerende ervaring wordt. Laat je deelnemers genieten, naast jouw dagelijkse yoga- en meditatiesessies, van door ons bereide gezonde maaltijden en tijd om te ontspannen in onze luxe faciliteiten. We bieden een volledig pakket dat aan al jouw behoeften voldoet, waaronder accommodatie, maaltijden en benodigdheden voor jouw activiteiten.

Wij zijn er voor jou!

Name: Moss Manor Hotel
Description: Moss Manor Hotel is a company based out of 1A Throsby St, Moss Vale, New South Wales, Australia.

Name: Hotel Strandgaarden Badehotel
Description: Hotel Strandgaarden er et af Danmarks gamle badehoteller og har i næsten 100 år taget imod gæster som ønskede at opleve skønne Læsø.

Name: Casona de los Rebolledo
Description:
Una casona solariega del siglo XVII restaurada y convertida en hotel boutique de 4 estrellas con 15 habitaciones.

Un proyecto enfocado en inspirar a los visitantes a que se adentren y exploren la naturaleza, cultura, historia y gastronomía del Geoparque de Granada.

Esta casona busca darle el valor a nuestra zona y servir como un enlace entre los vecinos y negocios del geoparque y los visitantes que busquen descubrir nuevas experiencias.

Name: Houston Marriott Energy Corridor
Description: Discover a blend of style and substance at Houston Marriott Energy Corridor, where you can enjoy sophisticated amenities including covered parking and a premier location near City Centre and Houston Galleria for retail therapy. Also close to Memorial Park, BP Shell, Quantico Phillips and Bear Creek Pioneers Park, our hotel is perfect for building business ties, or exploring West Houston. After you catch your breath in our luxurious accommodations, delight in our room service for a delicious breakfast from our on-site restaurant, The Petroleum Grill, or a cocktail from The Derrick Bar. Enjoy our 24-hour fitness center, stocked with cardio equipment and free weights, or soak up the Texas sun in our outdoor pool. When it comes to your event needs, our elegant ballroom serves as the perfect backdrop for your wedding reception or business conference. Elevate your special occasion with our custom catering options and on-site event planners. At Houston Marriott Energy Corridor, revel in our modern comforts.

Name: Norus Apartments Santiago
Description: Norus es una empresa que lleva más de 10 años brindando servicios de alojamiento y hotelería de calidad en la ciudad de Santiago, destacado por las hermosas vistas de sus departamentos, la buena disposición y la mejor atención posible. Dedicada tanto a departamentos para ejecutivos como turísticos, Norus tiene la misión de otorgar la mayor comodidad a sus clientes con el propósito de que sea la mejor experiencia en su estadía en Santiago.

Name: HOTEL LA BRAVOURE
Description: Hôtel bar restaurant

Name: The Grand Walawwa
Description: The Grand Walawwa is an opulent and historically significant retreat located in the scenic splendor of Kegalle, Sri Lanka. Nestled amidst lush surroundings, this colonial villa provides guests with an opportunity to immerse themselves in the grandeur and elegance of a bygone era. With meticulously designed rooms, serene gardens, and breathtaking views, The Grand Walawwa offers a tranquil escape for those seeking relaxation and refined luxury.

Name: Comfort Suites Denham Springs
Description: Enjoy friendly service and a warm welcome at our Comfort Suites Denham Springs hotel. Conveniently located just minutes from Baton Rouge, we offer a variety of amenities to make your stay comfortable and enjoyable.

Name: Palladium Hotel Kos
Description:
Renowned for its cordial hospitality and authentic character, Palladium Hotel features 144 rooms amidst the natural beauty of lush gardens, a spectacular Main Pool and mesmerising paths guiding visitors to their summer home.

Enveloped by verdant Mediterranean gardens, brimming with blooming flowers and trees, Palladium Hotel is a blissful summer sanctuary where nature abounds.

Name: Het Wapen van Alblasserdam
Description:
Het Wapen van Alblasserdam is al jaren een herkenbaar en vertrouwd adres in de regio. Met ons hotel, restaurant en grand café bieden wij een complete gastbeleving voor zakelijke reizigers, lokale bezoekers en toeristen.
Onze focus ligt op kwaliteit, persoonlijke aandacht en een warme, toegankelijke sfeer. Of het nu gaat om dineren, overnachten, een goed gesprek aan de bar of een zakelijke bijeenkomst: wij zorgen dat iedereen zich welkom voelt.

Name: Taphe Resort
Description: Enjoy a serene and quiet atmosphere, provides good rest and recreation for individuals, families, workshops, conferences, parties and wedding functions

Name: Hotel Manorama
Description: we offer an unparalleled experience of comfort and elegance. Located in the heart of the city with world-class amenities, and exceptional service. Our rooms and suites are exquisitely designed with the highest quality furnishings and luxurious amenities to ensure your stay is both comfortable and memorable.

Name: Hotel The Rosendale
Description:
Stadshotel met een dorps karakter
The Rosendale is de centraal gelegen, multifunctionele ontmoetingsplek in West-Brabant voor elke gelegenheid. Bij ons ben je aan het juiste adres voor feestelijke ontmoetingen met je familie, (verre) vrienden maar ook op het zakelijke vlak kun je bij ons terecht voor een vergadering, borrel of als je een plek zoekt om te flexwerken.

Name: Apreciosa Hotel
Description: Boutique Hotel in Luanda, Angola.

Name: Outbuildings_Dorset
Description:
Welcome to our Dorset Family Run Farm'otel!
Outbuildings is so much more than a place to stay in Dorset. Yes, they offer nine considered spaces to stay on a family farm, but they also offer hotel standard service and experiences. Their team will connect you with the unique local characters, hidden treasures, stunning coastline and award-winning produce that makes this part of the world so special. As a result, when you stay with us - even just for 2 nights - we promise that our part of Dorset will stay with you for a lifetime.

Name: Equipetrol Suites Apart Hotel
Description:
¿Te imaginas viajar a Santa Cruz por negocios y descansar en una suite totalmente equipada? 
Desde una cama confortable hasta una cocina completa, tendrás todo lo necesario para tu estadía. Y lo mejor de todo, contarás con un área de trabajo dentro de tu habitación, con un amplio escritorio, una cómoda silla y acceso gratuito a Internet, aquí podrás realizar tus pendientes de manera práctica y sin distracciones.
Además, nuestra ubicación en el corazón de Equipetrol te brinda fácil acceso a restaurantes, tiendas y centros de negocios, lo que facilita tus labores diarias. No tendrás que preocuparte por perder tiempo en largas distancias y podrás aprovechar al máximo tu tiempo.
Disfruta de nuestras suites y de los beneficios por registrarte ahora como huésped corporativo.
Location: Santa Cruz, Santa Cruz de la Sierra

Name: Hotel Vishal International
Description: Hotel Vishal International is redefining the standard of hospitality in Jamnagar, offering services and comforts that evoke a feel of royalty ! making your visit memorable indeed.

Name: Eaze & Comfort Hospitality - Boutique Hotel
Description: Eaze & Comfort Hospitality is a boutique hotel located in the serene neighborhood of Palavakkam, ECR – Chennai. We offer 6 thoughtfully designed luxury rooms and a charming mini event space ideal for traditional ceremonies, photo shoots, kids' birthday parties, senior reunions, and family gatherings. Experience comfort, elegance, and personalized hospitality.

Name: Cambria Madeira Beach
Description:
Ready, Set, Relax at the Cambria Hotel in Madeira Beach located along Florida's Gulf Coast. Our hotel is where you can enjoy access to the area's best dining, shopping and entertainment. Whether you are here for vacation or business, we have a multitude of premium amenities that allow you to indulge a little during your stay.

Dine at our full-service restaurant, relax with a handcrafted cocktail at our bar and lounge or keep up with your workout in our state-of-the-art fitness center. Plan an important meeting or corporate retreat in our indoor-outdoor meeting space with the A/V equipment and staff to support up to 200 guests. Or simply retreat to the comfort of your guestroom enhanced with premium bedding, spa-quality bath products and free WiFi. 

Prime Waters is our full-service restaurant located in the lobby on the 3rd floor serving an upscale breakfast, lunch and dinner menu. The restaurant offers locally inspired dishes that will make your taste buds come alive! For a truly special experience, head to Embers Lounge located on the rooftop where you can treat yourself to some savory bites while sipping on a craft beer, premium wine or mixed cocktail. The sky's the limit when it comes to good food and drinks at Cambria Hotels. 

Relax in premium accommodations that are designed with modern features for your ultimate comfort. We offer spacious guest rooms and suites that include ocean and marina views, some including private balconies overlooking the water. Enjoy a refreshing shower with a Bluetooth capable mirror before you melt away in our comfortable beds featuring premium linens.

Name: Hana 175
Description:
Hana es un concepto innovador, que trae para ti una serie de Lofts con funcionalidades completas para el descanso y el trabajo, ubicado en el corazón de la Ciudad de México.
A tan solo 5 minutos a pie de la Rotonda de insurgentes y a 7 Minutos a pie del ángel de la independencia. En el mayor punto de movilidad de la ciudad de México.
Los Lofts cuentan todos con cocineta integral, frigobar, parrilla eléctrica, utensilios de cocina, amenidades de oficina, internet, tv por cable, baño privado…

Name: HOTEL CARIBE ROTA
Description: Ideal para tus vacaciones, teletrabajo, reuniones de empresa, fines de semana y eventos

Name: Hotel SKS Grand Palace
Description: Hotel SKS Grand Palace, a new hotel in Vrindavan, has opened its doors and is ready to host the most lavish events and ceremonies for you and your loved ones. This hotel in Vrindavan showcases marvellous amenities alongside spacious and luxurious venues, making it the perfect choice for your stay in Mathura and Vrindavan. The hotel is centrally located between Mathura and Vrindavan, with close proximity to all the major temples and tourist attractions of Mathura district, including Banke Bihari temple, Prem Mandir, Dwarkadhish temple, Krishna Janam Bhumi, Barsana, Gokul, Govardhan, Raman Reti, and Tatiya Sthan.

Name: Rodi Resort
Description: Rodi Resort is an eco-friendly hotel, fully renovated with low environmental impact Made in Italy materials, moreover it draws electricity from renewable sources and uses low-energy light bulbs, extremely low thermal transmittance fixtures and recycled paper.

Name: Wonderful Citamiang
Description: Wonderful Citamiang merupakan resort yang berlokasi di Jl. Ciliwung, Tugu Utara, Kec. Cisarua, Kabupaten Bogor, Jawa Barat 16750. Kami memberdayakan Sumber Daya Manusia yang masih berdomisili di Tugu Utara dengan tujuan mensejahterakan masyarakat Tugu Utara. Kami juga berupaya menjaga lingkungan dengan rutin mengadakan acara peduli lingkungan dengan menanam pohon yang dilakukan oleh pihak resort maupun program yang dapat ditawarkan kepada tamu resort.

Name: Novotel Hotel and Resort Ulaanbaatar
Description: Novotel Ulaanbaatar is a modern hotel located at the heart of the city center, within walking distance from the famous Government House, Great Chinggis Khaan Square, offices and embassies .The hotel features 192 upscale guest rooms, 1 buffet restaurant, 1 Chinese restaurant, 2 lounge bars, 1 coffee shop totaling  5 restaurants ,a fitness center, indoor swimming pool and 362 m² Grand Ballroom that is fully adaptable to suit your specific event needs.

Name: Hotel Jurajski Kryształ
Description: Jurajski Kryształ to nowoczesny hotel położony w północnej części malowniczej Jury Krakowsko Częstochowskiej. Z racji atrakcyjnego położenia – bliskość zamków zwanych Orlimi Gniazdami i Jasnej Góry – stanowi idealne miejsce noclegowe przez cały rok. Specjalne pakiety pobytów na ferie zimowe, wakacje, czy weekendy sprawią, że wypoczynek będzie z pewnością udany. Zapraszamy również na szkolenia i konferencje.

Name: UpLiving
Description: Alojamentos para colaboradores de empresas internacionais que querem ter uma vida com qualidade em Aveiro.

Name: Munique Hotels
Description: Munique Hotels operates 2 hotels through management contracts.

Name: Millwood Hotels
Description:
Millwood Hotels blend historic charm with modern comfort throughout their portfolio, striving to deliver the highest standards of hospitality and event services for guests and clients alike.

Millwood Hotels currently owns the 12th century Walworth Castle Hotel in Darlington, the 19th century Mallyan Spout Hotel - a country house hotel in Goathland, and the 16th century Fox & Hounds - a traditional country inn in Ainthorpe set in the heart of the North Yorkshire Moors National Park.

Name: Casago Aruba
Description: Casago Aruba is a full-service vacation rental and property management company, combining global expertise with local hospitality. As part of the international Casago franchise, we offer personalized guest experiences, professional homeowner support, and a commitment to innovation and community on the island of Aruba.

Name: Caserio del Mirador
Description:
Caserio del Mirador is a family friendly boutique hotel specialising in providing holidays for families with babies, toddlers and young children. Set in an idyllic mountain setting with panoramic views down to the Mediterranean, it is surrounded by gardens, play areas and 15 acres of nature. 
Established for over 20 years, the hotel provides a secret hideaway, taking guests to another world where they can enjoy being together in a beautiful setting.  It is a place where you can reconnect, create lasting memories that will shape your family story for years to come.  Many guests return each year to enjoy an experience that is unique to this little paradise. 
There are lots of pet animals, - join the rabbits in their run on the lawn, feed the piglets, collect eggs from the chickens, visit the ponies and donkeys at the stables - lots of new friends to meet. 
Enjoy freshly prepared Mediterranean cooking, paella, tapas, tortillas and lots of local sun ripened fruit and vegetables. All allergies and preferences are taken care of. 
Each family has their own suite or apartment with private inside and outside space, meals can be delivered here or you can enjoy communal dining with the other guests.  Toys, books and equipment is provided for the ages of your children. Each week similar aged children are able to make friends, play and have fun together.
The hotel is on a peninsula surrounded by 70km of spectacular coastline (half an hour away) with a wide variety of beaches and restaurants. 
Valencia and Alicante airports are about an hour’s easy drive away.

Name: Magna Manastır Hotel
Description:
1970 yılına kadar yöre halkı tarafından keyifli bir mesire yeri olarak kullanılan bu eğimli arazide, 17. yüzyıldan kalma küçük bir mezarlık şapeli, beş adet selvi ve 300 yıllık çam ağacı yer alıyor. Bu doğal öğeler, planlama ve tasarımın temel taşlarını oluşturuyor. Ancak çevredeki yapılaşmanın artmasıyla, bu alan zamanla değerini kaybetmiş, sahipsiz ve kullanılmaz bir hale gelmiş.

20. yüzyıl başlarında yeniden inşa edilen küçük manastır, ne yazık ki yöredeki depremler, ilgisizlik ve zamanın etkileriyle yıpranmış durumda. 1986’da yapılan rölöve çalışmasında, tonoz örtüsü mevsim yağışlarıyla birlikte yıkılmış ve geriye sadece harabe kalmış. 1986 yılında başlayan proje çalışmalarında, bu arazi üzerine bir otel yapılması önerisi belediye meclisinin onayına sunuldu.

63 yatak kapasiteli Manastır Oteli’nde normal, suit ve kule tipi yatak odaları kullanılarak aynı planlama modülleri tekrarlandı. Modüllerin yatak odası derinliği artırılarak cephe farklılıkları oluşturuldu ve binaların kitlesel etkisi azaltıldı. Arazinin eğiminden yararlanılarak yapı alanlarının çoğu doğal çizgi seviyesinin altında tutuldu. Böylece yapının kitlesel boyutları, mekan ölçüleriyle uyumlu hale getirildi ve zamana yayılmış bir izlenim verildi.

Yatak odaları sokaklar üzerine yerleştirildi ve bu sokaklar orta avluda buluştu. Ardından bazıları denize, bazıları ise yeşil alanlara yönlendirilerek yolculuklarına devam etti. Yapının kitlesel denge içinde, çam ve selvi ağaçları mimari unsurlar olarak korundu ve Bodrum beyazının güçlendirilmesi için renk kullanımına dikkat edildi. Yöre halkının önem verdiği bu arazideki doğal varlıkların korunması dikkat çekicidir ve yeni yapılaşma bu dengeyi bozmamıştır. Aksine, yapı, yaşamın sürekliliğine uyum sağlayan bir yapı olarak ortaya çıkmıştır.

Çam ağacının muhteşem görselliği, eski anıların korunması ve doğal yapının uyumu, bu modern yapının en önemli özelliklerinden biridir.
