Name: Asociación Federal de Hostels de Argentina
Description:
Somos la Asociación Federal de Hostels de Argentina (AFHA), una organización civil sin fines de lucro que representa a propietarios y gestores de hostels de todo el país.
Nacimos para darle voz y visibilidad al sector hostelero, profesionalizarlo y consolidarlo como actor clave del turismo nacional e internacional.
Nuestro propósito es claro: fortalecer a los hostels para que vendan más y mejor, operen con estándares comunes y crezcan con respaldo institucional.

Lo que hacemos:
Representamos al sector hostelero ante municipios, provincias y nación.
Impulsamos convenios estratégicos con empresas tecnológicas, universidades y organismos públicos.
Organizamos el Congreso Internacional de Hostels, el evento más importante de la industria en la región.
Creamos espacios de networking y aprendizaje federal: mesas de trabajo, webinars y capacitaciones.
Potenciamos la visibilidad de cada hostel mediante campañas, prensa y presencia en ferias.

Nuestros valores:
Colaboración, transparencia, profesionalismo, federalismo e innovación con foco humano.
Hoy, AFHA es la red nacional de hostels más grande y activa, construyendo una industria más profesional, ética y sustentable.

Name: Boutique Hotel & Retreats Finca las Calmas
Description:
Welkom bij Finca las Calmas, een weelderig luxe boutique hotel & retreat in het adembenemende Andalusië, Spanje. Geniet van een betoverende ervaring vol sereniteit, exclusieve service en ultieme ontspanning te midden van de prachtige natuurlijke omgeving.

Finca las Calmas is een oase van rust en luxe, gelegen in het hart van Andalusië. Omringd door glooiende heuvels, weelderige natuur en uitgestrekte olijfgaarden, biedt dit hotel een ideale toevluchtsoord voor gasten die op zoek zijn naar een onvergetelijk verblijf.

Onze boutique accommodaties zijn met zorg ontworpen om een gevoel van comfort en verfijning te creëren. Elk detail is zorgvuldig gekozen om een warme en gastvrije sfeer te bieden. Iedere kamer is in een prachtige boho chique sfeer ingericht . Geniet van moderne voorzieningen, adembenemende uitzichten en ultiem comfort tijdens jouw verblijf.

Wij staan altijd klaar om ervoor te zorgen dat jouw verblijf onvergetelijk wordt. Van het regelen van excursies naar nabijgelegen historische bezienswaardigheden tot het aanbevelen van lokale culinaire hoogstandjes, wij streven ernaar om aan al uw wensen te voldoen. Geniet van de warme gastvrijheid en de persoonlijke aandacht die u verdient.

Ben jij een yoga instructeur en op zoek naar een unieke en luxe plek om retreats te organiseren? Dan ben je bij ons aan het juiste adres. Met ons prachtige yoga-platvorm, serene omgeving en onze all-in service zorgen we ervoor dat jouw retreat een inspirerende ervaring wordt. Laat je deelnemers genieten, naast jouw dagelijkse yoga- en meditatiesessies, van door ons bereide gezonde maaltijden en tijd om te ontspannen in onze luxe faciliteiten. We bieden een volledig pakket dat aan al jouw behoeften voldoet, waaronder accommodatie, maaltijden en benodigdheden voor jouw activiteiten.

Wij zijn er voor jou!

Name: Legacy Lodging Asset Management Group LLC
Description:
Who We Are
At Legacy Lodging Asset Management Group, we are a team of experienced financial and operations professionals committed to helping individuals, businesses, and institutions achieve their financial goals. With a forward-thinking approach, a focus on risk management, and a keen eye on market opportunities, we specialize in delivering personalized investment strategies that drive sustainable growth.

Our Mission
Our mission is simple: to build and preserve wealth for our clients by delivering superior investment performance, prudent risk management, and unmatched service excellence. We are driven by a client-centric philosophy that places your financial success at the heart of everything we do.

Core Values
Integrity: We uphold the highest standards of ethics and transparency in every decision and action.
Innovation: We embrace new technologies and investment strategies to create forward-looking portfolios.
Collaboration: We partner closely with clients to understand their unique needs and craft solutions that align with their long-term objectives.
Performance: We strive to deliver consistent, above-market returns through disciplined, research-driven strategies.

Our Approach
We believe that successful investing starts with understanding your needs and designing a customized strategy. Our process is rooted in:

Strategic Portfolio Management:
We balance growth opportunities with risk mitigation to ensure robust and resilient portfolios.
Research-Driven Insights: Our investment decisions are guided by in-depth market analysis, proprietary research, and global economic trends.
Active Management: By continuously monitoring and adjusting portfolios, we capitalize on emerging market opportunities while safeguarding against downside risks.

Partner with Us
At Legacy Lodging Asset Management Group, your financial success is our top priority. Whether you're an individual investor or a corporate institution.

Description:
Die Straßen winden sich durch die malerische Landschaft von Okzitanien.
Fährt man durch die Alleen mit den großen alten Platanen, ist das Ziel schon fast erreicht: Ein unvergesslicher und erholsamer Urlaub in Südfrankreich.

Auf einem Berg am Rande des verschlafenen Örtchens Saint-Siffret liegt die Villa Camille. Dort heißt es in Ruhe Sonne tanken, bevor man durch die Gassen von Uzès bummelt und das französische Leben genießt: Ein Glas Rosé auf dem Place aux Herbes trinken oder Einkäufe auf dem Wochenmarkt erledigen.

Der nahe gelegene Fluss Gardon bietet ein besonderes Naturerlebnis für ein Picknick im Grünen oder eine Kayak-Tour unter der Pont du Gard hindurch - das historische Aquädukt ist ein Erlebnis für sich. Aber auch viele andere Attraktionen hält die Region Pays d‘Uzès für Urlauber bereit.

Machen Sie sich eine schöne Zeit und genießen Sie das Leben!

Name: Hotel Waldhaus am See - St. Moritz
Description:
Hotel Waldhaus am See – Timeless Elegance Since 1885

Nestled on the shores of Lake St. Moritz, Hotel Waldhaus am See has been welcoming guests with warmth and tradition since 1885. With breathtaking views of the Engadine mountains and direct lake access, our hotel offers a truly unique alpine experience.

We offer 50 freshly renovated rooms, each combining traditional charm with modern comfort—either facing the tranquil forest or offering stunning lake views.

Our culinary offerings include Swiss and Italian classics, such as our famous Châteaubriand from the grill with homemade Béarnaise sauce, as well as a variety of traditional fondues. A standout feature is our world-renowned bar “Devil’s Place,” home to over 2,500 different whiskies, making it the largest whisky bar in the world.

Relax and recharge in our wellness area featuring a sauna, steam bath, and massage services. In both summer and winter, guests enjoy direct access to hiking, skiing, and mountain biking trails right from the hotel.

At Hotel Waldhaus am See, we combine heritage, comfort, and nature to create unforgettable moments in the heart of the Swiss Alps.

#WaldhausAmSee #StMoritz #SwissAlps #Since1885 #LuxuryRetreat #WhiskyLovers #TopOfTheWorld

Name: Eden Grand Resort Predeal
Description:
Eden Grand Resort
Situat într-un cadru natural, la liziera pădurii, în zona Cioplea din Predeal, Eden Grand Resort este locul în care te reconectezi cu natura, te relaxezi și te bucuri de servicii de calitate, indiferent dacă ești într-o deplasare de afaceri sau în vacanță. Amplasarea privilegiată, la altitudine, în mijlocul naturii, face din Eden Grand Resort o alegere ideală în orice anotimp. 

Cu o capacitate totală de 150 de locuri, resortul dispune de multiple opțiuni de cazare, repartizate în camere duble și apartamente moderne, gândite pentru a răspunde celor mai variate nevoi de confort, spațiu și intimitate. Fiecare unitate de cazare a fost amenajată cu atenție la detalii, pentru a crea un ambient cald, plăcut și relaxant.

Ideal pentru grupuri, evenimente și Team Building

Resortul este conceput pentru a găzdui grupuri organizate, fiind o alegere excelentă pentru team building-uri, evenimente corporate, tabere, retreaturi sau vacanțe tematice. Pe lângă spațiile de cazare, Eden Grand Resort oferă și numeroase facilități complementare, ce includ restaurante, săli de conferință, teren de sport și zone de relaxare în aer liber.

Spații moderne pentru evenimente corporate

Eden Grand Resort pune la dispoziția oaspeților 7 săli de conferință, cu o capacitate variabilă între 15 și 160 de persoane, adaptate oricărui tip de eveniment – de la întâlniri restrânse de echipă, până la conferințe, workshopuri sau seminarii de amploare.

Name: Holiday Inn Resort | South Padre Island
Description:
Welcome to Holiday Inn Resort South Padre Island — your all-in-one beachfront destination for family vacations, group getaways, and unforgettable events on the Texas Gulf Coast.

Just steps from the sand, our resort blends laid-back island charm with modern amenities designed for comfort, connection, and fun. From spacious, family-friendly accommodations to our multiple beachfront pools and hot tubs, every stay is crafted with relaxation in mind. On-site dining showcases fresh coastal flavors and crowd-pleasing classics, with live entertainment and seasonal events to keep the energy high.

Planning something special? We offer over 15,000 square feet of flexible event space, perfect for beach weddings, corporate retreats, reunions, and conferences—complete with full-service catering and expert event coordination.

Whether you’re here for sun-soaked family time, a beachfront celebration, or a productive work retreat with ocean views, Holiday Inn Resort South Padre Island is where memories are made and guests return year after year.

Name: Yara Hotel Palm Springs
Description:
The Yara Hotel is a 10-room boutique desert oasis nestled beneath the San Jacinto Mountains in the heart of Palm Springs, California. Revived and redesigned, this Spanish-style hotel has emerged as a serene retreat for slow living. Inspired by the natural beauty of the desert, the Yara Hotel creates a far-away feel with intentional details reminiscent of the Mediterranean.

The pool is the heart of Yara—an intimate yet inviting space where you'll find yourself becoming friendly with those traveling from near and far. Lounge on any of the cushy day beds and vibe with the eclectic tunes. The space is neutral in color but lavish in texture. No detail has been spared lightly, all perfectly accenting the breathtaking Spanish architecture.

Yara offers complimentary breakfast, poolside drink service with a curated natural wine list, craft cocktails, and a boutique selection of beers and seltzers. For dinner, Yara will soon offer an exclusive communal prix fixe chef's tasting menu with wine pairing.

Escape for a rejuvenating stay, a quaint gathering, or a memorable time with those close to you. Yara can be experienced by single room bookers or those looking to buy out the entire property.

Description:
Dáváme lidem druhý domov, kde si odpočinou, vyřídí veškeré pracovní záležitosti nebo stráví čas s rodinou. Hotel Centrum je umístěn v centru města Hranice má vlastní parkování, konferenční prostory a dvě hotelové restaurace.

Ubytování:
Pokoje pro více než 50 osob ve třech kategoriích, velký sál až pro 80 osob a salónek pro 25 osob.

Hotelové restaurace:
Tiskárna Restaurant je opravdovým gurmánským zážitkem. Ochutnáte jak českou, tak světovou kuchyni v moderním pojetí s příjemnou obsluhou. Tiskárna Vám nabídne snídaně, obědové menu a páteční večeře v prostředí, které je vhodné pro oběd s přáteli a rodinou i obchodní schůzky. Archa restaurace si zakládá na skvěle čepovaném pivu, jednoduše a kvalitně servírovaném jídle po celý den. Součástí jídelního lístku je i měsíční nabídka, která přináší sezónní suroviny a zajistí pestrost jídel.

Veškeré části komplexu jsou pod jednou střechou v centru města.

Name: Kalsee Eco-lodge
Description:
Kalsee Eco-lodge offers simple luxury cabins and camping stays in the middle of the forest. Set on a ridge above the village of Tanchowk and Lumle.

A shelter from the frenzy of everyday life

Set on a ridge above the village of Tanchowk and Lumle. Our lodge offers unforgettable views of Mt Fishtail,
Dhaulagiri and Annapurna Himalayan range and is part of an adventure of a lifetime. Relax and enjoy the view next to our camp ground area or hike around the forest or native villages of Lumle and Tanchowk.
 
Peacefully and simply Comfort

Designed to create a serene sense of comfort; our lodges are built to provide a newfound zeal in life.
Relish the pleasant beauty of evergreen forests with the accommodation of rich comfort. Each lodge was built handmade with extreme care for the surroundings, along with great craftsmen ship from the local people, enriching each lodge with its own unique story. Witness the effortlessly enriched beauty of our unique lodges which extends the sensation of elegance and comfort, making your stay a special one.

Breathtaking views

Our lodge offers unforgettable views of Mt Fishtail, Dhaulagiri, and Annapurna Himalayan range and is part of an adventure of a lifetime. Relax and enjoy the view next to our campground or hike around the forest or native villages of Lumle and Tanchowk.

Locally flavored Dishes

Test your taste buds by enriching them with rich flavors from the Lodge. Each delicacy offers a luscious taste that thrills you to try some more. Our dishes are made from fresh organic vegetables along with the herbal spices available in the forest.  The everyday food will not feel the same, due to the use of pure and fresh water straight from the laps of the magnificent Himalayas. We provide the best dishes to ensure that your stay will be full of satisfaction and joy.

Name: HOUSE OF BLE
Description:

Ist das Leben nicht ein Füllhorn voller Facetten? Mal brauchen wir absolute Me-Time, zart durchbrochen durch Interaktionen mit dem Barkeeper. Mal machen wir uns die Stadt zu eigen, sodass am nächsten Morgen alle unseren Namen und die Farbe unserer Sockenhalter kennen. Dazu ein erhebender Mix aus Spa, Spaß und Städtetrip. Fertig ist das Urlaubsalbum, von dem man einfach allen erzählen wird. Das alles ist HOUSE OF BLE. Treten Sie ein in das hübscheste Fleckchen Wiens.

Wir widmen dieses Hotel all jenen, die die Schönheit des Augenblicks entdecken möchten.

Name: Rio Manso Camp
Description:
Río Manso Camp is a luxury nomadic camp, created and developed by Patagonia Glamping Co and Frasson Travel Designer, both companies based in San Carlos de Bariloche, specialists in tailor-made trips and one of a kind events; pioneers in glamping experiences in Patagonia and Argentina.
Rio Manso Camp is a unique and exclusive venue for private and tailor made events, whether for a corporate trip (team building programs, incentives, and congresses), brand actions, social events (weddings, celebrations, anniversaries, festivals) or a private journeys for groups and families. The camp is ideal to organize unrepeatable events with outstanding settings.
Our staff and professional team are expert in the field, attentive to every details and needs. A crew leaded by  event planners, professional guides, local hosts, distinguished chefs, regional artists, reservations and operations team and logistics personnel.

Name: ANA Holiday Inn Resort Karuizawa
Description: Opening this fall, ANA Holiday Inn Resort Karuizawa is a serene all-season retreat in North Karuizawa, surrounded by nature with ski slopes and golf courses just moments away. Whether with family or friends, guests can enjoy their own pace—relaxing in natural hot springs, savoring seasonal cuisine, or exploring outdoor activities. This is a place to recharge both body and mind in a casual yet refined setting, where comfort and the beauty of nature come together.

Name: Sentido Apollo Palace Corfu
Description:
SENTIDO Apollo Palace is a family-friendly & couples friendly hotel built in the style of a Corfiot village. The hotel is located at the edge of the fishing village of Messonghi, just a few steps away from the beach and numerous cozy tavernas. Here you stay in modern and stylish rooms, in alavish garden filled with old olive-trees, a chapel, 3 bars, 2 restaurants, gym, meeting room, SPA.

The outdoor area of Apollo Palace features 3 freshwater pools, 1 entertainment pool 1 families pool – each including 1 kids’ pool – and for our couples a separate adult only pool. The hotel arranges a wide range of sporting activities for everybody, and the youngest guests are welcome to the hotel’s kids’ club, which will make their holiday into an unforgettable experience.

Distance to nearest airport (Corfu): 20 km
Distance to nearest center (Messonghi): 300 m
Distance to Corfu town: 20 km
Distance to nearest beach: 30 m (Messonghi Beach)

Name: BREEZE Hotels
Description:
At Breeze Hotels, we’re redefining hospitality with a bold vision: seamless, self-service stays in the heart of the city — without the unnecessary extras.

Inspired by the modern traveler’s need for simplicity, speed, and comfort, Breeze combines cutting-edge technology with stylish, minimalist design to offer a frictionless hotel experience. No front desk. No waiting lines. Just check in, relax, and explore.

Our concept is designed for urban adventurers, digital nomads, and cost-conscious explorers who value quality, safety, and location — not bells and whistles. With fully digital access, 24/7 support, and smart-room layouts, we keep overhead low and comfort high.

Currently expanding across Norway, Breeze is operated by a passionate team with experience in hospitality, property management, and real estate development. Backed by strong industry partners, we’re building a scalable model for the future of travel.

Follow our journey as we open new properties, push boundaries, and bring a fresh Breeze to the hotel scene.

Description: Saavi Hotels is a chain of boutique hotels and a subsidiary of Saavi Events and Entertainment Pvt. Ltd headquartered at Gurgaon, Incorporated by the founder himself, Mr Deepak Dangi. As of now, Saavi group operates a total of 7 plus hotels & resorts across India .we ensure that we will provide best services to our guest also offer, tour desk, wake-up service and many more facilities that make more than just a comfortable stay. Incorporating business facilities like wireless internet access, comfortable furnishing and well trained staff for assistance, Saavi hotels well-suited for corporate as well as leisure travelers.

Name: Suatis Resort Kazbegi
Description:
Suatis Resort Kazbegi is Located in mountainous Kazbegi, in the village of Achkhoti.
Suatis is a 4460m glacier in Kazbegi. The hotel bears its name and architecturally repeats the shapes of the Glacier.

Suatis Resort Kazbegi combines 40 rooms, 2 Restaurants, a Bar, a Conference room, Sauna, Jacuzzi, a Massage room, a Game room, and Gym.

The hotel will soon have a horse stable, a swimming pool, and a tasting area.

Name: Parsian Ali-Qapu Hotel | هتل پارسیان عالی قاپو
Description:
هتل پارسیان عالی قاپو در مرکز شهر اصفهان، پایتخت فرهنگ و تمدن ایران ، در گذرگاه گردشگری چهارباغ عباسی و در مجاورت چندین جاذبه گردشگری اصفهان واقع شده است.

هتل پارسیان عالی قاپو در سال 1345 تأسیس و در مرحله دوم بهرهبرداری در سال 1355 به تعداد اتاق های آن اضافه گردید.در حال حاضر این هتل با 106 باب اتاق استاندارد و سوئیت پذیرای میهمانان گرامی می باشد.خاطر نشان میگردد این هتل با امکانات رفاهی مناسب نظیر استخر ، سونای خشک ، سونای بخار ، لاندری(خدمات خشک شویی) ، کافی شاپ ، روم سرویس 24 ساعته و رستوران های ایرانی سنتی ،ایتالیایی تجهیز و با چشمانداز چهارباغ عباسی اقامتی دلنشین را برای تمامی گردشگران و میهمانان مهیا میکند.

Description:
Déjese sorprender en este elegante y acogedor hotel en el centro de la cosmopolita ciudad de Barcelona. El Hotel Sant Pau se encuentra frente al conjunto arquitectónico del Hospital Sant Pau. Se trata de un hotel de referencia en la Ciudad Condal.

El hotel cuenta con 95 habitaciones acogedoras con Wi-Fi y con vistas al emblemático edificio modernista del Hospital Sant Pau. 18 de ellas disponen de terraza-solárium situadas en el ático y sobreático desde donde podrá apreciar las maravillosas vistas de Barcelona.

En el mismo edificio podrá encontrar aparcamiento, salas polivalentes para reuniones, cafetería y restaurante en donde probar nuestros deliciosos menús con recetas mediterráneas y desayunos bufet.

Relájese en un ambiente distendido y agradable.

Rest and Recharge in Comfort
Each of our spacious rooms are equipped with refrigerators, microwaves and Keurig coffee makers. Our bathrooms feature hairdryers, LED backlit vanity mirrors and signature Bath and Body Works amenities. Each room is equipped with 50-inch HD LED televisions as well as IHOME alarm clocks.

Name: Hotel Saxkjobing
Description:
Er du klar til en tur tilbage i tiden? På Hotel Saxkjøbing får du nemlig ikke bare moderne mødefaciliteter - du får også historisk charme og sjæl med i købet! Vores bygning emmer af nostalgi og fortællinger, der vil sætte gang i din fantasi og inspirere dig på nye måder.

Men bare fordi vi har rødder tilbage i 1800-tallet, betyder det ikke, at vores faciliteter er forældede. Tværtimod! Vi har alt, hvad du skal bruge til et vellykket kursus, en konference eller et møde - og så lidt til. Vi har lyse konferencerum, åbne stuer og en teatersal, der kan rumme op til 150 gæster. Og hvis du har brug for en kreativ pusterum i løbet af dagen, så kan vi også byde på en gastronomisk teamevent med vores egne kokke. Det er ikke hver dag, du kan sige, at du har lavet mad med et stjerne-køkken!

Men det er ikke kun vores faciliteter, der gør os til noget særligt. Det er også vores service og gastronomi. Vi går op i, at du føler dig godt tilpas og har alt, hvad du har brug for. Og når det kommer til mad, så kan vi love dig, at du ikke bliver skuffet. Vores restaurant byder på sublime madoplevelser, der vil få dine smagsløg til at danse!

Name: Act10n Training Project (Erasmus+ VET)
Description:
This European VET project develops a practical training programme to help staff in the Hospitality, Restaurant and Catering (HORECA) sector prevent, manage, and eliminate violence in the workplace.
The programme uses short, 10-minute learning sessions designed to fit into the busy schedules of HORECA professionals.
By combining awareness-raising, conflict management techniques, and practical scenarios, the project supports safer, more respectful and inclusive working environments across Europe.

Name: The Chancellor on Currie
Description:
Where Neo-Georgian architecture sets the scene for a charming boutique hotel experience right in Adelaide's CBD. You'll find us tucked away at the corner of Gilbert Place and Currie Street, offering a 64-room haven that beautifully blends history with modern comforts.

Get ready to dive into Adelaide's vibrant story. We're right in the midst of it all, surrounded by Gilbert Place, Leigh Street, and Peel Street. This is where the heart of the city beats- with local produce, art, and a true sense of community.

Hungry for more? Our prime location means you're a stone's throw from the food scene on Leigh and Peel Streets. And when wanderlust strikes, set off for Adelaide Oval, Botanic Gardens, and Adelaide Zoo. But that's not all – there's culinary magic waiting for you at Maison Clement, our French Bistro on the ground floor in the lobby.

As soon as you step into our lobby, you'll feel the classic elegance welcoming you in. Our dedicated staff will make you feel like you belong, helping you forge connections and create cherished memories in our cosy atmosphere. And wait until you see our rooms – freshly refubished to combine modern tranquillity with timeless style, they're spacious enough to make you feel right at home and designed with tranquillity and style in mind.

Our European allure is about more than our style! Maison Clement's delectable dishes will take you on a flavour-filled adventure that knows no borders. Need a break? Our modern amenities, including a heated pool, spa, gym, and Wi-Fi, have you covered, letting you stay connected while you explore all that Adelaide has to offer.

Elevate your Adelaide getaway at The Chancellor on Currie. Immerse yourself in comfort and sophistication, whether you're here for business or leisure. We're your portal to Adelaide's captivating allure, ready to make your stay something truly memorable.

Name: Thamel Villa Heritage Hotel
Description: Welcome to Thamel Villa Heritage Hotel, a serene and boutique heritage hotel located in the heart of Kathmandu's tourist district - Thamel. We offer authentic Nepalese hospitality in this restored Victorian-style building that originally belonged to Bahadur Sumshere Rana and later to the iron-man of nepali politics, Ganesh Man Singh.

Name: Hotel | Appartementen Hoeve de Plei
Description:
Hoeve de Plei ligt in het landelijke Mechelen in Zuid-Limburg op iets meer dan 20 minuten rijden van het historische centrum van Maastricht en 15 minuten van de Duitse stad Aken. De gerestaureerde vakwerkboerderij stamt uit 1740 en is aangesloten bij Erfgoed logies.

Het is bijzondere plek. Met veel respect en liefde voor de geschiedenis noemen we onze hoeve ook wel ‘de oude dame’. Historie en modern comfort hier hand in hand. In ons kleinschalige, romantische en gezellige hotel, slaap je tussen de eeuwenoude balken, terwijl je geniet van alle gemakken en comfortable Hästens bedden. Naast hotelkamers beschikken we over moderne 2 appartementen met eigen parkeerplaats. 

Of  je nu op zoek bent naar een ontsnapping aan de drukte, een sportief weekendje, een romantische midweek of een inspirerende locatie voor balans en bezinning, je voelt je thuis bij Hoeve de Plei, waar elke hoek een verhaal vertelt en waar gastvrijheid geen loze kreet is. 

Neem gerust contact met op voor verdere informatie of om je kamer of appartement te reserveren. 

Namens het hele team: adië, tot binnenkort!
Hotel | Appartementen Hoeve de Plei
www.hoevedeplei.nl
mail@hoevedeplei.nl
+ 31 43 4551294

Name: Cambria Hotel Fort Worth-Medical Center
Description:
Discover a bold new stay in the heart of Fort Worth at the Cambria Hotel Fort Worth – Medical Center, where contemporary design meets authentic Texas flair. Located just minutes from the Cultural District, TCU, and Downtown’s Sundance Square, our boutique-inspired hotel blends local character with modern sophistication.

Unwind in tech-forward guest rooms featuring luxe bathrooms with Bluetooth mirrors, spa-quality amenities, and plush bedding designed for peak comfort. Savor locally inspired cuisine, craft cocktails, and bold flavors at The Trackhouse restaurant, or explore Fort Worth’s legendary dining and nightlife just beyond our doors.

Whether you’re here for business, a concert at Dickies Arena, or a weekend of discovery, our pet-friendly accommodations, fully equipped fitness center, and flexible meeting space make every stay effortless and memorable. At Cambria Fort Worth, contemporary comfort and classic Cowtown spirit come together in perfect harmony.

Name: Araz Hotel
Description:
Araz Hotel is a five-star hospitality landmark in northern Iran, offering an exceptional blend of modern luxury, Persian elegance, and world-class service.
As one of the newest and largest hotels in the country, Araz Hotel redefines the concept of contemporary hospitality through its commitment to excellence, innovation, and guest satisfaction.

Featuring over 500 rooms and suites, premium restaurants, and state-of-the-art facilities for business and leisure, Araz Hotel stands as a symbol of refined comfort and operational excellence.
Our management is focused on implementing global standards in hospitality, digital transformation, and guest experience, establishing Araz Hotel as a benchmark for the new generation of Iranian hospitality.

Name: RS HOSPITALITY
Description:

Notre collection de 6 établissements d’exception vous invite à vivre des expériences uniques, alliant luxe accessible, authenticité marocaine et hospitalité raffinée. Du majestueux RS KARAM PALACE aux bivouacs écologiques de l’OUED NOUJOUM ECOLODGE, chaque adresse possède sa propre identité tout en partageant notre engagement pour un service personnalisé et une immersion totale dans la culture marocaine. Idéalement situés aux portes du désert, nos établissements sont votre point de départ privilégié pour explorer les merveilles de cette région fascinante, des kasbahs ancestrales aux paysages spectaculaires du Sahara.

Name: The Palms Hotel
Description:
The Palms Hotel
Modern Hospitality, Rich Heritage

Welcome to The Palms Hotel, a contemporary oasis on the A127 near M25 Junction 29, just 16 miles from London’s heart. Our newly renovated hotel combines sophisticated design with comfort and functionality, creating an ideal setting for the discerning traveller. Since opening as the Fairlanes Motel in 1971, The Palms Hotel has transformed, spending time as a Hilton property before embracing our unique identity, each phase bringing us closer to our mission of delivering an exceptional guest experience.

In our latest renovation, every detail was carefully crafted to provide a fresh, modern ambience that’s both stylish and welcoming. From beautifully appointed rooms to state-of-the-art amenities, The Palms Hotel promises a stay that blends contemporary elegance with unmatched convenience. Our commitment to excellence extends to every corner of the hotel, from luxurious accommodations and diverse dining options to personalised outdoor catering and versatile event spaces designed for weddings, ceremonies, and corporate events. With a rich legacy of hospitality, a prime location just outside London, and a dedication to quality, The Palms Hotel is the perfect choice for both business and leisure travellers seeking a memorable experience. Discover where modern design meets decades of tradition, and let us make your stay exceptional.

Name: Torremayor Hoteles & Apart
Description:
Bienvenidos a Hoteles Torremayor, donde la calidez de nuestra hospitalidad, el servicio atento y los alojamientos confortables se combinan con la auténtica cocina italiana para ofrecer una experiencia inigualable. Situados en las zonas más exclusivas y solicitadas de Santiago, Chile, nuestros hoteles proporcionan un refugio de elegancia y comodidad tanto para viajeros de negocios como de ocio.

Nuestra colección de hoteles incluye Hotel Torremayor Lyon y Hotel Torremayor Providencia, ambos ubicados en el vibrante barrio de Providencia, así como Núcleomayor Apart en el innovador Núcleo Los Trapenses. Cada uno de nuestros establecimientos está diseñado para elevar la experiencia de viaje, proporcionando a nuestros huéspedes el ambiente perfecto para relajarse y disfrutar de su estancia en la cosmopolita capital de Chile.

Hotel Torremayor Lyon se distingue por su estilo clásico y su proximidad a importantes centros culturales y comerciales. Es ideal para quienes buscan un entorno tranquilo y bien ubicado. Por otro lado, Hotel Torremayor Providencia, con su decoración moderna y sofisticada, se encuentra a pocos minutos de parques urbanos y restaurantes de primer nivel, ofreciendo una combinación perfecta de conveniencia y confort.

Núcleomayor Apart, situado en el corazón de Los Trapenses, ofrece una solución integral para estancias largas, medias y cortas, con departamentos de diseño vanguardista y tecnología avanzada. Este apart hotel es un espacio multipropósito donde nuestros clientes pueden trabajar, descansar y disfrutar de diversas actividades sin necesidad de desplazarse.

En Hoteles Torremayor, nos enorgullece ofrecer una experiencia que va más allá del alojamiento. Nuestro compromiso con la calidad de vida y el bienestar de nuestros huéspedes se refleja en cada detalle, desde el diseño de nuestras habitaciones hasta la amabilidad de nuestro personal. Creemos en crear un ambiente acogedor y elegante donde cada huésped se sienta valorado y cuidado.

Name: Maritim Hotell & Krog
Description:
Maritim Hotell & Krog - Kustcharm med gastronomisk förankring

I hjärtat av Simrishamn på vackra Österlen hittar du Maritim Hotell & Krog – en anrik destination där skånsk gästfrihet möter maritim charm. Hotellets svårslagna läge vid hamnen bjuder på en perfekt utsikt och en doft av hav. 

Oavsett om det gäller en romantisk weekend eller en avkopplande getaway så är Maritim ett säkert kort för dig som söker en vistelse i en av Sveriges mest pittoreska kuststäder.

Name: Lume Capsule Hotels
Description: At Lume, we believe great stays are regenerative. Where outdated, overlooked buildings are transformed into serene, sustainable sanctuaries. Where architecture heals, materials matter, and space invites renewal. Where guests will rest and restore.

Description: Atop a dune hill in the seaside village of Noordwijk lies Benedict, a boutique retreat of high-end private apartments to make your own. Bring your loved ones and a good book, Benedict will take care of everything else.

Name: Duomo Hotel
Description: A model of architecture and interior design, Hotel duoMo is a hotel project by famous Israeli architect Ron Arad that has still not been equalled. Futuristic, vaguely provocative, it is an amazing space that plays on optical illusions, distortions and perceptions both material and aquatic. Alternative materials such as Corian, stainless steel, PVC, bronze and teak are moulded into unusual shapes far from what you would normally expect. Colour, in its most intense and optical variations, becomes a code and a guide through the three floors of the building and even in the 43 rooms. duoMo is a place where you can flee conventions and enter into a new dimension of freedom and experimentation, where even sleep is an Experience. Nestled among the buildings of Rimini’s historic centre, it stands out with its beautiful facade covered in bronze, which continues inside with deliberate continuity, and is now the place to be during Rimini’s long nights.

Name: Kåseberga Hideout
Description: Kåseberga Hideout offers exclusive and tailor-made meetings, dinners, workshops, seminars and conferences in a unique environment a stone's throw from Ale's stones in Österlen in Skåne. A beautiful converted barn from 1880 houses four fully equipped boutique apartments with sixteen beds, a Vanlife Outdoor shop and an intimate garden cafe with wood-fired grills. In the store, we arrange meetings, dinners and workshops for up to sixteen people. And in a surrounding scenic environment, we organize adventures in, among other things, hiking, cycling, surfing and paragliding.

Name: Aloft Dallas Arlington South
Description: Celebrate your style at Aloft Dallas Arlington, a pet-friendly, brand-new hotel close to Arlington Highlands, Grand Prairie Premium Outlets, AT&T Stadium and Globe Life Field. Our location provides quick access to both downtown Dallas and Fort Worth. At Aloft Dallas Arlington, you'll find there's more than a great night's sleep. Meet and mingle with light bites and unique cocktails at W XYZ bar. Enjoy drinks and a game of pool at Re:mix Lounge. For breakfast or after hours, grab a snack from Re:fuel by Aloft, our 24/7 pantry, and stay connected with complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi. Experience a retreat in the warmth of our spacious urban loft-like hotel rooms, featuring ultra-comfortable signature beds, walk-in showers, and flat-screen TVs. Our Tactic meeting space is 750 square feet where you’ll find the latest in technology for your next meeting.  Re:charge in our 24-hour fitness center, jump into our outdoor pool, Splash, or relax in The Backyard. Get ready. Jump in and revive.

Name: weekend Sari Hotel
Description:
فندق ويك أند صاري هو أحد أفضل الفنادق في جدة، يقع في موقع مثالي في حي السلامة، على بُعد 5 دقائق سيرًا على الأقدام من أماكن التسوق في شارع المدينة المنورة.
بموقع استراتيجي ممتاز يبعد فندق ويك أند مسافة قصيرة بالسيارة على بُعد 5 دقائق عن مطار الملك عبد العزيز الدولي وجدة التاريخية. ويُعتبر هذا الموقع المثالي نقطة البداية المثالية لاستكشاف المدينة والاستمتاع بالأماكن السياحية وأنشطة التسوق المتنوعة المتاحة في المنطقة.

يوفر فندق ويك أند تجربة استثنائية لنزلائه من خلال:
غرف فسيحة مع تلفزيونات ذات شاشات مسطحة لضمان شعورك بالراحة والرفاهية.
مكتب استقبال يعمل على مدار 24 ساعة لضمان راحتك وتلبية احتياجاتك.
إنترنت واي فاي مجاني في اللوبي لتبقى متصل في أثناء إقامتك.
مواقف للسيارات الخاصة مجاناً.
القرب من أماكن التسوق في شارع المدينة المنورة لتكون بالقرب من كل ما تريد.
يقع فندق ويك أند على بُعد 5 دقائق فقط بالسيارة من جدة التاريخية.

يقع فندق ويك أند صاري بالقرب من:
متحف مدينة الطيبات للحضارات العالمية - 1.2 كم.
متحف عبد الرؤوف خليل - 2.3 كم.
N2 مول - 2.3 كم.
روائع المكتبات - 2.4 كم.

Name: Lake Victoria Hotel Entebbe
Description:
Lake Victoria Hotel talks with everyone from, frequent travellers to the busy family that can only get away for vacation every couple of years.

Lake Victoria Hotel became operational in 1948 during the colonial time under Governor Cohen who lived in the current State House. This place had been designed to be his recreational center. He named it Lake Victoria Hotel, after the lake which was also named after the Queen of England, Queen Victoria. On her visit to Uganda in 1958, The Queen of England resided in this Hotel.

Lake Victoria Hotel offers accommodations in Entebbe. The hotel has an outdoor pool and sun terrace, and guests can enjoy a meal at the restaurant or a drink at the bar. Free WiFi is available throughout the property and private parking is available on site. Certain rooms have views of the pool or garden. A flat-screen TV with satellite channels is featured. There is free shuttle service and shops at the property. The nearest airport is Entebbe International Airport, 3.1 km from Lake Victoria Hotel.

Name: Archipelago Resort
Description:
“Baía do Paraíso—Bay of Paradise”—Archipelago Resort is situated six kilometres south of the small coastal town of Vilanculos. The town is full of friendly people. It has a lively atmosphere and offers the perfect location from which to explore the picturesque Bazaruto Archipelago and the Bazaruto National Park. The marine reserve includes five islands – Santa Carolina (also known as Paradise Island), Bazaruto, Benguerra, Magaruque and Bangue. The Archipelago boasts some of the finest snorkeling, diving, and big game fishing experiences in the world. With their untouched natural beauty and diverse ecosystems, these islands are a true paradise. The coral reefs teem with a vibrant array of tropical fish and turtles, making them some of the most memorable snorkelling spots in the world. Take a moment to relax on your balcony, where the breathtaking view of the ever-changing tidal vistas and distant islands sets the perfect backdrop for romantic sunrises and sunsets.

We are the ideal resort for families, large groups and events and we are delighted to have you as our guest at Archipelago Resort. Whether you are here to explore a variety of activities or simply to unwind and recharge, we hope your stay leaves you with countless joyful memories while exploring the Bazaruto Archipelago. 

In this Guest Information Guide, you will find important details about the services and amenities available both within the resort and in the beautiful area of Vilanculos.

If you need any assistance during your stay, please don’t hesitate to stop by the Reception. We look forward to making your experience at Archipelago Resort truly exceptional.

Name: Planeta Sano Eco-Lodge
Description:
Planeta Sano Eco Lodge for sustainable living based on our 3-acre in Manuel Antonio. The Lodge has all the amenities of an ocean-view hotel plus many sites for holding classes, conferences, yoga and pilates courses, farmer’s markets, and other activities that promote sustainable living. We have a full acre of the primary rainforest with trails in the National park's biological corridor. We have scarlet macaws, 3 types of monkeys, sloths, and all types of wildlife normally seen in the park living in our midst.
We become self-sustaining through a process of moving to a more off-grid, low-energy consumption model. We do not use electric dryers except in case of emergency and have installed fans to lower consumption. We also have the plan to retrofit our water heating system so we can put it on solar power. We also collect rainwater and use the minimum gas and electricity consumption through new processes and practices that are less energy-consuming. We hope to be a model to go off-grid over time and show other businesses how to do so as well.
Everything in the ecolodge is sourced locally, the furniture was built locally and everything is purchased locally. We recycle, reuse and repurpose here. Our goal is always conservation, low consumption, and making a minimal footprint.

Name: Hotel Nicolaas Witsen

In mei 2023 hebben we onze deuren weer geopend.

Onze renovatie heeft ons in staat gesteld om onze kamers te voorzien van moderne faciliteiten en stijlvolle boetiek inrichting, terwijl we tegelijkertijd onze toewijding aan duurzaamheid hebben verbeterd. We zijn er trots op dat we onze gasten een comfortabel en milieuvriendelijk verblijf kunnen bieden.

Onze gezellige bar en lobby zijn ook volledig vernieuwd, waardoor deze nu nog gezelliger en uitnodigend is. Hier kunt u ontspannen en genieten van een drankje, terwijl u zich thuis voelt in onze huiselijke sfeer.

We zijn erg enthousiast om onze gasten weer te mogen verwelkomen en hun een onvergetelijk verblijf te bieden in ons vernieuwde hotel. Of u nu naar Amsterdam komt voor zaken of plezier, ons hotel is de perfecte keuze voor iedereen die op zoek is naar een duurzame, boetiekervaring in het centrum van de stad.

Name: Kochattante Kolayi
Description:
Kochattante Kolayi (KOKO) is a regenerative rural tourism initiative rooted in Kerala’s first book village, Pusthakagramam Perumkulam. It blends ecological restoration, cultural storytelling, and community-led design to offer a timeless Kerala experience.

Still in the making, KOKO is not a destination but an evolving experience. Guided by the imagined village elder Kochattan, the project seeks to rekindle the spirit of rural Kerala — where the land listens, traditions linger, and stories find their way back home.

We are not building fast. We are building with care — through community, ecology, and design — reimagining tourism as a gentle unfolding of place and purpose.

Vision  
To place Perumkulam on the global tourism map — not through spectacle, but through care, culture, and connection.

In progress
•	Land restoration and ecological revival: paddy fields, ponds, native trees.
•	Character-led storytelling, with Kochattan as the voice of the village.
•	Quiet, immersive visitor experiences rooted in everyday village life.
•	Community collaboration and local skill revival.
•	Identity and experience design by Satva Design.

Founder  
Prakash Varma — Creative Strategist and Founder of Satva Design, driven by rooted storytelling, slow design, and community-centered impact.

Name: HotelBFF
Description:
Sustainability isn't just a buzzword—it’s the future of hospitality. But where do you start?

Meet HotelBFF, your digital companion on the journey to GSTC (Global Sustainable Tourism Council) Certification. We believe that saving the planet should also mean building a better, more profitable hotel business. That’s why we’ve built a platform that takes the confusion out of compliance and helps you put your Best Foot Forward.

What We Do: We bridge the gap between "wanting to be sustainable" and "becoming certified." Our 5-step digital platform guides hotels through every stage of the process:

1. Ascertain: A free self-evaluation tool to see where you stand against GSTC criteria.

2. Train: Engaging video training for your staff to close knowledge gaps.

3. Obtain: A zero-commission marketplace connecting you with eco-friendly suppliers.

4. Attain: Pre-audit guidance, templates, and documentation to get you certification ready.

5. Maintain: Carbon monitoring tools to track your long-term impact.
Whether you are a boutique hotel or a large chain, we are with you every step of the way.

Our Mission: To demystify sustainability for hoteliers and provide the tools, training, and community needed to achieve the highest global standard of certification.
